Existing solutions typically rely either on heavy visual reflection, which incurs high inference cost yet yields limited gains; or on fine-tuning with large-scale datasets, which still provides weak and indirect aesthetic supervision. In contrast, the explicit use of aesthetic principles as supervision remains unexplored. In this work, we present AeSlides, a reinforcement learning framework with verifiable rewards for Aesthetic layout supervision in Slide generation. We introduce a suite of meticulously designed verifiable metrics to quantify slide layout quality, capturing key layout issues in an accurate, efficient, and low-cost manner. Leveraging these verifiable metrics, we develop a GRPO-based reinforcement learning method that directly optimizes slide generation models for aesthetically coherent layouts. With only 5K training prompts on GLM-4.7-Flash, AeSlides improves aspect ratio compliance from 36% to 85%, while reducing whitespace by 44%, element collisions by 43%, and visual imbalance by 28%. Human evaluation further shows a substantial improvement in overall quality, increasing scores from 3.31 to 3.56 (+7.6%), outperforming both model-based reward optimization and reflection-based agentic approaches, and even edging out Claude-Sonnet-4.5. These results demonstrate that such a verifiable aesthetic paradigm provides an efficient and scalable approach to aligning slide generation with human aesthetic preferences. Our repository is available at https://github.com/ympan0508/aeslides.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AeSlides，一个基于可验证奖励的强化学习框架，用于幻灯片生成中的美学布局优化。通过设计一系列可验证的度量指标（如纵横比、空白区域、元素碰撞等），结合GRPO强化学习方法，直接优化生成模型的美学布局，仅用5K训练数据即在多个指标上取得显著提升，甚至超越Claude-Sonnet-4.5。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在幻灯片生成中存在文本生成与视觉美感之间的模态鸿沟，生成内容在排版美学上表现不佳。已有方法（如视觉反思、微调）成本高、收益有限或缺乏直接的美学监督，亟需一种高效、可扩展且直接优化美学布局的方法。
AI.method: 设计一套可验证的布局质量度量指标（纵横比合规、空白区域、元素碰撞、视觉不平衡等），并基于GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）强化学习框架，利用这些可验证奖励直接优化幻灯片生成模型（基于GLM-4.7-Flash）。
AI.result: 仅用5K训练提示，纵横比合规从36%提升至85%，空白区域减少44%，元素碰撞减少43%，视觉不平衡减少28%。人工评估总体质量从3.31提升至3.56（+7.6%），超越基于模型奖励的优化和反思型智能体方法，甚至略优于Claude-Sonnet-4.5。
AI.conclusion: 可验证的美学奖励范式为幻灯片生成与人类审美偏好对齐提供了一种高效、可扩展的方法，验证了在生成任务中直接应用美学原则进行监督的有效性。

title: Score-Repellent Monte Carlo: Toward Efficient Non-Markovian Sampler with Constant Memory in General State Spaces
summary: History-dependent sampling can reduce long-run Monte Carlo variance by discouraging redundant revisits, but existing schemes typically encode history through empirical measure on finite state spaces, which is infeasible in high-dimensional discrete configuration spaces or ill-posed in continuous domains. We propose Score-Repellent Monte Carlo (SRMC) framework that summarizes trajectory history by a running average of score evaluations in $R^d$, where $d$ is the dimension of the score and state representation. This history is converted into a surrogate target through an exponential score tilt, indexed with $α$ that represents the strength of repellence in controlling the magnitude of the history-based repulsion. The surrogate family is normalization-free in the standard MCMC sense, yielding a generic wrapper: at each iteration, any base kernel targeting $π$ can instead be run on the current surrogate $π_{θ_n}$ while the history is updated online. We analyze the coupled evolution of the history recursion and Monte Carlo estimators using stochastic approximation with controlled Markovian noise, establishing almost sure convergence and a joint central limit theorem. We further identify regimes in which the asymptotic covariance decreases as $α$ increases, with scaling $O(1/α)$, extending the near-zero-variance effect of finite-state history-dependent samplers to general state spaces with constant memory. Experiments on continuous targets and discrete energy-based models demonstrate improved estimator variance and mode coverage, while retaining $O(d)$ memory usage and modest per-iteration overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出Score-Repellent Monte Carlo (SRMC)框架，通过历史轨迹的分数平均值构造排斥势能，在连续和高维离散空间中实现历史依赖采样，降低蒙特卡洛方差，并在O(d)内存下实现近零方差效应。
AI.motivation: 现有历史依赖采样方法依赖有限状态空间的经验测度，无法处理高维离散配置空间或连续域。本文希望将历史依赖采样的方差缩减优势推广到更一般的状态空间。
AI.method: 提出SRMC框架，用分数评估的运行平均值编码轨迹历史，通过指数分数倾斜构造替代目标分布（排斥势能）。在每个迭代中，基础MCMC核在当前替代目标上运行，同时在线更新历史。利用随机逼近和受控马尔可夫噪声分析耦合演化过程。
AI.result: 建立了几乎必然收敛性和联合中心极限定理；证明了在特定参数范围内，渐近协方差随排斥强度α增加而降低，达到O(1/α)缩放。实验表明，在连续目标和离散能量基模型上，估计量方差和模式覆盖均有改进，且保持O(d)内存和适度每轮开销。
AI.conclusion: SRMC将历史依赖采样的近零方差效应从有限状态空间推广到一般状态空间，在保持恒定内存的同时实现方差缩减，为高维MCMC提供了一种通用且高效的包装框架。

title: AI Identity: Standards, Gaps, and Research Directions for AI Agents
summary: AI agents are now running real transactions, workflows, and sub-agent chains across organizational boundaries without continuous human supervision. This creates a problem no current infrastructure is equipped to solve: how do you identify, verify, and hold accountable an entity with no body, no persistent memory, and no legal standing? We define AI Identity as the continuous relationship between what an AI agent is declared to be and what it is observed to do, bounded by the confidence that those two things correspond at any given moment. Through a structured survey of industry trends, emerging standards, and technical literature, we conduct a gap analysis across the full agent identity lifecycle and make three contributions: (1) a structural comparison of human and AI identity across four dimensions (substrate, persistence, verifiability, and legal standing) showing that the asymmetry is fundamental and that extending human frameworks to agents without structural modification produces systematic failures; (2) an evaluation of current technical and regulatory documents against the identity requirements of autonomous agents, finding that none adequately address the challenge of governing nondeterministic, boundary-crossing entities; and (3) identification of five critical gaps (semantic intent verification, recursive delegation accountability, agent identity integrity, governance opacity and enforcement, and operational sustainability) that no current technology or regulatory instrument resolves. These gaps are structural; more engineering effort alone will not close them. Foundational research on AI identity is the central conclusion of this report.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了AI智能体在缺乏人类持续监督下运行时面临的身份问题，指出现有基础设施无法解决无实体、无持久记忆、无法人身份的AI身份识别、验证和问责问题。通过对比人类与AI身份的四维差异，评估现有技术和监管文件，识别出五个关键缺口，认为仅靠工程努力无法解决，需要进行AI身份的基础性研究。
AI.motivation: AI智能体正在跨组织边界执行真实交易和工作流，且无需人类持续监督，但现有基础设施无法解决如何识别、验证和问责一个没有实体、没有持久记忆、没有法律地位的实体，因此亟需定义和研究AI身份问题。
AI.method: 通过结构化调查行业趋势、新兴标准和技术文献，对人类与AI身份进行四维对比分析（基质、持久性、可验证性、法律地位），并评估现有技术和监管文件对自主智能体身份需求的覆盖情况。
AI.result: 发现人类身份框架无法直接适用于AI智能体；现有技术和监管文件未能充分解决非确定性、跨边界实体的治理问题；识别出五个关键缺口：语义意图验证、递归委派问责、智能体身份完整性、治理不透明与执行、运营可持续性。
AI.conclusion: 这些缺口是结构性的，仅靠工程努力无法解决，需要进行关于AI身份的基础性研究。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models on Computer Science University Exams in Data Structures
summary: We present a comprehensive evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) on Computer Science (CS) Data Structure examination questions. Our work introduces a new benchmark dataset comprising exam questions from Tel Aviv University (TAU), curated to assess LLMs' abilities in handling closed and multiple-choice questions. We evaluated the performance of OpenAI's GPT 4o and Anthropic's Claude 3.5, popular LLMs, alongside two smaller LLMs, Mathstral 7B and LLaMA 3 8B, across the TAU exams benchmark. Our findings provide insight into the current capabilities of LLMs in CS education.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了GPT-4o、Claude 3.5、Mathstral 7B和LLaMA 3 8B在特拉维夫大学计算机科学数据结构考试题目上的表现，构建了一个新的基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 评估LLMs在计算机科学教育中的能力，特别是在数据结构考试题目上的表现，为教育应用提供参考。
AI.method: 构建了来自特拉维夫大学(TAU)的数据结构考试题目基准数据集，包含闭卷和多项选择题；测试了4个LLM（GPT-4o、Claude 3.5、Mathstral 7B、LLaMA 3 8B）的表现。
AI.result: 提供了这些LLMs在CS数据结构考试中的性能对比结果，揭示了当前LLMs在CS教育中的能力边界。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在CS数据结构考试中表现出一定能力，但仍有提升空间。

title: ATTN-FIQA: Interpretable Attention-based Face Image Quality Assessment with Vision Transformers
summary: Face Image Quality Assessment (FIQA) aims to assess the recognition utility of face samples and is essential for reliable face recognition (FR) systems. Existing approaches require computationally expensive procedures such as multiple forward passes, backpropagation, or additional training, and only recent work has focused on the use of Vision Transformers. Recent studies highlighted that these architectures inherently function as saliency learners with attention patterns naturally encoding spatial importance. This work proposes ATTN-FIQA, a novel training-free approach that investigates whether pre-softmax attention scores from pre-trained Vision Transformer-based face recognition models can serve as quality indicators. We hypothesize that attention magnitudes intrinsically encode quality: high-quality images with discriminative facial features enable strong query-key alignments producing focused, high-magnitude attention patterns, while degraded images generate diffuse, low-magnitude patterns. ATTN-FIQA extracts pre-softmax attention matrices from the final transformer block, aggregate multi-head attention information across all patches, and compute image-level quality scores through simple averaging, requiring only a single forward pass through pre-trained models without architectural modifications, backpropagation, or additional training. Through comprehensive evaluation across eight benchmark datasets and four FR models, this work demonstrates that attention-based quality scores effectively correlate with face image quality and provide spatial interpretability, revealing which facial regions contribute most to quality determination.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATTN-FIQA，一种无需训练的人脸图像质量评估方法，通过利用预训练Vision Transformer中注意力层的pre-softmax注意力分数作为质量指标，仅需单次前向传播即可完成质量评估。
AI.motivation: 现有FIQA方法计算开销大（需多次前向传播、反向传播或额外训练），且对Vision Transformer的利用不足。作者希望利用ViT自带的注意力模式作为质量指示器，实现高效、无需额外训练的质量评估。
AI.method: 从预训练Vision Transformer人脸识别模型的最后一个Transformer块提取pre-softmax注意力矩阵，聚合所有patches的多头注意力信息，通过简单平均计算图像级质量分数。仅需单次前向传播，无需修改架构、反向传播或额外训练。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集和4个FR模型上的综合评估表明，基于注意力的质量分数与人脸图像质量有效相关，并提供了空间可解释性，能揭示哪些面部区域对质量判断贡献最大。
AI.conclusion: 注意力分数可作为高效、可解释的人脸图像质量评估指标，低开销且无需额外训练。

title: Reward Models Are Secretly Value Functions: Temporally Coherent Reward Modeling
summary: Reward models in RLHF are trained to score only the final token of a response - a choice that discards rich signal from every intermediate position and produces models whose token-level outputs are noise. We argue this is a missed opportunity: a well-trained reward model's output at any token should represent the conditional expectation of the final reward given the response so far. We introduce Temporally Coherent Reward Modeling (TCRM), which induces this property via two regularization terms on top of the standard Bradley-Terry loss, with minimizers provably equal to conditional expectations. The regularizers correspond to Monte Carlo and TD value-learning objectives, establishing a direct connection to RL value functions. TCRM requires zero changes to architecture, data, or inference, yet unlocks three capabilities from one principle: interpretable token-level reward trajectories (middle-token pairwise accuracy improved from 50% to 88.9%, final-token accuracy preserved); state-of-the-art PRM performance on ProcessBench (44.9% average F1) among models trained only on outcome data; and unified reward/value modeling in PPO, reducing peak GPU memory by 27% and step time by 19% with matching LLM quality.

AI.tldr: 提出时间连续奖励建模（TCRM），通过两个正则化项使奖励模型在每个token的输出成为最终奖励的条件期望，无需改动架构/数据/推理，即可实现可解释的token级奖励轨迹、SOTA过程奖励性能以及统一奖励/价值建模降低27%峰值GPU内存和19%步长时间。
AI.motivation: 标准RLHF奖励模型只对最终token打分，丢弃了中间位置的丰富信号，导致token级输出是噪声，错过了利用中间奖励信息的机会。
AI.method: 在标准Bradley-Terry损失基础上加入两个正则化项（Monte Carlo和TD值学习目标），迫使奖励模型每个token的输出等于最终奖励的条件期望，建立与RL值函数的直接联系。
AI.result: 中间token配对准确率从50%提升到88.9%，保留最终token准确率；ProcessBench上平均F1达44.9%（SOTA）；PPO中统一奖励/价值建模减少27%峰值GPU内存和19%步长时间，LLM质量持平。
AI.conclusion: TCRM在不改动架构和数据的情况下，通过简单正则化实现了奖励模型的时间一致性，同时解锁了可解释性、过程奖励和训练效率提升三重能力，建立了奖励建模与RL值函数的理论联系。

title: LEGO: An LLM Skill-Based Front-End Design Generation Platform
summary: Existing LLM-based EDA agents are often isolated task-specific systems. This leads to repeated engineering effort and limited reuse of successful design and debugging strategies. We present LEGO, a unified skill-based platform for front-end design generation. It decomposes the digital front-end flow into six independent steps and represents every agent capability as a standardized composable circuit skill within a plug-and-play architecture. To build this skill library, we survey more than 100 papers, select 11 representative open-source projects, and extract 42 executable circuit skills within a six-step finite state machine formulation. Circuit Skill Builder automates skill extraction with linear scalability. Agent Skill RAG achieves submillisecond retrieval without relying on embedding models. Empirical evaluation on a hard subset of 41 VerilogEval v2 problems that gpt-5.2-codex fails to solve under extra-high reasoning effort shows that individual circuit skills constructed within LEGO raise Pass@1 from 0.000 to 0.805. This is an 80.5% gain over the baseline. Cross-project skill compositions also reach 0.805 Pass@1. They outperform hierarchy-verilog by 14.6% and VerilogCoder by 2.5%. They also match MAGE. These results show that modular skill composition supports both effective and flexible RTL design automation. The LEGO platform and all circuit skills are publicly available at GitHub: https://github.com/loujc/LEGO-An-LLM-Skill-Based-Front-End-Design-Generation-Platform

AI.tldr: LEGO是一个统一的、基于技能的模块化EDA平台，将前端设计流程分解为六个步骤，通过42个可组合电路技能实现RTL设计自动化。在VerilogEval v2难题上，Pass@1从0提升至0.805，超越多个基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的EDA代理多为孤立的、针对特定任务的系统，导致重复工程劳动，成功的设计与调试策略难以复用。作者希望构建一个统一的、可组合的技能平台，打破这一困境。
AI.method: 将数字前端流程分解为六个独立步骤，将每个代理能力表示为标准化、可组合的电路技能，构建即插即用的技能库。通过调研100+论文、选取11个开源项目，提取42个可执行电路技能，并采用六步有限状态机形式化。提出Circuit Skill Builder实现线性可扩展的技能提取，以及Agent Skill RAG实现亚毫秒级检索。
AI.result: 在gpt-5.2-codex无法解决的41个VerilogEval v2难题上，单个电路技能将Pass@1从0提升至0.805。跨项目技能组合也达到0.805 Pass@1，比hierarchy-verilog高14.6%，比VerilogCoder高2.5%，与MAGE持平。
AI.conclusion: 模块化技能组合能够实现高效且灵活的RTL设计自动化，验证了基于技能的模块化架构在EDA领域的有效性和可扩展性。

title: When Chain-of-Thought Fails, the Solution Hides in the Hidden States
summary: Whether intermediate reasoning is computationally useful or merely explanatory depends on whether chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens contain task-relevant information. We present a mechanistic causal analysis of CoT on GSM8K using activation patching: transferring token-level hidden states from a CoT generation to a direct-answer run for the same question, then measuring the effect on final-answer accuracy. Across models, generating after patching yields substantially higher accuracy than both direct-answer prompting and the original CoT trace, revealing that individual CoT tokens can encode sufficient information to recover the correct answer, even when the original trace is incorrect. This task-relevant information is more prevalent in correct than incorrect CoT runs and is unevenly distributed across tokens, concentrating in mid-to-late layers and appearing earlier in the reasoning trace. Moreover, patching language tokens such as verbs and entities carry task-solving information that steers generation toward correct reasoning, whereas mathematical tokens encode answer-proximal content that rarely succeeds. Patched outputs are often shorter and yet exceed the accuracy of a full CoT trace, suggesting complete reasoning chains are not always necessary. Together, these findings demonstrate that CoT encodes recoverable, token-level problem-solving information, offering new insight into how reasoning is represented and where it breaks down.

AI.tldr: 本文通过激活修补（activation patching）的因果分析方法，研究Chain-of-Thought（CoT）推理中各个token是否包含任务相关信息。实验发现：CoT token编码了足够恢复正确答案的信息，即使原始推理链是错误的；这些信息不均匀分布，集中在中间到深层，且语言token（动词、实体）比数学token更有效地引导正确推理；修补后的输出往往更短但准确率更高，说明完整推理链并非总是必要。
AI.motivation: 探究CoT推理的中间步骤是否真正包含任务相关信息，以及这些信息如何分布和作用，从而理解CoT推理的因果机制。
AI.method: 使用激活修补（activation patching）方法，将CoT生成过程中各token的隐状态迁移到直接回答（direct-answer）生成中，量化每个token对最终答案准确率的因果贡献。
AI.result: 1) 修补后的准确率显著高于直接回答和原始CoT；2) 正确CoT的任务相关信息多于错误CoT；3) 信息集中在中间到深层、出现在推理链早期；4) 语言token（动词、实体）携带推理信息，数学token携带答案邻近信息但成功率低；5) 修补输出更短但准确率更高。
AI.conclusion: CoT token编码了可恢复的、token级别的问题解决信息，完整推理链并非总是必要，这为理解CoT如何表示推理以及何处可能失败提供了新见解。

title: EX-FIQA: Leveraging Intermediate Early eXit Representations from Vision Transformers for Face Image Quality Assessment
summary: Face Image Quality Assessment is crucial for reliable face recognition systems, yet existing Vision Transformer-based approaches rely exclusively on final-layer representations, ignoring quality-relevant information captured at intermediate network depths. This paper presents the first comprehensive investigation of how intermediate representations within ViTs contribute to face quality assessment through early exit mechanisms and score fusion strategies. We systematically analyze all twelve transformer blocks of ViT-FIQA architectures, demonstrating that different depths capture distinct and complementary quality-relevant information, as evidenced by varying attention patterns and performance characteristics across network layers. We propose a score fusion framework that combines quality predictions from multiple transformer blocks without architectural modifications or additional training. Our early exit analysis reveals optimal performance-efficiency trade-offs, enabling significant computational savings while maintaining competitive performance. Through extensive evaluation across eight benchmark datasets using four FR models, we demonstrate that our fusion strategy improves upon single-exit approaches. Our proposed quality fusion approach employs depth-weighted averaging that assigns progressively higher importance to deeper transformer blocks, achieving the best quality assessment performance by effectively leveraging the hierarchical nature of feature learning in ViTs. Our work challenges the conventional wisdom that only deep features matter for face analysis, revealing that intermediate representations contain valuable information for quality assessment. The proposed framework offers practical benefits for real-world biometric systems by enabling adaptive computation based on resource constraints while maintaining competitive quality assessment capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究ViT中间层表征对人脸质量评估的贡献，提出基于早期退出和分数融合的质量评估框架，通过深度加权平均融合多个Transformer块的预测结果，在不修改架构或额外训练的情况下提升评估性能，并实现计算效率与性能的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有基于ViT的人脸质量评估方法仅利用最后一层表征，忽略了中间层包含的质量相关信息。本文旨在探究不同深度Transformer块中质量相关信息的分布特性，并利用这些信息提升评估性能。
AI.method: 系统分析了ViT-FIQA架构中全部12个Transformer块的质量相关表征，提出早期退出机制和分数融合框架，采用深度加权平均策略融合多个块的质量预测结果，无需架构修改或额外训练。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集、4种FR模型上的实验表明，融合策略优于单一退出方法，深度加权平均融合达到最佳性能，同时早期退出机制可在保持竞争力的前提下显著节省计算资源。
AI.conclusion: 挑战了"只有深层特征对人脸分析有用"的传统观点，揭示了中间层表征包含有价值的质量评估信息；提出的框架支持根据资源约束进行自适应计算，具有实际部署价值。

title: Collocation-based Robust Physics Informed Neural Networks for time-dependent simulations of pollution propagation under thermal inversion conditions on Spitsbergen
comment: Robust Variational Physics Informed Neural Networks; Pollution propagation simulations; Longyearbyen at Spitsbergen; Advection-diffusion model; In-field measurements; Open source software
summary: In this paper, we propose a Physics-Informed Neural Network framework for time-dependent simulations of pollution propagation originating from moving emission sources. We formulate a robust variational framework for the time-dependent advection-diffusion problem and establish the boundedness and inf-sup stability of the corresponding discrete weak formulation. Based on this mathematical foundation, we construct a robust loss function that is directly related to the true approximation error, defined as the difference between the neural network approximation and the (unknown) exact solution. Additionally, a collocation-based strategy is introduced to speed up neural network training. As a case study, we investigate pollution propagation caused by snowmobile traffic in Longyearbyen, Spitsbergen, supported by detailed in-field measurements collected using dedicated sensors. The proposed framework is applied to analyze the effects of thermal inversion on pollutant accumulation. Our results demonstrate that thermal inversion traps dense and humid air masses near the ground, significantly enhancing particulate matter (PM) concentration and worsening local air quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，用于模拟移动排放源导致的时变污染传播，并以斯匹次卑尔根岛朗伊尔城的雪地摩托车污染为例，分析了热逆温对污染物累积的影响。
AI.motivation: 移动排放源（如雪地摩托车）造成的污染传播模拟具有重要环境意义，但传统数值方法计算成本高；同时热逆温现象对污染物累积的定量影响尚缺乏有效的神经模拟手段。
AI.method: 基于时变对流-扩散问题的变分框架，构建了与真实逼近误差直接相关的鲁棒损失函数，并引入配点策略加速训练；结合实地传感器数据作为案例研究。
AI.result: 热逆温会捕获近地面高湿密气团，显著提升颗粒物（PM）浓度，恶化局地空气质量。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的PINN框架能够有效模拟移动源污染传播，且热逆温是加剧污染的关键气象因素。

title: GSAR: Typed Grounding for Hallucination Detection and Recovery in Multi-Agent LLMs
summary:
Autonomous multi-agent LLM systems are increasingly deployed to investigate operational incidents and produce structured diagnostic reports. Their trustworthiness hinges on whether each claim is grounded in observed evidence rather than model-internal inference. Existing groundedness evaluators (binary classifiers, LLM-as-judge scalars, self-correction loops) treat supporting evidence as interchangeable and emit a single signal that offers no principled control over downstream action.
  We present GSAR, a grounding-evaluation and replanning framework that (i) partitions claims into a four-way typology (grounded, ungrounded, contradicted, complementary), giving first-class standing to non-redundant alternative perspectives; (ii) assigns evidence-type-specific weights reflecting epistemic strength; (iii) computes an asymmetric contradiction-penalised weighted groundedness score; and (iv) couples that score to a three-tier decision function (proceed, regenerate, replan) driving a bounded-iteration outer loop under an explicit compute budget.
  We formalise the algorithm, prove six structural properties, and evaluate five design claims on FEVER with gold Wikipedia evidence under four independently-trained LLM judges (gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-7, gemini-2.5-pro). Every ablation reproduces in the same direction on every judge: bootstrap 95% CIs on the rho=0 effect exclude 0 on all four; the no-complementary ablation under Opus 4.7 has CI [-96,-68] of 200; at n=1000 three independent judges converge to DeltaS(rho=0)=+0.058. A head-to-head against Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open is included. To our knowledge, GSAR is the first published groundedness framework coupling evidence-typed scoring with tiered recovery under an explicit compute budget.

AI.tldr: GSAR 是一个面向多智能体 LLM 系统的接地性评估与重规划框架，它将声明细分为四类（接地、未接地、矛盾、互补），引入加权打分与不对称矛盾惩罚，并耦合三级决策（继续、重新生成、重新规划）在显式计算预算下运行，在 FEVER 数据集上通过独立 LLM 法官验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有接地性评估方法（二元分类器、LLM-as-judge 标量评分、自纠正循环）将所有支撑证据视为可互换的，输出单一信号，无法对下游行为提供原则性的控制，尤其忽略了非冗余替代视角（互补声明）的重要性。
AI.method: GSAR 框架包含：(i) 四类声明分类法；(ii) 基于证据类型的加权；(iii) 不对称矛盾惩罚加权评分；(iv) 三级决策函数驱动有界迭代外循环。算法形式化并证明了六条结构性质。
AI.result: 在 FEVER 数据集上使用四种独立 LLM 法官（gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-7, gemini-2.5-pro）验证。所有消融实验方向一致，bootstrap 95% CI 排除零效应，与 Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open 进行了对比。
AI.conclusion: GSAR 是首个将证据类型化评分与显式计算预算下的分级恢复相结合的接地性评估框架。

title: VeriLLMed: Interactive Visual Debugging of Medical Large Language Models with Knowledge Graphs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in medical diagnosis, but real-world deployment remains challenging due to high-stakes clinical decisions and imperfect reasoning reliability. As a result, careful inspection of model behavior is essential for assessing whether diagnostic reasoning is reliable and clinically grounded. However, debugging medical LLMs remains difficult. First, developers often lack sufficient medical domain expertise to interpret model errors in clinically meaningful terms. Second, models can fail across a large and diverse set of instances involving different input types, tasks, and reasoning steps, making it challenging for developers to prioritize which errors deserve focused inspection. Third, developers struggle to identify recurring error patterns across cases, as existing debugging practices are largely instance-centric and rely on manual inspection of isolated failures. To address these challenges, we present VeriLLMed, a visual analytics system that integrates external biomedical knowledge to audit and debug medical LLM diagnostic reasoning. VeriLLMed transforms model outputs into comparable reasoning paths, constructs knowledge graph-grounded reference paths, and identifies three recurring classes of diagnosis errors: relation errors, branch errors, and missing errors. Case studies and expert evaluation demonstrate that VeriLLMed helps developers identify clinically implausible reasoning and generate actionable insights that can inform the improvement of medical LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出了VeriLLMed，一个集成外部生物医学知识的可视化分析系统，用于审计和调试医学大语言模型的诊断推理，能够将模型输出转化为可比较的推理路径，识别出关系错误、分支错误和缺失错误三类诊断错误。
AI.motivation: 医学LLM在实际部署中面临高风险的临床决策和不完美的推理可靠性，但现有调试方法存在三大挑战：开发者缺乏医学领域知识、错误实例多样难以优先处理、缺乏跨案例的重复错误模式识别。
AI.method: 构建VeriLLMed可视化分析系统，将模型输出转化为可比较推理路径，构建知识图谱引导的参考路径，识别三类诊断错误（关系错误、分支错误、缺失错误）。
AI.result: 案例研究和专家评估表明VeriLLMed能帮助开发者识别临床不可靠的推理，并生成可操作的见解以改进医学LLM。
AI.conclusion: VeriLLMed通过整合外部知识和可视化分析，有效解决了医学LLM调试中的领域知识不足、错误优先级确定和模式识别等关键挑战。

title: Unified Multi-Foundation-Model Slide Representation for Pan-Cancer Recognition and Text-Guided Tumor Localization
summary: The expanding ecosystem of pathology foundation models has produced powerful but fragmented tile-level representations, limiting their use in clinical tasks that require unified slide-level reasoning and interpretable linkage to clinically meaningful information. We present ASTRA, a pan-cancer framework that integrates heterogeneous foundation-model representations into a shared slide-level representation space and semantically grounds that space using structured pathology annotation fields, including classification category, cancer type, and anatomic site. ASTRA combines sparse mixture-of-experts contextualization, masked multi-model reconstruction, and contrastive alignment to structured pathology prompts to learn slide representations that support 4-category classification, 3-class solid tumor typing, 16-class cancer typing, and text-guided tumor localization without pixel-level supervision. Developed on a CHTN cohort of 10,359 whole-slide images (WSIs) spanning 16 tumor types, ASTRA consistently improves pan-cancer classification across four pathology foundation-model backbones, achieving up to 97.8% macro-AUC for 4-category classification, 99.7% for 3-class solid tumor typing, and 99.2% for 16-class cancer typing. For tumor localization, ASTRA achieves a mean Dice of 0.897 on an annotated in-domain CHTN subset (n = 380) spanning 16 cancer types and 0.738 on an external TCGA cohort (n = 1,686) spanning four cancer types. These results demonstrate that minimal structured pathology annotation fields derived from slide-level metadata can provide effective semantic supervision for unified slide representation learning, enabling both pan-cancer prediction and weakly supervised tumor localization within a single framework.

AI.tldr: ASTRA是一个泛癌框架，通过混合专家模型、掩码多模态重建和对比对齐等方法，将异构病理基础模型表征统一到共享的幻灯片级表征空间，实现了多种分类任务和文本引导的肿瘤定位，在多个数据集上取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有病理基础模型产生的是碎片化的tile级表征，缺乏统一的幻灯片级推理能力以及临床可解释的语义链接，限制了临床任务应用。
AI.method: 结合稀疏混合专家(MoE)上下文建模、掩码多模型重建以及结构化病理提示的对比对齐，将异构基础模型表征融合到共享的幻灯片级表征空间。
AI.result: 在4分类任务上达97.8% macro-AUC，3类实体瘤分型99.7%，16类癌症分型99.2%；肿瘤定位在域内数据Dice=0.897，外部TCGA数据Dice=0.738。
AI.conclusion: 来自幻灯片级元数据的最小结构化病理标注字段可以为统一幻灯片表征学习提供有效的语义监督，实现单一框架内的泛癌预测和弱监督肿瘤定位。

title: On-Device Vision Training, Deployment, and Inference on a Thumb-Sized Microcontroller
comment: 25 pages; 3 figures; 3 tables. Code and datasets available at https://github.com/webmcu-ai/on-device-vision-ai. Paper 1 of the webmcu-ai series. Implements end-to-end on-device CNN training and inference on a thumb-sized microcontroller (ESP32-S3) the XIAO ML Kit in ~1,750 lines of single-file C++ without external ML dependencies
summary: This paper presents a complete, end-to-end on-device vision machine learning pipeline, comprising data acquisition, two-layer CNN training with Adam optimization, and real-time inference, executing entirely on a microcontroller-class device costing $15-40 USD. Unlike cloud-based workflows that require external infrastructure and conceal the computational pipeline from the practitioner, this system implements every step of the core ML lifecycle in approximately 1,750 lines of readable C++ that compiles in under one minute using the Arduino IDE, with no external ML dependencies. Running on the Seeed Studio ESP32-S3 XIAO ML Kit (8 MB PSRAM), the firmware achieves three-class 64x64 image classification in approximately 9 minutes per training run, with real-time inference at 6.3 FPS. Key contributions include: correct batch-level gradient accumulation; pre-computed resize lookup tables for inference; dual-format weight export for SD-free baked-in deployment; a three-tier weight priority system (SD binary > baked-in header > He-initialization) resolved automatically at boot; a single-constant network reconfiguration interface; and PSRAM-aware memory management suited to microcontroller constraints. All source code and reference datasets are released under the MIT License at https://github.com/webmcu-ai/on-device-vision-ai

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个完全在微控制器设备上运行的端到端视觉机器学习流水线，包含数据采集、CNN训练和实时推理，无需云端依赖，代码约1750行C++，在ESP32-S3上实现9分钟训练/6.3 FPS推理。
AI.motivation: 传统云端的ML工作流需要外部基础设施，且对从业者隐藏了计算流水线的细节。作者希望在低成本微控制器上实现完整的、透明的ML生命周期，降低入门门槛。
AI.method: 基于ESP32-S3微控制器（8MB PSRAM），使用两层CNN+Adam优化器，实现批级梯度累积、预计算查表推理、双格式权重导出、三级权重优先级系统、单常数网络重配置接口、PSRAM感知内存管理等关键技术。
AI.result: 在64x64三分类图像任务上，训练约9分钟/轮，实时推理速度6.3 FPS。整个系统编译时间<1分钟，代码约1750行，无外部ML依赖。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明在低成本微控制器上实现完整的ML训练和推理流水线是可行的，为边缘设备上的自主AI提供了实用框架。

title: Constraint-Based Analysis of Reasoning Shortcuts in Neurosymbolic Learning
comment: This is the full version of a paper appearing at the 23rd International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR 2026)
summary: Neurosymbolic systems can satisfy logical constraints during learning without achieving the intended concept-label correspondence; this is a problem known as reasoning shortcuts. We formalize reasoning shortcuts as a constraint satisfaction problem and investigate under which conditions concept mappings are uniquely determined by the constraints. We prove that a discrimination property (requiring that no valid concept mapping can be transformed into another valid mapping by swapping two concept values) is necessary for shortcut-freeness under bijective mappings, but demonstrate via a counterexample that it is insufficient even when the constraint graph is connected. We develop an ASP-based algorithm that verifies whether a given constraint set uniquely determines the intended concept mapping, with proven soundness and completeness. When shortcuts are detected, a greedy repair algorithm eliminates them by augmenting the constraint set, converging in at most $k$ iterations, where $k$ is the number of alternative valid mappings. We further provide a complexity classification: deciding shortcut-freeness is coNP-complete, counting shortcuts is #P-complete, and finding minimal repairs is NP-hard. We also establish sample complexity bounds showing that logarithmically many label queries suffice for disambiguation in favorable cases, while querying all ambiguous positions suffices in the worst case. Experiments across eight benchmark domains validate our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了神经符号系统中的推理捷径问题，提出基于ASP的算法检测和修复约束集中的概念歧义，并给出了复杂度分类和样本复杂度界限。
AI.motivation: 神经符号系统在学习过程中可能满足逻辑约束但未学到预期的概念-标签对应关系（推理捷径问题），现有研究缺乏对该问题的形式化理解和自动化检测/修复方法。
AI.method: 1) 将推理捷径形式化为约束满足问题；2) 证明歧视性（discrimination property）是双射下无捷径的必要但不充分条件；3) 提出基于回答集编程（ASP）的算法验证约束集是否唯一确定概念映射；4) 设计贪心修复算法增广约束集消除捷径；5) 给出复杂度分类（coNP-complete, #P-complete, NP-hard）和样本复杂度分析。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集上验证了所提方法的有效性；理论上证明了捷径判定问题的复杂度类别，并给出了对数级样本查询即可消歧的充分条件。
AI.conclusion: 为神经符号系统中的推理捷径问题提供了系统的形式化理论和自动化解决方案，但歧视性条件不充分表明需要更细粒度的约束设计。

title: Overcoming Copyright Barriers in Corpus Distribution Through Non-Reversible Hashing
summary: While annotated corpora are crucial in the field of natural language processing (NLP), those containing copyrighted material are difficult to exchange among researchers. Yet, such corpora are necessary to fully represent the diversity of data found in the wild in the context of NLP tasks. We tackle this issue by proposing a method to lawfully and publicly share the annotations of copyrighted literary texts. The corpus creator shares the annotations in clear, along with a non-reversible hashed version of the source material. The corpus user must own the source material, and apply the same hash function to their own tokens, in order to match them to the shared annotations. Crucially, our method is robust to reasonable divergences in the version of the copyrighted data owned by the user. As an illustration, we present alignment experiments on different editions of novels. Our results show that our method is able to correctly align 98.7 to 99.79% of tokens depending on the novel, provided the user version is sufficiently close to the corpus creator's version. We publicly release novelshare, a Python implementation of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过非可逆哈希方法合法共享受版权保护的文学文本标注的方法，允许标注拥有版权的用户匹配标注，并对不同版本间的差异具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 受版权保护的语料库难以在研究者之间合法共享，但这类语料对于充分代表自然语言处理任务中数据的多样性至关重要。现有方法无法同时满足版权保护和标注共享的需求。
AI.method: 标注创建者共享明文标注和源材料的不可逆哈希版本；标注使用者必须拥有源材料，并对自己的token应用相同的哈希函数以匹配共享的标注。该方法对不同版本间的合理差异具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在不同版本小说的对齐实验中，该方法能正确对齐98.7%到99.79%的token（取决于小说），前提是用户版本与创建者版本足够接近。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够合法且公开地分享受版权保护的文学文本标注，为NLP社区在版权限制下进行语料库共享提供了一种可行的技术方案。

title: Dream-Cubed: Controllable Generative Modeling in Minecraft by Training on Billions of Cubes
summary: We introduce Dream-Cubed, a large-scale dataset of Minecraft worlds at voxel resolution, and a family of models using cubes as powerful compositional units for efficient generation of interactive 3D environments. Dream-Cubed comprises tens of billions of tokens from a carefully curated mixture of procedural biome terrain and high-quality human-authored maps. We use this dataset to conduct the first large-scale study of 3D diffusion models for voxel generation, analyzing discrete and continuous diffusion formulations, data compositions, and architectural design choices. Our models operate directly in the space of blocks, enabling efficient and semantically grounded generation while supporting interactive user workflows such as inpainting and outpainting from user-authored blocks. To quantitatively evaluate our models, we adapt the FID metric to assess semantic differences between real and generated world renderings, and validate generation quality through a human preference study. We release the full dataset, code, and all our pretrained models, which we hope will provide a foundation for future research in efficient generative modeling for structured, interactive 3D environments.

AI.tldr: Dream-Cubed 是一个大规模体素分辨率 Minecraft 世界数据集，并基于该数据集训练了 3D 扩散模型，用于高效生成可交互的 3D 环境，支持修补、外扩等用户交互工作流。
AI.motivation: 现有 3D 生成模型缺乏大规模结构化的体素级数据集，且缺乏对扩散模型在体素生成上的系统性研究。作者希望构建一个大规模 Minecraft 数据集，并探索扩散模型在交互式 3D 环境生成中的潜力。
AI.method: 构建了包含数百亿 token 的体素分辨率 Minecraft 数据集（混合程序化地形和人工设计地图）；在块（block）空间上训练离散/连续 3D 扩散模型；采用 FID 和人类偏好评估生成质量。
AI.result: 成功训练了能够直接生成体素级 3D 世界的扩散模型，支持用户交互式编辑（inpainting/outpainting），并通过 FID 和人类偏好研究验证了生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了大规模基准数据集和预训练模型，为未来结构化交互式 3D 环境的生成建模奠定了基础。

title: Complex SGD and Directional Bias in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces
summary: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is a known stochastic iterative method popular for large-scale convex optimization problems due to its simple implementation and scalability. Some objectives, such as those found in complex-valued neural networks, benefit from updates like in SGD and Gradient Descent (GD) with a newly defined ``gradient'' that allows for complex parameters. This complex variant of the SGD/GD methods has already been proposed, but convergence guarantees without analyticity constraints have not yet been provided. We propose a variant of SGD (complex SGD) that allows for complex parameters, and we provide convergence guarantees under assumptions that parallel those from the real setting. Notably, these results extend to GD as well, and with the same set of assumptions, we confirm that some directional bias results extend from the real to the complex setting for kernel regression problems. We provide empirical results demonstrating the efficacy of the complex SGD in kernel regression problems utilizing complex reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces. In particular, we demonstrate we may recover superoscillation functions and Blaschke products from the Fock Space and Hardy Space, respectively, as the optimal functions for a particular choice of a loss function.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了复数SGD方法，为复数参数优化提供了收敛性保证，并验证了在复数核回归问题中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有复数SGD/GD方法缺乏无解析性约束的收敛性保证，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 提出复数SGD变体，在平行于实数的假设下提供收敛性证明，并将方向性偏差结果从实数域扩展到复数域。
AI.result: 在复数核回归问题中验证了复数SGD的有效性，能够从Fock空间和Hardy空间中恢复超振荡函数和Blaschke乘积作为最优函数。
AI.conclusion: 复数SGD在更宽松的假设下具有收敛保证，且适用于复数神经网络等场景。

title: SoccerRef-Agents: Multi-Agent System for Automated Soccer Refereeing
comment: 26 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to ISACE 2026. Github Repo: https://github.com/yjlog/SoccerRef-Agents
summary: Refereeing is vital in sports, where fair, accurate, and explainable decisions are fundamental. While intelligent assistant technologies are being widely adopted in soccer refereeing, current AI-assisted approaches remain preliminary. Existing research mostly focuses on isolated video perception tasks and lacks the ability to understand and reason about foul scenarios. To fill this gap, we propose SoccerRef-Agents, a holistic and explainable multi-agent decision-making framework for soccer refereeing. The main contributions are: (i) constructing the multimodal benchmark SoccerRefBench with over 1,200 referee theory questions and 600 foul video clips; (ii) building a vector-based knowledge base RefKnowledgeDB using the latest "Laws of the Game" and a classic case database for precise, knowledge-driven reasoning; (iii) designing a novel multi-agent architecture that collaborates via cross-modal RAG to bridge the semantic gap between visual content and regulatory texts. This work explores the technical capability of integrating MLLMs with refereeing expertise, and evaluations show our system significantly outperforms general-purpose MLLMs in decision accuracy and explanation quality. All databases, benchmarks, and code will be made available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SoccerRef-Agents，一个面向足球裁判的、可解释的多智能体决策框架，包含多模态基准SoccerRefBench（1200+理论题、600个犯规视频）、基于最新规则的向量知识库RefKnowledgeDB，以及通过跨模态RAG协作的多智能体架构，显著优于通用多模态大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有AI辅助裁判技术仅关注孤立的视频感知任务，缺乏对犯规场景的理解和推理能力，亟需一个能够结合视觉内容与规则文本进行可解释决策的智能系统。
AI.method: 构建多模态基准SoccerRefBench；建立基于向量检索的规则知识库RefKnowledgeDB；设计多智能体架构，通过跨模态RAG（检索增强生成）桥接视觉内容与规则文本的语义鸿沟，实现协同决策。
AI.result: 在决策准确性和解释质量上显著优于通用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作探索了将多模态大模型与裁判专业知识相结合的技术能力，为体育裁判领域的AI辅助提供了可解释的全流程解决方案。

title: Beyond Local vs. External: A Game-Theoretic Framework for Trustworthy Knowledge Acquisition
summary: Cloud-hosted Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unmatched reasoning capabilities and dynamic knowledge, yet submitting raw queries to these external services risks exposing sensitive user intent. Conversely, relying exclusively on trusted local models preserves privacy but often compromises answer quality due to limited parameter scale and knowledge. To resolve this dilemma, we propose Game-theoretic Trustworthy Knowledge Acquisition (GTKA), a framework that formulates the trade-off between knowledge utility and privacy as a strategic game. GTKA consists of three components: (i) a privacy-aware sub-query generator that decomposes sensitive intent into generalized, low-risk fragments; (ii) an adversarial reconstruction attacker that attempts to infer the original query from these fragments, providing adaptive leakage signals; and (iii) a trusted local integrator that synthesizes external responses within a secure boundary. By training the generator and attacker in an alternating adversarial manner, GTKA optimizes the sub-query generation policy to maximize knowledge acquisition accuracy while minimizing the reconstructability of the original sensitive intent. To validate our approach, we construct two sensitive-domain benchmarks in the biomedical and legal fields. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GTKA significantly reduces intent leakage compared to state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining high-fidelity answer quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种博弈论框架GTKA，通过将用户敏感查询分解为低风险子查询，在利用云LLM的强推理能力的同时保护用户意图隐私，经交替对抗训练优化子查询生成策略，在生物医学和法律领域基准上实现了隐私泄露与回答质量的有效平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有方案面临两难：直接向云端LLM提交查询会暴露敏感用户意图（隐私风险），而完全依赖本地小模型则因参数规模有限导致回答质量下降。亟需一种既能利用云端LLM强大能力又能保护查询隐私的方法。
AI.method: 提出GTKA框架，包含三个组件：1) 隐私感知子查询生成器，将敏感意图分解为泛化、低风险片段；2) 对抗性重建攻击者，尝试从子查询推断原始查询以提供自适应泄露信号；3) 可信本地集成器，在安全边界内整合外部响应。生成器与攻击者以交替对抗方式训练，优化子查询策略以最大化答案质量同时最小化意图可重建性。
AI.result: 在生物医学和法律两个敏感领域基准上，GTKA相比现有最先进基线显著降低了意图泄露，同时保持了高保真度的回答质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过博弈论框架将隐私保护与知识获取的权衡形式化，交替对抗训练能够有效学习最优的子查询生成策略，实现云端LLM能力利用与用户隐私保护的双赢。

title: LunarDepthNet: Generation of Digital Elevation Models using Deep Learning and Monocular Satellite Images
comment: Accepted by IEEE - 4th International Conference on Computer, Electronics, Electrical Engineering and their applications (IC2E3 2026)
summary: Recent times have seen an increase in demand of high quality Digital Elevation Models (DEMs) for the lunar surface, because they are highly important for studying the moon and planning future missions. However, there is an evident lack of detailed elevation data on the Moon. To overcome this limitation, this study proposes a novel deep learning method that estimates and generates a surface elevation map directly from monocular images of the surface. The dataset used comprises of the Chandrayaan-2 Terrain Mapping Camera (TMC) images with their corresponding Digital Terrain Models (DTMs). The study proposes LunarDepthNet, which comprises of a UNet architecture to generate DEMS. It incorporates an EfficientNet encoder and custom layers to correctly learn how the light shadows on the surface relate to the actual elevation values. A combined loss function was also utilized to keep the terrain details accurate and smooth. During validation, the model showed a stable loss convergence of 12%. It achieved a mean nRMSE of 0.437 and an MAE of 4.5m in the testing stage. These results prove the model can generate dependable elevation maps from single orbital images, which are quite useful in regions of the moon where stereo-images are not available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LunarDepthNet，一种基于UNet架构的深度学习方法，利用月表单目影像生成数字高程模型（DEM），在测试中达到nRMSE 0.437、MAE 4.5m的性能。
AI.motivation: 月球表面高质量数字高程模型（DEM）需求日益增长，但缺乏详细的月表高程数据，现有立体影像覆盖不足。
AI.method: 采用UNet架构，以EfficientNet为编码器，设计自定义层学习光照阴影与高程值的关系，并使用组合损失函数保持地形细节准确和平滑。
AI.result: 验证集损失收敛至12%，测试集平均nRMSE为0.437，MAE为4.5米。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能够从单张轨道影像生成可靠的月表高程图，对缺乏立体影像的月球区域具有实用价值。

title: Preserving Long-Tailed Expert Information in Mixture-of-Experts Tuning
summary: Despite MoE models leading many benchmarks, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) for the MoE architectures remains difficult because its router layers are fragile. Methods such as DenseMixer and ESFT mitigate router collapse with dense mixing or auxiliary load-balancing losses, but these introduce noisy gradients that often degrade performance. In preliminary experiments, we systematically pruned experts and observed that while certain super experts are activated far more frequently, discarding less used experts still leads to notable performance degradation. This suggests that even rarely activated experts encode non-trivial knowledge useful for downstream tasks. Motivated by this, we propose an auxiliary-loss-free MoE SFT framework that combines bias-driven sparsification with always-active gated condenser experts. Rather than enforcing balanced activation across all experts, our method encourages task-relevant experts to remain active while pushing long-tailed experts toward inactivity. The condenser experts provide a persistent, learnable pathway that alleviates gradient starvation and facilitates consolidation of information that would otherwise remain fragmented across sparsely activated experts. Analysis further suggest that this design better preserves long-tailed expert information under sparse routing. Experiments on large-scale MoE models demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art SFT baselines such as DenseMixer and ESFT, achieving average gain of 2.5%+ on both mathematical reasoning and commonsenseQA benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无辅助损失的MoE监督微调框架，通过偏置驱动的稀疏化和始终激活的冷凝专家，在保持长尾专家知识的同时提升模型性能，在数学推理和常识问答上平均提升2.5%+。
AI.motivation: MoE模型在SFT过程中路由层脆弱，现有方法（如DenseMixer、ESFT）通过密集混合或辅助负载均衡损失缓解路由崩溃，但引入了噪声梯度导致性能下降。此外，即使低频专家也编码了有用的知识，简单的丢弃会损害性能。
AI.method: 提出无辅助损失的MoE SFT框架，包含两个关键组件：(1) 偏置驱动的稀疏化，鼓励任务相关专家保持激活，将长尾专家推向非激活；(2) 始终激活的冷凝专家（condenser experts），提供持久可学习的通路，缓解梯度饥饿并整合碎片化信息。
AI.result: 在大规模MoE模型上，该方法在数学推理和常识问答基准上超越DenseMixer、ESFT等SFT基线方法，平均提升2.5%以上。分析表明该设计能更好地在稀疏路由下保留长尾专家信息。
AI.conclusion: 无辅助损失的偏置驱动稀疏化+冷凝专家设计能有效缓解MoE微调中的路由崩溃问题，同时保留长尾专家的有价值知识，是一种更优的MoE SFT方案。

title: When Corrective Hints Hurt: Prompt Design in Reasoner-Guided Repair of LLM Overcaution on Entailed Negations under OWL~2~DL
summary: We report a reproducible error pattern in GPT-5.4 on OWL~2~DL compliance queries: the model frequently answers ``unknown'' when the reasoner-entailed answer is ``no'' under \emph{FunctionalProperty} closure or class \emph{disjointness}. Using 180 reasoner-audited queries from a procedural expansion of the observed pattern plus 18 hand-authored held-out queries in two unrelated domains (insurance and clinical), we compare four interaction modes under matched query budget: single-shot, three rounds of generic ``you-are-wrong'' retry, three rounds of reasoner-verdict repair with an open-world-assumption (OWA) hint, and the same repair without the hint. Direct faithfulness is 43.9\,\% (Wilson 95\,\% CI $[36.8,51.2]$); generic retry reaches 81.7\,\% ($[75.4,86.6]$); the verdict-with-hint variant is \emph{worse} at 67.2\,\% ($[60.1,73.7]$); the verdict-only variant reaches 97.8\,\% ($[94.4,99.1]$). All pairwise comparisons remain significant under McNemar's exact test with Bonferroni correction ($α= 0.01$; all $p < 10^{-5}$). The same fingerprint accounts for 4/4 errors on the held-out queries. Our interpretation is bounded: prompt framing can matter more than corrective content, and reasoner-guided wrappers should be ablated explicitly.

AI.tldr: 本文发现GPT-5.4在处理OWL~2~DL本体推理查询时存在系统性错误模式（频繁将“否”错误回答为“未知”）。通过180条审计查询和18条手工保留查询的对比实验发现，不使用提示但结合推理器结果的修复模式准确率最高（97.8%），而带有开放世界假设提示的修复反而更差（67.2%），表明提示框架比修正内容更重要。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在形式化推理任务（如本体查询）上的可靠性不足，特别是GPT-5.4在处理描述逻辑查询时存在可复现的错误模式（将“否”错答为“未知”），需要系统性地评估不同交互策略对修复此类错误的效果。
AI.method: 使用180条基于错误模式程序化扩展的推理器审计查询和18条手工编写的跨领域保留查询（保险和临床），比较四种交互模式：单次查询、三轮通用“你错了”重试、带开放世界假设（OWA）提示的三轮推理器判定修复、不带OWA提示的三轮推理器判定修复。使用Wilson置信区间和McNemar精确检验进行统计分析。
AI.result: 单次查询准确率43.9%；通用重试81.7%；带OWA提示的修复反而更差（67.2%）；不带提示的推理器判定修复最佳（97.8%）。所有配对比较均显著（p<10^-5）。该错误模式同样解释了保留查询中的全部4个错误。
AI.conclusion: 提示框架（prompt framing）比修正内容本身对LLM推理修复效果影响更大；推理器引导的包装器应明确进行消融实验；开放世界假设提示可能引入新混淆，反而降低性能。

title: Revisiting Greedy Decoding for Visual Question Answering: A Calibration Perspective
summary: Stochastic sampling strategies are widely adopted in large language models (LLMs) to balance output coherence and diversity. These heuristics are often inherited in Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) without task-specific justification. However, we contend that stochastic decoding can be suboptimal for Visual Question Answering (VQA). VQA is a closed-ended task with head-heavy answer distributions where uncertainty is usually epistemic, arising from missing or ambiguous visual evidence rather than plausible continuations. In this work, we provide a theoretical formalization of the relationship between model calibration and predictive accuracy, and derive the sufficient conditions for greedy decoding optimality. Extensive experiments provide empirical evidence for the superiority of greedy decoding over stochastic sampling across multiple benchmarks. Furthermore, we propose Greedy Decoding for Reasoning Models, which outperforms both stochastic sampling and standard greedy decoding in multimodal reasoning scenarios. Overall, our results caution against naively inheriting LLMs decoding heuristics in MLLMs and demonstrate that greedy decoding can be an efficient yet strong default for VQA.

AI.tldr: 论文指出，从LLM继承到多模态大模型的随机采样解码策略在VQA任务中是次优的，理论分析表明贪婪解码在特定条件下最优，实验验证了贪婪解码在VQA上的优越性，并针对推理模型提出了改进的贪婪解码方法。
AI.motivation: 质疑从LLM直接继承随机采样解码策略到MLLM的合理性，针对VQA这种闭合式、答案分布头重的任务，随机采样可能带来次优结果。
AI.method: 1) 理论形式化模型校准与预测准确率的关系；2) 推导贪婪解码最优性的充分条件；3) 提出面向推理模型的贪婪解码变体。
AI.result: 贪婪解码在多个VQA基准上显著优于随机采样；提出的推理模型贪婪解码在多模态推理场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 不应机械地将LLM的解码启发式方法继承到MLLM中，贪婪解码可作为VQA任务高效且强大的默认解码策略。

title: Accelerating New Product Introduction for Visual Quality Inspection via Few-Shot Diffusion-Based Defect Synthesis
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures. White paper from Relimetrics, Inc
summary: Industrial visual inspection systems often suffer from a severe scarcity of labeled defect data, particularly during the early stages of New Product Introduction (NPI). This limitation hinders the deployment of robust supervised detectors precisely when automated quality control is most needed. We present an end-to-end generative framework for high-fidelity, few-shot defect synthesis that enables both in-domain augmentation and cross-domain transfer. Our approach disentangles defect morphology from background appearance by combining masked textual inversion for defect representation learning, noise-blended conditioned generation for surface-aware synthesis, and gradient-aware post-processing for seamless visual integration. We evaluate the framework in two practically relevant settings: few-shot data augmentation, where synthetic samples enrich a small set of real defects, and zero-shot adaptation, where defects learned from a source domain are transferred to a novel target surface without any real target-domain defect examples. Using RF-DETR as the downstream detector, we show that the proposed pipeline substantially narrows the domain gap on a private industrial dataset. In the few-shot setting, synthetic augmentation improves mAP from 78.8% to 83.3%. In the zero-shot setting, synthetic domain adaptation improves mAP from 65.0% to 85.1%. These results demonstrate that high-fidelity defect synthesis can meaningfully accelerate NPI by enabling effective inspection models before sufficient real defect data has been collected.

AI.tldr: 提出一个端到端生成框架，通过解耦缺陷形态与背景外观，实现小样本缺陷合成，在工业视觉检测的少样本和零样本设定下显著提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 工业视觉检测系统在新产品导入初期面临标注缺陷数据严重匮乏的问题，阻碍了监督探测器部署，急需缺陷合成方法。
AI.method: 结合掩码文本反演（缺陷表示学习）、噪声混合条件生成（表面感知合成）和梯度感知后处理（视觉无缝集成），实现缺陷形态与背景外观的解耦。
AI.result: 在私有工业数据集上，少样本设置下mAP从78.8%提升至83.3%；零样本（跨域迁移）设置下mAP从65.0%提升至85.1%。
AI.conclusion: 高保真缺陷合成能在真实缺陷数据不足时有效加速新产品导入，使检测模型提前达到可用水平。

title: A Differentiable Framework for Global Circulation Model Precipitation Bias Correction
summary: Systematic biases in Global Circulation Model (GCM) outputs limit their direct applicability in regional planning, necessitating bias correction. Correcting precipitation is particularly challenging due to its non-Gaussian distribution, intermittent nature, and non-linear extremes. However, traditional statistical methods cannot learn from big data and easily address systematic biases in the GCMs, and while machine learning does provide this flexibility, their black-box type functionality hinders us from understanding these biases completely which also further prevents generalization across different GCMs and locations, especially for precipitation. In this study, we propose a differentiable bias adjustment framework called δCLIMBA (or dCLIMBA), that learns a spatiotemporally adaptive parametric bias adjustment procedure between historical CMIP6 model outputs and reference reanalysis datasets (Livneh). Results demonstrate that the proposed method accurately corrects both the magnitude and distribution of extreme storm events, with particularly strong performance in capturing extremes. The quantile distribution of precipitation is well reproduced across diverse U.S. cities, and spatial patterns perform comparably to the widely used LOCA2 statistical downscaling technique. In addition, the framework showed future trend preservation unlike pure quantile based methods and LOCA2; and results from bias correction over unseen regions showed that the marginal biases were attenuated. This work presents a modular, computationally efficient and extensible bias correction approach that is physically informed, scalable, and compatible with both historical and future applications. Its flexibility makes it suitable for integration into Earth system post-processing pipelines and impact workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出δCLIMBA，一个可微分的偏差校正框架，通过学习CMIP6气候模型输出与参考再分析数据之间的时空自适应参数化偏差调整，有效校正降水偏差，尤其在极端事件捕捉、分位数分布保持和未来趋势保留方面表现优异，且具有模块化、计算高效和可迁移的特点。
AI.motivation: 全球环流模型(GCM)输出存在系统性偏差，限制了其在区域规划中的直接应用。传统统计方法无法从大数据中学习，而机器学习方法又是黑箱，难以理解偏差且无法跨模型和位置泛化。降水校正因其非高斯分布、间歇性和非线性极值而尤为困难。
AI.method: 提出δCLIMBA框架，是一个可微分的偏差调整方法，学习历史CMIP6模型输出与参考再分析数据集(Livneh)之间的时空自适应参数化偏差调整过程。
AI.result: 该方法能准确校正极端风暴事件的量级和分布，在捕捉极值方面表现突出；能很好地再现美国多个城市的降水分位数分布；空间模式表现与LOCA2统计降尺度技术相当；在未见区域上边际偏差得到缓解；且能保留未来趋势，优于纯分位数方法和LOCA2。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种模块化、计算高效、可扩展的偏差校正方法，具有物理信息、可扩展性，兼容历史和未来应用，适合集成到地球系统后处理流程和影响评估工作流中。

title: IndustryAssetEQA: A Neurosymbolic Operational Intelligence System for Embodied Question Answering in Industrial Asset Maintenance
comment: 20 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, Accepted for the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026) Industry Track
summary: Industrial maintenance environments increasingly rely on AI systems to assist operators in understanding asset behavior, diagnosing failures, and evaluating interventions. Although large language models (LLMs) enable fluent natural-language interaction, deployed maintenance assistants routinely produce generic explanations that are weakly grounded in telemetry, omit verifiable provenance, and offer no testable support for counterfactual or action-oriented reasoning that undermine trust in safety-critical settings. We present IndustryAssetEQA, a neurosymbolic operational intelligence system that combines episodic telemetry representations with a Failure Mode Effects Analysis Knowledge Graph (FMEA-KG) to enable Embodied Question Answering (EQA) over industrial assets. We evaluate on four datasets covering four industrial asset types, including rotating machinery, turbofan engines, hydraulic systems, and cyber-physical production systems. Compared to LLM-only baselines, IndustryAssetEQA improves structural validity by up to 0.51, counterfactual accuracy by up to 0.47, and explanation entailment by 0.64, while reducing severe expert-rated overclaims from 28% to 2% (approximately 93% reduction). Code, datasets, and the FMEA-KG are available at https://github.com/IBM/AssetOpsBench/tree/IndustryAssetEQA/IndustryAssetEQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IndustryAssetEQA，一个结合时序遥测表示与故障模式知识图谱（FMEA-KG）的神经符号系统，用于工业资产的可定位问答（EQA）。相比纯LLM基线，该方法在结构有效性、反事实准确性和解释蕴涵方面分别提升0.51、0.47和0.64，并将专家评定的过度断言从28%降至2%。
AI.motivation: 工业维护中部署的LLM助手存在三个关键缺陷：生成的解释缺乏遥测数据支撑、缺少可验证的来源、无法支持反事实推理和行动导向推理，这在安全关键场景下会削弱信任。现有方法难以将自然语言与结构化工业知识（如时序数据、故障模式）有效结合。
AI.method: 提出神经符号架构IndustryAssetEQA，包含：(1)  episodic telemetry representations（情景遥测表示），编码资产时序行为；(2) Failure Mode Effects Analysis Knowledge Graph (FMEA-KG)，编码故障模式及其因果关系；(3) 基于上述结构的Embodied Question Answering机制，实现可定位的工业资产问答。
AI.result: 在四个工业资产数据集（旋转机械、涡扇发动机、液压系统、网络物理生产系统）上，与纯LLM基线相比：结构有效性提升0.51，反事实准确性提升0.47，解释蕴涵提升0.64，专家评定的过度断言从28%降至2%（约93%的减少）。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM的语义理解能力与结构化知识图谱和时序数据表示相结合，可以显著提升工业维护AI系统的可解释性和可信度，特别是在反事实推理和避免过度断言方面效果突出。

title: AI Safety Training Can be Clinically Harmful
summary: Large language models are being deployed as mental health support agents at scale, yet only 16% of LLM-based chatbot interventions have undergone rigorous clinical efficacy testing, and simulations reveal psychological deterioration in over one-third of cases. We evaluate four generative models on 250 Prolonged Exposure (PE) therapy scenarios and 146 CBT cognitive restructuring exercises (plus 29 severity-escalated variants), scored by a three-judge LLM panel. All models scored near-perfectly on surface acknowledgment (~0.91-1.00) while therapeutic appropriateness collapsed to 0.22-0.33 at the highest severity for three of four models, with protocol fidelity reaching zero for two. Under CBT severity escalation, one model's task completeness dropped from 92% to 71% while the frontier model's safety-interference score fell from 0.99 to 0.61. We identify a systematic, modality-spanning failure: RLHF safety alignment disrupts the therapeutic mechanism of action by grounding patients during imaginal exposure, offering false reassurance, inserting crisis resources into controlled exercises, and refusing to challenge distorted cognitions mentioning self-harm in PE; and through task abandonment or safety-preamble insertion during CBT cognitive restructuring. These findings motivate a five-axis evaluation framework (protocol fidelity, hallucination risk, behavioral consistency, crisis safety, demographic robustness), mapped onto FDA SaMD and EU AI Act requirements. We argue that no AI mental health system should proceed to deployment without passing multi-axis evaluation across all five dimensions.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现，尽管LLM被大规模部署为心理健康支持代理，但存在系统性治疗失效：RLHF安全对齐机制破坏了暴露疗法和认知重构的核心治疗机制，导致在严重病例中治疗适当性降至0.22-0.33，协议保真度归零。论文提出了五轴评估框架，并主张未经全面评估的AI心理健康系统不应部署。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM被大规模用于心理健康支持，但缺乏严格的临床有效性测试，模拟显示超过三分之一的病例出现心理恶化，亟需系统性的评估和安全机制分析。
AI.method: 在250个延长暴露（PE）治疗场景和146个CBT认知重构练习（含29个严重程度升级变体）上评估四个生成模型，使用三人LLM评审小组评分，并分析RLHF安全对齐对治疗机制的干扰。
AI.result: 所有模型在表面认可上得分接近完美（0.91-1.00），但治疗适当性在最高严重度下骤降至0.22-0.33；两个模型协议保真度归零。RLHF安全对齐导致：在暴露疗法中打断想象暴露、提供虚假安慰、插入危机资源；在CBT中放弃任务或插入安全前导语。
AI.conclusion: 提出了五轴评估框架（协议保真度、幻觉风险、行为一致性、危机安全、人口统计鲁棒性），映射到FDA和EU AI Act要求，主张未经多轴评估的AI心理健康系统不应部署。

title: EgoDyn-Bench: Evaluating Ego-Motion Understanding in Vision-Centric Foundation Models for Autonomous Driving
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced highlevel reasoning in autonomous driving, their ability to ground this reasoning in the underlying physics of ego-motion remains poorly understood. We introduce EgoDyn-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating the semantic ego-motion understanding of vision-centric foundation models. By mapping continuous vehicle kinematics to discrete motion concepts via a deterministic oracle, we decouple a model's internal physical logic from its visual perception. Our large-scale empirical audit spanning 20 + models, including closed-source MLLMs, open-source VLMs across multiple scales, and specialized VLAs, identifies a significant Perception Bottleneck: while models exhibit logical physical concepts, they consistently fail to accurately align them with visual observations, frequently underperforming classical non-learned geometric baselines. This failure persists across model scales and domain-specific training, indicating a structural deficit in how current architectures couple visual perception with physical reasoning. We demonstrate that providing explicit trajectory encodings substantially restores physical consistency across all evaluated models, revealing a functional disentanglement between vision and language: egomotion logic is derived almost exclusively from the language modality, while visual observations contribute negligible additional signal. This structural finding provides a standardized diagnostic framework and a practical pathway toward physically aligned embodied AI. Keywords: Ego-motion - Physical Reasoning - Foundation Models

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoDyn-Bench基准，用于评估视觉基础模型对自我运动（ego-motion）的语义理解能力。通过对20+模型的大规模实验，发现存在显著的**感知瓶颈**：模型虽然具备逻辑物理概念，但无法准确将其与视觉观察对齐，且视觉模态对自我运动逻辑的贡献微乎其微，语言模态才是推理的主要来源。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在自动驾驶中具备高级推理能力，但其对自我运动物理机制的理解缺乏系统性评估。作者旨在揭示视觉基础模型在物理推理与视觉感知之间的耦合程度及潜在缺陷。
AI.method: 1) 设计EgoDyn-Bench诊断基准，将连续车辆运动学映射为离散运动概念（通过确定性oracle解耦物理逻辑与视觉感知）；2) 对20+模型（闭源MLLM、多尺度开源VLM、专用VLA）进行大规模实证审计；3) 对比非学习的几何基线方法。
AI.result: 1) 模型存在感知瓶颈：虽有物理概念逻辑，但视觉-物理对齐失败，常不如经典几何基线；2) 该缺陷跨模型规模和领域特化训练持续存在；3) 提供显式轨迹编码可显著恢复物理一致性；4) 视觉与语言功能解耦：自我运动推理几乎完全来自语言模态，视觉输入贡献极小。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉基础模型在物理对齐上存在结构性缺陷，视觉与语言功能是解耦的。研究为构建物理一致的具身AI提供了标准化诊断框架和实用路径（如显式轨迹编码）。

title: Shape of Memory: a Geometric Analysis of Machine Unlearning in Second-Order Optimizers
comment: Full experiment data available at secondstreetlabs.io
summary: We argue that current definitions of machine unlearning are underspecified for second-order optimizers. We compare first-order and second-order learners for their ability to handle the data deletion task with varying degrees of eigendecomposition to mimic the loss model memory. While both first and second-order methods realign with the ideal counterfactul in terms of performance and gradient, the second-order optimizer shows significant volatility in the optimizer state. This indicates residual information, supposedly deleted, that isn't detectable by first-order analysis. Various eigendecay treatments show that stability and information loss is regained only under controlled state pertubation where geometric information (or memory) is erased.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有机器遗忘定义对二阶优化器不适用，通过对比一阶和二阶学习器在数据删除任务中的表现，发现二阶优化器存在显著的优化器状态波动，残留了无法通过一阶分析检测的信息，只有通过受控状态扰动（擦除几何信息/记忆）才能恢复稳定性和实现信息丢失。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘的定义未充分考虑二阶优化器的特性，导致在二阶优化器中进行数据删除后可能存在未被检测的残留信息，影响遗忘的彻底性。
AI.method: 对比一阶和二阶学习器在数据删除任务中的表现，通过不同程度的特征分解（eigendecomposition）模拟损失模型记忆，分析优化器状态的变化。
AI.result: 二阶优化器在性能和梯度上虽能与理想反事实对齐，但优化器状态存在显著波动，表明存在残留信息；通过受控状态扰动（擦除几何信息）才能恢复稳定性并真正消除信息。
AI.conclusion: 机器遗忘需要重新定义以涵盖二阶优化器的特性，仅靠一阶分析无法检测二阶优化器中的残留信息，必须进行优化器状态的受控扰动才能实现彻底遗忘。

title: ArguAgent: AI-Supported Real-Time Grouping for Productive Argumentation in STEM Classrooms
comment: Full paper accepted to the 27th International Conference on AI in Education (AIED 2026). AIED Proceedings to be released Summer 2026
summary: Argumentation is a core practice in STEM education, but its productivity depends on who participates and how they interact. Higher-achieving students often dominate the talk and decision-making, while lower-achieving peers may disengage, defer, or comply without contributing substantive reasoning. Forming groups strategically based on students' stances and argumentation skills could help foster inclusive, evidence-based discourse. In practice, however, teachers are constrained in implementing this grouping strategy because it requires real-time insight into students' positions and the quality of their argumentation, information that is difficult to assess reliably and at scale during instruction. We present a generative AI-powered system, ArguAgent, that creates groups optimizing for stance heterogeneity while constraining argumentation quality differences to +/-1 level on a validated learning progression. ArguAgent uses a two-component assessment pipeline: first scoring student arguments on a 0-4 rubric, then clustering positions via semantic analysis. We validated the scoring component against human expert consensus (Krippendorff's ααα = 0.817) using 200 expert-generated scores. Testing three OpenAI models (GPT-4o-mini, GPT-5.1, GPT-5.2) with identical calibrated prompts, we found that systematic prompt engineering informed by human disagreement analysis contributed 89% of scoring improvement (QWK: 0.531 to 0.686), while model upgrades contributed an additional 11% (QWK: 0.686 to 0.708). Simulation testing across 100 classes demonstrated that the grouping algorithm achieves 95.4% of groups that meet both design criteria, a 3.2x improvement over random assignment. These results suggest ArguAgent can enable real-time, theoretically grounded grouping that promotes productive STEM argumentation in classrooms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ArguAgent，一个基于生成式AI的课堂分组系统，通过评估学生的论证质量和立场，自动将学生分为立场异质但能力相近的小组，以促进STEM教育中更包容、更有生产力的论证讨论。
AI.motivation: STEM教育中，高成就学生往往主导讨论，低成就学生容易边缘化。教师需要根据学生的立场和论证能力进行战略性分组，但课堂上难以实时、可靠地评估这些信息，因此需要AI辅助系统来解决这一瓶颈。
AI.method: ArguAgent采用双组件流水线：1) 评分组件：基于0-4评分量规，使用GPT模型对学生的论证质量进行打分；2) 聚类组件：通过语义分析对学生立场进行聚类。然后基于这两项信息，在保证立场异质性的同时限制论证能力差异≤1级，优化分组。
AI.result: 评分组件与人类专家共识的Krippendorff's α=0.817；系统化提示工程贡献了89%的评分改进（QWK从0.531提升至0.686），模型升级贡献了11%（QWK从0.686提升至0.708）；分组算法在100个班级模拟中，95.4%的小组满足双设计标准，相比随机分配提升3.2倍。
AI.conclusion: ArguAgent能够实现实时、有理论基础的课堂分组，有效促进STEM教育中更有生产力的论证活动，具有实际教学应用价值。

title: A Benchmark Suite of Reddit-Derived Datasets for Mental Health Detection
comment: In the proceedings of 12th Annual Conference on Computational Science & Computational Intelligence (CSCI'25)
summary: The growing availability of online support groups has opened up new windows to study mental health through natural language processing (NLP). However, it is hindered by a lack of high-quality, well-validated datasets. Existing studies have a tendency to build task-specific corpora without collecting them into widely available resources, and this makes reproducibility as well as cross-task comparison challenging. In this paper, we present a uniform benchmark set of four Reddit-based datasets for disjoint but complementary tasks: (i) detection of suicidal ideation, (ii) binary general mental disorder detection, (iii) bipolar disorder detection, and (iv) multi-class mental disorder classification. All datasets were established upon diligent linguistic inspection, well-defined annotation guidelines, and human-judgmental verification. Inter-annotator agreement metrics always exceeded the baseline agreement score of 0.8, ensuring the labels' trustworthiness. Previous work's evidence of performance on both transformer and contextualized recurrent models demonstrates that these models receive excellent performances on tasks (F1 ~ 93-99%), further validating the usefulness of the datasets. By combining these resources, we establish a unifying foundation for reproducible mental health NLP studies with the ability to carry out cross-task benchmarking, multi-task learning, and fair model comparison. The presented benchmark suite provides the research community with an easy-to-access and varied resource for advancing computational approaches toward mental health research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的Reddit心理健康NLP基准数据集，涵盖自杀意念检测、精神障碍检测、双相障碍检测和多类精神障碍分类四个任务，并通过严格标注流程确保数据质量，为可复现的心理健康NLP研究提供基础。
AI.motivation: 现有心理健康NLP研究缺乏高质量、良好验证的标准化数据集，研究往往构建特定任务语料库而未整合为广泛可用的资源，导致可复现性和跨任务比较困难。
AI.method: 基于Reddit收集四个任务数据集，经过细致的语言学检查、明确定义的标注指南和人工验证，确保标注者间一致性指标超过0.8；并在Transformer和上下文循环模型上验证了有效性。
AI.result: 模型在不同任务上取得F1约93-99%的优异性能，验证了数据集的有用性；标注一致性均超过0.8基线，保证了标签的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准套件为心理健康NLP研究提供了易于获取且多样化的资源，支持跨任务基准测试、多任务学习和公平模型比较，推动了计算方法的可复现性研究。

title: FastAT Benchmark: A Comprehensive Framework for Fair Evaluation of Fast Adversarial Training Methods
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables. Code: https://github.com/fzjcdt/FastAT_Benchmark Project page: https://fzjcdt.github.io/FastAT_Benchmark/benchmark.html
summary: Fast Adversarial Training (FastAT) seeks to achieve adversarial robustness at a fraction of the computational cost incurred by standard multi-step methods such as PGD-AT. Although numerous FastAT techniques have been proposed in recent years, fair comparison among them remains elusive. Existing benchmarks and public leaderboards typically permit diverse model architectures, varying training configurations, and external data sources, making it unclear whether reported improvements reflect genuine algorithmic advances or merely more favorable experimental conditions. To address this problem, we introduce the FastAT Benchmark, a controlled evaluation framework built on three core design principles: unified architecture requirements, standardized training settings, and strict prohibition of external or synthetic data. The benchmark implements over twenty representative FastAT methods within a single codebase, enabling direct and reproducible comparison. Each method is assessed through a dual-metric evaluation framework that measures both adversarial robustness (accuracy under PGD, AutoAttack, and CR Attack) and computational cost (GPU training time and peak memory footprint). Comprehensive experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet provide reliable baseline measurements and reveal that well-designed single-step methods can match or surpass PGD-AT robustness at substantially lower cost, while no single method dominates across all evaluation dimensions. The complete benchmark, including source code, configuration files, and experimental results, is publicly available to support transparent and fair evaluation of future FastAT research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FastAT Benchmark，一个用于公平比较快速对抗训练方法的标准化评估框架，统一了架构、训练设置和数据来源，在多个数据集上系统评估了20多种方法，发现精心设计的单步方法能以更低成本达到或超过PGD-AT的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的FastAT方法比较存在不公平问题：不同方法使用不同的模型架构、训练配置和外部数据，导致无法区分性能提升是来自算法创新还是实验条件的差异。
AI.method: 构建了基于三大设计原则（统一架构、标准化训练设置、禁止外部数据）的基准测试框架，在统一代码库中实现了20多种FastAT方法，使用PGD、AutoAttack和CR Attack评估鲁棒性，同时记录GPU训练时间和峰值内存作为计算成本指标。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet上的实验表明：精心设计的单步方法可以匹配或超越PGD-AT的鲁棒性，同时计算成本显著降低；没有单一方法能在所有评估维度上占优。
AI.conclusion: 该基准为FastAT研究提供了标准化、可复现的评估平台，有助于推动该领域的公平比较和健康发展。

title: ML-Guided Primal Heuristics for Mixed Binary Quadratic Programs
summary: Mixed Binary Quadratic Programs (MBQPs) are an important and complex set of problems in combinatorial optimization. As solving large-scale combinatorial optimization problems is challenging, primal heuristics have been developed to quickly identify high-quality solutions within a short amount of time. Recently, a growing body of research has also used machine learning to accelerate solution methods for challenging combinatorial optimization problems. Despite the increasing popularity of these ML-guided methods, a large body of work has focused on Mixed-Integer Linear Programs (MILPs). MBQPs are challenging to solve due to the combinatorial complexity coupled with nonlinearities. This work proposes ML-guided primal heuristics for Mixed Binary Quadratic Programs (MBQPs) by adapting and extending existing work on ML-guided MILP solution prediction to MBQPs. We introduce a new neural network architecture for MBQP solution prediction and a new training data collection procedure. Moreover, we extend existing loss functions in solution prediction and propose to combine contrastive and weighted cross-entropy losses. We evaluate the methods on standard and real-world MBQP benchmarks and show that the developed ML-guided methods significantly outperform existing primal heuristics and state-of-the-art solvers. Furthermore, models trained with our proposed extension with combined losses outperform other ML-based methods adapted from MILPs and improve generalization in cross-regional inference on a real-world wind farm layout optimization problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的原始启发式方法，通过扩展MILP的ML引导方法来解决混合二元二次规划（MBQP）问题，设计了新的神经网络架构、训练数据收集流程和结合对比学习与加权交叉熵的损失函数，在标准及真实世界基准上显著优于现有启发式方法和求解器。
AI.motivation: MBQP是一类重要但求解困难的组合优化问题，现有的原始启发式方法在大规模问题上表现有限，而多数ML-guided方法集中在MILP上，缺乏针对MBQP中非线性与组合复杂性的有效ML方法。
AI.method: 提出了新的神经网络架构用于MBQP解预测；设计了新的训练数据收集流程；将MILP的解预测方法扩展到MBQP；结合对比损失（contrastive loss）和加权交叉熵损失作为扩展损失函数。
AI.result: 在标准MBQP基准和真实世界风电场布局优化问题上，所提ML-guided方法显著优于现有原始启发式方法和顶级求解器；结合对比损失与加权交叉熵的模型在跨区域泛化上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: ML-guided方法能有效加速MBQP求解，扩展的损失函数组合提升了模型泛化能力，为非线性组合优化问题的机器学习方法提供了新方向。

title: Ulterior Motives: Detecting Misaligned Reasoning in Continuous Thought Models
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has emerged as a key technique for eliciting complex reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). Although interpretable, its dependence on natural language limits the model's expressive bandwidth. Continuous thought models address this bottleneck by reasoning in latent space rather than human-readable tokens. While they enable richer representations and faster inference, they raise a critical safety question: how can we detect misaligned reasoning in an uninterpretable latent space? To study this, we introduce MoralChain, a benchmark of 12,000 social scenarios with parallel moral/immoral reasoning paths. We train a continuous thought model with backdoor behavior using a novel dual-trigger paradigm - one trigger that arms misaligned latent reasoning ([T]) and another that releases harmful outputs ([O]). We demonstrate three findings: (1) continuous thought models can exhibit misaligned latent reasoning while producing aligned outputs, with aligned and misaligned reasoning occupying geometrically distinct regions of latent space; (2) linear probes trained on behaviorally-distinguishable conditions ([T][O] vs [O]) transfer to detecting armed-but-benign states ([T] vs baseline) with high accuracy; and (3) misalignment is encoded in early latent thinking tokens, suggesting safety monitoring for continuous thought models should target the "planning" phase of latent reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoralChain基准（12,000个社会场景），研究连续思维模型在潜在空间中进行推理时的安全隐患。通过双触发器范式训练带有后门行为的连续思维模型，发现：（1）模型可在潜在空间中产生对齐/不对齐推理，两者在几何空间上可区分；（2）线性探针可从行为可区分条件迁移检测武装但良性的状态；（3）不对齐编码出现在早期潜在思维token中，安全监控应聚焦于"规划"阶段。
AI.motivation: 连续思维模型在潜在空间推理，提升了表达能力和推理速度，但牺牲了可解释性。这引发了一个关键安全问题：如何在不可解释的潜在空间中检测不对齐的推理？现有CoT推理虽可解释但带宽有限，而连续思维模型的安全监控方法尚属空白。
AI.method: 构建MoralChain基准（12,000个社会场景，配备平行道德/不道德推理路径）；提出双触发器范式（[T]触发不对齐潜在推理，[O]释放有害输出）；训练带有后门行为的连续思维模型；使用线性探针在潜在空间进行检测。
AI.result: （1）连续思维模型可产生不对齐的潜在推理但输出对齐内容，两种推理在潜在空间占据不同几何区域；（2）线性探针可跨条件迁移检测不对齐状态；（3）不对齐编码主要出现在早期潜在思维token（"规划"阶段）。
AI.conclusion: 连续思维模型的安全监控应聚焦于潜在推理的早期"规划"阶段，而非仅关注最终输出；线性探针是一种有效的检测工具。

title: JudgeSense: A Benchmark for Prompt Sensitivity in LLM-as-a-Judge Systems
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Code: https://github.com/rohithreddybc/judgeSense. Dataset (JudgeSense Benchmark): https://huggingface.co/datasets/Rohithreddybc/judgesense-benchmark
summary:
Large language models are increasingly deployed as automated judges for evaluating other models, yet the stability of their verdicts under semantically equivalent prompt paraphrases remains unmeasured. We introduce JudgeSense, a framework and benchmark for quantifying this property via the Judge Sensitivity Score (JSS), defined as the fraction of paraphrase pairs on which a judge returns an identical decision.
  Evaluating nine judge models on 494 validated paraphrase pairs, we find that coherence is the only task where judges meaningfully differ, with JSS ranging from 0.389 to 0.992. On factuality, all judges cluster near JSS about 0.63, driven by a polarity-inverted prompt artifact; after correction, factuality JSS rises to about 0.9. Pairwise tasks (preference and relevance) exhibit degenerate always-A behavior in 8 of 9 judges, indicating strong position bias.
  Model scale does not predict consistency. We release code, decision logs, and a validated paraphrase dataset to support standardized JSS reporting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出JudgeSense框架，通过法官敏感度分数（JSS）量化大语言模型作为自动化裁判时，在语义等价改写下判断的不稳定性。实验发现：一致性任务中模型差异最大（JSS: 0.389-0.992），事实性任务因提示极性颠倒伪影导致低分（修正后升至~0.9），成对任务（偏好/相关性）中8/9模型出现退化性"永远选A"行为（位置偏差）。模型规模与一致性无关。
AI.motivation: LLM被广泛用作自动化裁判评估其他模型，但提示改写（语义等价改写）是否影响裁判稳定性尚未被系统量化。作者旨在填补这一评估稳定性空白。
AI.method: 提出Judge法官敏感度分数（JSS）= 在语义等价改写对中返回一致决策的比例。构建494个验证改写对，评估9个法官模型在事实性、一致性、偏好、相关性四项任务上的JSS。
AI.result: 1) 一致性任务JSS差异最大（0.389-0.992）；2) 事实性任务所有模型JSS~0.63（因提示极性颠倒伪影），修正后升至~0.9；3) 偏好与相关性任务8/9模型表现退化——持续选A（强位置偏差）；4) 模型规模与JSS无显著相关性。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM裁判对提示改写敏感，尤其存在位置偏差和提示伪影问题；模型规模不能保证判决一致性；需标准化JSS报告以提升评估可靠性。

title: MAE-Based Self-Supervised Pretraining for Data-Efficient Medical Image Segmentation Using nnFormer
summary: Transformer architectures, including nnFormer,have demonstrated promising results in volumetric medical image segmentation by being able to capture long-range spatial interactions. Although they have high performance, these models need large quantities of labeled training data and are also likely to overfit and become training unstable. This is a serious practical problem because it is not only time-consuming but also expensive to obtain medical images that are annotated by experts. Moreover, fully supervised traditional training pipelines do not take advantage of the available large amounts of unlabeled medical imaging data that can be easily obtained in the clinics. We have solved these drawbacks by advancing the efficiency of the nnFormer with a self-supervised pretraining framework, which is based on the Masked Autoencoders (MAE). In this method, the model is pretrained on unlabeled volumetric medical images to reconstruct randomly masked parts of the input. This allows the encoder to learn meaningful anatomical and structural representations . The encoder is then further fine-tuned on a labeled dataset on the downstream segmentation task. Conducted Experiment shows that the offered method leads to a higher segmentation performance on the count of Dice score, a quicker convergence rate on the course of the fine-tuning procedure, and a superior generalization on the basis of limited labeled data . These findings validate that self-supervised learning combined with transformer-based segmentation models is an appropriate approach to the problem of data shortage in medical image analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将nnFormer与掩码自编码器(MAE)结合的自监督预训练框架，用于三维医学图像分割。该方法先让模型在无标签数据上通过重建随机遮挡区域进行预训练，再在下游分割任务上微调，有效提升了分割性能、收敛速度和小样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: Transformer架构在医学图像分割中表现优异，但存在两大问题：(1)需要大量标注数据，而医学图像标注昂贵且耗时；(2)容易过拟合且训练不稳定。同时，大量易获取的无标签临床数据未被充分利用。本文旨在解决数据短缺和标注成本高的问题。
AI.method: 基于nnFormer架构，采用掩码自编码器(MAE)进行自监督预训练：先在无标签三维医学图像上随机遮挡部分体素，训练模型重建完整图像，使编码器学习到有意义的解剖和结构表征；然后将预训练编码器在下游分割任务上进行有监督微调。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在Dice分数上获得了更高的分割性能，微调过程中收敛速度更快，并且在有限标注数据下具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习与基于Transformer的分割模型相结合，是应对医学图像分析中数据短缺问题的有效途径。

title: K-Score: Kalman Filter as a Principled Alternative to Reward Normalization in Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted in NewInML Workshop, The 42nd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2025).\href{https://icml.cc/virtual/2025/affinity-event/39980}{Event Page}
summary: We propose a simple yet effective alternative to reward normalization in policy gradient reinforcement learning by integrating a 1D Kalman filter for online reward estimation. Instead of relying on fixed heuristics, our method recursively estimates the latent reward mean, smoothing high-variance returns and adapting to non-stationary environments. This approach incurs minimal overhead and requires no modification to existing policy architectures. Experiments on \textit{LunarLander} and \textit{CartPole} demonstrate that Kalman-filtered rewards significantly accelerate convergence and reduce training variance compared to standard normalization techniques. Code is available at https://github.com/Sumxiaa/Kalman_Normalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用1D卡尔曼滤波器替代传统奖励归一化方法，在线估计奖励均值，平滑高方差回报并适应非平稳环境。在LunarLander和CartPole上的实验表明，该方法相比标准归一化技术显著加速收敛、降低训练方差。
AI.motivation: 传统策略梯度强化学习中的奖励归一化依赖固定启发式方法，难以处理高方差回报和非平稳环境，需要更鲁棒、自适应的奖励估计方法。
AI.method: 将1D卡尔曼滤波器集成到策略梯度强化学习中，递归估计潜在奖励均值，无需修改现有策略架构，计算开销极小。
AI.result: 在LunarLander和CartPole环境中，卡尔曼滤波奖励方法相比标准归一化技术显著加速收敛并降低训练方差。
AI.conclusion: 卡尔曼滤波是一种简单、有效且轻量级的奖励归一化替代方案，能自适应处理非平稳奖励分布，有望推广到更复杂的强化学习任务。

title: Escher-Loop: Mutual Evolution by Closed-Loop Self-Referential Optimization
comment: The first three authors contributed equally. Corresponding Authors: Han Hao, Liu Yang
summary: While recent autonomous agents demonstrate impressive capabilities, they predominantly rely on manually scripted workflows and handcrafted heuristics, inherently limiting their potential for open-ended improvement. To address this, we propose Escher-Loop, a fully closed-loop framework that operationalizes the mutual evolution of two distinct populations: Task Agents that solve concrete problems, and Optimizer Agents that recursively refine both the task agents and themselves.
