To sustain this self-referential evolution, we propose a dynamic benchmarking mechanism that seamlessly reuses the empirical scores of newly generated task agents as relative win-loss signals to update optimizers' scores. This mechanism leverages the evolution of task agents as an inherent signal to drive the evaluation and refinement of optimizers without additional overhead. Empirical evaluations on mathematical optimization problems demonstrate that Escher-Loop effectively pushes past the performance ceilings of static baselines, achieving the highest absolute peak performance across all evaluated tasks under matched compute. Remarkably, we observe that the optimizer agents dynamically adapt their strategies to match the shifting demands of high-performing task agents, which explains the system's continuous improvement and superior late-stage performance.

AI.tldr: 提出Escher-Loop框架，通过任务智能体与优化智能体的协同进化实现自主代理的持续改进，无需人工脚本。
AI.motivation: 现有自主代理依赖人工编写的脚本和启发式规则，限制了其开放性改进的可能性，需要一种能自动演进、自我优化的框架。
AI.method: 构建闭环框架Escher-Loop，包含两类种群：Task Agents（解决具体问题）和Optimizer Agents（递归优化任务智能体和自身）；提出动态基准测试机制，利用新任务智能体的经验分数作为相对胜负信号来更新优化器分数，驱动无需额外开销的自我进化。
AI.result: 在数学优化问题上，Escher-Loop突破了静态基线的性能上限，在所有评估任务中实现了最高绝对峰值性能；优化器智能体能够动态调整策略以适应高性能任务智能体的需求变化，解释了系统持续改进和后期优越性能的原因。
AI.conclusion: Escher-Loop验证了通过智能体间的自我指涉式共同进化可以超越手工设计的静态系统，为开放式自主代理的持续改进提供了有效范式。

title: Your Students Don't Use LLMs Like You Wish They Did
summary: Educational NLP systems are typically evaluated using engagement metrics and satisfaction surveys, which are at best a proxy for meeting pedagogical goals. We introduce six computational metrics for automated evaluation of pedagogical alignment in student-AI dialogue. We validate our metrics through analysis of 12,650 messages across 500 conversations from four courses. Using our metrics, we identify a fundamental misalignment: educators design conversational tutors for sustained learning dialogue, but students mainly use them for answer-extraction. Deployment context is the strongest predictor of usage patterns, outweighing student preference or system design: when AI tools are optional, usage concentrates around deadlines; when integrated into course structure, students ask for solutions to verbatim assignment questions. Whole-dialogue evaluation misses these turn-by-turn patterns. Our metrics will enable researchers building educational dialogue systems to measure whether they are achieving their pedagogical goals.

AI.tldr: 论文提出六个计算指标用于自动评估教育对话系统中师生对话的教学对齐程度，发现学生实际使用模式（答案提取）与教育者设计目标（持续学习对话）之间存在根本性错位，且部署环境是使用模式的最强预测因素。
AI.motivation: 现有教育NLP系统评估多依赖参与度指标和满意度调查，无法有效衡量是否达成教学目标，缺乏自动化的教学对齐评估方法。
AI.method: 定义六个计算指标（基于对话分析），对来自四门课程的500个对话（12650条消息）进行验证分析，比较不同部署环境下的使用模式。
AI.result: 发现学生主要将对话式辅导系统用于"答案提取"而非"持续学习对话"；部署环境是使用模式的最强预测因子（如可选工具在截止日期前集中使用，整合到课程中的工具被用于获取作业原题答案）。
AI.conclusion: 全对话级别的评估会遗漏逐轮对话的模式差异，所提指标可帮助教育对话系统研究者衡量是否实现了教学目标。

title: Evaluating Remote Sensing Image Captions Beyond Metric Biases
summary: The core objective of image captioning is to achieve lossless semantic compression from visual signals into textual modalities. However, the reliance on manually curated reference texts for evaluation essentially forces models to mimic specific human annotation styles, thereby masking the true descriptive capabilities of advanced foundation models. This systemic misalignment prompts a critical question: Is task-specific fine-tuning truly necessary for Remote Sensing Image Captioning, or is the perceived performance gap merely an artifact of flawed evaluation criteria? To investigate this discrepancy, we propose ReconScore, a novel reference-free evaluation metric. Rather than computing textual similarities, we assess caption quality by its capability to reconstruct the original visual elements solely from the generated text, effectively neutralizing human annotation biases. Applying this metric, we uncover a profound, counterintuitive truth: inherently powerful, unfine-tuned MLLMs surpass their fine-tuned counterparts in authentic zero-shot RSIC tasks. Driven by this structural discovery, we introduce RemoteDescriber, a completely training-free generation methodology. By employing ReconScore as a self-correction mechanism, we iteratively refine the semantic precision of MLLM outputs without any computational fine-tuning overhead. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that RemoteDescriber achieves state-of-the-art performance on three datasets. Furthermore, we validate ReconScore's reliability and analyze the flaws of traditional metrics. Our code is available at https://github.com/hhu-czy/RemoteDescriber.

AI.tldr: 本文提出无参考评估指标ReconScore和完全无需训练的图像描述生成方法RemoteDescriber，发现未微调的多模态大模型在零样本遥感图像描述任务中实际优于微调版本，挑战了传统评估范式和微调必要性认知。
AI.motivation: 揭示现有图像描述评估指标依赖人工参考文本导致的系统性偏差，探究遥感图像描述任务中微调是否真正必要，还是性能差距仅源于有缺陷的评估标准。
AI.method: 提出无参考评估指标ReconScore（基于生成文本重建视觉元素的能力评估描述质量），以及完全免训练的描述生成方法RemoteDescender（利用ReconScore作为自校正机制迭代优化MLLM输出）。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上达到SOTA；未微调MLLM在零样本设置下超越微调版本；验证了ReconScore的可靠性并揭示了传统指标的缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 任务特定微调对于遥感图像描述并非必要，传统评估指标掩盖了基础模型的真实能力；所提无参考评估和免训练生成方法更有效且更真实反映模型性能。

title: C-MORAL: Controllable Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization with Reinforcement Alignment for LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise for molecular optimization, but aligning them with selective and competing drug-design constraints remains challenging. We propose C-Moral, a reinforcement learning post-training framework for controllable multi-objective molecular optimization. C-Moral combines group-based relative optimization, property score alignment for heterogeneous objectives, and continuous non-linear reward aggregation to improve stability across competing properties. Experiments on the C-MuMOInstruct benchmark show that C-Moral consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models across both in-domain and out-of-domain settings, achieving the best Success Optimized Rate (SOR) of 48.9% on IND tasks and 39.5% on OOD tasks, while largely preserving scaffold similarity. These results suggest that RL post-training is an effective way to align molecular language models with continuous molecular design objectives. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Rwigie/C-MORAL.

AI.tldr: 提出C-Moral框架，通过强化学习后训练实现可控的多目标分子优化，在C-MuMOInstruct基准上取得SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: LLMs在分子优化中有潜力，但如何让它们满足选择性且互相竞争的药物设计约束仍具挑战。
AI.method: C-Moral框架包含三种技术：基于分组的相对优化、异构目标的属性分数对齐、以及连续非线性奖励聚合，以提升竞争属性间的训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在C-MuMOInstruct基准上，IND任务SOR达48.9%，OOD任务SOR达39.5%，均优于SOTA模型，同时较好保留了骨架相似性。
AI.conclusion: RL后训练能有效将分子语言模型与连续的分子设计目标对齐。

title: Agentic Adversarial Rewriting Exposes Architectural Vulnerabilities in Black-Box NLP Pipelines
comment: Submitted to IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON INFORMATION FORENSICS AND SECURITY
summary: Multi-component natural language processing (NLP) pipelines are increasingly deployed for high-stakes decisions, yet no existing adversarial method can test their robustness under realistic conditions: binary-only feedback, no gradient access, and strict query budgets. We formalize this strict black-box threat model and propose a two-agent evasion framework operating in a semantic perturbation space. An Attacker Agent generates meaning-preserving rewrites while a Prompt Optimization Agent refines the attack strategy using only binary decision feedback within a 10-query budget. Evaluated against four evidence-based misinformation detection pipelines, the framework achieves evasion rates of 19.95 to 40.34% on modern large language model (LLM) based systems, compared to at most 3.90% for token-level perturbation baselines that rely on surrogate models because they cannot operate under our threat model. A legacy system relying on static lexical retrieval exhibits near-total vulnerability 97.02%, establishing a lower bound that exposes how architectural choices govern the attack surface. Evasion effectiveness is associated with three architectural properties: evidence retrieval mechanism, retrieval-inference coupling, and baseline classification accuracy. The iterative prompt optimization yields the largest marginal gains against the most robust targets, confirming that adaptive strategy discovery is essential when evasion is non-trivial. Analysis of successful rewrites reveals four exploitation patterns, each targeting failures at distinct pipeline stages. A pattern-informed defense reduces the evasion rate by up to 65.18%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种严格黑盒条件下的双智能体对抗攻击框架，能在仅有二元反馈、无梯度访问且10次查询预算下，通过语义级改写和提示优化，对基于LLM的虚假信息检测管道实现19.95%-40.34%的逃逸率，并揭示了四种利用模式及相应防御策略。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗方法无法在现实条件下（仅二元反馈、无梯度、严格查询预算）测试多组件NLP管道的鲁棒性，亟需一种能反应真实威胁模型的测试方法。
AI.method: 提出双智能体框架：(1) 攻击者智能体生成保持语义的文本改写；(2) 提示优化智能体在10次查询预算内，仅利用二元决策反馈迭代优化攻击策略。在语义扰动空间（而非词级别）进行操作。
AI.result: 基于LLM的虚假信息检测管道逃逸率19.95%-40.34%（基线<3.90%）；传统静态词检索系统逃逸率97.02%。成功逃逸与三个架构属性相关：证据检索机制、检索-推理耦合度、基线分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了四种利用模式（对应管道不同阶段失效），基于这些模式的防御可将逃逸率降低最多65.18%。自适应策略发现对于非平凡逃逸至关重要。

title: K-SENSE: A Knowledge-Guided Self-Augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health Conditions on Social Media
summary: Early detection of mental health conditions, particularly stress and depression, from social media text remains a challenging open problem in computational psychiatry and natural language processing. Automated systems must contend with figurative language, implicit emotional expression, and the high noise inherent in user-generated content. Existing approaches either leverage external commonsense knowledge to model mental states explicitly, or apply self-augmentation and contrastive training to improve generalization, but seldom do both in a principled, unified framework. We propose K-SENSE (Knowledge-guided Self-augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health), a framework that jointly exploits external psychological reasoning and internal representation robustness. K-SENSE adopts a three-stage encoding pipeline: (1) inferential commonsense knowledge is extracted from the COMET model across five mental state dimensions; (2) a semantic anchor is constructed by combining hidden representations from two parallel encoding streams, projected into a shared space before fusion; and (3) a supervised contrastive learning objective aligns same-class representations while encouraging the attention mechanism to suppress irrelevant knowledge noise. We evaluate K-SENSE on Dreaddit (stress detection) and Depression_Mixed (depression detection), achieving mean F1-scores of 86.1 (0.6%) and 94.3 (0.8%), respectively, over five independent runs. These represent improvements of approximately 2.6 and 1.5 percentage points over the strongest prior baselines. Ablation experiments confirm the contribution of each architectural component, including the temporal knowledge integration strategy and the choice to keep the knowledge encoder frozen during fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: K-SENSE是一个融合外部常识知识（COMET模型）和内部对比学习的心理健康检测框架，在压力检测（F1 86.1）和抑郁检测（F1 94.3）上超越基线。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体文本中的心理健康（压力/抑郁）早期检测面临比喻语言、隐含情感表达和高噪声等挑战。现有方法要么利用外部常识知识建模心理状态，要么通过自增强和对比训练提升泛化能力，但很少有方法在统一框架中同时做到这两点。
AI.method: K-SENSE采用三阶段编码流程：(1) 从COMET模型提取五个心理维度的推理常识知识；(2) 构建语义锚点，融合两个并行编码流的隐藏表示；(3) 使用监督对比学习对齐同类表示，同时通过注意力机制抑制无关知识噪声。
AI.result: 在Dreaddit（压力检测）和Depression_Mixed（抑郁检测）上，五次独立运行的平均F1分别达到86.1（0.6%）和94.3（0.8%），比最强基线分别提升约2.6和1.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 消融实验证实了各组件的贡献，包括时序知识整合策略和冻结知识编码器的选择。K-SENSE证明了外部知识引导与内部表示鲁棒性联合优化的有效性。

title: Attention-Augmented YOLOv8 with Ghost Convolution for Real-Time Vehicle Detection in Intelligent Transportation Systems
summary: Accurate vehicle detection is a critical component of autonomous driving, traffic surveillance, and intelligent transportation systems. This paper presents an enhanced YOLOv8n-based model that integrates the Ghost Module, Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM), and Deformable Convolutional Networks v2 (DCNv2) to improve detection performance. The Ghost Module reduces feature redundancy through efficient feature generation, CBAM refines feature representation via channel and spatial attention, and DCNv2 enhances adaptability to geometric variations in vehicle structures. Evaluated on the KITTI dataset, the proposed model achieves 95.4% mAP@0.5, representing an 8.97% improvement over the baseline YOLOv8n, along with 96.2% precision, 93.7% recall, and a 94.93% F1-score. Comparative analysis against seven state-of-the-art detectors demonstrates consistent superiority across key performance metrics, while ablation studies validate the individual and combined contributions of the integrated modules. By addressing feature redundancy, attention refinement, and spatial adaptability, the proposed approach offers a robust and computationally efficient solution for vehicle detection in diverse and complex traffic environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种增强型YOLOv8n车辆检测模型，通过集成Ghost模块、CBAM注意力机制和DCNv2可变形卷积，在KITTI数据集上达到95.4% mAP@0.5，相比基线提升8.97%。
AI.motivation: 提升复杂交通环境下车辆检测的精度和鲁棒性，解决特征冗余、注意力不足和几何变形适应性差的问题。
AI.method: 在YOLOv8n基础上集成：Ghost模块（减少特征冗余）、CBAM（通道+空间注意力细化特征）、DCNv2（增强几何变形适应能力）。
AI.result: KITTI数据集上mAP@0.5达95.4%（提升8.97%），精度96.2%，召回93.7%，F1-score 94.93%，优于7种SOTA检测器。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模块集成有效平衡了精度与效率，为车辆检测提供了一种鲁棒且计算高效的解决方案。

title: RL Token: Bootstrapping Online RL with Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models can learn to perform diverse manipulation skills "out of the box," but achieving the precision and speed that real-world tasks demand requires further fine-tuning -- for example, via reinforcement learning (RL). We introduce a lightweight method that enables sample-efficient online RL fine-tuning of pretrained VLAs using just a few hours of real-world practice. We (1) adapt the VLA to expose an "RL token," a compact readout representation that preserves task-relevant pretrained knowledge while serving as an efficient interface for online RL, and (2) train a small actor-critic head on this RL token to refine the actions, while anchoring the learned policy to the VLA. Online RL with the RL token (RLT) makes it possible to fine-tune even large VLAs with RL quickly and efficiently. Across four real-robot tasks (screw installation, zip tie fastening, charger insertion, and Ethernet insertion), RLT improves the speed on the hardest part of the task by up to 3x and raises success rates significantly within minutes to a few hours of practice. It can even surpass the speed of human teleoperation on some of the tasks.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出RLT方法，通过在预训练VLA模型中暴露一个"RL Token"作为高效接口，结合小型actor-critic网络进行在线强化学习微调，仅需数小时真实世界训练即可显著提升机器人操作任务的精度和速度（成功率大幅提升，速度最高提升3倍）。
AI.motivation: VLA模型虽能零样本执行多种操作技能，但现实任务对精度和速度的高要求使其需要进一步微调。现有微调方法效率低，难以在真实世界中快速适应。
AI.method: (1) 修改VLA架构，暴露一个"RL Token"作为紧凑的读出示向量，保留预训练知识的同时作为强化学习的接口；(2) 在该RL Token上训练一个小型actor-critic网络来优化动作，同时将策略锚定在VLA上，实现样本高效的在线RL微调。
AI.result: 在四项真实机器人任务（螺丝安装、扎带紧固、充电器插入、以太网插入）上，RLT将任务最难部分的速度提升最高3倍，成功率达显著提升，甚至在某些任务上超越人类遥操作速度。
AI.conclusion: RLT方法证明了仅需数小时真实世界在线RL微调即可大幅提升VLA模型在精密操作任务上的表现，为VLA模型的快速机器人部署提供了高效实用的方案。

title: Do Transaction-Level and Actor-Level AML Queues Agree? An Empirical Evaluation of Granularity Effects on the Elliptic++ Graph
summary: Graph-based anti-money laundering (AML) systems on blockchain networks can score suspicious activity at two granularity levels -- transactions or actor addresses -- yet compliance action is conducted per actor. This paper contributes an evaluation methodology for measuring how scoring granularity affects investigation queue composition under fixed review budgets. We formalize the evaluation through a projection framework mapping transaction-level scores to the actor-level action unit via four aggregation operators, and introduce budgeted investigation metrics -- yield@budget, burden decomposition, and case fragmentation. Using the public Elliptic++ Bitcoin dataset (203,769 transactions; 822,942 address occurrences), we train independent random forest classifiers at each level under a causal temporal protocol and compare review queues through Jaccard overlap, burden decomposition, and feature-matching ablations. At one-percent budget, temporal evaluation yields mean Jaccard of 0.374 (SD 0.171); static pooled evaluation yields 0.087 (95% CI [0.079, 0.094]). An enriched address model receiving all 237 features produces even lower overlap (Jaccard=0.051), with 4.3% illicit per 100 reviews versus 30.2% for the transaction-projected queue. Address-level detection value is temporally concentrated: two timesteps exceed 91% illicit per 100 reviews while the static burden is only 3.4%. A fixed hybrid policy underperforms the best single-level queue by 5.05pp (CI [-10.2pp, -0.9pp]). These findings establish that scoring granularity is a consequential design variable for AML investigation systems -- same data, same budget, different queues, different addresses investigated.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了区块链反洗钱系统中评分粒度（交易级 vs 地址级）对调查队列构成的影响，通过投影框架和预算约束指标发现：评分粒度是AML系统设计的关键变量，相同数据与预算下会筛选出不同的调查对象。
AI.motivation: 现有AML系统可在交易或地址两个粒度评分，但合规行动是按地址执行的。评分粒度如何影响调查队列的构成尚缺乏系统评估方法，亟需建立正式的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出投影框架将交易级分数通过四种聚合算子映射到地址级；引入预算约束下的调查指标（yield@budget、负担分解、案件碎片化）；在Elliptic++数据集上训练随机森林分类器，进行因果时序评估和静态评估，比较队列的Jaccard重叠度、负担分解和特征匹配消融。
AI.result: 1%预算下，时序评估Jaccard均值0.374，静态评估仅0.087；富特征地址模型Jaccard仅0.051，每100次审查仅发现4.3%非法地址（交易投影队列为30.2%）；地址级检测价值在时间上高度集中；混合策略不及最优单级队列。
AI.conclusion: 评分粒度是AML调查系统的重要设计变量——相同数据、相同预算，不同粒度产生不同的队列和调查对象。该发现对区块链AML系统设计具有重要指导意义。

title: MTRouter: Cost-Aware Multi-Turn LLM Routing with History-Model Joint Embeddings
comment: This work has accepted by ACL 2026
summary: Multi-turn, long-horizon tasks are increasingly common for large language models (LLMs), but solving them typically requires many sequential model invocations, accumulating substantial inference costs. Here, we study cost-aware multi-turn LLM routing: selecting which model to invoke at each turn from a model pool, given a fixed cost budget. We propose MTRouter, which encodes the interaction history and candidate models into joint history-model embeddings, and learns an outcome estimator from logged trajectories to predict turn-level model utility. Experiments show that MTRouter improves the performance-cost trade-off: on ScienceWorld, it surpasses GPT-5 while reducing total cost by 58.7%; on Humanity's Last Exam (HLE), it achieves competitive accuracy while reducing total cost by 43.4% relative to GPT-5, and these gains even carry over to held-out tasks. Further analyses reveal several mechanisms underlying its effectiveness: relative to prior multi-turn routers, MTRouter makes fewer model switches, is more tolerant to transient errors, and exhibits emergent specialization across models. Code: https://github.com/ZhangYiqun018/MTRouter

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTRouter，一种面向多轮长程任务的成本感知LLM路由方法，通过历史-模型联合嵌入和结果估计器，在固定预算下智能选择每轮调用的模型，实现性能与推理成本的更好权衡。
AI.motivation: 多轮长程任务需要大量顺序模型调用，推理成本高昂。如何在固定预算下，为每轮对话智能选择最优性价比的模型，是降低LLM部署成本的关键问题。
AI.method: MTRouter将交互历史和候选模型编码为联合历史-模型嵌入，并从记录的轨迹中学习结果估计器，用于预测每轮调用各个模型的效用，从而在预算约束下进行最优路由选择。
AI.result: 在ScienceWorld上，MTRouter超越GPT-5的同时降低58.7%总成本；在HLE上达到竞争性精度并降低43.4%成本。相比之前的多轮路由方法，模型切换更少、对瞬时错误更鲁棒，且展现出模型间的涌现特化能力。
AI.conclusion: MTRouter有效解决了多轮任务中的成本-性能权衡问题，验证了联合历史-模型编码和结果估计学习的有效性，为LLM的高效部署提供了实用方案。

title: IoT-Enhanced CNN-Based Labelled Crack Detection for Additive Manufacturing Image Annotation in Industry 4.0
summary: This paper presents an IoT-enhanced deep learning framework for automated crack detection in Additive Manufacturing (AM) surfaces using convolutional neural networks (CNNs). By integrating IoT-enabled real-time monitoring, high-resolution imaging, and edge computing, the system enables continuous in-situ defect detection and classification. Real-time data acquisition supports immediate CNN-based analysis, improving both accuracy and efficiency in AM quality control. The framework supports supervised and semi-supervised learning, enabling robust performance on large, sparsely annotated datasets. Using LabelImg for annotation and OpenCV for preprocessing, the system achieves 99.54% accuracy on 14,982 images, with 96% precision, 98% recall, and a 97% F1-score. Dataset balancing and augmentation significantly improve generalization, increasing accuracy from 32% to 99%. Beyond detection, the framework establishes a linkage between AM process parameters, defect formation, and surface topology, supporting predictive analytics and defect mitigation. Aligned with Industry 4.0, it incorporates Digital Twin (DT) technology for real-time process simulation, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control. Key contributions include an IoT-based monitoring system using edge devices (Raspberry Pi 4B), an optimized CNN with model quantization and batch processing reducing inference latency by 47%, and an MQTT-based low-latency data streaming system with 5G connectivity, lowering transmission overhead by 35%. DT integration further enables predictive defect analysis and dynamic adjustment of AM parameters. This work advances intelligent AM quality control by providing a scalable, high-accuracy, and low-latency framework. Future directions include multimodal data fusion, hybrid architectures, and enhanced Digital Twin simulations for AI-driven defect prevention.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种IoT增强的深度学习框架，利用CNN对增材制造表面进行自动化裂纹检测，结合边缘计算、实时监控和数字孪生技术，在14,982张图像上达到99.54%的准确率，并将推理延迟降低47%。
AI.motivation: 增材制造过程中的表面缺陷检测目前依赖人工或传统方法，效率和准确性不足。需要一种自动化、实时、高精度的检测系统来提升AM质量控制水平。
AI.method: 采用CNN架构，结合IoT设备（Raspberry Pi 4B）实时采集高分辨率图像，通过LabelImg标注、OpenCV预处理，使用模型量化和批处理优化推理速度，MQTT+5G实现低延迟数据传输，集成数字孪生技术进行预测分析和参数自适应控制。
AI.result: 在14,982张图像上达到99.54%准确率、96%精确率、98%召回率、97% F1-score；数据增强将准确率从32%提升至99%；推理延迟降低47%；数据传输开销降低35%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为AM质量控制提供了可扩展、高精度、低延迟的解决方案，建立了工艺参数与缺陷形成之间的关联。未来方向包括多模态数据融合、混合架构及增强数字孪生仿真。

title: Channel Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models: A Systematic Benchmark Across Architectures, Tasks, and Training Regimes
summary: Scaling EEG foundation models requires pooling data across heterogeneous electrode montages, a prerequisite both for larger pretraining corpora and for downstream deployment. We present the first systematic comparison of four channel adaptation methods (Conv1d projection, spherical spline interpolation (SSI), source-space decomposition, and Riemannian re-centering) across five pretrained EEG foundation models (5M--157M parameters), five downstream tasks, and two training regimes with 10--15 random seeds each. We find that rigid-montage models (BENDR, Neuro-GPT) require external adaptation, while flexible models (EEGPT, CBraMod) match or exceed it natively when fine-tuned but benefit from external methods under frozen-encoder deployment. A probe-SFT asymmetry exists: external adaptation can cause severe negative transfer during fine-tuning of flexible models. The optimal method is architecture-dependent (Conv1d for BENDR, SSI/Riemannian for Neuro-GPT, source-space decomposition for depression detection), and 5M-parameter CBraMod outperforms models up to 31$\times$ larger on 4/5 datasets, consistent with independent findings that compact EEG-specific architectures can match larger models.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统比较了四种EEG通道适配方法（Conv1d投影、球面样条插值、源空间分解、黎曼重中心化）在五个预训练EEG基础模型上的效果，发现适配方法的效果高度依赖于模型架构，且存在探针-SFT不对称性，同时5M参数的CBraMod在多数任务上优于大31倍的模型。
AI.motivation: 扩展EEG基础模型需要将来自不同电极配置的异构数据进行池化，这是构建更大预训练语料库和实现下游部署的前提条件，但目前缺乏对不同通道适配方法的系统比较。
AI.method: 系统比较了四种通道适配方法（Conv1d投影、球面样条插值、源空间分解、黎曼重中心化）在五个EEG基础模型（5M-157M参数）、五个下游任务和两种训练范式（微调与冻结编码器）上的表现，每种设置使用10-15个随机种子。
AI.result: 刚性电极配置模型（BENDR, Neuro-GPT）需要外部适配；灵活模型（EEGPT, CBraMod）微调时原生表现良好但冻结编码器时受益于外部方法；存在探针-SFT不对称性（外部适配在灵活模型微调时可能导致严重负迁移）；最优方法依赖架构；5M参数的CBraMod在4/5数据集上优于大31倍的模型。
AI.conclusion: 通道适配方法的选择高度依赖模型架构和训练范式，紧凑型EEG专用架构可媲美更大模型，为EEG基础模型的跨数据集扩展提供了实用指导。

title: MetaGAI: A Large-Scale and High-Quality Benchmark for Generative AI Model and Data Card Generation
summary: The rapid proliferation of Generative AI necessitates rigorous documentation standards for transparency and governance. However, manual creation of Model and Data Cards is not scalable, while automated approaches lack large-scale, high-fidelity benchmarks for systematic evaluation. We introduce MetaGAI, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,541 verified document triplets constructed through semantic triangulation of academic papers, GitHub repositories, and Hugging Face artifacts. Unlike prior single-source datasets, MetaGAI employs a multi-agent framework with specialized Retriever, Generator, and Editor agents, validated through four-dimensional human-in-the-loop assessment, including human evaluation of editor-refined ground truth. We establish a robust evaluation protocol combining automated metrics with validated LLM-as-a-Judge frameworks. Extensive analysis reveals that sparse Mixture-of-Experts architectures achieve superior cost-quality efficiency, while a fundamental trade-off exists between faithfulness and completeness. MetaGAI provides a foundational testbed for benchmarking, training, and analyzing automated Model and Data Card generation methods at scale. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/haoxuan-unt2024/MetaGAI-Benchmark.

AI.tldr: MetaGAI是一个用于自动化生成模型和数据卡（Model/Data Cards）的基准测试集，包含2,541个通过三元语义三角验证的文档，并提出了多智能体框架和评估协议。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展需要严格的文档标准来确保透明度和治理，但手动创建模型卡和数据卡不可扩展，自动化方法缺乏大规模、高保真的基准用于系统评估。
AI.method: 通过学术论文、GitHub仓库和Hugging Face制品的三元语义三角验证构建2,541个文档三元组；提出包含Retriever、Generator、Editor专业智能体的多智能体框架；采用四维人类参与的评估（含编辑优化后的真值人工评估）；结合自动指标和LLM-as-a-Judge的评估协议。
AI.result: 稀疏MoE架构在成本-质量效率上表现最优；存在忠实度与完整性之间的根本性权衡。
AI.conclusion: MetaGAI为自动化模型和数据卡生成方法提供了大规模的基准测试、训练和分析基础平台。

title: Pref-CTRL: Preference Driven LLM Alignment using Representation Editing
comment: Accepted to the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Test-time alignment methods offer a promising alternative to fine-tuning by steering the outputs of large language models (LLMs) at inference time with lightweight interventions on their internal representations. Recently, a prominent and effective approach, RE-Control (Kong et al., 2024), has proposed leveraging an external value function trained over the LLM's hidden states to guide generation via gradient-based editing. While effective, this method overlooks a key characteristic of alignment tasks, i.e. that they are typically formulated as learning from human preferences between candidate responses. To address this, in this paper we propose a novel preference-based training framework, Pref-CTRL, that uses a multi-objective value function to better reflect the structure of preference data. Our approach has outperformed RE-Control on two benchmark datasets and showed greater generalization on out-of-domain datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/UTS-nlPUG/pref-ctrl.

AI.tldr: 提出Pref-CTRL，一种基于偏好的测试时对齐方法，通过多目标价值函数改进了RE-Control，在偏好数据上表现更好。
AI.motivation: 现有的测试时对齐方法（如RE-Control）忽略了对齐任务通常是从人类偏好中学习这一关键特性，因此需要一种能更好反映偏好数据结构的训练框架。
AI.method: 提出Pref-CTRL框架，使用多目标价值函数（multi-objective value function）来更好地表征偏好数据的结构，在推理时通过梯度编辑引导LLM生成。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上优于RE-Control，且在域外数据集上展现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于偏好的多目标价值函数能更有效地实现测试时对齐，提升对齐效果和泛化能力。

title: A Digital Pathology Resource for Liver Cancer Quantification with Datasets, Benchmarks, and Tools
summary: Liver cancer, especially hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC), imposes a substantial global disease burden. Accurate diagnosis and prognostic assessment directly influence treatment selection and patient survival, and pathological examination remains the gold standard for liver cancer diagnosis. Identifying diverse tissue components and pathological subtypes on histopathology slides is crucial for estimating postoperative recurrence risk and overall prognosis. However, most publicly available resources are still provided at the whole-slide image (WSI) level, and well-annotated datasets for fine-grained tissue component identification in liver cancer are scarce, which hinders reproducible model development and the deployment of quantitative analysis tools. To address this gap, we release HepatoBench, a patch-level image database for liver cancer with annotations for seven key tissue categories. Based on HepatoBench, we train and open-source a deep learning classification model as a tissue recognition tool. Furthermore, we train a WSI-level tumor/non-tumor segmentation model to automatically localize lesion regions across entire slides. By integrating the patch-level tissue classifier with the WSI-level segmentation model, we build HepatoQuant, an end-to-end, disease-specific regional quantification tool for liver cancer, enabling a unified workflow from WSIs to tissue composition parsing and quantitative statistics. We also open-source HepatoBench, the benchmarking protocol, and supporting tools, providing a solid foundation for automated regional quantification and fair method comparison in liver cancer pathology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 HepatoBench（肝细胞癌组织病理学补丁级图像数据库）和 HepatoQuant（端到端区域量化工具），通过深度学习模型实现肝癌症切片组织成分识别与自动量化分析，并开源相关资源以推动可重复研究与公平对比。
AI.motivation: 肝细胞癌（HCC）负担重，病理诊断是金标准。现有资源多在全切片图像（WSI）级别，缺乏细粒度组织成分标注的数据集，阻碍了可重复模型开发与定量分析工具部署。
AI.method: 1) 构建 HepatoBench——带7类组织标注的补丁级图像数据库；2) 训练并开源补丁级组织分类模型；3) 训练WSI级肿瘤/非肿瘤分割模型；4) 将二者整合为 HepatoQuant 端到端量化工具。
AI.result: 发布 HepatoBench 数据集、基准测试协议、补丁分类模型与WSI分割模型，以及 HepatoQuant 工具，实现从WSI到组织成分解析与量化统计的统一流程。
AI.conclusion: 为肝癌病理自动区域量化和公平方法比较提供了基础资源与工具。

title: ProEval: Proactive Failure Discovery and Efficient Performance Estimation for Generative AI Evaluation
comment: Our open-sourced code and data can be found at https://github.com/google-deepmind/proeval
summary: Evaluating generative AI models is increasingly resource-intensive due to slow inference, expensive raters, and a rapidly growing landscape of models and benchmarks. We propose ProEval, a proactive evaluation framework that leverages transfer learning to efficiently estimate performance and identify failure cases. ProEval employs pre-trained Gaussian Processes (GPs) as surrogates for the performance score function, mapping model inputs to metrics such as the severity of errors or safety violations. By framing performance estimation as Bayesian quadrature (BQ) and failure discovery as superlevel set sampling, we develop uncertainty-aware decision strategies that actively select or synthesize highly informative inputs for testing. Theoretically, we prove that our pre-trained GP-based BQ estimator is unbiased and bounded. Empirically, extensive experiments on reasoning, safety alignment, and classification benchmarks demonstrate that ProEval is significantly more efficient than competitive baselines. It requires 8-65x fewer samples to achieve estimates within 1% of the ground truth, while simultaneously revealing more diverse failure cases under a stricter evaluation budget.

AI.tldr: 提出ProEval，一种利用高斯过程迁移学习来主动评估生成式AI模型的框架，通过贝叶斯求积和超层级集采样高效估计模型性能并发现失败案例，在推理、安全对齐等任务上比基线方法效率提升8-65倍。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI模型的评估越来越耗费资源（推理慢、标注成本高、模型和基准数量激增），亟需一种高效且能主动发现失败案例的评估方法。
AI.method: 使用预训练的高斯过程作为性能评分函数的代理模型，将性能估计建模为贝叶斯求积问题，将失败发现建模为超层级集采样问题，采用不确定性感知的决策策略主动选择或合成高信息量的测试输入。
AI.result: 在推理、安全对齐和分类基准上，ProEval仅需基线方法8-65分之一的样本即可达到1%误差内的估计精度，同时在更严格的评估预算下能发现更多样化的失败案例。
AI.conclusion: ProEval通过主动学习和迁移学习大幅降低评估成本，是一种高效且可扩展的生成式AI模型评估框架。

title: FinGround: Detecting and Grounding Financial Hallucinations via Atomic Claim Verification
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Industry Track. 14 pages, 1 figure, 14 tables
summary: Financial AI systems must produce answers grounded in specific regulatory filings, yet current LLMs fabricate metrics, invent citations, and miscalculate derived quantities. These errors carry direct regulatory consequences as the EU AI Act's high-risk enforcement deadline approaches (August 2026). Existing hallucination detectors treat all claims uniformly, missing 43% of computational errors that require arithmetic re-verification against structured tables. We present FinGround, a three-stage verify-then-ground pipeline for financial document QA. Stage 1 performs finance-aware hybrid retrieval over text and tables. Stage 2 decomposes answers into atomic claims classified by a six-type financial taxonomy and verified with type-routed strategies including formula reconstruction. Stage 3 rewrites unsupported claims with paragraph- and table-cell-level citations. To cleanly isolate verification value from retrieval quality, we propose retrieval-equalized evaluation as standard methodology for RAG verification research: when all systems receive identical retrieval, FinGround still reduces hallucination rates by 68% over the strongest baseline ($p < 0.01$). The full pipeline achieves a 78% reduction relative to GPT-4o. An 8B distilled detector retains 91.4% F1 at 18x lower per-claim latency, enabling $0.003/query deployment, supported by qualitative signals from a four-week analyst pilot.

AI.tldr: FinGround是一个三阶段验证-溯源金融文档QA系统，通过财务感知检索、原子声明分类与类型路由验证、以及引用重写，在EU AI Act合规背景下将幻觉率降低68-78%，并提出了检索均衡评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有金融AI系统在监管文件问答中会编造指标、捏造引用、计算错误，而EU AI Act的高风险执行期限（2026年8月）即将到来，现有幻觉检测器对所有声明一视同仁，忽略了43%需要算术重验的计算错误，亟需专门针对金融文档的结构化验证方法。
AI.method: 三阶段流程：1) 金融感知混合检索（文本+表格）；2) 将答案分解为原子声明，按六类金融分类法分类，使用类型路由策略（包括公式重建）验证；3) 用段落级和表格单元格级引用重写不支持的声明。同时提出检索均衡评估方法以隔离验证效果。
AI.result: 在检索均衡条件下，FinGround比最强基线降低68%幻觉率（p<0.01），完整流程相比GPT-4o降低78%。8B蒸馏检测器保留91.4% F1，延迟降低18倍，部署成本$0.003/查询。
AI.conclusion: 针对金融文档的结构化验证-溯源范式能有效解决LLM在金融领域的幻觉问题，尤其擅长处理需要算术重验的计算错误，且蒸馏模型在效率与效果间取得良好平衡。

title: RouteNLP: Closed-Loop LLM Routing with Conformal Cascading and Distillation Co-Optimization
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 Industry Track. 13 pages, 2 figures, 15 tables, 1 algorithm
summary: Serving diverse NLP workloads with large language models is costly: at one enterprise partner, inference costs exceeded $200K/month despite over 70% of queries being routine tasks well within the capability of smaller models. We present RouteNLP, a closed-loop framework that routes queries across a tiered model portfolio to minimize cost while satisfying per-task quality constraints. The framework integrates three components: a difficulty-aware router with shared task-conditioned representations trained on preference data and quality signals; confidence-calibrated cascading that uses conformal prediction for distribution-free threshold initialization; and a distillation-routing co-optimization loop that clusters escalation failures, applies targeted knowledge distillation to cheaper models, and automatically retrains the router, yielding over twice the cost improvement of untargeted distillation. In an 8-week pilot deployment processing ~5K queries/day at an enterprise customer-service division, RouteNLP reduced inference costs by 58% while maintaining 91% response acceptance and reducing p99 latency from 1,847 ms to 387 ms. On a six-task benchmark spanning finance, customer service, and legal domains, the framework achieves 40-85% cost reduction while retaining 96-100% quality on structured tasks and 96-98% on generation tasks, with human evaluation confirming that 74.5% of routed generation outputs match or exceed frontier-model quality.

AI.tldr: RouteNLP是一个闭环框架，通过将查询路由到不同规模模型构成的层级化模型组合中，在满足每个任务质量约束的前提下最小化推理成本。在8周的企业部署中，它降低了58%的推理成本，同时保持了91%的响应接受率，并将p99延迟从1847ms降至387ms。
AI.motivation: 企业使用大型语言模型服务多样化NLP工作负载成本极高——一家企业合作伙伴的推理成本超过每月20万美元，尽管超过70%的查询是小型模型足以胜任的常规任务。因此需要一种能根据任务难度智能路由查询以降低成本的方法。
AI.method: RouteNLP包含三个核心组件：1）难度感知路由器，使用共享任务条件表示并在偏好数据和质量信号上训练；2）基于共形预测的置信度校准级联，实现无分布假设的阈值初始化；3）蒸馏-路由协同优化循环，聚类升级失败案例并对廉价模型进行定向知识蒸馏，自动重训练路由器。
AI.result: 在8周企业部署中（~5K查询/天），推理成本降低58%，响应接受率保持91%，p99延迟从1847ms降至387ms。在六任务基准上，结构化任务实现40-85%成本降低且质量保留96-100%，生成任务质量保留96-98%，74.5%的路由生成输出匹配或超越前沿模型质量。
AI.conclusion: RouteNLP通过智能路由和持续优化循环，在保持高质量的同时显著降低LLM推理成本，证明了层级化模型组合策略在实际企业场景中的可行性和有效性。

title: MeshLAM: Feed-Forward One-Shot Animatable Textured Mesh Avatar Reconstruction
summary: We introduce MeshLAM, a feed-forward framework for one-shot animatable mesh head reconstruction that generates high-fidelity, animatable 3D head avatars from a single image. Unlike previous work that relies on time-consuming test-time optimization or extensive multi-view data, our method produces complete mesh representations with inherent animatability from a single image in a single forward pass. Our approach employs a dual shape and texture map architecture that simultaneously processes mesh vertices and texture map with extracted image features from a shared transformer backbone, allowing for coherent shape carving and appearance modeling. To prevent mesh collapse and ensure topological integrity during feed-forward deformation, we propose an iterative GRU-based decoding mechanism with progressive geometry deformation and texture refinement, coupled with a novel reprojection-based texture guidance mechanism that anchors appearance learning to the input image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in reconstruction quality, animation capability, and computational efficiency. Project page at https://meshlam.github.io.

AI.tldr: MeshLAM 是一个前馈式框架，能从单张图片一步生成高保真、可动画化的3D头部网格模型，无需测试时优化或多视图数据。
AI.motivation: 现有单图3D头部重建方法依赖于耗时的测试时优化或大量多视图数据，缺乏高效的前馈式解决方案。
AI.method: 采用双形状与纹理图架构，结合共享Transformer骨干提取图像特征；提出基于GRU的迭代解码机制实现渐进式几何变形与纹理细化，以及重投影纹理引导机制将外观学习锚定到输入图像。
AI.result: 在重建质量、动画能力和计算效率上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MeshLAM实现了高效、高质量的单一图像到可动画3D头部重建，兼顾保真度与拓扑完整性。

title: Unstable Rankings in Bayesian Deep Learning Evaluation
summary: Standard evaluations of Bayesian deep learning methods assume that metric estimates are reliable, but we show this assumption fails under data scarcity. Method rankings are not only unreliable at small $n$, but also dataset-dependent in ways that point estimates cannot reveal: the same method comparison yields $P(\mathrm{MCD} \prec \mathrm{Ensemble}) = 1.000$ at $n = 50$ on one dataset and remains below $0.95$ even at $n = 500$ on another. Across the datasets we consider, no universal sample size threshold exists, which is precisely why dataset-specific posterior inference is necessary. To address this, we use a Bayesian hierarchical model with method-specific variances to treat evaluation metrics as random variables across data realizations, and we use a predictive Minimum Detectable Difference curve to assess whether an observed gap would be detectable at a given training size. Across six Bayesian deep learning methods and five regression datasets, our results show that uncertainty-aware evaluation is necessary in low-data settings, because current evidence for method superiority and predictive detectability at the same training size can diverge substantially. Our framework provides practitioners with principled tools to determine whether their evaluation data is sufficient before drawing conclusions about method superiority.

AI.tldr: 本文指出在数据稀缺条件下，贝叶斯深度学习方法的评估指标不可靠，方法排名依赖于数据集且无通用样本量阈值。作者提出贝叶斯层次模型将评估指标视为随机变量，并引入最小可检测差异曲线来判断观测差距是否可检测。实验表明不确定性感知评估在低数据场景下至关重要。
AI.motivation: 标准评估方法假设指标估计可靠，但在小样本情况下这一假设不成立。方法排名不仅在小样本时不可靠，而且数据集依赖性强，点估计无法揭示这种差异。需要一种不确定性感知的评估框架来判断数据量是否足够。
AI.method: 使用贝叶斯层次模型，引入方法特定的方差，将评估指标视为跨数据实现的随机变量。提出预测性最小可检测差异曲线来评估给定训练量下观测差距是否可检测。
AI.result: 在6种贝叶斯深度学习方法、5个回归数据集上，发现当前方法优越性的证据与预测可检测性在相同训练量下可能存在显著分歧。无通用样本量阈值，数据集特定的后验推断是必要的。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知评估在低数据场景下是必要的，该框架为从业者提供了判断评估数据是否充足的工具。

title: When AI reviews science: Can we trust the referee?
summary: The volume of scientific submissions continues to climb, outpacing the capacity of qualified human referees and stretching editorial timelines. At the same time, modern large language models (LLMs) offer impressive capabilities in summarization, fact checking, and literature triage, making the integration of AI into peer review increasingly attractive -- and, in practice, unavoidable. Yet early deployments and informal adoption have exposed acute failure modes. Recent incidents have revealed that hidden prompt injections embedded in manuscripts can steer LLM-generated reviews toward unjustifiably positive judgments. Complementary studies have also demonstrated brittleness to adversarial phrasing, authority and length biases, and hallucinated claims. These episodes raise a central question for scholarly communication: when AI reviews science, can we trust the AI referee? This paper provides a security- and reliability-centered analysis of AI peer review. We map attacks across the review lifecycle -- training and data retrieval, desk review, deep review, rebuttal, and system-level. We instantiate this taxonomy with four treatment-control probes on a stratified set of ICLR 2025 submissions, using two advanced LLM-based referees to isolate the causal effects of prestige framing, assertion strength, rebuttal sycophancy, and contextual poisoning on review scores. Together, this taxonomy and experimental audit provide an evidence-based baseline for assessing and tracking the reliability of AI peer review and highlight concrete failure points to guide targeted, testable mitigations.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了AI（LLM）用于同行评审的安全与可靠性问题，通过构建攻击分类法（涵盖评审全生命周期的五种攻击类型）并进行实验探测（检验声望框架、断言强度、反驳谄媚和上下文投毒对评审分数的影响），揭示了AI评审在对抗性攻击下的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 随着科学论文数量激增，人工审稿人资源不足，LLM被越来越多地引入同行评审流程；但早期部署暴露了严重的安全漏洞（如提示注入导致不公正好评、对抗性措辞、偏见和幻觉），引发了"能否信任AI审稿人"的核心问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建了涵盖训练/数据检索、桌面评审、深度评审、反驳和系统级别五个阶段的攻击分类法；2) 基于ICLR 2025提交论文的分层样本，设计了四种治疗-控制探针实验，使用两种先进LLM审稿人，检验声望框架、断言强度、反驳谄媚和上下文投毒的因果效应。
AI.result: 实验结果量化了上述四种攻击对AI审稿评分的影响，展示了AI评审在对抗性设置下的系统性脆弱性，并建立了评估AI同行评审可靠性的经验基线。
AI.conclusion: AI同行评审在安全性和可靠性方面存在严重缺陷，需要针对具体失败点制定可测试的缓解措施；本文的分类法和实验审计为追踪和改进AI评审可靠性提供了基础。

title: LLMs Reading the Rhythms of Daily Life: Aligned Understanding for Behavior Prediction and Generation
summary:
Human daily behavior unfolds as complex sequences shaped by intentions, preferences, and context. Effectively modeling these behaviors is crucial for intelligent systems such as personal assistants and recommendation engines. While recent advances in deep learning and behavior pre-training have improved behavior prediction, key challenges remain--particularly in handling long-tail behaviors, enhancing interpretability, and supporting multiple tasks within a unified framework. Large language models (LLMs) offer a promising direction due to their semantic richness, strong interpretability, and generative capabilities. However, the structural and modal differences between behavioral data and natural language limit the direct applicability of LLMs.
  To address this gap, we propose Behavior Understanding Alignment (BUA), a novel framework that integrates LLMs into human behavior modeling through a structured curriculum learning process. BUA employs sequence embeddings from pretrained behavior models as alignment anchors and guides the LLM through a three-stage curriculum, while a multi-round dialogue setting introduces prediction and generation capabilities. Experiments on two real-world datasets demonstrate that BUA significantly outperforms existing methods in both tasks, highlighting its effectiveness and flexibility in applying LLMs to complex human behavior modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出BUA框架，通过课程学习将LLM与人类行为建模对齐，在行为预测与生成任务上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统行为建模难以处理长尾行为、缺乏可解释性且难以统一支持多任务。LLM虽有语义丰富和可解释性优势，但行为数据与自然语言之间存在结构和模态差异，限制了LLM的直接应用。
AI.method: 提出BUA框架：① 使用预训练行为模型的序列嵌入作为对齐锚点；② 设计三阶段课程学习引导LLM逐步对齐；③ 引入多轮对话机制实现预测与生成能力。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上，BUA在行为预测和生成任务中均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BUA有效且灵活地将LLM应用于复杂人类行为建模，弥合了行为数据与LLM之间的鸿沟。

title: Probing Visual Planning in Image Editing Models
comment: Accepted to ES-Reasoning Workshop @ ICLR 2026. Our code is available at https://github.com/spatigen/amaze
summary: Visual planning represents a crucial facet of human intelligence, especially in tasks that require complex spatial reasoning and navigation. Yet, in machine learning, this inherently visual problem is often tackled through a verbal-centric lens. While recent research demonstrates the promise of fully visual approaches, they suffer from significant computational inefficiency due to the step-by-step planning-by-generation paradigm. In this work, we present EAR, an editing-as-reasoning paradigm that reformulates visual planning as a single-step image transformation. To isolate intrinsic reasoning from visual recognition, we employ abstract puzzles as probing tasks and introduce AMAZE, a procedurally generated dataset that features the classical Maze and Queen problems, covering distinct, complementary forms of visual planning. The abstract nature of AMAZE also facilitates automatic evaluation of autoregressive and diffusion-based models in terms of both pixel-wise fidelity and logical validity. We assess leading proprietary and open-source editing models. The results show that they all struggle in the zero-shot setting, finetuning on basic scales enables remarkable generalization to larger in-domain scales and out-of-domain scales and geometries. However, our best model that runs on high-end hardware fails to match the zero-shot efficiency of human solvers, highlighting a persistent gap in neural visual reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EAR（编辑即推理）范式，将视觉规划问题重构为单步图像变换，并创建了包含迷宫和皇后问题的AMAZE数据集。研究发现现有编辑模型在零样本设置下表现不佳，但微调后可泛化到更大规模问题，然而最佳模型在效率上仍不及人类求解者。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉规划方法存在计算效率低下的问题（逐步生成），且该问题常被用语言中心的方式解决，忽视了其本质上的视觉特性。作者希望提出一种更高效的视觉推理范式。
AI.method: 提出EAR（Editing-as-Reasoning）范式，将视觉规划转化为单步图像编辑/变换任务。构建AMAZE数据集，包含两种抽象谜题（迷宫和皇后问题），用于评估自回归和扩散模型在像素级保真度和逻辑有效性上的表现。
AI.result: 现有编辑模型（包括专有和开源）在零样本设置下表现不佳；在基本尺度上微调后，模型能显著泛化到更大的域内尺度和域外尺度及几何形状；但最佳模型在高端硬件上仍无法匹配人类求解者的零样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 视觉推理中仍然存在人类与模型之间的显著差距，尤其是在效率方面。

title: Conditional Imputation for Within-Modality Missingness in Multi-Modal Federated Learning
comment: Wugeng Zheng and Ziwen Kan contributed equally to this work. Song Wang is the corresponding author. Accepted to FedVision 2026
summary: Multimodal Federated Learning (MMFL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative training, but real-world clinical applications often suffer from within-modality missingness caused by sensor intermittency or irregular sampling. Existing methods implicitly represent unobserved data via architectural alignment or missing embeddings, often failing to recover the true distribution and yielding sub-optimal performance. We propose CondI, a federated framework explicitly addressing this missingness using conditional diffusion models. CondI employs a two-phase training pipeline: first, imputing unobserved temporal components using available multimodal context and conditional embeddings; second, optimizing modality-specific extractors and joint embedding spaces. During inference, imputed raw data pass through trained extractors to generate robust features, providing a holistic representation for downstream tasks. Explicit data imputation ensures models operate on complete semantic structures, significantly enhancing resilience against severe data incompleteness. Experiments on three clinical datasets (PTB-XL, SLEEP-EDF, MIMIC-IV) demonstrate CondI achieves comparable results to state-of-the-art baselines. Code: https://github.com/ZhengWugeng/CondI

AI.tldr: CondI是一个面向多模态联邦学习的条件扩散模型框架，通过显式数据插补解决临床应用中因传感器间歇或采样不规则导致的模态内数据缺失问题，采用两阶段训练流程在联邦环境下恢复缺失数据分布，实验证明其在三个临床数据集上与SOTA方法表现相当。
AI.motivation: 多模态联邦学习在实际临床应用中常面临模态内数据缺失问题（如传感器间歇或采样不规则），现有方法通过架构对齐或缺失嵌入隐式处理未观测数据，但往往无法恢复真实数据分布，导致性能次优。
AI.method: CondI采用两阶段训练流程：第一阶段利用可用多模态上下文和条件嵌入通过条件扩散模型插补未观测的时间组件；第二阶段优化模态特定提取器和联合嵌入空间。推理时，插补后的原始数据经过训练好的提取器生成鲁棒特征，为下游任务提供整体表示。
AI.result: 在PTB-XL、SLEEP-EDF、MIMIC-IV三个临床数据集上，CondI达到了与当前最先进基线可比的结果。
AI.conclusion: 显式数据插补确保模型在完整的语义结构上运行，显著增强了对严重数据不完整性的鲁棒性，为多模态联邦学习中的缺失数据问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Thinking Like a Clinician: A Cognitive AI Agent for Clinical Diagnosis via Panoramic Profiling and Adversarial Debate
summary: The application of large language models (LLMs) in clinical decision support faces significant challenges of "tunnel vision" and diagnostic hallucinations present in their processing unstructured electronic health records (EHRs). To address these challenges, we propose a novel chain-based clinical reasoning framework, called DxChain, which transforms the diagnostic workflow into an iterative process by mirroring a clinician's cognitive trajectory that consists of "Memory Anchoring", "Navigation" and "Verification" phases. DxChain introduces three key methodological innovations to elicit the potential of LLM: (i) a Profile-Then-Plan paradigm to mitigate cold-start hallucinations by establishing a panoramic patient baseline, (ii) a Medical Tree-of-Thoughts (Med-ToT) algorithm for strategic look ahead planning and resource aware navigation, and (iii) a Dialectical Diagnostic Verification procedure utilizing "Angel-Devil" adversarial debates to resolve complex evidence conflicts. Evaluated on two real world benchmarks, MIMIC-IV-Ext Cardiac Disease and MIMIC-IV-Ext CDM, DxChain achieves state-of-the-art performances in both diagnostic accuracy and logical consistency, offering a modular and reliable architecture for next-generation clinical AI. The code is at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Dx-Chain.

AI.tldr: 提出了DxChain，一种基于链式临床推理框架，通过记忆锚定、导航和验证三阶段迭代过程，结合Profile-Then-Plan、医学思维树(Med-ToT)和天使-魔鬼对抗辩论等创新方法，缓解LLM在临床决策中的隧道视野和诊断幻觉问题，在MIMIC-IV基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: LLM在临床决策支持中存在"隧道视野"和诊断幻觉问题，处理非结构化电子健康记录时表现不佳，需要更可靠的推理框架来模拟临床医生的认知路径。
AI.method: 提出三阶段链式推理框架DxChain：(1) Profile-Then-Plan范式建立患者全景基线以缓解冷启动幻觉；(2) 医学思维树(Med-ToT)算法进行战略性前瞻规划和资源感知导航；(3) "天使-魔鬼"对抗辩论的辩证诊断验证机制解决复杂证据冲突。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV-Ext Cardiac Disease和MIMIC-IV-Ext CDM两个真实世界基准上，诊断准确性和逻辑一致性均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: DxChain提供了一种模块化、可靠的临床AI架构，有效缓解了LLM在临床推理中的幻觉问题，可作为下一代临床决策支持系统的基础。

title: ComplianceNLP: Knowledge-Graph-Augmented RAG for Multi-Framework Regulatory Gap Detection
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 Industry Track. 19 pages, 15 tables, 1 figure
summary: Financial institutions must track over 60,000 regulatory events annually, overwhelming manual compliance teams; the industry has paid over USD 300 billion in fines and settlements since the 2008 financial crisis. We present ComplianceNLP, an end-to-end system that automatically monitors regulatory changes, extracts structured obligations, and identifies compliance gaps against institutional policies. The system integrates three components: (1) a knowledge-graph-augmented RAG pipeline grounding generations in a regulatory knowledge graph of 12,847 provisions across SEC, MiFID II, and Basel III; (2) multi-task obligation extraction combining NER, deontic classification, and cross-reference resolution over a shared LEGAL-BERT encoder; and (3) compliance gap analysis that maps obligations to internal policies with severity-aware scoring. On our benchmark, ComplianceNLP achieves 87.7 F1 on gap detection, outperforming GPT-4o+RAG by +3.5 F1, with 94.2% grounding accuracy ($r=0.83$ vs. human judgments) and 83.4 F1 under realistic end-to-end error propagation. Ablations show that knowledge-graph re-ranking contributes the largest marginal gain (+4.6 F1), confirming that structural regulatory knowledge is critical for cross-reference-heavy tasks. Domain-specific knowledge distillation (70B $\to$ 8B) combined with Medusa speculative decoding yields $2.8\times$ inference speedup; regulatory text's low entropy ($H=2.31$ bits vs. $3.87$ general text) produces 91.3% draft-token acceptance rates. In four months of parallel-run deployment processing 9,847 updates at a financial institution, the system achieved 96.0% estimated recall and 90.7% precision, with a $3.1\times$ sustained analyst efficiency gain. We report deployment lessons on trust calibration, GRC integration, and distributional shift monitoring for regulated-domain NLP.

AI.tldr: ComplianceNLP是一个端到端系统，利用知识图谱增强RAG、多任务义务提取和合规差距分析，自动监控金融监管变化，在真实部署中达到96%召回率，分析师效率提升3.1倍。
AI.motivation: 金融机构每年需追踪超过6万项监管事件，人工合规团队不堪重负，自2008年金融危机以来行业已支付超3000亿美元罚款，亟需自动化合规监控系统。
AI.method: 系统集成三个组件：(1)知识图谱增强RAG管道，基于包含12,847条法规的监管知识图谱；(2)多任务义务提取，结合NER、道义分类和交叉引用解析，共享LEGAL-BERT编码器；(3)合规差距分析，将义务映射到内部策略并给出严重性感知评分。采用领域特定知识蒸馏(70B→8B)和Medusa投机解码加速推理。
AI.result: 在基准上达到87.7 F1（差距检测），优于GPT-4o+RAG 3.5 F1；94.2%的落地准确率；83.4 F1的端到端误差传播；推理加速2.8倍；部署4个月处理9,847条更新，达到96.0%召回率和90.7%精度，分析师效率提升3.1倍。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱重排序贡献最大边际增益(+4.6 F1)，证实结构化监管知识对交叉引用密集型任务至关重要；低熵监管文本(H=2.31 bits)带来91.3%的草稿令牌接受率；报告了信任校准、GRC集成和分布漂移监控等部署经验。

title: Vision-Based Lane Following and Traffic Sign Recognition for Resource-Constrained Autonomous Vehicles
comment: 2026 International Conference on Intelligent Systems, Blockchain, and Communication Technologies
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) rely on real-time perception systems to understand road environments and ensure safe navigation. However, implementing reliable perception algorithms on resource-constrained embedded platforms remains challenging due to limited computational resources. This paper presents a lightweight vision-based framework that integrates lane detection, lane tracking, and traffic sign recognition for embedded autonomous vehicles. A computationally efficient threshold-based lane segmentation method combined with perspective transformation and histogram-based curvature estimation is used for robust lane tracking under varying illumination conditions. A rule-based steering controller generates steering commands to maintain stable vehicle navigation. For traffic sign recognition, two lightweight convolutional neural networks (CNNs), EfficientNet-B0 and MobileNetV2, are evaluated using a custom dataset captured from the vehicle's onboard camera. Experimental results show that the system achieves real-time performance while maintaining accurate lane tracking with only 3.16% maximum offset RMSE. EfficientNet-B0 achieves a high offline classification accuracy of 98.77% on the test dataset, while achieving 90% accuracy during real-time on-device deployment, outperforming MobileNetV2 in both settings. MobileNetV2, however, offers slightly faster inference and lower computational cost. These results highlight the effectiveness of lightweight vision-based perception pipelines for resource-constrained autonomous driving applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向资源受限嵌入式平台的轻量级视觉感知框架，集成车道检测、车道跟踪和交通标志识别，使用轻量级CNN（EfficientNet-B0和MobileNetV2）在真实环境中实现实时性能，EfficientNet-B0离线准确率达98.77%，在线达90%。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的嵌入式平台上实现可靠的自动驾驶实时感知算法面临计算资源有限的挑战，需要设计轻量级且高效的视觉感知方案。
AI.method: 提出轻量级视觉框架：基于阈值的车道分割+透视变换+直方图曲率估计实现车道跟踪，基于规则的转向控制器，以及EfficientNet-B0和MobileNetV2两种轻量级CNN用于交通标志识别。
AI.result: 系统实现实时性能，车道跟踪最大偏移RMSE仅3.16%；EfficientNet-B0离线准确率98.77%，在线准确率90%，均优于MobileNetV2；MobileNetV2推理速度更快、计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级视觉感知流水线在资源受限的自动驾驶场景中能同时满足实时性和准确性要求，具有实际部署价值。

title: A Tale of Two Variances: When Single-Seed Benchmarks Fail in Bayesian Deep Learning
summary: In limited-data settings, a single endpoint mean of an evaluation metric such as the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) is itself a random variable, yet it is routinely reported as if it were a stable property of the method. We study when this practice fails. Using 50 independent repetitions across six regression datasets, we show that CRPS variance trajectories differ substantially across methods and are not always well described by a smooth power-law decay. Methods with a learned heteroscedastic variance head, namely MAP and Deep Ensembles, can develop pronounced, reproducible variance peaks at intermediate training sizes on real datasets, whereas MC Dropout and Bayes by Backprop typically show smooth variance contraction. These peaks have direct practical consequences: at the variance peak on Seoul Bike, the relative RMSE of a single-seed MAP estimate reaches 93.6\%, and the probability of falling within \(\pm 10\%\) of the repeated-run mean drops to 5.9\%. We show that local CRPS variance provides a direct signal of single-seed estimation error, with Spearman correlations above 0.96 on every real dataset. Power-law fit quality and monotonicity together provide compact method-level summaries of trajectory regularity. Finally, replacing the standard heteroscedastic objective with \(β\)-NLL substantially reduces the irregular behavior, consistent with the view that the heteroscedastic training objective contributes to the instability. Practitioners should report trajectory summaries alongside endpoint means and concentrate repeated evaluation in high-variance regions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限数据设置下，单一评估指标（如CRPS）终点均值的方差问题。通过50次独立重复实验，发现不同方法的CRPS方差轨迹差异显著，并非总是符合平滑幂律衰减。带有异方差方差头的方法（如MAP、Deep Ensembles）在中等训练规模时会出现明显方差峰值，而MC Dropout和Bayes by Backprop则平滑收缩。方差峰值导致单次估计误差极大（如Seoul Bike数据集上相对RMSE达93.6%）。局部CRPS方差可作为单次估计误差的直接信号（Spearman相关性>0.96）。用β-NLL替代异方差目标可减轻不稳定性。
AI.motivation: 指出在有限数据场景下，仅报告单一终点均值作为方法稳定性的做法可能产生误导，需要系统研究不同方法的方差特性及其对评估可靠性的影响。
AI.method: 在六个回归数据集上进行50次独立重复实验，比较MAP、Deep Ensembles、MC Dropout、Bayes by Backprop等方法的CRPS方差轨迹；分析幂律拟合质量与单调性等轨迹特征；引入β-NLL目标函数改进异方差训练目标的不稳定性。
AI.result: 异方差方差头方法（MAP、Deep Ensembles）在中等训练规模出现方差峰值，相对RMSE高达93.6%，落入±10%均值的概率降至5.9%；局部CRPS方差与单次估计误差的Spearman相关性>0.96；β-NLL可显著缓解不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 建议实践者除了报告终点均值外，还应报告方差轨迹摘要，并在高方差区域进行重复评估，以提升评估的可靠性。

title: Tandem: Riding Together with Large and Small Language Models for Efficient Reasoning
summary: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have catalyzed the rise of reasoning-intensive inference paradigms, where models perform explicit step-by-step reasoning before generating final answers. While such approaches improve answer quality and interpretability, they incur substantial computational overhead due to the prolonged generation sequences. In this paper, we propose Tandem, a novel collaborative framework that synergizes large and small language models (LLMs and SLMs) to achieve high-quality reasoning with significantly reduced computational cost. Specifically, the LLM serves as a strategic coordinator, efficiently generating a compact set of critical reasoning insights. These insights are then used to guide a smaller, more efficient SLM in executing the full reasoning process and delivering the final response. To balance efficiency and reliability, Tandem introduces a cost-aware termination mechanism that adaptively determines when sufficient reasoning guidance has been accumulated, enabling early stopping of the LLM's generation. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation benchmarks demonstrate that Tandem reduces computational costs by approximately 40% compared to standalone LLM reasoning, while achieving superior or competitive performance. Furthermore, the sufficiency classifier trained on one domain transfers effectively to others without retraining. The code is available at: https://github.com/Applied-Machine-Learning-Lab/ACL2026_Tandem.

AI.tldr: 提出Tandem框架，让大模型（LLM）作为战略协调者生成关键推理见解，小模型（SLM）基于这些见解执行完整推理，配合成本感知的提前终止机制，在数学推理和代码生成任务上实现约40%的计算成本降低，同时保持或超越原有性能。
AI.motivation: 推理密集型任务中，LLM进行显式逐步推理虽然提升了答案质量和可解释性，但生成长序列导致计算开销巨大，亟需降低推理成本的同时保持高性能。
AI.method: 提出Tandem协作框架：LLM作为战略协调者生成关键推理见解（compact reasoning insights），SLM基于这些见解执行完整推理并生成最终答案；引入成本感知的提前终止机制（cost-aware termination），自适应判断何时已积累足够推理指导，实现LLM生成的早期停止。
AI.result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准上，相比单独使用LLM推理，Tandem降低约40%的计算成本，且性能达到或超越原有水平；充分性分类器在跨领域迁移时无需重新训练也能有效工作。
AI.conclusion: Tandem通过大-小模型协作的范式，在不牺牲推理质量的前提下显著降低计算开销，并且具有良好的跨领域迁移能力，为推理密集型任务的高效部署提供了可行方案。

title: XITE: Cross-lingual Interpolation for Transfer using Embeddings
summary: Facilitating cross-lingual transfer in multilingual language models remains a critical challenge. Towards this goal, we propose an embedding-based data augmentation technique called XITE. We start with unlabeled text from a low-resource target language, identify an English counterpart in a task-specific training corpus using embedding-based similarities and adopt its label. Next, we perform a simple interpolation of the source and target embeddings to create synthetic data for task-specific fine-tuning. Projecting the target text into a language-rich subspace using linear discriminant analysis (LDA), prior to interpolation, further boosts performance. Our cross-lingual embedding-based augmentation technique XITE yields significant improvements of up to 35.91% for sentiment analysis and up to 81.16% for natural language inference, using XLM-R, for a diverse set of target languages including Korean, Arabic, Urdu and Hindi. Apart from boosting cross-lingual transfer, adaptation using XITE also safeguards against forgetting and maintains task performance on the high-resource language.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为XITE的跨语言嵌入数据增强技术，通过利用低资源目标语言的未标注文本与英语训练语料的嵌入相似性来生成合成数据，从而提升多语言模型的跨语言迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 解决多语言模型中跨语言迁移的难题，特别是在低资源语言上的任务性能提升，同时避免对高资源语言性能的遗忘问题。
AI.method: 1) 利用嵌入相似性将低资源目标语言的未标注文本匹配到英语训练语料，继承其标签；2) 对源语言（英语）和目标语言（低资源语言）的嵌入进行插值，生成合成训练数据；3) 在插值前使用线性判别分析（LDA）将目标文本投影到语言丰富的子空间以进一步提升性能。
AI.result: 在情感分析任务上提升高达35.91%，在自然语言推理任务上提升高达81.16%，涵盖韩语、阿拉伯语、乌尔都语和印地语等多种目标语言；同时维持高资源语言（英语）的任务性能，不会遗忘。
AI.conclusion: XITE是一种有效的跨语言数据增强方法，能显著提升低资源语言的迁移性能，同时不会损害高资源语言的表现。

title: SketchVLM: Vision language models can annotate images to explain thoughts and guide users
summary: When answering questions about images, humans naturally point, label, and draw to explain their reasoning. In contrast, modern vision-language models (VLMs) such as Gemini-3-Pro and GPT-5 only respond with text, which can be difficult for users to verify. We present SketchVLM, a training-free, model-agnostic framework that enables VLMs to produce non-destructive, editable SVG overlays on the input image to visually explain their answers. Across seven benchmarks spanning visual reasoning (maze navigation, ball-drop trajectory prediction, and object counting) and drawing (part labeling, connecting-the-dots, and drawing shapes around objects), SketchVLM improves visual reasoning task accuracy by up to +28.5 percentage points and annotation quality by up to 1.48x relative to image-editing and fine-tuned sketching baselines, while also producing annotations that are more faithful to the model's stated answer. We find that single-turn generation already achieves strong accuracy and annotation quality, and multi-turn generation opens up further opportunities for human-AI collaboration. An interactive demo and code are at https://sketchvlm.github.io/.

AI.tldr: SketchVLM是一个无需训练、模型无关的框架，能让VLM在图像上生成非破坏性、可编辑的SVG覆盖图，以可视化方式解释其答案。在7个基准测试中，视觉推理任务准确率提升高达28.5个百分点，标注质量提升1.48倍。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM（如Gemini-3-Pro、GPT-5）仅以文本回答，用户难以验证其正确性。人类在回答图像问题时自然会指向、标注和绘图来解释推理过程，因此需要让VLM也能以可视化方式解释答案。
AI.method: 提出SketchVLM框架，无需训练且模型无关。让VLM在输入图像上生成非破坏性、可编辑的SVG覆盖图（矢量图形），通过视觉标注来解释答案。支持单轮生成和多轮生成（人机协作）。
AI.result: 在7个基准测试（视觉推理+绘图标注）上，相比图像编辑和微调草图基线，视觉推理任务准确率最高提升28.5个百分点，标注质量提升1.48倍。单轮生成已能达到强性能，多轮生成为人机协作打开新空间。
AI.conclusion: SketchVLM有效提升了VLM的可解释性和用户对模型答案的信任度，是提升VLM可验证性的实用方法。

title: HBGSA: Hydrogen Bond Graph with Self-Attention for Drug-Target Binding Affinity Prediction
summary: Accurate prediction of drug-target binding affinity accelerates drug discovery by prioritizing compounds for experimental validation. Current methods face three limitations: sequence-based approaches discard spatial geometric constraints, structure-based methods fail to exploit hydrogen bond features, and conventional loss functions neglect prediction-target correlation, a key factor for identifying high-affinity compounds in virtual screening. We developed HBGSA (Hydrogen Bond Graph with Self-Attention), a 3.06M-parameter model that encodes hydrogen bond spatial features. HBGSA uses graph neural networks to model hydrogen bond spatial topology with self-attention enhancement and Pearson correlation loss. Experimental results on PDBbind Core Set and CSAR-HiQ dataset demonstrate that HBGSA outperforms baseline methods with strong generalization capability. Ablation studies confirm the effectiveness of hydrogen bond modeling and Pearson correlation loss.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HBGSA模型，通过图神经网络编码氢键空间特征并结合自注意力机制与皮尔逊相关损失函数，在药物-靶标结合亲和力预测任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有药物-靶标结合亲和力预测方法存在三个局限：序列方法忽略空间几何约束、结构方法未利用氢键特征、常规损失函数忽视预测与目标的相关性，影响虚拟筛选中对高亲和力化合物的识别。
AI.method: 提出HBGSA模型（3.06M参数），使用图神经网络建模氢键空间拓扑结构，结合自注意力机制增强特征提取，并采用皮尔逊相关损失函数优化预测与真实值的相关性。
AI.result: 在PDBbind Core Set和CSAR-HiQ数据集上，HBGSA优于基线方法，具有强泛化能力；消融实验验证了氢键建模和皮尔逊相关损失函数的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 氢键空间特征的显式建模与相关性导向的损失函数能显著提升药物-靶标结合亲和力预测性能，为虚拟筛选提供了更可靠的工具。

title: Causal Discovery as Dialectical Aggregation: A Quantitative Argumentation Framework
comment: Accepted at the 23rd International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR 2026). This arXiv version includes supplementary material and additional implementation details
summary: Constraint-based causal discovery is brittle in finite-sample regimes because erroneous conditional-independence (CI) decisions can cascade into substantial structural errors. We propose Quantitative Argumentation for Causal Discovery (QACD), a semantics-driven framework that represents CI outcomes as graded, defeasible arguments rather than irreversible constraints. QACD maps statistical test outcomes to argument strengths and aggregates conflicting evidence through connectivity-mediated witness propagation, producing a fixed-point acceptability labeling over candidate adjacencies. Experiments on standard benchmark Bayesian networks suggest that QACD improves structural coherence and interventional reliability in several noisy or inconsistent CI regimes, while remaining competitive with classical constraint-based, hybrid, and prior argumentation-based baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于量化论证的因果发现框架QACD，将条件独立性检验结果视为可废止的论点而非硬约束，通过论据强度和冲突传播产生稳定的可接受性标注，在有限样本下提升了因果结构的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于约束的因果发现在有限样本场景中脆弱，条件独立性判断的错误会级联为严重的结构错误。
AI.method: 将统计检验结果映射为论证强度，通过连通性介导的证据传播聚合冲突信息，最终基于不动点可接受性标注判定候选邻接关系。
AI.result: 在标准贝叶斯网络基准上，QACD在噪声或不一致的CI条件下改善了结构连贯性和干预可靠性，与经典方法竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: 论证框架可以有效缓解CI检验错误级联问题，为因果发现提供更稳健的替代方案。

title: Personality Shapes Gender Bias in Persona-Conditioned LLM Narratives Across English and Hindi: An Empirical Investigation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in persona-driven applications such as education, customer service, and social platforms, where models are prompted to adopt specific personas when interacting with users. While persona conditioning can improve user experience and engagement, it also raises concerns about how personality cues may interact with gender biases and stereotypes. In this work, we present a controlled study of persona-conditioned story generation in English and Hindi, where each story portrays a working professional in India producing context-specific artifacts (e.g., lesson plans, reports, letters) under systematically varied persona gender, occupational role, and personality traits from the HEXACO and Dark Triad frameworks. Across 23,400 generated stories from six state-of-the-art LLMs, we find that personality traits are significantly associated with both the magnitude and direction of gender bias. In particular, Dark Triad personality traits are consistently associated with higher gender-stereotypical representations compared to socially desirable HEXACO traits, though these associations vary across models and languages. Our findings demonstrate that gender bias in LLMs is not static but context-dependent. This suggests that persona-conditioned systems used in real-world applications may introduce uneven representational harms, reinforcing gender stereotypes in generated educational, professional, or social content.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在人格条件化故事生成中，LLMs 中的人格特质（尤其是 HEXACO 和 Dark Triad）与性别偏见之间的关联。通过对 6 个 SOTA LLM 生成 23,400 个故事，发现 Dark Triad 特质（如自恋、马基雅维利主义）与更强的性别刻板印象相关，而 HEXACO 特质则相关性较弱，且这种关联因模型和语言而异。
AI.motivation: 随着 LLM 被广泛应用于需要人格条件化的场景（如教育、客服），人格提示可能放大性别偏见和刻板印象。现有研究对人格与性别偏见的交互作用缺乏系统、受控的分析，尤其是在非英语语言和多模型比较上存在空白。
AI.method: 在英语和印地语中，通过系统变化人格性别、职业角色以及 HEXACO 和 Dark Triad 人格特质，提示 6 个 SOTA LLM 生成故事（每位角色为印度职场专业人士）。共收集 23,400 个故事，利用统计方法分析人格特质与性别偏见方向和强度的关联。
AI.result: 人格特质与性别偏见的强度和方向显著相关。Dark Triad 特质始终与更强的性别刻板印象相关联，而 HEXACO 特质则较弱。这些关联在不同模型和语言间存在差异，表明性别偏见是语境依赖的。
AI.conclusion: LLM 中的性别偏见并非静态，而是高度依赖人格条件化上下文。现实应用中的人格条件化系统可能不均等地加剧性别刻板印象，在生成教育、职业或社交内容时带来代表性伤害。

title: NeuroAPS-Net: Neuro-Anatomically Aware Point Cloud Representation for Efficient Alzheimer's Disease Classification
summary: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder and a major cause of dementia. Structural MRI is widely used to analyze AD-related brain atrophy; however, most deep learning methods rely on computationally expensive 3D convolutional neural networks (CNNs), limiting deployment in resource-constrained settings. This work introduces two main contributions. First, we propose a pipeline that converts T1-weighted MRI into anatomically informed 2D point clouds using Anatomical Priority Sampling (APS), producing ADNI-2DPC, the first neuroanatomically labeled MRI-derived point cloud dataset. Second, we present NeuroAPS-Net, a lightweight geometric deep learning model that incorporates anatomical priors via region-aware feature encoding and ROI token aggregation. Experiments on ADNI-2DPC demonstrate that NeuroAPS-Net achieves competitive classification accuracy while significantly reducing inference latency and GPU memory compared to state-of-the-art point cloud methods. These results highlight the potential of anatomically guided point cloud learning as an efficient and interpretable alternative to voxel-based CNNs for AD classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将3D MRI转化为解剖学引导的2D点云（ADNI-2DPC数据集），并设计了轻量级几何深度学习模型NeuroAPS-Net，在阿尔茨海默病分类中实现了与3D CNN相当的精度，同时大幅降低了推理延迟和GPU内存消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D CNN的AD分类方法计算开销大，难以部署在资源受限的环境中，因此需要更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 1) 提出Anatomical Priority Sampling (APS)将T1-weighted MRI转换为解剖学引导的2D点云，构建ADNI-2DPC数据集；2) 设计NeuroAPS-Net，通过区域感知特征编码和ROI token聚合融入解剖学先验。
AI.result: NeuroAPS-Net在AD分类上达到与SOTA点云方法相当的准确率，同时显著降低推理延迟和GPU内存占用。
AI.conclusion: 解剖学引导的点云学习可以作为基于体素的3D CNN的高效且可解释的替代方案，用于AD分类任务。

title: h-MINT: Modeling Pocket-Ligand Binding with Hierarchical Molecular Interaction Network
summary: Accurate molecular representations are critical for drug discovery, and a central challenge lies in capturing the chemical environment of molecular fragments, as key interactions, such as H-bond and π stacking, occur only under specific local conditions. Most existing approaches represent molecules as atom-level graphs; however, atom-level representations can hardly express higher-order chemical context (e.g., stereochemistry, lone pairs, conjugation). Fragment-based methods (e.g., principal subgraph, predefined functional groups) fail to preserve essential information such as chirality, aromaticity, and ionic states. This work addresses these limitations from two aspects. (i) OverlapBPE tokenization. We propose a novel data-driven molecule tokenization method. Unlike existing approaches, our method allows overlapping fragments, reflecting the inherently fuzzy boundaries of small-molecule substructures and, together with enriched chemical information at the token level, thereby preserving a more complete chemical context. (ii) h-MINT model. OverlapBPE induces many-to-many atom-fragment mappings, which necessitate a new hierarchical architecture. We therefore develop a hierarchical molecular interaction network capable of jointly modeling interactions at both atom and fragment levels. By supporting fragment overlaps, the model naturally accommodates the many-to-many atom-fragment mappings introduced by the OverlapBPE scheme. Extensive evaluation against state-of-the-art methods shows our method improves binding affinity prediction by 2-4% Pearson/Spearman correlation on PDBBind and LBA, enhances virtual screening by 1-3% in key metrics on DUD-E and LIT-PCBA, and achieves the best overall HTS performance on PubChem assays. Further analysis demonstrates that our method effectively captures interactive information while maintaining good generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出了OverlapBPE（一种允许重叠片段的分子分词方法）和h-MINT（层次化分子交互网络），在分子表示学习中通过同时建模原子级和片段级交互，显著提升药物发现中结合亲和力预测和虚拟筛选等任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分子表示方法存在局限：原子级图难以表达高阶化学上下文（如立体化学、孤对电子、共轭）；片段级方法（如主子图、预定义官能团）会丢失手性、芳香性、离子态等关键信息。需要一种能保留完整化学上下文并同时建模多层级交互的分子表示方法。
AI.method: (1) OverlapBPE分词：数据驱动的分子分词方法，允许片段重叠以反映小分子子结构边界的模糊性，保留更完整的化学上下文。(2) h-MINT模型：层次化分子交互网络，联合建模原子级和片段级交互，天然适配OverlapBPE带来的多对多原子-片段映射关系。
AI.result: 在PDBBind和LBA上结合亲和力预测提升2-4%（Pearson/Spearman相关系数）；在DUD-E和LIT-PCBA上虚拟筛选关键指标提升1-3%；在PubChem assay上实现最佳整体HTS性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效捕获分子交互信息，同时保持良好的泛化能力，在多项药物发现任务上超越现有最先进方法。

title: Structural Enforcement of Goal Integrity in AI Agents via Separation-of-Powers Architecture
summary: Recent evidence suggests that frontier AI systems can exhibit agentic misalignment, generating and executing harmful actions derived from internally constructed goals, even without explicit user requests. Existing mitigation methods, such as Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and constitutional prompting, operate primarily at the model level and provide only probabilistic safety guarantees. We propose the Policy-Execution-Authorization (PEA) architecture, a "separation-of-powers" design that enforces safety at the system level. PEA decouples intent generation, authorization, and execution into independent, isolated layers connected via cryptographically constrained capability tokens. We present five core contributions: (C1) an Intent Verification Layer (IVL) for ensuring capability-intent consistency; (C2) Intent Lineage Tracking (ILT), which binds all executable intents to the originating user request via cryptographic anchors; (C3) Goal Drift Detection, which rejects semantically divergent intents below a configurable threshold; (C4) an Output Semantic Gate (OSG) that detects implicit coercion using a structured $K \times I \times P$ threat calculus (Knowledge, Influence, Policy); and (C5) a formal verification framework proving that goal integrity is maintained even under adversarial model compromise. By shifting agent alignment from a behavioral property to a structurally enforced system constraint, PEA provides a robust foundation for the governance of autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: 提出PEA架构，通过"分权制衡"的系统级设计（意图生成、授权、执行分离），利用加密能力令牌和五层安全机制，将AI对齐从行为属性转为结构性系统约束，实现可证明的安全保障。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（RLHF、宪法提示）仅在模型层面提供概率性安全保证，无法应对前沿AI系统可能出现的"代理性失调"——即AI自主构建有害目标并执行恶意行为，即便没有用户明确指令。
AI.method: 提出PEA"分权制衡"架构：(1) 意图验证层(IVL)确保能力-意图一致性；(2) 意图血统追踪(ILT)通过密码学锚点将可执行意图绑定到原始用户请求；(3) 目标漂移检测，拒绝语义偏离的可配置阈值；(4) 输出语义门(OSG)使用K×I×P威胁演算检测隐式胁迫；(5) 形式化验证框架，证明即使在对抗性模型妥协下也能维护目标完整性。
AI.result: 通过系统级分离和密码学约束，将安全保证从概率性提升为结构性可证明；在模型被攻破的极端情况下仍能维持目标完整性。
AI.conclusion: PEA将智能体对齐从行为属性转变为结构性系统约束，为自主智能体的治理提供了稳健基础。

title: Applications of the Transformer Architecture in AI-Assisted English Reading Comprehension
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, Conference paper for International Conference on Big Data Applications in Education and Engineering {ICBDAEE 2026)
summary: This paper studies interpretable and fair artificial intelligence architectures for understanding English reading. Introduced transformer-based models, integrating advanced attention mechanisms and gradient-based feature attribution. The model's lack of interpretability, reduction of algorithmic bias, and unreliable performance in learning environments are the current issues faced in natural language teaching. A unified technical pipeline has been constructed, including adversarial bias correction methods, token-level attribution analysis, and multi-head attention heatmap visualization. Experimental validation was conducted using a large-scale labeled English reading comprehension dataset, and the data partitioning scheme and parameter optimization procedures have been determined. The method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art models for this task in terms of accuracy and macro-average F1 score; in some aspects, it even surpasses or closely matches the results of human evaluations. In multi-week user experiments, the explainable transformer improved teachers' trust and operability in feedback-based assessments within the scoring system. The proposed method aims to ensure high prediction accuracy and fairness for different learners. This indicates that it is a real-world educational application based on artificial intelligence with a focus on interpretation. Improve the user experience in AI-assisted reading comprehension systems, counteract biases, and enhance the details explained by transformers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释且公平的Transformer模型，用于英语阅读理解教学。该模型集成了注意力机制、梯度特征归因、对抗性偏差矫正等方法，在大型英语阅读理解数据集上取得了SOTA性能，并通过多周用户实验证明其提升了教师的信任度和可操作性。
AI.motivation: 针对自然语言教学中Transformer模型缺乏可解释性、存在算法偏见以及在教学环境中表现不可靠的问题，提出可解释且公平的AI架构。
AI.method: 构建统一技术管线，包括对抗性偏差矫正、token级特征归因分析、多头注意力热力图可视化。采用大规模标注英语阅读理解数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在准确率和宏平均F1上显著超越SOTA模型，某些指标接近或超过人类水平。多周用户实验表明可解释Transformer提升了教师对评分系统的信任和操作性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证高预测精度的同时实现了对不同学习者的公平性，是一个以可解释性为重点的真实教育应用，提升了AI辅助阅读系统中的用户体验并减少了偏见。

title: Can Multimodal Large Language Models Truly Understand Small Objects?
comment: Under Peer Review (26 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables)
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising potential in diverse understanding tasks, e.g., image and video analysis, math and physics olympiads. However, they remain blank and unexplored for Small Object Understanding (SOU) tasks. To fill this gap, we introduce SOUBench, the first and comprehensive benchmark for exploring the small objects understanding capability of existing MLLMs. Specifically, we first design an effective and automatic visual question-answer generation strategy, constructing a new SOU-VQA evaluation dataset, with 18,204 VQA pairs, six relevant sub-tasks, and three dominant scenarios (i.e., Driving, Aerial, and Underwater). Then, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation on 15 state-of-the-art MLLMs and reveal their weak capabilities in small object understanding. Furthermore, we develop SOU-Train, a multimodal training dataset with 11,226 VQA pairs, to improve the SOU capabilities of MLLMs. Through supervising fine-tuning of the latest MLLM, we demonstrate that SOU-Train can effectively enhance the latest MLLM's ability to understand small objects. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that, the proposed SOUBench, along with the SOU-VQA and SOU-Train datasets, provides a crucial empirical foundation to the community for further developing models with enhanced small object understanding capabilities. Datasets and Code: https://github.com/Hanfj-X/SOU.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOUBench，首个针对多模态大模型(MLLM)小物体理解能力的综合基准，包含18,204个VQA样本、6个子任务和3种场景(驾驶、航空、水下)。评估15个MLLM发现其小物体理解能力薄弱，并构建SOU-Train数据集通过微调有效提升了该能力。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在图像视频分析、数理竞赛等任务上表现优异，但在小物体理解(SOU)任务上尚属空白，缺乏专门的评估基准和训练数据。
AI.method: 1) 设计自动化VQA生成策略构建SOU-VQA评估数据集(18,204对、6子任务、3场景)；2) 评估15个SOTA MLLM；3) 构建SOU-Train训练数据集(11,226对)并通过监督微调提升MLLM的小物体理解能力。
AI.result: 现有MLLM在小物体理解任务上表现薄弱；通过SOU-Train微调可有效增强MLLM的小物体理解能力。
AI.conclusion: SOUBench及配套数据集为社区提供了研究MLLM小物体理解的重要实证基础。

title: Surface Sensitivity in Lean 4 Autoformalization
summary: Natural-language variation poses a key challenge in Lean autoformalization: semantically equivalent paraphrases of the same theorem statements can induce divergent formal outputs, yet it remains unclear whether this variation reflects semantic disagreements or shallower failures. We investigate this question in Lean 4 using 60 deterministic paraphrase rules applied to ProofNet\# and miniF2F. Across four GPT-family models and three open-weight 7B autoformalizers, we find that the observed paraphrase sensitivity reflects compilation-boundary failures rather than semantic divergence among successful formalizations. In particular, when both baseline and perturbed outputs compile, paired predictions are semantically equivalent under BEq+ and structurally near-identical under GTED. By contrast, paraphrasing substantially affects whether outputs compile, with failure modes varying across datasets and perturbation classes. Our results suggest that future training-time interventions should target the compile boundary rather than the semantic layer, and that benchmarks should separate compile-conditional equivalence from surface consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Lean自动形式化中自然语言变体对形式化输出的影响。通过对ProofNet#和miniF2F数据集应用60种确定性释义规则，发现释义敏感性主要表现为编译边界失败而非语义分歧：当基线输出和扰动输出都通过编译时，它们在BEq+下语义等价且结构几乎相同；而释义显著影响是否通过编译，且失败模式因数据集和扰动类别而异。
AI.motivation: 探究自然语言变体在Lean自动形式化任务中导致输出差异的根本原因——究竟是反映了真实的语义分歧，还是更浅层的失败模式。
AI.method: 使用60种确定性释义规则，在ProofNet#和miniF2F两个数据集上构造语义等价的自然语言变体；评估4个GPT系列模型和3个开源7B参数自动形式化模型；通过编译成功/失败、BEq+语义等价性、GTED结构相似度等多维度分析输出差异的本质。
AI.result: 释义敏感性主要体现为编译边界失败而非语义分歧；当基线及扰动输出均通过编译时，两者在BEq+下语义等价且GTED下结构几乎一致；释义显著影响编译成功率，且失败模式因数据集和扰动类别呈现差异。
AI.conclusion: 未来训练阶段的干预应针对编译边界而非语义层；基准测试应区分"编译时等价性"和"表面一致性"这两个维度。

title: Vibe Medicine: Redefining Biomedical Research Through Human-AI Co-Work
