summary: With the emergence of large language models (LLMs) and AI agent frameworks, the human-AI co-work paradigm known as Vibe Coding is changing how people code, making it more accessible and productive. In scientific research, where workflows are more complex and the burden of specialized labor limits independent researchers and those in low-resource areas, the potential impact is even greater, particularly in biomedicine, which involves heterogeneous data modalities and multi-step analytical pipelines. In this paper, we introduce Vibe Medicine, a co-work paradigm in which clinicians and researchers direct skill-augmented AI agents through natural language to execute complex, multi-step biomedical workflows, while retaining the role of research director who specifies objectives, reviews intermediate results, and makes domain-informed decisions. The enabling infrastructure consists of three layers: capable LLMs, agent frameworks such as OpenClaw and Hermes Agent, and the OpenClaw medical skills collection, which includes more than 1,000 curated skills from multiple open-source repositories. We analyze the architecture and skill categories of this collection across ten biomedical domains, and present case studies covering rare disease diagnosis, drug repurposing, and clinical trial design that demonstrate end-to-end workflows in practice. We also identify the principal risks, such as hallucination, data privacy, and over-reliance, and outline directions toward more reliable, trustworthy, and clinically integrated agent-assisted research that advances research and technological equity and reduces health care resource disparities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Vibe Medicine范式，让临床医生和研究人员通过自然语言指导增强型AI代理执行多步骤生物医学工作流，基于三层基础设施（LLM、代理框架、OpenClaw医学技能集合含1000+技能），通过案例研究展示其在罕见病诊断、药物重利用和临床试验设计中的应用，并分析了幻觉、数据隐私等风险。
AI.motivation: 降低生物医学研究门槛，使独立研究人员和资源匮乏地区的工作者能够完成复杂的多模态数据分析工作流，促进研究和技术公平。
AI.method: 提出Vibe Medicine人机协作范式，构建三层基础设施：底层为强大的LLM，中间层为代理框架（OpenClaw和Hermes Agent），顶层为包含1000+技能的OpenClaw医学技能集合。研究者通过自然语言指导代理执行工作流，同时保留决策者角色。
AI.result: 分析了技能集合在十个生物医学领域的架构和分类，通过罕见病诊断、药物重利用和临床试验设计三个案例展示了端到端工作流实践。
AI.conclusion: Vibe Medicine范式和对应基础设施有潜力促进研究公平和减少医疗资源差距，但需要解决幻觉、数据隐私和过度依赖等风险，向更可靠、可信、临床集成的代理辅助研究方向发展。

title: GraphPlanner: Graph Memory-Augmented Agentic Routing for Multi-Agent LLMs
summary: LLM routing has achieved promising results in integrating the strengths of diverse models while balancing efficiency and performance. However, to support more realistic and challenging applications, routing must extend into agentic LLM settings, where task planning, multi-round cooperation among heterogeneous agents, and memory utilization are indispensable. To address this gap, we propose GraphPlanner, a heterogeneous graph memory-augmented agentic router for multi-agent LLMs that generates routing workflows for each query and supports both inductive and transductive inference. GraphPlanner formulates workflow generation as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), where at each step it selects both the LLM backbone and the agent role, including Planner, Executor, and Summarizer. By leveraging a heterogeneous graph, denoted as GARNet, to capture interaction memories among queries, agents, and responses, GraphPlanner integrates historical memory and workflow memory into richer state representations. The entire pipeline is optimized with reinforcement learning, jointly improving task-specific performance and computational efficiency. We evaluate GraphPlanner across 14 diverse LLM tasks and demonstrate that: (1) GraphPlanner outperforms strong single-round and multi-round routers, improving accuracy by up to 9.3% while reducing GPU cost from 186.26 GiB to 1.04 GiB; (2) GraphPlanner generalizes robustly to unseen tasks and LLMs, exhibiting strong zero-shot capabilities; and (3) GraphPlanner effectively leverages historical memories, supporting both inductive and transductive inference for more adaptive routing. Our code for GraphPlanner is released at https://github.com/ulab-uiuc/GraphPlanner.

AI.tldr: GraphPlanner是一个基于异构图记忆增强的智能体路由器，通过强化学习优化多智能体LLM的工作流生成，在14个任务上提升了准确率并大幅降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM路由方法主要聚焦单轮场景，无法支持需要任务规划、多轮协作和记忆利用的智能体LLM设置，缺乏面向多智能体场景的异构路由框架。
AI.method: 将工作流生成建模为MDP，每一步同时选择LLM主干和智能体角色（Planner/Executor/Summarizer）；构建异构图GARNet捕获查询-智能体-响应间的交互记忆，融合历史记忆和工作流记忆作为状态表示；使用强化学习联合优化任务性能和计算效率。
AI.result: 在14个LLM任务上，GraphPlanner准确率最高提升9.3%，GPU成本从186.26 GiB降至1.04 GiB；对未见任务和LLM展现出强零样本泛化能力；有效利用历史记忆，支持归纳和转导推理。
AI.conclusion: 异构图记忆增强的多智能体路由框架GraphPlanner能有效适配智能体LLM场景，兼顾性能与效率，且具有良好的泛化性和适应性。

title: Federated Cross-Modal Retrieval with Missing Modalities via Semantic Routing and Adapter Personalization
summary: Federated cross-modal retrieval faces severe challenges from heterogeneous client data, particularly non-IID semantic distributions and missing modalities. Under such heterogeneity, a single global model is often insufficient to capture both shared cross-modal knowledge and client-specific characteristics. We propose RCSR, a personalization-friendly federated framework that integrates prototype anchoring, retrieval-centric semantic routing, and optional client-specific adapters. Built on a frozen CLIP backbone, RCSR leverages lightweight shared adapters for global knowledge transfer while supporting efficient local personalization. Prototype anchoring helps unimodal clients align with global cross-modal semantics, and a server-side semantic router adaptively assigns aggregation weights based on retrieval consistency to mitigate alignment drift during heterogeneous updates. Extensive experiments on MS-COCO, Flickr30K, and other benchmarks show that RCSR consistently improves global retrieval accuracy and training stability, while further enhancing client-level retrieval performance, especially for clients with incomplete modalities. Code is available at https://github.com/RezinChow/RCSR-Retrieval-Centric-Semantic-Routing.

AI.tldr: RCSR 是一个面向联邦跨模态检索的个性化框架，基于冻结的 CLIP 骨干，通过原型锚定、检索中心语义路由和客户端适配器，解决异构客户端数据下的非 IID 语义分布和模态缺失问题，在多个基准上提升了全局和客户端级检索性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦跨模态检索面临客户端数据高度异构（非IID语义分布、模态缺失），单一全局模型难以同时捕捉共享跨模态知识和客户端特定特征。
AI.method: 提出 RCSR 框架：基于冻结 CLIP 骨干 + 轻量共享适配器实现全局知识迁移；原型锚定帮助单模态客户端对齐跨模态语义；服务器端语义路由器根据检索一致性自适应分配聚合权重，缓解异构更新中的对齐漂移；可选客户端特定适配器支持局部个性化。
AI.result: 在 MS-COCO、Flickr30K 等基准上，RCSR 持续提升全局检索精度和训练稳定性，并显著增强客户端级检索性能，尤其是对模态不完整的客户端。
AI.conclusion: RCSR 通过个性化联邦框架有效解决了异构跨模态检索中的语义对齐和模态缺失问题，兼顾全局性能与局部个性化能力。

title: Scaling Multi-Node Mixture-of-Experts Inference Using Expert Activation Patterns
summary:
Most recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) large language models (LLMs) use Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures to scale model capacity without proportional per-token compute, enabling higher-quality outputs at manageable serving costs. However, MoE inference at scale is fundamentally bottlenecked by expert load imbalance and inefficient token routing, especially in multi-node deployments where tokens are not guaranteed to be routed to local experts, resulting in significant inter-node all-to-all communication overhead.
  To systematically characterize these challenges, we profile SOTA open-source MoE models, including Llama 4 Maverick, DeepSeek V3-671B, and Qwen3-230B-A22B, on various datasets and collected over 100k real expert activation traces. Upon studying the expert activation patterns, we uncover various persistent properties across all the frontier MoE models: variable expert load imbalance, domain-specific expert activation where expert popularity shifts across task families (code, math, chat, general), and a strong correlation between prefill and decode expert activations. Motivated by these findings, we propose workload-aware micro-batch grouping and an expert placement strategy to maximize token locality to the destination expert, thereby reducing inter-node communication. Across models and datasets, these optimizations help reduce all2all communication data up to 20, resulting in lower MoE decode latency and better accelerator utilization.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了MoE大模型在推理时的专家负载不均衡和跨节点通信瓶颈问题，通过采集10万+专家激活轨迹，发现专家激活具有负载不均、领域特异性（代码/数学/对话等任务中专家偏好不同）以及prefill与decode阶段强相关等特性，并提出基于工作负载的微批分组和专家放置策略，减少all-to-all通信量最高达20倍，降低推理延迟、提升加速器利用率。
AI.motivation: MoE大模型在规模化部署时，专家负载不均衡和低效的路由策略会导致严重的跨节点通信开销（all-to-all），成为推理吞吐瓶颈。现有工作缺乏对SOTA MoE模型在真实推理场景下专家激活模式的系统化理解，因此本文旨在通过大规模Profiling揭示其内在规律，为优化推理效率提供依据。
AI.method: 1) 对Llama 4 Maverick、DeepSeek V3-671B、Qwen3-230B-A22B等前沿MoE模型进行Profiling，采集10万+真实专家激活轨迹；2) 分析专家激活模式：负载不均衡性、领域特异性（不同任务类型下专家激活分布变化）、prefill与decode阶段专家激活的强相关性；3) 基于上述发现提出工作负载感知的微批分组（workload-aware micro-batch grouping）和专家放置策略（expert placement），最大化token与目标专家的本地性，减少跨节点通信。
AI.result: 跨模型和数据集，所提优化策略可将all-to-all通信数据量降低最多20倍，从而显著降低MoE解码延迟，提高加速器利用率。
AI.conclusion: MoE推理的通信瓶颈可以通过理解专家激活模式并设计亲局部性的调度策略来大幅缓解，为大规模MoE的高效部署提供了系统级的优化方向。

title: Transferable Human Mobility Network Reconstruction with neuroGravity
summary: Accurate modeling of human mobility is critical for tackling urban planning and public health challenges. In undeveloped regions, the absence of comprehensive travel surveys necessitates reconstructing mobility networks from publicly available data. Here we develop neuroGravity, a physics-informed deep learning model that reliably reconstructs mobility flows from limited observations and transfers to unobserved cities. Using only urban facility and population distributions, we find that neuroGravity's regional representations strongly correlate with socioeconomic and livability status, offering scalable proxies for costly surveys. Furthermore, we uncover that spatial income segregation plays a key role in model transferability: mobility networks are most reliably reconstructed when target cities share similar segregation levels with the source. We design an index to quantify this segregation and accurately predict transferability. Finally, we generate mobility flow proxies for over 1,200 cities worldwide, highlighting neuroGravity's potential to mitigate critical data shortages in resource-limited, underdeveloped areas.

AI.tldr: 本文提出neuroGravity，一个物理信息增强的深度学习模型，利用城市设施和人口分布数据重建人类移动网络，能在数据稀缺地区迁移应用，并生成了全球1200多个城市的流动代理数据。
AI.motivation: 在欠发达地区，缺乏全面的出行调查数据，难以进行城市规划和公共卫生研究。因此需要从公开数据中重建人类移动网络。
AI.method: 提出neuroGravity，一种物理信息增强的深度学习模型，仅利用城市设施和人口分布等公开数据重建移动流，并具备跨城市迁移能力。
AI.result: 模型区域表征与城市社会经济和宜居性高度相关；发现空间收入隔离程度是影响模型可迁移性的关键因素；生成了全球1200多个城市的移动流代理数据。
AI.conclusion: neuroGravity能够缓解资源有限地区的数据短缺问题，为城市规划和公共卫生研究提供可扩展的代理数据。

title: Neural Grammatical Error Correction for Romanian
summary: Resources for Grammatical Error Correction (GEC) in non-English languages are scarce, while available spellcheckers in these languages are mostly limited to simple corrections and rules. In this paper we introduce a first GEC corpus for Romanian consisting of 10k pairs of sentences. In addition, the German version of ERRANT (ERRor ANnotation Toolkit) scorer was adapted for Romanian to analyze this corpus and extract edits needed for evaluation. Multiple neural models were experimented, together with pretraining strategies, which proved effective for GEC in low-resource settings. Our baseline consists of a small Transformer model trained only on the GEC dataset (F0.5 of 44.38), whereas the best performing model is produced by pretraining a larger Transformer model on artificially generated data, followed by finetuning on the actual corpus (F0.5 of 53.76). The proposed method for generating additional training examples is easily extensible and can be applied to any language, as it requires only a POS tagger

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了首个罗马尼亚语语法纠错(GEC)语料库(10k句对)，并适配了德语ERRANT评分器用于罗马尼亚语评估。实验了多种神经模型和预训练策略，最终通过在大规模人工生成数据上预训练Transformer模型再微调，取得了最佳性能(F0.5为53.76)，该方法可推广到其他语言。
AI.motivation: 非英语语言的语法纠错资源稀缺，现有拼写检查器仅限于简单修正和规则，缺乏高质量的GEC数据集和评估工具。
AI.method: 构建了10k句对的罗马尼亚语GEC语料库，改编了德语ERRANT评分器用于罗马尼亚语；实验了多个神经模型(包括小Transformer基线)，并采用在大规模人工生成数据上预训练+微调的策略，人工数据生成仅需POS标注器，易于扩展。
AI.result: 仅用GEC数据集训练的小Transformer模型F0.5为44.38，而预训练大Transformer模型后微调达到F0.5为53.76，显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了罗马尼亚语GEC的空白，所提出的人工数据生成方法简洁可扩展，对低资源语言的GEC研究有重要参考价值。

title: Breaking Degradation Coupling: A Structural Entropy Guided Decoupled Framework and Benchmark for Infrared Enhancement
summary: Thermal infrared image enhancement aims to restore high-quality images from complex compound degradations. Existing all-in-one approaches typically employ a single shared backbone to handle diverse degradations, which causes gradient interference and parameter competition. To address this, we propose a Structural Entropy-Guided Decoupled (SEGD) Framework. Unlike unified modeling paradigms, SEGD decomposes compound degradations into independent sub-processes and models them in a divide-and-conquer manner through Degradation-Specific Residual Modules (DRMs). Each DRM focuses on residual estimation for a specific degradation, enabling task decoupling while remaining jointly trainable, which mitigates parameter contention. A Degradation-Aware Evidential Network further estimates degradation type and intensity, providing priors that adaptively regulate DRM restoration strength. To handle compound cases, DRMs are composed in varying orders to form multiple restoration paths, from which the most informative features are aggregated under a structural-entropy criterion, yielding decoder-ready representations with structural fidelity and degradation awareness. Integrating divide-and-conquer restoration, evidential perception, and entropy-guided adaptation, SEGD achieves fine-grained and interpretable enhancement. We also construct a nighttime TIR benchmark for evaluation under real low-light conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that SEGD surpasses state-of-the-art methods while achieving higher efficiency with fewer parameters.

AI.tldr: 提出结构熵引导的解耦框架(SEGD)，将热红外图像增强中的复合退化分解为独立子过程，通过退化专用残差模块、退化感知证据网络和熵引导特征聚合，实现细粒度、可解释的图像增强，在更少参数下超越SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有全合一方法使用共享主干网络处理多样化退化，导致梯度干扰和参数竞争，无法有效建模复合退化。
AI.method: 提出SEGD框架：(1) 退化专用残差模块(DRM)实现分治建模；(2) 退化感知证据网络估计退化类型和强度；(3) 结构熵准则引导多路径特征聚合。
AI.result: 在构建的夜间TIR基准上，SEGD以更少参数超越SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 将分治恢复、证据感知和熵引导自适应相结合，实现了细粒度、可解释的图像增强，验证了解耦建模在复合退化场景中的有效性。

title: Efficient VQ-QAT and Mixed Vector/Linear quantized Neural Networks
summary: In this work, we developed and tested 3 techniques for vector quantization (VQ) based model weight compression. To mitigate codebook collapse and enable end-to-end training, we adopted cosine similarity-based assignment. Building on ideas from attention-based formulations in Differentiable K-Means (DKM), we further improved this approach by using cosine similarity for assignment combined with top-1 sampling and a straight-through estimator, thereby eliminating the need for weighted-average reconstruction. Finally, we investigated the use of differentiable neural architecture search (NAS) to adaptively select layer-wise quantization configurations, further optimizing the compression process. Although our method does not consistently outperform existing approaches across all quantization levels, it provides useful insights into the design trade-offs and behaviors of VQ-based model compression methods.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了三种基于向量量化（VQ）的模型权重重压缩技术，包括余弦相似度分配、结合top-1采样与直通估计器的可微方法，以及利用可微神经架构搜索自适应选择逐层量化配置。实验表明该方法并非在所有量化级别上均优于现有方法，但为VQ压缩的设计权衡提供了洞见。
AI.motivation: 针对VQ模型压缩中常见的码本崩溃问题和端到端训练困难，提出改进的量化方法，并探索可微NAS自适应选择量化配置以优化压缩过程。
AI.method: 1) 余弦相似度分配机制缓解码本崩溃；2) 结合top-1采样和直通估计器的可微量化方法（受DKM启发）；3) 利用可微神经架构搜索自适应选择每层的量化配置。
AI.result: 该方法并非在所有量化级别上一致优于现有方法，但在某些场景下提供了有意义的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 论文为VQ模型压缩方法的设计权衡和行为提供了有用洞见，但整体性能尚未做到全面超越现有方法。

title: Information-Theoretic Measures in AI: A Practical Decision Guide
comment: 25 pages, 2 tables, 1 figure. Submitted to Applied Intelligence (Springer)
summary:
Information-theoretic (IT) measures are ubiquitous in artificial intelligence: entropy drives decision-tree splits and uncertainty quantification, cross-entropy is the default classification loss, mutual information underpins representation learning and feature selection, and transfer entropy reveals directed influence in dynamical systems.
  A second, less consolidated family of measures, integrated information (Phi), effective information (EI), and autonomy, has emerged for characterizing agent complexity. Despite wide adoption, measure selection is often decoupled from estimator assumptions, failure modes, and safe inferential claims.
  This paper provides a practical decision framework for all seven measures, organized around three prescriptive questions for each: (i) what question does the measure answer and in which AI context; (ii) which estimator is appropriate for the data type and dimensionality; and (iii) what is the most dangerous misuse. The framework is operationalized in two complementary artifacts: a measure-selection flowchart and a master decision table. We cover both AI/ML and decision-making agent application domains per measure, with standardized Bridge Boxes linking IT quantities to cognitive constructs. Three worked examples illustrate the framework on concrete practitioner scenarios spanning representation learning, temporal influence analysis, and evolved agent complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文为AI中的七种信息论度量（熵、交叉熵、互信息、转移熵、Φ、有效信息、自主性）提供了一个实用决策框架，围绕三个核心问题帮助研究者选择合适度量：度量回答什么问题、用哪种估计器、最危险的误用是什么。
AI.motivation: 信息论度量在AI中广泛使用，但研究者常常将度量选择与估计器假设、失败模式和安全的推断性声明脱钩，导致误用。
AI.method: 为七种信息论度量分别设计三个指导性问题（问题背景、估计器选择、危险误用），并配套提供度量选择流程图和主决策表，以及标准化Bridge Boxes连接信息论量与认知概念。
AI.result: 提供了可操作的决策框架、流程图和主决策表，并通过三个工作示例（表示学习、时间影响分析、演化智能体复杂度）验证其实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架帮助AI从业者系统性地选择合适的信息论度量并避免常见陷阱，弥合了理论度量与工程实践之间的鸿沟。

title: Benchmarking Testing in Automated Theorem Proving
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in formal theorem proving, yet evaluating semantic correctness remains challenging. Existing evaluations rely on indirect proxies such as lexical overlap with human-annotated proof, or expensive manual inspection. Inspired by the shift from lexical comparison to test-based evaluation in code generation, we propose T , a framework that evaluates the semantic correctness of formal theorems: a generated theorem is considered correct only if all dependent successor theorems compile successfully, analogous to integration testing. We construct a benchmark from 5 real-world Lean 4 repositories, comprising 2,206 problems paired with 41 successor theorems on average, automatically extracted without human effort. Experiments demonstrate that while state-of-the-art models achieve high compilation success, they perform significantly worse under our semantic metric. The best model, Claude-Sonnet-4.5, achieves only 38.9% Testing Accuracy on the full set, given both natural language proof and successor theorems as context, revealing a critical gap in current theorem generation capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为T的框架，通过类似集成测试的方式评估形式化定理的语义正确性：生成的定理只有在所有依赖的后继定理都能成功编译时才被认为正确。基于5个Lean 4仓库构建了包含2206个问题的基准测试，发现当前最佳模型（Claude-Sonnet-4.5）在该指标下仅达到38.9%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在形式化定理证明中的评估依赖于与人工标注证明的词汇重叠或昂贵的人工检查，缺乏对语义正确性的有效度量，类似于代码生成领域从词法比较转向基于测试的评估的转变需求。
AI.method: 提出T框架：将生成的定理视为正确仅当所有依赖的后继定理都能成功编译（类似集成测试）。从5个真实Lean 4仓库自动提取2206个问题，每个问题平均有41个后继定理，无需人工标注。
AI.result: 当前最先进的模型在传统编译成功率上表现良好，但在语义度量下显著变差。最佳模型Claude-Sonnet-4.5在给定NL证明和后继定理作为上下文时，完整集上仅达到38.9%的测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了当前定理生成能力存在严重差距，现有评估指标高估了模型真实语义正确性。

title: Text-Guided Multimodal Unified Industrial Anomaly Detection
summary: Industrial anomaly detection based on RGB-3D multimodal data has emerged as a mainstream paradigm for intelligent quality inspection. However, existing unsupervised methods suffer from two critical limitations: ambiguous cross-modal alignment caused by the lack of high-level semantic guidance and insufficient geometric modeling for RGB-to-3D feature mapping. To address these issues, we propose a unified multimodal industrial anomaly detection framework guided by text semantics. The framework consists of two core modules: a Geometry-Aware Cross-Modal Mapper to preserve geometric structure during modality conversion, and an Object-Conditioned Textual Feature Adaptor to align multimodal features with semantic priors. Furthermore, we establish a unified learning paradigm for multimodal industrial anomaly detection, which breaks the one-model-one-class constraint and enables accurate anomaly detection across diverse classes using a single model. Extensive experiments on the MVTec 3D-AD and Eyecandies datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in classification and localization under unsupervised settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本语义引导的统一多模态工业异常检测框架，包含几何感知跨模态映射器和对象条件文本特征适配器，实现了跨类别单模型异常检测，在MVTec 3D-AD和Eyecandies数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督RGB-3D多模态异常检测方法存在两个关键问题：1) 缺乏高层语义引导导致跨模态对齐模糊；2) RGB到3D特征映射的几何建模不足。
AI.method: 提出统一多模态框架，包含两个核心模块：1) Geometry-Aware Cross-Modal Mapper（几何感知跨模态映射器）保留几何结构；2) Object-Conditioned Textual Feature Adaptor（对象条件文本特征适配器）利用文本语义先验对齐多模态特征。打破了一模型一类限制，实现单模型多类别检测。
AI.result: 在MVTec 3D-AD和Eyecandies数据集上，无监督设置下的分类和定位任务均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 文本语义引导能有效解决多模态异常检测中的跨模态对齐和几何建模问题，统一框架具有跨类别泛化能力。

title: Follow the TRACE: Exploiting Post-Click Trajectories for Online Delayed Conversion Rate Prediction
comment: Accepted as a SIGIR 2026 short paper
summary: Delayed feedback poses a core challenge for online CVR prediction, forcing a trade-off between label accuracy and data freshness. Existing methods address this through delay modeling or sample reweighting, yet neglect how post-click behaviors evolve over the observation period. To overcome this limitation, we formalize this evolution as feedback trajectory and propose TRACE. Instead of forcing hard labels on unrevealed samples, our method evaluates how well the accumulated feedback status aligns with conversion versus non-conversion, dynamically refining posteriors without waiting for final outcomes. To counteract early-stage trajectory sparsity, we further design a reliability-gated retrospective completer that leverages full-lifecycle data to provide adaptive posterior guidance for unrevealed samples. Extensive experiments validate TRACE's superiority over state-of-the-art baselines and confirm the retrospective completion module as a model-agnostic enhancer for existing systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/LunaZhangxy/TRACE.

AI.tldr: TRACE提出了一种通过反馈轨迹建模解决在线CVR预测中延迟反馈问题的方法，核心思想是利用累积反馈状态动态调整后验概率，并设计可靠性门控回顾补全模块处理早期轨迹稀疏性。
AI.motivation: 现有延迟反馈方法仅关注延迟建模或样本重加权，忽视了点击后行为在观测期内的动态演化过程。
AI.method: 1) 将点击后行为演化为形式化为反馈轨迹；2) 根据累积反馈状态与转化/非转化的对齐程度动态修正后验；3) 设计可靠性门控回顾补全模块，利用全生命周期数据为未揭示样本提供自适应后验指导。
AI.result: 在实验中优于SOTA基线，且回顾补全模块可作为模型无关的增强器提升现有系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过追踪反馈轨迹而非等待最终结果，可更高效地利用观测期内信息，缓解延迟反馈带来的数据新鲜度与标签准确性矛盾。

title: Expert Evaluation of LLM's Open-Ended Legal Reasoning on the Japanese Bar Exam Writing Task
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on legal benchmarks, including multiple-choice components of bar exams. However, their capacity for generating open-ended legal reasoning in realistic scenarios remains insufficiently explored. Notably, to our best knowledge, there are no prior studies or datasets addressing this issue in the Japanese context.
  This study presents the first dataset designed to evaluate the open-ended legal reasoning performance of LLMs within the Japanese jurisdiction. The dataset is based on the writing component of the Japanese bar examination, which requires examinees to identify multiple legal issues from long narratives and to construct structured legal arguments in free text format. Our key contribution is the manual evaluation of LLMs' generated responses by legal experts, which reveals limitations and challenges in legal reasoning. Moreover, we conducted a manual analysis of hallucinations to characterize when and how the models introduce content not supported by precedent or law.
  Our real exam questions, model-generated responses, and expert evaluations reveal the milestones of current LLMs in the Japanese legal domain. Our dataset and relevant resources will be available online.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个评估LLMs在日本法律领域开放式法律推理能力的数据集，基于日本司法考试的写作部分，通过法律专家人工评估和幻觉分析，揭示了当前LLMs在这一领域的局限与挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注LLMs在法律选择题上的表现，但缺乏对其在现实场景中生成开放式法律推理能力的探索，尤其是在日本法律语境下尚属空白。
AI.method: 基于日本司法考试的写作部分构建数据集，要求模型从长文本中识别多个法律问题并构建结构化论证；通过法律专家对生成回答进行人工评估，并手动分析模型产生的幻觉现象。
AI.result: 揭示了当前LLMs在日本法律领域开放式推理中的里程碑式表现及具体局限，包括幻觉的类型和触发模式。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在开放式法律推理任务上仍存在显著不足，尤其是在幻觉控制方面；该数据集和人工评估为未来改进提供了有价值的基准。

title: Agri-CPJ: A Training-Free Explainable Framework for Agricultural Pest Diagnosis Using Caption-Prompt-Judge and LLM-as-a-Judge
comment: This work is an expanded version of our prior paper published in the IEEE ICASSP 2026 conference arXiv:2512.24947, from 4 to 20+ pages, presenting a well-structured and principled framework, extensive experiments, and deeper insights. Tao Fang is the corresponding author
summary: Crop disease diagnosis from field photographs faces two recurring problems: models that score well on benchmarks frequently hallucinate species names, and when predictions are correct, the reasoning behind them is typically inaccessible to the practitioner. This paper describes Agri-CPJ (Caption-Prompt-Judge), a training-free few-shot framework in which a large vision-language model first generates a structured morphological caption, iteratively refined through multi-dimensional quality gating, before any diagnostic question is answered. Two candidate responses are then generated from complementary viewpoints, and an LLM judge selects the stronger one based on domain-specific criteria. Caption refinement is the component with the largest individual impact: ablations confirm that skipping it consistently degrades downstream accuracy across both models tested. On CDDMBench, pairing GPT-5-Nano with GPT-5-mini-generated captions yields \textbf{+22.7} pp in disease classification and \textbf{+19.5} points in QA score over no-caption baselines. Evaluated without modification on AgMMU-MCQs, GPT-5-Nano reached 77.84\% and Qwen-VL-Chat reached 64.54\%, placing them at or above most open-source models of comparable scale despite the format shift from open-ended to multiple-choice. The structured caption and judge rationale together constitute a readable audit trail: a practitioner who disagrees with a diagnosis can identify the specific caption observation that was incorrect. Code and data are publicly available https://github.com/CPJ-Agricultural/CPJ-Agricultural-Diagnosis

AI.tldr: 提出了Agri-CPJ框架，一个无需训练的少样本方法，通过生成结构化形态描述、多维度质量门控、双视角候选回答和LLM裁判选择，显著提升作物病害诊断的准确性和可解释性，在CDDMBench上疾病分类提升22.7个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有作物病害诊断模型存在两个问题：一是高基准分数下仍频繁出现物种名称幻觉，二是预测缺乏可解释性，从业者无法理解推理过程。
AI.method: 提出Agri-CPJ框架，包含三步：1) 大视觉语言模型生成结构化形态描述，通过多维度质量门控迭代优化；2) 从互补视角生成两个候选回答；3) LLM裁判基于领域特定标准选择更优回答。
AI.result: 在CDDMBench上，GPT-5-Nano配合GPT-5-mini生成的描述，疾病分类提升22.7个百分点，QA分数提升19.5个百分点；在AgMMU-MCQs上，GPT-5-Nano达77.84%，Qwen-VL-Chat达64.54%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化描述生成是提升准确性的最关键组件，同时生成的描述和裁判推理构成了可读的审计追踪，从业者可以定位具体的错误描述，增强模型可信度。

title: On the Complementarity of Quantum and Classical Features: Adaptive Hybrid Quantum-Classical Feature Fusion for Breast Cancer Classification
comment: 41 pages, 16 figures. This manuscript is a preprint under review at Artificial Intelligence in Medicine
summary: The integration of quantum machine learning with classical deep learning offers promising avenues for medical image analysis by mapping data into high-dimensional Hilbert spaces. However, effectively unifying these distinct paradigms remains challenging due to common optimization asymmetries. In this paper, a novel hybrid quantum-classical architecture for breast cancer diagnosis based on a dual-branch feature-extraction pipeline is proposed. Our framework extracts and unifies complementary representations from classical models and quantum circuits, exploring both trainable and deterministic (non-trainable) quantum paradigms. To integrate these embeddings, three progressive feature fusion strategies are introduced: Static Hybrid Fusion (SHF) for offline extraction, Dynamic Hybrid Fusion (DHF) for end-to-end co-adaptation, and a novel Temperature-Scaled Hybrid Fusion (TSHF). The TSHF strategy incorporates a learnable scalar, inspired by multimodal learning, that dynamically balances hybrid gradient dynamics and resolves optimization bottlenecks. Empirical validation on the BreastMNIST dataset confirms our hypothesis that unifying diverse feature representations creates a richer data context. The TSHF strategy, specifically when pairing a ResNet backbone with a trainable quantum circuit, achieved a peak accuracy of 87.82%, F1-score of 91.77%, and an AUC-ROC of 89.08%, outperforming purely classical baselines. These results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid framework improves classification accuracy and threshold reliability, providing a stable, high-performance architecture for the clinical deployment of quantum-enhanced diagnostic tools.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合量子-经典的双分支特征提取架构，用于乳腺癌诊断，并设计了三种特征融合策略（SHF、DHF、TSHF），其中TSHF通过可学习标量平衡混合梯度动力学，在BreastMNIST数据集上达到87.82%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习与经典深度学习在医学图像分析中的统一面临优化不对称等挑战，现有方法难以有效融合这两种不同范式的特征表示。
AI.method: 构建双分支特征提取管道，从经典模型（ResNet）和量子电路（包括可训练和确定性两种范式）提取互补特征，并提出三种渐进式融合策略：静态混合融合（SHF）、动态混合融合（DHF）和温度缩放混合融合（TSHF）。TSHF引入受多模态学习启发的可学习标量来动态平衡混合梯度动力学。
AI.result: 在BreastMNIST数据集上，ResNet+可训练量子电路+TSHF策略达到87.82%准确率、91.77% F1分数和89.08% AUC-ROC，优于纯经典基线。
AI.conclusion: 统一不同特征表示能创建更丰富的数据上下文，混合框架提升了分类准确率和阈值可靠性，为量子增强诊断工具的临床部署提供了稳定高性能架构。

title: A Layer Separation Optimization Framework for Cross-Entropy Training in Deep Learning
summary: This paper investigates the deep learning optimization problem with softmax cross-entropy loss. We propose a layer separation strategy to alleviate the strong nonconvexity encountered during training deep networks. For cross-entropy models with fully connected and convolutional neural networks, we introduce auxiliary variables associated with hidden layer outputs and construct corresponding layer separation models, which decompose the original deeply nested optimization problem into a sequence of more manageable subproblems. We also conduct theoretical analyses, proving that the new layer separation loss provides an upper bound for the original cross-entropy loss. Moreover, we design alternating minimization algorithms and prove that, under appropriate conditions, these algorithms exhibit decreasing properties of the loss function. Numerical experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed methods and indicate improved optimization behavior, especially for fully connected and convolutional neural networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种层分离策略来解决深度网络训练中softmax交叉熵损失的强非凸优化问题，通过引入辅助变量将嵌套优化分解为子问题序列，并设计了交替最小化算法。
AI.motivation: 深度网络训练中softmax交叉熵损失存在强非凸性，导致优化困难，需要更有效的优化策略。
AI.method: 提出层分离策略，引入与隐藏层输出相关的辅助变量，构建层分离模型将原始深度嵌套优化问题分解为多个更易处理的子问题，并设计交替最小化算法。
AI.result: 理论分析证明新层分离损失是原交叉熵损失的上界；算法在一定条件下具有损失递减性质；数值实验验证了方法的有效性，特别是在全连接和卷积神经网络上优化行为有所改善。
AI.conclusion: 层分离策略能有效缓解深度网络训练中的非凸优化困难，为交叉熵损失优化提供了新思路。

title: Modeling Induced Pleasure through Cognitive Appraisal Prediction via Multimodal Fusion
summary: Multimodal affective computing analyzes user-generated social media content to predict emotional states. However, a critical gap remains in understanding how visual content shapes cognitive interpretations and elicits specific affective experiences such as pleasure. This study introduces a novel computational model to infer video-induced pleasure via cognitive appraisal variables. The proposed model addresses four challenges: (1) noisy and inconsistent human labels, (2) the semantic gap between "positive emotions" and "pleasure," (3) the scarcity of pleasure-specific datasets, and (4) the limited interpretability of existing black-box fusion methods. Our approach integrates data-driven and cognitive theory-driven methods, using cognitive appraisal theory and a fuzzy model within an innovative framework. The model employs transformer-based architectures and attention mechanisms for fine-grained multimodal feature extraction and interpretable fusion to capture both inter- and intra-modal dynamics associated with pleasure. This enables the prediction of underlying appraisal variables, thereby bridging the semantic gap and enhancing model explainability beyond conventional statistical associations. Experimental results validate the efficacy of the proposed method in detecting video-induced pleasure, achieving a peak accuracy of 0.6624 in predicting pleasure levels. These findings highlight promising implications for affective content recommendation, intelligent media creation, and advancing our understanding of how digital media influences human emotions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合认知评价理论与数据驱动方法的计算模型，利用Transformer架构和注意力机制对视频引发的愉悦情绪进行可解释性预测，在实验中达到0.6624的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视视觉内容如何塑造认知解释并引发特定情感体验（如愉悦），且存在标签噪声、语义鸿沟、数据集稀缺和黑盒融合不可解释等问题。
AI.method: 集成认知评价理论与模糊模型，采用Transformer架构和注意力机制进行细粒度多模态特征提取与可解释融合，预测潜在的评价变量，从而桥接语义鸿沟。
AI.result: 实验验证了模型在检测视频诱发愉悦情绪方面的有效性，预测愉悦水平的最高准确率为0.6624。
AI.conclusion: 该模型对情感内容推荐、智能媒体创作以及理解数字媒体对人类情绪的影响具有启示意义。

title: AIPsy-Affect: A Keyword-Free Clinical Stimulus Battery for Mechanistic Interpretability of Emotion in Language Models
comment: Dataset paper. 4 pages + appendix, 2 figures. Dataset available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/keidolabs/aipsy-affect. MIT license
summary: Mechanistic interpretability research on emotion in large language models -- linear probing, activation patching, sparse autoencoder (SAE) feature analysis, causal ablation, steering vector extraction -- depends on stimuli that contain the words for the emotions they test. When a probe fires on "I am furious", it is unclear whether the model has detected anger or detected the word "furious". The two readings have very different consequences for every downstream claim about emotion circuits, features, and interventions. We release AIPsy-Affect, a 480-item clinical stimulus battery that removes the confound at the stimulus level: 192 keyword-free vignettes evoking each of Plutchik's eight primary emotions through narrative situation alone, 192 matched neutral controls that share characters, setting, length, and surface structure with the affect surgically removed, plus moderate-intensity and discriminant-validity splits. The matched-pair structure supports linear probing, activation patching, SAE feature analysis, causal ablation, and steering vector extraction under a strong methodological guarantee: any internal representation that distinguishes a clinical item from its matched neutral cannot be doing so on the basis of emotion-keyword presence. A three-method NLP defense battery -- bag-of-words sentiment, an emotion-category lexicon, and a contextual transformer classifier -- confirms the property: bag-of-words methods see only situational vocabulary, and a contextual classifier detects affect (p < 10^-15) but cannot identify the category (5.2% top-1 vs. 82.5% on a keyword-rich control). AIPsy-Affect extends our earlier 96-item battery (arXiv:2603.22295) by a factor of four and is released openly under MIT license.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AIPsy-Affect——一个包含480个临床刺激项的电池，通过无情感关键词的叙事场景引发情绪，解决了机械可解释性研究中“检测到情绪词vs.检测到情绪”的混淆问题。匹配对结构（临床项+中性对照）确保任何内部表征差异都不能基于情绪关键词存在。通过三种NLP方法验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM情感机械可解释性研究依赖包含情感关键词的刺激（如"I am furious"），无法区分模型是检测到情绪还是检测到对应词汇。这一混淆从根本上影响了关于情绪回路、特征和干预的所有下游结论。
AI.method: 构建480个刺激项：(1)192个无情感关键词的临床场景唤起Plutchik八种基本情绪；(2)192个匹配的中性对照（共享角色、场景、长度和表面结构，仅移除情感成分）；(3)中等强度和判别效度拆分。同时应用三种NLP防御方法验证：词袋情感分析、情绪分类词典、上下文Transformer分类器。
AI.result: 词袋方法仅看到情境词汇；上下文分类器能检测到情感(p<10^-15)但无法识别情感类别（top-1仅5.2%，而富含关键词的对照组为82.5%）。表明该数据集有效解除了关键词混淆。
AI.conclusion: AIPsy-Affect为LLM情感机械可解释性研究提供了干净的方法论保障，支持线性探测、激活修补、SAE特征分析、因果消融和引导向量提取等任务，在MIT许可下开源发布。

title: VS-DDPM: Efficient Low-Cost Diffusion Model for Medical Modality Translation
summary: Diffusion models produce high-quality synthetic data but suffer from slow inference. We propose 3D Variable-Step Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (VS-DDPM) a framework engineered to maintain generative quality while accelerating inference by several factors. We tested our approach on four tasks (missing MRI, tumor removal, MRI-to-sCT, and CBCT-to-sCT) within the BraTS2025 and SynthRAD2025 challenges. Designed for high efficiency under hardware and time constrains imposed by both challenges. VS-DDPM achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in missing MRI synthesis, yielding Dice scores of 0.80, 0.83, and 0.88 for the enhancing tumor, tumor core, and whole tumor regions, respectively, alongside a structural similarity index (SSIM) of 0.95. For MRI tumor removal, the model attained a root mean squared error (RMSE) of 0.053, a peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of 26.77, and an SSIM of 0.918. While the framework demonstrated competitive performance in MRI-to-sCT and CBCT-to-sCT tasks, it did not reach SOTA benchmarks, potentially due to sensitivities in data pre and post-processing pipelines or specific loss function configurations. These results demonstrate that VS-DDPM provides a robust and tunable solution for high-fidelity 3D medical image synthesis. The code is available in https://github.com/andre-fs-ferreira/SynthRAD_by_Faking_it.

AI.tldr: 提出了3D可变步长去噪扩散概率模型（VS-DDPM），通过加速推理同时保持生成质量，在医学影像合成任务上取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型能生成高质量合成数据但推理速度慢，本文旨在加速扩散模型的推理过程，同时保持生成质量。
AI.method: 提出了3D Variable-Step Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (VS-DDPM)，通过可变步长策略在保证质量的同时加速推理。
AI.result: 在缺失MRI合成任务上达到SOTA（Dice: 0.80/0.83/0.88, SSIM: 0.95）；肿瘤移除任务RMSE 0.053, PSNR 26.77, SSIM 0.918；在MRI-to-sCT和CBCT-to-sCT任务上表现有竞争力但未达SOTA。
AI.conclusion: VS-DDPM提供了一种鲁棒且可调的方案用于高保真3D医学图像合成，但在某些任务上受限于数据预处理/后处理流程或损失函数配置。

title: Contrastive Learning for Multimodal Human Activity Recognition with Limited Labeled Data
summary:
Human activity recognition serves as the foundation for various emerging applications. In recent years, researchers have used collaborative sensing of multi-source sensors to capture complex and dynamic human activities. However, multimodal human activity sensing typically encounters highly heterogeneous data across modalities and label scarcity, resulting in an application gap between existing solutions and real-world needs. In this paper, we propose CLMM, a general contrastive learning framework for human activity recognition that achieves effective multimodal recognition with limited labeled data.
  CLMM employs a novel two-stage training strategy. In the first stage, CLMM employs a CNN-DiffTransformer encoder to capture cross-modal shared information by extracting local and global features. Meanwhile, a hard-positive samples weighting algorithm enhances gradient propagation to reinforce shared learning. In the second stage, a dual-branch architecture combining quality-guided attention and bidirectional gated units captures modality-specific information, while a primary-auxiliary collaborative training strategy fuses both shared and modality-specific information. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that CLMM significantly improves state-of-the-art baselines in both recognition accuracy and convergence performance.

AI.tldr: 提出CLMM框架，通过两阶段对比学习策略（CNN-DiffTransformer共享特征提取+硬正样本加权+双分支模态特定信息捕获）解决多模态人体活动识别中的数据异质性和标签稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态人体活动感知面临高度异质的数据跨模态和标签稀缺问题，现有解决方案与现实需求之间存在应用差距。
AI.method: 两阶段训练策略：第一阶段用CNN-DiffTransformer编码器提取跨模态共享信息，配合硬正样本加权算法增强梯度传播；第二阶段用双分支架构（质量引导注意力+双向门控单元）捕获模态特定信息，并通过主-辅助协同训练策略融合共享与特定信息。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，CLMM在识别准确率和收敛性能上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的对比学习框架能有效利用有限标注数据实现多模态人体活动识别，为跨模态异质数据融合提供了可行方案。

title: FAIR_XAI: Improving Multimodal Foundation Model Fairness via Explainability for Wellbeing Assessment
summary: In recent years, the integration of multimodal machine learning in wellbeing assessment has offered transformative potential for monitoring mental health. However, with the rapid advancement of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), their deployment in clinical settings has raised concerns due to their lack of transparency and potential for bias. While previous research has explored the intersection of fairness and Explainable AI (XAI), its application to VLMs for wellbeing assessment and depression prediction remains under-explored. This work investigates VLM performance across laboratory (AFAR-BSFT) and naturalistic (E-DAIC) datasets, focusing on diagnostic reliability and demographic fairness. Performance varied substantially across environments and architectures; Phi3.5-Vision achieved 80.4% accuracy on E-DAIC, while Qwen2-VL struggled at 33.9%. Additionally, both models demonstrated a tendency to over-predict depression on AFAR-BSFT. Although bias existed across both architectures, Qwen2-VL showed higher gender disparities, while Phi-3.5-Vision exhibited more racial bias. Our XAI intervention framework yielded mixed results; fairness prompting achieved perfect equal opportunity for Qwen2-VL at a severe accuracy cost on E-DAIC. On AFAR-BSFT, explainability-based interventions improved procedural consistency but did not guarantee outcome fairness, sometimes amplifying racial bias. These results highlight a persistent gap between procedural transparency and equitable outcomes. We analyse these findings and consolidate concrete recommendations for addressing them, emphasising that future fairness interventions must jointly optimise predictive accuracy, demographic parity, and cross-domain generalisation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在心理健康评估和抑郁预测中的公平性与可解释性问题。实验发现，不同VLM在实验室和自然场景数据集上表现差异显著（Phi3.5-Vision准确率80.4%，Qwen2-VL仅33.9%），且存在明显的性别和种族偏见。可解释性干预虽能提升过程一致性，但难以保证结果公平，有时甚至加剧偏见。
AI.motivation: 将多模态机器学习用于心理健康评估具有巨大潜力，但VLMs在临床部署中缺乏透明度和存在偏见。此前研究对公平性和可解释性AI的探索较少应用于VLMs的健康评估场景，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用两个数据集（实验室AFAR-BSFT和自然场景E-DAIC）评估多种VLM架构的性能；引入XAI干预框架（包括公平性提示和可解释性干预）并分析其对诊断准确性和人口统计学公平性的影响。
AI.result: 1) 模型性能因环境和架构差异显著，Phi3.5-Vision（80.4%）远优于Qwen2-VL（33.9%）；2) 两模型均对AFAR-BSFT数据有过预测抑郁的倾向；3) Qwen2-VL存在更大的性别差异，Phi-3.5-Vision存在更多种族偏见；4) 公平性提示虽能实现完美机会均等但严重牺牲准确性；5) 可解释性干预提升过程一致性但可能加剧偏见。
AI.conclusion: 过程透明与结果公平之间存在持续差距，未来的公平性干预必须同时优化预测准确性、人口统计公平性和跨领域泛化能力。

title: Multimodal QUD: Inquisitive Questions from Scientific Figures
summary: Asking inquisitive questions while reading, and looking for their answers, is an important part in human discourse comprehension, curiosity, and creative ideation, and prior work has investigated this in text-only scenarios. However, in scientific or research papers, many of the critical takeaways are conveyed through both figures and the text that analyzes them. While scientific visualizations have been used to evaluate Vision-Language Models (VLMs) capabilities, current benchmarks are limited to questions that focus simply on extracting information from them. Such questions only require lower-level reasoning, do not take into account the context in which a figure appears, and do not reflect the communicative goals the authors wish to achieve. We generate inquisitive questions that reach the depth of questions humans generate when engaging with scientific papers, conditioned on both the figure and the paper's context, and require reasoning across both modalities. To do so, we extend the linguistic theory of Questions Under Discussion (QUD) from being text-only to multimodal, where implicit questions are raised and resolved as discourse progresses. We present MQUD, a dataset of research papers in which such questions are made explicit and annotated by the original authors. We show that fine-tuning a VLM on MQUD shifts the model from generating generic low-level visual questions to content-specific grounding that requires a high-level of multimodal reasoning, yielding higher-quality, more visually grounded multimodal QUD generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MQUD数据集，将文本中的"讨论中的问题"(QUD)理论扩展到多模态场景，生成需要结合图表和论文上下文进行跨模态推理的探究性问题，并微调VLM使其能从提取低级视觉信息转向生成高质量、多模态推理的高阶问题。
AI.motivation: 现有科学图表基准仅关注从图中提取信息的低层次问题，忽略了图表所处的论文上下文以及作者的沟通意图，无法反映人类阅读科学论文时提出的深层探究性问题。
AI.method: 将语言学中的"讨论中的问题"(QUD)理论从纯文本扩展到多模态，构建MQUD数据集（包含论文中由原作者标注的显式化探究性问题），并在此基础上微调视觉语言模型(VLM)。
AI.result: 微调后的VLM从生成通用低级视觉问题转向生成内容特异性、需要高层次多模态推理的问题，生成质量更高、视觉基础更牢固的多模态QUD。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态QUD框架和数据集，可以显著提升VLM生成需要跨图表与文本进行高层次推理的探究性问题的能力，更接近人类阅读科学论文时的提问方式。

title: AnemiaVision: Non-Invasive Anemia Detection via Smartphone Imagery Using EfficientNet-B3 with TrivialAugmentWide, Mixup Augmentation, and Persistent Patient History Management
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, 6 tables. Final year personal project, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, Indian Institute of Information Technology Surat. Code: https://github.com/RAHULPATEL2002/anemia-detection Demo: https://anemia-detection-gbmj.onrender.com
summary: Anemia affects over one billion people globally and remains severely under-diagnosed in low-resource regions where laboratory blood tests are inaccessible. This paper presents AnemiaVision, an end-to-end web-based system for non-invasive anemia screening from smartphone photographs of the palpebral conjunctiva and fingernail beds. The proposed pipeline fine-tunes a pre-trained EfficientNet-B3 backbone with a redesigned three-layer classifier head incorporating BatchNorm, GELU activations, and high-rate Dropout (0.45/0.35). Training employs four orthogonal accuracy-boosting techniques: TrivialAugmentWide for policy-free image augmentation, RandomErasing for spatial regularisation, Mixup (alpha=0.2) for inter-class smoothing, and cosine-annealing scheduling with linear warmup. Early stopping is governed by peak validation accuracy rather than validation loss to prevent premature termination on high-variance epochs. The deployed Flask application integrates persistent patient-history management backed by PostgreSQL on Render, with an automated database-migration entrypoint ensuring zero data loss across redeploys. Ablation experiments demonstrate that accuracy-first early stopping contributes +1.6% and Mixup contributes +2.8% to final validation accuracy. Overall, the proposed system achieves a validation accuracy of 96.2% and AUC-ROC of 0.98, compared with 44.9% validation accuracy and AUC-ROC of 0.58 from the three-epoch CPU-only baseline. Sensitivity for the anemic class reaches 0.96, making the system suitable as a first-line screening tool for community health workers in rural settings. The system is publicly accessible and source code is openly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AnemiaVision，一个基于智能手机拍照（眼睑结膜+指甲床）的非侵入式贫血筛查Web系统。通过微调EfficientNet-B3并设计三层分类头，结合TrivialAugmentWide、RandomErasing、Mixup和余弦退火调度等四项正交增强技术，以及准确率优先早停策略，最终达到96.2%的验证准确率和0.98的AUC-ROC，适用于资源匮乏地区的贫血筛查。
AI.motivation: 全球有超过10亿人患有贫血，但在低资源地区因实验室血液检测不可及而严重漏诊，亟需一种低成本、非侵入式的筛查工具。
AI.method: 微调预训练EfficientNet-B3，重新设计三层分类头（含BatchNorm、GELU激活、高Dropout率0.45/0.35）；采用四项正交增强技术：TrivialAugmentWide、RandomErasing、Mixup(alpha=0.2)、余弦退火调度+线性预热；早停基于峰值验证准确率而非验证损失；部署为Flask Web应用，使用PostgreSQL管理患者历史记录。
AI.result: 验证准确率96.2%，AUC-ROC 0.98，贫血类别敏感度0.96；消融实验显示准确率优先早停贡献+1.6%，Mixup贡献+2.8%；对比基线（三epoch CPU训练）准确率44.9%，AUC-ROC 0.58。
AI.conclusion: AnemiaVision可作为社区医疗工作者在农村环境中的一线筛查工具，系统已公开可访问且代码开源。

title: Revisable by Design: A Theory of Streaming LLM Agent Execution
summary: Current LLM agents operate under an implicit but universal assumption: execution is a transaction -- the user submits a request, the agent works in isolation, and only upon completion does the dialogue resume. This forces users into a binary choice: wait for a potentially incorrect output, or interrupt and lose all progress. We reject this assumption and propose the stream paradigm, in which agent execution and user intervention are concurrent, interleaved processes sharing a bidirectional channel. We formalize this paradigm through a reversibility taxonomy that classifies every agent action as Idempotent, Reversible, Compensable, or Irreversible, and arrive at a core conclusion: an agent's flexibility is bounded by its reversibility. We prove that conflicting compensable actions impose unavoidable adaptation costs and that conflicting irreversible actions make full specification satisfaction impossible -- these costs are properties of the action space, not of the algorithm. Guided by this insight, we present the Revision Absorber, a reactive algorithm based on the Earliest-Conflict Rollback rule that is structurally optimal under mild assumptions. Experiments on StreamBench with real LLM agents validate all predictions: the Absorber matches the quality of a brute-force full-restart baseline while wasting an order of magnitude fewer steps of already-completed work, turning mid-execution revisions from a dead-end into a first-class interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出流式范式（stream paradigm），允许LLM agent执行与用户干预并发进行，通过可逆性分类（Idempotent/Reversible/Compensable/Irreversible）形式化分析，并设计Revision Absorber算法实现高效的执行中修订，在StreamBench上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM agent假设执行是"事务性"的——用户在请求提交后只能等待结果或中断丢失所有进度，这种二元选择低效且不灵活。作者拒绝这一隐含假设，希望实现agent执行与用户干预的并发交互。
AI.method: (1) 提出可逆性分类法：将agent动作分为幂等、可逆、可补偿、不可逆四类；(2) 理论证明冲突的可补偿动作会带来不可避免的适应成本，冲突的不可逆动作使完全满足规范不可能；(3) 提出Revision Absorber算法，基于最早冲突回滚规则，在温和假设下结构最优。
AI.result: 在StreamBench上的实验表明，Revision Absorber在质量上与暴力全重启基线相当，但浪费的已完成工作量少一个数量级，将执行中的修订从死胡同转变为第一类交互。
AI.conclusion: agent的灵活性受限于其可逆性，最理想的方案是不执行不可逆动作，并确保可补偿动作不与后续行动冲突。Revision Absorber是实现流式交互的高效实用方案。

title: Domain-Filtered Knowledge Graphs from Sparse Autoencoder Features
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) extract millions of interpretable features from a language model, but flat feature inventories aren't very useful on their own. Domain concepts get mixed with generic and weakly grounded features, while related ideas are scattered across many units, and there's no way to understand relationships between features. We address this by first constructing a strict domain-specific concept universe from a large SAE inventory using contrastive activations and a multi-stage filtering process. Next, we build two aligned graph views on the filtered set: a co-occurrence graph for corpus-level conceptual structure, organized at multiple levels of granularity, and a transcoder-based mechanism graph that links source-layer and target-layer features through sparse latent pathways. Automated edge labeling then turns these graph views into readable knowledge graphs rather than unlabeled layouts. In a case study on a biology textbook, these graphs recover coherent chapter and subchapter-level structure, reveal concepts that bridge neighboring topics, and transform messy sentence-level activity containing thousands of features into compact, readable views that illustrate the model's local activity. Taken together, this reframes a flat SAE inventory as an internal knowledge graph that converts feature-level interpretability into a global map of model knowledge and enables audits of reasoning faithfulness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将稀疏自编码器（SAE）提取的海量特征构建为内部知识图谱：通过对比激活和多阶段过滤构建领域概念空间，再构建共现图和基于transcoder的机制图，最后自动标注边，将扁平的特征清单转化为可读的知识图谱，在生物学教材案例中验证了其恢复章节结构、揭示跨主题概念、可视化模型局部活动的能力。
AI.motivation: SAE能从语言模型中提取数百万可解释特征，但这些扁平化的特征清单缺乏结构，领域概念与通用/弱基础特征混杂，相关概念分散在不同单元中，且无法理解特征间的关系。现有可解释性方法难以提供模型知识的全局视图。
AI.method: 1) 通过对比激活和多阶段过滤从大型SAE清单中构建严格的领域特定概念空间；2) 构建两个对齐的图视图：共现图（捕获语料级概念结构，支持多粒度组织）和基于transcoder的机制图（连接源层和目标层特征，通过稀疏潜在路径）；3) 自动边标注将图转化为可读的知识图谱。
AI.result: 在生物学教材案例中，该方法能恢复连贯的章节和子章节级结构，揭示连接相邻主题的概念，并将包含数千特征的混乱句子级活动转化为紧凑可读的视图，展示模型的局部活动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将扁平的特征清单重构为内部知识图谱，将特征级可解释性转化为模型知识的全局地图，并能用于审计推理的忠实性。

title: Domain Fine-Tuning vs. Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Medical Multiple-Choice Question Answering: A Controlled Comparison at the 4B-Parameter Scale
summary: Practitioners deploying small open-weight large language models (LLMs) for medical question answering face a recurring design choice: invest in a domain-fine-tuned model, or keep a general-purpose model and inject domain knowledge at inference time via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We isolate this trade-off by holding model size, prompt template, decoding temperature, retrieval pipeline, and evaluation protocol fixed, and varying only (i) whether the model has been domain-adapted (Gemma 3 4B vs. MedGemma 4B, both 4-bit quantized and served via Ollama) and (ii) whether retrieved passages from a medical knowledge corpus are inserted into the prompt. We evaluate all four cells of this 2x2 design on the full MedQA-USMLE 4-option test split (1,273 questions) with three repetitions per question (15,276 LLM calls). Domain fine-tuning yields a +6.8 percentage-point gain in majority-vote accuracy over the general 4B baseline (53.3% vs. 46.4%, McNemar p < 10^-4). RAG over MedMCQA explanations does not produce a statistically significant gain in either model, and in the domain-tuned model the point estimate is slightly negative (-1.9 pp, p = 0.16). At this scale and on this benchmark, domain knowledge encoded in weights dominates domain knowledge supplied in context. We release the full experiment code and JSONL traces to support replication.

AI.tldr: 本文在固定模型规模、提示模板、解码温度、检索流程和评估协议下，对比了领域微调（MedGemma 4B）与检索增强生成（RAG）在医疗问答中的效果。结果表明，领域微调相比通用基线提升+6.8%（53.3% vs. 46.4%），而RAG在两种模型上均无统计显著的增益，在领域微调模型上甚至略有负面效果（-1.9 pp）。结论：在此规模和基准上，编码在权重中的领域知识优于上下文注入的领域知识。
AI.motivation: 为部署小型开源LLM进行医疗问答的实践者澄清一个关键设计选择：是投资领域微调模型，还是保留通用模型并在推理时通过RAG注入领域知识。作者通过严格隔离变量来量化这一权衡。
AI.method: 采用2×2实验设计：（i）是否领域适配（Gemma 3 4B vs. MedGemma 4B，均4-bit量化+Ollama部署）；（ii）是否在提示中插入来自医学知识库的检索段落。在MedQA-USMLE四选一测试集（1,273题）上，每问重复3次，共15,276次LLM调用。
AI.result: 领域微调带来+6.8个百分点的多数投票准确率提升（53.3% vs. 46.4%，p<10^-4）；基于MedMCQA解释的RAG在两种模型上均无统计显著增益，领域微调模型上点估计略为负（-1.9 pp，p=0.16）。
AI.conclusion: 在此规模（4B参数）和基准（MedQA-USMLE）上，编码在权重中的领域知识效果优于通过上下文注入的领域知识。代码和JSONL轨迹已开源以支持复现。

title: BrickNet: Graph-Backed Generative Brick Assembly
summary: We train a language model to generate LEGO-brick build sequences. While prior work has been restricted to discrete, voxel-like towers, we consider a much broader set of pieces, encompassing thousands of part types with diverse connection semantics. To enable this, we first collect a large-scale dataset of over 100,000 human-designed LDraw brick objects and scenes. The complexity of our setting makes it challenging to autoregressively assemble structures that satisfy physical constraints. When predicting block pose directly, build sequences quickly become invalid after a small number of steps. Although pieces are placed in 3D space, it is the spatial relationships of the parts which define the whole. With this in mind, we design a graph-based program representation that parametrizes structure through connectivity, improving the physical grounding of generated sequences. To enable future applications, we make our dataset and models available for research purposes. https://kulits.github.io/BrickNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BrickNet，通过图结构程序表示训练语言模型生成LEGO积木搭建序列，解决了复杂零件类型下的物理约束问题。
AI.motivation: 现有工作局限于离散体素塔结构，无法处理数千种具有复杂连接语义的LEGO零件类型，且自回归预测部件位姿会导致序列快速失效。
AI.method: 收集10万+人类设计的LDraw积木数据集，设计基于图的程序表示方法，通过零件间的连接关系参数化结构，提升生成序列的物理合理性。
AI.result: 训练的语言模型能够生成满足物理约束的复杂LEGO搭建序列，数据集和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 图结构程序表示能有效改进自回归生成中的物理约束问题，为复杂结构生成提供了新思路。

title: An Analysis of Active Learning Algorithms using Real-World Crowd-sourced Text Annotations
comment: The proposed dataset can be accessed at https://github.com/varuntotakura/al_rcta/. To appear in Proceedings of the IEEE International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Active learning algorithms automatically identify the most informative samples from large amounts of unlabeled data and tremendously reduce human annotation effort in inducing a machine learning model. In a conventional active learning setup, the labeling oracles are assumed to be infallible, that is, they always provide correct answers (in terms of class labels) to the queried unlabeled instances, which cannot be guaranteed in real-world applications. To this end, a body of research has focused on the development of active learning algorithms in the presence of imperfect / noisy oracles. Existing research on active learning with noisy oracles typically simulate the oracles using machine learning models; however, real-world situations are much more challenging, and using ML models to simulate the annotation patterns may not appropriately capture the nuances of real-world annotation challenges. In this research, we first collect annotations of text samples (from 3 benchmark text classification datasets) from crowd-sourced workers through a crowd-sourcing platform. We then conduct extensive empirical studies of 8 commonly used active learning techniques (in conjunction with deep neural networks) using the obtained annotations. Our analyses sheds light on the performance of these techniques under real-world challenges, where annotators can provide incorrect labels, and can also refuse to provide labels. We hope this research will provide valuable insights that will be useful for the deployment of deep active learning systems in real-world applications. The obtained annotations can be accessed at https://github.com/varuntotakura/al_rcta/.

AI.tldr: 本文通过众包平台收集真实标注数据，在3个文本分类基准上系统评估了8种主流深度主动学习方法在含噪声标注者（可能提供错误标签或拒绝标注）场景下的表现，揭示了现有模拟噪声研究与实际场景的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习研究假设标注者是完美的，而实际场景中标注者会出错或拒绝标注；即使有研究考虑噪声标注者，也多用ML模型模拟噪声，无法真实反映现实中的标注挑战。
AI.method: 通过众包平台收集3个文本分类数据集上的人类真实标注；然后系统评估8种深度主动学习方法（结合深度神经网络）在这些真实噪声标注下的表现。
AI.result: 揭示了主流主动学习方法在真实标注噪声（错误标签+拒绝标注）下的性能表现，为实际部署提供了实证依据。
AI.conclusion: 真实场景中的标注噪声（错误+拒绝）对主动学习方法影响显著，未来应开发对真实标注噪声更鲁棒的主动学习算法。

title: ClawTrace: Cost-Aware Tracing for LLM Agent Skill Distillation
summary: Skill-distillation pipelines learn reusable rules from LLM agent trajectories, but they lack a key signal: how much each step costs. Without per-step cost, a pipeline cannot distinguish adding a missing step to fix a bug from removing an expensive step that never affected the outcome. We introduce ClawTrace, an agent tracing platform that records every LLM call, tool use, and sub-agent spawn during an agent session and compiles each session into a TraceCard: a compact YAML summary with per-step USD cost, token counts, and redundancy flags. Built on ClawTrace, CostCraft is a distillation pipeline that reads TraceCards and produces three types of skill patches. Preserve patches keep behaviors that led to success. Prune patches remove expensive steps that did not matter, each backed by a counterfactual argument against a named high-cost step. Repair patches fix failures grounded in oracle evidence. Ablations on 30 held-out SpreadsheetBench tasks show that both cost attribution and prune patches independently reduce quality regressions. When the same skill is applied to 30 unrelated SkillsBench tasks, an unexpected asymmetry emerges: prune rules transferred across benchmarks and cut median cost by 32%, while preserve rules, trained on benchmark-specific conventions, caused regressions on new task types. We release ClawTrace and TraceCards as open infrastructure for cost-aware agent research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ClawTrace（代理追踪平台）和 CostCraft（蒸馏流水线），通过 TraceCard（含每步成本的 YAML 摘要）实现 LLM 代理轨迹的**成本感知**技能蒸馏，生成三种技能补丁（保留/剪枝/修复），实验表明成本归因和剪枝补丁可减少质量退化并降低 32% 成本。
AI.motivation: 现有技能蒸馏流水线缺乏每步成本信号，无法区分"修复错误需要添加步骤"和"移除从未影响结果的昂贵步骤"，导致蒸馏质量退化。
AI.method: 1) ClawTrace：追踪平台，记录每步 LLM 调用、工具使用、子代理生成，编译为 TraceCard（含 USD 成本、token 数、冗余标志）。2) CostCraft：基于 TraceCard 的蒸馏流水线，生成 Preserve（保留成功行为）、Prune（剪枝不影响结果的昂贵步骤，附反事实论证）、Repair（修复失败）三种技能补丁。
AI.result: 1) 在 SpreadsheetBench 上，成本归因和剪枝补丁独立减少质量退化。2) 在 SkillsBench 上，剪枝规则跨基准迁移，中位数成本降低 32%；保留规则因过度学习基准特定约定导致新任务类型退化。
AI.conclusion: 成本感知是代理蒸馏的关键信号；剪枝补丁具有更好的跨任务泛化性；公开 ClawTrace 和 TraceCards 作为开源基础设施。

title: LegalDrill: Diagnosis-Driven Synthesis for Legal Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: Small language models (SLMs) are promising for real-world deployment due to their efficiency and low operational cost. However, their limited capacity struggles with high-stakes legal reasoning tasks that require coherent statute interpretation and logically consistent deduction. Furthermore, training SLMs for such tasks demands high-quality, concise reasoning trajectories, which are prohibitively expensive to manually collect and difficult to curate via standard rejection sampling, lacking granularity beyond final verdicts. To address these challenges, we propose {LegalDrill}, a diagnosis-driven synthesis framework that extracts and iteratively refines reasoning trajectories from a capable teacher via fine-grained prompting, then a self-reflective verification is employed to adaptively select the most effective data for the SLM student. The resulting data empower SLM training through supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization. Extensive experiments on several legal benchmarks demonstrate that {LegalDrill} significantly bolsters the legal reasoning capabilities of representative SLMs while bypassing the need for scarce expert annotations, paving a scalable path toward practical legal reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: LegalDrill是一个诊断驱动的合成框架，通过精细提示从教师模型中提取并迭代精炼推理轨迹，再通过自反验证选择最有效数据来训练小语言模型，使其在法律推理任务上表现显著提升。
AI.motivation: 小语言模型在高风险法律推理任务中能力不足，且缺乏高质量、简洁的推理轨迹训练数据——人工收集成本高昂，标准拒绝采样又缺乏细粒度。
AI.method: LegalDrill框架：1) 通过精细提示从能力强的教师模型中提取并迭代精炼推理轨迹；2) 采用自反验证自适应选择最有效的数据；3) 用所选数据通过监督微调和直接偏好优化训练小模型。
AI.result: 在多个法律基准测试上，LegalDrill显著增强了小语言模型的法律推理能力，且无需稀缺的专家标注。
AI.conclusion: LegalDrill为实用法律推理系统提供了一条可扩展的路径，证明了通过合成数据蒸馏可以有效提升小模型在高难度专业任务上的表现。

title: CheXmix: Unified Generative Pretraining for Vision Language Models in Medical Imaging
summary: Recent medical multimodal foundation models are built as multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) by connecting a CLIP-pretrained vision encoder to an LLM using LLaVA-style finetuning. This two-stage, decoupled approach introduces a projection layer that can distort visual features. This is especially concerning in medical imaging where subtle cues are essential for accurate diagnoses. In contrast, early-fusion generative approaches such as Chameleon eliminate the projection bottleneck by processing image and text tokens within a single unified sequence, enabling joint representation learning that leverages the inductive priors of language models. We present CheXmix, a unified early-fusion generative model trained on a large corpus of chest X-rays paired with radiology reports. We expand on Chameleon's autoregressive framework by introducing a two-stage multimodal generative pretraining strategy that combines the representational strengths of masked autoencoders with MLLMs. The resulting models are highly flexible, supporting both discriminative and generative tasks at both coarse and fine-grained scales. Our approach outperforms well-established generative models across all masking ratios by 6.0% and surpasses CheXagent by 8.6% on AUROC at high image masking ratios on the CheXpert classification task. We further inpaint images over 51.0% better than text-only generative models and outperform CheXagent by 45% on the GREEN metric for radiology report generation. These results demonstrate that CheXmix captures fine-grained information across a broad spectrum of chest X-ray tasks. Our code is at: https://github.com/StanfordMIMI/CheXmix.

AI.tldr: CheXmix 是一种针对胸部X光片的早期融合生成式多模态模型，通过两阶段生成式预训练策略（结合掩码自编码器和多模态LLM），在分类和报告生成任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗多模态基础模型采用LLaVA式的两阶段解耦方法（CLIP视觉编码器+投影层+LLM），投影层会扭曲视觉特征，这在需要捕捉细微线索的医学影像诊断中尤为不利。作者希望消除投影瓶颈，采用早期融合的生成式方法来实现更好的联合表示学习。
AI.method: 基于Chameleon的早期融合自回归框架，提出两阶段多模态生成式预训练策略：第一阶段结合掩码自编码器（MAE）的表示学习优势，第二阶段进行多模态LLM式的生成式训练。模型在大量胸部X光片-报告对上进行训练。
AI.result: 在CheXpert分类任务上，所有掩码比例下平均优于其他生成模型6.0%，高掩码比例下优于CheXagent 8.6% AUROC；图像修补优于纯文本生成模型51.0%；放射学报告生成的GREEN指标上优于CheXagent 45%。
AI.conclusion: CheXmix能有效捕获胸部X光片中的细粒度信息，在各类任务上均表现出色，证明了早期融合生成式方法在医学影像领域的潜力。

title: CombiMOTS: Combinatorial Multi-Objective Tree Search for Dual-Target Molecule Generation
comment: Accepted as a poster at ICML 2025 (Main Track)
summary: Dual-target molecule generation, which focuses on discovering compounds capable of interacting with two target proteins, has garnered significant attention due to its potential for improving therapeutic efficiency, safety and resistance mitigation. Existing approaches face two critical challenges. First, by simplifying the complex dual-target optimization problem to scalarized combinations of individual objectives, they fail to capture important trade-offs between target engagement and molecular properties. Second, they typically do not integrate synthetic planning into the generative process. This highlights a need for more appropriate objective function design and synthesis-aware methodologies tailored to the dual-target molecule generation task. In this work, we propose CombiMOTS, a Pareto Monte Carlo Tree Search (PMCTS) framework that generates dual-target molecules. CombiMOTS is designed to explore a synthesizable fragment space while employing vectorized optimization constraints to encapsulate target affinity and physicochemical properties. Extensive experiments on real-world databases demonstrate that CombiMOTS produces novel dual-target molecules with high docking scores, enhanced diversity, and balanced pharmacological characteristics, showcasing its potential as a powerful tool for dual-target drug discovery. The code and data is accessible through https://github.com/Tibogoss/CombiMOTS.

AI.tldr: 提出了CombiMOTS，一个基于帕累托蒙特卡洛树搜索（PMCTS）的框架，用于生成能与两个靶点蛋白相互作用的新型可合成双靶分子，兼顾靶标亲和力和理化性质的多目标优化。
AI.motivation: 现有双靶分子生成方法存在两个问题：(1) 将复杂的双靶优化简化为标量化组合，无法捕捉靶标结合与分子性质之间的重要权衡；(2) 未将合成可及性纳入生成过程。因此需要更合适的损失函数设计和合成感知的方法。
AI.method: 提出CombiMOTS框架，核心是帕累托蒙特卡洛树搜索（PMCTS），在可合成的分子片段空间中进行搜索，使用向量化优化约束来同时考虑靶标亲和力和理化性质，实现多目标帕累托优化。
AI.result: 在真实数据库上的实验表明，CombiMOTS能够生成新型双靶分子，具有高对接分数、更好的多样性和平衡的药理学特性。
AI.conclusion: CombiMOTS是一种有潜力的双靶药物发现工具，通过帕累托优化和合成感知设计解决了现有方法的局限性。

title: Does Machine Unlearning Preserve Clinical Safety? A Risk Analysis for Medical Image Classification
summary: The application of Deep Learning in medical diagnosis must balance patient safety with compliance with data protection regulations. Machine Unlearning enables the selective removal of training data from deployed models. However, most methods are validated primarily through efficiency and privacy-oriented metrics, with limited attention to clinically asymmetric error costs. In this work, we investigate how unlearning affects clinical risk in binary medical image classification. We show that standard unlearning strategies (Fine-Tuning, Random Labeling, and SalUn) may reduce test utility while increasing false-negative rates, thereby amplifying clinical risk. To mitigate this, we propose SalUn-CRA (Clinical Risk-Aware), a variant of SalUn that replaces random relabeling with entropy-based forgetting for malignant samples in the forget set, preventing the model from learning harmful benign associations. We evaluate on DermaMNIST and PathMNIST medical image datasets under 20% and 50% data removal. Using Global Risk metrics with asymmetric costs, SalUn-CRA achieves lower or comparable clinical risk to full retraining while preserving unlearning effectiveness. These results suggest that clinical risk should be an integral component of unlearning validation in medical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器遗忘在医学图像分类中的临床风险，发现标准遗忘方法可能增加假阴性率从而放大临床风险。作者提出SalUn-CRA方法，用熵基遗忘替代随机重标号，在降低临床风险的同时保持遗忘效果。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法主要关注效率和隐私指标，忽略了医学诊断中不对称错误代价（如假阴性的临床风险远高于假阳性）。需要将临床风险评估纳入遗忘验证体系。
AI.method: 提出SalUn-CRA，在SalUn框架中将随机重标号替换为基于熵的遗忘策略，针对遗忘集中恶性样本进行遗忘，避免模型学习有害的良性关联。
AI.result: 在DermaMNIST和PathMNIST数据集上，20%和50%数据移除场景下，SalUn-CRA在全局风险指标上达到低于或接近完全重训练的临床风险，同时保持遗忘有效性。
AI.conclusion: 临床风险应作为医学系统中机器遗忘验证的组成部分，SalUn-CRA是平衡遗忘效果与临床安全性的有效方案。

title: DRACULA: Hunting for the Actions Users Want Deep Research Agents to Execute
summary: Scientific Deep Research (DR) agents answer user queries by synthesizing research papers into multi-section reports. User feedback can improve their utility, but existing protocols only score the final report, making it hard to study and learn which intermediate actions DR agents should take to improve reports. We collect DRACULA, the first dataset with user feedback on intermediate actions for DR. Over five weeks, nineteen expert CS researchers ask queries to a DR system that proposes actions (e.g., "Add a section on datasets"). Our users select actions they prefer, then judge whether an output report applied their selections successfully, yielding 8,103 action preferences and 5,230 execution judgments. After confirming a DR agent can execute DRACULA's actions, we study the predictability of user-preferred actions via simulation-how well LLMs predict the actions users select-a step toward learning to generate useful actions. We discover: (1) LLM judges initially struggle to predict action selections, but improve most when using a user's full selection history, rather than self-reported or extrapolated user context signals; (2) Users' selections for the same query differ based on unstated goals, bottlenecking simulation and motivating affordances that let users steer reports; and (3) Our simulation results inform an online intervention that generates new actions based on the user's past interactions, which users pick most often in follow-up studies. Overall, while work extensively studies execution, DRACULA reveals a key challenge is deciding which actions to execute in the first place. We open-source DRACULA's study design, user feedback, and simulation tasks to spur future work on action feedback for long-horizon agents.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了DRACULA数据集，收集了19位CS研究人员在科学深度研究（DR）代理系统上对中间动作（如添加章节）的偏好反馈和执行判断，研究了如何用LLM预测用户偏好的动作，发现利用完整选择历史最有效，并基于此设计了在线干预方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的科学深度研究（DR）代理的评价反馈只关注最终报告质量，难以研究和学习中间动作（如搜索、添加章节）对报告效果的贡献，因此缺乏细粒度动作级别的用户反馈数据来指导代理改进。
AI.method: 收集19位CS研究者5周内的交互数据，包括动作偏好（8,103条）和执行判断（5,230条）；通过模拟实验评估LLM预测用户动作选择的能力，对比不同上下文信号（完整历史、自报告偏好、外推信号）的效果；基于模拟结果设计在线干预，生成个性化动作建议。
AI.result: (1) LLM预测动作选择时，利用用户的完整选择历史效果最佳，优于自报告或外推的用户上下文信号；(2) 用户对同一查询的选择因未言明的目标而异，这成为模拟的瓶颈；(3) 基于历史交互的在线干预生成的新动作在后续研究中被用户最频繁选择。
AI.conclusion: DR代理的关键挑战不在于执行动作，而在于决定首先执行哪些动作；DRACULA数据集和任务为长周期代理的动作反馈研究提供了基础。

title: Hard to See, Hard to Label: Generative and Symbolic Acquisition for Subtle Visual Phenomena
summary: Subtle visual anomalies such as hairline cracks, sub-millimeter voids, and low-contrast inclusions are structurally atypical yet visually ambiguous, making them both difficult to annotate and easy to overlook during active learning. Standard acquisition heuristics based on discriminative uncertainty or feature diversity often overselect dominant patterns while underexploring sparse yet important regions of the data space. This failure mode is especially severe in industrial defect inspection, where anomalies may be both low-prevalence and difficult to distinguish from surrounding structure. To resolve this, we propose GSAL, an active learning framework for object detection that combines a diffusion-based difficulty signal with a hierarchical semantic coverage prior. The diffusion component scores images and proposals using reconstruction discrepancy and denoising variability, prioritizing visually atypical or ambiguous examples. However, diffusion alone does not prevent acquisition from repeatedly favoring hard samples within dominant semantic modes. The semantic component therefore organizes candidate samples in a three-level concept graph and promotes coverage of underrepresented semantic regions while providing interpretable acquisition rationales. By balancing visual difficulty with semantic coverage, GSAL improves retrieval of subtle and rare targets that are often missed by uncertainty-only selection. Experiments on a proprietary thin-film defect, Pascal VOC and MS COCO dataset show consistent gains in label efficiency and rare-class retrieval over uncertainty-, diversity-, and hybrid-based baselines

AI.tldr: 提出GSAL主动学习框架，结合扩散模型检测难度信号和层级语义覆盖先验，解决工业缺陷检测中视觉异常难以标注和遗漏的问题，在标签效率和稀有类检索上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 标准主动学习方法（基于不确定性或特征多样性）在工业缺陷检测中容易过度选择主导模式样本，忽略稀疏但重要的视觉异常（如细微裂纹、低对比度夹杂物），导致对罕见缺陷的召回率低。
AI.method: GSAL包含两个核心组件：(1) 扩散模型信号——利用重建差异和去噪变异性对样本进行视觉异常难度评分；(2) 层级语义覆盖先验——构建三级概念图组织候选样本，促进对欠代表语义区域的覆盖，平衡视觉难度与语义多样性。
AI.result: 在专有薄膜缺陷数据集、Pascal VOC和MS COCO上，GSAL在标签效率和稀有类检索上一致优于基于不确定性、多样性和混合策略的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过将扩散模型捕获的视觉异常信号与语义覆盖先验结合，能有效提升对细微、罕见目标的检索能力，为工业缺陷检测中的主动学习提供了新范式。

title: CODA: Coordination via On-Policy Diffusion for Multi-Agent Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) enables policy learning from fixed datasets, but is prone to coordination failure: agents trained on static, off-policy data converge to suboptimal joint behaviours because they cannot co-adapt as their policies change. We introduce CODA (Coordination via On-Policy Diffusion for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning), a diffusion-based multi-agent trajectory generator for data augmentation that samples conditioned on the current joint policy, producing synthetic experience which reflects the evolving behaviours of the agents, thereby providing a mechanism for co-adaptation. We find that previous diffusion-based augmentation approaches are insufficient for fostering multi-agent coordination because they produce static augmented datasets that do not evolve as the current joint policy changes during training; CODA resolves this by more closely simulating on-policy learning and is a meaningful step toward coordinated behaviours in the offline setting. CODA is algorithm-agnostic and can be layered onto both model-free and model-based offline reinforcement learning pipelines as an augmentation module. Empirically, CODA not only resolves canonical coordination pathologies in continuous polynomial games but also delivers strong results on the more complex MaMuJoCo continuous-control benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CODA是一种基于扩散模型的多智能体轨迹生成器，通过生成基于当前联合策略条件的合成经验数据，解决了离线多智能体强化学习中的协调失败问题，使得智能体能够在训练过程中实现共同适应。
AI.motivation: 离线多智能体强化学习存在协调失败问题：由于训练数据是静态的离线数据，智能体的策略在更新时无法相互适应，导致收敛到次优的联合行为。
AI.method: 提出CODA框架，利用扩散模型作为多智能体轨迹生成器，以当前联合策略为条件生成合成经验数据，模拟在线策略学习过程，实现智能体间的共同适应。该方法是算法无关的，可作为增强模块集成到无模型和基于模型的离线RL流程中。
AI.result: 在连续多项式游戏中解决了经典的协调病理问题，并在更复杂的MaMuJoCo连续控制基准测试中取得了强竞争结果。
AI.conclusion: CODA通过在线策略条件化的数据增强，有效缓解了离线多智能体强化学习中的协调失败问题，是迈向离线场景下协调行为的有意义的步骤。

title: Time-Series Forecasting in Safety-Critical Environments: An EU-AI-Act-Compliant Open-Source Package / Zeitreihenprognose in sicherheitskritischen Umgebungen: Ein KI-VO-konformes Open-Source-Paket
comment: Bilingual twin paper: English version first, German original below (91 pages total). Single shared bibliography
summary: With spotforecast2-safe we present an integrated Compliance-by-Design approach to Python-based point forecasting of time series in safety-critical environments. A review of the relevant open-source tooling shows that existing compliance solutions operate consistently outside of the library to be used - e.g. as scanners, templates, or runtime layers. spotforecast2-safe takes the inverse approach and anchors the requirements of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (the EU AI Act, in German: KI-VO), of IEC 61508, of the ISA/IEC 62443 standards series, and of the Cyber Resilience Act within the library: in application-programming-interface contracts, persistence formats, and continuous-integration gates. The approach is operationalised by four non-negotiable code-development rules (zero dead code, deterministic processing, fail-safe handling, minimal dependencies) together with the corresponding process rules (model card, executable docstrings, CI workflows, Common-Platform-Enumeration (CPE) identifier, REUSE-conformant licensing, release pipeline). Interactive visualisation, hyperparameter tuning and automated machine learning (AutoML), as well as deep-learning and large-language-model backends are deliberately excluded, because each of these components either enlarges the attack surface, introduces non-determinism, or impairs reproducibility. A bidirectional traceability matrix maps every regulatory provision onto the corresponding mechanism in the code; an end-to-end example of European-market electricity generation, transmission, and consumption forecasting demonstrates the application. The package is open-source and available under Affero General Public License (AGPL) 3.0-or-later.

AI.tldr: 本文提出spotforecast2-safe，一种将欧盟AI法案、IEC 61508等安全法规直接嵌入Python时序预测库的"合规即设计"方法，通过API契约、持久化格式和CI门控强制执行四项代码规则，并明确排除深度学习/LLM等非确定性组件。
AI.motivation: 现有合规解决方案（扫描器、模板、运行时层）独立于库外部运行，缺乏内生性合规机制。安全关键场景的时序预测需要将法规要求直接嵌入库设计本身。
AI.method: 采用逆向设计思路，将欧盟AI法案、IEC 61508、ISA/IEC 62443等法规要求锚定在库内部，通过四项不可协商的代码规则（零死代码、确定性处理、故障安全处理、最小依赖）及配套流程规则实现，并构建双向可追溯矩阵。
AI.result: 提供了一个合规即设计、开源（AGPL 3.0）的Python时序点预测库，以欧洲电力市场预测为例展示了端到端应用，但明确排除了深度学习、LLM、AutoML等非确定性组件。
AI.conclusion: 安全关键环境中，合规应内嵌于库设计而非外部独立工具，但代价是牺牲深度学习/LLM等可能引入非确定性或扩大攻击面的高级功能。

title: Resource-Lean Lexicon Induction for German Dialects
summary: Automatic induction of high-quality dictionaries is essential for building lexical resources, yet low-resource languages and dialects pose several challenges: limited access to annotators, high degree of spelling variations, and poor performance of large language models (LLMs). We empirically show that statistical models (random forests) trained on string similarity features are surprisingly effective for inducing German dialect lexicons. They outperform LLMs, enable cross-dialect transfer, and offer a lightweight data-driven alternative. We evaluate our models intrinsically on bilingual lexicon induction (BLI) and extrinsically on dialect information retrieval (IR). On BLI, random forests outperform Mistral-123b while being more resource-lean. On dialect IR with BM25, using our dialect dictionaries for query expansion yields relative improvements of up to 28.9% in nDCG@10 and 50.7% in Recall@100. Motivated by the resource scarcity in dialects, we further investigate the extent to which models transfer across different German dialects, and their performance under varying amounts of training data.

AI.tldr: 本文发现随机森林模型基于字符串相似性特征在诱导德语方言词典方面表现惊人，不仅超越大型语言模型（如Mistral-123b），还能实现跨方言迁移，并在双语词典归纳和方言信息检索任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 低资源语言和方言面临标注者有限、拼写变异多、LLM表现不佳等问题，自动构建高质量词典对于建立词汇资源至关重要。
AI.method: 使用基于字符串相似性特征的随机森林模型进行方言词典诱导，并与大型语言模型进行对比，评估双语词典归纳和方言信息检索任务，同时研究跨方言迁移和数据量影响。
AI.result: 随机森林在双语词典归纳上优于Mistral-123b；在方言信息检索中，使用方言词典进行查询扩展使nDCG@10提升28.9%，Recall@100提升50.7%。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级的统计模型（随机森林）在低资源方言词典构建中比大型语言模型更有效，是一种数据驱动的实用替代方案。

title: Efficient Image Annotation via Semi-Supervised Object Segmentation with Label Propagation
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables, submitted to RoboCup 2026 Symposium
summary: Reliable object perception is necessary for general-purpose service robots. Open-vocabulary detectors struggle to generalize beyond a few classes and fully supervised training of object detectors requires time-intensive annotations. We present a semi-supervised label propagation approach for household object segmentation. A segment proposer generates class-agnostic masks, and an ensemble of Hopfield networks assigns labels by learning representative embeddings in complementary foundation model embedding spaces (CLIP, ViT, Theia). Our approach scales to 50 object classes with limited annotation overhead and can automatically label 60% of the data in a RoboCup@Home setting, where preparation time is severely constrained. Dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ais-bonn/label_propagation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Hopfield网络集成的半监督标签传播方法，利用CLIP、ViT、Theia等多种基础模型嵌入空间，在少量标注下自动为家庭物体分割提供标签，可在RoboCup@Home场景下自动标注60%数据。
AI.motivation: 通用服务机器人需要可靠的物体感知，但开放词汇检测器在少数类别外泛化能力差，全监督物体检测需要大量标注时间成本，亟需一种低标注开销的物体分割标注方法。
AI.method: 采用半监督标签传播策略：先用分割提议器生成类别无关的掩码，再通过Hopfield网络集成在CLIP、ViT、Theia等多种基础模型嵌入空间中学习代表性嵌入，从而为未标注数据分配标签。
AI.result: 在50个物体类别上扩展良好，标注开销有限；在RoboCup@Home场景下可自动标注60%数据，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合多种基础模型嵌入空间和Hopfield网络集成，可以在极小标注成本下实现有效的家庭物体分割标注，适用于对准备时间要求严格的场景。

title: GIFT: Global stabilisation via Intrinsic Fine Tuning
summary: Deep reinforcement learning policies achieve strong performance in complex continuous control environments with nonlinear contact forces. However, these policies often produce chaotic state dynamics, with trivially small changes to the initial conditions significantly impacting the long-term behaviour of the control system. This high sensitivity to initial conditions limits the application of Deep RL to real-world control systems where performance and stability guarantees are often required. To address this issue, we propose Global stabilisation via Intrinsic Fine Tuning (GIFT), a general-purpose training framework which directly optimises the global stability of existing high-performing deep RL policies using a custom reward function.
