We demonstrate that GIFT increase the stability of the control interaction while maintaining comparable task performance, thereby improving the suitability of deep RL policies for real-world control systems.

AI.tldr: 提出GIFT框架，通过对高表现深度强化学习策略进行内在微调，优化全局稳定性，在保持任务性能的同时减少对初始条件的敏感性。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习策略在复杂连续控制环境中表现出色，但常常产生混沌状态动力学，对初始条件高度敏感，这限制了其在需要性能和稳定性保证的真实控制系统中的应用。
AI.method: 提出GIFT（Global stabilisation via Intrinsic Fine Tuning）框架，通过自定义奖励函数直接优化现有高性能深度强化学习策略的全局稳定性。
AI.result: GIFT在保持可比任务性能的同时，显著提升了控制交互的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: GIFT提高了深度强化学习策略在真实世界控制系统中的适用性。

title: ZenBrain: A Neuroscience-Inspired 7-Layer Memory Architecture for Autonomous AI Systems
comment: Pre-print of NeurIPS 2026 main-track submission. Earliest preprint version on Zenodo 31 March 2026 (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19353664); cross-posted to TDCommons (dpubs_series/9683, 1 April 2026). Six Zenodo revisions and three TDCommons revisions through 9 April 2026 (Zenodo concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19353663). 41 pages, 22 tables, 2 figures
summary:
Despite a century of empirical memory research, existing AI agent memory systems rely on system-engineering metaphors (virtual-memory paging, flat LLM storage, Zettelkasten notes), none integrating principles of consolidation, forgetting, and reconsolidation.
  We present ZenBrain, a multi-layer memory architecture integrating fifteen neuroscience models. It implements seven memory layers (working, short-term, episodic, semantic, procedural, core, cross-context) orchestrated by nine foundational algorithms (Two-Factor Synaptic Model, vmPFC-coupled FSRS, Simulation-Selection sleep, Bayesian confidence, and five more) plus six new Predictive Memory Architecture (PMA) components: a four-channel NeuromodulatorEngine, prediction-error-gated ReconsolidationEngine, TripleCopyMemory with divergent decay, four-dimensional PriorityMap with amygdala fast-path, StabilityProtector (NogoA/HDAC3 analogue), and MetacognitiveMonitor for bias detection.
  The 15-algorithm ablation reveals a cooperative survival network: under stress, 9 of 15 algorithms become individually critical (delta-Q up to -93.7%, Wilcoxon, 10 seeds, alpha=0.005). Simulation-Selection sleep achieves 37% stability improvement (p<0.005) with 47.4% storage reduction. TripleCopyMemory retains S(t)=0.912 at 30 days; PriorityMap reaches NDCG@10=0.997.
  Multi-layer routing beats a flat single-layer baseline by 20.7% F1 on LoCoMo (p<0.005) and 19.5% on MemoryArena (p=0.015). On LongMemEval-500, ZenBrain holds the highest mean rank on all 12 system-judge cells (4 systems x 3 LLM judges), three-judge mean J=0.545 vs letta=0.485, a-mem=0.414, mem0=0.394; all 9 pair-wise contrasts clear Bonferroni (alpha=0.05/18, min p=6.2e-31, d in [0.18, 0.52]). Under LongMemEval's binary judge, ZenBrain reaches 91.3% of oracle accuracy at 1/106th the per-query token budget. Open-source with 11,589 automated test cases.

AI.tldr: ZenBrain提出了一种基于15个神经科学模型的多层记忆架构，包含7个记忆层和9个基础算法，在多个长时记忆基准测试上显著优于现有AI记忆系统（如letta、mem0等），其中在LongMemEval-500上达到91.3%的oracle准确率，而token消耗仅为oracle的1/106。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体的记忆系统仍停留在系统工程隐喻（虚拟内存分页、扁平LLM存储、Zettelkasten笔记）层面，完全没有整合记忆巩固、遗忘和再巩固等神经科学原理，导致长时记忆性能受限。
AI.method: 设计7层记忆架构（工作记忆、短时、情景、语义、程序、核心、跨上下文），由9种神经科学基础算法（双因子突触模型、vmPFC耦合FSRS、模拟选择睡眠等）和6个新PMA组件（神经调节引擎、再巩固引擎、三重拷贝记忆、四维优先级图、稳定性保护器、元认知监控器）协同驱动。
AI.result: 多层路由在LoCoMo上F1提升20.7%，MemoryArena提升19.5%；LongMemEval-500上3判官平均J=0.545，显著优于letta(0.485)等；15算法消融实验揭示了合作生存网络，9个算法在压力下变得个体关键（delta-Q最高-93.7%）；模拟选择睡眠实现37%稳定提升+47.4%存储缩减；三重拷贝记忆30天保留率S(t)=0.912。
AI.conclusion: 将神经科学记忆原理系统性地融入AI记忆架构是可行且有效的，ZenBrain在长时记忆任务上显著优于现有方法，且具有极高的token效率。

title: One Size Fits None: Heuristic Collapse in LLM Investment Advice
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as advisors in high-stakes domains -- answering medical questions, interpreting legal documents, recommending financial products -- where good advice requires integrating a user's full context rather than responding to salient surface features. We investigate whether frontier LLMs actually do this, or whether they instead exhibit heuristic collapse: a systematic reduction of complex, multi-factor decisions to a small number of dominant inputs. We study the phenomenon in investment advice, where legal standards explicitly require individualized reasoning over a client's full circumstances. Applying interpretable surrogate models to LLM outputs, we find systematic heuristic collapse: investment allocation decisions are largely determined by self-reported risk tolerance, while other relevant factors contribute minimally. We further find that web search partially attenuates heuristic collapse but does not resolve it. These findings suggest that heuristic collapse is not resolved by web search augmentation or model scale alone, and that deploying LLMs as advisors requires auditing input sensitivity, not just output quality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了前沿大语言模型在提供投资建议时是否会出现“启发式崩溃”——即复杂决策被简化为少数主导因素（如风险承受能力），而忽略了其他重要背景信息。研究发现，即便使用网络搜索增强或扩大模型规模，这种启发式崩溃现象仍然存在。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型正越来越多地被部署在高风险领域（医疗、法律、金融）担任顾问角色，但这些场景要求基于用户的完整背景进行个性化推理，而非仅响应表面显著特征。作者希望探究LLM是否真的能做到这一点，还是存在系统性的简化偏差。
AI.method: 使用可解释的代理模型（interpretable surrogate models）分析LLM在投资建议任务中的输出，系统性地量化各输入因素对模型决策的贡献程度。
AI.result: LLM的投资配置决策主要由用户自述的风险承受能力决定，其他相关因素贡献极小；网络搜索可部分缓解但无法解决启发式崩溃；模型规模扩大也无法消除该现象。
AI.conclusion: 启发式崩溃无法仅通过网络搜索增强或模型规模扩展来解决，部署LLM作为顾问时需要审计其输入敏感性（即模型是否充分考虑了所有相关因素），而不仅仅是输出质量。

title: GenAssets: Generating in-the-wild 3D Assets in Latent Space
summary: High-quality 3D assets for traffic participants are critical for multi-sensor simulation, which is essential for the safe end-to-end development of autonomy. Building assets from in-the-wild data is key for diversity and realism, but existing neural-rendering based reconstruction methods are slow and generate assets that render well only from viewpoints close to the original observations, limiting their usefulness in simulation. Recent diffusion-based generative models build complete and diverse assets, but perform poorly on in-the-wild driving scenes, where observed actors are captured under sparse and limited fields of view, and are partially occluded. In this work, we propose a 3D latent diffusion model that learns on in-the-wild LiDAR and camera data captured by a sensor platform and generates high-quality 3D assets with complete geometry and appearance. Key to our method is a "reconstruct-then-generate" approach that first leverages occlusion-aware neural rendering trained over multiple scenes to build a high-quality latent space for objects, and then trains a diffusion model that operates on the latent space. We show our method outperforms existing reconstruction and generation based methods, unlocking diverse and scalable content creation for simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种3D潜空间扩散模型，利用"先重建再生成"的策略，从野外驾驶场景的稀疏LiDAR和相机数据中生成具有完整几何和外观的高质量交通参与者3D资产，用于多传感器仿真。
AI.motivation: 高质量3D交通资产对自动驾驶安全端到端开发至关重要，但现有神经渲染方法速度慢且视角泛化差，扩散模型在野外驾驶场景（稀疏视角、部分遮挡）表现不佳，因此需要一种能从真实稀疏数据中生成完整3D资产的方法。
AI.method: 提出"reconstruct-then-generate"两阶段方法：1) 利用跨场景的遮挡感知神经辐射场构建对象的3D潜空间；2) 在该潜空间上训练扩散模型以生成完整几何和外观的3D资产。输入为野外采集的LiDAR和相机数据。
AI.result: 该方法在野外驾驶场景中优于现有的重建和生成方法，能生成高质量、完整且多样的3D交通参与者资产，支持多传感器仿真。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了从稀疏、部分遮挡的野外数据生成完整3D资产的难题，为仿真中多样化、可扩展的内容创建提供了可行方案。

title: Layer Embedding Deep Fusion Graph Neural Network
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated impressive performance in learning representations from graph-structured data. However, their message-passing mechanism inherently relies on the assumption of label consistency among connected nodes, limiting their applicability to low-homophily settings. Moreover, since message passing operates as a hierarchical diffusion process, GNNs face challenges in capturing long-range dependencies. As network depth increases, the structural noise along heterophilic edges tends to be amplified, resulting in over-smoothing. This issue becomes especially prominent in highly heterophilic graphs, where the propagation of inconsistent semantics across the topology continually exacerbates misaggregation. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework named Layer Embedding Deep Fusion Graph Neural Network (LEDF-GNN). Specifically, we design a Layer Embedding Deep Fusion (LEDF) operator that nonlinearly fuses multi-layer embeddings to capture inter-layer dependencies and effectively alleviate deep propagation degradation. Meanwhile, to mitigate structural heterophily, LEDF-GNN employs a Dual-Topology Parallel Strategy (DTPS) that simultaneously leverages the original and reconstructed topologies, allowing for adaptive structure-semantics co-optimization under diverse homophily conditions. Extensive semi-supervised classification experiments on the citation and image benchmarks demonstrate that, under both homophilic and heterophilic settings, LEDF-GNN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating its effectiveness and generalization capability across diverse graph types.

AI.tldr: 提出LEDF-GNN框架，通过层嵌入深度融合算子缓解深层传播退化，并采用双拓扑并行策略应对结构异质性，在图半监督分类任务上超越现有基准。
AI.motivation: GNN的消息传递机制假设连接节点间标签一致，在低同质性图上表现受限；同时深层GNN存在过平滑问题，异质性边的结构噪声会加剧错误聚合。
AI.method: 1) 层嵌入深度融合(LEDF)算子：非线性融合多层嵌入以捕获跨层依赖、缓解深层传播退化；2) 双拓扑并行策略(DTPS)：同时利用原始拓扑和重构拓扑进行自适应结构-语义协同优化。
AI.result: 在同质性和异质性设置下的引用图和图像基准上，LEDF-GNN在半监督分类任务中一致优于SOTA基线，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: LEDF-GNN通过深度融合与双拓扑策略有效解决了GNN在异质图上的过平滑和长程依赖问题，具有跨图类型的泛化能力。

title: MarketBench: Evaluating AI Agents as Market Participants
summary: Markets are a promising way to coordinate AI agent activity for similar reasons to those used to justify markets more broadly. In order to effectively participate in markets, agents need to have informative signals of their own ability to successfully complete a task and the cost of doing so. We propose MarketBench, a benchmark for assessing whether AI agents have these capabilities. We use a 93-task subset of SWE-bench Lite, a software engineering benchmark, with six recently released LLMs as a demonstration. These LLMs are miscalibrated on both success probability and token usage, and auctions built from these self-reports diverge from a full-information allocation. A follow-up intervention where we add information about capabilities from prior experiments to the context improves calibration, but only modestly narrows the gap to a full-information benchmark. We also document the performance of a market-based scaffolding with these LLMs. Our results point to self-assessment as a key bottleneck for market-style coordination of AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 MarketBench 基准，用于评估 AI 代理在市场中自我评估能力（成功概率和成本估计）。基于 SWE-bench Lite 的 93 个任务测试 6 种 LLM，发现它们在成功概率和 token 使用上校准不佳，导致市场分配偏离最优。加入先验信息可改善校准，但差距仍显著。
AI.motivation: 市场机制有望用于协调 AI 代理活动，但前提是代理能准确自我评估任务成功概率和成本。当前缺乏评估这种能力的标准基准。
AI.method: 基于 SWE-bench Lite 的 93 个软件工程任务，构建 MarketBench 基准；使用 6 种近期 LLM 进行实验，评估其自我报告的成功概率和 token 消耗的校准程度，并构建拍卖市场比较分配效率。
AI.result: LLM 在成功概率和 token 使用上均存在校准偏差；基于自我报告构建的拍卖市场分配效率低于全信息基准；在上下文中加入先验实验信息可改善校准，但差距缩小有限。
AI.conclusion: 自我评估能力是 LLM 参与市场式协调的主要瓶颈，当前模型尚不足以有效支持基于市场的 AI 代理协同。

title: Reheat Nachos for Dinner? Evaluating AI Support for Cross-Cultural Communication of Neologisms
summary: Neologisms and emerging slang are central to daily conversation, yet challenging for non-native speakers (NNS) to interpret and use appropriately in cross-cultural communication with native speakers (NS). NNS increasingly make use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools to learn these words. We study the utility of such tools in mediating an informal communication scenario through a human-subjects study (N=234): NNS participants learn English neologisms with AI support, write messages using the learned word to an NS friend, and judge contextual appropriateness of the neologism in two provided writing samples. Using both NS evaluator-rated communicative competence of NNS-produced writing and NNS' contextual appropriateness judgments, we compare three AI-based support conditions: AI Definition, AI Rewrite into simpler English, AI Explanation of meaning and usage, and Non-AI Dictionary for comparison. We show that AI Explanation yields the largest gains over no support in NS-rated competence, while contextual appropriateness judgments show indifference across support. NNS participants' self-reported perceptions tend to overestimate NS ratings, revealing a mismatch between perceived and actual competence. We further observe a significant gap between NNS- and NS-produced writing, highlighting the limitations of current AI tools and informing design for future tools.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过人类实验（N=234）比较了四种AI/非AI工具对非母语者学习英语新词和俚语的效果，发现AI解释（含用法和含义）在提升母语者评定的交际能力方面效果最佳，但非母语者的自我感知能力与实际能力存在偏差，且当前AI工具仍难以弥合非母语者与母语者写作质量之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 非母语者在跨文化交际中难以理解和恰当使用新词与俚语，越来越多地借助AI工具学习这些词汇，但不同AI支持方式的效果尚不明确，需要系统比较。
AI.method: 进行人类受试者研究（N=234），非母语者在不同条件下（AI定义、AI简化改写、AI解释含义与用法、非AI词典）学习英语新词，然后完成写作和语境恰当性判断任务，由母语者评估其交际能力。
AI.result: AI解释条件在提升母语者评定的交际能力方面效果最佳；非母语者自我感知能力高估了实际表现；不同条件下语境恰当性判断无显著差异；非母语者与母语者写作质量之间仍存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: AI工具对非母语者学习新词有一定帮助，但存在感知与实际能力的偏差，且当前AI能力有限，需改进工具设计。

title: AmaraSpatial-10K: A Spatially and Semantically Aligned 3D Dataset for Spatial Computing and Embodied AI
summary: Web-scale 3D asset collections are abundant, but rarely deployment-ready. Assets ship with arbitrary metric scale, incorrect pivots and forward axes, brittle geometry, and textures that do not support relighting, which limits their utility for embodied AI, robotics simulation, game development, and AR/VR. We present AmaraSpatial-10K, a dataset of over 10,000 synthetic 3D assets designed for downstream use rather than volume alone. Each asset is released as a metric-scaled, semantically anchored .glb with separated PBR material maps, a convex collision hull, a paired reference image, and rich multi-sentence text metadata. The dataset spans indoor objects, vehicles, architecture, creatures, and props under a unified spatial convention. Alongside the dataset, we introduce an evaluation suite for 3D asset banks. The suite comprises a continuous Scale Plausibility Score (SPS) with an LLM-as-Judge interval protocol, an LLM Concept Density score for metadata, an anchor-error metric, and a cross-modal CLIP coherence protocol, and we use it to audit AmaraSpatial-10K alongside matched subsets from Objaverse, HSSD, ABO, and GSO. Compared with Objaverse-sourced assets, we demonstrate that AmaraSpatial-10K substantially improves text-based retrieval precision (CLIP Recall@5 of 0.612 vs 0.181, a 3.4x improvement with median rank falling from 267 to 3), and we establish that it satisfies the spatial and semantic prerequisites for physics-aware scene composition and embodied-AI asset banks, leaving those downstream evaluations to future work. AmaraSpatial-10K is publicly available on Hugging Face.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AmaraSpatial-10K，一个包含超过10,000个高质量合成3D资产的数据集，每个资产都经过标准化处理（公制尺度、正确枢轴、PBR材质、碰撞体等），并配套了包含LLM评估、CLIP召回等指标的评估套件，在文本检索上相比Objaverse实现了3.4倍的提升。
AI.motivation: 现有3D资产集合（如Objaverse）虽然规模庞大，但存在尺度不统一、枢轴错误、几何脆弱、纹理不支持重新照明等问题，使得这些资产难以直接应用于具身AI、机器人仿真、游戏开发等领域，因此需要构建一个可直接部署的高质量3D资产数据集。
AI.method: 1) 构建AmaraSpatial-10K数据集：超过10,000个合成3D资产，统一为公制尺度、语义锚定的.glb格式，包含分离的PBR材质贴图、凸包碰撞体、配对参考图像和丰富的多句文本元数据。2) 提出评估套件：包括尺度合理性得分（SPS，含LLM-as-Judge协议）、LLM概念密度得分、锚点误差指标、跨模态CLIP一致性协议。3) 在Objaverse、HSSD、ABO、GSO等数据集上进行对比评估。
AI.result: 相比Objaverse，AmaraSpatial-10K在文本检索方面显著提升：CLIP Recall@5从0.181提升至0.612（提升3.4倍），中位数排名从267降至3。数据集满足物理感知场景合成和具身AI资产库的空间与语义先决条件。
AI.conclusion: AmaraSpatial-10K提供了可直接部署的高质量3D资产，解决了现有数据集部署就绪性不足的问题，为具身AI、机器人仿真等下游应用奠定了数据基础，数据集已在Hugging Face公开发布。

title: Process Supervision of Confidence Margin for Calibrated LLM Reasoning
summary: Scaling test-time computation with reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a reliable path to improve large language models (LLM) reasoning ability. Yet, outcome-based reward often incentivizes models to be overconfident, leading to hallucinations, unreliable confidence-based control, and unnecessary compute allocation. We introduce Reinforcement Learning with Confidence Margin (\textbf{RLCM}), a calibration-aware RL framework that jointly optimizes correctness and confidence reliability via a margin-enhanced process reward over intermediate-budget completions. Rather than aligning confidence to correctness likelihoods, RLCM encourages to widen the confidence margin between correct and incorrect steps within a single reasoning trajectory. Across mathematical, code, logic and science benchmarks, our method substantially improves calibration while maintaining or improving accuracy. We further show that, with calibrated confidence signals, the resulting models enable more efficient conformal risk control and effective confidence-weighted aggregation.

AI.tldr: RLCM是一种校准感知的强化学习框架，通过中间预算完成上的边际增强过程奖励，联合优化LLM推理的正确性和置信度可靠性，有效减少过自信和幻觉。
AI.motivation: 基于结果的奖励常常激励模型过度自信，导致幻觉、不可靠的基于置信度的控制以及不必要的计算分配。现有方法将置信度对齐到正确性似然，但效果有限。
AI.method: 提出RLCM框架，通过边际增强过程奖励（margin-enhanced process reward）在中间预算完成（intermediate-budget completions）上联合优化正确性和置信度可靠性。关键创新是鼓励在单个推理轨迹中扩大正确步骤与错误步骤之间的置信度边际（confidence margin），而非简单对齐置信度与正确性似然。
AI.result: 在数学、代码、逻辑和科学基准测试中，RLCM在保持或提升准确率的同时显著改善了校准性。校准后的置信度信号还能更有效地进行风险控制和置信度加权聚合。
AI.conclusion: RLCM通过置信度边际增强机制有效解决了基于结果的RL带来的过度自信问题，实现了更好的校准性，同时不牺牲甚至提升推理准确性，为测试时计算扩展提供了更可靠的路径。

title: LLM-Augmented Traffic Signal Control with LSTM-Based Traffic State Prediction and Safety-Constrained Decision Support
summary: Traffic signal control is a critical task in intelligent transportation systems, yet conventional fixed-time and rule-based methods often struggle to adapt to dynamic traffic demand and provide limited decision interpretability. This study proposes an LLM-augmented traffic signal control framework that integrates LSTM-based short-term traffic state prediction, predictive phase selection, structured large language model reasoning, and safety-constrained action filtering. The LSTM module forecasts future queue length, waiting time, vehicle count, and lane occupancy based on recent intersection-level observations. A predictive controller then generates candidate signal actions, while the LLM module evaluates these actions using structured traffic-state inputs and produces congestion diagnoses, phase adjustment recommendations, and natural-language explanations. To ensure operational reliability, all LLM-generated recommendations are validated by a safety filter before execution. Simulation-based experiments in SUMO compare the proposed method with fixed-time control, rule-based control, and an LSTM-based predictive baseline under balanced demand, directional peak demand, and sudden surge scenarios. The results indicate that the proposed framework improves traffic efficiency, especially under dynamic and non-recurrent traffic conditions, while maintaining zero constraint violations after safety filtering. Overall, this study demonstrates that LLMs can enhance traffic signal control when used as constrained reasoning and decision-support modules rather than direct low-level controllers. Keywords: Intelligent Transportation Systems; Traffic Signal Control; Large Language Models; LSTM; Traffic State Prediction; Decision Support; Safety-Constrained Control; SUMO Simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种LLM增强的交通信号控制框架，结合LSTM交通预测、预测性相位选择、结构化LLM推理和安全约束过滤，在SUMO仿真中验证了其在动态交通场景下的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统固定时间和基于规则的交通信号控制方法难以适应动态交通需求，且决策可解释性有限，亟需更智能、可解释的控制方法。
AI.method: 提出LLM增强框架：1) LSTM预测队列长度、等待时间等交通状态；2) 预测控制器生成候选信号动作；3) LLM模块基于结构化交通输入进行评估、诊断和推荐；4) 安全过滤器验证LLM输出后再执行。
AI.result: 在SUMO模拟中（平衡需求、方向性高峰、突发激增三种场景），相比固定时间控制、规则控制和LSTM基线，所提框架提升了交通效率，尤其在动态和非周期性交通条件下，且安全过滤后零约束违规。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为受约束的推理和决策支持模块来增强交通信号控制，而非直接作为底层控制器，能够提升可解释性和动态适应性。

title: Translate or Simplify First: An Analysis of Cross-lingual Text Simplification in English and French
summary: Cross-Lingual Text Simplification (CLTS) aims to make content more accessible across languages by simultaneously addressing both linguistic complexity and translation. This study investigates the effectiveness of different prompting strategies for CLTS between English and French using large language models (LLMs). We examine five distinct prompting systems: a direct prompt instructing the LLM to perform both translation and simplification simultaneously, two Composition approaches that either translate-then-simplify or simplify-then-translate within a single prompt, and two decomposition approaches that perform the same operations in separate, consecutive prompts. These systems are evaluated across a diverse set of five corpora of different genres (Wikipedia and medical texts) using seven state-of-the-art LLMs. Output quality is assessed through a multi-faceted evaluation framework comprising automatic metrics, comprehensive linguistic feature analysis, and human evaluation of simplicity and meaning preservation. Our findings reveal that while direct prompting consistently achieves the highest BLEU scores, indicating meaning fidelity, Translate-then-Simplify approaches demonstrate the highest simplicity, as measured by the linguistic features.

AI.tldr: 研究了不同提示策略在大语言模型上进行跨语言文本简化（英法）的效果，发现直接提示在BLEU得分（意义保真度）上最优，而先翻译后简化的策略在简化效果上最佳。
AI.motivation: 跨语言文本简化（CLTS）能同时解决语言复杂性和翻译问题，使内容更易获取，但不同提示策略的效果尚不明确。
AI.method: 在5个不同语料库（维基百科和医学文本）上，使用7种前沿LLM，比较了5种提示策略：直接提示、两种组合方法（先翻译后简化/先简化后翻译，在同一提示内）、两种分解方法（分步连续提示）。通过自动指标、语言特征分析和人工评估进行综合评价。
AI.result: 直接提示在BLEU得分（意义保真度）上最高；先翻译后简化方法在基于语言特征的简化效果上表现最好。
AI.conclusion: 不同提示策略在保真度和简化效果上各有侧重，需根据任务目标选择。直接提示保真度高，分解简化效果好。

title: Understanding Representation Gaps Across Scales in Tropical Tree Species Classification from Drone Imagery
summary: Accurate classification of tropical tree species from unoccupied aerial vehicle (UAV) imagery remains challenging due to high species diversity and strong visual similarity among species at typical image resolutions (centimeters per pixel). In contrast, models trained on close-up citizen science photographs captured with smartphones achieve strong plant species classification performance. Recent advances in UAV data acquisition now enable the collection of close-up images that are spatially registered with top-view aerial imagery and approach the level of visual detail found in smartphone photographs, with the trade-off that such high-resolution photos cannot be acquired for many trees. In this work, we evaluate the performance of existing methods using paired top-view and close-up UAV imagery collected in a species-rich tropical forest. Through fine-tuning experiments, we quantify the performance gap between vision foundation models and in-domain generalist plant recognition models across both image types (high-resolution close-up versus coarser-resolution top-view imagery). We show that classification performance is consistently higher on close-up images than on top-view aerial imagery, and that this performance gap widens for rare species. Finally, we propose that self-supervised representation alignment across these two spatial scales offers a promising approach for integrating fine-grained visual information into canopy-level species classification models based on top-view UAV imagery. Leveraging high-resolution close-up UAV imagery to enhance canopy-level species classification could substantially improve large-scale monitoring of tropical forest biodiversity.

AI.tldr: 利用无人机获取的近距离高分辨率图像和俯视影像，通过微调视觉基础模型，验证了近距离图像在热带树种分类上优于俯视图像，尤其对稀有物种差异更大，并提出跨尺度自监督表征对齐方法以提升冠层分类性能。
AI.motivation: 热带树种分类面临物种多样性高、视觉相似性强等挑战，现有方法在俯视无人机影像上表现有限，而公民科学拍摄的近距离照片分类效果较好。作者希望利用无人机采集的高分辨率近距离图像来提升冠层水平的树种分类能力，从而支持大规模热带森林生物多样性监测。
AI.method: 使用配对的俯视和近距离无人机影像，在热带雨林中进行微调实验，对比视觉基础模型与领域内通用植物识别模型的性能差异，并分析近距离与俯视图像在不同物种（特别是稀有物种）上的分类差距，最后提出自监督表征对齐方法以融合多尺度信息。
AI.result: 近距离图像上的分类性能始终优于俯视影像，且这一差距在稀有物种上更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 自监督跨尺度表征对齐是整合近距离细粒度视觉信息到冠层分类模型的有效方向，可提升热带森林生物多样性的大规模监测能力。

title: TEMPO: Transformers for Temporal Disease Progression from Cross-Sectional Data
comment: 31 pages; Published at Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning (CHIL) 2026
summary: Event-Based Models (EBMs) infer biomarker progression from cross-sectional data but typically only as ordinal sequences and rely on rigid model assumptions. We propose \textsc{Tempo}, a Transformer architecture that learns both ordinal and continuous event sequences through simulation-based supervised learning. \textsc{Tempo} uses two Transformer modules: one treats biomarkers as tokens to infer event sequencing; the other treats patients as tokens, representing each by their per-biomarker abnormality profile, to infer patients' disease stages. On synthetic benchmarks, \textsc{Tempo} reduces normalized Kendall's Tau distance by 52.89\% and staging MAE by 25.33\% compared to state-of-the-art SA-EBM, with larger reductions in high-dimensional settings (58.88\% and 61.10\%). Applied to ADNI, \textsc{Tempo} recovers a biologically plausible Alzheimer's progression: early medial temporal atrophy, followed by amyloid accumulation and cognitive decline, and late-stage tau pathology with terminal acceleration of global neurodegeneration -- broadly consistent with established disease models. \textsc{Tempo} also eliminates the need to derive custom inference algorithms and enables rapid empirical comparison of generative hypotheses.

AI.tldr: 提出Tempo，一种基于Transformer的事件模型，通过模拟监督学习从横截面数据中推断生物标志物的序数和连续进展序列，在合成基准和ADNI数据集上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统事件模型（EBM）只能从横截面数据中推断序数级生物标志物进展序列，且依赖刚性模型假设，无法学习连续时间信息，缺乏灵活性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出Tempo架构，包含两个Transformer模块：一个将生物标志物视为token来推断事件排序；另一个将患者视为token，通过每个患者的生物标志物异常特征来推断疾病阶段。采用基于模拟的监督学习进行训练。
AI.result: 在合成基准上，归一化Kendall's Tau距离降低52.89%，分期MAE降低25.33%；高维场景下分别降低58.88%和61.10%。在ADNI上恢复出生物学合理的阿尔茨海默病进展序列。
AI.conclusion: Tempo不仅提升了预测精度，还消除了自定义推理算法的需要，能够快速比较不同的生成假设，具有更强的灵活性和实用性。

title: Agentic AI platforms for autonomous training and rule induction of human-human and virus-human protein-protein interactions
summary: We instruct an AI agent to construct two separate agentic AI platforms: one for autonomous training of predictive ML models for human-human and virus-human PPI, and the other for inducing explicit general rules governing human-human and virus-human PPI. The first agentic AI platform for autonomous training of predictive ML models for PPI is designed to consist of five AI agents that handle autonomous data collection, data verification, feature embedding, model design, and training and validation on three-way protein-disjoint cross-fold datasets. For human-human and human-virus PPIs, the final three-way protein-disjoint ensemble achieves an accuracy of 87.3% and 86.5%, respectively. For cross-checking and interpretability purposes, the second agentic AI platform is designed to replace ML predictions with human-readable rules derived from protein embeddings, physicochemical autocovariance descriptors, compartment annotations, pathway-domain overlap, and graph contexts. For human-human PPI, it is defined by a two-rule induction, whereas human-virus is induced by a more complex set of weighted rules. The rules induced by the second agentic platform align with the SHAP-identified features from the predictive ML models built by the first agentic platform. Taken together, our work demonstrates the agentic AI's ability to orchestrate from data planning to execution, and from rule induction to explanation in ML, opening the door to various applications.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了两个Agentic AI平台：一个用于自动训练蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）的预测ML模型（精度87.3%和86.5%），另一个用于归纳可解释的通用规则，两者特征高度一致。
AI.motivation: 利用Agentic AI自动化完成从数据收集、验证、特征嵌入、模型设计到训练验证的完整ML流水线，并同时生成可解释的规则用于交叉验证。
AI.method: 设计两个Agent平台：1）5个AI智能体分别负责数据收集、验证、特征嵌入、模型设计、训练验证，使用三路蛋白不相交交叉验证；2）基于蛋白嵌入、物理化学自协方差描述符、区室注释、通路-结构域重叠和图上下文等特征归纳人类可读规则。
AI.result: 人-人PPI准确率87.3%，人-病毒PPI准确率86.5%；人-人PPI由2条规则归纳，人-病毒PPI由更复杂的加权规则集归纳；规则与SHAP识别的重要特征一致。
AI.conclusion: 证明了Agentic AI能够自主完成从数据规划到执行、从规则归纳到ML解释的全流程，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Learning Selective LLM Autonomy from Copilot Feedback in Enterprise Customer Support Workflows
summary: We present a deployed system that automates end-to-end customer support workflows inside an enterprise Business Process Management (BPM) platform. The approach is scalable in production and reaches selective automation within two weeks for a new process, leveraging supervision already generated at scale: structured per-case UI interaction traces and low-overhead copilot feedback, where operators either accept a suggestion or provide a correction. A staged deployment pipeline trains a next UI action policy, learns a critic from copilot feedback to calibrate abstention, and executes only high-confidence steps in the background while deferring uncertain decisions to operators and resuming from the updated UI state. This setup lets one operator supervise multiple concurrent sessions and be interrupted only when the system is uncertain. The system operates on a schema-driven view of the BPM interface and includes monitoring and safe fallbacks for production. In production, it automated 45% of sessions and reduced average handling time by 39% without degrading support quality level.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个部署在企业BPM平台上的端到端客服工作流自动化系统，通过两阶段部署（学习UI动作策略+基于copilot反馈的批评模型校准弃权）实现高置信度步骤的自动执行，生产环境实现了45%会话自动化和39%处理时间降低。
AI.motivation: 企业客服工作流自动化面临标注数据稀缺、生产环境部署风险高、需要与人工操作员协同等挑战，现有方法难以实现快速、可规模化的部署。
AI.method: 两阶段部署管道：1) 从UI交互轨迹学习下一个UI动作策略；2) 利用copilot反馈（接受建议或提供修正）训练批评模型来校准弃权决策，仅在置信度高时在后台自动执行，不确定时交由操作员处理并从更新后的UI状态恢复。
AI.result: 在生产环境中，该系统自动化了45%的会话，平均处理时间降低39%，且未降低客服质量水平。
AI.conclusion: 结合copilot反馈和分层弃权机制是一种有效的企业级工作流自动化方案，能在保证质量的同时实现显著的效率提升。

title: Urban Flood Observations (UFO): A hand-labeled training and validation dataset of post-flood inundation
summary: Urban flooding affects lives and infrastructure worldwide. Mapping inundation in complex urban environments from satellite imagery remains challenging due to limited spatial resolution, infrequent acquisitions, and cloud cover. We present Urban Flood Observations (UFO), a global, hand-labeled dataset of post-flood inundation in diverse urban settings. UFO comprises 215 image chips (1024 by 1024 pixels) from 14 flood events between 2017 and 2021, derived from 3 m PlanetScope imagery. Each chip is annotated with two classes: 'inundated' (all visible surface water, including floodwater and pre-existing water bodies (permanent or seasonal)) and 'non-inundated'. To demonstrate the dataset's utility, we trained a segmentation model using leave-one-event-out cross-validation, achieving a mean Intersection over Union (IoU) of 77.3. We also used UFO to evaluate two widely used surface water products, the Sentinel-1-based NASA IMPACT model and Google's 10 m Dynamic World water class, which yielded IoUs of 44.1 and 48.1, respectively. UFO is publicly available to support the development and validation of urban inundation mapping methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Urban Flood Observations (UFO)，一个全球城市洪水淹没的手工标注数据集，包含14个洪水事件的215张卫星图像切片，并基于该数据集训练了分割模型，IoU达77.3，远超现有方法。
AI.motivation: 城市洪水对全球生活和基础设施影响严重，但现有卫星遥感方法在复杂城市环境中面临空间分辨率不足、获取频率低、云层遮挡等问题，缺乏高质量标注数据集来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建UFO数据集（215张1024×1024像素图像，来自3米分辨率PlanetScope影像，覆盖14个洪水事件），标注为"淹没"和"非淹没"两类；采用留一事件交叉验证训练分割模型。
AI.result: 所训练模型平均IoU为77.3；NASA IMPACT模型和Google Dynamic World的IoU分别为44.1和48.1，大幅低于本方法。
AI.conclusion: UFO数据集可有效支持城市洪水淹没映射方法的开发与验证，且已公开供社区使用。

title: When Context Sticks: Studying Interference in In-Context Learning
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Code available at: https://github.com/nilsvselte/icl-context-stickiness
summary: This paper investigates context stickiness in in-context learning (ICL), a phenomenon where earlier examples in a prompt interfere with a transformer's ability to adapt to later tasks. Using synthetic regression tasks over linear and quadratic functions, we examine how models trained under sequential, mixed, and random curricula handle abrupt task switches during inference. By sweeping over structured combinations of misleading linear examples followed by recovery quadratic examples, we quantify how prior context biases prediction error and how quickly models realign. Our results show strong evidence of persistent interference: more preceding linear examples reliably degrade quadratic predictions, while additional quadratic examples reduce error but with diminishing returns. We further find that training curricula significantly modulate resilience, with sequential training on the target function class yielding the fastest recovery, and surprisingly, random training producing the least robust behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文研究上下文学习中的"上下文粘性"现象，发现前置示例会持续干扰Transformer对后续任务的适应能力，不同训练课程（sequential/random/mixed）对此干扰的恢复速度有显著影响。
AI.motivation: 理解ICL中早期示例如何干扰后续任务适应，探究不同训练课程对模型鲁棒性的影响。
AI.method: 使用线性与二次函数的合成回归任务，系统性地设计结构化提示（误导性线性示例+恢复性二次示例），训练模型采用sequential、mixed、random三种课程。
AI.result: 更多前置线性示例稳定降低二次预测质量；更多二次示例减少误差但收益递减。sequential课程恢复最快，random课程表现最差。
AI.conclusion: 上下文粘性在ICL中普遍存在且持久，训练课程设计对模型的抗干扰能力至关重要，sequential训练优于random训练。

title: GAMED.AI: A Hierarchical Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Educational Game Generation
summary: We introduce GameDAI, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that transforms instructor-provided questions into fully playable, pedagogically grounded educational games validated through formal mechanic contracts. Built on phase-based LangGraph sub-graphs, deterministic Quality Gates, and structured Pydantic schemas, GameDAI supports two template families encompassing 15 interaction mechanics across spatial reasoning, procedural execution, and higher-order Bloom's Taxonomy objectives. Evaluated on 200 questions spanning five subject domains, the system achieves a 90% validation pass rate, 98.3% schema compliance, and 73% token reduction over ReAct agents (${\sim}$73,500 $\rightarrow$ ${\sim}$19,900 tokens/game) at $0.46 per game. Within this model configuration, these results suggest that phase-bounded architectural structure correlates more strongly with alignment quality than prompting strategy alone. Our demonstration lets attendees generate Bloom's-aligned games from natural language in under 60 seconds, inspect Quality Gate outputs at each pipeline phase, and browse a curated library of 50 games spanning all 15 mechanic types.

AI.tldr: GameDAI是一个基于LangGraph的分层多智能体框架，能将教师问题自动转化为可玩的、符合教育学的教育游戏，通过形式化机制合约和阶段约束架构实现高质量对齐，在200个问题测试中达到90%验证通过率、98.3%模式合规，相比ReAct方法减少73%的token消耗。
AI.motivation: 将大语言模型应用于教育游戏开发，解决从自然语言问题到可玩教育游戏的自动转化问题，同时确保游戏的教育学质量和可玩性。
AI.method: 采用分层多智能体框架，基于LangGraph的阶段性子图、确定性质量门控和结构化Pydantic模式，实现从问题到教育游戏的端到端自动生成，包含两种模板家族和15种交互机制。
AI.result: 在200个跨5个学科领域的问题上：90%验证通过率、98.3%模式合规、73% token减少（从~73,500降至~19,900 tokens/游戏），每游戏成本约0.46美元。
AI.conclusion: 阶段约束的架构结构（phase-bounded architectural structure）相比单纯提示策略，与对齐质量的相关性更强，为LLM驱动的教育内容生成提供了高效、可控的范式。

title: Knowledge Vector of Logical Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Logical reasoning serve as a central capability in LLMs and includes three main forms: deductive, inductive, and abductive reasoning. In this work, we study the knowledge representations of these reasoning types in LLMs and analyze the correlations among them. Our analysis shows that each form of logical reasoning can be captured as a reasoning-specific knowledge vector in a linear representation space, yet these vectors are largely independent of each other. Motivated by cognitive science theory that these subforms of logical reasoning interact closely in the human brain, as well as our observation that the reasoning process for one type can benefit from the reasoning chain produced by another, we further propose to refine the knowledge representations of each reasoning type in LLMs to encourage complementarity between them. To this end, we design a complementary subspace-constrained refinement framework, which introduces a complementary loss that enables each reasoning vector to leverage auxiliary knowledge from the others, and a subspace constraint loss that prevents erasure of their unique characteristics. Through steering experiments along reasoning vectors, we find that refined vectors incorporating complementary knowledge yield consistent performance gains. We also conduct a mechanism-interpretability analysis of each reasoning vector, revealing insights into the shared and specific features of different reasoning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM中演绎、归纳、溯因三种逻辑推理的知识表示，发现每种推理可由独立的推理向量表示。受认知科学启发，提出互补子空间约束框架，使各推理向量能利用其他类型的辅助知识，同时保留自身特性。实验表明融合互补知识的推理向量能带来一致性能提升。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM中三种逻辑推理（演绎、归纳、溯因）的知识表示及其相互关系，并基于认知科学中推理形式交互的理论，尝试增强推理向量之间的互补性以提升推理能力。
AI.method: 提出互补子空间约束精炼框架，包含互补损失（让各推理向量利用其他类型的辅助知识）和子空间约束损失（防止自身独特特征被抹除），并通过steering实验验证效果。
AI.result: 精炼后的推理向量融合互补知识后，在steering实验中取得一致性能提升；机制可解释性分析揭示了不同推理类型的共享与特化特征。
AI.conclusion: LLM中的不同逻辑推理形式存在独立的知识表示，但通过互补性约束可以增强它们之间的协同作用，从而提升推理能力。

title: From Pixels to Explanations: Interpretable Diabetic Retinopathy Grading with CNN-Transformer Ensembles, Visual Explainability and Vision-Language Models
summary: The quality of diabetic retinopathy (DR) screening relies on the ability to correctly grade severity; however, many deep-learning (DL) classifiers cannot be easily interpreted in the clinical context. This study presents a methodology that combines strong discriminative models with multimodal explanations, converting retinal pixels into clinically interpretable outputs. Using the APTOS 2019 benchmark, we evaluated six representative CNN- and transformer-based backbones under a controlled protocol with stratified five-fold cross-validation. We then compared ensembling strategies (hard voting, weighted soft voting, stacking) and investigated a hybrid class-level fusion variant to exploit grade-specific advantages. For interpretability, we produced Grad-CAM++ visual attribution maps and short textual rationales using vision-language models (VLMs) conditioned on the fundus image and classifier outputs under conservative prompting constraints. Modern CNN backbones (ResNet-50 and ConvNeXt-Tiny) provided the strongest single-model baselines, with cross-validated QWK up to 0.919 and 0.914, respectively. Ensembling improved ordinal agreement, and weighted soft voting was the most consistent across folds (QWK 0.934 +/- 0.017). Hybrid class-level fusion was competitive but did not yield a statistically reliable improvement over standard fusion in paired fold comparisons (Holm-adjusted p >= 1.000). For explanation quality, Grad-CAM++ offered plausible but coarse localization, and VLM rationales were generally grade-consistent. Quantitatively, VLM variants showed a trade-off between clinical completeness and template-level semantic similarity (coverage 0.700 vs. BERTScore 0.072), while image-text alignment was comparable (CLIPScore approximately 0.34).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合CNN/Transformer强判别模型与多模态解释的糖尿病视网膜病变分级方法，在APTOS 2019上达到QWK 0.934，并使用Grad-CAM++和VLM生成视觉与文本解释。
AI.motivation: 现有DR分级深度学习模型缺乏临床可解释性，无法被医生理解和信任。
AI.method: 采用六种CNN和Transformer骨干网络，比较多种集成策略（硬投票、加权软投票、堆叠、混合类级融合），并用Grad-CAM++生成热力图、VLM在保守提示约束下生成文本解释。
AI.result: 加权软投票集成最优（QWK 0.934±0.017）；混合类级融合无显著提升；VLM解释在临床完整性和语义相似度间存在权衡。
AI.conclusion: 强判别模型结合多模态解释可提升DR筛查的可信度，但现有VLM解释的质量仍存在局限。

title: V-GRPO: Online Reinforcement Learning for Denoising Generative Models Is Easier than You Think
summary: Aligning denoising generative models with human preferences or verifiable rewards remains a key challenge. While policy-gradient online reinforcement learning (RL) offers a principled post-training framework, its direct application is hindered by the intractable likelihoods of these models. Prior work therefore either optimizes an induced Markov decision process (MDP) over sampling trajectories, which is stable but inefficient, or uses likelihood surrogates based on the diffusion evidence lower bound (ELBO), which have so far underperformed on visual generation. Our key insight is that the ELBO-based approach can, in fact, be made both stable and efficient. By reducing surrogate variance and controlling gradient steps, we show that this approach can beat MDP-based methods. To this end, we introduce Variational GRPO (V-GRPO), a method that integrates ELBO-based surrogates with the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) algorithm, alongside a set of simple yet essential techniques. Our method is easy to implement, aligns with pretraining objectives, and avoids the limitations of MDP-based methods. V-GRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance in text-to-image synthesis, while delivering a $2\times$ speedup over MixGRPO and a $3\times$ speedup over DiffusionNFT.

AI.tldr: 提出V-GRPO方法，将基于ELBO的似然代理与GRPO算法结合，通过降低代理方差和控制梯度步长，使得ELBO方法在扩散模型对齐中既稳定又高效，在文生图任务上达到SOTA，并实现2-3倍加速。
AI.motivation: 将去噪生成模型与人类偏好/可验证奖励对齐仍是关键挑战。策略梯度在线RL的直接应用受限于模型不可处理的似然，而现有方法要么基于诱导MDP（稳定但低效），要么基于ELBO似然代理（在视觉生成上表现不佳）。作者发现ELBO方法可以同时做到稳定和高效。
AI.method: 提出V-GRPO，核心是将ELBO-based似然代理与GRPO算法整合，辅以降低代理方差和控制梯度步长的关键技术。该方法易于实现，与预训练目标一致，避免了MDP方法的局限性。
AI.result: 在文生图任务上达到SOTA，相比MixGRPO实现2倍加速，相比DiffusionNFT实现3倍加速。
AI.conclusion: ELBO-based方法通过合理的技术设计（方差缩减、梯度控制）可以同时实现稳定性和高效性，V-GRPO证明了这一点，并为扩散模型与RL对齐提供了新的有效范式。

title: Context-Aware Hospitalization Forecasting Evaluations for Decision Support using LLMs
summary: Medical and public health experts must make real-time resource decisions, such as expanding hospital bed capacity, based on projected hospitalization trends during large-scale healthcare disruptions (e.g., operational failures or pandemics). Forecasting models can assist in this task by analyzing large volumes of resource-related data at the facility level, but they must be reliable for decision-making under real-world data conditions. Recent work shows that large language models (LLMs) can incorporate richer forms of context into numerical forecasting. Whereas traditional models rely primarily on temporal context (i.e., past observations), LLMs can also leverage non-temporal public health context such as demographic, geographic, and population-level features. However, it remains unclear how these models should be used to produce stable or decision-relevant predictions in real-world healthcare settings. To evaluate how LLMs can be effectively used in this setting, we evaluate three approaches across 60 counties with low-,mid-, and high-hospitalization intensities in the United States: direct LLM-based forecasting, classical time-series models, and a context-augmented hybrid pipeline (HybridARX) that incorporates LLM-derived signals into structured models. Because the goal is operational decision-making rather than error minimization alone, we evaluate performance with bias and lead-lag alignment in addition to standard forecasting metrics. Our results show that HybridARX improves over classical ARX by yielding more stable and better-calibrated forecasts, particularly when incorporating noisy contextual signals into structured time-series models. These findings suggest that, in non-stationary healthcare resource forecasting, LLMs are most useful when embedded within structured hybrid models.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了在医疗资源预测中，如何有效利用大型语言模型（LLMs）结合非时间上下文信息（如人口统计、地理特征）来改善传统时间序列模型的预测。提出了一种混合方法 HybridARX，将LLM生成的信号整合到结构化ARX模型中，在60个美国县的低、中、高住院强度场景下进行评估，结果显示混合方法比纯LLM或纯传统模型更稳定、校准更好。
AI.motivation: 医疗和公共卫生专家在面临大规模医疗系统中断（如疫情或运营故障）时，需要基于住院趋势预测做出实时资源决策（如扩展病床容量）。传统预测模型主要依赖时间序列数据，而LLM能够利用更丰富的非时间上下文信息（如人口统计、地理特征），但如何在实际医疗场景中可靠地使用LLM进行决策尚不清楚。
AI.method: 评估三种方法：1) 直接基于LLM的预测；2) 经典时间序列模型；3) 上下文增强的混合管道 HybridARX（将LLM衍生的信号整合到结构化ARX模型中）。在美国60个低、中、高住院强度的县进行实验，使用偏倚、超前-滞后对齐以及标准预测指标进行性能评估。
AI.result: HybridARX相比经典ARX模型，在整合噪声上下文信号时能产生更稳定、校准更好的预测。直接使用LLM进行预测效果不如混合方法。
AI.conclusion: 在非平稳的医疗资源预测场景中，LLM最有效的使用方式是嵌入到结构化混合模型中，而非直接作为预测器。

title: TSAssistant: A Human-in-the-Loop Agentic Framework for Automated Target Safety Assessment
comment: Preliminary version; quantitative evaluation results to be included in a future revision
summary: Target Safety Assessment (TSA) requires systematic integration of heterogeneous evidence, including genetic, transcriptomic, target homology, pharmacological, and clinical data, to evaluate potential safety liabilities of therapeutic targets. This process is inherently iterative and expert-driven, posing challenges in scalability and reproducibility. We present TSAssistant, a multi-agent framework designed to support TSA report drafting through a modular, section-based, and human-in-the-loop paradigm. The framework decomposes report generation into a coordinated pipeline of specialised subagents, each targeting a single TSA section. Specialised subagents retrieve structured and unstructured data as well as literature evidence from curated biomedical sources through standardised tool interfaces, producing individually citable, evidence-grounded sections. Agent behaviour is governed by a hierarchical instruction architecture comprising system prompts, domain-specific skill modules, and runtime user instructions. A key feature is an interactive refinement loop in which users may manually edit sections, append new information, upload additional sources, or re-invoke agents to revise specific sections, with the system maintaining conversational memory across iterations. TSAssistant is designed to reduce the mechanical burden of evidence synthesis and report drafting, supporting a hybrid model in which agentic AI augments evidence synthesis while toxicologists retain final decision authority.

AI.tldr: TSAssistant是一个多智能体框架，通过模块化、基于章节和人在回路的范式，辅助治疗靶点安全性评估（TSA）报告的草拟。它将报告生成分解为专业化子智能体的协作管道，每个子智能体负责一个TSA章节，通过标准化工具接口检索结构化/非结构化数据和文献证据，并支持人工编辑和迭代优化。
AI.motivation: TSA需要系统整合异质性证据（遗传、转录组、药理学等），但现有过程依赖专家驱动，可扩展性和可重复性差，机械性的证据合成和报告起草负担沉重。
AI.method: 采用多智能体框架，将报告分解为多个专业化子智能体的协作管道；每个子智能体通过标准化工具接口从生物医学来源检索数据；采用分层指令架构（系统提示、领域技能模块、运行时用户指令）；支持人机交互的迭代优化循环，用户可手动编辑、追加信息或重新调用智能体修订特定章节。
AI.result: 提出了TSAssistant框架，能够辅助完成TSA报告起草，减少机械性的证据合成负担，支持毒性学家保留最终决策权的混合工作模式。
AI.conclusion: TSAssistant通过多智能体协作和人机交互迭代，可提升TSA报告起草的效率和可重复性，同时确保专家在关键决策中保留最终权威。

title: Toward Real-World Adoption of Portrait Relighting via Hybrid Domain Knowledge Fusion
summary: The real-world adoption of portrait relighting is hindered by dataset domain gaps, camera sensitivity, and computational costs. We address these challenges with Hybrid Domain Knowledge Fusion, a paradigm that fuses the specialized strengths of synthetic, One-Light-at-A-Time (OLAT), and real-world datasets into a compact model. Our approach features specialized prior models hardened by domain-aware adaptation, followed by augmented knowledge distillation into a lightweight student model with multi-domain expertise. Our method demonstrates a 6x to 240x inference speedup while maintaining state-of-the-art (SOTA) visual quality in the experiments. Additionally, we construct a massive, high-fidelity synthetic dataset with diverse ground-truth intrinsics to support our training pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出混合领域知识融合范式，通过领域感知适配、知识蒸馏等技术，将合成、OLAT和真实世界数据集的专长融合为轻量级模型，实现6到240倍加速的同时保持SOTA人像重光照视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 人像重光照的实际应用受到数据集领域差距、相机敏感性和计算成本三大挑战的制约，现有方法难以同时兼顾质量与效率。
AI.method: 提出Hybrid Domain Knowledge Fusion范式：1) 利用领域感知适配训练多个专用先验模型（分别适配合成、OLAT、真实数据集）；2) 通过增强知识蒸馏将多领域专家知识压缩到轻量级学生模型中；3) 构建大规模高保真合成数据集作为训练支撑。
AI.result: 在保持SOTA视觉质量的前提下，实现6倍到240倍的推理加速。
AI.conclusion: 混合领域知识融合能够有效弥合数据集领域差距，在显著降低计算成本的同时保持高质量的人像重光照效果。

title: Domain-Adapted Fine-Tuning of ECG Foundation Models for Multi-Label Structural Heart Disease Screening
summary: Transthoracic echocardiography is the reference standard for confirming structural heart disease (SHD), but first-line screening is limited by cost, workflow burden, and specialist availability. We evaluated whether open pretrained electrocardiogram (ECG) foundation models can support echo-confirmed multi-label SHD detection using the public EchoNext Mini-Model benchmark. Six echocardiography-derived abnormalities were targeted: reduced left ventricular ejection fraction, increased left ventricular wall thickness, aortic stenosis, mitral regurgitation, tricuspid regurgitation, and right ventricular systolic dysfunction. Under a common pipeline, we compared engineered ECG features with gradient boosting, end-to-end waveform learning from scratch, and transfer from open ECG foundation models. We then applied in-domain self-supervised adaptation of an ECG foundation model (ECG-FM) on EchoNext waveforms followed by selective supervised fine-tuning, and evaluated trade-offs between discrimination and adaptation cost. Adapted ECG-FM models achieved the best overall performance: peak macro-AUROC 0.8509 and macro-AUPRC 0.4297, while a parameter-efficient operating point preserved AUROC (0.8501) and attained the highest fixed-threshold macro-F1 0.3691. Late fusion with covariates did not improve threshold-independent discrimination, and evaluated LoRA, alternative backbones, and mixture-of-foundations strategies did not surpass the best adapted single-backbone models. These results indicate that for ECG-based case finding and echocardiography triage, combining target-domain self-supervised adaptation with selective supervised updating of a pretrained ECG backbone is the most effective transfer strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了开放预训练心电图（ECG）基础模型在超声心动图确认的结构性心脏病多标签检测中的效果。通过EchoNext基准测试，对比了多种方法，发现域内自监督适应结合选择性监督微调的ECG基础模型表现最佳（macro-AUROC 0.8509, macro-F1 0.3691），优于特征工程、端到端学习及其他迁移策略。
AI.motivation: 经胸超声心动图是结构性心脏病确诊的金标准，但作为一线筛查手段受限于成本、工作流程负担和专家可用性。因此需要探索更便捷、低成本的ECG基础模型作为预筛查工具。
AI.method: 使用EchoNext基准数据集，对比了三种方法：(1) 工程化ECG特征+梯度提升；(2) 从头端到端波形学习；(3) 从开放ECG基础模型迁移。重点评估了ECG基础模型（ECG-FM）的域内自监督适应+选择性监督微调，并考察了参数高效微调（LoRA）、不同骨干网络、混合基础模型等策略。
AI.result: 适应后的ECG-FM模型取得最佳性能：峰值macro-AUROC 0.8509，macro-AUPRC 0.4297；参数高效操作点保持AUROC 0.8501，取得最高固定阈值macro-F1 0.3691。晚期融合协变量、LoRA、其他骨干网络及混合基础模型策略均未超越单骨干适应模型。
AI.conclusion: 对于基于ECG的病例发现和超声心动图分诊，最优迁移策略是结合目标域自监督适应和选择性监督更新的预训练ECG骨干网络。

title: An empirical evaluation of the risks of AI model updates using clinical data: stability, arbitrariness, and fairness
comment: Accepted to iEEE EMBC 2026. 4 pages, 3 figures
summary: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI/ML) models used in clinical settings are increasingly deployed to support clinical decision-making. However, when training data become stale due to changes in demographics, environment, or patient behaviors, model performance can degrade substantially. While updating models with new training data is necessary, such updates may also introduce new risks. We evaluated the proposed monitoring framework on four publicly available U.S.-based Type 1 Diabetes datasets containing high-resolution continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) data, comprising approximately 11,300 weekly observations from 496 participants under 20 years of age. All datasets included structured sociodemographic information. Using the prediction of severe hyperglycemia events in children with type 1 diabetes as a case study, we examine how different model update strategies can adversely affect model stability (e.g., by causing predictions to "flip" for a large number of cases after an update), increase arbitrariness in predictions, or worsen accuracy equity and the balance of error rates across subpopulations. We propose multiple dimensions for continuous monitoring to detect these issues and argue that such monitoring is essential for the development of trustworthy clinical decision support systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究临床AI/ML模型因训练数据过时而性能下降的问题，以儿童1型糖尿病严重高血糖事件预测为案例，评估不同模型更新策略对稳定性、预测任意性、准确性公平性及子群体错误率平衡的负面影响，并提出多维度持续监控框架以确保模型可信赖。
AI.motivation: 临床AI/ML模型部署后，训练数据会因人口统计、环境或患者行为变化而过时，导致性能显著下降。模型更新虽必要，但可能引入新风险（如预测翻转、不公平性），现有研究缺乏系统评估这些风险的框架。
AI.method: 基于四个公开的美国1型糖尿病CGM数据集（约11,300周观测值，496名20岁以下参与者），以严重高血糖事件预测为案例，评估不同模型更新策略对稳定性、预测任意性、准确性公平性和子群体错误率平衡的影响，并提出多维度持续监控框架。
AI.result: 模型更新策略会导致大量预测"翻转"、增加预测任意性、降低准确性公平性，并恶化不同子群体间的错误率平衡。
AI.conclusion: 多维度持续监控对开发可信赖的临床决策支持系统至关重要，可检测模型更新带来的负面效应。

title: KOMBO: Korean Character Representations Based on the Combination Rules of Subcharacters
summary: The Korean writing system, \textit{Hangeul}, has a unique character representation rigidly following the invention principles recorded in \textit{Hunminjeongeum}.\footnote{\textit{Hunminjeongeum} is a book published in 1446 that describes the principles of invention and usage of \textit{Hangeul}, devised by King Sejong \cite{Hunminjeongeum_Guide}.} However, existing pre-trained language models (PLMs) for Korean have overlooked these principles. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework for Korean PLMs called KOMBO, which firstly brings the invention principles of \textit{Hangeul} to represent character. Our proposed method, KOMBO, exhibits notable experimental proficiency across diverse NLP tasks. In particular, our method outperforms the state-of-the-art Korean PLM by an average of 2.11\% in five Korean natural language understanding tasks. Furthermore, extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method is suitable for comprehending the linguistic features of the Korean language. Consequently, we shed light on the superiority of using subcharacters over the typical subword-based approach for Korean PLMs. Our code is available at: [https://github.com/SungHo3268/KOMBO](https://github.com/SungHo3268/KOMBO).

AI.tldr: KOMBO是一个利用韩文（Hangeul）创造原理来改进韩语预训练语言模型（PLM）的框架，通过引入子字符（subcharacter）表示，在自然语言理解任务上平均提升2.11%，超越了现有的最先进韩语PLM。
AI.motivation: 现有的韩语预训练语言模型忽略了Hangeul文字系统的发明原理（如《训民正音》中记录的创制原则），论文旨在通过将这些原则引入字符表示来弥补这一缺陷。
AI.method: 提出了KOMBO框架，将Hangeul的创制原理（如初声、中声、终声等子字符成分）融入预训练语言模型的字符表示中，替代传统的子词（subword）分词方法。
AI.result: 在五个韩语自然语言理解任务中，KOMBO平均比最先进的韩语PLM高出2.11%；多项实验表明其能更好地捕捉韩语的 linguistic features。
AI.conclusion: 使用子字符（subcharacter）表示优于传统的基于子词的方法，证明了将语言创制原理融入PLM的有效性。

title: INSIGHT: Indoor Scene Intelligence from Geometric-Semantic Hierarchy Transfer for Public~Safety
summary: Indoor environments lack the spatial intelligence infrastructure that GPS provides outdoors; first responders arriving at unfamiliar buildings typically have no machine-readable map of safety equipment. Prior work on 3D semantic segmentation for public safety identified two barriers: scarcity of labeled indoor training data and poor recognition of small safety-critical features by native point-cloud methods. This paper presents INSIGHT, a zero-target-domain-annotation pipeline that projects 2D image understanding into 3D metric space via registered RGB-D data. Two interchangeable vision stacks share a common 3D back end: a SAM3 foundation-model stack for text-prompted segmentation, and a traditional CV stack (open-set detection, VQA, OCR) whose intermediate outputs are independently inspectable. Evaluated on all seven subareas of Stanford 2D-3D-S (70{,}496 images), the pipeline produces Pointcept-schema-compatible labeled point clouds and ISO~19164-compliant scene graphs with ${\sim}10^{4}{\times}$ compression; role-filtered payloads transmit in ${<}15$\,s at 1\,Mbps over FirstNet Band~14. We report per-point labeling accuracy on 7 shared classes, detection sensitivity for 15 safety-critical classes absent from public 3D benchmarks alongside code-capped deployable estimates, and inter-pipeline complementarity, demonstrating that 2D-to-3D semantic transfer addresses the labeled-data bottleneck while scene graphs provide building intelligence compact enough for field deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出INSIGHT，一种零标注的2D到3D语义分割pipeline，通过RGB-D数据将2D图像理解投影到3D度量空间，解决室内环境3D语义分割中标注数据稀缺和小目标识别困难的问题，在Stanford 2D-3D-S数据集上验证，生成兼容Pointcept的标注点云和ISO 19164兼容的场景图。
AI.motivation: 室内环境缺乏类似GPS的空间智能基础设施，应急响应人员无法获取建筑内安全设备的机器可读地图；同时，3D语义分割面临标注数据稀缺和点云方法难以识别小尺寸安全关键特征两大障碍。
AI.method: 提出零目标域标注pipeline，通过配准的RGB-D数据将2D图像理解投影到3D度量空间。包含两个可互换的视觉栈：SAM3基础模型栈（文本提示分割）和传统CV栈（开放集检测、VQA、OCR），共享同一3D后端。生成Pointcept兼容的标注点云和ISO 19164兼容的场景图，支持约10^4倍压缩。
AI.result: 在Stanford 2D-3D-S全部7个子区域（70,496张图像）上验证，报告了7个共享类别的逐点标注准确率、15个未出现在公开3D基准中的安全关键类别的检测灵敏度，以及两套pipeline的互补性。
AI.conclusion: 2D到3D语义迁移有效解决了标注数据瓶颈问题，场景图为现场部署提供了足够紧凑的建筑智能信息（角色过滤后载荷在FirstNet Band14上以1Mbps传输时间小于15秒）。

title: Approximating Uniform Random Rotations by Two-Block Structured Hadamard Rotations in High Dimensions
summary:
Uniform random rotations are a useful primitive in applications such as fast Johnson-Lindenstrauss embeddings, kernel approximation, communication-efficient learning, and recent AI compression pipelines, but they are computationally expensive to generate and apply in high dimensions. A common practical replacement is repeated structured random rotations built from Walsh-Hadamard transforms and random sign diagonals.
  Applying the structured random rotation twice has been shown empirically to be useful, but the supporting theory is still limited. In this paper we study the approximation quality achieved when using this two-block structured Hadamard rotation. Our results are both positive and negative. On the positive side, we prove that every fixed coordinate of the two-block transform converges uniformly, over all inputs, to the corresponding coordinate of a uniformly rotated vector, with an explicit Kolmogorov-distance bound of order $d^{-1/5}$. On the negative side, we prove an explicit lower bound on the Wasserstein distance between the full vector distributions, showing that the two-block transform is not a globally accurate surrogate for a uniform random rotation in the worst case. For the extremal input used in the lower bound, we also prove a matching asymptotic upper bound, showing that the lower-bound scale is sharp for that input.
  Taken together, the results identify a clear separation between one-dimensional marginal behavior, where approximation improves with dimension, and full high-dimensional geometry, where a nonvanishing discrepancy remains. This provides a partial theoretical explanation for the empirical success of structured Hadamard rotations in some algorithms, while also clarifying the limitations of treating them as drop-in replacements for true uniform random rotations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两次应用结构化Hadamard旋转（两块结构旋转）作为均匀随机旋转近似时的质量，给出了正反两方面的理论结果：一维边际分布随维度增加收敛到均匀旋转，但高维整体分布存在不可忽视的偏差。
AI.motivation: 均匀随机旋转在高维应用中（如Johnson-Lindenstrauss嵌入、核近似、AI压缩）计算成本高，实践中常用结构化Hadamard旋转替代，但理论基础薄弱，尤其对"两次应用"这一常见做法缺乏严格分析。
AI.method: 理论分析：推导两块Hadamard变换的一维边际Kolmogorov距离上界（$d^{-1/5}$阶），以及高维Wasserstein距离下界，并通过匹配的渐近上界证明下界尺度的紧致性。
AI.result: 正面：每个固定坐标的边际分布以$d^{-1/5}$阶收敛到均匀旋转；负面：高维整体Wasserstein距离存在非零下界，表明两块变换不是均匀旋转的全局精确替代。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了一维边际与高维几何的显著分离——维度增加时边际逼近改善，但整体分布偏差持续存在，部分解释了结构化Hadamard旋转在某些算法中的经验成功，同时明确了其作为均匀旋转替代的局限性。

title: LLM-Guided Agentic Floor Plan Parsing for Accessible Indoor Navigation of Blind and Low-Vision People
summary: Indoor navigation remains a critical accessibility challenge for the blind and low-vision (BLV) individuals, as existing solutions rely on costly per-building infrastructure. We present an agentic framework that converts a single floor plan image into a structured, retrievable knowledge base to generate safe, accessible navigation instructions with lightweight infrastructure. The system has two phases: a multi-agent module that parses the floor plan into a spatial knowledge graph through a self-correcting pipeline with iterative retry loops and corrective feedback; and a Path Planner that generates accessible navigation instructions, with a Safety Evaluator agent assessing potential hazards along each route. We evaluate the system on the real-world UMBC Math and Psychology building (floors MP-1 and MP-3) and on the CVC-FP benchmark. On MP-1, we achieve success rates of 92.31%, 76.92%, and 61.54% for short, medium, and long routes, outperforming the strongest single-call baseline (Claude 3.7 Sonnet) at 84.62%, 69.23%, and 53.85%. On MP-3, we reach 76.92%, 61.54%, and 38.46%, compared to the best baseline at 61.54%, 46.15%, and 23.08%. These results show consistent gains over single-call LLM baselines and demonstrate that our workflow is a scalable solution for accessible indoor navigation for BLV individuals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个智能体框架，将单张建筑平面图转为可检索知识库，为盲人和低视力群体生成安全、可达的室内导航指令，在真实建筑和基准测试上超越单次调用LLM基线。
AI.motivation: 现有室内导航方案依赖每栋建筑部署昂贵的专用基础设施，对盲人和低视力群体不友好，缺乏轻量级、可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1) 多智能体模块通过自校正流水线（含迭代重试和纠错反馈）将平面图解析为空间知识图谱；2) 路径规划器生成导航指令，安全评估智能体评估沿途潜在危险。
AI.result: 在MP-1建筑上，短/中/长途成功率92.31%/76.92%/61.54%，超越Claude 3.7 Sonnet基线(84.62%/69.23%/53.85%)；在MP-3上也一致超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作流是面向BLV群体可扩展的室内导航方案，通过多智能体协作和自校正机制显著优于单次调用LLM方法。

title: Quantum Knowledge Graph: Modeling Context-Dependent Triplet Validity
comment: 15 pages main text, 6 pages appendix, 5 figures, preprint
summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) are increasingly used to support large lan guage model (LLM) reasoning, but standard triplet-based KGs treat each relation as globally valid. In many settings, whether a relation should count as evidence depends on the context. We therefore formulate triplet validity as a triplet-specific function of context and refer to this formulation as a Quantum Knowledge Graph (QKG). We instantiate QKG in medicine using a diabetes-centered PrimeKG subgraph, whose 68,651 context-sensitive relations are further annotated with patient-group-specific constraints. We evaluate it in a reasoner--validator pipeline for medical question answering on a KG-grounded subset of MedReason containing 2,788 questions. With Haiku-4.5 as both the Reasoner and the Validator, KG-backed validation significantly improves over a no-validator baseline ($+0.61$ pp), and QKG with context matching yields the largest gain, outperforming both KG validation without context matching ($+0.79$ pp) and the no-validator baseline ($+1.40$ pp; paired McNemar, all $p<0.05$). Under a stronger validator (Qwen-3.6-Plus), the raw QKG gain over the no-validator baseline grows from $+1.40$ pp to $+5.96$ pp; the context-matching gap is non-significant ($p=0.73$) on the raw set but becomes borderline significant ($p=0.05$) after adjustment for knowledge leakage and suspicious questions, consistent with a benchmark-gold ceiling rather than a QKG limitation. Taken together, the results support the view that the value of a KG in LLM-based clinical reasoning lies not merely in storing medically related facts, but in representing whether those facts are applicable to the specific patient context. For reproducibility and further research, we release the curated QKG datasets and source code.\footnote{https://github.com/HKAI-Sci/QKG}

AI.tldr: 本文提出量子知识图谱(QKG)，将三元组有效性建模为上下文相关函数，在医学问答中验证了上下文感知的KG比静态KG更能提升LLM推理效果。
AI.motivation: 标准三元组知识图谱将每条关系视为全局有效，但实际中关系是否成立取决于具体上下文（如患者群体），因此需要将上下文信息融入知识图谱表示。
AI.method: 提出量子知识图谱(QKG)，将三元组有效性定义为上下文的函数；在糖尿病PrimeKG子图上构建68,651条上下文敏感关系并标注患者群体约束；采用推理器-验证器流水线进行医学问答。
AI.result: 在MedReason的2,788个问题上，QKG+上下文匹配比无验证器基线提升+1.40pp；使用更强的验证器(Qwen-3.6-Plus)时，QKG增益扩大至+5.96pp。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱在LLM临床推理中的价值不仅在于存储医学事实，更在于表示这些事实是否适用于特定患者上下文。

title: Transferable Physical-World Adversarial Patches Against Object Detection in Autonomous Driving
summary: Deep learning drives major advances in autonomous driving (AD), where object detectors are central to perception. However, adversarial attacks pose significant threats to the reliability and safety of these systems, with physical adversarial patches representing a particularly potent form of attack. Physical adversarial patch attacks pose severe risks but are usually crafted for a single model, yielding poor transferability to unseen detectors. We propose AdvAD, a transfer-based physical attack against object detection in autonomous driving. Instead of targeting a specific detector, AdvAD optimizes adversarial patches over multiple detection models in a unified framework, encouraging the learned perturbations to capture shared vulnerabilities across architectures. The optimization process adaptively balances model contributions and enforces robustness to physical variations. It further employs data augmentation and geometric transformations to maintain patch effectiveness under diverse physical conditions. Experiments in both digital and real-world settings show that AdvAD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) attacks in performance and transferability.

AI.tldr: 提出AdvAD，一种针对自动驾驶目标检测的迁移性物理对抗补丁攻击方法，通过在多个检测模型上联合优化补丁，使其捕获不同架构间的共享脆弱性，在数字和物理场景下均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有物理对抗补丁攻击通常针对单一模型设计，迁移性差，无法有效攻击未见过的检测器，威胁自动驾驶系统的可靠性与安全性。
AI.method: AdvAD在一个统一框架内对多个检测模型联合优化对抗补丁，自适应平衡各模型贡献，并引入数据增强和几何变换增强对物理条件变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在数字和真实物理场景实验中，AdvAD在攻击性能和迁移性上均持续优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模型联合优化可有效提升对抗补丁的迁移攻击能力，对自动驾驶感知系统的安全性提出新的挑战。

title: Evolve: A Persistent Knowledge Lifecycle for Small Language Models
comment: 35 pages, 1 figure. Code and evaluation data: https://gitlab.com/dikran.hovagimian/evolve
summary:
Evolve pairs a small local language model with a persistent, teacher-compiled knowledge store -- refined through sleep consolidation and usage-driven refresh -- to deliver substantial accuracy gains over the model's parametric baseline while amortizing teacher costs through cross-query knowledge reuse. Rather than retrieving document fragments at query time, Evolve constructs a store of semantically coherent sections compiled by teacher models at natural conceptual boundaries; new sections are staged on acquisition, consolidated offline through teacher-mediated merging, and refreshed inline when expired. A 2B-parameter local model handles classification and generation; large teacher models are invoked only for knowledge operations.
  Across 750 benchmark queries spanning custom specialist questions, NaturalQuestions, and TriviaQA, the 2B model augmented by Evolve improves from 20-33% baseline accuracy to 60-84% (+40-52pp) while reducing teacher invocations by over 50% through reuse. Post-consolidation compresses the knowledge store by 31-33.5% across three independent benchmarks while preserving accuracy; section-based retrieval outperforms chunk-based retrieval by 5-9pp across every lifecycle condition. The architecture supports two generation modes over the same lifecycle -- suppress (strict section-only grounding, auditable) and augment (section-supplemented responses).

AI.tldr: Evolve通过将小型本地语言模型与教师模型编译的持久知识库结合，利用睡眠整合和使用驱动刷新机制，在显著减少教师模型调用次数的同时，将2B参数模型在750个基准查询上的准确率从20-33%提升至60-84%。
AI.motivation: 解决小型语言模型知识容量有限的问题，同时避免在每次查询时都调用昂贵的大模型，通过构建可复用的、语义连贯的知识存储来摊销教师模型的推理成本。
AI.method: 采用2B参数本地模型处理分类和生成任务，教师模型仅在知识操作（如编译语义连贯的章节、睡眠整合时进行合并）时被调用。知识库通过"获取-睡眠整合-过期刷新"的生命周期管理，支持抑制模式和增强模式两种生成方式。
AI.result: 在750个基准查询上，2B模型准确率从20-33%提升至60-84%（+40-52pp），教师调用次数减少50%以上。睡眠整合将知识库压缩31-33.5%且不损失准确率，基于章节的检索比基于块的检索在各生命周期状态下高5-9pp。
AI.conclusion: Evolve证明了通过精心设计的持久知识库和离线整合机制，可以大幅提升小模型的能力，同时有效控制大模型的使用成本，为知识增强型小模型的实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Representational Curvature Modulates Behavioral Uncertainty in Large Language Models
summary: In autoregressive large language models (LLMs), temporal straightening offers an account of how the next-token prediction objective shapes representations. Models learn to progressively straighten the representational trajectory of input sequences across layers, potentially facilitating next-token prediction via linear extrapolation. However, a direct link between this trajectory and token-level behavior has been missing. We provide such a link by relating contextual curvature-a geometric measure of how sharply the representational trajectory bends over recent context-to next-token entropy. Across two models (GPT-2 XL and Pythia-2.8B), contextual curvature is correlated with entropy, and this relationship emerges during training. Perturbation experiments reveal selective dependence: manipulating curvature through trajectory-aligned interventions reliably modulates entropy, while geometrically misaligned perturbations have no effect. Finally, regularizing representations to be straighter during training modestly reduces token-level entropy without degrading validation loss. These results identify trajectory curvature as a task-aligned representational feature that influences behavioral uncertainty in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型中表示轨迹的"直线化"现象与下一token预测不确定性之间的关系，发现轨迹曲率与token熵相关，且通过曲率干预可调节模型不确定性。
AI.motivation: 虽然已知LLM在层间会直线化表示轨迹以促进线性外推预测，但缺乏证据直接将这种几何特征与token级行为（如预测不确定性）联系起来。
AI.method: 定义"上下文曲率"度量表示轨迹弯曲程度；在GPT-2 XL和Pythia-2.8B上分析曲率与下一token熵的相关性；进行轨迹对齐/错位扰动实验；在训练中引入曲率正则化。
AI.result: 曲率与熵正相关且相关性随训练增强；仅轨迹对齐的干预才能可靠调节熵；曲率正则化可降低token熵且不损害验证损失。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹曲率是LLM中与任务对齐的表征特征，可直接影响模型的行为不确定性，为理解LLM内部表征与预测行为的关系提供了新视角。

title: Propagation Structure-Semantic Transfer Learning for Robust Fake News Detection
summary: Fake news generally refers to false information that is spread deliberately to deceive people, which has detrimental social effects. Existing fake news detection methods primarily learn the semantic features from news content or integrate structural features from propagation. However, in practical scenarios, due to the semantic ambiguity of informal language and unreliable user interactive behaviors on social media, there are inherent semantic and structural noises in news content and propagation. Although some recent works consider the effect of irrelevant user interactions in a hybrid-modeling way, they still suffer from the mutual interference between structural noise and semantic noise, leading to limited performance for robust detection. To alleviate this issue, this paper proposes a novel Propagation Structure-Semantic Transfer Learning framework (PSS-TL) for robust fake news detection under a teacher-student architecture. Specifically, we design dual teacher models to learn semantics knowledge and structure knowledge from noisy news content and propagation structure independently. Besides, we design a Multi-channel Knowledge Distillation (MKD) loss to enable the student model to acquire specialized knowledge from the teacher models, thereby avoiding mutual interference. Extensive experiments on two real-world datasets validate the effectiveness and robustness of our method.

AI.tldr: 针对虚假新闻检测中语义和结构噪声的相互干扰问题，提出基于教师-学生架构的传播结构-语义迁移学习框架(PSS-TL)，通过双教师模型独立学习语义和结构知识，并设计多通道知识蒸馏损失让学生模型获取专业知识，避免噪声干扰，在两个真实数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假新闻检测方法在融合新闻内容语义特征和传播结构特征时，忽略了非正式语言的语义歧义和用户交互行为不可靠带来的语义与结构噪声，导致二者相互干扰，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: 提出PSS-TL框架，采用教师-学生架构：设计双教师模型分别从带噪的新闻内容和传播结构中独立学习语义知识和结构知识；提出多通道知识蒸馏(MKD)损失，使学生模型能从教师模型中获取专业化知识，避免噪声的相互干扰。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在虚假新闻检测中的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦语义和结构噪声的学习过程，PSS-TL能够有效提升虚假新闻检测的鲁棒性，为处理含噪社交媒体数据提供了新思路。

title: Learning from Imperfect Text Guidance: Robust Long-Tail Visual Recognition with High-Noise Label
summary: Real-world data often exhibit long-tailed distributions with numerous noisy labels, substantially degrading the performance of deep models. While prior research has made progress in addressing this combined challenge, it overlooks the severe label-image mismatch inherent to high-noise settings, thereby limiting their effectiveness. Given that observed labels, though mismatched with images, still retain category information, we propose employing auxiliary text information from labels to address label-image inconsistencies in long-tailed noisy data. Specifically, we leverage the intrinsic cross-modal alignment in pre-trained visual-language models to correct the label-image inconsistencies. This supervisory signal, referred to as Weak Teacher Supervision (WTS), is unaffected by label noise and data distribution biases, albeit exhibits limited accuracy. Therefore, the activation of WTS is determined by evaluating the discrepancy between text-predicted labels and observed labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of WTS across synthetic and real-world datasets, particularly under high-noise conditions. The source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/WTS-0F3C.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Weak Teacher Supervision (WTS)方法，利用预训练视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）的跨模态对齐能力，通过文本预测标签与观测标签的差异来激活弱教师监督信号，从而解决长尾分布和高噪声环境下的标签-图像不匹配问题，在合成和真实数据集上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现实数据常呈现长尾分布并包含大量噪声标签，严重降低深度模型性能。现有研究忽视了高噪声场景下严重的标签-图像不匹配问题，限制了其有效性。本文试图利用标签本身的文本信息，借助视觉-语言模型的跨模态对齐能力来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出Weak Teacher Supervision (WTS)框架：利用预训练视觉-语言模型的跨模态对齐能力，通过文本预测标签与观测标签之间的差异来评估是否激活WTS信号，以纠正标签-图像不一致问题。WTS不受标签噪声和数据分布偏差影响，虽准确度有限但在高噪声场景下效果显著。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的大量实验表明，WTS方法在不同噪声条件下均表现出优越性能，尤其在高噪声场景下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 利用预训练视觉-语言模型中的文本信息作为弱监督信号，可以有效缓解长尾高噪声数据中的标签-图像不匹配问题，为解决真实世界中复杂数据分布下的学习问题提供了新思路。

title: When Does Removing LayerNorm Help? Activation Bounding as a Regime-Dependent Implicit Regularizer
comment: 28 pages, 7 figures, includes appendices. Code and artifacts: https://github.com/lucky-verma/dyt-composition-study
summary: Dynamic Tanh (DyT) removes LayerNorm by bounding activations with a learned tanh(alpha x). We show that this bounding is a regime-dependent implicit regularizer, not a uniformly beneficial replacement. Across GPT-2-family models spanning 64M to 3.78B parameters and 1M to 118M tokens, with Llama and ViT cross-checks, DyT improves validation loss by 27.3% at 64M/1M but worsens it by 18.8% at 64M/118M; the 1M benefit vanishes with capacity (+1.7% at 3.78B), while the 118M penalty reaches +27.9%. The mechanism is measurable: 49% of DyT activations saturate at 1M versus 23% at 118M, and a 500-step saturation heuristic classifies DyT's sign with 75% raw in-sample accuracy on the 12-cell GPT-2 calibration set (AUC 0.75; 64% when adding Scale 5 stress cells), correctly labels 3/3 Llama checks, but only reaches 50% raw leave-one-scale-out accuracy. Three interventions support the bounding explanation: HardTanh reproduces the regime pattern, increasing alpha at 118M monotonically reduces DyT's penalty, and vanilla+dropout(p=0.5) matches DyT's data-rich loss. We also localize Llama-DyT collapse to SwiGLU gating, where saturation separates collapse from convergence in a 3-seed component ablation (r=0.94). Scope: all experiments are compute-limited (T/P < 1.84), below Chinchilla-optimal training.

AI.tldr: DyT通过tanh(alpha*x)替代LayerNorm，但效果高度依赖训练规模：小模型/少数据时提升27.3%，大模型/多数据时恶化18.8%，本质是一个依赖于训练 regime 的隐式正则化器。
AI.motivation: 探究DyT（Dynamic Tanh）作为LayerNorm替代方案的有效性边界，揭示其性能反转现象背后的机制，挑战其被普遍认为有益的观点。
AI.method: 在GPT-2家族（64M-3.78B参数）、Llama和ViT上进行多规模实验；通过饱和率分析（49% vs 23%）、500步饱和启发式分类器、HardTanh对照、alpha调节实验、dropout匹配实验以及SwiGLU门控定位分析等方法验证假设。
AI.result: DyT在小模型/少数据时提升27.3%但大模型/大数据时恶化18.8%；饱和率与性能高度相关；500步启发式分类器在12-cell GPT-2校准集上75%准确率（AUC 0.75）；LLaMA-DyT崩溃定位到SwiGLU门控（r=0.94）。
AI.conclusion: DyT是特定regime下的隐式正则化器而非普适改进方案；其性能取决于激活饱和程度；建议在应用DyT前需评估训练规模是否匹配其正则化效应。

title: Failure-Centered Runtime Evaluation for Deployed Trilingual Public-Space Agents
summary:
This paper presents PSA-Eval, a failure-centered runtime evaluation framework for deployed trilingual public-space agents. The central claim is that, when the evaluation object shifts from a static input-output mapping to a runtime system, the basic unit of analysis should shift from score to failure. PSA-Eval extends the conventional chain Question -> Answer -> Score -> End into Question -> Batch -> Run -> Score -> Failure Case -> Repair -> Regression Batch, making failures traceable, reviewable, repairable, and regression-testable.
  The framework uses trilingual equivalent inputs as controlled probes for observing group-level cross-language policy drift. We conduct a pilot study on a real trilingual digital front-desk system deployed in the lobby of an international financial institution. The pilot uses a simplified single-foundation-model setting (MA = MB), so the observed drift should not be interpreted as an A/B foundation-model difference. The study contains 81 samples organized into 27 trilingual equivalent question groups. Although the system achieves an average score of 23.15/24, 14 groups show non-zero cross-language score drift, 5 groups show drift of at least 3 points, and the maximum drift reaches 9 points. These results provide initial evidence that failure-centered runtime evaluation can expose structured deployment signals hidden by aggregate scoring.

AI.tldr: 提出PSA-Eval，一个面向部署中三语公共空间智能体的运行时评估框架，将评估单元从分数转向失败案例，支持失败的可追溯、可审查、可修复和回归测试。在真实三语数字前台系统上的初步实验显示，尽管平均得分很高（23.15/24），但存在显著的跨语言分数漂移（最大达9分），证明以失败为中心的运行时评估能揭示聚合评分隐藏的结构化部署信号。
AI.motivation: 传统评估方法将系统视为静态的输入-输出映射，以分数为中心，但部署中的运行时系统存在复杂的动态行为（如跨语言策略漂移），需要以失败为中心的评估框架来捕捉聚合评分掩盖的结构化信号。
AI.method: PSA-Eval将评估流程从Question->Answer->Score->End扩展为Question->Batch->Run->Score->Failure Case->Repair->Regression Batch，使用三语等价输入作为受控探针观察跨语言策略漂移，并在真实三语数字前台系统上进行初步研究。
AI.result: 在81个样本（27组三语等价问题）上，系统平均得分23.15/24，但14组存在非零跨语言分数漂移，5组漂移≥3分，最大漂移达9分。
AI.conclusion: 以失败为中心的运行时评估能够暴露聚合评分隐藏的结构化部署信号，为部署中系统的可靠性和公平性提供了新的评估范式。

title: EPM-RL: Reinforcement Learning for On-Premise Product Mapping in E-Commerce
summary: Product mapping, the task of deciding whether two e-commerce listings refer to the same product, is a core problem for price monitoring and channel visibility. In real marketplaces, however, sellers frequently inject promotional keywords, platform-specific tags, and bundle descriptions into titles, causing the same product to appear under many different names. Recent LLM-based and multi-agent frameworks improve robustness and interpretability on such hard cases, but they often rely on expensive external APIs, repeated retrieval, and complex inference-time orchestration, making large-scale deployment costly and difficult in privacy-sensitive enterprise settings. To address these issues, we present EPM-RL, a reinforcement-learning-based framework for building an accurate and efficient on-premise e-commerce product mapping model. Our central idea is to distill high-cost agentic reasoning into a trainable in-house model. Starting from a curated set of product pairs with LLM-generated rationales and human verification, we first perform parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) on a small student model using structured reasoning outputs. We then further optimize the model with Reinforcement Learning (RL) using an agent-based reward that jointly evaluates output-format compliance, label correctness, reasoning--preference scores from specially designed judge models. Preliminary results show that EPM-RL consistently improves over PEFT-only training and offers a stronger quality--cost trade-off than commercial API-based baselines, while enabling private deployment and lower operational cost. These findings suggest that reinforcement learning can turn product mapping from a high-latency agentic pipeline into a scalable, inspectable, and production-ready in-house system.

AI.tldr: 提出EPM-RL框架，通过强化学习将从LLM代理推理中蒸馏知识到小型本地模型，实现高效、低成本、隐私友好的电商产品匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM和多智能体的产品映射方法依赖昂贵的外部API、重复检索和复杂推理编排，在大规模部署中成本高且难以在隐私敏感的企业环境中使用。
AI.method: 1) 在带LLM生成理由和人工验证的产品对上进行参数高效微调(PEFT)训练学生模型；2) 使用基于智能体的奖励函数进行强化学习优化，联合评估输出格式合规性、标签正确性和推理偏好分数。
AI.result: EPM-RL持续优于纯PEFT训练，相比商业API基线提供更强的质量-成本权衡，支持私有部署并降低运营成本。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习可以将产品匹配从高延迟的代理管道转变为可扩展、可检查且可投产的内部系统。

title: CNN-ViT Fusion with Adaptive Attention Gate for Brain Tumor MRI Classification: A Hybrid Deep Learning Model
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, submitted as conference paper
summary: Early detection and classifying brain tumors using Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) images is highly important but difficult to extract in medical images. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are good at capturing both local texture and spatial information whereas Vision Transformers (ViTs) are good at capturing long-range global dependencies. We propose a new hybrid architecture that combines a SqueezeNet-style CNN branch with a MobileViT-style global transformer branch, through an Adaptive Attention Gate mechanism, in this paper. The gate learns dynamically per-sample, per-feature weights to weight the contribution of each branch, allowing context-sensitive merging of local and global representations. The proposed model has a test accuracy of 97.60, a precision of 97.30, a recall of 97.50, an F1-score of 97.40, and a macro-average area under the curve (AUC) of 0.9946 with a trained and evaluated on the Brain Tumor MRI Dataset (Kaggle). These scores are higher than single CNN and ViT baselines, and current competitive fusion methods, showing that dynamic feature weighting is an effective way to classify medical images.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合SqueezeNet（CNN分支）和MobileViT（全局Transformer分支）的混合架构，通过自适应注意力门控机制动态融合局部和全局特征，在脑肿瘤MRI分类上取得97.60%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤MRI图像早期检测中，CNN擅长提取局部纹理和空间信息，ViT擅长捕获长程全局依赖，但两者各自有局限性，需要有效融合两者优势的方法。
AI.method: 设计混合架构：SqueezeNet-style CNN分支提取局部特征 + MobileViT-style Transformer分支提取全局特征，通过Adaptive Attention Gate机制为每个样本、每个特征动态学习权重，自适应融合局部和全局表征。
AI.result: 在Brain Tumor MRI Dataset (Kaggle)上，测试准确率97.60%，精确率97.30%，召回率97.50%，F1分数97.40%，宏观AUC 0.9946，均优于纯CNN、纯ViT及现有融合方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态特征加权是一种有效的医学图像分类方法，所提混合架构能够成功融合CNN和ViT的优势，提升脑肿瘤分类性能。

title: Machine learning models for estimating counterfactuals in a single-arm inflammatory bowel disease study
summary: Single-arm trials accelerate study timelines by reducing the number of patients that must be recruited for a concurrent control group.
