summary: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) extends traditional RAG by using knowledge graphs (KGs) to give large language models (LLMs) a structured, semantically coherent context, yielding more grounded answers. However, GraphRAG reasoning process remains a black-box, limiting our ability to understand how specific pieces of structured knowledge influence the final output. Existing explainability (XAI) methods for RAG systems, designed for text-based retrieval, are limited to interpreting an LLM response through the relational structures among knowledge components, creating a critical gap in transparency and trustworthiness. To address this, we introduce XGRAG, a novel framework that generates causally grounded explanations for GraphRAG systems by employing graph-based perturbation strategies, to quantify the contribution of individual graph components on the model answer. We conduct extensive experiments comparing XGRAG against RAG-Ex, an XAI baseline for standard RAG, and evaluate its robustness across various question types, narrative structures and LLMs. Our results demonstrate a 14.81% improvement in explanation quality over the baseline RAG-Ex across NarrativeQA, FairyTaleQA, and TriviaQA, evaluated by F1-score measuring alignment between generated explanations and original answers. Furthermore, XGRAG explanations exhibit a strong correlation with graph centrality measures, validating its ability to capture graph structure. XGRAG provides a scalable and generalizable approach towards trustworthy AI through transparent, graph-based explanations that enhance the interpretability of RAG systems.

AI.tldr: XGRAG是一个通过基于图的扰动策略为GraphRAG提供因果归因解释的框架，能量化知识图谱中各组成成分对模型输出的贡献，相比基线RAG-Ex在解释质量上提升14.81%。
AI.motivation: GraphRAG虽然能利用知识图谱为LLM提供结构化、语义一致的上下文，但其推理过程仍是黑箱，现有针对文本检索的RAG可解释性方法无法解释结构化知识组件的因果关系，导致透明性和可信度存在关键缺口。
AI.method: 提出XGRAG框架，采用基于图的扰动策略（graph-based perturbation strategies），通过扰动知识图谱中的各个组件并观察对LLM输出的影响，量化每个组件的因果贡献，从而生成具有因果基础的解释。
AI.result: 在NarrativeQA、FairyTaleQA和TriviaQA数据集上，以F1分数衡量解释与原始答案的对齐程度，XGRAG相比RAG-Ex基线在解释质量上提升了14.81%。同时，其解释与图的中心性指标存在强相关性，验证了捕获图结构的能力。
AI.conclusion: XGRAG提供了一种可扩展且泛化的方法，通过透明、基于图的解释增强RAG系统的可解释性，推动可信AI的发展。

title: Zero-shot Large Language Models for Automatic Readability Assessment
summary: Unsupervised automatic readability assessment (ARA) methods have important practical and research applications (e.g., ensuring medical or educational materials are suitable for their target audiences). In this paper, we propose a new zero-shot prompting methodology for ARA and present the first comprehensive evaluation of using large language models (LLMs) as an unsupervised ARA method by testing 10 diverse open-source LLMs (e.g., different sizes and developers) on 14 diverse datasets (e.g., different text lengths and languages). Our findings show that our proposed prompting methodology outperforms prior methods on 13 of the 14 datasets. Furthermore, we propose LAURAE, which combines LLM and readability formula scores to improve robustness by capturing both contextual and shallow (e.g., sentence length) features of readability. Our evaluation demonstrates that LAURAE robustly outperforms prior methods across languages, text lengths, and amounts of technical language.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的无监督自动可读性评估（ARA）方法，包括新的零样本提示策略和结合可读性公式的LAURAE框架，在14个数据集上优于先前方法。
AI.motivation: 无监督ARA方法在确保医学或教育材料适合目标受众方面具有重要的实际和研究价值，但现有方法性能有限，需要更有效的评估手段。
AI.method: 提出零样本提示方法，测试10种开源LLM在14个数据集上的表现；并提出LAURAE框架，将LLM评估与可读性公式（如句子长度等浅层特征）相结合以提高鲁棒性。
AI.result: 提出的零样本提示方法在14个数据集的13个上优于先前方法；LAURAE在跨语言、文本长度和技术语言含量上均稳健胜出。
AI.conclusion: LLM可作为有效的无监督ARA工具，结合浅层特征进一步提升了鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Knee-xRAI: An Explainable AI Framework for Automatic Kellgren-Lawrence Grading of Knee Osteoarthritis
summary: Radiographic grading of knee osteoarthritis (KOA) with the Kellgren-Lawrence (KL) system is limited by inter-reader variability and the opacity of current deep learning approaches, which predict KL grades directly from images without decomposing structural features. We present Knee-xRAI, a modular framework that independently quantifies the three cardinal radiographic features of KOA (joint space narrowing [JSN], osteophytes, and subchondral sclerosis) and integrates them into an explainable KL grade classification. The pipeline combines U-Net++ segmentation for contour-based JSN measurement, an SE-ResNet-50 network for per-site osteophyte grading (OARSI scale), and a hybrid texture-CNN classifier for binary sclerosis quantification. The resulting 50-dimensional structured feature vector feeds two complementary classification paths. An XGBoost path supports SHAP-based feature attribution. A ConvNeXt hybrid path combines the structured vector with a full-image encoder for enhanced predictive performance. Evaluated on 8,260 radiographs from an OAI-derived dataset, the JSN module achieved a Dice coefficient of 0.8909 and an mJSW intraclass correlation of 0.8674 against manual annotations. The ConvNeXt hybrid path reached a test quadratic weighted kappa (QWK) of 0.8436 and AUC of 0.9017. The transparent XGBoost path achieved a test QWK of 0.6294 with full feature-level audit capability. Ablation confirmed JSN as the dominant predictor (QWK = 0.6103 alone), with osteophyte features providing consistent incremental gain (+0.0183) and sclerosis contributing marginally. Inference-time ablation of Path B confirmed the structured pathway contributes materially beyond the image encoder, with QWK drops of 0.098 (feature zeroing) and 0.284 (feature-image permutation). Knee-xRAI explicitly quantifies all three KL-defining radiographic features within a single auditable pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Knee-xRAI框架，通过独立量化KOA的三个核心影像特征（关节间隙狭窄、骨赘、软骨下硬化），并将其整合为可解释的KL分级分类。该框架结合U-Net++分割、SE-ResNet-50骨赘分级和混合纹理-CNN硬化分类器，生成50维特征向量，分别输入XGBoost（支持SHAP特征归因）和ConvNeXt混合路径进行预测。
AI.motivation: 传统KL分级存在阅片者间变异大，且现有深度学习方法直接预测KL分级而不分解结构特征，缺乏可解释性。作者旨在构建一个模块化、可审计的框架，显式量化KL分级的三个核心放射学特征。
AI.method: 采用三模块流水线：1) U-Net++分割进行基于轮廓的JSN测量；2) SE-ResNet-50进行逐部位骨赘分级(OARSI量表)；3) 混合纹理-CNN分类器进行二元硬化量化。生成50维结构化特征向量后，分别通过XGBoost（支持SHAP归因）和ConvNeXt混合路径（结合结构化向量与全图编码器）进行分类。
AI.result: 在8,260张OAI数据集上，JSN模块Dice=0.8909，mJSW ICC=0.8674；ConvNeXt混合路径QWK=0.8436，AUC=0.9017；透明XGBoost路径QWK=0.6294。消融实验表明JSN是主导预测因子(QWK=0.6103)，骨赘提供稳定增益(+0.0183)，硬化贡献微弱。
AI.conclusion: Knee-xRAI能够在一个可审计的流水线中显式量化所有三个KL定义的核心放射学特征，实现了可解释的KOA分级，为临床可信的AI辅助诊断提供了框架。

title: Graph Memory Transformer (GMT)
comment: 65 pages, 10 figures, 5 tables. Code available at https://github.com/Nemesis533/GMT-GraphMemoryTransformer
summary: We investigate whether the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) sublayer in a decoder-only transformer can be replaced by an explicit learned memory graph while preserving the surrounding autoregressive architecture. The proposed Graph Memory Transformer (GMT) keeps causal self-attention intact, but replaces the usual per-token FFN transformation with a memory cell that routes token representations over a learned bank of centroids connected by a learned directed transition matrix. In the base GMT v7 instantiation studied here, each of 16 transformer blocks contains 128 centroids, a 128 * 128 edge matrix, gravitational source routing, token-conditioned target selection, and a gated displacement readout. The cell therefore returns movement from an estimated source memory state toward a target memory state, rather than a retrieved value. The resulting model is a fully decoder-only language model with 82.2M trainable parameters and no dense FFN sublayers, compared with a 103.0M-parameter dense GPT-style baseline used in the evaluation. The base v7 model trains stably and exposes centroid usage, transition structure, and source-to-target movement as directly inspectable quantities of the forward computation. It remains behind the larger dense baseline in validation loss and perplexity (3.5995/36.58 vs. 3.2903/26.85), while showing close zero-shot benchmark behavior under the evaluated setting. These results are not intended as a state-of-the-art claim; they support the viability and structural interpretability of replacing dense within-token transformation with graph-mediated memory navigation. Broader scaling, optimized kernels, and more extensive benchmark evaluation are left for subsequent work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph Memory Transformer (GMT)，用显式可学习记忆图（128个质心+转移矩阵）替代decoder-only transformer中的FFN子层。82.2M参数的GMT v7在验证损失/困惑度上不如103M的GPT基线（3.5995/36.58 vs 3.2903/26.85），但零样本基准测试表现接近，且提供了可解释的质心使用、转移结构和源-目标运动信息。
AI.motivation: 探索能否用显式可学习的记忆图替代decoder-only transformer中的FFN子层，同时保持自回归架构不变，旨在提升模型的结构可解释性。
AI.method: 在16个transformer块中，每个块用128个质心、128×128边矩阵、引力源路由、token条件目标选择和门控位移读取组成的记忆单元替代FFN，输出从源记忆状态到目标记忆状态的位移而非检索值。
AI.result: 82.2M参数的GMT v7验证损失3.5995/困惑度36.58，低于103M GPT基线的3.2903/26.85，但零样本基准测试表现接近，且质心使用和转移结构可直接观察。
AI.conclusion: 证明了用图介导的记忆导航替代密集的token内变换是可行的，且具有结构可解释性，但非SOTA声明，更大规模优化和评估留待后续工作。

title: The Price of Agreement: Measuring LLM Sycophancy in Agentic Financial Applications
summary: Given the increased use of LLMs in financial systems today, it becomes important to evaluate the safety and robustness of such systems. One failure mode that LLMs frequently display in general domain settings is that of sycophancy. That is, models prioritize agreement with expressed user beliefs over correctness, leading to decreased accuracy and trust. In this work, we focus on evaluating sycophancy that LLMs display in agentic financial tasks. Our findings are three-fold: first, we find the models show only low to modest drops in performance in the face of user rebuttals or contradictions to the reference answer, which distinguishes sycophancy that models display in financial agentic settings from findings in prior work. Second, we introduce a suite of tasks to test for sycophancy by user preference information that contradicts the reference answer and find that most models fail in the presence of such inputs. Lastly, we benchmark different modes of recovery such as input filtering with a pretrained LLM.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了LLM在金融智能体任务中的谄媚行为（sycophancy），发现模型在面对用户反驳时性能下降有限（与先前工作不同），但在用户偏好信息与参考答案矛盾时大多数模型失败，并测试了多种恢复策略。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM在金融系统中的广泛应用，评估其安全性和鲁棒性变得至关重要。谄媚行为（模型优先同意用户观点而非坚持正确性）是LLM常见故障模式，但尚未在金融智能体场景中得到系统评估。
AI.method: 设计了多组金融智能体任务，测试LLM在用户反驳/矛盾以及用户偏好信息与参考答案冲突情况下的表现，并基准测试了输入过滤等恢复策略。
AI.result: 1) 模型在面对用户反驳时仅表现出低到中等的性能下降，与以往发现不同；2) 当用户偏好信息与参考答案矛盾时，大多数模型表现失败；3) 输入过滤等恢复策略有一定效果。
AI.conclusion: 金融智能体场景下的谄媚行为模式与通用领域不同，需要针对性的评估和缓解策略来提高金融LLM系统的鲁棒性和可信赖性。

title: SEARCH-R: Structured Entity-Aware Retrieval with Chain-of-Reasoning Navigator for Multi-hop Question Answering
summary: Multi-hop Question Answering (MHQA) aims to answer questions that require multi-step reasoning. It presents two key challenges: generating correct reasoning paths in response to the complex user queries, and accurately retrieving essential knowledge in the face of potential limitations in large language models (LLMs). Existing approaches primarily rely on prompt-based methods to generate reasoning paths, which are further combined with traditional sparse or dense retrieval to produce the final answer. However, the generation of reasoning paths commonly lacks effective control over the generative process, thus leading the reasoning astray. Meanwhile, the retrieval methods over-rely on knowledge matching or similarity scores rather than evaluating the practical utility of the information, resulting in retrieving homogeneous or non-useful information. Therefore, we propose a Structured Entity-Aware Retrieval with Chain-of-Reasoning Navigator framework named SEARCH-R. Specifically, SEARCH-R trains an end-to-end reasoning path navigator, which is able to provide a powerful sub-question decomposer by fine-tuning the Llama3.1-8B model. Moreover, a novel dependency tree-based retrieval is designed to evaluate the informational contribution of the document quantitatively. Extensive experiments on three challenging multi-hop datasets validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. The code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/Applied-Machine-Learning-Lab/ACL2026_SEARCH-R.

AI.tldr: 提出SEARCH-R框架，通过微调Llama3.1-8B训练端到端推理路径导航器，并设计基于依赖树的检索机制来量化文档的信息贡献，解决多跳问答中的推理路径生成和信息检索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在MHQA中面临两个主要挑战：1) 提示方法生成推理路径时缺乏有效控制，容易偏离正确方向；2) 检索方法过度依赖知识匹配或相似度分数，而非评估信息的实际效用，导致检索到同质化或无用信息。
AI.method: SEARCH-R框架包含两个核心组件：1) 端到端推理路径导航器，通过微调Llama3.1-8B模型实现子问题分解；2) 基于依赖树的检索机制，能够定量评估文档的信息贡献度。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的多跳数据集上的大量实验验证了所提框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SEARCH-R通过结构化实体感知检索与推理链导航器的结合，有效提升了多跳问答的性能，解决了推理路径控制和信息效用评估两大难题。

title: Resource-Constrained UAV-Based Weed Detection for Site-Specific Management on Edge Devices
summary: Weeds compete with crops for light, water, and nutrients, reducing yield and crop quality. Efficient weed detection is essential for site-specific weed management (SSWM). Although deep learning models have been deployed on UAV-based edge systems, a systematic understanding of how different model architectures perform under real-world resource constraints is still lacking. To address this gap, this study proposes a deployment-oriented framework for real-time UAV-based weed detection on resource-constrained edge platforms. The framework integrates UAV data acquisition, model development, and on-device inference, with a focus on balancing detection accuracy and computational efficiency. A diverse set of state-of-the-art object detection models is evaluated, including convolution-based YOLO models (v8-v12) and transformer-based RT-DETR models (v1-v2). Experiments on three edge devices (Jetson Orin Nano, Jetson AGX Xavier, and Jetson AGX Orin) demonstrate clear trade-offs between accuracy and inference latency across models and hardware configurations. Results show that high-capacity models achieve up to 86.9% mAP50 but suffer from high latency, limiting real-time deployment. In contrast, lightweight models achieve 66%-71% mAP50 with significantly lower latency, enabling real-time performance. Among all models, RT-DETRv2-R50-M achieves competitive accuracy (79% mAP50) with improved efficiency, while YOLOv10n provides the fastest inference speed. YOLOv11s and RT-DETRv2-R50-M offer the best balance between accuracy and speed, making them strong candidates for real-time UAV deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向资源受限边缘平台的实时无人机杂草检测框架，系统评估了YOLO (v8-v12) 和 RT-DETR (v1-v2) 等目标检测模型在三种Jetson设备上的性能，发现高容量模型（最高86.9% mAP50）延迟高，轻量模型（66%-71% mAP50）可实现实时推理，其中YOLOv11s和RT-DETRv2-R50-M在精度与速度间取得了最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 填补深度学习模型在真实资源约束条件下进行无人机杂草检测的系统性评估空白，为实时边缘部署提供指导。
AI.method: 提出了一套部署导向框架，涵盖无人机数据采集、模型开发与设备端推理；系统对比了卷积型YOLO (v8-v12) 与Transformer型RT-DETR (v1-v2) 在三种Jetson边缘设备上的精度-延迟权衡。
AI.result: 高容量模型mAP50最高达86.9%但延迟高；轻量模型mAP50为66%-71%但可实时运行；RT-DETRv2-R50-M达79% mAP50且效率较好，YOLOv10n推理最快，YOLOv11s和RT-DETRv2-R50-M综合最佳。
AI.conclusion: 不同模型架构在边缘部署中存在显著的精度-效率权衡，YOLOv11s和RT-DETRv2-R50-M是实时无人机杂草检测的优选方案。

title: Inverting Foundation Models of Brain Function with Simulation-Based Inference
summary: Foundation models of brain activity promise a new frontier for in silico neuroscience by emulating neural responses to complex stimuli across tasks and modalities. A natural next step is to ask whether these models can also be used in reverse. Can we recover a stimulus or its properties from synthetic brain activity? We study this question in a proof-of-concept setting using TRIBEv2. We pair the brain emulator with large language models (LLMs) that generate news headlines from linguistic parameters such as valence, arousal, and dominance. We then use simulation-based inference to learn a probabilistic mapping from brain maps to latent stimulus parameters. Our results show that these parameters can be recovered from predicted brain maps, validating the quality of neural encodings. They also show that LLMs can serve as controllable stimulus generators for simulated experiments. Together, these findings provide a step toward decoding and inverse design with foundation brain models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了能否从基础脑模型生成的合成脑活动中逆向恢复刺激参数，通过将TRIBEv2（脑模拟器）与LLM配对，利用仿真推理从脑图学习到潜在刺激参数的概率映射，验证了神经编码质量并展示了LLM作为可控刺激生成器的能力。
AI.motivation: 探索基础脑模型是否能够逆向使用——即从合成脑活动中恢复刺激或其属性，为数字神经科学的逆向解码和逆向设计铺路。
AI.method: 使用TRIBEv2作为脑模拟器，配对大语言模型（LLMs）生成新闻标题（基于效价、唤醒度、优势度等语言参数），通过仿真推理（simulation-based inference）学习从脑图到潜在刺激参数的概率映射。
AI.result: 从预测的脑图中成功恢复了刺激参数（效价、唤醒度、优势度），验证了神经编码质量；同时LLM可作为可控刺激发生器用于模拟实验。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为利用基础脑模型进行解码和逆向设计迈出了重要一步，展示了LLM与脑模型结合在神经科学中的潜力。

title: Governing What You Cannot Observe: Adaptive Runtime Governance for Autonomous AI Agents
summary: Autonomous AI agents can remain fully authorized and still become unsafe as behavior drifts, adversaries adapt, and decision patterns shift without any code change. We propose the \textbf{Informational Viability Principle}: governing an agent reduces to estimating a bound on unobserved risk $\hat{B}(x) = U(x) + SB(x) + RG(x)$ and allowing an action only when its capacity $S(x)$ exceeds $\hat{B}(x)$ by a safety margin. The \textbf{Agent Viability Framework}, grounded in Aubin's viability theory, establishes three properties -- monitoring (P1), anticipation (P2), and monotonic restriction (P3) -- as individually necessary and collectively sufficient for documented failure modes. \textbf{RiskGate} instantiates the framework with dedicated statistical estimators (KL divergence, segment-vs-rest $z$-tests, sequential pattern matching), a fail-secure monotonic pipeline, and a closed-loop Autopilot formalised as an instance of Aubin's regulation map with kill-switch-as-last-resort; a scalar Viability Index $VI(t) \in [-1,+1]$ with first-order $t^*$ prediction transforms governance from reactive to predictive. Contributions are the theoretical framework, the reference implementation, and analytical coverage against published agent-failure taxonomies; quantitative empirical evaluation is scoped as follow-up work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出信息可行性原则和Agent可行性框架，通过估计未观察风险边界和安全容量的比较来治理AI Agent，并基于Aubin的可行性理论建立了三个必要条件（监控P1、预判P2、单调约束P3）。RiskGate实现了该框架，包含统计估计器、单调安全管道和闭环自动驾驶仪，通过一个标量可行性指数将治理从被动转变为主动。
AI.motivation: 自主AI Agent即使代码未改变，也可能因行为漂移、对手适应和决策模式变化而变得不安全。现有方法缺乏理论保证来检测和预防这些失败模式。
AI.method: 提出信息可行性原理（估计未观察风险边界B̂(x)=U(x)+SB(x)+RG(x)，仅当能力S(x)超过B̂(x)安全裕度时才允许行动）；基于Aubin可行性理论建立三个必要条件（P1监控、P2预判、P3单调约束）；RiskGate实现含KL散度、z检验、序列模式匹配等统计估计器，以及单调安全管道和闭环自动驾驶仪。
AI.result: 提供了理论框架和参考实现，并分析了其对已发表的Agent故障分类的覆盖情况。定量实证评估被列为后续工作。
AI.conclusion: 论文贡献在于理论框架、参考实现以及通过分析覆盖验证了框架对已知故障模式的完备性（三个条件既是必要的也是充分的）。

title: Generating Place-Based Compromises Between Two Points of View
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel academically but struggle with social intelligence tasks, such as creating good compromises. In this paper, we present methods for generating empathically neutral compromises between two opposing viewpoints. We first compared four different prompt engineering methods using Claude 3 Opus and a dataset of 2,400 contrasting views on shared places. A subset of the gen erated compromises was evaluated for acceptability in a 50-participant study. We found that the best method for generating compromises between two views used external empathic similarity between a compromise and each viewpoint as iterative feedback, outperforming stan dard Chain of Thought (CoT) reasoning. The results indicate that the use of empathic neutrality improves the acceptability of compromises. The dataset of generated compromises was then used to train two smaller foundation models via margin-based alignment of human preferences, improving efficiency and removing the need for empathy estimation during inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过共情中立性生成妥协方案的方法，使用外部共情相似性作为迭代反馈优于标准CoT推理，并通过人类偏好对齐训练小型模型以提高效率。
AI.motivation: LLM在学术任务中表现出色，但在社交智能任务（如生成可接受的妥协方案）上表现不足，需要改进方法。
AI.method: 比较了四种提示工程方法，其中最佳方法利用外部共情相似性作为迭代反馈（empathic similarity feedback），优于标准Chain of Thought推理。随后通过基于边际的人类偏好对齐（margin-based alignment of human preferences）训练小型基础模型。
AI.result: 共情中立性显著提高了妥协方案的可接受性（50人参与的用户研究）。训练后的小型模型无需在推理时进行共情估计，效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 利用共情相似性迭代反馈是生成可接受妥协的有效策略，且可通过偏好对齐将能力蒸馏到小型模型中。

title: From Edges to Depth: Probing the Spatial Hierarchy in Vision Transformers
summary: Vision Transformers trained only on image classification routinely transfer to tasks that demand spatial understanding, yet they receive no spatial supervision during pretraining. We ask where and how robustly such structure is encoded. Probing a frozen ViT-B/16 layerwise for two complementary properties, local patch boundaries (BSDS500) and per-patch depth (NYU Depth V2), reveals a clear hierarchy: boundary structure becomes linearly decodable at layers 5-6 (AP = 0.833), while depth, which requires integrating global cues, peaks two to three layers later at layer 8 (MAE = 0.0875). Both signals collapse at the final classification layer, and random-weight controls confirm the encodings are learned rather than architectural. Causal interventions add specificity: ablating the single direction a linear depth probe reads degrades depth decoding by up to 165%, while ablating any other direction changes it by less than 1%. Targeted activation patching along that direction shows the depth signal is partially re-derived at each layer rather than passively carried in the residual stream, with mid-layer interventions persisting most strongly downstream. The result is that a classification-trained ViT develops an actively maintained spatial hierarchy that mirrors the early-to-late progression observed in the primate visual cortex.

AI.tldr: 本文探究图像分类训练的ViT（无空间监督）如何及在何处编码空间结构。通过逐层探测和因果干预，发现ViT内部形成了层级化的空间表征：边界信息在浅层（5-6层）线性可解码，深度信息在中层（第8层）达到峰值，且这些信号并非被动传递，而是各层主动重新计算，与灵长类视觉皮层的早期-晚期处理层级相似。
AI.motivation: 探究仅通过图像分类训练的Vision Transformer（无任何空间监督）为何能迁移到需要空间理解的下游任务（如边界检测、深度估计），并揭示其内部是如何编码空间结构的。
AI.method: 1) 对冻结的ViT-B/16进行逐层线性探测（边界检测用BSDS500，深度估计用NYU Depth V2）；2) 与随机权重基线对比；3) 因果干预：消融探测方向/定向激活修补。
AI.result: 边界结构在第5-6层线性可解（AP=0.833），深度在第8层达峰（MAE=0.0875），末层分类层空间信号崩溃。消融关键方向使深度解码恶化165%，定向修补证实深度信号在各层被主动重新计算。
AI.conclusion: 分类训练的ViT内部自发形成了活跃维护的空间处理层级，其早期-晚期的空间信号分布与灵长类视觉皮层处理层级相似。

title: Learning Interpretable PDE Representations for Generative Reconstructions with Structured Sparsity
summary: Scientific measurements are often bottlenecked by suboptimal conditions, whether that be noise, incomplete spatial coverage, or limited resolution, rendering accurate field reconstruction a difficult task. We introduce LatentPDE, a latent diffusion framework designed to simultaneously resolve sparse-observation reconstruction and super-resolution. While existing physics-guided diffusion models typically rely on soft loss penalties or uninterpretable representations, our approach enforces physical compliance by constructing an inherently interpretable latent space. Specifically, we parameterize the latent variables directly as the coefficients and source terms of an assumed governing PDE. In doing so, LatentPDE is able to reliably reconstruct dynamics across highly disparate and structured data gaps. Empirical results on diverse configurations demonstrate that our model achieves high-fidelity recovery at any desired resolution while also tracking the underlying predictive uncertainty.

AI.tldr: LatentPDE是一个潜在扩散框架，通过将潜变量直接参数化为假设控制PDE的系数和源项，构建可解释的潜在空间，用于同时解决稀疏观测重建和超分辨率问题，实现高保真动力学重建和不确定性追踪。
AI.motivation: 科学测量常受限于噪声、空间覆盖不全或分辨率不足等次优条件，导致精确场重建困难。现有物理引导扩散模型依赖软损失惩罚或不可解释表示，缺乏物理一致性和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出LatentPDE框架，将潜变量直接参数化为假设控制PDE的系数和源项，构建内在可解释的潜在空间，结合潜在扩散模型实现稀疏观测重建和超分辨率。
AI.result: 在多种配置下实现高保真恢复和任意分辨率重建，同时能够追踪底层预测不确定性。
AI.conclusion: LatentPDE通过可解释的PDE参数化潜空间，有效解决了物理引导扩散模型的可解释性和物理一致性问题，在科学测量重建任务中表现优异。

title: Can Current Agents Close the Discovery-to-Application Gap? A Case Study in Minecraft
comment: Preprint, under review. 41 pages. Project page: https://scicrafter-bench.github.io/. Code: https://github.com/scicrafter-bench/scicraft-bench
summary: Discovering causal regularities and applying them to build functional systems--the discovery-to-application loop--is a hallmark of general intelligence, yet evaluating this capacity has been hindered by the vast complexity gap between scientific discovery and real-world engineering. We introduce SciCrafter, a Minecraft-based benchmark that operationalizes this loop through parameterized redstone circuit tasks. Agents must ignite lamps in specified patterns (e.g., simultaneously or in timed sequences); scaling target parameters substantially increases construction complexity and required knowledge, forcing genuine discovery rather than reliance on memorized solutions. Evaluating frontier models including GPT-5.2, Gemini-3-Pro, and Claude-Opus-4.5 under a general-purpose code agent scaffold, we find that all plateau at approximately 26% success rate. To diagnose these failures, we decompose the loop into four capacities--knowledge gap identification, experimental discovery, knowledge consolidation, and knowledge application--and design targeted interventions whose marginal contributions serve as proxies for corresponding gaps. Our analysis reveals that although the general knowledge application capability still remains as the biggest gap across all models, for frontier models the knowledge gap identification starts to become a major hurdle--indicating the bottleneck is shifting from solving problems right to raising the right problems for current AI. We release SciCrafter as a diagnostic probe for future research on AI systems that navigate the full discovery-to-application loop.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciCrafter，一个基于Minecraft的基准测试，用于评估AI从科学发现到实际应用的完整循环能力。前沿模型（GPT-5.2、Gemini-3-Pro、Claude-Opus-4.5）在该基准上仅达到约26%的成功率，且分析表明瓶颈正从"解决问题"转向"提出正确问题"。
AI.motivation: 评估AI从科学发现到工程应用的全循环能力因复杂度差距而受阻，现有基准无法有效衡量这一通用智能核心特征。
AI.method: 通过Minecraft中参数化红石电路任务构建基准，目标参数缩放增加复杂度迫使真正的发现而非记忆。将发现-应用循环分解为四个能力（知识缺口识别、实验发现、知识整合、知识应用），设计定向干预作为能力代理。
AI.result: 所有前沿模型在大约26%的成功率处停滞。知识应用能力仍是最大差距，但前沿模型的知识缺口识别能力已成为主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: AI系统瓶颈正从"正确解决问题"转向"提出正确问题"，SciCrafter可作为诊断探针推动相关研究。

title: Aligned Multi-View Scripts for Universal Chart-to-Code Generation
summary: Chart-to-code generation converts a chart image into an executable plotting script, enabling faithful reproduction and editable visualizations. Existing methods are largely Python-centric, limiting practical use and overlooking a critical source of supervision: the same chart can be expressed by semantically equivalent scripts in different plotting languages. To fill this gap, we introduce Chart2NCode, a dataset of 176K charts paired with aligned scripts in Python, R, and LaTeX that render visually equivalent outputs, constructed via a metadata-to-template pipeline with rendering verification and human quality checks. Building on a LLaVA-style architecture, we further propose CharLuMA, a parameter-efficient adaptation module that augments the multimodal projector with a language-conditioned mixture of low-rank subspaces, allowing the model to share core chart understanding while specializing code generation to the target language through lightweight routing. Extensive experiments show consistent gains in executability and visual fidelity across all languages, outperforming strong open-source baselines and remaining competitive with proprietary systems. Further analyses reveal that balanced multi-language supervision benefits all languages and that the adapter allocates a compact shared core plus language-specific capacity. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/Zhihan72/CharLuMA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Chart2NCode 数据集（176K图表配对Python/R/LaTeX脚本）和 CharLuMA 模型（语言条件混合低秩适配模块），实现跨语言的图表到代码生成，超越开源基线并与闭源系统竞争。
AI.motivation: 现有图表到代码生成方法仅支持Python，忽略了同一图表可用不同语言（如R、LaTeX）语义等价脚本表达的事实，限制了实际应用和跨语言监督信号的利用。
AI.method: 构建Chart2NCode数据集（元数据转模板+渲染验证+人工质检）；提出CharLuMA：在LLaVA架构的多模态投影仪中注入语言条件混合低秩子空间（MoLoRA），使模型共享图表理解能力的同时，通过轻量路由实现目标语言特化代码生成。
AI.result: 在Python/R/LaTeX三语言上一致提升可执行性和视觉保真度，超越强开源基线，与闭源系统竞争；平衡多语言监督对所有语言有益；适配器分配紧凑共享核心+语言特定容量。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言多任务学习能提升单语言性能，语言条件低秩适配是一种高效的多语言代码生成范式，验证了"共享理解+特化生成"路线的有效性。

title: Leveraging Spatial Transcriptomics as Alternative to Manual Annotations for Deep Learning-Based Nuclei Analysis
summary: Deep learning-based nuclei segmentation and classification in pathology images typically rely on large-scale pixel-level manual annotations, which are costly and difficult to obtain across diverse tissues and staining conditions. To address this limitation, we propose a framework that leverages spatial transcriptomics (ST) data as supervision for nuclei segmentation and classification. By incorporating cell-level ST data, we obtain gene expression profiles and corresponding nuclear masks from histopathological images. Gene expression profiles are converted into cell-type labels and used as training data for image-based classification. Because existing gene expression-based cell-type classification methods are not designed for image recognition, we introduce an image-oriented classification approach that bridges gene expression-based cell typing and image-based cell classification. To evaluate generalization, we conduct segmentation experiments on previously unseen organs and compare our method with conventional supervised models. Despite being trained on fewer organ types, our framework achieves higher segmentation accuracy, demonstrating strong transferability. Classification experiments further show consistent improvements over existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出利用空间转录组学数据作为监督信号进行病理图像中细胞核分割与分类的新框架，在减少对像素级人工标注依赖的同时，实现了较好的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于深度学习的细胞核分割与分类依赖大规模像素级人工标注，成本高且难以覆盖多样化的组织和染色条件。本文旨在利用空间转录组学数据作为监督信号，降低对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 利用空间转录组学数据获取基因表达谱和对应的核掩码；将基因表达谱转换为细胞类型标签，作为图像分类的训练数据；提出面向图像的分类方法，桥接基因表达驱动的细胞分型与基于图像的细胞分类。
AI.result: 在未见过的器官上进行分割实验，与传统的监督模型相比，本文框架在训练器官类型更少的情况下取得了更高的分割精度，展现出强迁移性；分类实验也显示出一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 利用空间转录组学数据替代人工标注是可行的，所提框架具有良好的泛化能力和迁移性，为病理图像分析提供了一种低成本、高泛化的新思路。

title: Cardiac Stability Theory: An Axiomatically Grounded Framework for Continuous Cardiac Health Monitoring via Smartphone Photoplethysmography
summary: We present Cardiac Stability Theory (CST), an axiomatically grounded framework formally defining cardiovascular health as a stability margin around a cardiac dynamical attractor. From four axioms we derive the Cardiac Stability Index (CSI), a composite scalar in [0,1] integrating the largest Lyapunov exponent, recurrence determinism, and signal entropy via time-delay embedding. The ECG-based model (CSISurrogateV2, CNN-Transformer) achieves $R^2=0.8788$, MAE$=0.0234$ on PTB-XL (21,799 recordings). We extend CSI to smartphone PPG via Complementary Domain Transfer (CDT): CSISurrogateV2 generates pseudo-labels for the BUT PPG dataset (48 recordings, 12 subjects), training TinyCSINet (122,849 parameters), achieving MAE$=0.0557$, $ρ=0.660$ on the held-out test set ($n=1065$ windows) at ${<}30$ ms mobile latency. CDT is validated on BIDMC, Welltory, and RWS-PPG. Paired validation on 5,035 BIDMC windows yields $r=0.454$ ($ρ=0.485$, $p<10^{-295}$), confirming correlated cardiac stability across modalities. CSI is negatively correlated with age (slope $= -0.000225$ CSI/year, PTB-XL), discriminates atrial fibrillation from normal sinus rhythm (AUROC$=0.89$), and is robust under Perturbation Invariance Training (max AUC drop 1.65\%). We derive HeartSpan, a longitudinal stability metric relative to population age norms, enabling continuous non-invasive cardiac monitoring from commodity smartphones for longevity tracking and cardiac risk stratification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出心脏稳定性理论（CST），通过四个公理推导出心脏稳定性指数（CSI），基于ECG和智能手机PPG信号实现心血管健康评估。CNN-Transformer模型在PTB-XL数据集上达到R²=0.8788，轻量模型TinyCSINet在手机上延迟<30ms，MAE=0.0557。CSI与年龄负相关，可区分房颤（AUROC=0.89），并具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有心血管健康评估方法依赖临床设备，缺乏可解释的数学框架和可推广到日常移动设备的轻量级解决方案。作者希望建立一套公理化的心血管稳定性理论，并扩展到智能手机PPG信号，实现大规模、低成本的持续心脏监测。
AI.method: 从四个公理推导CSI（结合最大Lyapunov指数、递归确定性和信号熵）；构建CNN-Transformer模型（CSISurrogateV2）从ECG估计CSI；通过互补域迁移（CDT）将模型迁移到智能手机PPG数据；设计轻量网络TinyCSINet在移动端推理。
AI.result: CSISurrogateV2在PTB-XL上R²=0.8788，MAE=0.0234；TinyCSINet在BUT PPG上MAE=0.0557，ρ=0.660，延迟<30ms；跨模态验证r=0.454（p<10⁻²⁹⁵）；房颤检测AUROC=0.89；鲁棒性测试最大AUC下降1.65%。
AI.conclusion: CST框架和CSI指标可用于从临床ECG到智能手机PPG的跨模态心血管稳定性评估，衍生出的HeartSpan指标支持长期纵向监测和风险分层，为可及性心脏健康管理提供理论基础和实用工具。

title: Case-Specific Rubrics for Clinical AI Evaluation: Methodology, Validation, and LLM-Clinician Agreement Across 823 Encounters
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, submitted to JAMIA
summary:
Objective. Clinical AI documentation systems require evaluation methodologies that are clinically valid, economically viable, and sensitive to iterative changes. Methods requiring expert review per scoring instance are too slow and expensive for safe, iterative deployment. We present a case-specific, clinician-authored rubric methodology for clinical AI evaluation and examine whether LLM-generated rubrics can approximate clinician agreement.
  Materials and Methods. Twenty clinicians authored 1,646 rubrics for 823 clinical cases (736 real-world, 87 synthetic) across primary care, psychiatry, oncology, and behavioral health. Each rubric was validated by confirming that an LLM-based scoring agent consistently scored clinician-preferred outputs higher than rejected ones. Seven versions of an EHR-embedded AI agent for clinicians were evaluated across all cases.
  Results. Clinician-authored rubrics discriminated effectively between high- and low-quality outputs (median score gap: 82.9%) with high scoring stability (median range: 0.00%). Median scores improved from 84% to 95%. In later experiments, clinician-LLM ranking agreement (tau: 0.42-0.46) matched or exceeded clinician-clinician agreement (tau: 0.38-0.43), attributable to both ceiling compression and LLM rubric improvement.
  Discussion. This convergence supports incorporating LLM rubrics alongside clinician-authored ones. At roughly 1,000 times lower cost, LLM rubrics enable substantially greater evaluation coverage, while continued clinical authorship grounds evaluation in expert judgment. Ceiling compression poses a methodological challenge for future inter-rater agreement studies.
  Conclusion. Case-specific rubrics offer a path for clinical AI evaluation that preserves expert judgment while enabling automation at three orders lower cost. Clinician-authored rubrics establish the baseline against which LLM rubrics are validated.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于临床专家撰写的病例特定评分标准（rubric）的方法来评估临床AI文档系统，并探索了LLM生成的评分标准能否近似临床专家的一致性。实验表明，专家撰写的评分标准能有效区分高质量和低质量输出，而LLM生成的评分标准在成本降低约1000倍的情况下，与专家的一致性可匹配或超过专家间的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有的临床AI评估方法依赖逐实例的专家评审，成本高、速度慢，无法支持安全、迭代的部署。需要一种既具有临床有效性、经济可行性，又能对迭代变化敏感的评估方法。
AI.method: 20位临床专家为823个临床案例撰写了1,646个评分标准，通过验证LLM评分代理一致地对专家偏好的输出给出更高分来确认每个评分标准的有效性。随后评估了7个版本的EHR嵌入式AI代理，并比较了专家-LLM排名一致性与专家-专家排名一致性。
AI.result: 专家评分标准有效区分高低质量输出（中位分差82.9%），评分稳定性高（中位范围0.00%）。中位得分从84%提升至95%。专家-LLM排名一致性（tau: 0.42-0.46）匹配或超过专家-专家一致性（tau: 0.38-0.43）。天花板压缩效应是未来研究的一个方法论挑战。
AI.conclusion: 病例特定评分标准为临床AI评估提供了一条既能保留专家判断，又能以低三个数量级的成本实现自动化的路径。专家撰写的评分标准为验证LLM评分标准建立了基线。

title: MEG-RAG: Quantifying Multi-modal Evidence Grounding for Evidence Selection in RAG
summary: Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (MRAG) addresses key limitations of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), such as hallucination and outdated knowledge. However, current MRAG systems struggle to distinguish whether retrieved multimodal data truly supports the semantic core of an answer or merely provides superficial relevance. Existing metrics often rely on heuristic position-based confidence, which fails to capture the informational density of multimodal entities. To address this, we propose Multi-modal Evidence Grounding (MEG), a semantic-aware metric that quantifies the contribution of retrieved evidence. Unlike standard confidence measures, MEG utilizes Semantic Certainty Anchoring, focusing on high-IDF information-bearing tokens that better capture the semantic core of the answer. Building on MEG, we introduce MEG-RAG, a framework that trains a multimodal reranker to align retrieved evidence with the semantic anchors of the ground truth. By prioritizing high-value content based on semantic grounding rather than token probability distributions, MEG-RAG improves the accuracy and multimodal consistency of generated outputs. Extensive experiments on the M$^2$RAG benchmark show that MEG-RAG consistently outperforms strong baselines and demonstrates robust generalization across different teacher models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MEG（多模态证据 grounding）语义度量指标及MEG-RAG框架，通过关注高信息密度token的语义确定性锚定，改进多模态检索增强生成中证据与答案语义核心的对齐，提升生成准确性和多模态一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有MRAG系统难以区分检索到的多模态数据是否真正支持答案的语义核心，往往仅提供表面相关性；现有指标依赖基于位置的启发式置信度，无法捕捉多模态实体的信息密度。
AI.method: 提出多模态证据grounding（MEG）语义感知度量，利用语义确定性锚定聚焦高IDF信息承载token来量化证据贡献；在此基础上构建MEG-RAG框架，训练多模态重排序器使检索证据与答案语义锚点对齐。
AI.result: 在M^2RAG基准上的大量实验表明，MEG-RAG持续优于强基线方法，并在不同教师模型上展现出稳健的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MEG-RAG通过基于语义grounding而非token概率分布来优先选择高价值内容，显著提升了多模态检索增强生成的准确性和一致性。

title: BurstGP: Enhancing Raw Burst Image Super Resolution with Generative Priors
summary: Burst image super resolution (BISR) aims to construct a single high-resolution (HR) image by aggregating information from multiple low-resolution (LR) frames, relying on temporal redundancy and spatial coherence across the burst. While conventional methods achieve impressive results, they often struggle with complex textures and oversmoothing. Diffusion models, particularly those pretrained on high-quality data, have shown remarkable capability in generating realistic details for image and video super-resolution. However, their potential remains largely under-explored in BISR, where existing approaches typically rely on task-specific diffusion models trained from scratch and operate on single-frame reconstructions. In this work, we propose BurstGP, a novel diffusion-based solution for BISR, which leverages generative priors of recent foundation models to overcome these issues. In particular, we build a multiframe-aware diffusion model on top of a conventional BISR approach, which boosts image quality with minimal loss to fidelity. Further, we introduce (i) a novel degradation-aware conditioning mechanism, which controls synthesis of fine details based on the estimated degradation in the input, and (ii) a robust sRGB-to-lRGB inverter, enabling us to utilize generative multiframe (video) sRGB priors, while operating with raw input and lRGB output images. Empirically, we demonstrate that BurstGP outperforms the existing state of the art, both quantitatively (especially with respect to perceptual metrics, including MUSIQ and LPIPS) and qualitatively. In particular, our proposed method excels at recovering richer textures and finer structural details, highlighting the potential of video priors for BISR over traditional methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BurstGP，一种基于扩散模型的突发图像超分辨率方法，利用预训练基础模型的生成先验，通过多帧感知扩散模型、退化感知条件机制和sRGB-to-lRGB转换器，在保持保真度的同时显著提升感知质量，在MUSIQ和LPIPS等指标上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 传统BISR方法在复杂纹理和过平滑方面存在不足，而扩散模型在图像/视频超分辨率中表现优异，但在BISR领域尚未被充分探索（现有方法通常从零训练单帧扩散模型）。
AI.method: 1) 在传统BISR基础上构建多帧感知扩散模型；2) 提出退化感知条件机制，根据输入退化程度控制细节合成；3) 设计鲁棒的sRGB-to-lRGB转换器，使得在raw输入/lRGB输出场景下也能利用预训练的视频sRGB先验。
AI.result: 在定量指标（MUSIQ、LPIPS等感知指标）和定性效果上均超越现有SOTA方法，尤其擅长恢复更丰富的纹理和更精细的结构细节。
AI.conclusion: 展示了视频先验在BISR中的潜力，证明了利用基础模型生成先验可有效克服传统方法的局限性。

title: Geometry Preserving Loss Functions Promote Improved Adaptation of Blackbox Generative Model
summary: Adaptation of blackbox generative models has been widely studied recently through the exploration of several methods including generator fine-tuning, latent space searches, leveraging singular value decomposition, and so on. However, adapting large-scale generative AI tools to specific use cases continues to be challenging, as many of these industry-grade models are not made widely available. The traditional approach of fine-tuning certain layers of a generative network is not feasible due to the expense of storing and fine-tuning generative models, as well as the restricted access to weights and gradients. Recognizing these challenges, we propose a novel end-to-end pipeline aimed at domain adaptation by leveraging geometry-preserving loss functions in conjunction to pre-trained generative adversarial networks (GANs). Our method rethinks the problem of adaptation by re-contextualizing the role of GAN inversion in obtaining accurate latent space representations. Extending the ability of existing state-of-the-art inverters, we preserve pair-wise distances between tangent spaces to successfully train a latent generative model to produce samples from the target distribution. We evaluate our proposed pipeline on StyleGANs with real distribution shifts and demonstrate that the introduction of the geometry preserving loss function lends to improved adaptation of generative models compared to other traditional loss functions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于几何保持损失函数的端到端管道，通过GAN反演和潜在空间建模，实现对黑盒生成模型（尤其是StyleGAN）的域适应，无需访问模型权重和梯度。
AI.motivation: 大规模生成式AI工具难以适应特定用例，因为许多工业级模型不公开权重和梯度，且传统微调方法存储和计算成本过高。
AI.method: 提出端到端管道：利用几何保持损失函数（保持切空间之间的成对距离）结合预训练GAN，通过改进的GAN反演获得精确潜在空间表示，训练潜在生成模型从目标分布生成样本。
AI.result: 在StyleGAN上针对真实分布偏移进行评估，结果表明引入几何保持损失函数相比传统损失函数能更好地适应生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 几何保持损失函数能有效提升黑盒生成模型的域适应能力，为无需访问模型内部参数的生成模型适配提供了可行方案。

title: Learning to Rotate: Temporal and Semantic Rotary Encoding for Sequential Modeling
summary:
Every Transformer architecture dedicates enormous capacity to learning rich representations in semantic embedding space -- yet the rotation manifold acted upon by Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE) has been treated as a fixed, hand-crafted structure, populated only by discrete ordinal indices. We argue that this rotation space is a largely overlooked second dimension of expressivity in the attention mechanism, one whose systematic exploration may open a new door for attention-based architectures. The analogy to complex numbers is instructive: just as introducing the imaginary axis -- orthogonal to and independent of the real line -- unlocked new algebraic structure once believed impossible, treating the rotation manifold as a learnable, signal-conditioned space opens an orthogonal degree of freedom in attention. In this framing, the token embedding encodes the semantic (real) component of a representation -- what a token means -- while the rotation encodes its dynamic (imaginary) component -- how it relates to every other token across time, position, and context.
  We introduce SIREN-RoPE, a concrete instantiation of this idea, which populates the rotation dimension with heterogeneous signals -- continuous timestamps, cyclical temporal patterns, and categorical metadata -- via a dual-branch Sinusoidal Representation Network (SIREN). As a proof of concept, we evaluate on a production-scale news feed dataset from a major social network using a generative recommender as the ranking model, demonstrating that activating this hidden dimension yields consistent improvements across calibration and ranking objectives with negligible computational overhead. We invite the community to view the rotation space not as a solved positional-encoding detail, but as an untapped axis whose rich structure may prove as consequential for attention as the imaginary unit proved for algebra.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Transformer中RoPE的旋转空间从固定结构改造为可学习的、信号驱动的动态空间（SIREN-RoPE），通过双分支SIREN网络将时间戳、周期模式等异构信号编码进旋转维度，并在生产级推荐系统上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: RoPE中的旋转空间一直被当作固定的、手工设计的结构，只填充离散的位置索引，但作者认为这个旋转维度是注意力机制中被忽视的第二个表达性维度，应该像复数中引入虚轴一样，将其改造为可学习的、信号驱动的空间，以捕获token之间的动态关系。
AI.method: 提出SIREN-RoPE，采用双分支Sinusoidal表示网络（SIREN）将连续时间戳、周期性时间模式以及分类元数据等异构信号编码到RoPE的旋转维度中，替代原始的固定位置编码，使旋转空间具备信号条件化的表达能力。
AI.result: 在大型社交网络的生产级新闻推荐数据集上，使用生成式推荐器作为排序模型进行实验，结果表明该方法在校准和排序目标上均取得一致性改进，且计算开销可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 旋转空间不应被看作已解决的位置编码细节，而是一个未被充分开发的表达轴，其丰富结构可能对注意力机制产生类似虚数对代数那样的变革性影响。

title: Skill Retrieval Augmentation for Agentic AI
summary: As large language models (LLMs) evolve into agentic problem solvers, they increasingly rely on external, reusable skills to handle tasks beyond their native parametric capabilities. In existing agent systems, the dominant strategy for incorporating skills is to explicitly enumerate available skills within the context window. However, this strategy fails to scale: as skill corpora expand, context budgets are consumed rapidly, and the agent becomes markedly less accurate in identifying the right skill. To this end, this paper formulates Skill Retrieval Augmentation (SRA), a new paradigm in which agents dynamically retrieve, incorporate, and apply relevant skills from large external skill corpora on demand. To make this problem measurable, we construct a large-scale skill corpus and introduce SRA-Bench, the first benchmark for decomposed evaluation of the full SRA pipeline, covering skill retrieval, skill incorporation, and end-task execution. SRA-Bench contains 5,400 capability-intensive test instances and 636 manually constructed gold skills, which are mixed with web-collected distractor skills to form a large-scale corpus of 26,262 skills. Extensive experiments show that retrieval-based skill augmentation can substantially improve agent performance, validating the promise of the paradigm. At the same time, we uncover a fundamental gap in skill incorporation: current LLM agents tend to load skills at similar rates, regardless of whether a gold skill is retrieved or whether the task actually requires external capabilities. This shows that the bottleneck in skill augmentation lies not only in retrieval but also in the base model's ability to determine which skill to load and when external loading is actually needed. These findings position SRA as a distinct research problem and establish a foundation for the scalable augmentation of capabilities in future agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出技能检索增强（SRA）范式，让LLM智能体从大规模外部技能库中动态检索并应用技能，构建了首个基准SRA-Bench（5,400个测试实例、26,262个技能），实验表明检索增强可提升性能，但发现智能体在技能加载上存在"无差别装载"的根本性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体系统将技能显式放入上下文的策略无法规模化扩展，技能库越大，上下文预算被快速消耗且技能识别精度下降，亟需一种可动态检索技能的新范式。
AI.method: 形式化定义技能检索增强（SRA）范式；构建大规模技能语料库（26,262个技能，含636个金标准技能和网络收集的干扰技能）；提出SRA-Bench基准，对检索、技能融入、最终任务执行三个环节进行独立评估。
AI.result: 基于检索的技能增强能显著提升智能体性能；但揭示了一个根本性缺陷：当前LLM智能体无论是否检索到金标准技能、任务是否需要外部能力，都以类似速率加载技能，缺乏判断何时需要外部技能的能力。
AI.conclusion: SRA是一个独立的研究问题，瓶颈不仅在于检索，更在于基础模型判断加载何种技能以及何时需要外部能力的能力，为未来智能体系统的可扩展能力增强奠定基础。

title: Emotion-Conditioned Short-Horizon Human Pose Forecasting with a Lightweight Predictive World Model
summary: Short-term human pose prediction plays a crucial role in interactive systems, assistive robots, and emotion-aware human-computer interaction[1-3]. While current trajectory prediction models primarily rely on geometric motion cues, they often overlook the underlying emotional signals influencing human motion dynamics[4-5]. This paper investigates whether facial expression-derived emotion embeddings can provide auxiliary conditional signals for short-term pose prediction. To further evaluate multimodal conditionation in a recursive prediction setting, we propose a lightweight autoregressive predictive world model that performs 15-step rolling pose prediction. This framework combines pose keypoints with emotion embeddings through a learnable gating mechanism and performs autoregressive unfolding prediction using a recurrent sequence model based on a two-layer LSTM architecture. Experiments were conducted on two small-scale pose-emotion video datasets: controlled motion sequences with minimal facial expression changes and, natural emotion-driven motion sequences with considerable facial expression changes. The results show that simple multimodal fusion does not consistently improve prediction accuracy, while normalized gating fusion significantly enhances the performance of emotion-driven motion sequences. Furthermore, counterfactual perturbation experiments demonstrate that the predicted trajectory exhibits measurable sensitivity to changes in multimodal input, suggesting that facial expression embeddings act as auxiliary conditional signals rather than redundant features. In summary, these results indicate that incorporating facial expression-derived emotion embeddings into emotion-conditional short-term pose prediction based on a lightweight predictive world model architecture is a feasible approach.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将面部表情衍生的情绪嵌入作为辅助条件信号，用于基于轻量级自回归预测世界模型的短时姿态预测，实验表明归一化门控融合在情绪驱动运动序列上有效，且情绪嵌入可作为辅助条件而非冗余特征。
AI.motivation: 现有的短时人体姿态预测模型主要依赖几何运动线索，忽略了影响人体运动动态的潜在情绪信号。本文旨在探究面部表情情绪嵌入能否为姿态预测提供辅助条件信息。
AI.method: 提出轻量级自回归预测世界模型，通过可学习门控机制融合姿态关键点与情绪嵌入，使用双层LSTM循环序列模型进行15步滚动自回归预测。
AI.result: 简单多模态融合不能一致提升预测精度；归一化门控融合在情绪驱动运动序列上显著提升性能；反事实扰动实验表明预测轨迹对多模态输入变化敏感，情绪嵌入起辅助条件信号作用。
AI.conclusion: 将面部表情衍生的情绪嵌入融入情绪条件化短时姿态预测是可行的方法，情绪嵌入作为辅助信号而非冗余特征。

title: Machine Learning and Deep Learning Models for Short Term Electricity Price Forecasting in Australia's National Electricity Market
summary: Short term electricity price forecast is essential in competitive power markets, yet electricity price series exhibit high volatility, irregularity, and non-stationarity. This phenomenon is pronounced in the South Australian region of the National Electricity Market, where high renewable penetration drives price volatility and frequent negative price intervals, while structural changes such as the transition to five-minute settlement further complicate forecast. To address these challenges, this study develops a unified benchmark framework. Under identical data preprocessing, feature engineering with lag features, rolling statistics, cyclic temporal encodings, and so on, and an 85% to 15% chronological train test split, six algorithms are systematically compared, including AWMLSTM, CatBoost, GBRT, LSTM, LightGBM, and SVR. The results show that for price prediction, tree-based models, especially GBRT with an R squared value of 0.88, generally outperform LSTM and SVR. However, all models achieve a mean absolute percentage error above 90%, and more than 65% of GBRT predictions have relative errors above 10%, which highlights the inherent difficulty of price forecast. For demand prediction, all models perform substantially better than in price prediction. AWMLSTM and GBRT achieve an R2 value of 0.96 with mean absolute percentage error below 32%, and GBRT has 74.37% of samples within 5% error, while LSTM and SVR perform less accurately in both tasks. Future improvements should focus on hybrid models such as tree plus transformers, data augmentation for extreme events, and error correction to better capture price spikes.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了六种算法（AWMLSTM、CatBoost、GBRT、LSTM、LightGBM、SVR）在南澳大利亚电力市场的短期电价预测任务上的表现，发现树模型（尤其GBRT，R²=0.88）优于LSTM和SVR，但所有模型MAPE均高于90%，揭示了电价预测的固有困难。
AI.motivation: 电力市场短期电价预测对竞争性电力市场至关重要，但电价序列具有高波动性、不规则性和非平稳性，尤其是南澳地区可再生能源渗透率高、负电价频繁、结算机制变化等挑战加剧了预测难度，亟需统一的基准框架进行系统比较。
AI.method: 建立统一基准框架，在相同数据预处理、特征工程（滞后特征、滚动统计量、周期时间编码等）和85%/15%时间顺序划分下，系统比较AWMLSTM、CatBoost、GBRT、LSTM、LightGBM和SVR六种算法。
AI.result: 电价预测中树模型（尤其GBRT）优于LSTM和SVR，但所有模型MAPE>90%，超65%的GBRT预测相对误差>10%；负荷预测中所有模型表现更好，AWMLSTM和GBRT的R²=0.96且MAPE<32%。
AI.conclusion: 未来改进应聚焦混合模型（如树+Transformer）、极端事件数据增强和误差修正方法以更好捕捉电价尖峰。

title: Cloudless-Training: A Framework to Improve Efficiency of Geo-Distributed ML Training
summary: Geo-distributed ML training can benefit many emerging ML scenarios (e.g., large model training, federated learning) with multi-regional cloud resources and wide area network. However, its efficiency is limited due to 2 challenges. First, efficient elastic scheduling of multi-regional cloud resources is usually missing, affecting resource utilization and performance of training. Second, training communication on WAN is still the main overhead, easily subjected to low bandwidth and high fluctuations of WAN. In this paper, we propose a framework, Cloudless-Training, to realize efficient PS-based geo-distributed ML training in 3 aspects. First, it uses a two-layer architecture with control and physical training planes to support elastic scheduling and communication for multi-regional clouds in a serverless maner.Second, it provides an elastic scheduling strategy that can deploy training workflows adaptively according to the heterogeneity of available cloud resources and distribution of pre-existing training datasets. Third, it provides 2 new synchronization strategies for training partitions among clouds, including asynchronous SGD with gradient accumulation (ASGD-GA) and inter-PS model averaging (MA). It is implemented with OpenFaaS and evaluated on Tencent Cloud. Experiments show that Cloudless-Training can support general ML training in a geo-distributed way, greatly improve resource utilization (e.g., 9.2%-24.0% training cost reduction) and synchronization efficiency (e.g., 1.7x training speedup over baseline at most) with model correctness guarantees.

AI.tldr: 提出了Cloudless-Training框架，通过两层架构、弹性调度和两种新的同步策略（ASGD-GA和MA），实现基于参数服务器的地理分布式机器学习训练，在腾讯云上验证可降低9.2%-24.0%训练成本并实现最高1.7倍加速。
AI.motivation: 地理分布式ML训练面临两个主要挑战：缺乏高效的多区域云资源弹性调度，以及WAN上训练通信的低带宽和高波动问题。
AI.method: 提出Cloudless-Training框架：1）两层架构（控制平面+物理训练平面），以无服务器方式支持弹性调度与通信；2）根据云资源异构性和数据集分布自适应部署训练工作流的弹性调度策略；3）两种新的跨云同步策略——异步SGD+梯度累积（ASGD-GA）和参数服务器间模型平均（MA）。基于OpenFaaS实现。
AI.result: 在腾讯云上实验，Cloudless-Training支持通用地理分布式ML训练，降低9.2%-24.0%训练成本，最高实现1.7倍训练加速，且保证模型正确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过弹性调度和新的同步策略，有效解决了地理分布式训练中的资源利用率和WAN通信瓶颈问题。

title: Evaluation of Pose Estimation Systems for Sign Language Translation
comment: Accepted at LREC 2026 Workshop on the Representation and Processing of Sign Languages. O'Brien and Sant contributed equally to this paper. 16 pages, 6 figures
summary:
Many sign language translation (SLT) systems operate on pose sequences instead of raw video to reduce input dimensionality, improve portability, and partially anonymize signers. The choice of pose estimator is often treated as an implementation detail, with systems defaulting to widely available tools such as MediaPipe Holistic or OpenPose. We present a systematic comparison of pose estimators for pose-based SLT, covering widely used baselines (MediaPipe Holistic, OpenPose) and newer whole-body/high-capacity models (MMPose WholeBody, OpenPifPaf, AlphaPose, SDPose, Sapiens, SMPLest-X). We quantify downstream impact by training a controlled SLT pipeline on RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather 2014 where only the pose representation varies, evaluating with BLEU and BLEURT.
  To contextualize translation outcomes, we analyze temporal stability, missing hand keypoints, and robustness to occlusion using higher-resolution videos from the Signsuisse dataset. SDPose and Sapiens achieve the best translation performance (BLEU ~11.5), outperforming the common MediaPipe baseline (BLEU ~10). In occlusion cases, Sapiens is correct in all tested instances (15/15), while OpenPifPaf fails in nearly all (1/15) and also yields the weakest translation scores. Estimators that frequently leave out hand keypoints are associated with lower BLEU/BLEURT. We release code that can be used not only to reproduce our experiments, but also considerably lowers the barrier for other researchers to use alternative pose estimators.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了多种姿态估计器（MediaPipe、OpenPose、SDPose、Sapiens等）在手语翻译任务中的影响，发现SDPose和Sapiens性能最优（BLEU ~11.5），优于常用的MediaPipe（BLEU ~10），并指出手部关键点缺失是翻译性能下降的重要原因。
AI.motivation: 手语翻译中姿态估计器的选择通常被视为实现细节而被忽视，多数系统直接采用MediaPipe等默认工具。本文旨在系统性地评估不同姿态估计器对手语翻译下游任务的影响，填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 在RWTH-PHOENIX-Weather 2014数据集上构建受控手语翻译流程，仅改变姿态表示，使用BLEU和BLEURT评估。同时利用Signsuisse数据集的高分辨率视频分析时间稳定性、手部关键点缺失及遮挡鲁棒性。
AI.result: SDPose和Sapiens取得最佳翻译性能（BLEU ~11.5），优于MediaPipe（BLEU ~10）。在遮挡场景中，Sapiens全部正确（15/15），而OpenPifPaf几乎全部失败（1/15），其翻译得分也最低。频繁缺失手部关键点的估计器与较低BLEU/BLEURT相关。
AI.conclusion: 姿态估计器的选择对手语翻译性能有显著影响，不应被视为实现细节。SDPose和Sapiens等高性能模型能有效提升翻译质量，尤其在遮挡场景下优势明显。研究开放了代码以降低使用替代姿态估计器的门槛。

title: $Z^2$-Sampling: Zero-Cost Zigzag Trajectories for Semantic Alignment in Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models have achieved unprecedented success in text-aligned generation, largely driven by Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG). However, standard CFG operates strictly on instantaneous gradients, omitting the intrinsic curvature of the data manifold. Recent methods like Zigzag-sampling (Z-Sampling) explicitly traverse multi-step forward-backward trajectories to probe this curvature, significantly improving semantic alignment. Yet, these explicit traversals triple the Neural Function Evaluation (NFE) cost and introduce unconstrained truncation errors from off-manifold evaluations, causing cumulative drift from the true marginal distribution. In this paper, we theoretically demonstrate that the explicit zigzag sequence is topologically reducible. We propose Implicit Z-Sampling, rigorously proving that intermediate states can be algebraically annihilated via operator dualities, physically eliminating off-manifold approximation errors. To push sampling efficiency to its theoretical lower bound, we introduce $Z^2$-Sampling (Zero-cost Zigzag Sampling). Exploiting the Probability Flow ODE's temporal coherence, $Z^2$-Sampling couples implicit algebraic collapse with a dynamically cached Temporal Semantic Surrogate. This restores the standard 2-NFE baseline without sacrificing semantic exploration. We formally prove via Backward Error Analysis that this discrete collapse inherently synthesizes a directional derivative curvature penalty. Finally, extensive evaluations demonstrate that $Z^2$-Sampling structurally shatters the performance-efficiency Pareto frontier. We validate its universal applicability across diverse architectures (U-Nets, DiTs) and modalities (image/video), establishing seamless orthogonality with advanced alignment frameworks (AYS, Diffusion-DPO).

AI.tldr: 本文提出Z²-Sampling，通过隐式代数折叠消除Zigzag采样的额外计算成本，在保持语义探索能力的同时将NFE恢复至标准CFG的2步基线，并通过反向误差分析证明其内在引入曲率惩罚项，在图像/视频生成中突破性能-效率帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 标准CFG忽略数据流形曲率，现有Zigzag采样虽能通过多步前向-反向轨迹改善语义对齐，但导致NFE成本增加3倍且引入截断误差。目标是消除显式轨迹遍历的计算开销与误差，同时保留曲率探测能力。
AI.method: 1) 理论证明显式zigzag序列拓扑可约简，通过算子对偶性实现中间状态的代数折叠（Implicit Z-Sampling）；2) 利用概率流ODE的时间一致性，引入动态缓存的时序语义代理（Temporal Semantic Surrogate），将计算成本恢复至2-NFE基线；3) 通过反向误差分析证明离散折叠隐式包含方向导数曲率惩罚。
AI.result: Z²-Sampling在保持语义探索质量的同时，将NFE从Z-Sampling的6步降至2步（与标准CFG持平），在U-Net和DiT架构、图像/视频模态上均验证了有效性，并与AYS、Diffusion-DPO等对齐框架正交兼容。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论驱动的代数折叠与缓存机制，在不牺牲语义对齐的前提下恢复了标准CFG的计算效率，实现了对性能-效率帕累托前沿的结构性突破，具有良好的架构和模态泛化能力。

title: Gromov-Wasserstein Methods for Multi-View Relational Embedding and Clustering
comment: This manuscript is currently under review at the XLIV Simposio Brasileiro de Telecomunicacoes e Processamento de Sinais - SBrT (Brazilian Symposium on Telecommunications and Signal Processing ) 2026
summary: Learning low-dimensional representations from multi-view relational data is challenging when underlying geometries differ across views. We propose Bary-GWMDS, a Gromov-Wasserstein-based method that operates directly on distance matrices to learn a consensus embedding preserving shared relational structure. By leveraging intrinsic distances, the approach naturally handles nonlinear distortions across views. We also introduce Mean-GWMDS-C, a clustering-oriented formulation that averages distance matrices and learns reduced-support representations via a consensus Gromov-Wasserstein transport. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that the proposed framework yields stable and geometrically meaningful embeddings.

AI.tldr: 提出Bary-GWMDS和Mean-GWMDS-C方法，基于Gromov-Wasserstein距离从多视角关系数据中学习共识低维嵌入，处理视角间的非线性形变。
AI.motivation: 多视角关系数据中不同视角的底层几何结构可能不同，现有方法难以有效处理这种非线性形变并学习共享的共识表示。
AI.method: 基于Gromov-Wasserstein距离，直接在距离矩阵上操作，通过Bary-GWMDS学习共识嵌入；Mean-GWMDS-C通过平均距离矩阵和共识Gromov-Wasserstein传输实现聚类导向的降维表示学习。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，该方法能够生成稳定且几何上有意义的嵌入表示。
AI.conclusion: 基于Gromov-Wasserstein的多视角嵌入方法能有效处理视角间非线性失真，生成几何意义明确的共识表示。

title: ECoLAD: Deployment-Oriented Evaluation for Automotive Time-Series Anomaly Detection
summary:
Time-series anomaly detectors are commonly compared on workstation-class hardware under unconstrained execution. In-vehicle monitoring, however, requires predictable latency and stable behavior under limited CPU parallelism. Accuracy-only leaderboards can therefore misrepresent which methods remain feasible under deployment-relevant constraints.
  We present ECoLAD (Efficiency Compute Ladder for Anomaly Detection), a deployment-oriented evaluation protocol instantiated as an empirical study on proprietary automotive telemetry (anomaly rate ${\approx}$0.022) and complementary public benchmarks. ECoLAD applies a monotone compute-reduction ladder across heterogeneous detector families using mechanically determined, integer-only scaling rules and explicit CPU thread caps, while logging every applied configuration change. Throughput-constrained behavior is characterized by sweeping target scoring rates and reporting (i) coverage (the fraction of entities meeting the target) and (ii) the best AUC-PR achievable among measured ladder configurations satisfying the target. On constrained automotive telemetry, lightweight classical detectors sustain both coverage and detection lift above the random baseline across the full throughput sweep. Several deep methods lose feasibility before they lose accuracy.

AI.tldr: ECoLAD是一个面向部署约束（尤其是车载场景）的时间序列异常检测评估协议，通过计算阶梯和CPU线程限制来评估模型在吞吐量约束下的可行性与检测性能。在车载遥测数据上，轻量级经典检测器在全吞吐量范围内保持可行性，而深度方法往往在精度下降前就已失去部署可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列异常检测器的对比通常在无约束的工作站级硬件上进行，无法反映车载监控等场景对延迟、CPU并行度等部署约束的要求。仅依赖精度的排行榜会误导对方法实际可行性的判断。
AI.method: 提出ECoLAD评估协议，包含单调计算阶梯、机械确定的纯整数缩放规则、显式CPU线程上限。通过扫描目标评分速率，报告覆盖率（满足目标的实体比例）和最佳可达AUC-PR，在私有车载遥测数据（异常率≈0.022）和公开基准上评估。
AI.result: 在受约束的车载遥测数据上，轻量级经典检测器在全吞吐量扫描范围内保持覆盖率和检测提升；而多种深度方法在精度下降之前就已失去可行性。
AI.conclusion: 部署约束下的评估至关重要，精度排行榜可能误导对模型实际可用性的判断；轻量级经典方法在资源受限场景下更具优势。

title: Looking for the Bottleneck in Fine-grained Temporal Relation Classification
summary:
Temporal relation classification is the task of determining the temporal relation between pairs of temporal entities in a text.
  Despite recent advancements in natural language processing, temporal relation classification remains a considerable challenge.
  Early attempts framed this task using a comprehensive set of temporal relations between events and temporal expressions.
  However, due to the task complexity, datasets have been progressively simplified, leading recent approaches to focus on the relations between event pairs and to use only a subset of relations.
  In this work, we revisit the broader goal of classifying interval relations between temporal entities by considering the full set of relations that can hold between two time intervals.
  The proposed approach, Interval from Point, involves first classifying the point relations between the endpoints of the temporal entities and then decoding these point relations into an interval relation.
  Evaluation on the TempEval-3 dataset shows that this approach can yield effective results, achieving a temporal awareness score of $70.1$ percent, a new state-of-the-art on this benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"Interval from Point"（从点到区间）的时序关系分类方法，先分类时间实体端点之间的点关系，再将其解码为区间关系，在TempEval-3数据集上达到70.1%的时序感知分数，创下新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有时序关系分类数据集被过度简化，仅关注事件对和部分关系子集，丢失了完整的区间关系建模能力。作者希望回归更全面的目标——分类时间实体之间完整的区间关系集合。
AI.method: 提出Interval from Point方法：先对时间实体的端点（起点和终点）之间的点关系进行分类，然后将这些点关系解码为完整的区间关系（如Allen区间代数的关系集合）。
AI.result: 在TempEval-3基准上达到70.1%的时序感知分数，创下新的state-of-the-art。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解为端点级关系再组合的方式，可以有效建模更完整的时序区间关系，证明该分解策略优于直接分类区间关系的传统方法。

title: Oracle Noise: Faster Semantic Spherical Alignment for Interpretable Latent Optimization
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved remarkable generative capabilities, yet accurately aligning complex textual prompts with synthesized layouts remains an ongoing challenge. In these models, the initial Gaussian noise acts as a critical structural seed dictating the macroscopic layout. Recent online optimization and search methods attempt to refine this noise to enhance text-image alignment. However, relying on unconstrained Euclidean gradient ascent mathematically inflates the latent norm and destroys the standard Gaussian prior, causing severe visual artifacts like color over-saturation. Furthermore, these methods suffer from inefficient semantic routing and easily fall into the ``reward hacking'' trap of external proxy models. To address these intertwined bottlenecks, we propose Oracle Noise, a zero-shot framework reframing noise initialization as semantic-driven optimization strictly confined to a Riemannian hypersphere. Instead of relying on complex external parsers, we directly identify the most impactful structural words in the prompt to efficiently route optimization energy. By updating the noise strictly along a spherical path, we mathematically preserve the original Gaussian distribution. This geometric constraint eliminates norm inflation and unlocks aggressive step sizes for rapid convergence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Oracle Noise significantly accelerates semantic alignment and achieves superior aesthetics without black-box models. It completely mitigates Euclidean-induced degradation, establishing state-of-the-art performance across human preference metrics (e.g., HPSv2, ImageReward), semantic alignment (CLIP Score), and sample diversity, all within a strict 2-second optimization budget.

AI.tldr: 提出Oracle Noise，一种零样本框架，将文本到图像扩散模型的噪声初始化重构为严格约束在黎曼超球面上的语义驱动优化，通过保持高斯先验分布来避免欧几里得梯度上升导致的视觉伪影，在2秒内实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型中，在线优化方法使用无约束欧几里得梯度上升来优化初始噪声以提升文本-图像对齐，但这会数学上膨胀潜在范数、破坏标准高斯先验，导致颜色过饱和等严重视觉伪影，且存在语义路由低效和奖励黑客问题。
AI.method: 将噪声初始化重构为严格约束在黎曼超球面上的语义驱动优化问题；直接识别prompt中最有影响力的结构词来高效路由优化能量；沿球面路径更新噪声以数学上保持原始高斯分布；通过几何约束消除范数膨胀并允许激进步长实现快速收敛。
AI.result: 在人类偏好指标(HPSv2, ImageReward)、语义对齐(CLIP Score)和样本多样性上达到SOTA性能，完全消除欧几里得方法导致的退化，且严格在2秒优化预算内完成。
AI.conclusion: 证明将噪声优化约束在黎曼超球面上能同时解决视觉质量、语义对齐和优化效率三个瓶颈，是一种高效且无需外部黑盒模型的零样本解决方案。

title: Crystal structure prediction using graph neural combinatorial optimization
summary: Crystalline materials are widely used in technological applications, yet their discovery remains a significant challenge. As their properties are driven by structure, crystal structure prediction (CSP) methods play a central role in computational approaches aiming to accelerate this process. Previously, CSP has been approached from a combinatorial optimization perspective, with the core challenge of allocating atoms on a fine grid of predefined discrete positions within a unit cell while minimizing their interaction energy. Exact mathematical optimization methods provide guaranteed solutions, but they become computationally expensive for large-scale instances, where the atomic configuration space grows rapidly, particularly in the absence of additional symmetry constraints. In this work, we introduce a neural combinatorial optimization approach to the atom allocation challenge and, subsequently, CSP, based on graph neural networks (GNNs), which can effectively sample from the distribution of feasible structures in an unsupervised manner. We leverage expander graphs to construct computational graphs over discrete positions that capture both short- and long-range interactions between atoms, and employ the Gumbel-Sinkhorn approach to enforce the desired stoichiometry of the generated structures. We demonstrate that our method outperforms classical heuristic approaches and is competitive with a commercial optimization solver across a range of chemical compositions. This enables the use of ever-expanding GPU infrastructure to tackle the inherent combinatorial challenges of CSP, paving the way for scaling beyond current capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的神经组合优化方法，用于晶体结构预测（CSP）中的原子分配问题。该方法利用扩展图构建计算图以捕获长短程原子相互作用，采用Gumbel-Sinkhorn方法强制生成结构的化学计量比，在无监督情况下从可行结构分布中采样。实验表明该方法优于经典启发式方法，与商业优化求解器竞争力相当。
AI.motivation: 晶体结构预测（CSP）是材料发现的核心挑战，传统组合优化方法在原子配置空间增长时计算开销巨大，缺乏有效的大规模求解方法，亟需更高效的求解策略。
AI.method: 提出基于GNN的神经组合优化方法：1) 利用扩展图在离散位置上构建计算图，同时捕捉原子间短程和长程交互；2) 采用Gumbel-Sinkhorn方法作为可微排列操作，实现无监督学习并强制满足化学计量比约束；3) 通过神经网络从可行结构分布中高效采样。
AI.result: 该方法在多种化学成分上优于经典启发式算法，性能与商业优化求解器相当，展示了利用GPU基础设施解决CSP中组合优化挑战的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 神经组合优化方法为CSP提供了可扩展的新范式，可充分利用GPU算力扩展至更大规模的晶体结构预测任务。

title: K-MetBench: A Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Fine-Grained Evaluation of Expert Reasoning, Locality, and Multimodality in Meteorology
comment: 39 pages, 32 figures, 14 tables, including appendices. Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: The development of practical (multimodal) large language model assistants for Korean weather forecasters is hindered by the absence of a multidimensional, expert-level evaluation framework grounded in authoritative sources. To address this, we introduce K-MetBench, a diagnostic benchmark grounded in national qualification exams. It exposes critical gaps across four dimensions: expert visual reasoning of charts, logical validity via expert-verified rationales, Korean-specific geo-cultural comprehension, and fine-grained domain analysis. Our evaluation of 55 models reveals a profound modality gap in interpreting specialized diagrams and a reasoning gap where models hallucinate logic despite correct predictions. Crucially, Korean models outperform significantly larger global models in local contexts, demonstrating that parameter scaling alone cannot resolve cultural dependencies. K-MetBench serves as a roadmap for developing reliable, culturally aware expert AI agents. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/soyeonbot/K-MetBench .

AI.tldr: K-MetBench是一个基于韩国国家资格考试的气象领域多模态诊断基准，评估了55个模型在专家视觉推理、逻辑有效性、韩国地理文化理解和细粒度领域分析四个维度上的表现，发现全球大模型在本地气象图表理解和文化依赖场景中存在明显短板。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏基于权威气象知识的多维专家级评估框架，导致多模态大语言模型在韩国气象预报场景中的实际可用性难以评估。
AI.method: 基于韩国国家资格考试构建K-MetBench诊断基准，从专家视觉图表推理、专家验证的逻辑合理性、韩国特定地理文化理解、细粒度领域分析四个维度评估55个模型。
AI.result: 揭示了模态差距（模型难以解读专业图表）和推理差距（模型在正确答案下仍会幻觉逻辑）；韩国本土模型在本地语境中显著优于参数更大的全球模型，表明单纯扩大参数规模无法解决文化依赖性。
AI.conclusion: K-MetBench可作为开发可靠且具有文化意识的气象AI助手的路线图。

title: AusSmoke meets MultiNatSmoke: a fully-labelled diverse smoke segmentation dataset
summary: Wildfires are an escalating global concern due to the devastating impacts on the environment, economy, and human health, with notable incidents such as the 2019-2020 Australian bushfires and the 2025 California wildfires underscoring the severity of these events. AI-enabled camera-based smoke detection has emerged as a promising approach for the rapid detection of wildfires. However, existing wildfire smoke segmentation datasets that are used for training detection and segmentation models are limited in scale, geographically constrained, and often rely on synthetic imagery, which hinders effective training and generalization. To overcome these limitations, we present AusSmoke, a new smoke segmentation dataset collected from Australia to address the data scarcity in this region. Furthermore, we introduce a MultiNational geographically diverse and substantially larger fully-labelled benchmark, called MultiNatSmoke, that consolidates publicly available international datasets with the newly collected Australian imagery, expanding the scale by an order of magnitude over previous collections. Finally, we benchmark smoke segmentation models, demonstrating improved performance and enhanced generalization across diverse geographical contexts. The project is available at \href{https://github.com/henryzhao0615/MultiNatSmoke}{Github}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AusSmoke（澳大利亚烟雾分割数据集）和MultiNatSmoke（多国地理多样化基准），通过整合多个公开数据集大幅扩展了野火烟雾分割的规模，并验证了模型在跨地理场景下的泛化能力提升。
AI.motivation: 现有野火烟雾分割数据集规模有限、地理分布单一、多依赖合成图像，导致模型训练不足、泛化能力差，尤其缺乏澳大利亚地区的数据。
AI.method: 收集澳大利亚真实烟雾图像构建AusSmoke数据集，并将多个公开国际数据集与AusSmoke整合形成MultiNatSmoke基准，规模比之前扩大一个数量级。
AI.result: 在MultiNatSmoke基准上训练的烟雾分割模型性能提升，且跨地理场景的泛化能力显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 大规模、地理多样化的真实数据集能有效提升野火烟雾分割模型的训练效果和泛化能力。

title: Robust and Clinically Reliable EEG Biomarkers: A Cross Population Framework for Generalizable Parkinson's Disease Detection
comment: This is the non anonymized preprint corresponding to the version submitted to ACM Transactions on Computing for Healthcare. It is not the final typeset or accepted version
summary: Developing robust and clinically reliable EEG biomarkers requires evaluation frameworks that explicitly address cross population generalization in multi site settings such as Parkinsons disease (PD) detection. Models trained under i.i.d. assumptions often capture population specific artifacts rather than disease relevant neural structure, leading to poor generalization across clinical cohorts. EEG further amplifies this challenge due to low signal to noise ratio and heterogeneous acquisition conditions. We propose a population aware evaluation framework to assess the robustness and clinical reliability of EEG biomarkers under distribution shift. Using an n gram expansion strategy, we enumerate all cross population train test configurations across five independent cohorts, resulting in 75 directional evaluations. A nested cross validation design with integrated channel selection ensures prospective biomarker identification without population leakage. Results show that cross population transfer is asymmetric and that both accuracy and biomarker stability improve with increasing training population diversity, achieving up to 94.1% accuracy on held out cohorts. A theoretical analysis based on mixture risk optimization and hypothesis space contraction explains these trends, showing that multi population training promotes population robust representations. This work establishes a principled framework for learning robust, generalizable, and clinically reliable EEG biomarkers for multi site biomedical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向人群感知的评估框架，用于在跨群体分布偏移下评估EEG生物标志物的鲁棒性和临床可靠性。通过n-gram扩展策略枚举了五个独立队列间的所有跨人群训练-测试配置（共75个方向评估），并采用嵌套交叉验证和集成通道选择确保无人群泄漏。实验表明跨人群迁移具有不对称性，训练人群多样性提升可提高准确率（最高94.1%）和生物标志物稳定性，理论分析基于混合风险优化和假设空间收缩解释了这一趋势。
AI.motivation: 现有基于i.i.d.假设训练的模型在跨临床队列（如帕金森病检测）中容易捕捉人群特定伪影而非疾病相关神经结构，导致泛化能力差，而EEG信号的低信噪比和异质采集条件进一步加剧了这一问题。
AI.method: 提出了一个"人群感知评估框架"：1) 使用n-gram扩展策略枚举所有跨人群训练-测试配置（5个队列×15种组合=75个方向评估）；2) 采用嵌套交叉验证+集成通道选择实现前瞻性生物标志物识别，避免人群泄漏；3) 结合混合风险优化和假设空间收缩进行理论分析。
AI.result: 1) 跨人群迁移具有不对称性；2) 训练人群多样性增加可同时提升准确率（最高达94.1%）和生物标志物稳定性；3) 理论分析表明多人群训练促进人群鲁棒表示。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为多站点生物医学应用中学习鲁棒、可泛化且临床可靠的EEG生物标志物建立了一个原则性框架，对跨人群泛化评估提供了系统性方法论。

title: RADIANT-LLM: an Agentic Retrieval Augmented Generation Framework for Reliable Decision Support in Safety-Critical Nuclear Engineering
summary:
Reliable decision support in nuclear engineering requires traceable, domain-grounded knowledge retrieval, yet safety and risk analysis workflows remain hampered by fragmented documentation and hallucination when use pre-trained large language model (LLM) in specialized nuclear domains. To address these challenges, this paper presents RADIANT-LLM (Retrival-Augumented, Domain-Intelligent Agent for Nuclear Technologies using LLM), a multi-modal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) framework designed for nuclear safety, security, and safeguards applications. The framework uses a local-first, model-agnostic architecture that pairs a multi-modal document ingestion pipeline with a structured, metadata-rich knowledge base, supporting page- and figure-level retrieval from technical documents. An agentic layer coordinates domain-specific tools, enforces citation-backed responses with provenance tracking, and supports human-in-the-loop validation to reduce hallucination risks.
  To rigorously evaluate this framework, we develop and apply a suite of domain-aware metrics, including Context Precision (CoP), Hallucination Rate (HR), and Visual Recall (ViR), to expert-curated benchmarks derived from Used Nuclear Fuel Storage Facility design guidance. Across varying knowledge base sizes, CoP and ViR remain within an 85--98\% band, and hallucination rates are substantially lower than those observed in general-purpose deployments. When the same queries are posed to commercial LLM platforms without the RAG layer, hallucinations and citation errors increase markedly. These results indicate that a locally controlled, multi-modal RAG framework with domain-specific retrieval and provenance enforcement is necessary to achieve the factual accuracy, transparency, and auditability that nuclear engineering workflows demand.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RADIANT-LLM，一个面向核工程安全、安保与保障领域的多模态检索增强生成（RAG）框架。该框架采用本地优先、模型无关的架构，通过多模态文档处理流水线和元数据丰富的结构化知识库实现页面级和图表级检索，并配备智能体层协调领域工具、强制执行带引用来源的响应，支持人工验证以降低幻觉风险。在乏核燃料贮存设施设计基准测试中，Context Precision和Visual Recall保持在85–98%，幻觉率显著低于通用部署。
AI.motivation: 核工程中的安全与风险分析工作流受限于碎片化文档和通用大语言模型在专业核领域中的幻觉问题，需要可追溯、领域扎根的知识检索来支撑可靠的决策支持。
AI.method: 提出RADIANT-LLM框架：1) 本地优先、模型无关的多模态文档处理流水线（支持页面级和图表级检索）；2) 结构化、元数据丰富的知识库；3) 智能体层协调领域工具、强制执行带引用来源的响应并支持人在回路验证。
AI.result: 在不同知识库规模下，Context Precision和Visual Recall保持在85–98%区间；幻觉率显著低于通用部署的LLM；商用LLM平台在相同查询下出现更多幻觉和引用错误。
AI.conclusion: 本地控制的多模态RAG框架结合领域特定检索和来源强制执行，对于实现核工程工作流所需的事实准确性、透明性和可审计性是必要的。

title: DepthKV: Layer-Dependent KV Cache Pruning for Long-Context LLM Inference
summary: Long-context reasoning is a critical capability of large language models (LLMs), enabling applications such as long-document understanding, summarization, and code generation. However, efficient autoregressive inference relies on the key-value (KV) cache, whose memory footprint grows linearly with sequence length, leading to a major memory bottleneck. To mitigate this overhead, KV cache pruning methods discard cached tokens with low attention scores during inference. Most existing methods apply a uniform pruning ratio across layers, implicitly assuming that all layers contribute equally to overall model performance. We show that this assumption is suboptimal, as layers differ significantly in their sensitivity to pruning. We propose DepthKV, a layer-dependent pruning framework that allocates a fixed global KV budget across layers based on their sensitivity, rather than using a uniform allocation. Across multiple models and tasks, DepthKV consistently outperforms uniform pruning at the same global pruning ratio, demonstrating more effective utilization of the KV cache budget through layer-dependent allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DepthKV方法，通过层间非均匀分配KV缓存预算（基于各层对剪枝的敏感性），在相同全局剪枝率下优于传统均匀剪枝策略，有效缓解长上下文推理中的内存瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 长上下文推理中KV缓存内存开销随序列长度线性增长，现有剪枝方法假设各层对剪枝的敏感性相同，采用均匀剪枝比例，但这一假设是次优的，因为不同层对剪枝的敏感性存在显著差异。
AI.method: 提出DepthKV，一种层依赖的KV缓存剪枝框架。在固定全局KV预算下，根据各层对剪枝的敏感性差异来非均匀分配预算，而非采用统一的剪枝比例。
AI.result: 在多种模型和任务上，DepthKV在相同全局剪枝率下始终优于均匀剪枝方法，证明层依赖的预算分配能更有效地利用KV缓存。
AI.conclusion: 不同层对KV剪枝的敏感性不同，按层敏感性分配预算比均匀分配更高效，为长上下文推理中的KV缓存优化提供了新思路。

title: COMO: Closed-Loop Optical Molecule Recognition with Minimum Risk Training
summary: Optical chemical structure recognition (OCSR) translates molecular images into machine-readable representations like SMILES strings or molecular graphs, but remains challenging in real-world documents due to inexhaustible variations in chemical structures, shorthand conventions, and visual noise. Most existing deep-learning-based approaches rely on teacher forcing with token-level Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE). This training paradigm suffers from exposure bias, as models are trained under ground-truth prefixes but must condition on their own previous predictions during inference. Moreover, token-level MLE objectives hinder the optimization towards molecular-level evaluation criteria such as chemical validity and structural similarity. Here we introduce Minimum Risk Training (MRT) to OCSR and propose COMO (Closed-loop Optical Molecule recOgnition), a closed-loop framework that mitigates exposure bias by directly optimizing over molecule-level, non-differentiable objectives, by iteratively sampling and evaluating the model's own predictions. Experiments on ten benchmarks including synthetic and real-world chemical diagrams from patent and scientific literature demonstrate that COMO substantially outperforms existing rule-based and learning-based methods with less training data. Ablation studies further show that MRT is architecture-agnostic, demonstrating its potential for broad application to end-to-end OCSR systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMO框架，将最小风险训练（MRT）引入光学化学结构识别（OCSR），通过闭环优化直接优化分子级非可微指标（如化学有效性和结构相似性），缓解了teacher forcing带来的暴露偏差问题，在十个基准上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有OCSR方法采用teacher forcing的token级MLE训练，存在两个问题：1）训练时使用真实前缀但推理时使用自生成前缀导致的暴露偏差；2）token级目标无法直接优化分子级评估指标（如化学有效性、结构相似性）。
AI.method: 提出COMO（Closed-loop Optical Molecule recOgnition）框架，将最小风险训练（MRT）引入OCSR。核心思想是迭代采样模型自身的预测结果，并直接基于分子级非可微目标（如化学有效性、结构相似度）进行优化，从而缓解暴露偏差并实现对分子级指标的端到端优化。
AI.result: 在10个基准（包括合成数据及来自专利和学术文献的真实化学图表）上，COMO以更少的训练数据显著超越现有基于规则和基于学习的方法。消融实验表明MRT架构无关，可广泛应用于端到端OCSR系统。
AI.conclusion: MRT有效解决了OCSR中teacher forcing导致的暴露偏差问题，且架构无关，具有广泛适用性。COMO框架为化学结构识别提供了新的优化范式。
