  We further propose a per-stage evaluation framework pairing each pipeline component with an appropriate benchmark. The code pipeline is publicly available at https://github.com/pritesh-2711/RaV-IDP for experimentation and use.

AI.tldr: RaV-IDP提出了一种文档处理流水线，通过引入"重建作为验证"（Reconstruction as Validation）的架构组件：提取实体后，专用重建器将提取结果还原为可比较的形式，再由比较器评估与原始文档区域的保真度，低分时触发GPT-4.1视觉回溯，从而提供基于原文的质量信号而非模型内部置信度。
AI.motivation: 现有文档提取流水线无法验证提取结果是否忠实于原文，模型内部置信度衡量的是推理确定性而非与原文的对应关系，提取错误会无声传播到下游系统。
AI.method: 提出RaV-IDP架构，包含三个核心组件：1）提取器（提取结构化实体）；2）重建器（将提取结果渲染回与原文可比较的形式）；3）比较器（评估重建与原始文档区域的保真度）。当保真度低于阈值时，触发GPT-4.1视觉回溯并重复验证循环。比较器始终锚定原始文档区域，避免循环验证。
AI.result: 论文未在摘要中给出具体数值结果，但提供了完整的开源代码库（GitHub），并提出了一个分阶段评估框架来分别评测每个流水线组件。
AI.conclusion: RaV-IDP通过重建-比较机制提供了一种无标签的、基于原文的保真度质量信号，打破了传统流水线中提取错误无声传播的局限，并利用大模型视觉能力作为高质量回退方案。

title: A Limit Theory of Foundation Models: A Mathematical Approach to Understanding Emergent Intelligence and Scaling Laws
summary: Emergent intelligence have played a major role in the modern AI development. While existing studies primarily rely on empirical observations to characterize this phenomenon, a rigorous theoretical framework remains underexplored. This study attempts to develop a mathematical approach to formalize emergent intelligence from the perspective of limit theory. Specifically, we introduce a performance function E(N, P, K), dependent on data size N, model size P and training steps K, to quantify intelligence behavior. We posit that intelligence emerges as a transition from finite to effectively infinite knowledge, and thus recast emergent intelligence as existence of the limit $\lim_{N,P,K \to \infty} \mathcal{E}(N,P,K)$, with emergent abilities corresponding to the limiting behavior. This limit theory helps reveal that emergent intelligence originates from the existence of a parameter-limit architecture (referred to as the limit architecture), and that emergent intelligence rationally corresponds to the learning behavior of this limit system. By introducing tools from nonlinear Lipschitz operator theory, we prove that the necessary and sufficient conditions for existence of the limit architecture. Furthermore, we derive the scaling law of foundation models by leveraging tools of Lipschitz operator and covering number. Theoretical results show that: 1) emergent intelligence is governed by three key factors-training steps, data size and the model architecture, where the properties of basic blocks play a crucial role in constructing foundation models; 2) the critical condition Lip(T)=1 for emergent intelligence provides theoretical support for existing findings. 3) emergent intelligence is determined by an infinite-dimensional system, yet can be effectively realized in practice through a finite-dimensional architecture. Our empirical results corroborate these theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文从极限理论视角出发，将涌现智能形式化为性能函数在数据规模、模型参数和训练步数趋于无穷大时的极限存在性问题，并通过Lipschitz算子理论证明了极限架构存在的充要条件，推导出基础模型的缩放定律。
AI.motivation: 现有涌现智能研究主要依赖经验观察，缺乏严格的理论框架。本文试图从极限理论的数学视角形式化涌现智能现象，建立严谨的理论基础。
AI.method: 1）提出性能函数 E(N, P, K) 将涌现智能定义为极限存在性；2）引入非线性Lipschitz算子理论，证明极限架构存在的充要条件；3）利用Lipschitz算子与覆盖数推导缩放定律。
AI.result: 1）涌现智能由训练步数、数据规模和模型架构三个关键因素共同决定，基础模块的性质对构建基础模型至关重要；2）涌现智能的临界条件为 Lip(T)=1，为现有发现提供理论支撑；3）涌现智能由无限维系统决定，但可通过有限维架构有效实现。
AI.conclusion: 本文为涌现智能提供了严格的数学理论框架，揭示了涌现现象的本质是参数-极限架构的存在性，并为基础模型的缩放定律提供了理论依据。

title: Secure On-Premise Deployment of Open-Weights Large Language Models in Radiology: An Isolation-First Architecture with Prospective Pilot Evaluation
summary:
Purpose: To design, implement, evaluate, and report on the regulatory requirements of a self-hosted LLM infrastructure for radiology adhering to the principle of least privilege, emphasizing technical feasibility, network isolation, and clinical utility.
  Materials and Methods: The isolation-first, containerized LLM inference stack relies on strict network segmentation, host-enforced egress filtering, and active isolation monitoring preventing unauthorized external connectivity. An accompanying deployment package provides automated isolation and hardening tests. The system served the open-weights DeepSeek-R1 model via vLLM. In a one-week pilot phase, 22 residents and radiologists were free to use 10 predefined prompt-templates whenever they considered them useful in daily work. Afterward, they rated clinical utility and system stability on an 0-10 Likert scale and reported observed critical errors in model output.
  Results: The applied institutional governance pathway achieved approval from clinic management, compliance, data protection and information security officers for processing unanonymized PHI. The system was rated stable and user friendly during the pilot. Source text-anchored tasks, such as report corrections or simplifications, and radiology guideline recommendations received the highest utility ratings, whereas open-ended conclusion generation based on findings resulted in the highest frequency of critical errors, such as clinically relevant hallucinations or omissions.
  Conclusion: The proposed isolation-first on-premise architecture enabled overcoming regulatory borders, showed promising clinical utility in text-anchored tasks and is the current base to serve open-weights LLMs as an official service of a German University Hospital with over 10,000 employees. The deployment package were made publicly available (https://github.com/ukbonn/ukb-gpt).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最小权限原则、网络隔离优先的自托管LLM推理架构，成功在德国大学医院部署了DeepSeek-R1模型处理未匿名化受保护健康信息（PHI），在文本锚定任务中展现出临床实用性，但开放式的结论生成任务存在幻觉等关键错误。
AI.motivation: 解决放射科在临床环境中安全部署LLM面临的监管壁垒和数据隐私问题，特别是处理未匿名化患者数据时需满足严格的合规要求。
AI.method: 采用隔离优先的容器化LLM推理栈，通过严格网络分段、主机强制出口过滤和主动隔离监控防止未授权外部连接；配套部署包提供自动化的隔离和加固测试；使用vLLM部署DeepSeek-R1模型。
AI.result: 系统获得临床管理、合规、数据保护和信息安全官员批准；22名住院医师和放射科医生参与一周试点；文本锚定任务（报告修正/简化、指南推荐）获得最高实用性评分，而开放式结论生成任务出现最高频率的关键错误（临床相关幻觉或遗漏）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的隔离优先本地架构成功跨越监管障碍，在文本锚定任务中展现出有前景的临床实用性，已成为德国某万人员工大学医院提供开源LLM官方服务的当前基础。

title: Geometry-Conditioned Diffusion for Occlusion-Robust In-Bed Pose Estimation
comment: This is the preprint version of the paper. The final version has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 20th IEEE International Conference on Automatic Face and Gesture Recognition (IEEE FG 2026)
summary: Robust in-bed human pose estimation under blanket occlusion remains challenging due to the scarcity of reliable labeled training data for heavily covered poses. Existing approaches rely on multi-modal sensing or image-to-image translation frameworks that remain conditioned on visible source imagery, limiting scalability and pose diversity. In this work, we reformulate occlusion-aware augmentation as a geometry-conditioned generative modeling task. We conduct a systematic comparison of deterministic masking, unpaired translation, paired diffusion-based translation, and a proposed pose-conditioned Latent Diffusion Model (Pose-LDM). Unlike image-guided methods, Pose-LDM synthesizes blanket-covered images directly from skeletal keypoints, eliminating dependence on paired supervision and pixel-level source-image conditioning while enabling generation from arbitrary pose inputs. All augmentation strategies are evaluated through their impact on downstream pose estimation under a fixed backbone. Pose- LDM achieves the highest strict localization accuracy under severe occlusion while maintaining overall detection performance comparable to paired diffusion models, approaching the performance of fully supervised training. These results demonstrate that geometry-conditioned diffusion provides an effective and supervision-efficient pathway toward occlusion-robust inbed pose estimation without modifying the sensing pipeline. The code is available at: github.com/navidTerraNova/ GeoDiffPose.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pose-LDM，一种基于姿态条件潜在扩散模型的方法，用于在床人体姿态估计中合成遮挡数据（如被子覆盖），无需配对监督或像素级条件，显著提升了严重遮挡下的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 床上的被褥遮挡导致人体姿态估计缺乏可靠的带标签训练数据，现有方法依赖多模态传感或图像到图像的翻译框架，仍然受限于可见源图像，限制了可扩展性和姿态多样性。
AI.method: 将遮挡感知的数据增强建模为几何条件生成任务，系统比较了确定性掩码、非配对翻译、配对扩散翻译，并提出了Pose-LDM（姿态条件潜在扩散模型）。Pose-LDM直接从骨骼关键点合成被子覆盖图像，无需配对监督和像素级源图像条件。
AI.result: 在严重遮挡下，Pose-LDM取得了最高的严格定位精度，整体检测性能与配对扩散模型相当，接近全监督训练的水平。
AI.conclusion: 几何条件扩散模型为遮挡鲁棒的床上姿态估计提供了一条有效且监督高效的路径，无需修改感知流水线。

title: AgenticCache: Cache-Driven Asynchronous Planning for Embodied AI Agents
summary: Embodied AI agents increasingly rely on large language models (LLMs) for planning, yet per-step LLM calls impose severe latency and cost. In this paper, we show that embodied tasks exhibit strong plan locality, where the next plan is largely predictable from the current one. Building on this, we introduce AgenticCache, a planning framework that reuses cached plans to avoid per-step LLM calls. In AgenticCache, each agent queries a runtime cache of frequent plan transitions, while a background Cache Updater asynchronously calls the LLM to validate and refine cached entries. Across four multi-agent embodied benchmarks, AgenticCache improves task success rate by 22% on average across 12 configurations (4 benchmarks x 3 models), reduces simulation latency by 65%, and lowers token usage by 50%. Cache-based plan reuse thus offers a practical path to low-latency, low-cost embodied agents. Code is available at https://github.com/hojoonleokim/MLSys26_AgenticCache.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgenticCache，一种利用计划局部性原理缓存和复用规划结果来避免逐步骤调用LLM的框架。实验表明，在4个多智能体具身基准测试上，成功率平均提升22%，延迟降低65%，token消耗减少50%。
AI.motivation: 具身AI智能体依赖LLM进行规划时，每步调用LLM导致严重的延迟和高成本，亟需一种高效的规划复用机制来降低计算开销。
AI.method: 提出AgenticCache：1) 运行时缓存存储频繁的计划转移模式；2) 背景缓存更新器异步调用LLM验证和细化缓存条目；3) 利用具身任务中"计划局部性"原理（下一计划可从当前计划预测）。
AI.result: 在4个多智能体具身基准测试×3种模型共12种配置下，任务成功率平均提升22%，仿真延迟降低65%，token使用量降低50%。
AI.conclusion: 基于缓存的计划复用为构建低延迟、低成本的具身智能体提供了一条实用路径。

title: When VLMs 'Fix' Students: Identifying and Penalizing Over-Correction in the Evaluation of Multi-line Handwritten Math OCR
summary: Accurate transcription of handwritten mathematics is crucial for educational AI systems, yet current benchmarks fail to evaluate this capability properly. Most prior studies focus on single-line expressions and rely on lexical metrics such as BLEU, which fail to assess the semantic reasoning across multi-line student solutions. In this paper, we present the first systematic study of multi-line handwritten math Optical Character Recognition (OCR), revealing a critical failure mode of Vision-Language Models (VLMs): over-correction. Instead of faithfully transcribing a student's work, these models often "fix" errors, thereby hiding the very mistakes an educational assessment aims to detect. To address this, we propose PINK (Penalized INK-based score), a semantic evaluation metric that leverages a Large Language Model (LLM) for rubric-based grading and explicitly penalizes over-correction. Our comprehensive evaluation of 15 state-of-the-art VLMs on the FERMAT dataset reveals substantial ranking reversals compared to BLEU: models like GPT-4o are heavily penalized for aggressive over-correction, whereas Gemini 2.5 Flash emerges as the most faithful transcriber. Furthermore, human expert studies show that PINK aligns significantly better with human judgment (55.0% preference over BLEU's 39.5%), providing a more reliable evaluation framework for handwritten math OCR in educational settings.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了多行手写数学公式的光学字符识别（OCR）问题，指出现有视觉语言模型（VLM）存在“过度修正”的失败模式（即模型会“修复”学生的书写错误而非忠实转录），并提出了基于大语言模型（LLM）计分和惩罚过度修正的语义评估指标PINK，实验表明PINK比传统BLEU指标更能对齐人类判断。
AI.motivation: 教育AI系统需要准确转录学生的手写数学作业，但现有基准主要关注单行表达式且依赖BLEU等词汇级指标，无法评估多行学生解答中的语义推理过程；同时发现VLM存在过度修正问题，会隐藏本应被检测到的学生错误。
AI.method: 提出PINK（Penalized INK-based score）评估指标：利用大语言模型（LLM）进行基于评分标准的自动评分，并明确惩罚模型的过度修正行为（即模型擅自纠正学生原始书写内容的情况）。
AI.result: 在FERMAT数据集上评估了15个最先进的VLM，发现PINK与BLEU产生了显著排名逆转：GPT-4o因过度修正被大幅惩罚，而Gemini 2.5 Flash成为最忠实的转录者；人类专家研究显示PINK与人类判断的对齐度（55.0%）显著优于BLEU（39.5%）。
AI.conclusion: PINK为教育场景下的手写数学OCR提供了更可靠的评估框架，揭示了BLEU指标在评估忠实转录任务上的不足。

title: ResAF-Net: An Anchor-Free Attention-Based Network for Tree Detection and Agricultural Mapping in Palestine
summary: Reliable agricultural data is essential for food security, land-use planning, and economic resilience, yet in Palestine, such data remains difficult to collect at scale because of fragmented landscapes, limited field access, and restrictions on aerial monitoring. This paper presents ResAF-Net, a satellite-based tree detection framework designed for large-scale agricultural monitoring in resource-constrained settings. The proposed architecture combines a ResNet-50 encoder, Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP), a feature-fusion stage, a multi-head self-attention refinement module, and an anchor-free FCOS detection head to improve tree localization in dense and heterogeneous scenes. Trained on the MillionTrees benchmark, the model achieved 82% Recall, 63.03% mAP@0.50, and 35.47% mAP@0.50:0.95 on the validation split, indicating strong sensitivity to tree presence while maintaining competitive localization quality. Beyond benchmark evaluation, we implemented the model within a web-based GIS application integrated with Palestinian cadastral data from GeoMolg, enabling tree analysis at scene, parcel, and community levels. This deployment demonstrates the practical feasibility of AI-assisted agricultural inventorying in Palestine. It provides a foundation for data-driven monitoring, reporting, and future species-level analysis of Mediterranean tree crops.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResAF-Net，一种基于卫星图像的树木检测框架，结合ResNet-50、ASPP、多头自注意力机制和FCOS检测头，用于巴勒斯坦等资源受限地区的农业监测，在MillionTrees基准上达到82%召回率和63.03% mAP@0.50，并部署为Web GIS应用。
AI.motivation: 巴勒斯坦地区因地形碎片化、实地访问受限和空中监控限制，难以大规模收集可靠农业数据，亟需一种基于卫星遥感的自动化树木检测方案。
AI.method: 提出ResAF-Net架构，结合ResNet-50编码器、空洞空间金字塔池化(ASPP)、特征融合阶段、多头自注意力精炼模块以及无锚框的FCOS检测头，提升密集异质场景下的树木定位能力。
AI.result: 在MillionTrees基准验证集上达到82%召回率、63.03% mAP@0.50和35.47% mAP@0.50:0.95，并成功部署于结合巴勒斯坦地籍数据的Web GIS应用中。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了AI辅助农业清点在巴勒斯坦的实践可行性，为数据驱动的农业监测、报告以及未来地中海树木作物的物种级分析奠定了基础。

title: End-to-End Learning for Partially-Observed Time Series with PyPOTS
summary: Partially-observed time series (POTS) is ubiquitous in real-world applications, yet most existing toolchains separate missing-value handling from downstream learning, which limits reproducibility and overall performance. This tutorial introduces PyPOTS, an open-source Python ecosystem for end-to-end data mining and machine learning on POTS. We present practical workflows spanning missingness simulation, data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation across core tasks, including imputation, forecasting, classification, clustering, and anomaly detection. The tutorial consists of two parts: Part I emphasizes hands-on application for practitioners through unified APIs and benchmark-oriented experiments. Part II targets developers and researchers, focusing on extending PyPOTS with custom models, domain-specific constraints, and contribution-ready engineering practices. Participants will gain both conceptual understanding and implementation experience for building robust, transparent, and reusable POTS pipelines in research and production settings. PyPOTS is publicly available at https://github.com/WenjieDu/PyPOTS

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了PyPOTS，一个面向部分观测时间序列（POTS）数据的端到端开源Python生态系统，涵盖缺失值模拟、预处理、模型训练与评估的统一工作流，支持插补、预测、分类、聚类和异常检测等核心任务。
AI.motivation: 现有工具链将缺失值处理与下游学习分离，导致可复现性差且整体性能受限，亟需一个统一、可复用的POTS数据处理与学习生态系统。
AI.method: 构建PyPOTS开源库，提供统一API和基准实验，支持自定义模型扩展和领域特定约束，分为面向实践者的应用篇和面向开发者的扩展篇。
AI.result: 提供了从缺失值模拟到评估的完整工作流，覆盖插补、预测、分类、聚类、异常检测等任务，并开源于GitHub。
AI.conclusion: PyPOTS能帮助构建鲁棒、透明、可复用的POTS处理流程，适用于研究和生产场景。

title: Epicure: Multidimensional Flavor Structure in Food Ingredient Embeddings
summary: A chef's intuition about flavor, texture, and cultural identity represents tacit knowledge that is difficult to articulate yet central to culinary practice. We show that this knowledge is already encoded in FlavorGraph's 300-dimensional ingredient embeddings, trained on recipe cooccurrence and food chemistry, and that it can be systematically recovered. An LLM-augmented curation pipeline consolidates 6,653 raw FlavorGraph ingredients into 1,032 canonical entries, substantially strengthening the recoverable structure. We identify at least fifteen independently classifiable dimensions spanning taste, texture, geography, food processing, and culture.

AI.tldr: 本文利用FlavorGraph的食材嵌入（300维），结合LLM辅助的整理流程，从食谱共现和食品化学数据中系统性地恢复了关于味道、质地、文化身份等烹饪隐性知识，并识别出至少15个可独立分类的维度。
AI.motivation: 厨师关于风味、质地和文化身份的直觉是难以言说的隐性知识，但却是烹饪实践的核心。作者想探究这些知识是否已隐含在食材嵌入中并被系统性地提取出来。
AI.method: 使用FlavorGraph的300维食材嵌入（基于食谱共现和食品化学训练），结合LLM增强的整理流程，将6,653个原始食材合并为1,032个规范条目，然后分析嵌入中的可分类维度。
AI.result: LLM整理流程大幅增强了嵌入中可恢复的结构化知识，识别出至少15个独立可分类维度，涵盖味道、质地、地理、加工方式和文化等方面。
AI.conclusion: 烹饪隐性知识已经编码在食材嵌入中，可以通过系统方法恢复，LLM可以辅助知识的整理和结构化。

title: BVI-Mamba: Video Enhancement Using a Visual State-Space Model for Low-Light and Underwater Environments
summary: Videos captured in low-light and underwater conditions often suffer from distortions such as noise, low contrast, color imbalance, and blur. These issues not only limit visibility but also degrade automatic tasks like detection. Post-processing is typically required but can be time-consuming. AI-based tools for video enhancement also demand significantly more computational resources compared to image-based methods. This paper introduces a novel framework, Visual Mamba, designed to reduce memory usage and computational time by leveraging the Visual State Space (VSS) model. The framework consists of two modules: (i) a feature alignment module, where spatio-temporal displacement between input frames is registered in the feature space, and (ii) an enhancement module, where noise removal and brightness adjustment are performed using a UNet-like architecture, with all convolutional layers replaced by VSS blocks. Experimental results show that the Visual Mamba technique outperforms Transformer and convolution-based models in both low-light and underwater video enhancement tasks. Code is available on line at https://github.com/russellllaputa/BVI-Mamba.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Visual Mamba框架，利用Visual State Space (VSS)模型进行低光和水下视频增强，通过特征对齐和U-Net（卷积替换为VSS块）实现降噪、亮度调整，在减少内存和计算时间的同时优于Transformer和卷积模型。
AI.motivation: 低光及水下视频存在噪声、低对比度、颜色失衡等失真问题，不仅影响观感，还损害自动检测任务。现有AI视频增强工具计算资源消耗大（尤其相比图像方法），需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Visual Mamba框架：1）特征对齐模块，在特征空间配准输入帧的时空位移；2）增强模块，采用U-Net架构，将所有卷积层替换为Visual State Space (VSS)块，完成噪声去除和亮度调整。
AI.result: 在低光和水下视频增强任务中，Visual Mamba优于Transformer和基于卷积的模型，同时降低了内存使用和计算时间。
AI.conclusion: Visual State Space模型在视频增强领域展现出高效性和优越性能，为计算资源受限场景下的视频处理提供了可行方案。

title: Generalising maximum mean discrepancy: kernelised functional Bregman divergences
summary: Bregman divergences play a pivotal role in statistics, machine learning and computational information geometry. Particularly in the context of machine learning, they are central to clustering, exponential families, parameter estimation and optimisation, among other things. Despite this, the full toolkit of Hilbert spaces and in particular reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces have not been systematically developed and applied to functional Bregman divergences, where points are functions rather than finite-dimensional parameter vectors. While other types of functional Bregman divergences have been studied, these are typically in a Banach space rather than more directly aligned with kernel methods and Hilbert-space geometry commonly used in machine learning. We consider functional Bregman divergences on a Hilbert space, where the self-dual pairing and Riesz representer afford us particularly convenient calculus. Further specialising Bregman generators as a composition involving a kernel mean embedding makes such divergences easy to estimate. We discuss applications in clustering, universal estimation, robust estimation and generative modelling, and contrast our approach with other types of Bregman divergences.

AI.tldr: 本文在希尔伯特空间中系统发展了泛函Bregman散度，并使用核均值嵌入作为生成器，使其易于估计，并应用于聚类、鲁棒估计和生成建模等领域。
AI.motivation: 尽管Bregman散度在机器学习中广泛应用（聚类、指数族、参数估计等），但完整的希尔伯特空间工具集（尤其是再生核希尔伯特空间）尚未被系统地用于泛函Bregman散度（即点不再是有限维参数向量，而是函数）。现有研究多限于巴拿赫空间，与核方法和希尔伯特空间几何不够紧密。
AI.method: 在希尔伯特空间中定义泛函Bregman散度，利用自对偶配对（self-dual pairing）和Riesz表示器简化计算；特别地，将Bregman生成器设计为核均值嵌入（kernel mean embedding）的复合形式，使得散度的估计变得简单可行。
AI.result: 该方法在聚类、通用估计、鲁棒估计和生成建模等任务中展示了应用价值，并与其他类型的Bregman散度进行了对比分析。
AI.conclusion: 提出了希尔伯特空间上的泛函Bregman散度框架，结合核均值嵌入使其易于实用化，为核方法和信息几何的结合提供了新视角。

title: RCSB PDB AI Help Desk: retrieval-augmented generation for protein structure deposition support
summary:
Motivation: Structural Biologists have contributed more than 245,000 experimentally determined three-dimensional structures of biological macromolecules to the Protein Data Bank (PDB). Incoming data are validated and biocurated by ~20 expert biocurators across the wwPDB. RCSB PDB biocurators who process more than 40% of global depositions face increasing challenges in maintaining efficient Help Desk operations, with approximately 19,000 messages in approximately 8,000 entries received from depositors in 2025.
  Results: We developed an AI-powered Help Desk using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) built on LangChain with a pgvector store (PostgreSQL) and GPT-4.1-mini. The system employs pymupdf4llm for Markdown-preserving PDF extraction, two-stage document chunking, Maximal Marginal Relevance retrieval, a topical guardrail that filters off-topic queries, and a specialized system prompt that prevents exposure of internal terminology. A dual-LLM architecture uses separate model configurations for question condensing and response generation. Deployed in production on Kubernetes with PostgreSQL (pgvector), it provides around-the-clock depositor assistance with citation-backed, streaming responses.
  Availability and implementation: Freely available at https://rcsb-deposit-help.rcsb.org.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于RAG（检索增强生成）的AI客服系统，用于帮助PDB（蛋白质数据库）的沉积者解决数据提交问题，系统使用GPT-4.1-mini、LangChain、pgvector等技术栈，已在生产环境部署。
AI.motivation: 由于PDB数据库已有超过24.5万个实验确定的3D结构，而仅有约20名专家策展人负责处理全球超过40%的数据沉积，导致帮助台面临大量咨询（2025年约19000条消息/8000个条目），传统人工客服效率低下，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 基于RAG架构，采用LangChain框架+pgvector（PostgreSQL）向量存储+GPT-4.1-mini。包含：pymupdf4llm进行Markdown保留的PDF提取、两阶段文档分块、最大边际相关性（MMR）检索、主题防护栏过滤无关查询、专用系统提示防止内部术语暴露。采用双LLM架构分别处理问题浓缩和响应生成。
AI.result: 成功在生产环境（Kubernetes + PostgreSQL/pgvector）部署了24/7全天候沉积者帮助系统，提供带引用来源的流式响应。
AI.conclusion: 该AI客服系统有效提升了PDB数据沉积流程中的帮助台效率，为结构生物学领域提供了可实际使用的自动化支持工具。

title: SolarFCD: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Solar Fault Classification in Photovoltaic Systems
summary: The increasing global deployment of solar photovoltaic (PV) systems needs robust, scalable, and automated inspection technologies capable of detecting a wide range of panel flaws under a variety of operating situations. The lack of large-scale, multi-modal, publicly available annotated datasets is a major obstacle preventing advancement in this field. We introduce SolarFCD, an extensive dataset of solar panel defects created by methodically combining and reconciling three publicly accessible datasets covering two imaging modalities: RGB/Drone images and Thermal Infrared. The dataset consist of 4,435 images arranged under four unified defect classes such as: healthy images, Surface Obstruction, structural fault, and electrical fault. The dataset was divided into training, validation, and test splits at an 80:10:10 ratio through methodical label mapping, near-duplicate removal, and targeted augmentation of minority classes. Sixteen classification architectures from five design families were trained and assessed on the dataset to provide repeatable benchmark baselines. With an accuracy of 86.68%, precision of 88.65%, recall of 88.62%, and F1-score of 88.17%, ResNet101V2 performed the best overall. Per-class results showed balanced detection across all four defect categories within a narrow performance band of less than 1.2 percentage points. To promote open and repeatable research in automated PV inspection and solar energy operations and maintenance, the dataset, annotation files, and baseline code are made openly available.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了 SolarFCD 数据集，整合 RGB/无人机和热红外两种模态的太阳能电池板缺陷图像，统一为四类缺陷标签，并在该数据集上评估了16种分类架构，其中 ResNet101V2 表现最佳（准确率86.68%）。数据集和代码均开源。
AI.motivation: 太阳能光伏系统全球部署日益增多，需要鲁棒、可扩展的自动化检测技术来识别面板缺陷。但缺乏大规模、多模态、公开标注的数据集是阻碍该领域发展的主要障碍。
AI.method: 整合三个公开数据集，覆盖 RGB/无人机和热红外两种成像模态；经过标签映射、近重复去除和少数类增强，构建包含4,435张图像的 SolarFCD 数据集（四类缺陷），并以8:1:1划分训练/验证/测试集；在数据集上训练并评估了16种分类架构。
AI.result: ResNet101V2 表现最佳：准确率86.68%，精确率88.65%，召回率88.62%，F1分数88.17%。所有四类缺陷检测性能差异小于1.2个百分点，表现出均衡的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: SolarFCD 数据集及其基准测试为自动化光伏面板检测研究提供了开源平台，有助于推动太阳能运维领域可重复研究的发展。

title: FreeScale: Distributed Training for Sequence Recommendation Models with Minimal Scaling Cost
comment: 14 pages, 11 figures. Accepted to the 9th MLSys Conference, Bellevue, WA, USA, 2026
summary: Modern industrial Deep Learning Recommendation Models typically extract user preferences through the analysis of sequential interaction histories, subsequently generating predictions based on these derived interests. The inherent heterogeneity in data characteristics frequently result in substantial under-utilization of computational resources during large-scale training, primarily due to computational bubbles caused by severe stragglers and slow blocking communications. This paper introduces FreeScale, a solution designed to (1) mitigate the straggler problem through meticulously load balanced input samples (2) minimize the blocking communication by overlapping prioritized embedding communications with computations (3) resolve the GPU resource competition during computation and communication overlapping by communicating through SM-Free techniques. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that FreeScale achieves up to 90.3% reduction in computational bubbles when applied to real-world workloads running on 256 H100 GPUs.

AI.tldr: FreeScale 通过负载均衡、优先级重叠通信和 SM-Free 技术，在 256 块 H100 GPU 上实现了高达 90.3% 的计算气泡减少，用于优化大规模深度学习推荐模型训练中的资源利用问题。
AI.motivation: 大规模推荐模型训练中，数据异构性导致计算资源严重未充分利用，主要表现为 straggler 和阻塞通信造成的计算气泡问题。
AI.method: 1) 输入样本负载均衡缓解 straggler 问题；2) 优先级嵌入通信与计算重叠减少阻塞通信；3) 通过 SM-Free 技术解决通信与计算重叠时的 GPU 资源竞争。
AI.result: 在 256 块 H100 GPU 的真实工作负载上，计算气泡减少高达 90.3%。
AI.conclusion: FreeScale 有效缓解了大规模推荐模型训练中的计算资源未充分利用问题，显著提升了训练效率。

title: In-Sync: Adaptation of Speech Aware Large Language Models for ASR with Word Level Timestamp Predictions
summary: Recent advances in speech-aware language models have coupled strong acoustic encoders with large language models, enabling systems that move beyond transcription to produce richer outputs. Among these, word-level timestamp prediction is critical for applications such as captioning, media search, and multimodal synchronization, yet it is often handled by external alignment tools. In this work, we extend an existing speech-aware language model to predict timestamps directly alongside transcripts. We introduce a set of novel lightweight training strategies that improve alignment robustness while preserving recognition quality. Experiments across multiple datasets show that these strategies not only enhance timestamp accuracy, but also yield gains in overall ASR performance. Together, they demonstrate an efficient and unified approach to speech recognition with precise timestamp prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了语音感知语言模型，使其能够直接预测词级时间戳，并引入轻量级训练策略来提升对齐鲁棒性和ASR性能。
AI.motivation: 词级时间戳预测在字幕生成、媒体搜索和多模态同步等应用中至关重要，但现有方法通常依赖外部对齐工具，缺乏统一高效的端到端方案。
AI.method: 在已有的语音感知语言模型基础上进行扩展，使其直接输出时间戳；引入一组轻量级训练策略来提升对齐鲁棒性，同时保持识别质量。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，所提策略不仅提升了时间戳预测的准确性，还带来了整体ASR性能的提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了一种统一、高效的语音识别与精确时间戳预测方案。

title: HAC: Parameter-Efficient Hyperbolic Adaptation of CLIP for Zero-Shot VQA
comment: This is the preprint version of the paper. The final version has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026)
summary: Recent advances in representation learning have shown that hyperbolic geometry can offer a more expressive alternative to the Euclidean embeddings used in CLIP models, capturing hierarchical structures and leading to better-organized representations. However, current hyperbolic CLIP variants are trained entirely from scratch, which is computationally expensive and resource-intensive. In this work, we propose HAC (Hyperbolic Adaptation of CLIP), a parameter-efficient framework that enables pretrained CLIP models to transition into hyperbolic space via lightweight fine-tuning. We apply HAC to Visual Question Answering (VQA), where models must interpret visual elements and align them with textual queries. Notably, HAC's training is performed on a dataset with no overlap with any VQA benchmark, resulting in a strict zero-shot evaluation paradigm that underscores HAC's task-agnostic adaptability. We evaluate HAC across a diverse suite of VQA benchmarks spanning General, Reasoning, and OCR categories. Both HAC-S (small) and HAC-B (medium) consistently surpass Euclidean baselines and prior hyperbolic approaches, with HAC-B delivering up to a +1.9 point average improvement over CLIP-B on reasoning-intensive tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/fdibiton/HAC

AI.tldr: 提出HAC，一种参数高效框架，通过对预训练CLIP模型进行轻量级微调使其适应双曲空间，在零样本VQA任务上优于欧几里得基线和之前双曲方法。
AI.motivation: 双曲几何能更表达层次结构，但现有双曲CLIP变体需从头训练，计算成本高。作者希望用参数高效方式让预训练CLIP模型迁移到双曲空间。
AI.method: 提出HAC框架，对预训练CLIP模型进行轻量级微调以适配双曲空间；在无VQA基准重叠的数据集上训练，实现严格零样本评估。
AI.result: HAC-S和HAC-B在General、Reasoning、OCR类VQA基准上均超越欧几里得基线和先前双曲方法；HAC-B在推理密集型任务上平均提升+1.9点。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效的双曲适应是可行的，能提升CLIP在VQA任务上的表现，尤其在推理方面有显著改进。

title: Explaining Temporal Graph Predictions With Shapley Values
summary: Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) have become increasingly popular in recent years due to their superior predictive performance by combining both spatial and temporal information. However, how these models utilize the information to make predictions is rather unexplored, leading to potentially faulty or biased models. This work introduces two novel model-agnostic explainers for local explanations of TGNNs based on Shapley and Owen values. The first method, an event-level (edge-level) Shapley explainer, applies the KernelSHAP algorithm to estimate contribution scores for individual temporal events, providing interpretable descriptions for model behavior. The second, a feature-level Shapley explainer, extends this framework by decomposing event-level Shapley values into Owen values, and thereby uncovers hierarchical dependencies of the event and its features. The explainers outperform SOTA explainers on different metrics and datasets. Additionally, the Feature Explainer reveals a faulty extraction of actual timestamps of a commonly used TGAT implementation, helping to further understand performance drops on very sparse explanations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种基于Shapley值和Owen值的图神经网络可解释性方法，用于解释时序图神经网络（TGNN）的局部预测。其中事件级Shapley解释器通过KernelSHAP估计时间事件的贡献，特征级Shapley解释器进一步分解为Owen值以揭示事件与特征的层级依赖关系。实验表明该方法优于现有SOTA，并发现了一个TGAT实现中的时间戳提取错误。
AI.motivation: 时序图神经网络在结合时空信息进行预测方面表现出色，但其内部如何利用这些信息进行决策尚未被充分探索，可能导致模型存在潜在错误或偏见。因此需要可解释性方法来理解模型行为。
AI.method: 提出了两种模型无关的局部解释方法：1）事件级（边级）Shapley解释器：基于KernelSHAP算法估计单个时序事件对预测的贡献分数；2）特征级Shapley解释器：将事件级Shapley值分解为Owen值，揭示事件及其特征间的层级依赖关系。
AI.result: 在多个指标和数据集上，所提出的解释器性能优于当前SOTA可解释性方法。此外，特征解释器发现了一个常用的TGAT实现中实际时间戳提取存在错误，有助于理解在极稀疏解释下性能下降的原因。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Shapley和Owen值解释器能有效解释TGNN的局部预测行为，且模型无关的特性使其具有良好的泛化性。同时，可解释性方法还能帮助发现模型实现中的潜在缺陷。

title: A General Framework for Generative Self-supervised Learning in Non-invasive Estimation of Physiological Parameters Using Photoplethysmography
summary: Aligning physiological parameter labels with large-scale photoplethysmographic (PPG) data for deep learning is challenging and resource-intensive. While self-supervised representation learning (SSRL) can handle limited annotated data, the challenge lies in learning robust shared representations from vast unlabeled data and integrating contextual cues to learn distinctive representations. To alleviate these challenges, a generative SSRL framework TS2TC is proposed to utilize the temporal, spectrogram, and temporal-spectrogram mixed domains to explore and incorporate the unique features of PPG for universal and noninvasive physiological parameter estimation. A pretext task named Cross-Temporal Fusion Generative Anchor (CTFGA) is designed, modeling temporal dependencies and reconstructing independent segments at a coarse level to provide robust global feature extraction and local contextual representation. The framework includes sub-signals from PPG with diverse frequency scales and order derivatives reflecting hemodynamics to facilitate learning shared representations at varying semantic levels. Secondly, a cognitive-inspired dual-process transfer (DPT) strategy is formulated, consisting of prior-dependent autonomous processes and posterior observation reasoning processes, to leverage the independent and integrated advantages of shared and specific representations. TS2TC introduces a bilinear temporal-spectrogram fusion method in the mixed domain, aligning latent representations from different domains and establishing fine-grained contextual interactions across multiple sources of information. Extensive experiments on physiological parameter estimation tasks showed that the joint performance of CTFGA and DPT outperforms standard generative learning significantly. TS2TC achieved an average 2.49\% improvement in RMSE over state-of-the-art estimation methods with only 10\% training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TS2TC框架，一种生成式自监督表征学习方法，利用时域、频谱及时频混合域对PPG信号进行生理参数估计。核心包括跨时融合生成锚点（CTFGA）预文本任务和认知启发的双过程迁移（DPT）策略，在仅用10%训练数据下实现平均2.49%的RMSE改进。
AI.motivation: PPG生理参数标注成本高、资源密集；现有自监督方法难以从大量未标注数据中学习鲁棒的共享表征，且缺乏多源上下文线索的有效整合。
AI.method: 1) 提出TS2TC生成式SSRL框架，融合时域、频谱和时频混合三个域的特征；2) 设计CTFGA预文本任务（粗粒度依赖建模与段重构）；3) 引入DPT双过程迁移策略（先验自主动作+后验观察推理）；4) 提出双线性时频谱融合方法进行跨域对齐。
AI.result: 在生理参数估计任务上，CTFGA+DPT的联合性能显著优于标准生成式学习；仅用10%训练数据，TS2TC在RMSE上平均提升2.49%，超越SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: TS2TC有效解决了PPG数据标注稀缺下的表征学习难题，验证了多域融合与双过程迁移策略在生理信号分析中的有效性。

title: Deploy DINO with Many-to-Many Association
summary: Motivated by the limited generalization of supervised image matching models to unseen image domains, we explore the zero-shot deployment of DINO features for this task. The generalist visual representation extracted from DINO has inherent ambiguity when used to match feature points among semantically similar instances, prompting us to adopt a many-to-many (m-to-m) matching paradigm. However, the existing robust mechanism under m-to-m data association is computationally heavy, which requires finding a maximum-cardinality matching in the inlier association graph for each parameter evaluation. To address this inefficiency, we introduce a novel likelihood perspective, which interprets the existing method as a zeroth-order approximation of otherwise intractable likelihood calculation,and inspires us to propose a faster and finer-grained robust mechanism, termed as Harmonic Consensus Maximization (HCM). Take camera pose estimation as an exemplifying downstream task, we demonstrate that general-purpose visual features, used out of the box without any adaptation, can compete with specialized matching models on out-of-distribution datasets when mated with m-to-m association and the HCM mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Harmonic Consensus Maximization (HCM)机制，将DINO特征与多对多匹配范式结合，实现零样本图像匹配，在相机位姿估计等任务上达到与专用匹配模型竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 监督图像匹配模型对未见过的图像域泛化能力有限，而DINO这类通用视觉特征在语义相似实例间特征点匹配时存在固有的歧义性，需要多对多匹配范式，但现有鲁棒机制计算开销过大。
AI.method: 从似然视角重新解释现有方法（将其视为零阶近似），提出Harmonic Consensus Maximization (HCM)机制，实现更快且更细粒度的鲁棒匹配，并与多对多数据关联结合使用DINO特征。
AI.result: 在相机位姿估计等下游任务上，通用DINO特征搭配多对多匹配和HCM机制，无需任何领域适配即可在分布外数据集上与专用匹配模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: 通用视觉特征（如DINO）结合高效的多对多匹配鲁棒机制（HCM），可以在零样本设置下有效替代专用匹配模型，极大提升跨域泛化能力。

title: Meta-Ensemble Learning with Diverse Data Splits for Improved Respiratory Sound Classification
summary: Training reliable respiratory sound classification models remains challenging due to the limited size and subject diversity of datasets. Ensemble methods can improve robustness, but when base models are trained on identical data, models tend to overfit and produce highly correlated predictions, thereby reducing the effectiveness of ensembling. In this work, we investigate a meta-ensemble learning methodology that enhances prediction diversity by training base models on diverse data splits and combining their outputs through a trained meta-model. Specifically, we train base models on the ICBHI dataset using two data split settings: fixed 80-20% split and five-fold cross-validation split, under two data granularity settings: patient- and sample-level. The resulting diversity in base model predictions enables the meta-model to better generalize. Our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the ICBHI benchmark, reaching a Score of 66.49% and showing improved generalization on two out-of-distribution datasets, indicating its potential applicability to real-world clinical data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种元集成学习方法，通过在ICBHI数据集上使用不同数据划分策略（固定80-20%划分和五折交叉验证）和数据粒度（患者级和样本级）训练基模型，再通过元模型组合其输出，在呼吸音分类任务上达到SOTA（Score 66.49%），并在两个分布外数据集上展现出更好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 呼吸音分类模型面临数据集规模小、受试者多样性有限的问题，集成方法虽能提升鲁棒性，但基模型在相同数据上训练时会产生高度相关的预测，削弱集成效果。本文旨在通过多样化数据划分增强基模型预测多样性，从而提升集成的泛化能力。
AI.method: 使用元集成学习框架：（1）在ICBHI数据集上，采用固定80-20%划分和五折交叉验证两种数据分割设置；（2）结合患者级和样本级两种数据粒度；（3）训练多个基模型使其预测具有多样性；（4）通过一个元模型（trained meta-model）学习如何组合这些基模型的输出。
AI.result: 在ICBHI基准上达到新的SOTA，Score为66.49%；在两个分布外（OOD）数据集上表现出更好的泛化能力，表明该方法对真实临床数据具有潜在适用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多样化数据划分策略增强基模型预测多样性，再以元模型组合输出，能有效提升呼吸音分类的泛化性能和鲁棒性，在实际临床场景中具有应用潜力。

title: Learning to Decipher from Pixels -- A Case Study of Copiale
summary: Historical encrypted manuscripts require both paleographic interpretation of cipher symbols and cryptanalytic recovery of plaintext. Most existing computational workflows rely on a transcription-first paradigm, in which handwritten symbols are transcribed prior to decipherment. This intermediate step is labor-intensive, error-prone, and not always aligned with the goal of direct plaintext recovery. We propose an end-to-end, transcription-free approach that directly maps handwritten cipher images to plaintext. Using the Copiale cipher as a case study, we introduce the first text-line-level dataset pairing cipher images with German plaintext. We show that pretraining on generic handwriting data followed by cipher-specific fine-tuning substantially improves decipherment accuracy. Our results demonstrate that transcription-free image-to-plaintext decipherment is both feasible and effective for historical substitution ciphers, offering a simplified and scalable alternative to traditional pipelines. https://github.com/leitro/Decipher-from-Pixels-Copiale

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端、免转录的历史加密手稿解密方法，直接将手写密文图像映射为明文，以Copiale密码为例验证了可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统加密手稿解密依赖先转录后解密的流水线，转录步骤劳动密集、易出错，且与直接恢复明文的目标不完全对齐。本文旨在消除这一中间步骤。
AI.method: 提出免转录的图像到明文端到端方法，构建了首个行级Copiale密文-德文明文配对数据集，采用通用手写数据预训练+密码特定微调的策略。
AI.result: 通用手写数据预训练后针对密码微调能显著提升解密准确率，证明了免转录图像到明文解密在历史替换密码上的可行性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 免转录的端到端方法是传统转录-解密流水线的简化且可扩展的替代方案，适用于历史替换密码场景。

title: Fed-DLoRA: Efficient Wireless Federated Learning with Dynamic Low-Rank Adaptation
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures. Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology
summary: Federated learning (FL) offers a promising distributed learning paradigm for internet of vehicles (IoV) applications. However, it faces challenges from communication overhead and dynamic environments. Model compression techniques reduce computing and communication burden yet create trade-offs between compression ratios and vehicle participation strategies. In this paper, we propose a lightweight FL algorithm named federated learning with dynamic low-rank adaptation (Fed-DLoRA), which is combined with low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to effectively reduce parameters and communication costs while enhancing training efficiency. The convergence analysis of Fed-DLoRA is conducted through stochastic gradient descent optimization coupled with singular value decomposition. This analysis establishes the theoretical relationships among LoRA rank, vehicular scheduling strategies and the model's convergence characteristics. Building on these insights, we formulate a joint optimization problem aimed at maximizing system performance. To address this problem, we propose an adaptive rank, bandwidth and vehicle selection (ARBVS) algorithm that integrates enumeration with greedy optimization strategies. The algorithm provides efficient rank selection and resource scheduling strategies for each FL communication round, thereby achieving effective performance improvements for the FL system. Experimental results demonstrate that Fed-DLoRA achieves superior performance compared to conventional federated learning approaches, exhibiting enhanced accuracy, faster convergence, and improved communication efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合低秩适应（LoRA）的轻量级联邦学习算法Fed-DLoRA，通过动态低秩适应减少参数量和通信成本，并设计了自适应秩、带宽和车辆选择算法ARBVS来优化系统性能。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在车联网应用中面临通信开销大和动态环境的挑战，模型压缩虽能减少计算和通信负担，但压缩比与车辆参与策略之间存在权衡，需要更优的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Fed-DLoRA算法，将LoRA与联邦学习结合以降低参数和通信成本；通过随机梯度下降与奇异值分解进行收敛性分析；设计ARBVS算法（结合枚举与贪婪优化）自适应选择秩、带宽和车辆，实现资源调度优化。
AI.result: 实验表明Fed-DLoRA相比传统联邦学习方法在准确率、收敛速度和通信效率方面均取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态低秩适应和自适应资源调度策略，有效解决了联邦学习在车联网环境下的通信与效率权衡问题。

title: A Large-Scale, Cross-Disciplinary Corpus of Systematic Reviews
summary: Existing benchmarks for systematic reviewing remain limited either in scale or in disciplinary coverage, with some collections comprising only a modest number of topics and others focusing primarily on biomedical research. We present Webis-SR4ALL-26, a large-scale, cross-disciplinary corpus of 301,871 systematic reviews spanning all scientific fields as covered by OpenAlex. Using a multi-stage pre-processing pipeline, we link reviews to resolved OpenAlex metadata and reference lists and extract, when explicitly reported, structured method artifacts relevant to retrieval and screening. These artifacts include reported search strategies (Boolean queries or keyword lists) that we normalize into executable approximations, as well as reported inclusion and exclusion criteria. Together, these layers support cross-domain benchmarking of retrieval and screening components against review reference lists, training and evaluation of extraction methods for review artifacts, and comparative meta-science analyses of systematic review practices across disciplines and time. To demonstrate one concrete use case, we report large-scale baseline retrieval signals by executing normalized search strategies in OpenAlex and comparing retrieved sets to resolved reference lists. We release the corpus and the pre-processing pipeline, along with code used for extraction validation and the retrieval demonstration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 Webis-SR4ALL-26，一个包含 301,871 篇系统综述的大规模跨学科语料库，涵盖 OpenAlex 中所有科学领域，并提供了检索策略、纳入/排除标准等结构化注释，支持跨领域基准测试和方法提取训练。
AI.motivation: 现有系统综述基准在规模或学科覆盖上存在局限，要么主题数量有限，要么主要聚焦生物医学领域，缺乏跨学科的大规模基准资源。
AI.method: 构建多阶段预处理管道，将系统综述与 OpenAlex 元数据和参考文献列表关联，提取并规范化布尔查询/关键词列表等搜索策略，以及纳入/排除标准，形成结构化语料库。
AI.result: 构建了 301,871 篇系统综述的跨学科语料库，并通过在 OpenAlex 中执行规范化搜索策略与参考文献列表对比，提供了大规模检索基线信号。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库及预处理管道可支持跨领域检索和筛选组件的基准测试、综述人工制品的提取方法训练与评估，以及系统综述实践的跨学科元科学研究。

title: Reading in the Dark: Low-light Scene Text Recognition
summary: Accurate text recognition in low-light environments is essential for intelligent systems in applications ranging from autonomous vehicles to smart surveillance. However, challenges such as poor illumination and noise interference remain underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce LSTR, a large-scale Low-light Scene Text Recognition dataset comprising 11,273 low-light images generated from well-lit datasets (ICDAR2015, IIIT5K, and WordArt), along with ESTR, which includes 60 real nighttime street-scene images in English and Spanish for exclusive evaluation. We explore two solution strategies: (1) employing Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models with fine-tuning and LoRA-based fine-tuning and (2) a joint training strategy that integrates a low-light image enhancement (LLIE) module with an OCR model. In particular, we propose a novel re-render LLIE (RLLIE) module, which demonstrates improved performance on real-world data. Through extensive experimentation, we analyze various training strategies and address a key research question: \emph{How bright is bright enough for effective scene text recognition?} Our results indicate that standalone LLIE or OCR models perform inadequately under low-light conditions, highlighting the advantages of specialized, jointly trained text-centric approaches. Additionally, we provide a comprehensive benchmark to support future research in robust low-light scene text recognition. https://huggingface.co/datasets/lumimusta/Low-light_Scene_Text_Dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LSTR（大规模低光场景文本识别数据集，含11,273张低光图像）和ESTR（60张真实夜间街景图像），并探索了两种解决方案：1）OCR模型微调/LoRA微调；2）联合训练策略（低光图像增强模块+OCR模型）。作者提出RLLIE模块，实验表明单独使用LLIE或OCR在低光下表现不足，而联合训练方法更优。
AI.motivation: 低光环境下的文本识别对于自动驾驶、智能监控等应用至关重要，但目前低光场景文本识别面临光照不足和噪声干扰的挑战，相关研究尚不充分，缺乏大规模基准数据集和系统性的解决方案探索。
AI.method: 1) 构建LSTR和ESTR数据集；2) 对比纯OCR微调/LoRA微调与联合训练（LLIE+OCR）策略；3) 提出可重渲染的低光增强模块RLLIE。
AI.result: 单独使用LLIE或OCR模型在低光条件下表现不佳，联合训练（尤其是RLLIE+OCR）在真实数据上性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 专门设计的、联合训练的文本中心化方法更适用于低光场景文本识别，并提供了基准以推动后续研究。

title: Leveraging Human Feedback for Semantically-Relevant Skill Discovery
comment: Accepted at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026)
summary: Unsupervised skill discovery in reinforcement learning aims to intrinsically motivate agents to discover diverse and useful behaviours. However, unconstrained approaches can produce unsafe, unethical, or misaligned behaviours. To mitigate these risks and improve the practical desireability of discovered skills, recent work grounds the discovery process by leveraging human preference feedback. However, preference-based approaches are feedback-inefficient and inherently ill-equipped to deal with skill spaces composed of a variety of different skills such as running, jumping, walking, etc. To overcome this limitation, we introduce semantic labelling, a novel and feedback-efficient approach that leverages human cognitive strengths to identify and label semantically meaningful behaviours. Based on semantic labelling, we propose Semantically Relevant Skill Discovery (SRSD), a novel human-in-the-loop approach that collects semantic labels from human feedback and learns a reward function to encourage skills to be more semantically diverse and relevant. Through our experiments in a 2D navigation environment and four locomotion environments, we demonstrate that SRSD can improve semantic diversity and discover relevant behaviours while scaling effectively to a large variety of behaviours.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于语义标注的强化学习无监督技能发现方法(SRSD)，通过人类反馈收集语义标签来学习奖励函数，使智能体发现多样且相关的语义行为，在2D导航和四个 locomotion 环境中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督技能发现可能产生不安全/不道德行为，而基于偏好的方法反馈效率低，且难以处理包含多种技能(跑、跳、走等)的技能空间。本文旨在利用人类认知优势，提出一种更高效、更语义化的技能发现方法。
AI.method: 提出语义标注(Semantic Labelling)方法，利用人类反馈对语义上有意义的行为进行标注；基于此提出SRSD框架，收集语义标签并学习奖励函数，鼓励技能在语义上更加多样且相关。
AI.result: 在2D导航环境和4个 locomotion 环境中，SRSD能够提升语义多样性，发现相关行为，并能有效扩展到大量行为种类。
AI.conclusion: 语义标注是一种比偏好反馈更高效的人类引导方式，SRSD框架能有效引导智能体发现语义多样且相关的技能，提升了无监督技能发现的实用性和安全性。

title: Do Protective Perturbations Really Protect Portrait Privacy under Real-world Image Transformations?
summary: Proactive defense methods protect portrait images from unauthorized editing or talking face generation (TFG) by introducing pixel-level protective perturbations, and have already attracted increasing attention for privacy protection. In real-world scenarios, images inevitably undergo various transformations during cross-device display and dissemination--such as scale transformations and color compression--that directly alter pixel values. However, it remains unclear whether such pixel-level modifications affect the effectiveness of existing proactive defense methods that rely on pixel-level perturbations. To solve this problem, we conduct a systematic evaluation of representative proactive defenses under image transformation. The evaluated methods are selected to span different generation architectures such as diffusion and GAN-based models, as well as defense scopes covering both portrait and natural images, and are assessed using both qualitative and quantitative metrics for subjective and objective comparison. Experimental results indicate that defense methods based on pixel-level perturbations struggle to withstand common image transformations, posing a risk of defense failure in real-world applications. To further highlight this risk, we propose a simple yet effective purification framework by leveraging the vulnerabilities induced by real-world image transformations. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently remove protective perturbations with low computational cost, highlighting previously overlooked risks to the research community.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了现有针对肖像图像的主动防御方法（通过像素级扰动防止未经授权的编辑和换脸视频生成）在真实世界图像变换（如缩放、色彩压缩）下的有效性，发现这些方法无法抵御常见变换，并提出了一种简单高效的去扰动净化框架以揭示该风险。
AI.motivation: 现有主动防御方法依赖像素级扰动，但现实场景中图像会经历跨设备传播时的各种变换（缩放、色彩压缩等），这些变换直接改变像素值。目前尚不清楚这类像素级修改是否会影响主动防御方法的有效性，因此需要进行系统评估。
AI.method: 1) 系统评估：选取覆盖不同生成架构（扩散模型、GAN）和防御范围（肖像图、自然图像）的典型主动防御方法，使用定性和定量指标进行评测；2) 提出净化框架：利用图像变换的脆弱性，设计一种低计算成本的净化方法去除防御扰动。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于像素级扰动的防御方法难以抵御常见的图像变换，存在真实场景中失效的风险。提出的净化方法能以低计算成本高效移除防御扰动。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了像素级扰动防御在真实图像变换下的脆弱性，提醒研究社区关注这一此前被忽视的风险。

title: Machine-Learning-Based Classification of Radio Frequency Building Loss
comment: Accepted as a short paper in International Conference on Telecommunications (ICT) 2026
summary: Accurate modeling of outdoor-to-indoor (O2I) and indoor-to-indoor (I2I) signal loss is important for improving indoor wireless network performance in dense urban areas. Traditional on-site measurements are expensive, time-consuming, and difficult to conduct across wide regions. Real-world datasets also tend to be noisy and imbalanced, which makes signal loss prediction challenging. This study presents a machine learning framework for classifying radio frequency (RF) building loss. The framework combines passively collected, crowdsourced user equipment (UE) data from 3GPP-compliant networks with public building information. We evaluated Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, and a voting classifier using both supervised (SL) and semi-supervised learning (SSL). Compared to SL-only inference, the proposed SL and SSL framework improved both prediction accuracy and confidence under identical data constraints, achieving up to 12.6% relative accuracy gain for O2I loss and 3.4% for I2I loss, while reducing prediction entropy by up to 8.4%. Among the evaluated models, SSL XGBoost provided the most confident O2I loss classification, whereas SSL LightGBM achieved the best performance for I2I loss. These results demonstrate that the proposed approach provides a practical, data-driven alternative to traditional models, with promising potential to support better network planning and indoor coverage optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合监督学习和半监督学习的机器学习框架，利用众包用户数据和公共建筑信息对室外到室内（O2I）和室内到室内（I2I）信号损耗进行分类，相比纯监督学习，O2I准确率提升12.6%，I2I提升3.4%，预测熵降低8.4%。
AI.motivation: 传统无线信号损耗测量成本高、耗时长，且现实数据集存在噪声和类别不平衡问题，亟需一种高效、数据驱动的替代方案来改善密集城区室内网络规划与覆盖优化。
AI.method: 利用3GPP网络的被动众包用户设备（UE）数据与公共建筑信息，构建RF建筑损耗分类框架；评估Random Forest、XGBoost、LightGBM及投票分类器，分别使用监督学习（SL）和半监督学习（SSL）两种范式。
AI.result: 半监督学习相比纯监督学习，O2I损耗分类相对准确率提升12.6%，I2I提升3.4%，预测熵降低最高8.4%。SSL XGBoost在O2I上表现最佳，SSL LightGBM在I2I上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法是一种实用的数据驱动替代传统模型的有效方案，具备支持网络规划和室内覆盖优化的潜力。

title: A Pose-only Geometric Constraint for Multi-Camera Pose Adjustment
summary: Multi-camera systems offer rich observation capabilities for visual navigation and 3D scene reconstruction; however, the resulting feature redundancy often compromises computational efficiency. This challenge is particularly pronounced during bundle adjustment, where the non-linear optimization of both system poses and scene points incurs substantial computational overhead. To address this challenge, this paper introduces a pose-only geometric constraint for multi-camera systems and proposes a corresponding pose adjustment algorithm. Specifically, we use generalized camera model to establish a unified representation of the multi-camera system. Building upon this model, we formulate the multi-camera pose-only constraint, which implicitly represents a 3D scene point using two base observations and their associated poses, thereby achieving a pose-only representation of the projection geometry. Subsequently, we introduce a multi-camera pose adjustment algorithm that eliminates 3D points from the parameter space, thereby achieving efficient and focused pose optimization. Experimental results on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms baseline bundle adjustment methods in computational efficiency, while maintaining or even improving pose estimation accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多相机系统在束调整（Bundle Adjustment）中因特征冗余导致计算效率低的问题，提出了一种基于广义相机模型的纯位姿几何约束及对应的位姿调整算法。通过隐式表示3D点，将三维点从参数空间中消除，实现仅优化位姿的高效计算。实验表明，该方法在保持或提升精度的同时，显著提高了计算效率。
AI.motivation: 多相机系统在视觉导航和3D重建中提供丰富观测能力，但传统束调整需要同时优化位姿和场景点，计算开销极大。现有方法缺乏针对多相机系统特点的高效位姿优化方案。
AI.method: 1) 使用广义相机模型统一表示多相机系统；2) 构建多相机纯位姿约束，利用两个基观测及其对应位姿隐式表示3D点；3) 提出多相机位姿调整算法，将3D点从参数空间中消除，仅优化位姿参数。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，所提算法在计算效率上优于传统束调整基线方法，同时保持或提升了位姿估计精度。
AI.conclusion: 纯位姿约束能够有效降低多相机系统束调整的复杂度，在兼顾精度的前提下大幅提升计算效率，为多相机系统的高效优化提供了新思路。

title: Progressive Approximation in Deep Residual Networks: Theory and Validation
summary: The Universal Approximation Theorem (UAT) guarantees universal function approximation but does not explain how residual models distribute approximation across layers. We reframe residual networks as a layer-wise approximation process that builds an approximation trajectory from input to target, and prove the existence of progressive trajectories where error decreases monotonically with depth. It reveals that residual networks can implement structured, step-by-step refinement rather than end-to-end (E2E) black-box mapping. Building on this, we propose Layer-wise Progressive Approximation (LPA), a theoretically grounded training principle that explicitly aligns each layer with its residual target to realize such trajectories. LPA is architecture-agnostic: we observe progressive behavior in residual FNNs, ResNets, and Transformers across tasks including complex surface fitting, image classification, and NLP with LLMs for generation and classification. Crucially, this enables ``train once, use $N$ models": a single network yields useful predictions at every depth, supporting efficient shallow inference without retraining. Our work unifies approximation theory with practical deep learning, providing a new lens on representation learning and a flexible framework for multi-depth deployment. The source code will be released unpon acceptance at https://(open\_upon\_acceptance).

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了层渐进逼近（LPA）训练原则，通过理论证明残差网络能实现逐层误差递减的渐进逼近轨迹，并展示其在不同架构（FNN、ResNet、Transformer）上的有效性，支持单网络多深度部署。
AI.motivation: 通用逼近定理（UAT）保证神经网络可以逼近任意函数，但未能解释残差网络如何跨层分配逼近过程。作者希望从理论上揭示残差网络的分层逼近机制，并利用这一理解设计更高效的训练方法。
AI.method: 1) 理论证明残差网络中存在渐进逼近轨迹，即误差随深度增加单调递减。2) 提出层渐进逼近（LPA）训练原则，显式地将每一层与其残差目标对齐，以实现渐进逼近。LPA是架构无关的，在残差FNN、ResNet、Transformer上均适用。
AI.result: LPA在复杂曲面拟合、图像分类、以及LLM的文本生成和分类任务上均表现出渐进逼近行为。关键结果是实现了"一次训练，N个模型使用"——单个网络在每个深度都能产生有用预测，支持高效的浅层推理而无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将逼近理论与实际深度学习统一起来，为表示学习提供了新视角，并为多深度部署提供了灵活框架。

title: UGAF-ITS: A Standards Harmonization Framework and Validation Tool for Multi-Framework AI Governance in Distributed Intelligent Transportation Systems
summary:
Organizations deploying AI-enabled Intelligent Transportation Systems face fragmented governance: ISO/IEC 42001 demands a certifiable management system, the EU AI Act imposes binding high-risk obligations from August 2026, and the NIST AI Risk Management Framework structures voluntary practice. Each instrument is internally coherent, yet they drive different control vocabularies, evidence expectations, and audit rhythms. In distributed ITS deployments where vehicle manufacturers, roadside integrators, and cloud operators each hold partial evidence and partial accountability, this fragmentation multiplies compliance effort and obscures incident traceability.
  This paper introduces UGAF-ITS, a standards harmonization framework that consolidates 154 source obligations from the three instruments into 12 unified controls across eight governance domains through a reproducible five-phase crosswalk methodology. A three-tier operating model allocates each control to the vehicle, edge, or cloud tier where enforcement and defensible evidence production are feasible. An evidence backbone of 20 versioned artifacts supports a single audit package across all three frameworks without duplicating content.
  We validate UGAF-ITS through an open-source governance engine evaluated across four architecturally distinct ITS deployment scenarios. The engine encodes the complete crosswalk catalog and executes eight compliance computations. Three-tier deployments achieve 91.7% average framework coverage with 45.9% evidence reduction, complete bidirectional traceability, and 80% of artifacts serving all three frameworks simultaneously. Partial deployments degrade gracefully: coverage and reduction scale with architectural complexity. The tool, scenarios, and all reported results are publicly available for independent replication.

AI.tldr: 本文针对AI驱动的智能交通系统（ITS）中ISO/IEC 42001、EU AI Act和NIST AI风险管理框架三个治理标准碎片化的问题，提出了UGAF-ITS框架，通过五阶段交叉映射方法将154项义务整合为12项统一控制，并设计三层（车端-边缘-云）运行模型和证据骨干，实现跨框架合规审计的统一，实验显示三层部署达到91.7%框架覆盖率、45.9%证据量减少及80%工件三框架通用。
AI.motivation: 现有ITS治理中，三个主要标准（ISO/IEC 42001、EU AI Act、NIST AI RMF）各自内部一致但控制术语、证据要求和审计节奏不同，在分布式ITS部署中（车辆制造商、路边集成商、云运营商各持部分证据），这种碎片化导致合规工作量倍增且事件可追溯性模糊。
AI.method: 提出UGAF-ITS框架：1) 五阶段可复现交叉映射方法论，将三个标准共154项义务映射为12项统一控制（跨8个治理域）；2) 三层（车端-边缘-云）运行模型，为每项控制分配可执行和可产生防御性证据的层级；3) 20个版本化工件组成的证据骨干，支持单一审计包覆盖三个框架。
AI.result: 在四种架构不同的ITS场景中评估：三层部署达91.7%平均框架覆盖率、45.9%证据量减少、完全双向可追溯性、80%工件同时服务于三个框架；部分部署性能随架构复杂度优雅退化。
AI.conclusion: UGAF-ITS有效解决了ITS领域AI治理标准碎片化问题，通过统一控制和证据架构显著降低合规成本，且开源工具和场景可独立复现。

title: Large language model-enabled automated data extraction for concrete materials informatics
summary: The promise of data-driven materials discovery remains constrained by the scarcity of large, high-quality, and accessible experimental datasets. Here, we introduce a generalizable large language model (LLM)-powered pipeline for automated extraction and structuring of materials data from unstructured scientific literature, using concrete materials as a representative and particularly challenging example. The pipeline exhibits robust performance across a broad range of LLMs and achieves an $F_1$ score of up to 0.97 for diverse composition--process--property attributes. Within one hour, it extracts nearly 9,000 high-quality records with over 100 attributes screened from more than 27,000 publications, enabling the construction of the largest open laboratory database for blended cement concrete. Machine learning analyses underscore the importance of large, diverse, and information-rich datasets for enhancing both in-distribution accuracy and out-of-distribution generalization to unseen materials. The proposed pipeline is readily adaptable to other materials domains and accelerates the development of scalable data infrastructures for materials informatics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于LLM的自动化管线，用于从科学文献中提取结构化材料数据。在混凝土材料领域，该管线在1小时内从27,000篇论文中提取了近9,000条高质量记录，F1分数高达0.97，并构建了最大的开源混凝土实验室数据库。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的材料发现面临高质量实验数据集稀缺的瓶颈，而大量材料科学知识隐藏在非结构化的学术文献中，亟需自动化提取方法。
AI.method: 提出一个基于LLM的自动化管线，利用大语言模型从非结构化科学文献中提取和结构化材料数据，涵盖成分-工艺-性能等多种属性。
AI.result: F1分数高达0.97；1小时从27,000+篇论文中提取近9,000条高质量记录，构建了最大的开源混凝土实验室数据库。
AI.conclusion: 该LLM管线可泛化到其他材料领域，有助于加速材料信息学中可扩展数据基础设施的建设。

title: Weakly Supervised Multicenter Nancy Index Scoring in Ulcerative Colitis Using Foundation Models
summary:
Histologic assessment of ulcerative colitis (UC) activity is an important endpoint in clinical trials and routine care, but manual grading with indices such as the Nancy histological index (NHI) is time-consuming and prone to observer variability. While computational pathology methods can automate scoring, many approaches depend on dense region-level annotations, which are costly to obtain, particularly in heterogeneous, multicenter cohorts.
  We propose a weakly supervised multiple instance learning (MIL) approach for whole-slide images that learns from case- and slide-level NHI labels, leveraging foundation models. Our method targets clinically relevant endpoints, including neutrophilic activity and derived Nancy-low/high groupings, enabling full five-grade NHI prediction.
  On a multicenter dataset of H&E-stained colon biopsies from three hospitals (2019-2025), we evaluate multiple foundation model encoders and aggregation strategies. We find that foundation model choice and resolution substantially affect performance, with Virchow2 providing the most consistent gains, and that a simple ensembling rule improves five-grade NHI prediction compared to a hierarchical gating baseline.
  Overall, our results demonstrate that weakly supervised MIL with modern foundation-model representations can provide robust, interpretable UC histology activity assessment in realistic multicenter settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于弱监督多实例学习（MIL）的方法，利用基础模型（如Virchow2）从全切片图像中预测溃疡性结肠炎的Nancy组织学指数（NHI）等级，并在多中心数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统的溃疡性结肠炎组织学评估依赖人工评分（如Nancy指数），耗时且存在观察者间变异；已有的计算病理方法需要密集的区域级标注，成本高昂，尤其在异质性多中心队列中难以推广。
AI.method: 采用弱监督多实例学习（MIL）框架，仅使用病例级和切片级的NHI标签进行训练；对比多种基础模型编码器（如Virchow2等）和聚合策略，并通过简单的集成规则提升五级NHI预测性能。
AI.result: 在多中心数据集（2019-2025，来自三家医院）上，基础模型选择和分辨率显著影响性能，其中Virchow2编码器表现最稳定；简单的集成规则在五级NHI预测上优于层次化门控基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督MIL结合现代基础模型表示，能够在现实多中心场景中提供鲁棒、可解释的溃疡性结肠炎组织学活性评估，降低了对密集标注的依赖。

title: Meta-Aligner: Bidirectional Preference-Policy Optimization for Multi-Objective LLMs Alignment
summary: Multi-Objective Alignment aims to align Large Language Models (LLMs) with diverse and often conflicting human values by optimizing multiple objectives simultaneously. Existing methods predominantly rely on static preference weight construction strategies. However, rigidly aligning to fixed targets discards valuable intermediate information, as training responses inherently embody valid preference trade-offs even when deviating from the target. To address this limitation, we propose Meal, i.e., MEta ALigner, a bi-level meta-learning framework enabling bidirectional optimization between preferences and policy responses, generating instructive dynamic preferences for steadier training. Specifically, we introduce a preference-weight-net as a meta-learner to generate adaptive preference weights based on input prompts and update the preference weights as learnable parameters, while the LLM policy acts as a base-learner optimizing response generation conditioned on these preferences with rejection sampling strategy. Extensive empirical results demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on several multi-objective benchmarks, validating the effectiveness of the dynamic bidirectional preference-policy optimization framework.

AI.tldr: 提出Meal框架，通过双层元学习实现偏好与策略之间的双向动态优化，解决多目标对齐中静态偏好权重丢弃有效中间信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用静态偏好权重，丢弃了训练响应中蕴含的有效偏好权衡信息，导致对齐效果受限。
AI.method: 提出Meal（MEta ALigner）双层元学习框架：上层偏好权重网络作为元学习器，根据输入提示生成自适应偏好权重；下层LLM策略作为基学习器，基于偏好权重通过拒绝采样优化响应生成。
AI.result: 在多个多目标基准测试上取得了优于现有方法的性能，验证了动态双向偏好-策略优化框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态双向的偏好-策略优化比静态偏好权重策略更有效，能更好地对齐多样且冲突的人类价值。

title: ZID-Net: Zero-Inference Diffusion Prior Decoupling Network for Single Image Dehazing
comment: Submitted to Neurocomputing. Includes 12 figures and 8 tables
summary: Single image dehazing is often constrained by a trade-off between restoration quality and computational efficiency. While efficient, CNN networks struggle to learn robust priors for dense and non-homogeneous haze. Conversely, diffusion models provide strong generative priors but suffer from severe inference latency and sampling instability. To address these limitations, we propose ZID-Net, a novel framework that explicitly decouples diffusion supervision from feed-forward inference. For efficient inference, we design a frequency-spatial decoupled feed-forward backbone. Within this backbone, a Channel-Spatial Laplacian Mask (CSLM) filters haze-amplified noise to extract purified structural details, while Lightweight Global Context Blocks (LGCBs) establish long-range spatial dependencies to capture the global variations of haze. A Dynamic Feature Arbitration Block (DFAB) then adaptively fuses these semantic and structural features for robust reconstruction. To provide this backbone with physical priors without the inference cost, we introduce a Zero-Inference Prior Propagation Head (ZI-PPH) during training. ZI-PPH leverages a conditional diffusion process to predict residual noise, providing degradation-aware structural supervision to the backbone. By discarding the diffusion branch at test time, ZID-Net integrates diffusion priors into a pure feed-forward architecture for accurate and efficient restoration. ZID-Net achieves 40.75 dB PSNR on the synthetic RESIDE dataset and outperforms existing methods with a 1.13 dB gain on real-world datasets. Additionally, it yields a 3.06 dB PSNR gain on the StateHaze1k remote sensing dataset with an inference time of just 19.35 ms. The project code is available at: https://github.com/XoomitLXH/ZID-Net.

AI.tldr: 提出ZID-Net，通过解耦扩散模型的监督训练与纯前馈推理，在单图像去雾任务中实现了高修复质量（RESIDE上40.75 dB PSNR）与极低推理延迟（19.35 ms）的兼得。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像去雾方法在修复质量与计算效率之间存在权衡：CNN网络高效但难以处理密集非均匀雾霾，扩散模型生成能力强但推理延迟大且采样不稳定。
AI.method: 设计频率-空间解耦的前馈骨干网络（含CSLM提取结构细节、LGCB建立长程依赖、DFAB自适应融合），并引入Zero-Inference Prior Propagation Head（ZI-PPH）在训练阶段通过条件扩散过程提供退化感知的结构监督，测试时丢弃扩散分支实现纯前馈推理。
AI.result: 在合成数据集RESIDE上达到40.75 dB PSNR，在真实世界数据集上比现有方法高出1.13 dB，在遥感数据集StateHaze1k上提升3.06 dB PSNR，推理时间仅19.35 ms。
AI.conclusion: 通过将扩散先验蒸馏到前馈网络中，成功实现了高效且高质量的单图像去雾，验证了训练时用扩散模型提供监督、推理时完全解耦的策略的有效性。

title: CMGL: Confidence-guided Multi-omics Graph Learning for Cancer Subtype Classification
comment: 24 pages, 15 figures, 13 tables, 2 algorithms (main paper + supplementary materials)
summary:
Motivation: Multi-omics integration can improve cancer subtyping, but modality informativeness and noise vary across cancer types and patients. Existing graph-based methods optimize modality weights jointly with the classification objective and therefore lack independent reliability estimates, so low-quality omics distort patient similarity graphs and amplify noise through message passing.
  Results: We propose CMGL, a two-stage framework that estimates per-sample modality reliability through evidential deep learning and uses the frozen confidence scores to guide cross-omics fusion and graph construction. On four MLOmics cancer-subtype tasks and the 32-class pan-cancer task, CMGL consistently improves over the strongest baseline, surpassing it by 4.03% in average accuracy on the four single-cancer tasks. Its representations recover the PAM50 intrinsic subtypes of breast invasive carcinoma (BRCA), and the BRCA-trained model transfers without fine-tuning to kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC), stratifying patients into prognostically distinct groups.

AI.tldr: 提出CMGL框架，通过证据深度学习估计每个样本的模态可靠性，用冻结的置信度分数指导跨模态融合和图构建，在多个癌症亚型任务上取得一致改进。
AI.motivation: 多组学整合能改善癌症亚型分类，但不同癌症类型和患者中模态信息量和噪声水平不同。现有基于图的方法将模态权重与分类目标联合优化，缺乏独立的可靠性估计，导致低质量组学数据扭曲患者相似度图并通过消息传递放大噪声。
AI.method: 两阶段框架CMGL：第一阶段通过证据深度学习估计每个样本的模态可靠性；第二阶段使用冻结的置信度分数指导跨组学融合和图构建，避免低质量模态的噪声传播。
AI.result: 在四个MLOmics癌症亚型任务和32类泛癌任务上，CMGL一致优于最强基线，在四个单癌任务上平均准确率提升4.03%。BRCA训练模型无需微调即可迁移到KIRC，实现预后有差异的患者分层。
AI.conclusion: 独立的模态可靠性估计能有效抑制噪声模态对图学习的负面影响，CMGL框架在癌症亚型分类中展现出显著优势和跨癌种迁移能力。

title: Caries DETR: Tooth Structure-aware Prior and Lesion-aware Dynamic Loss Refinement for DETR Based Caries Detection
summary: As dental caries appear as subtle, low-contrast lesions in intraoral imaging, existing deep learning models face significant challenges in the early detection of caries. While recent Transformer-based detectors have shown promising results in natural images, they often fail to capture the domain-specific anatomical priors crucial for dental caries detection. In this paper, we propose Caries-DETR, a specialized Transformer framework for caries detection in intraoral images. A Tooth Structure-aware Query Initialization (TSQI) is designed, leveraging large-scale intraoral photograph pre-training and a structure perception branch (SPB) to integrate high-frequency structural priors, guiding the model to focus on anatomically significant lesion areas. Furthermore, we design a Lesion-aware Dynamic Loss Refinement (LDLR) to implement quality-driven hard mining through adaptive loss reweighting based on lesion size, anatomical relevance, and prediction quality, optimizing detection for subtle lesions. Extensive experiments on two public datasets (i.e., AlphaDent and DentalAI) demonstrate that Caries-DETR achieves a state-of-the-art performance compared to existing methods and exhibits good generalization and robustness. Code and data at https://github.com/XuefenLiu-SZU/Caries-DETR}{https://github.com/XuefenLiu-SZU/Caries-DETR.

AI.tldr: 提出Caries-DETR，一种面向口腔内窥镜图像的龋齿检测Transformer框架，通过牙齿结构感知查询初始化（TSQI）和病灶感知动态损失优化（LDLR），在两大公共数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型难以捕捉牙齿解剖先验知识，导致早期龋齿检测困难；Transformer检测器在自然图像上表现良好，但无法有效利用口腔图像的特定结构先验。
AI.method: 1) 提出TSQI模块，通过大规模口腔照片预训练和结构感知分支（SPB）融合高频结构先验；2) 设计LDLR机制，基于病灶大小、解剖相关性和预测质量进行自适应损失重加权，实现质量驱动的难例挖掘。
AI.result: 在AlphaDent和DentalAI两个公开数据集上达到SOTA，具有良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 将领域特定的解剖结构先验融入Transformer检测器，可有效提升微小病灶的检测能力。

title: IMPA-Net: Meteorology-Aware Multi-Scale Attention and Dynamic Loss for Extreme Convective Radar Nowcasting
summary: Short-range prediction of convective precipitation from weather radar observations is essential for severe weather warnings. However, deep learning models trained with pixel-wise error metrics tend to produce overly smooth forecasts that suppress intense echoes critical for hazard detection. This issue is exacerbated by insufficient multi-scale feature interaction and suboptimal fusion of heterogeneous geophysical inputs. We propose IMPA-Net (Integrated Multi-scale Predictive Attention Network), a deterministic 0-2 hour nowcasting framework that addresses these limitations through meteorologically-informed designs at the input, architecture, and loss function levels. A parameter-free Spatial Mixer reorganizes heterogeneous input channels at the mesoscale-$γ$ neighborhood (~2 km) via deterministic channel permutation, providing a structured cross-field prior. An integrated multi-scale predictive attention module serves as the spatiotemporal translator, capturing dynamics from mesoscale-$β$ to mesoscale-$γ$ scales. A Meteorologically-Aware Dynamic Loss employs three-level asymmetric weighting -- adapting across training epochs, storm intensity, and forecast lead time -- to counteract regression-to-the-mean. Evaluated against seven baselines on a multi-source radar dataset over eastern China, IMPA-Net raises the Heidke Skill Score at $\geq$45 dBZ from 0.049 (SimVP baseline) to 0.143 under matched settings. Relative to pySTEPS, it provides a better trade-off between severe-event detection and false-alarm control. Spectral analysis confirms preserved energy across mesoscale bands where competing methods show progressive smoothing. These improvements are shown within a single domain and convective regime; generalizability to other orographic and climatic regions remains to be tested.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMPA-Net，一种面向0-2小时对流降水临近预报的确定性深度学习框架，通过气象信息驱动的输入重组织（空间混合器）、多尺度时空注意力机制（集成多尺度预测注意力模块）和三层不对称动态损失函数，在华东地区雷达数据集上显著提升了强回波（≥45 dBZ）的预测技巧评分（HSS从0.049提升至0.143），有效缓解了深度学习降水预报中常见的过度平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习降水临近预报模型使用逐像素误差损失训练，导致预报结果过于平滑、抑制了灾害性天气所需的强回波预测；同时存在多尺度特征交互不足及异构地球物理输入融合不优的问题。
AI.method: 提出了IMPA-Net，包含三个核心设计：（1）参数无关的空间混合器，通过确定性通道置换在约2公里邻域内重组异构输入通道；（2）集成多尺度预测注意力模块，作为时空翻译器捕获从中尺度β到中尺度γ尺度的动态；（3）气象感知动态损失，在训练轮次、风暴强度和预报提前时间三个层面进行非对称加权。
AI.result: 在华东多源雷达数据集上，IMPA-Net在≥45 dBZ的Heidke技巧评分从SimVP基线的0.049提升至0.143；相比pySTEPS实现了更好的严重事件检测与虚警控制权衡；频谱分析表明其在各中尺度频段保持了能量，而对比方法存在渐进平滑。
AI.conclusion: IMPA-Net在单域单对流区划内显著改善了强对流降水临近预报，但泛化性（其他地形和气候区域）仍有待验证。

title: Zoom In, Reason Out: Efficient Far-field Anomaly Detection in Expressway Surveillance Videos via Focused VLM Reasoning Guided by Bayesian Inference
summary: Expressway video anomaly detection is essential for safety management. However, identifying anomalies across diverse scenes remains challenging, particularly for far-field targets exhibiting subtle abnormal vehicle motions. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate strong semantic reasoning capabilities, processing global frames causes attention dilution for these far-field objects and incurs prohibitive computational costs. To address these issues, we propose VIBES, an asynchronous collaborative framework utilizing VLMs guided by Bayesian inference. Specifically, to overcome poor generalization across varying expressway environments, we introduce an online Bayesian inference module. This module continuously evaluates vehicle trajectories to dynamically update the probabilistic boundaries of normal driving behaviors, serving as an asynchronous trigger to precisely localize anomalies in space and time. Instead of processing the continuous video stream, the VLM processes only the localized visual regions indicated by the trigger. This targeted visual input prevents attention dilution and enables accurate semantic reasoning. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that VIBES improves detection accuracy for far-field anomalies and reduces computational overhead, achieving high real-time efficiency and explainability while demonstrating generalization across diverse expressway conditions.

AI.tldr: VIBES是一个异步协作框架，利用贝叶斯推理引导的视觉-语言模型（VLM）解决高速公路视频异常检测中远场小目标识别难、计算开销大的问题。它通过在线贝叶斯模块动态更新正常驾驶行为概率边界，精准触发VLM仅处理局部区域，避免注意力稀释并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在处理高速公路远场异常（如小目标轻微违规行为）时，因处理全局帧导致注意力稀释且计算成本过高；同时不同场景下泛化能力差，缺乏对正常驾驶行为边界的动态适应能力。
AI.method: 1) 在线贝叶斯推理模块：持续评估车辆轨迹，动态更新正常行为概率边界，作为异常触发的时空定位信号；2) 异步协作机制：贝叶斯模块触发后，VLM仅处理局部视觉区域（而非连续视频流），实现精准语义推理。
AI.result: VIBES在远场异常检测精度上显著提升，同时降低计算开销，实现了高实时性和可解释性，并在多种高速公路场景下表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过贝叶斯推理引导的异步VLM协作范式，有效解决了远场小目标异常检测的注意力稀释和计算成本问题，为高速公路视频异常检测提供了高效、可解释且泛化性强的解决方案。

title: GeoEdit: Local Frames for Fast, Training-Free On-Manifold Editing in Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models are a leading paradigm for data generation, but training-free editing typically re-runs the full denoising trajectory for every edit strength, making iterative refinement expensive. To address this issue, we instead edit near the data manifold, where small local updates can replace repeated re-synthesis. To enable this, we estimate a local manifold tangent space directly from perturbed samples and prove that this sample-based estimator closely approximates the true tangent. Building on this guarantee, we devise a Jacobian-free algorithm that constructs a tangent frame via small perturbations to the initial noise and alternates small tangent moves with diffusion-based projections. Updates within this frame follow principled on-manifold directions while suppressing off-manifold drift, enabling fine-grained edits without full re-diffusion or additional training. Edit strength is controlled by the number of steps for rapid, continuous adjustments that preserve fidelity and plug into existing samplers. Empirically, the resulting tangent directions yield smooth, semantic unsupervised traversals and effective CLIP-guided optimization, demonstrating practical interactive continuous editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据流形切空间的无训练扩散模型编辑方法，通过少量扰动估计局部切方向，实现无需完整重去噪的连续、细粒度编辑。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在数据生成中表现卓越，但无训练编辑每次调整编辑强度都需要重新运行完整去噪轨迹，导致迭代优化成本高昂。现有方法缺乏高效的连续编辑能力。
AI.method: 从扰动样本估计局部流形切空间，证明基于样本的估计器可逼近真实切空间；设计无雅可比算法，通过小扰动构建切框架，交替执行切方向移动和扩散投影，抑制离流形漂移。
AI.result: 生成的切方向可实现平滑、语义化的无监督遍历和有效的CLIP引导优化，展示出实用的交互式连续编辑能力，且编辑强度由步数连续控制，保真度高。
AI.conclusion: 在扩散模型中利用流形切空间实现高效连续编辑是可行且有原则性的，无需重训练或完整重去噪，为交互式编辑提供了新范式。

title: Applied AI-Enhanced RF Interference Rejection
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, Accepted to the 2nd IEEE International Conference on AI and Data Analytics (ICAD 2026)
summary: AI-enhanced interference rejection in radio frequency (RF) transmissions has recently attracted interest because deep learning approaches trained on both the signal of interest (SOI) and the signal mixture (SOI plus interference) can outperform traditional approaches which only consider the SOI. The goal is to detect, demodulate, and decode signals over a range of signal-to-interference-plus-noise (SINR) levels without having a detailed, design-level knowledge of the interfering signal or the propagation conditions. Our present AI interference suppression results are based on Autoregressive Transformer Decoder models which exhibit orders of magnitude faster throughput at inference time than WaveNet models developed in earlier work. As a specific example, we investigate an analog FM "Walkie Talkie" radio signal of interest in the presence of an Orthogonal Frequency-Division Multiplexing (OFDM) interferer. This type of interferer is near-ubiquitous in the current RF landscape. Our results clearly show the benefits of transformer-based interference mitigation in tactical settings. We show that unintelligible transmissions become intelligible via metrics such as Perceptual Evaluation of Speech Quality (PESQ), while overall latency is kept to a minimum using readily available lightweight GPUs such as a Jetson AGX Orin. We believe these same techniques can also be applied to a broader set of national security scenarios, as well as having commercial applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自回归Transformer解码器的AI干扰抑制方法，用于射频传输中的信号检测与解调。相比WaveNet模型，该方法推理吞吐量提升数个数量级，在FM对讲机信号受OFDM干扰的场景下显著改善语音可懂度（PESQ指标），并在轻量级GPU上保持低延迟。
AI.motivation: 传统RF干扰抑制方法仅利用感兴趣信号（SOI），而深度学习可结合SOI与混合信号（SOI+干扰）的信息，在无需详细先验知识的情况下实现更优的干扰抑制性能。
AI.method: 采用自回归Transformer解码器模型进行端到端的AI干扰抑制，在推理阶段实现比WaveNet快数个数量级的吞吐量。模型在FM模拟信号（SOI）与OFDM干扰信号混合的场景下进行训练和测试。
AI.result: Transformer模型在PESQ指标上显著提升语音可懂度，使原本不可懂的传输变为可懂，且在Jetson AGX Orin等轻量级GPU上保持低延迟推理。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的AI干扰抑制方法在战术通信场景中效果显著，可推广至国家安全和商业应用领域。

title: Training a General Purpose Automated Red Teaming Model
summary: Automated methods for red teaming LLMs are an important tool to identify LLM vulnerabilities that may not be covered in static benchmarks, allowing for more thorough probing. They can also adapt to each specific LLM to discover weaknesses unique to it. Most current automated red teaming methods are intended for tackling safety and content moderation. Thus, they make use of content safety models as evaluators and optimize for circumventing them, and as such, have not been tested with other adversarial intents not typically captured by these. We propose a pipeline for training a red teaming model that can generalize to arbitrary adversarial goals, including objectives it has not been directly trained on, and that does not depend on the existence of a pre-existing evaluator available at training time. We demonstrate that finetuning small models, such as Qwen3-8B, using this pipeline results in a substantial improvement in their ability to generate attacks for both in and out of domain adversarial goals.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自动化红队流水线，能够训练小模型（如Qwen3-8B）生成针对任意对抗性目标的攻击，且不依赖预定义的安全评估器，在域内和域外目标上均显著提升攻击能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化红队方法主要针对安全和内容审核领域，依赖内容安全模型作为评估器，无法泛化到其他类型的对抗性目标（如隐私泄露、事实性误导等），且需要预先存在评估器。
AI.method: 提出一个流水线，通过微调小模型（如Qwen3-8B）使其能泛化到任意对抗性目标，不依赖预训练评估器，在训练时无需预先存在的安全评估模型。
AI.result: 微调后的Qwen3-8B在域内和域外对抗性目标上均显著提升了攻击生成能力，证明了方法的有效性和泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可脱离安全评估器依赖，使红队模型泛化到任意对抗性目标，扩展了自动化红队的适用范围。

title: ESIA: An Energy-Based Spatiotemporal Interaction-Aware Framework for Pedestrian Intention Prediction
summary: Recent advances in autonomous driving have motivated research on pedestrian intention prediction, which aims to infer future crossing decisions and actions by modeling temporal dynamics, social interactions, and environmental context.
