The goal is to identify which changes improve generalization and which increase complexity without improving performance. The baseline model achieved 79.5\% test accuracy. Extending training duration improved performance steadily, whereas several structural redesigns reduced accuracy despite greater architectural variation. Based on the strongest individual configurations, a weighted ensemble was constructed, achieving 86.38\% accuracy in the reduced-data setting and 89.23\% when trained using the full CIFAR-10 dataset. These results suggest that performance gains in CNN-based classification depend less on indiscriminate increases in depth or parameter count than on careful empirical selection of training and architectural modifications. The study therefore highlights the practical value of ablation-oriented optimization and ensemble learning for small-image classification.

AI.tldr: 本文通过消融实验系统研究了CNN在CIFAR-10图像分类任务中17种架构与训练优化的影响，发现延长训练时间稳定提升性能，而某些结构修改反而降低了准确率。最佳配置的加权集成在完整数据集上达到89.23%准确率，表明性能提升更多依赖于经验性优化而非简单增加模型复杂度。
AI.motivation: 探索CNN在图像分类中哪些架构和训练选择真正提升泛化性能，哪些只是增加复杂度而无实质收益，为实际工程提供指导。
AI.method: 基于CIFAR-10基准，对17种渐进式修改（训练时长、学习率调度、Dropout配置、池化策略、网络深度、滤波器排列、全连接层设计）进行系统消融实验，并构建加权集成模型。
AI.result: 基线准确率79.5%；扩展训练时长持续提升性能；部分结构修改反而降低准确率；加权集成在缩减数据设置下达86.38%，完整数据集下达89.23%。
AI.conclusion: CNN分类性能提升更依赖于精心选择的训练与架构改进，而非盲目增加深度或参数量；消融导向的优化与集成学习对小图像分类具有重要实用价值。

title: An Automatic Ground Collision Avoidance System with Reinforcement Learning
summary: This article evaluates an artificial intelligence (AI)-based Automatic Ground Collision Avoidance System (AGCAS) designed for advanced jet trainers to enhance operational effectiveness. In the continuously evolving field of aerospace engineering, the integration of AI is crucial for advancing operations with improved timing constraints and efficiency. Our study explores the design process of an AI-driven AGCAS, specifically tailored for advanced jet trainers, focusing on addressing the AGCAS problem within a limited observation space. The system utilizes line-of-sight queries on a terrain server to ensure precise and efficient collision avoidance. This approach aims to significantly improve the safety and operational capabilities of advanced jet trainers.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了一种基于AI的自动地面防撞系统（AGCAS），专为高级喷气教练机设计，利用视线查询和有限观测空间来提升飞行安全与操作效能。
AI.motivation: 在航空航天工程中，AI集成对于提升操作的时间约束效率和整体效能至关重要，而现有AGCAS系统在高级喷气教练机上的应用尚需优化，特别是在有限观测空间下的碰撞避免问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种AI驱动的AGCAS，通过在地形服务器上进行视线查询（line-of-sight queries），在有限的观测空间内实现精确高效的碰撞避免。
AI.result: 所提出的AI驱动AGCAS能够有效提升高级喷气教练机的安全性和操作能力。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的AGCAS在航空安全领域具有显著潜力，能够增强高级喷气教练机的作战效能。

title: The Collapse of Heterogeneity in Silicon Philosophers
summary: Silicon samples are increasingly used as a low-cost substitute for human panels and have been shown to reproduce aggregate human opinion with high fidelity. We show that, in the alignment-relevant domain of philosophy, silicon samples systematically collapse heterogeneity. Using data from $N = {277}$ professional philosophers drawn from PhilPeople profiles, we evaluate seven proprietary and open-source large language models on their ability to replicate individual philosophical positions and to preserve cross-question correlation structures across philosophical domains. We find that language models substantially over-correlate philosophical judgments, producing artificial consensus across domains. This collapse is associated in part with specialist effects, whereby models implicitly assume that domain specialists hold highly similar philosophical views. We assess the robustness of these findings by studying the impact of DPO fine-tuning and by validating results against the full PhilPapers 2020 Survey ($N = {1785}$). We conclude by discussing implications for alignment, evaluation, and the use of silicon samples as substitutes for human judgment. The code of this project can be found at https://github.com/stanford-del/silicon-philosophers.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现，在哲学领域，LLMs作为人类样本替代品时，会系统性压缩观点多样性，过度相关不同哲学领域的判断，产生人为共识，并通过DPO微调和大规模调查验证了该发现的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 硅样本（LLMs）正被越来越多地用作人类调查的低成本替代品，但在需要观点多样性的对齐相关领域（如哲学），其保真度尚未得到充分验证。
AI.method: 收集277名专业哲学家的PhilPeople数据，评估7个开源和闭源LLM复制个体哲学立场和跨领域相关结构的能力，并通过DPO微调和在1785人规模的PhilPapers 2020调查上验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: LLMs显著过度相关哲学判断，产生人为的跨领域共识，且这种塌缩部分与专业效应（模型假设领域专家持有高度相似的哲学观点）有关。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs作为硅样本在哲学领域会丢失观点多样性，对齐评估和硅样本应用需谨慎。

title: Risk-Aware Robust Learning: Reducing Clinical Risk under Label Noise in Medical Image Classification
summary: Noisy labels are a pervasive challenge in medical image classification, where annotation errors arise from inter-observer variability and diagnostic ambiguity. Although several noise-robust learning methods have been proposed, their evaluation predominantly relies on accuracy-oriented metrics, overlooking the clinical implications of asymmetric error costs. In medical diagnosis, a false negative (missed disease) carries substantially higher consequences than a false positive (false alarm), as delayed treatment can directly impact patient outcomes. In this work, we investigate whether noise-robust training methods preserve clinical safety under label noise. We conduct a systematic risk-aware evaluation of the state-of-the-art noise-robust methods Coteaching, DivideMix, UNICON, and a GMM-based filtering approach on binarized DermaMNIST and PathMNIST datasets under clean and label noise rates of 20%, and 40%. Beyond balanced accuracy, we adopt a cost-sensitive Global Risk formulation that explicitly penalizes false negatives. Our analysis reveals that the robustness of state-of-the-art methods does not guarantee clinical safety. Furthermore, we demonstrate that integrating cost-sensitive optimization into noise-robust training significantly reduces clinical risk, while mantaining model utility. These findings demonstrate that noise-robust learning must be evaluated through a clinical risk lens, and that combining robust training with cost-sensitive optimization can meaningfully reduce risk in noisy-label medical imaging scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统评估了噪声鲁棒学习方法在医学图像分类中的临床安全性，发现现有方法在保证准确率的同时并不能保证假阴性风险最小化，并提出将代价敏感优化与噪声鲁棒训练结合可有效降低临床风险。
AI.motivation: 现有噪声鲁棒学习方法主要关注准确率指标，忽略了医学诊断中假阴性（漏诊）代价远高于假阳性的临床不对称性，缺乏从临床风险角度评估噪声鲁棒方法的系统性研究。
AI.method: 在DermaMNIST和PathMNIST数据集上，在干净标签及20%、40%噪声率下，系统评估Coteaching、DivideMix、UNICON和GMM滤波方法；采用代价敏感的全局风险公式（Global Risk）显式惩罚假阴性，并与平衡准确率指标对比。
AI.result: 现有噪声鲁棒方法的鲁棒性并不能保证临床安全性；将代价敏感优化融入噪声鲁棒训练可显著降低临床风险，同时保持模型效用。
AI.conclusion: 噪声鲁棒学习必须通过临床风险视角进行评估，将鲁棒训练与代价敏感优化结合能有效降低噪声标签医学影像场景中的临床风险。

title: Advancing Ligand-based Virtual Screening and Molecular Generation with Pretrained Molecular Embedding Distance
summary: Molecular similarity plays a central role in ligand-based drug discovery, such as virtual screening, analog searching, and goal-directed molecular generation. However, traditional similarity measures, ranging from fingerprint-based Tanimoto coefficients to 3D shape overlays, are often computationally expensive at scale or rely on hand-crafted molecular descriptors. Meanwhile, many deep learning approaches to similarity-aware design still depend on similarity-specific supervision or costly data curation, limiting their generality across targets. In this work, we propose pretrained embedding distance (PED) as an effective alternative, computed directly from pretrained molecular models without task-specific training. Experimental results show that PED exhibits distinct correlations with traditional similarity metrics, and performs effectively in both ranking molecules for virtual screening and guiding molecular generation via reward design. These findings suggest that pretrained molecular embeddings capture rich structural information and can serve as a promising and scalable similarity measurement for modern AI-aided drug discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用预训练分子嵌入的距离（PED）作为传统分子相似度度量的高效替代方案，无需任务特定训练即可在虚拟筛选和分子生成中取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 传统分子相似度度量（如指纹Tanimoto系数、3D形状重叠）计算成本高或依赖人工设计的分子描述符，而深度学习方法又需要相似度相关的监督信号或昂贵的数据标注，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 直接利用预训练分子模型的嵌入向量计算距离（PED），无需任何任务特定的训练或微调，作为分子相似度度量。
AI.result: PED与传统相似度指标存在显著相关性，在虚拟筛选的分子排序和基于奖励的分子生成任务中均表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 预训练分子嵌入捕获了丰富的结构信息，可作为一种可扩展且有效的分子相似度度量，适用于现代AI辅助药物发现。

title: IntrAgent: An LLM Agent for Content-Grounded Information Retrieval through Literature Review
summary: Scientific research relies on accurate information retrieval from literature to support analytical decisions. In this work, we introduce a new task, INformation reTRieval through literAture reVIEW (IntraView), which aims to automate fine-grained information retrieval faithfully grounded in the provided content in response to research-driven queries, and propose IntrAgent, an LLM-based agent that addresses this challenging task. In particular, IntrAgent is designed to mimic human behaviors when reading literature for information retrieval -- identifying relevant sections and then iteratively extracting key details to refine the retrieved information. It follows a two-stage pipeline: a Section Ranking stage that prioritizes relevant literature sections through structural-knowledge-enabled reasoning, and an Iterative Reading stage that continuously extracts details and synthesizes them into concise, contextually grounded answers. To support rigorous evaluation, we introduce IntraBench, a new benchmark consisting of 315 test instances built from expert-authored questions paired with literature spanning five STEM domains. Across seven backbone LLMs, IntrAgent achieves on average 13.2% higher cross-domain accuracy than state-of-the-art RAG and research-agent baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了IntraView任务（基于文献的细粒度信息检索）和IntrAgent（模拟人类阅读行为的LLM代理），包含Section Ranking和Iterative Reading两阶段，并在跨5个STEM领域的新基准IntraBench上比SOTA方法平均高出13.2%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 科学研究需要从文献中准确检索信息以支持分析决策，现有方法在处理细粒度、研究驱动的查询时不够精准，因此需要更自动化、更忠实于原文的信息检索方法。
AI.method: 提出IntrAgent，采用两阶段流水线：(1) Section Ranking阶段，通过结构知识推理优先排序相关文献章节；(2) Iterative Reading阶段，迭代提取细节并综合成简洁的上下文相关答案。同时构建了IntraBench基准（315个测试实例，覆盖5个STEM领域）。
AI.result: 在7个骨干LLM上，IntrAgent相比SOTA的RAG和研究代理基线，跨域准确率平均提升13.2%。
AI.conclusion: 模拟人类阅读行为的LLM代理在细粒度文献信息检索任务上效果显著，验证了结构化知识推理和迭代读取策略的有效性。

title: AgentEval: DAG-Structured Step-Level Evaluation for Agentic Workflows with Error Propagation Tracking
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 Industry Track. 14 pages, 3 figures, 21 tables
summary:
Agentic systems that chain reasoning, tool use, and synthesis into multi-step workflows are entering production, yet prevailing evaluation practices like end-to-end outcome checks and ad-hoc trace inspection systematically mask the intermediate failures that dominate real-world error budgets. We present AgentEval, a framework that formalizes agent executions as evaluation directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), where each node carries typed quality metrics assessed by a calibrated LLM judge (GPT-4o), classified through a hierarchical failure taxonomy (3 levels, 21 subcategories), and linked to upstream dependencies for automated root cause attribution. An ablation study isolates the impact of DAG-based dependency modeling: it alone contributes +22 percentage points to failure detection recall and +34 pp to root cause accuracy over flat step-level evaluation with identical judges and rubrics.
  Across three production workflows (450 test cases, two agent model families, predominantly sequential architectures with a 12% non-DAG trace rate), AgentEval achieves 2.17x higher failure detection recall than end-to-end evaluation (0.89 vs. 0.41), Cohen's kappa = 0.84 agreement with human experts, and 72% root cause accuracy against an 81% human ceiling. Cross-system evaluation on tau-bench and SWE-bench traces confirms transferability (failure detection recall >= 0.78) without taxonomy or rubric modification. A 4-month pilot with 18 engineers detected 23 pre-release regressions through CI/CD-integrated regression testing, reducing median root-cause identification time from 4.2 hours to 22 minutes and driving measurable failure rate reductions in two workflows.

AI.tldr: AgentEval是一个将智能体执行过程形式化为评估有向无环图(DAG)的框架，每个节点包含由校准的LLM评判器评估的类型化质量指标，通过层次化故障分类法分类，并链接上游依赖进行自动根因归因。相比端到端评估，故障检测召回率提升2.17倍，根因准确率达72%，并将根因定位时间从4.2小时降至22分钟。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体系统评估方法（端到端结果检查、临场trace检查）系统性掩盖了中间步骤的故障，而这些故障在实际错误预算中占主导地位，导致开发者难以定位和修复问题。
AI.method: 形式化智能体执行为评估DAG，每个节点包含由校准的GPT-4o评判器评估的类型化质量指标；通过3级21子类的层次化故障分类法分类；链接上游依赖实现自动根因归因；依赖消融实验显示DAG建模单独贡献+22%故障检测召回率和+34%根因准确率提升。
AI.result: 在450个测试用例上达到0.89故障检测召回率（vs 0.41端到端评估），Cohen's kappa=0.84与人类专家一致性，72%根因准确率（人类上限81%）；跨系统迁移性良好（召回率>=0.78）；4个月实验检测23个回归问题，根因定位时间从4.2小时降至22分钟。
AI.conclusion: AgentEval通过细粒度、结构化的中间步骤评估和自动根因归因，显著提升智能体系统故障检测和诊断能力，且具有良好的跨系统迁移性和工程实用性。

title: Mammographic Lesion Segmentation with Lightweight Models: A Comparative Study
summary: Breast cancer is a leading cause of cancer-related mortality among women worldwide, with mammography as the primary screening tool. While deep learning models have shown strong performance in lesion segmentation, most rely on computationally intensive architectures that limit their use in resource-constrained environments. This study evaluates the performance and efficiency of lightweight models for mammographic lesion segmentation. Architectures including MobileNetV2, EfficientNet Lite, ENet, and Fast-SCNN were compared against a U-Net baseline using the INbreast dataset with 5-fold cross-validation. Performance was assessed using Dice score, Intersection over Union (IoU), and Recall, alongside model complexity. MobileNetV2 with Squeeze-and-Excitation (SCSE) achieved the best performance, with a Dice score of 0.5766 while using approximately 75\% fewer parameters than U-Net. Cross-dataset evaluation on the DMID dataset showed reduced accuracy due to domain shift but preserved recall. These results demonstrate that lightweight architectures offer a practical balance between performance and efficiency for deployable CAD systems.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了MobileNetV2、EfficientNet Lite等轻量级模型在乳腺X光图像病变分割中的性能，发现MobileNetV2+SCSE以U-Net约25%的参数量达到了Dice 0.5766的最优表现，但跨数据集验证显示域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 大多数深度学习病变分割模型依赖计算密集型架构，限制了其在资源受限环境中的应用，因此需要探索轻量级模型的可行性与性能平衡。
AI.method: 在INbreast数据集上，用5折交叉验证比较MobileNetV2、EfficientNet Lite、ENet、Fast-SCNN等轻量架构与U-Net基线，使用Dice、IoU、Recall评估，并在DMID数据集上进行跨域验证。
AI.result: MobileNetV2+SCSE以0.5766 Dice得分最佳，参数量比U-Net减少约75%；跨数据集测试因域偏移性能下降但召回率保持较好。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级架构在乳腺病变分割中能实现性能与效率的良好平衡，适合部署在资源受限的计算机辅助诊断系统中，但跨域泛化仍需改进。

title: SceneSelect: Selective Learning for Trajectory Scene Classification and Expert Scheduling
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICIC 2026
summary: Accurate trajectory prediction is fundamentally challenging due to high scene heterogeneity - the severe variance in motion velocity, spatial density, and interaction patterns across different real-world environments. However, most existing approaches typically train a single unified model, expecting a fixed-capacity architecture to generalize universally across all possible scenarios. This conventional model-centric paradigm is fundamentally flawed when confronting such extreme heterogeneity, inevitably leading to a severe generalization gap, degraded accuracy, and massive computational waste. To overcome this bottleneck, rather than refining restricted model-centric architectures, we propose selective learning, a novel scene-centric paradigm. It explicitly analyzes the characteristics of the underlying scene to dynamically route inputs to the most appropriate expert models. As a concrete implementation of this paradigm, we introduce SceneSelect. Specifically, SceneSelect utilizes unsupervised clustering on interpretable geometric and kinematic features to discover a latent scene taxonomy. A highly decoupled classification module is then trained to assign real-time inputs to these scene categories, and a highly extensible, plug-and-play scheduling policy automatically dispatches the trajectory sequence to the optimal expert predictor. Crucially, this decoupled design ensures excellent generalization capabilities, allowing seamless integration with different off-the-shelf models and robust adaptation across new datasets without requiring computationally expensive joint retraining. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks (ETH-UCY, SDD, and NBA) demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms strong single-model and ensemble baselines, achieving an average improvement of 10.5%, showcasing the effectiveness of scene-aware selective learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向轨迹预测的场景选择性学习（SceneSelect），通过无监督聚类发现场景类别，并动态将输入路由到最适合的专家模型，在多个基准上平均提升10.5%。
AI.motivation: 传统轨迹预测方法采用单一统一模型应对高度异质的场景（运动速度、空间密度、交互模式差异大），导致严重的泛化差距和计算浪费。作者认为模型中心范式有根本缺陷，需要转向场景中心范式。
AI.method: 提出SceneSelect框架：(1) 利用无监督聚类对可解释的几何和运动学特征进行场景分类；(2) 训练一个解耦的分类模块将实时输入分配到场景类别；(3) 设计即插即用的调度策略将轨迹分配给最优的专家预测器。该框架解耦设计使其可与不同现成模型无缝集成。
AI.result: 在ETH-UCY、SDD、NBA三个基准上，SceneSelect一致优于强单模型和集成基线，平均提升10.5%。
AI.conclusion: 场景感知的选择性学习范式比传统模型中心范式更有效，解耦设计保证了良好的泛化能力，无需联合重训练即可适应新数据集。

title: AMAVA: Adaptive Motion-Aware Video-to-Audio Framework for Visually-Impaired Assistance
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. Published in the Proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Pattern Recognition Applications and Methods (ICPRAM 2026), pages 282--289
summary: Navigational aids for blind and low vision individuals struggle conveying dynamic real-world environments, leading to cognitive overload from continuous, undifferentiated feedback. We present AMAVA, a novel real-time video-to-audio framework that converts mobile device video into contextually relevant sound effects or text-to-speech descriptions. We propose a motion-aware pipeline using a lightweight AI classification model to distinguish between low and high-movement scenes followed by a real-time text-to-audio synthesis pipeline to enhance environmental perception more efficiently. In static environments, AMAVA generates spoken audio scene descriptions for situational awareness. In high-movement situations, it prioritizes safety by delivering sound cues, such as spoken hazard alerts and environmental sound effects. These audio outputs are produced by a decoder-only transformer-based vision-language model with mixture-of-experts and cross-modal attention for visual understanding, in conjunction with neural text-to-speech and natural sound synthesis networks. The proposed framework uses prompt-based caching and category-specific throttling to avoid auditory clutter and minimize latency. We present a comprehensive evaluation of the system, including a real-time navigation study comparing a white cane alone versus with AMAVA, that shows a significant increase in user confidence and perceived safety.

AI.tldr: AMAVA是一个将手机视频实时转换为音频（音效或语音描述）的导航辅助框架，面向盲人和低视力人群。它通过运动感知分类模型区分静态/高动态场景，分别生成场景描述或安全音效，并采用轻量级Transformer视觉语言模型+混合专家+跨模态注意力机制，配合提示缓存和类别限流减少延迟。实验表明相比仅用白手杖，用户信心和安全感显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有盲人导航辅助难以应对动态真实环境，持续无差别的反馈导致认知过载。因此需要一种能根据场景运动状态自适应调整输出类型（描述 vs. 警示音）的实时视频转音频系统，提升环境感知效率且不增加认知负担。
AI.method: 1) 运动感知管道：轻量级AI分类模型区分低/高运动场景；2) 静态场景：生成口语化音频场景描述；3) 高动态场景：生成语音警报和音效；4) 核心模型：基于decoder-only Transformer的视觉语言模型+混合专家(MoE)+跨模态注意力；5) 神经TTS与自然音效合成网络；6) 提示缓存(prompt-based caching)和类别限流(category-specific throttling)减少延迟与听觉杂乱。
AI.result: 在实时导航对比实验（白手杖 vs. 白手杖+AMAVA）中，用户信心和感知安全性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AMAVA通过运动自适应的视频转音频策略，有效降低了认知负荷，在真实导航场景中增强了盲人用户的安全感和信心，验证了面向特殊人群的AI辅助系统的可行性与实际价值。

title: Prior-Agnostic Robust Forecast Aggregation
summary:
Robust forecast aggregation combines the predictions of multiple information sources to perform well in the worst case across all possible information structures. Previous work largely focuses on settings with a known binary state space, where the state is either 0 or 1. We study prior-agnostic robust forecast aggregation in which the aggregator observes only experts' reports, yet is ignorant of both the underlying joint information structure and the full prior, including the underlying state space. Unlike the standard model that fixes the binary state space {0, 1}, we allow the (binary) unknown state values to be arbitrary numbers in [0, 1], so the same reported probability may correspond to very different realized outcome frequencies across environments.
  Our main contribution is a simple, explicit, closed-form log-odds aggregator that linearly pools forecasts in logit space, together with (nearly-)tight minimax-regret guarantees across three knowledge regimes. We first show that under conditionally independent (CI) signals, robust aggregation with an unknown state space is strictly harder than in the known-state setting by establishing a larger lower bound, and our aggregation rule can achieve a worst-case regret of 0.0255. Along the way, we also characterize tight regret bounds for Blackwell-ordered structures and for general information structures. In the classical setting with known state space {0,1}, our aggregator achieves regret strictly below 0.0226 for CI structures. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first explicit closed-form aggregator that achieves a regret upper bound strictly less than 0.0226. Finally, we extend the model where the aggregator additionally knows each expert's marginal forecast distribution; in this setting, with the CI structures, we show that a generalized log-odds rule achieves regret of 0.0228, complementing with a lower bound of 0.0225.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在状态空间未知（二进制状态值可为[0,1]间任意数）情况下的鲁棒预测聚合问题，提出了一种简单的闭式log-odds聚合器（在logit空间线性池化），并在三种知识体制下给出了（近乎）紧的极小极大遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 传统鲁棒预测聚合假设状态空间已知且为{0,1}，但实际中状态空间可能未知且状态值可为任意实数。本文旨在解决这一更实际的设定下的聚合问题。
AI.method: 提出一种简单的闭式log-odds聚合器（在logit空间线性池化），并针对条件独立（CI）信号、Blackwell序结构、一般信息结构三种知识体制进行理论分析。
AI.result: 在未知状态空间下，CI结构下可达0.0255的最坏遗憾；在已知状态空间{0,1}下，首次实现严格低于0.0226的遗憾上界（0.0226）；在已知边际分布+CI结构下，广义log-odds规则可达0.0228遗憾，下界为0.0225。
AI.conclusion: 未知状态空间的鲁棒聚合比已知状态空间更难，但所提log-odds聚合器仍能获得紧的上界保证，是该领域首个达到如此低遗憾的闭式聚合器。

title: 2nd of the 5th PVUW MeViS-Audio Track: ASR-SaSaSa2VA
summary: Audio-based video object segmentation aims to locate and segment objects in videos conditioned on audio cues, requiring precise understanding of both appearance and motion. Recent audio-driven video segmentation methods extend MLLMs by fusing audio and visual features for end-to-end localization. Despite their promise, these approaches are computationally intensive, struggle with aligning temporal audio cues to dynamic video content, and depend on large paired audio-video datasets. To address these challenges, we present ASR-SaSaSa2VA, a resource-efficient framework for audio-guided video segmentation. The key idea is to convert audio inputs into textual motion descriptions via automatic speech recognition (ASR) models and then leverage pre-trained text-based referring video segmentation models (e.g., SaSaSa2VA) for pixel-level predictions. To further enhance robustness, we incorporate a no-target expression detection module, implemented by a fine-tuned audio-based MLLM, which filters out audio clips that do not refer to any target object. This design allows the system to exploit strong pre-trained models while effectively handling ambiguous or irrelevant audio inputs. Our approach achieves a final score of 80.7 in the 5th PVUW Challenge (MeViS-v2-Audio track), earning the second-place ranking.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASR-SaSaSa2VA框架，通过ASR将音频转为文本描述，再利用预训练的文本参考视频分割模型进行像素级预测，并添加无目标表达检测模块过滤无关音频，在MeViS-v2-Audio赛道取得第二名（80.7分）。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动视频分割方法计算量大、难以对齐时序音频与动态视频内容、依赖大规模音视频配对数据，亟需一种资源高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 使用ASR将音频输入转换为文本运动描述；2) 利用预训练的文本参考视频分割模型（SaSaSa2VA）进行像素级预测；3) 引入微调的音频MLLM作为无目标表达检测模块，过滤不指向任何目标对象的音频片段。
AI.result: 在5th PVUW Challenge（MeViS-v2-Audio track）获得80.7分，排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 通过ASR桥接+预训练模型+过滤模块的组合，能有效降低计算资源需求，同时处理模糊或无关音频输入，证明了利用成熟文本模型解决音频视频分割任务的可行性。

title: A Reward-Free Viewpoint on Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
summary: Many sequential decision-making tasks involve optimizing multiple conflicting objectives, requiring policies that adapt to different user preferences. In multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL), one widely studied approach} addresses this by training a single policy network conditioned on preference-weighted rewards. In this paper, we explore a novel algorithmic perspective: leveraging reward-free reinforcement learning (RFRL) for MORL. While RFRL has historically been studied independently of MORL, it learns optimal policies for any possible reward function, making it a natural fit for MORL's challenge of handling unknown user preferences. We propose using the RFRL's training objective as an auxiliary task to enhance MORL, enabling more effective knowledge sharing beyond the multi-objective reward function given at training time. To this end, we adapt a state-of-the-art RFRL algorithm to the MORL setting and introduce a preference-guided exploration strategy that focuses learning on relevant parts of the environment. Through extensive experiments and ablation studies, we demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art MORL methods across diverse MO-Gymnasium tasks, achieving superior performance and data efficiency. This work provides the first systematic adaptation of RFRL to MORL, demonstrating its potential as a scalable and empirically effective solution to multi-objective policy learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将奖励无关强化学习（RFRL）引入多目标强化学习（MORL），利用RFRL的预训练目标作为辅助任务，并设计偏好引导的探索策略，显著提升了MORL的性能和数据效率。
AI.motivation: 多目标强化学习中处理冲突目标和未知用户偏好是一个核心挑战，现有方法通常训练条件策略网络但知识共享有限。作者希望利用RFRL天然能学习任意奖励函数最优策略的特性来增强MORL。
AI.method: 将RFRL的训练目标作为MORL的辅助任务以促进知识共享，并设计了偏好引导的探索策略来聚焦于环境中的相关部分。具体改编了最先进的RFRL算法到MORL场景。
AI.result: 在多个MO-Gymnasium任务上显著优于现有最先进的MORL方法，展现出更优的性能和数据效率。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统地将RFRL适配到MORL，证明了其作为可扩展且经验有效的多目标策略学习方案的潜力。

title: The Limits of Artificial Companionship
comment: Southwestern Journal of International Law (2026, forthcoming)
summary: This Article argues that conversations with companion chatbot should be subject to a clear structural distinction between commercial and non-commercial contexts. The insertion of undisclosed promotional content into affective or relational exchanges should be prohibited, as it collapses the boundary between market transaction and communicative intimacy in ways that erode user autonomy and conversational context. The Article begins by theorizing digital companionship as a sociotechnical form that reconfigures intimacy, dependence and relational vulnerability. It then introduces the potential economic harms derived from conversational advertising. The Article ultimately argues for a firm legal and social distinction between commercial and non-commercial conversational contexts as a precondition for the responsible stabilization of these technologies within social life.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了与陪伴型聊天机器人的对话应在商业与非商业语境之间有明确的结构性区分，禁止在情感或关系交流中插入未披露的促销内容，以保护用户自主性和对话完整性。
AI.motivation: 伴随式AI聊天机器人日益普及，商业利益可能侵蚀用户在亲密对话中的自主权，现有法律和伦理框架对此缺乏清晰界定。
AI.method: 理论分析：将数字陪伴定义为重构亲密关系、依赖性和关系脆弱性的社会技术形式，并引入对话广告可能造成的经济损害概念。
AI.result: 提出商业与非商业对话语境之间的法律和社会区分，作为这些技术在社会中稳定发展的前提条件。
AI.conclusion: 应明确禁止在情感/关系交流中插入未披露的促销内容，建立严格的商业-非商业语境区分以保护用户。

title: GoClick: Lightweight Element Grounding Model for Autonomous GUI Interaction
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) element grounding (precisely locating elements on screenshots based on natural language instructions) is fundamental for agents interacting with GUIs. Deploying this capability directly on resource-constrained devices like mobile phones is increasingly critical for GUI agents requiring low latency. However, this goal faces a significant challenge, as current visual grounding methods typically employ large vision-language model (VLM) (more than 2.5B parameters), making them impractical for on-device execution due to memory and computational constraints. To address this, this paper introduces GoClick, a lightweight GUI element grounding VLM with only 230M parameters that achieves excellent visual grounding accuracy, even on par with significantly larger models. Simply downsizing existing decoder-only VLMs is a straightforward way to design a lightweight model, but our experiments reveal that this approach yields suboptimal results. Instead, we select an encoder-decoder architecture, which outperforms decoder-only alternatives at small parameter scales for GUI grounding tasks. Additionally, the limited capacity of small VLMs encourages us to develop a Progressive Data Refinement pipeline that utilizes task type filtering and data ratio adjustment to extract a high-quality 3.8M-sample core set from a 10.8M raw dataset. Training GoClick using this core set brings notable grounding accuracy gains. Our experiments show that GoClick excels on multiple GUI element grounding benchmarks while maintaining a small size and high inference speed. GoClick also enhances GUI agent performance when integrated into a device-cloud collaboration framework, where GoClick helps cloud-based task planners perform precise element localization and achieve higher success rates. We hope our method serves as a meaningful exploration within the GUI agent community.

AI.tldr: 提出GoClick，一个仅有230M参数的轻量级GUI元素定位VLM，采用encoder-decoder架构和渐进式数据精炼管线，在资源受限设备上实现与大规模模型相当的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 当前的GUI元素视觉定位方法通常依赖参数量超过2.5B的大规模VLM，无法在手机等资源受限设备上高效部署，而用户需要低延迟的GUI代理。
AI.method: 1) 选择encoder-decoder架构替代decoder-only架构，在小参数量下表现更优；2) 提出渐进式数据精炼管线（Progressive Data Refinement），通过任务类型过滤和数据比例调整，从10.8M原始数据中提取3.8M高质量核心集进行训练。
AI.result: GoClick在多个GUI元素定位基准上达到优秀精度，与超过2.5B参数的更大模型性能相当，推理速度快，适合设备端部署。在设备-云协作框架中能提升GUI代理的任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: GoClick证明了在资源受限设备上部署轻量级高精度GUI元素定位模型的可行性，为GUI代理社区提供了有意义的探索方向。

title: Stochastic simultaneous optimistic optimization
comment: Published in International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2013)
summary: We study the problem of global maximization of a function f given a finite number of evaluations perturbed by noise. We consider a very weak assumption on the function, namely that it is locally smooth (in some precise sense) with respect to some semi-metric, around one of its global maxima. Compared to previous works on bandits in general spaces (Kleinberg et al., 2008; Bubeck et al., 2011a) our algorithm does not require the knowledge of this semi-metric. Our algorithm, StoSOO, follows an optimistic strategy to iteratively construct upper confidence bounds over the hierarchical partitions of the function domain to decide which point to sample next. A finite-time analysis of StoSOO shows that it performs almost as well as the best specifically-tuned algorithms even though the local smoothness of the function is not known.

AI.tldr: 本文提出StoSOO算法，在只知道函数局部光滑性（无需预知半度量）的条件下，通过乐观策略和分层划分，实现带噪函数全局最大化的高效求解。
AI.motivation: 传统全局优化算法（如随机搜索、贝叶斯优化）通常需要对函数的全局结构或光滑性有较强假设，或需要预知半度量。本文希望在最弱假设下——仅要求函数在全局最大值附近具有某种局部光滑性——实现高效的全局最大化，且无需提前知道该光滑性度量。
AI.method: 提出StoSOO算法：采用基于分层划分的乐观策略，迭代构建上置信界（UCB），在函数域的分层划分中决定下一个采样点。算法不需要预知半度量，通过自适应的方式在线学习。
AI.result: 有限时间分析表明，StoSOO在未知局部光滑性的情况下，其性能几乎与已知最优超参数的最优专门算法相当，达到了近乎最优的遗憾界。
AI.conclusion: StoSOO提供了一种在噪声环境下进行全局优化的实用方法，具有极强的适应性，能够在缺乏先验光滑性信息时仍保持接近理论最优的性能。

title: AutoRISE: Agent-Driven Strategy Evolution for Red-Teaming Large Language Models
summary: Automated red-teaming methods for large language models typically optimize attack prompts within a fixed, human-designed strategy, leaving the attack strategy itself unchanged. We instead optimize the strategy. We propose AutoRISE, a method that searches over executable attack programs rather than individual prompts. At each iteration, a coding agent edits a strategy and a fixed evaluation harness scores the resulting attacks, returning both a scalar objective and per-example diagnostics that guide subsequent edits. This allows structural changes, including new attack components and altered control flow, that prompt-level methods do not directly express. We also release two benchmark suites developed on disjoint target sets and evaluate on 11 models from five families against seven established jailbreak datasets. Across held-out models, AutoRISE improves average attack success rate by 17.0 points over the strongest baseline, and improves attack success by up to 16 points on frontier targets with low baseline success rates. Ablations against parametric and strategy-library baselines suggest that these gains arise from unrestricted program search, particularly compositional techniques and control-flow edits. AutoRISE operates in a black-box, inference-only setting, requiring no fine-tuning, human annotation, or GPU compute.

AI.tldr: AutoRISE 提出通过编程智能体自动搜索和编辑攻击策略（而非单个提示词）来对LLM进行红队测试，在多个模型和数据集上显著提升了攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有的自动化红队方法只能优化固定策略下的攻击提示词，无法改变攻击策略本身。作者希望突破这一限制，通过搜索可执行的攻击程序来实现策略层面的自动优化。
AI.method: 使用编码智能体迭代编辑攻击策略程序，通过评估工具返回标量目标和每个样本的诊断信息来指导后续编辑。支持结构变更（如新增攻击组件、修改控制流），在黑盒推理设置下运行，无需微调或人工标注。
AI.result: 在11个模型、7个越狱数据集上，相比最强基线平均攻击成功率提高17.0个百分点；在低基线成功率的尖端目标上提升高达16个点；消融实验表明增益来自无限制的程序搜索，特别是组合技术和控制流编辑。
AI.conclusion: AutoRISE通过程序级攻击策略搜索，在无需GPU计算的前提下显著超越了提示词级别的红队方法，为LLM安全评估提供了新的自动化范式。

title: LearnPruner: Rethinking Attention-based Token Pruning in Vision Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable capabilities in visual understanding and reasoning, but they also impose significant computational burdens due to long visual sequence inputs. Recent works address this issue by pruning unimportant visual tokens, achieving substantial computational reduction while maintaining model performance. The core of token pruning lies in determining token importance, with current approaches primarily relying on attention scores from vision encoders or Large Language Models (LLMs). In this paper, we analyze the effectiveness of attention mechanisms in both vision encoders and LLMs. We find that vision encoders suffer from attention sink, leading to poor focus on informative foreground regions, while in LLMs, although prior studies have identified attention bias toward token positions, text-to-vision attention demonstrates resistance to this bias and enables effective pruning guidance in middle layers. Based on these observations, we propose LearnPruner, a two-stage token pruning framework that first removes redundant vision tokens via a learnable pruning module after the vision encoder, then retains only task-relevant tokens in the LLM's middle layer. Experimental results show that our LearnPruner can preserve approximately 95% of the original performance while using only 5.5% of vision tokens, and achieve 3.2$\times$ inference acceleration, demonstrating a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LearnPruner，一种两阶段视觉token剪枝框架，通过分析视觉编码器和LLM中注意力机制的有效性，发现视觉编码器存在注意力汇聚问题，而LLM中文本到视觉的注意力对位置偏差具有抵抗力。该方法首先在视觉编码器后通过可学习剪枝模块移除冗余token，然后在LLM中间层保留任务相关token，仅用5.5%的视觉token即可保留约95%的原始性能，实现3.2倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: VLMs因长视觉序列输入带来巨大的计算负担，现有token剪枝方法主要依赖视觉编码器或LLM的注意力分数来判断token重要性，但缺乏对这两种注意力机制有效性的深入分析。
AI.method: 两阶段token剪枝框架LearnPruner：第一阶段在视觉编码器后使用可学习剪枝模块移除冗余视觉token；第二阶段在LLM中间层利用文本到视觉注意力保留任务相关token。
AI.result: 仅用5.5%的视觉token即可保留约95%的原始性能，实现3.2倍推理加速，在准确率与效率之间取得优异平衡。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了视觉编码器存在注意力汇聚问题而LLM中间层的文本到视觉注意力可有效指导剪枝，验证了两阶段剪枝策略在VLMs中的有效性。

title: Dialysis Risk Prediction and Treatment Effect Estimation for AKI patients using Longitudinal Electronic Health Records
summary: Progression to dialysis or end-stage renal disease is a rare but clinically important outcome. Clinicians need evidence on how medication exposures influence downstream risk. We constructed a fixed-window EHR cohort (90-day observation, 730-day prediction; N=81401; dialysis/ESRD prevalence: 1.1%) and modeled sequences of diagnoses, procedures, and medications with kidney laboratory trends (creatinine, BUN, eGFR). A transformer-based causal multi-head model was trained to estimate drug- and ingredient-level average treatment effects (ATEs) using counterfactual exposure removal and insertion under a full medication history setup. On test set, predictive performance reached an AUC of 0.694 and PR-AUC of 0.094. At the selected decision threshold (0.883), the model achieved an F1 score of 0.201 with a Brier score of 0.018. Post-hoc causal analyses of lab changes (eGFR, creatinine, BUN) using IPTW, AIPW, naive, and covariate-adjusted OLS methods assessed clinical directionality. Results showed partial protective-direction support for ACE/ARB exposures and worsening-direction signals for loop diuretics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用EHR数据（81401名患者）构建基于Transformer的因果多头模型，预测透析/ESRD风险（AUC 0.694），并估计药物级和成分级的平均处理效应，发现ACE/ARB有部分保护作用，袢利尿剂有恶化倾向。
AI.motivation: 透析和终末期肾病是罕见但临床重要的结局，临床医生需要证据来了解药物暴露如何影响下游风险，传统流行病学方法难以处理高维、时序性的EHR数据中的因果推断问题。
AI.method: 构建固定窗口EHR队列（90天观察，730天预测；N=81401），将诊断、程序、药物序列与肾脏实验室趋势（肌酐、BUN、eGFR）建模。采用基于Transformer的因果多头模型，通过反事实暴露移除和插入（在全用药历史设置下）估计药物级和成分级平均处理效应（ATE）。后验因果分析使用IPTW、AIPW、朴素和协变量调整OLS方法评估临床方向性。
AI.result: 测试集AUC为0.694，PR-AUC为0.094；选定决策阈值（0.883）下F1为0.201，Brier分数为0.018。ACE/ARB暴露显示出部分保护方向支持，袢利尿剂显示出恶化方向信号。
AI.conclusion: Transformer因果模型能从EHR数据中挖掘药物对罕见肾脏结局的因果效应，识别出ACE/ARB的保护性信号和袢利尿剂的恶化信号，为临床决策提供数据驱动的证据支持。

title: HeadRouter: Dynamic Head-Weight Routing for Task-Adaptive Audio Token Pruning in Large Audio Language Models
summary: Recent large audio language models (LALMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities in processing extended multi-modal sequences, yet incur high inference costs. Token compression is an effective method that directly reduces redundant tokens in the sequence. Existing compression methods usually assume that all attention heads in LALMs contribute equally to various audio tasks and calculate token importance by averaging scores across all heads. However, our analysis demonstrates that attention heads exhibit distinct behaviors across diverse audio domains. We further reveal that only a sparse subset of attention heads actively responds to audio, with completely different performance when handling semantic and acoustic tasks. In light of this observation, we propose HeadRouter, a head-importance-aware token pruning method that perceives the varying importance of attention heads in different audio tasks to maximize the retention of crucial tokens. HeadRouter is training-free and can be applied to various LALMs. Extensive experiments on the AudioMarathon and MMAU-Pro benchmarks demonstrate that HeadRouter achieves state-of-the-art compression performance, exceeding the baseline model even when retaining 70% of the audio tokens and achieving 101.8% and 103.0% of the vanilla average on Qwen2.5-Omni-3B and Qwen2.5-Omni-7B, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeadRouter，一种基于注意力头重要性感知的音频token剪枝方法。通过识别在不同音频任务中表现差异化的稀疏注意力头子集，在无需训练的情况下实现高效token压缩，在保留70%音频token时性能甚至超过原始模型。
AI.motivation: 现有token压缩方法假设所有注意力头对音频任务贡献相同，通过平均所有头的分数计算token重要性。但作者发现注意力头在不同音频任务（语义vs声学）中行为差异显著，只有稀疏的子集活跃响应音频，因此需要头级别的差异化处理来最大化关键token保留。
AI.method: HeadRouter是一种无需训练的token剪枝方法，核心思想是感知不同音频任务中注意力头的重要性差异。通过识别那些对音频任务活跃响应的稀疏注意力头子集，据此调整token重要性评估，从而在压缩时优先保留对关键头重要的token。
AI.result: 在AudioMarathon和MMAU-Pro基准上，HeadRouter达到SOTA压缩性能。在保留70%音频token时，Qwen2.5-Omni-3B和Qwen2.5-Omni-7B的压缩后性能分别达到原模型的101.8%和103.0%，即压缩后性能反而超过原始模型。
AI.conclusion: 注意力头在不同音频任务中存在显著的行为差异，利用这种差异可以实现更高效的token压缩。HeadRouter证明了无需训练、仅通过头重要性感知即可在压缩的同时保持甚至提升模型性能，为LALM的高效推理提供了新思路。

title: Viewport-Unaware Blind Omnidirectional Image Quality Assessment: A Unified and Generalized Approach
summary: Blind omnidirectional image quality assessment (BOIQA) presents a great challenge to the visual quality assessment community, due to different storage formats and diverse user viewing behaviors. The main paradigm of BOIQA models includes two steps, ie, viewport generation, and quality prediction, which brings an extra computational burden and is hard to generalize to other visual contents (eg, 2D planar image). Thus, in this paper, we make an attempt to solve these issues. First, we experimentally find that BOIQA can be formulated as a blind (2D planar) image quality assessment (BIQA) problem, ie, the first step - viewport generation - is no longer needed, which narrows the natural gap between BOIQA and BIQA. Then, we present a new BOIQA approach, which has three merits: ie, viewport-unaware - it accepts an omnidirectional image in the widely used equirectangular projection format as input without any transformation; unified - it can also be applied to BIQA; and generalized - it shows better generalizability against other competitors. Finally, we validate its promise by held-out test, cross-database validation, and the well-established gMAD competition.

AI.tldr: 本文尝试将盲全景图像质量评估（BOIQA）重新表述为盲平面图像质量评估（BIQA）问题，从而省略视口生成步骤，并提出了一种无需视口、统一且泛化能力更强的BOIQA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有BOIQA方法需要视口生成和质量预测两步，计算负担重且难以泛化到其他视觉内容（如2D平面图像），因此作者尝试简化流程并提升泛化性。
AI.method: 通过实验发现BOIQA可直接作为BIQA问题处理，省略视口生成步骤；提出新方法，可直接以等距柱状投影格式输入全景图像，无需变换，且能统一应用于BIQA。
AI.result: 通过留出测试、跨数据库验证和gMAD竞赛验证了方法的有效性，展示了更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BOIQA可简化为BIQA问题，提出的方法在无需视口生成的同时，实现了统一性和更强的泛化性。

title: GradMAP: Gradient-Based Multi-Agent Proximal Learning for Grid-Edge Flexibility
summary: Coordinating large populations of grid-edge devices requires learning methods that remain fully decentralised in deployment while still respecting three-phase AC distribution-network physics. This paper proposes gradient-based multi-agent proximal learning (GradMAP) to address this challenge. GradMAP trains independent neural-network policies for each agent without any parameter sharing, and each agent uses only its own local observation for online decision-making without communication. During offline training, GradMAP embeds a differentiable three-phase AC power-flow model in a primal-dual learning loop and uses implicit differentiation to propagate exact network-constraint violations to update the policy parameters. To speed up training, GradMAP reuses expensive environment gradients through a proximal surrogate within a trust region defined in the more direct policy-output (action) space, instead of the probability distribution space used in other works, such as PPO. In case studies with 1,000 agents managing batteries, heat pumps, and controllable generators on the IEEE 123-bus feeder, GradMAP learns decentralised policies that minimise three-phase AC load-flow constraint violations within 15 minutes of training on a single workstation-class NVIDIA RTX PRO 5000 Blackwell 48GB GPU. This is a 3--5x training speed-up over gradient-based self-supervised learning benchmarks and substantially better training efficiency than multi-agent reinforcement-learning benchmarks. In out-of-sample tests, GradMAP also delivers among the lowest operating cost and constraint violations.

AI.tldr: 提出GradMAP方法，通过可微三相交流电力流模型和隐式微分，在离线训练中学习完全去中心化的电网设备控制策略，实现15分钟内训练1000个智能体。
AI.motivation: 大规模电网边缘设备协调需要完全去中心化的学习方法，同时要满足三相交流配电网物理约束，现有方法在训练效率和约束满足方面存在不足。
AI.method: 将可微三相交流电力流模型嵌入原始-对偶学习循环，使用隐式微分传播网络约束违反梯度；在策略输出（动作）空间而非概率分布空间定义信任区域，通过近端代理复用昂贵的环境梯度加速训练。
AI.result: 在IEEE 123总线馈线上1000个智能体（电池、热泵、可控发电机）案例中，15分钟内训练完成，比梯度自监督基线快3-5倍，训练效率远超多智能体强化学习基线，并在样本外测试中实现最低运行成本和约束违反。
AI.conclusion: GradMAP有效结合可微物理模型与多智能体学习，实现了大规模电网去中心化策略的高效训练，为电网边缘设备协调提供了实用方案。

title: LAVA: Layered Audio-Visual Anti-tampering Watermarking for Robust Deepfake Detection and Localization
summary: Proactive watermarking offers a promising approach for deepfake tamper detection and localization in short-form videos. However, existing methods often decouple audio and visual evidence and assume that watermark signals remain reliable under real-world degradations, making tamper localization vulnerable to multimodal misalignment and compression distortions. Moreover, existing semi-fragile visual watermarking methods often degrade significantly under codec compression because their embedding bands overlap with compression-sensitive frequency regions. To address these limitations, we propose Layered Audio-Visual Anti-tampering Watermarking (LAVA), a calibration-aware audio-visual watermark fusion framework for deepfake tamper detection and localization. LAVA leverages cross-modal watermark fusion and calibration-aware alignment to preserve consistent and reliable tamper evidence under compression and audio-visual asynchrony, enabling robust tamper localization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LAVA achieves near-perfect detection performance (AP = 0.999), remains robust to compression and multimodal misalignment, and significantly improves tamper localization reliability over existing audio-visual fusion baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出LAVA框架，通过跨模态水印融合和校准感知对齐，在压缩和音视频异步条件下实现深度伪造的鲁棒检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分离音视频证据，假设水印在真实退化下仍可靠，导致伪造定位易受多模态错位和压缩失真影响；此外，现有半脆弱水印在编解码压缩下退化严重。
AI.method: 提出分层音视频防篡改水印（LAVA），利用跨模态水印融合和校准感知对齐，在压缩和音视频异步下保持一致的篡改证据。
AI.result: 检测AP达0.999，对压缩和多模态错位保持鲁棒，篡改定位可靠性显著优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: LAVA框架有效解决了深度伪造检测中多模态融合和压缩鲁棒性问题，实现近完美的检测性能和可靠的篡改定位。

title: Efficient learning by implicit exploration in bandit problems with side observations
comment: Published at Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2014
summary: We consider online learning problems under a partial observability model capturing situations where the information conveyed to the learner is between full information and bandit feedback. In the simplest variant, we assume that in addition to its own loss, the learner also gets to observe losses of some other actions. The revealed losses depend on the learner's action and a directed observation system chosen by the environment. For this setting, we propose the first algorithm that enjoys near-optimal regret guarantees without having to know the observation system before selecting its actions. Along similar lines, we also define a new partial information setting that models online combinatorial optimization problems where the feedback received by the learner is between semi-bandit and full feedback. As the predictions of our first algorithm cannot be always computed efficiently in this setting, we propose another algorithm with similar properties and with the benefit of always being computationally efficient, at the price of a slightly more complicated tuning mechanism. Both algorithms rely on a novel exploration strategy called implicit exploration, which is shown to be more efficient both computationally and information-theoretically than previously studied exploration strategies for the problem.

AI.tldr: 本文针对部分可观测的在线学习问题（介于全信息与bandit反馈之间）提出了首个无需预先知晓观测系统即可实现近乎最优遗憾保证的算法，并扩展到组合优化场景，提出了一种称为“隐式探索”的新策略。
AI.motivation: 现有在线学习算法在部分可观测环境中往往需要提前知道观测系统结构，这限制了其在实际场景中的适用性。本文旨在消除这一先验知识要求，设计更为通用的算法。
AI.method: 提出“隐式探索”（implicit exploration）策略，基于此设计了两个算法：第一个算法适用于一般部分可观测环境，无需预知观测系统；第二个算法针对组合优化问题，在保证计算效率的同时保持相似性能。
AI.result: 两个算法均实现了近乎最优的遗憾保证，且隐式探索在计算效率和信息论效率上优于以往的探索策略。
AI.conclusion: 隐式探索作为一种更高效的探索机制，为解决部分可观测在线学习问题提供了新的思路，在理论和计算上均具有优势。

title: Beyond Single-Agent Alignment: Preventing Context-Fragmented Violations in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: We identify and formalize a novel security risk: Context-Fragmented Violations (CFVs) - a class of policy breaches where individual agent actions appear locally safe and reasonable, yet collectively violate organizational policies because critical policy facts are siloed in different departments private contexts. Existing prompt-based alignment mechanisms and monolithic interceptors are poorly matched to violations that span contextual islands. We propose Distributed Sentinel, a distributed zero-trust enforcement architecture that introduces the Semantic Taint Token (STT) Protocol. Through lightweight sidecar proxies, our system propagates security state across organizational boundaries without exposing raw cross-domain data, enabling Counterfactual Graph Simulation for cross-domain policy verification. We construct PhantomEcosystem, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 9 categories of realistic cross-agent violation scenarios with adversarially balanced safe controls. On this benchmark, Distributed Sentinel achieves F1 = 0.95 with 106ms end-to-end latency (16ms verification + 90ms entity extraction on A100), compared to 0.85 F1 for prompt-based filtering and 0.65 for rule-based DLP. To empirically validate the need for external enforcement, we evaluate eight frontier LLMs in execution-oriented multi-agent workflows with per-agent domain world models. All models exhibit substantial violation rates (14-98%), with cross-domain data flows showing systematically higher violation rates than same-domain flows. These results indicate that self-avoidance is unreliable and that multi-agent security benefits from a centralized enforcement layer operating above individual agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分布式哨兵（Distributed Sentinel）架构，通过语义污染令牌（STT）协议在跨组织边界的AI代理间传播安全状态，解决因上下文碎片化导致的多代理策略违规问题。在PhantomEcosystem基准测试中，该方案F1=0.95，延迟仅106ms，而前沿LLM在跨域多代理工作流中的违规率高达14-98%，表明自我规避不可靠，需要集中式外部强制执行层。
AI.motivation: 现有提示对齐和单体拦截机制无法应对跨上下文孤岛的策略违规。多代理系统中，单个代理行为看似安全合理，但集体上违反组织策略，因为关键策略事实分散在不同部门的私有上下文中。
AI.method: 提出分布式哨兵架构，包含：1) 语义污染令牌（STT）协议，通过轻量级Sidecar代理在组织边界传播安全状态，不暴露原始跨域数据；2) 反事实图仿真，用于跨域策略验证。构建PhantomEcosystem基准，含9类跨代理违规场景。
AI.result: 在PhantomEcosystem上，Distributed Sentinel的F1=0.95，端到端延迟106ms（16ms验证+90ms实体提取），优于提示过滤（F1=0.85）和规则DLP（F1=0.65）。8个前沿LLM在跨域工作流中违规率14-98%，跨域数据流违规率系统性地高于同域数据流。
AI.conclusion: 自我规避不可靠，多代理安全受益于运行在单个代理之上的集中式强制执行层。外部强制执行是必要的。

title: Multi-View Synergistic Learning with Vision-Language Adaption for Low-Resource Biomedical Image Classification
summary: Accurate biomedical image classification under low-resource conditions remains challenging due to limited annotations, subtle inter-class visual differences, and complex disease semantics. While vision--language models offer a promising foundation for mitigating data scarcity, their effective adaptation in biomedical settings is constrained by the need for parameter-efficient tuning alongside fine-grained and semantically consistent representation learning. In this work, we propose Multi-View Synergistic Learning (MVSL), a unified framework that addresses these challenges by jointly considering adaptation paradigms, representation granularity, and disease semantic relationships. MVSL decouples the adaptation of visual and textual encoders to respect their distinct representational characteristics, enabling more stable and effective parameter-efficient fine-tuning. It further introduces multi-granularity contrastive learning to explicitly model both global image semantics and localized lesion-level evidence, improving fine-grained discrimination for visually similar disease categories. In addition, MVSL preserves disease-level semantic structure by incorporating structured supervision derived from large language models, which constrains textual representations at the class level and indirectly regularizes visual embeddings through cross-modal alignment. Together, these components enable more stable cross-modal alignment and improved discrimination under limited supervision. Extensive experiments on $11$ public biomedical datasets spanning $9$ imaging modalities and $10$ anatomical regions demonstrate that MVSL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in few-shot and zero-shot classification settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MVSL框架，通过解耦视觉/文本编码器适配、多粒度对比学习及LLM引导的语义结构约束，在低资源生物医学图像分类中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 低资源条件下生物医学图像分类面临标注少、类间差异细微、疾病语义复杂三大挑战，现有视觉-语言模型在适配时存在参数效率低、表示粒度不足、语义一致性差等问题。
AI.method: MVSL包含三个核心组件：1) 视觉和文本编码器解耦的参数高效微调；2) 多粒度对比学习（全局图像语义+局部病灶级证据）；3) 利用大语言模型（LLM）生成的结构化语义监督，约束类级文本表示并通过跨模态对齐间接正则化视觉嵌入。
AI.result: 在11个公开生物医学数据集、9种成像模态、10个解剖区域上，MVSL在少样本和零样本分类设置中均一致超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: MVSL通过解耦适配、多粒度对比和LLM语义结构化约束，有效提升了低资源生物医学图像分类的性能，验证了多视角协同学习范式的有效性。

title: Fraud Detection in Cryptocurrency Markets with Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, Accepted at the SDS2026: IEEE Swiss Conference on Data Science and AI
summary: Technological advancements in cryptocurrency markets have increased accessibility for investors, but concurrently exposed them to the risks of market manipulations. Existing fraud detection mechanisms typically rely on machine learning methods that treat each financial asset (i.e., token) and its related transactions independently. However, market manipulation strategies are rarely isolated events, but are rather characterized by coordination, repetition, and frequent transfers among related assets. This suggests that relational structure constitutes an integral component of the signal and can be effectively represented through graphical means. In this paper, we propose three graph construction methods that rely on aggregated hourly market data. The proposed graphs are processed by a unified spatio-temporal Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture that combines attention-based spatial aggregation with temporal Transformer encoding. We evaluate our methodology on a real-world dataset comprised of pump-and-dump schemes in cryptocurrency markets, spanning a period of over three years. Our comparative results showcase that our graph-based models achieve significant improvements over standard machine learning baselines in detecting anomalous events. Our work highlights that learned market connectivity provides substantial gains for detecting coordinated market manipulation schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种基于聚合小时级市场数据的图构建方法，结合注意力机制的空间聚合与时间Transformer编码的统一时空图神经网络架构，用于检测加密货币市场中的拉高出货操纵行为。在三年的真实数据集上，图模型相比标准ML基线取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有欺诈检测方法将每个金融资产及其交易独立处理，忽视了市场操纵策略具有协调性、重复性和关联资产间频繁转移等关系结构特征。
AI.method: 提出三种基于聚合小时级市场数据的图构建方法，采用统一时空GNN架构，结合注意力机制的空间聚合（图神经网络）与时间Transformer编码。
AI.result: 在三年期真实加密货币拉高出货数据集上，基于图的方法在检测异常事件方面显著优于标准机器学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 市场关联结构（图表示）能为检测协调性市场操纵方案提供显著的性能增益，证明了关系信息在金融欺诈检测中的重要性。

title: Hierarchical Prototype-based Domain Priors for Multiple Instance Learning in Multimodal Histopathology Analysis
summary: Digital pathology has fundamentally altered diagnostic workflows by enabling the computational analysis of gigapixel Whole Slide Images (WSIs), yet effectively deciphering their complex tumor microenvironments remains a formidable challenge. Existing Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) frameworks typically treat Whole Slide Images as unstructured bags of patches, discarding critical morphological semantics and spatial geometry. This lack of inductive bias often leads to overfitting on background noise and fails to align visual features with high-level diagnostic knowledge. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Hierarchical Prototype-based Domain Priors (HPDP) framework, a unified multimodal approach for joint histopathology diagnosis and prognosis. HPDP mitigates the data-driven "black box" issue by introducing a Morphologically Anchored Prototype System (MAPS), which anchors learning to interpretable morphological clusters, and a Sinusoidal Positional Encoder (SPE) to explicitly model tissue architecture. Furthermore, we bridge the semantic gap via a Hierarchical Cross-Modal Alignment (HCMA) module, using Large Language Model (LLM)-generated descriptions to contextually refine visual representations. Extensive experiments across seven cancer cohorts demonstrate that HPDP consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance with superior robustness and interpretability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HPDP框架，通过形态学锚定原型系统、正弦位置编码和层次化跨模态对齐（利用LLM生成描述），解决数字病理学中MIL方法忽略形态语义和空间几何的问题，在七个癌症数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有MIL方法将全切片图像视为无序的patch包，丢弃了关键的形态学语义和空间几何信息，导致过拟合背景噪声且无法将视觉特征与高层诊断知识对齐。
AI.method: 1) MAPS（形态学锚定原型系统）将学习锚定到可解释的形态聚类；2) SPE（正弦位置编码）显式建模组织架构；3) HCMA（层次化跨模态对齐模块）利用LLM生成的描述来上下文细化视觉表示，实现多模态对齐。
AI.result: 在七个癌症队列上，HPDP一致达到SOTA性能，且具有优越的鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 引入领域先验（形态学原型、空间位置编码）和LLM跨模态对齐可以有效提升病理诊断和预后性能，缓解数据驱动的黑箱问题。

title: Uncovering Latent Patterns in Social Media Usage and Mental Health: A Clustering-Based Approach Using Unsupervised Machine Learning
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, International Conference on Advancement in Healthcare Technology and Biomedical Engineering, Vancouver, BC, Canada
summary: The widespread adoption of social media has heightened interest in its psychological effects, particularly on mental health indicators such as anxiety, depression, loneliness, and sleep quality, as these platforms increasingly influence social interactions and well-being. Although previous research has examined correlations between social media use and mental health, few studies have utilized unsupervised machine learning to segment users based on behavioral and psychological patterns, leaving a gap in identifying distinct risk profiles across diverse groups. This study seeks to address this by segmenting individuals according to their social media usage and psychological well-being, employing clustering to reveal hidden patterns and evaluate their mental health implications. Data from 551 participants, collected via an online survey, were preprocessed using KNN imputation for missing values, one-hot encoding for categorical variables like Gender with 5 unique values, and outlier detection via IQR and Z-score methods. K-Means clustering, optimized at 6 clusters using the Elbow Method and a Silhouette Score of 0.32, was applied, with PCA reducing 22 dimensions for visualization and a correlation heatmap highlighting relationships, such as a 0.28 correlation between social media hours and anxiety.

AI.tldr: 本文使用无监督机器学习（K-Means聚类）对551名参与者的社交媒体使用与心理健康数据进行聚类分析，识别出6个不同风险画像的用户群体。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体对心理健康的潜在影响受到广泛关注，但以往研究鲜有使用无监督学习方法基于行为和心理模式对用户进行细分，缺乏识别不同群体风险特征的手段。
AI.method: 采用KNN插补处理缺失值、One-Hot编码处理类别特征、IQR和Z-score检测异常值进行数据预处理；使用K-Means聚类（肘部法+轮廓系数0.32确定6簇），PCA降维22维用于可视化，相关性热图分析特征关联。
AI.result: 成功将用户分为6个不同聚类，发现社交媒体使用时长与焦虑程度存在0.28的正相关性，并通过PCA可视化展示了用户群体的分布模式。
AI.conclusion: 无监督机器学习能够有效识别社交媒体使用与心理健康之间的隐藏模式，为针对性干预和风险评估提供数据驱动的分类依据。

title: SMoES: Soft Modality-Guided Expert Specialization in MoE-VLMs
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) has become a prevalent backbone for large vision-language models (VLMs), yet how modality-specific signals should guide expert routing remains under-explored. Existing routing strategies are either hand-crafted or modality-agnostic, relying on idealized priors that ignore the layer-dependent modality fusion patterns in MoE-VLMs and provide little guidance for expert specialization. We propose Soft Modality-guided Expert Specialization (SMoES), which consists of dynamic soft modality scores that capture layer-dependent fusion patterns, an expert binning mechanism aligned with expert-parallel deployment, and an inter-bin mutual information regularization that encourages coherent modality specialization. Our method leverages attention-based or Gaussian-statistics modality scores to optimize mutual information regularization. Experiments across four MoE-based VLMs and 16 benchmarks demonstrate improvement on both effectiveness and efficiency: 0.9% and 4.2% average gain on multimodal and language-only tasks, 56.1% reduction in EP communication overhead, and 12.3% throughput improvement under realistic deployment. These results validate that aligning routing with modality-aware expert specialization unlocks MoE-VLM capacity and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出软模态引导的专家特化（SMoES），通过动态模态分数、专家分箱机制和互信息正则化，在MoE-VLM中实现模态感知的专家路由，提升多模态及纯语言任务性能，同时降低通信开销和提高吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE-VLM的路由策略要么手工设计要么与模态无关，忽略了不同层中模态融合模式的差异，缺乏对专家特化的有效指导。
AI.method: SMoES包含三个组件：(1) 基于注意力或高斯统计量的动态软模态分数，捕获逐层模态融合模式；(2) 专家分箱机制，与专家并行部署对齐；(3) 箱间互信息正则化，鼓励连贯的模态特化。
AI.result: 在4种MoE-VLM和16个基准上，多模态任务平均提升0.9%，纯语言任务提升4.2%；EP通信开销减少56.1%；实际部署下吞吐量提升12.3%。
AI.conclusion: 将路由与模态感知的专家特化对齐，能有效释放MoE-VLM的容量和效率潜力。

title: Cortex-Inspired Continual Learning: Unsupervised Instantiation and Recovery of Functional Task Networks
summary: Block-sequential continual learning demands that a single model both protect prior solutions from catastrophic forgetting and efficiently infer at inference time which prior solution matches the current input without task labels. We present Functional Task Networks (FTN), a parameter-isolation method inspired by structural and dynamical motifs found in the mammalian neocortex. Similar to mixture-of-experts, this method uses a high dimensional, self-organizing binary mask over a large population of small but deep networks, inspired by dendritic models of pyramidal neurons. The mask is produced by a three-stage procedure: (1) gradient descent on a continuous mask identifies task-relevant neurons, (2) a smoothing kernel biases the result toward spatial contiguity, (3) and k-winner-take-all binarizes the resulting group at a fixed capacity budget. Like mixture-of-experts, each neuron is an independent deep network, so disjoint masks give exactly disjoint gradient updates, providing structural guarantees against catastrophic forgetting. This three-stage procedure recovers the sub-network of a previously-trained task in a single gradient step, providing unsupervised task segmentation at inference time. We test it on three continual-learning benchmarks: (1) a synthetic multi-task classification/regression generator, (2) MNIST with shuffled class labels (pure concept shift), and (3) Permuted MNIST (domain shift). On all three, FTN with fine grained smoothing (FTN-Slow) results in nearly zero forgetting. FTN with a large kernel and only 2 iterations of smoothing (FTN-Fast) trades off some retention for increased speed. We show that the spatial organization mechanism reduces the effective mask search from the combinatorial top-k subset problem in O(C(H,K)) to the complexity of a near-linear scan in O(H) over compact cortical neighborhoods, which is parallelized by the gradient-based update.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Functional Task Networks (FTN)，一种受哺乳动物新皮层启发的参数隔离方法，用于块序列持续学习。FTN通过三步流程（梯度下降识别任务相关神经元、平滑核偏置空间连续性、k-winner-take-all二值化）生成高维自组织二元掩码，实现无任务标签的推理时任务分割和零遗忘保护。
AI.motivation: 解决块序列持续学习中两个核心挑战：1) 防止灾难性遗忘（保护先前解决方案）；2) 在无任务标签的情况下高效推断当前输入匹配哪个先前解决方案。
AI.method: FTN是一种受新皮层结构和动力学启发的参数隔离方法。它采用类似混合专家（MoE）的架构，在大规模小型深度网络群上通过三步生成高维自组织二元掩码：(1) 对连续掩码进行梯度下降识别任务相关神经元；(2) 平滑核使结果偏向空间连续性；(3) k-winner-take-all在固定容量预算下二值化。每个神经元是独立深度网络，不相交掩码产生不相交梯度更新，提供结构性抗遗忘保证。
AI.result: 在三个持续学习基准（合成多任务分类/回归、带洗牌标签的MNIST、Permuted MNIST）上，精细平滑的FTN-Slow实现近乎零遗忘；FTN-Fast（大核+2次迭代）在速度和保留之间取得平衡。空间组织机制将有效掩码搜索从组合优化的O(C(H,K))降低到近线性扫描的O(H)。
AI.conclusion: FTN通过生物启发的空间组织机制，实现了高效、可扩展的持续学习，在保持零遗忘能力的同时大幅降低了掩码搜索复杂度，为无任务标签的持续学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: ServImage: An Image Generation and Editing Benchmark from Real-world Commercial Imaging Services
summary: Recent image generation and editing models demonstrate robust adherence to instructions and high visual quality on academic benchmarks. However, their performance on paid, real-world design projects remains uncertain. We introduce \textbf{ServImage}, a benchmark that explicitly correlates model outputs with economic value in commercial design projects. ServImage consists of (i) \textbf{\textit{ServImageBench}}: a dataset of 1.07k paid commercial design tasks and 2.05k designer deliverables totaling over \$295k, covering portrait, product, and digital content, along with 33k candidate images and 33k human annotations. (ii) \textbf{\textit{ServImageScore}}: an integrated scoring system that combines three quality dimensions: baseline requirements fulfilment, visual execution quality, and commercial necessity satisfaction. These three dimensions are designed to characterize the factors that drive human payment decisions and indicate whether an image is commercially acceptable. (iii) \textbf{\textit{ServImageModel}}: under this scoring system, we propose a payment prediction model trained on the human-annotated candidate images, achieving 82.00\% accuracy in predicting human payment decisions and producing calibrated payment probabilities. ServImage provides a comprehensive foundation for assessing the commercial viability of image generation models and offers a scalable resource for future research on economically grounded vision systems \href{https://github.com/FengxianJi/ServImage}{Github.}

AI.tldr: 本文提出ServImage基准，通过1.07k付费商业设计任务、2.05k设计师交付物（总价值超$295k）、33k候选图像及33k人工标注，从基线需求满足、视觉执行质量、商业必要性三个维度评估图像生成模型的商业可行性，并训练支付预测模型达82%准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成模型在学术基准上表现优异，但其在真实付费商业设计项目中的经济价值尚不明确，缺乏直接关联模型输出与经济价值的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建ServImageBench数据集（含付费商业设计任务及对应交付物）；设计ServImageScore三维评分体系（基线需求、视觉质量、商业必要性）；训练ServImageModel支付预测模型。
AI.result: 支付预测模型在预测人类支付决策上达82.00%准确率，并能产生校准的支付概率。
AI.conclusion: ServImage为评估图像生成模型的商业可行性提供了全面基础，是经济学视角下视觉系统研究的可扩展资源。

title: The Last Human-Written Paper: Agent-Native Research Artifacts
summary: Scientific publication compresses a branching, iterative research process into a linear narrative, discarding the majority of what was discovered along the way. This compilation imposes two structural costs: a Storytelling Tax, where failed experiments, rejected hypotheses, and the branching exploration process are discarded to fit a linear narrative; and an Engineering Tax, where the gap between reviewer-sufficient prose and agent-sufficient specification leaves critical implementation details unwritten. Tolerable for human readers, these costs become critical when AI agents must understand, reproduce, and extend published work. We introduce the Agent-Native Research Artifact (Ara), a protocol that replaces the narrative paper with a machine-executable research package structured around four layers: scientific logic, executable code with full specifications, an exploration graph that preserves the failures compilation discards, and evidence grounding every claim in raw outputs. Three mechanisms support the ecosystem: a Live Research Manager that captures decisions and dead ends during ordinary development; an Ara Compiler that translates legacy PDFs and repos into Aras; and an Ara-native review system that automates objective checks so human reviewers can focus on significance, novelty, and taste. On PaperBench and RE-Bench, Ara raises question-answering accuracy from 72.4% to 93.7% and reproduction success from 57.4% to 64.4%. On RE-Bench's five open-ended extension tasks, preserved failure traces in Ara accelerate progress, but can also constrain a capable agent from stepping outside the prior-run box depending on the agent's capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent-Native Research Artifact (Ara)协议，用四层机器可执行的研究包替代传统线性论文叙事，保留失败的探索分支和完整规范，提升AI代理在论文理解、问答和复现上的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统科学论文将分支迭代的研究过程压缩为线性叙事，丢弃了大量探索过程（故事税）和关键实现细节（工程税），这虽然对人类读者可容忍，但AI代理无法有效理解、复现和扩展这些工作。
AI.method: 提出Ara协议，包含四层结构：科学逻辑、带完整规范的可执行代码、保留失败记录的探索图、以及基于原始输出的证据支撑。配套三个机制：Live Research Manager捕捉开发过程中的决策和死路；Ara Compiler将旧PDF和代码库转换为Ara格式；Ara原生审稿系统自动化客观检查。
AI.result: 在PaperBench上问答准确率从72.4%提升到93.7%；复现成功率从57.4%提升到64.4%。在RE-Bench的开放扩展任务中，保留的失败轨迹既能加速进展，也可能限制强代理跳出原有探索路径。
AI.conclusion: Ara通过将研究过程以机器可执行的结构化形式完整呈现，显著提升了AI代理理解、问答和复现论文的能力，但保留失败轨迹对代理探索空间的影响存在两面性。

title: DeepTaxon: An Interpretable Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Framework for Unified Species Identification and Discovery
summary: Identifying species in biology among tens of thousands of visually similar taxa while discovering unknown species in open-world environments remains a fundamental challenge in biodiversity research. Current methods treat identification and discovery as separate problems, with classification models assuming closed sets and discovery relying on threshold-based rejection. Here we present DeepTaxon, a retrieval-augmented multimodal framework that unifies species identification and discovery through interpretable reasoning over retrieved visual evidence. Given a query image, DeepTaxon retrieves the top-$k$ candidate species with $n$ exemplar images each from a retrieval index and performs chain-of-thought comparative reasoning. Critically, we redefine discovery as an explicit, retrieval-based decision problem rather than an implicit parametric memory problem. A sample is novel if and only if the retrieval index lacks sufficient evidence for identification, so each retrieval naturally yields a classification or discovery label without manual annotation, thereby providing automatic supervision for both tasks. We train the framework via supervised fine-tuning on synthetic retrieval-augmented data, followed by reinforcement learning on hard samples, converting high-recall retrieval into high-precision decisions that scale to massive taxonomic vocabularies. Extensive experiments on a large-scale in-distribution benchmark and six out-of-distribution datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in both identification and discovery. Ablation studies further reveal effective test-time scaling with candidate count $k$ and exemplar count $n$, strong zero-shot transfer to unseen domains, and consistent performance across retrieval encoders, establishing an interpretable solution for biodiversity research.

AI.tldr: DeepTaxon 是一个检索增强的多模态框架，通过检索视觉证据和链式思维比较推理，统一了物种识别与发现任务，将新物种发现重新定义为基于检索的决策问题，并通过监督微调+强化学习训练，在多个基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将物种识别与发现作为分离任务处理（分类模型假设闭集，发现依赖阈值拒绝），无法统一解决。作者希望提出一个统一框架，同时处理已知物种识别和未知物种发现。
AI.method: DeepTaxon 采用检索增强多模态框架：1) 从检索索引中检索 top-k 候选物种及其 n 个示例图像；2) 进行链式思维比较推理；3) 将发现重新定义为显式的基于检索的决策问题（若索引缺乏足够证据则为新物种）；4) 通过监督微调 + 强化学习在困难样本上训练。
AI.result: 在大型分布内基准和六个分布外数据集上，识别和发现任务均有一致提升。消融实验表明：有效的测试时扩展（随 k 和 n 增加），强大的零样本迁移能力，以及跨检索编码器的一致性表现。
AI.conclusion: DeepTaxon 成功统一了物种识别与发现任务，提供了一个可解释的、可扩展的解决方案，能够将高召回检索转化为高精度决策，适用于大规模生物多样性研究。

title: Breaking the Scalability Limit of Multi-Projector Calibration with Embedded Cameras
summary: Conventional multi-projector calibration requires projecting and capturing structured light patterns for each projector sequentially, causing calibration time and effort to increase linearly with the number of projectors. This scalability bottleneck has long limited the deployment of large-scale projection mapping systems. We present a new calibration framework that breaks this limitation by embedding cameras into the surface of the calibration target. The embedded cameras directly capture the incoming projection light, enabling the separation of simultaneously projected structured light patterns from multiple projectors according to their incident directions. Our method establishes correspondences between the optical centers of the embedded cameras and the projector pixels, allowing the intrinsic and extrinsic parameters of all projectors to be simultaneously estimated. We further introduce a correction technique for small misalignments between the calibration board and camera optical centers. As a result, our system achieves calibration accuracy comparable to conventional methods while reducing the required number of projection-capture cycles from linear to nearly constant with respect to the number of projectors, dramatically improving scalability for dense multi-projector systems with overlapping projection regions, such as high-brightness stacking, super-resolution, light-field, and shadow-suppression displays.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种嵌入摄像头的校准靶标方法，让多个投影仪可同时发射结构光模式，通过嵌入式摄像头区分入射方向，将校准所需的投影-捕获次数从线性减少为近似常数，大幅提升多投影仪系统的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 传统多投影仪校准需要为每个投影仪依次投影和捕获结构光图案，校准时间和成本随投影仪数量线性增长，成为大规模投影映射系统部署的瓶颈。
AI.method: 在校准靶标表面嵌入摄像头，直接捕获入射投影光；利用摄像头光学中心与投影仪像素的对应关系，可同时估计所有投影仪的内外参；并引入针对校准板与摄像头光心之间微小偏差的校正技术。
AI.result: 该方法实现了与传统方法相当的校准精度，但投影-捕获循环次数从线性（随投影仪数量）降低到近乎常数，显著提升密集多投影仪系统的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 通过嵌入式摄像头设计打破了多投影仪校准的可扩展性限制，适用于高亮度叠加、超分辨率、光场和阴影抑制显示等场景。

title: A Functorial Formulation of Neighborhood Aggregating Deep Learning
summary: We provide a mathematical interpretation of convolutional (or message passing) neural networks by using presheaves and copresheaves of the set of continuous functions over a topological space. Based on this interpretation, we formulate a theoretical heuristic which elaborates a number of empirical limitations of these neural networks by using obstructions on such sets of continuous functions over a topological space to be sheaves or copresheaves.

AI.tldr: 该论文利用预层和余层理论为卷积/消息传递神经网络提供了数学解释，并通过拓扑空间上连续函数集的层/余层障碍来阐述这些网络的若干经验局限性。
AI.motivation: 作者试图为卷积神经网络（或消息传递神经网络）建立一个严格的数学理论基础，并解释这些网络在实际应用中观察到的经验局限性的根本原因。
AI.method: 使用拓扑空间上的连续函数集构造预层（presheaf）和余层（copresheaf），以此形式化地解释卷积/消息传递神经网络的操作，并利用层（sheaf）和余层理论中的障碍（obstructions）来推导网络的理论局限性。
AI.result: 提出了一个理论启发式方法，基于层论中的障碍概念，解释了卷积/消息传递神经网络在特定任务或数据分布上表现不佳的根本数学原因。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解深度神经网络的局限性提供了新的理论视角，但目前停留在启发式框架层面，尚需更严格的实验验证。

title: RouteGuard: Internal-Signal Detection of Skill Poisoning in LLM Agents
summary: Agent skills introduce a new and more severe form of indirect injection for LLM agents: unlike traditional indirect prompt injection, attackers can hide malicious instructions inside a dense, action-oriented skill that already functions as a legitimate instruction source. We study pre-execution skill-poison detection and show that successful skill poisoning induces a structured internal effect, attention hijacking, in which response-time attention shifts from trusted context to malicious skill spans and drives harmful behavior. Motivated by this mechanism, we propose RouteGuard, a frozen-backbone detector that combines response-conditioned attention and hidden-state alignment through reliability-gated late fusion. Across both real and synthetic open-source skill benchmarks, RouteGuard is consistently the strongest or most robust detector; on the critical Skill-Inject channel slice, it reaches 0.8834 F1 and recovers 90.51% of description attacks missed by lexical screening, showing that defending against skill poisoning requires internal-signal detection rather than text-only filtering

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对LLM Agent技能中毒（skill poisoning）的预执行检测方法RouteGuard。研究发现技能中毒会引发"注意力劫持"内部效应，使模型注意力从可信上下文转移到恶意技能片段。RouteGuard通过响应条件注意力与隐藏状态对齐（结合可靠性门控晚期融合）在冻结骨干网络上实现检测，在Skill-Inject基准上达0.8834 F1，恢复90.51%被词汇筛查遗漏的描述攻击。
AI.motivation: 技能（skill）作为面向Agent的新攻击向量，其注入攻击比传统间接提示注入更隐蔽且危害更大。现有检测方法主要依赖文本过滤，无法捕捉攻击引发的内部模型行为变化，需要基于内部信号的检测方案。
AI.method: RouteGuard：冻结骨干网络（frozen backbone），结合响应条件注意力（response-conditioned attention）与隐藏状态对齐（hidden-state alignment），通过可靠性门控晚期融合（reliability-gated late fusion）进行集成检测。
AI.result: 在真实与合成技能基准上，RouteGuard一致达到最强或最鲁棒检测效果。Skill-Inject通道上F1达0.8834，恢复90.51%被词汇筛查遗漏的描述攻击。
AI.conclusion: 对抗技能中毒需要基于内部信号的检测机制而非纯文本过滤，注意力劫持效应是有效的检测信号。

title: Diffusion-Guided Feature Selection via Nishimori Temperature: Noise-Based Spectral Embedding
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, extended version (with noise shift proof) of DSPA2026 article
summary: We propose Noise-Based Spectral Embedding (NBSE), a physics-informed framework for selecting informative features from high-dimensional data without greedy search. NBSE constructs a sparse similarity graph on the samples and identifies the Nishimori temperature $β_N$ the critical inverse temperature at which the Bethe Hessian becomes singular. The corresponding smallest eigenvector captures the dominant mode of an intrinsically degree-corrected diffusion process, naturally reweighting nodes to prevent hub dominance. By transposing the data matrix and applying NBSE in feature space, we obtain a one-dimensional spectral embedding that reveals groups of redundant or semantically related dimensions; balanced binning then selects one representative per group. We prove that coloured Gaussian perturbations shift $β_N$ by at most $O(\barσ^2)$, guaranteeing robustness to measurement noise. Experiments on ImageNet embeddings from MobileNetV2 and EfficientNet-B4 show that NBSE preserves classification accuracy even under aggressive compression: on EfficientNet-B4 the accuracy drop is below $1\%$ when retaining only $30\%$ of features, outperforming ANOVA $F$-test and random selection by up to $6.8\%$.

AI.tldr: 提出基于噪声的谱嵌入（NBSE）方法，利用统计物理中的Nishimori温度从高维数据中选择信息特征，无需贪心搜索，通过特征空间中的谱嵌入和平衡分箱实现特征压缩。
AI.motivation: 高维数据中特征选择通常依赖贪心搜索或统计检验，计算成本高且容易过拟合。作者希望提出一种无贪心搜索、物理启发式且鲁棒的特征选择框架。
AI.method: 构建样本间的稀疏相似图，计算Bethe Hessian矩阵，找到Nishimori温度（其奇异点对应的临界逆温度）；利用对应最小特征向量进行谱嵌入；将方法转置到特征空间得到一维嵌入，通过平衡分箱选择代表特征。
AI.result: 在MobileNetV2和EfficientNet-B4的ImageNet嵌入上，NBSE在保留30%特征时准确率下降<1%（EfficientNet-B4），优于ANOVA F检验和随机选择最高达6.8%。
AI.conclusion: NBSE是一种高效、鲁棒的特征选择方法，能识别语义相关的特征组并去除冗余，适用于高维嵌入的压缩。

title: JSSFF: A Joint Structural-Semantic Fusion Framework for Remote Sensing Image Captioning
summary: The encoder-decoder framework has become widely popular nowadays. In this model, the encoder extracts informative visual features from an input image, and the decoder employs a sequence-to-sequence formulation to generate the corresponding textual description from these features. The existing models focus more on the decision part. However, extracting meaningful information from the image can help the decoder generate an accurate caption by providing information about the objects and their relationship. Remote sensing images are highly complex. One major challenge is detecting objects that extend beyond their visible boundaries due to occlusion, overlapping structures, and unclear edges. Hence, there is a need to design an approach that can effectively capture both high-level semantics and low-level spatial details for accurate caption generation. In this work, we have proposed an edge-aware fusion method by incorporating the original image and its edge-aware version into the encoder to enhance feature representation and boundary awareness. We used a comparison-based beam search (CBBS) to generate captions to achieve a balanced trade-off between quantitative metrics and qualitative caption relevance through fairness-based comparison of candidate captions. Experimental results demonstrate our model's superiority over several baseline models in quantitative and qualitative perspectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种边缘感知融合方法，将原始图像与其边缘感知版本结合到编码器中，增强遥感图像的边界感知能力，并使用基于比较的波束搜索(CBBS)生成字幕，在定量和定性指标上均优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像高度复杂，存在物体遮挡、重叠结构、边缘模糊等问题，现有编码器-解码器框架难以有效捕捉超越可见边界的物体信息，需要一种能同时捕获高层语义和低层空间细节的方法。
AI.method: 1) 提出边缘感知融合方法，将原始图像及其边缘感知版本融入编码器以增强特征表示和边界感知；2) 提出基于比较的波束搜索(CBBS)算法，通过公平性比较候选字幕，在定量指标和定性相关性之间取得平衡。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在定量和定性评估上均优于多个基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 边缘感知融合有效提升了遥感图像字幕生成的质量，CBBS搜索策略有助于平衡定量评估与人类感知相关性。

title: Scalable Hyperparameter-Divergent Ensemble Training with Automatic Learning Rate Exploration for Large Models
summary:
Training large neural networks with data-parallel stochastic gradient descent allocates N GPU replicas to compute effectively identical updates -- a practice that leaves the rich space of learning rate configurations entirely unexplored during training. We propose Hyperparameter-Divergent Ensemble Training (HDET), a method that repurposes these replicas for simultaneous learning rate exploration at negligible communication overhead. HDET operates in alternating phases: a fan-out stage in which replicas train independently under a structured, symmetric spread of learning rates, and a converge stage in which parameters are averaged across all replicas via AllReduce every T steps. Building on this ensemble substrate, we further propose an automatic learning rate (auto-LR) controller that treats the relative training loss across replicas as a performance signal, updating the shared base schedule toward higher-performing configurations via a momentum-based gradient-free meta-update. The combined method produces a self-adapting learning rate schedule that improves both optimization quality and generalization without additional hyperparameter sweeps or training budget.
  Crucially, the framework generalizes beyond learning rate: any scalar hyperparameter that does not alter model architecture -- such as dropout rate, attention scale temperature, or weight-decay coefficient -- can be explored across replicas using the same fan-out/converge protocol, with inter-replica loss differences serving as zero-order hypergradients that guide the search direction. HDET is implemented as a drop-in replacement for PyTorch's OneCycleLR scheduler, requiring no changes to model architecture, optimizer, or data pipeline.

AI.tldr: 提出HDET方法，利用数据并行训练中的多个GPU副本进行超参数（如学习率）的并行探索，通过扇出-收敛两阶段交替实现自动学习率调度，可推广至其他标量超参数，无需额外训练预算。
AI.motivation: 现有数据并行训练中，N个GPU副本计算近乎相同的梯度更新，浪费了探索不同学习率配置的可能性空间。
AI.method: HDET包含两个交替阶段：1)扇出阶段：各副本在结构化的对称学习率分布下独立训练；2)收敛阶段：每T步通过AllReduce平均所有副本参数。还提出了自动学习率控制器，利用副本间相对训练损失作为性能信号，通过基于动量的无梯度元更新来调整共享基础调度。
AI.result: 该方法能自我适应地生成学习率调度，优化优化质量和泛化能力，无需额外超参数搜索或训练预算，并可推广到dropout率、注意力缩放温度、权重衰减系数等标量超参数。
AI.conclusion: HDET可作为PyTorch OneCycleLR调度器的即插即用替代品，无需修改模型架构、优化器或数据管道，实现了零额外通信开销的超参数探索。

title: Robust Grounding with MLLMs against Occlusion and Small Objects via Language-guided Semantic Cues
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enhanced grounding capabilities in general scenes, their robustness in crowded scenes remains underexplored. Crowded scenes entail visual challenges (i.e., occlusion and small objects), which impair object semantics and degrade grounding performance. In contrast, language expressions are immune to such degradation and preserve object semantics. In light of these observations, we propose a novel method that overcomes such constraints by leveraging Language-Guided Semantic Cues (LGSCs).
