Specifically, our approach introduces a Semantic Cue Extractor (SCE) to derive semantic cues of objects from the visual pipeline of an MLLM. We then guide these cues using corresponding text embeddings to produce LGSCs as linguistic semantic priors. Subsequently, they are reintegrated into the original visual pipeline to refine object semantics. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that incorporating LGSCs into an MLLM effectively improves grounding accuracy in crowded scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出语言引导语义线索（LGSCs）方法，通过语义线索提取器（SCE）从MLLM视觉管道中提取物体语义线索，并用文本嵌入引导，以提升拥挤场景下的视觉定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在拥挤场景（遮挡、小物体）下定位能力不足，因为视觉特征受损而语言表达不受影响，因此希望利用语言语义来增强视觉定位。
AI.method: 设计语义线索提取器（SCE）从MLLM视觉流程中提取物体语义线索，用对应的文本嵌入引导这些线索，生成LGSCs作为语言语义先验，再将其融合回原始视觉流程以优化物体语义表示。
AI.result: 实验证明，将LGSCs融入MLLM能有效提高拥挤场景下的定位准确率。
AI.conclusion: 利用语言语义先验来弥补视觉退化的思路有效，LGSCs可以作为一种轻量级的即插即用模块提升MLLM在拥挤场景的鲁棒性。

title: SpecRLBench: A Benchmark for Generalization in Specification-Guided Reinforcement Learning
summary: Specification-guided reinforcement learning (RL) provides a principled framework for encoding complex, temporally extended tasks using formal specifications such as linear temporal logic (LTL). While recent methods have shown promising results, their ability to generalize across unseen specifications and diverse environments remains insufficiently understood. In this work, we introduce SpecRLBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate the generalization capabilities of LTL-based specification-guided RL methods. The benchmark spans multiple difficulty levels across navigation and manipulation domains, incorporating both static and dynamic environments, diverse robot dynamics, and varied observation modalities. Through extensive empirical evaluation, we characterize the strengths and limitations of existing approaches and reveal the challenges that emerge as specification and environment complexity increase. SpecRLBench provides a structured platform for systematic comparison and supports the development of more generalizable specification-guided RL methods. Code is available at https://github.com/BU-DEPEND-Lab/SpecRLBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了 SpecRLBench，一个用于评估基于线性时序逻辑（LTL）的规范引导强化学习（RL）方法泛化能力的基准，涵盖导航和操作领域多个难度层级、静态/动态环境、不同机器人动力学和观测模态，通过大量实验揭示了现有方法在规范和环境复杂度增加时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有规范引导的RL方法虽然在复杂时序任务上取得进展，但其在未见过的规范和多样化环境中的泛化能力尚不明确，缺乏系统性的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建 SpecRLBench 基准，包含导航和操作两大领域，每个领域设计多个难度级别，涵盖静态/动态环境、不同机器人动力学和观测模态，并对现有方法进行广泛的实证评估。
AI.result: 揭示了现有方法在规范和环境复杂度增加时面临的挑战，量化了不同方法的泛化能力差异，发现了当前方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: SpecRLBench 为规范引导RL方法提供了结构化比较平台，有助于推动更具泛化能力的方法开发。

title: Citation-Driven Multi-View Training for Patent Embeddings: QaECTER and Sophia-Bench
summary: Patent retrieval underpins critical decisions in innovation, examination, and IP strategy, yet progress has been hampered by the absence of benchmarks that reflect the diversity of real world search scenarios. We address this gap with two contributions. First, we introduce Sophiabench, a large-scale patent retrieval benchmark comprising 10,000 queries and 75,000 corpus documents stratified across ten years, eight IPC technology sections, and twelve filing jurisdictions. Unlike prior benchmarks, Sophia-bench tests retrieval using 12 different query types-from structured patent fields to AI-generated summaries-and evaluates results against citation-based ground truth enhanced with a novel domain-relevance metric (InScope). Together, these enable systematic measurement of how well models perform across query types, technology domains, and jurisdictions. Second, we introduce QaECTER, a 344M-parameter embedding model trained on patent citation graphs and multi-view self-alignment. Despite its compact size, QaECTER establishes a new state of the art for patent retrieval. It outperforms the \#1 model on the English retrieval text embedding benchmark (RTEB), a model 23x larger, as well as all existing patent specific models across every query type, IPC section, and jurisdiction on Sophia-bench, with gains of up to 7.2% average NDCG@10 over the next-best model. These results are confirmed on an independent external benchmark, where QaECTER surpasses all prior models without requiring task-specific instruction prompts. Both the benchmark and the model are designed for practical deployment in large-scale patent search systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sophiabench专利检索基准（含10,000查询/75,000文档，覆盖10年、8个IPC技术领域、12个司法管辖区，含12种查询类型）和QaECTER嵌入模型（344M参数，基于专利引用图和多视角自对齐训练），在专利检索上达到SOTA，超越23倍大的模型。
AI.motivation: 现有专利检索缺乏能反映真实世界多样性的基准，阻碍了该领域进展。作者希望构建涵盖多查询类型、多技术领域、多司法管辖区的基准，并开发高效的专利检索模型。
AI.method: 1) 构建Sophiabench：10,000查询、75,000文档，跨10年/8个IPC类别/12个司法管辖区，含12种查询类型（从结构化字段到AI摘要），使用基于引用的ground truth和InScope领域相关性度量。2) 提出QaECTER：344M参数嵌入模型，在专利引用图上训练，采用多视图自对齐方法。
AI.result: QaECTER在Sophiabench上超越所有现有专利模型（包括23倍大的模型），NDCG@10提升最高达7.2%；在RTEB基准上排名第一；在独立外部基准上也超越所有先前的模型。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑的专利嵌入模型QaECTER结合多样化基准Sophiabench，可有效部署于大规模专利检索系统，填补了专利检索基准多样性的空白。

title: Jailbreaking Frontier Foundation Models Through Intention Deception
summary: Large (vision-)language models exhibit remarkable capability but remain highly susceptible to jailbreaking. Existing safety training approaches aim to have the model learn a refusal boundary between safe and unsafe, based on the user's intent. It has been found that this binary training regime often leads to brittleness, since the user intent cannot reliably be evaluated, especially if the attacker obfuscates their intent, and also makes the system seem unhelpful. In response, frontier models, such as GPT-5, have shifted from refusal-based safeguards to safe completion, that aims to maximize helpfulness while obeying safety constraints. However, safe completion could be exploited when a user pretends their intention is benign. Specifically, this intent inversion would be effective in multi-turn conversation, where the attacker has multiple opportunities to reinforce their deceptively benign intent. In this work, we introduce a novel multi-turn jailbreaking method that exploits this vulnerability. Our approach gradually builds conversational trust by simulating benign-seeming intentions and by exploiting the consistency property of the model, ultimately guiding the target model toward harmful, detailed outputs. Most crucially, our approach also uncovered an additional class of model vulnerability that we call para-jailbreaking that has been unnoticed up to now. Para-jailbreaking describes the situation where the model may not reveal harmful direct reply to the attack query, however the information that it reveals is nevertheless harmful. Our contributions are threefold. First, it achieves high success rates against frontier models including GPT-5-thinking and Claude-Sonnet-4.5. Second, our approach revealed and addressed para-jailbreaking harmful output. Third, experiments on multimodal VLM models showed that our approach outperformed state-of-the-art models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多轮对话越狱方法，通过逐步建立对话信任来利用模型的安全完成机制，并发现了一种新的"旁越狱"漏洞，在GPT-5和Claude等前沿模型上取得高成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有安全训练方法（基于拒绝的机制）存在脆性问题，而前沿模型转向"安全完成"机制后，可能被攻击者通过伪装善意意图（意图反转）在多轮对话中利用。
AI.method: 提出多轮越狱方法：逐步构建对话信任，模拟看似良性的意图，利用模型的连贯性属性，最终引导目标模型输出有害的详细内容。同时发现了"旁越狱"这一新型漏洞类别。
AI.result: 1) 在GPT-5-thinking和Claude-Sonnet-4.5等前沿模型上取得高成功率；2) 发现并揭示了"旁越狱"危害输出；3) 在多模态VLM模型上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 安全完成机制存在被意图反转攻击利用的脆弱性，旁越狱是一种此前未被注意的安全漏洞，需要更细粒度的安全对齐策略。

title: CLLAP: Contrastive Learning-based LiDAR-Augmented Pretraining for Enhanced Radar-Camera Fusion
summary: Accurate 3D object detection is critical for autonomous driving, necessitating reliable, cost-effective sensors capable of operating in adverse weather conditions. Camera and millimeter-wave radar fusion has emerged as a promising solution; however, these methods often rely on finely annotated radar data, which is scarce and labor-intensive to produce. To address this challenge, we present CLLAP, a Contrastive Learning-based LiDAR-Augmented Pretraining framework that enhances the performance of existing radar-camera fusion methods for 3D object detection. CLLAP leverages abundant LiDAR data to generate pseudo-radar data using the proposed L2R (LiDAR-to-Radar) Sampling method. Then, it incorporates this data into a novel dual-stage, dual-modality contrastive learning strategy, enabling effective self-supervised learning from paired pseudo-radar and image data. This approach facilitates effective pretraining of existing radar-camera fusion models in a plug-and-play manner, enhancing their feature extraction capabilities and improving detection accuracy and robustness. Experimental results using NuScenes and Lyft Level 5 datasets demonstrate significant performance improvements across three baseline models, highlighting CLLAP's effectiveness in advancing radar-camera fusion for autonomous driving applications.

AI.tldr: 提出CLLAP框架，通过对比学习和LiDAR生成伪雷达数据，提升雷达-相机融合的3D目标检测性能，无需人工标注雷达数据。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达-相机融合方法依赖人工精细标注的雷达数据，标注成本高且数据稀缺，限制了方法的实用性。
AI.method: 利用LiDAR数据通过L2R采样生成伪雷达数据，设计双阶段双模态对比学习策略，对伪雷达和图像数据进行自监督预训练，以即插即用方式增强现有融合模型的特征提取能力。
AI.result: 在NuScenes和Lyft Level 5数据集上，三种基线模型均取得显著性能提升，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CLLAP能有效缓解雷达标注数据稀缺问题，提升雷达-相机融合模型在自动驾驶3D检测中的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Learning to Think from Multiple Thinkers
comment: Comments are welcome. There are 78 pages and 5 Figures
summary:
We study learning with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) supervision from multiple thinkers, all of whom provide correct but possibly systematically different solutions, e.g., step-by-step solutions to math problems written by different thinkers, or step-by-step execution traces of different programs solving the same problem.
  We consider classes that are computationally easy to learn using CoT supervision from a single thinker, but hard to learn with only end-result supervision, i.e., without CoT (Joshi et al. 2025). We establish that, under cryptographic assumptions, learning can be hard from CoT supervision provided by two or a few different thinkers, in passive data-collection settings.
  On the other hand, we provide a generic computationally efficient active learning algorithm that learns with a small amount of CoT data per thinker that is completely independent of the target accuracy $\varepsilon$, a moderate number of thinkers that scales as $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log \log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$, and sufficient passive end-result data that scales as $\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\cdot poly\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}$.

AI.tldr: 研究多思考者提供的思维链（CoT）监督学习。在被动学习设置下，即使每个思考者都提供正确但系统不同的CoT，学习可能是困难的（基于密码学假设）。但在主动学习设置下，提出了一种高效算法：仅需少量CoT数据（与精度ε无关）、少量思考者（约log 1/ε log log 1/ε）和适量被动结果数据（约1/ε poly log 1/ε）。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT研究多假设来自单一完美思考者，但现实中CoT数据常来自多个不同思考者（如不同学生写的解题步骤），这些CoT虽然都正确但系统性地不同。这给学习带来了新的挑战，本文旨在探索多思考者CoT监督下的可学习性。
AI.method: 理论分析：在密码学假设下证明被动学习中多思考者CoT的困难性；随后提出一个主动学习算法，利用少量主动获取的CoT数据和大量被动结果数据实现高效学习。
AI.result: 1) 被动学习场景下，两个或少量不同思考者的CoT监督可能导致学习困难（基于密码学假设）。2) 主动学习场景下，提出的算法能实现高效学习。
AI.conclusion: 多思考者CoT监督的难易程度取决于学习范式：被动学习可能很难，但主动学习可以有效克服这一困难。

title: Reconstructive Authority Model: Runtime Execution Validity Under Partial Observability
comment: Agent Governance Series, Paper P5. Standalone resubmission following consolidation of P3+P4 into a single paper (P3/4, submit/7510907). Prior submission: submit/7501806. Companion papers on arXiv: P0 (2604.17511), P1 (2603.18829), P2 (2604.17517). Zenodo: 10.5281/zenodo.19669430
summary:
Autonomous systems increasingly operate under partial observability where execution-relevant state is never fully accessible. Existing governance mechanisms -- trusted execution environments, oracle-signed state proofs, cryptographic attestation -- enforce the integrity of computation and state projections. We show this is structurally insufficient: an authenticated projection of state is necessary but never sufficient for execution validity.
  We introduce the Reconstructive Authority Model (RAM), which separates integrity from coverage. RAM defines a reconstruction gate that reasons over an explicit coverage envelope -- comprising proven state, declared assumptions, and an acknowledged unobservable residual -- and permits execution only when coverage is adequate for the action class. When coverage is insufficient, RAM narrows privileges dynamically or fails closed. Attestation proves trust in measurement; RAM proves adequacy of what is measured.
  We formalize RAM, prove necessity via two theorems (attestation insufficiency and RAM necessity) and three corollaries, and present a hybrid RAM+Attestation architecture with privilege-narrowing. Synthetic experiments (N=100,000, seed=42) show RAM achieves zero invalid execution rates at all coverage levels. Attestation-based systems exhibit IER=0.423 at low coverage and IER=0.233 even at full coverage, the latter arising from undefined-state handling failures undetectable by integrity checks alone.
  This reframes execution validity as a coverage reconstruction problem, distinct from and complementary to integrity guarantees provided by attestation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出重构权威模型（RAM），证明仅靠认证机制（如TEE、签名状态证明）不足以保证部分可观测自治系统的执行有效性，RAM通过显式覆盖包络和重构门控来评估状态覆盖是否足够，从而在不充分时动态缩小权限或安全关闭。
AI.motivation: 现有治理机制（可信执行环境、签名状态证明、密码学认证）只能保证计算和状态投影的完整性，但在部分可观测场景中，即使状态投影是真实的（认证完整性），也可能因为未观测到的状态信息而导致执行无效。现有方法无法区分"状态被正确测量"和"测量了充分的状态"这两个不同的问题。
AI.method: 提出RAM模型，引入"重构门控"（reconstruction gate），显式定义覆盖包络（coverage envelope），包含已证明状态、声明假设和已知不可观测残差三个部分。根据动作类别判断覆盖是否充分，不充分时动态缩小权限或安全关闭。同时提出混合RAM+认证架构，结合两者优势。
AI.result: 通过形式化证明（两个定理和三个推论）证明认证不充分性和RAM必要性；合成实验（N=100,000）显示RAM在所有覆盖水平下实现零无效执行率，而纯认证系统在低覆盖下无效执行率为0.423，即使在满覆盖下也因未定义状态处理错误仍有0.233的无效执行率。
AI.conclusion: 执行有效性本质上是覆盖重构问题，与认证提供的完整性保证既不同又互补。RAM重新定义了自治系统治理的理论基础。

title: QEVA: A Reference-Free Evaluation Metric for Narrative Video Summarization with Multimodal Question Answering
summary: Video-to-text summarization remains underexplored in terms of comprehensive evaluation methods. Traditional n-gram overlap-based metrics and recent large language model (LLM)-based approaches depend heavily on human-written reference summaries, limiting their practicality and sensitivity to nuanced semantic aspects. In this paper, we propose QEVA, a reference-free metric evaluating candidate summaries directly against source videos through multimodal question answering. QEVA assesses summaries along three clear dimensions: Coverage, Factuality, and Chronology. We also introduce MLVU(VS)-Eval, a new annotated benchmark derived from the MLVU dataset, comprising 800 summaries generated from 200 videos using state-of-the-art video-language multimodal models. This dataset establishes a transparent and consistent framework for evaluation. Experimental results demonstrate that QEVA shows higher correlation with human judgments compared to existing approaches, as measured by Kendall's $τ_b$, $τ_c$, and Spearman's $ρ$. We hope that our benchmark and metric will facilitate meaningful progress in video-to-text summarization research and provide valuable insights for the development of future evaluation methods.

AI.tldr: 提出QEVA，一种无需参考摘要的、基于多模态问答的视频摘要评估指标，从覆盖度、事实性和时序性三个维度进行评估；同时构建了MLVU(VS)-Eval基准数据集，实验显示QEVA与人类判断的相关性优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要评估方法依赖人工撰写的参考摘要，实用性受限且对细粒度语义不敏感，亟需一种无需参考的自动化评估方法。
AI.method: 提出QEVA，通过多模态问答直接比较候选摘要与源视频，从Coverage（覆盖度）、Factuality（事实性）、Chronology（时序性）三个维度进行评估；并构建MLVU(VS)-Eval基准数据集（200个视频、800条摘要）。
AI.result: QEVA在Kendall's τ_b、τ_c和Spearman's ρ指标上与人类判断的相关性均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: QEVA作为参考自由的评估指标，在视频摘要评估任务上表现优异，有望推动视频到文本摘要研究的发展。

title: Conflict-Aware Harmonized Rotational Gradient for Multiscale Kinetic Regimes
summary:
In this paper, we propose a harmonized rotational gradient method, termed HRGrad, for simultaneously tackling multiscale time-dependent kinetic problems with varying small parameters.
  These parameters exhibit asymptotic transitions from microscopic to macroscopic physics, making it a challenging multi-task problem to solve over all ranges simultaneously.
  Solving tasks in different asymptotic regions often encounter gradient conflicts, which can lead to the failure of multi-task learning.
  To address this challenge, we explicitly encode a hidden representation of these parameters, ensuring that the corresponding solving tasks are serialized for simultaneous training.
  Furthermore, to mitigate gradient conflicts, we segment the prediction results to construct task losses and introduce a novel gradient alignment metric to ensure a positive dot product between the final update and each loss-specific gradient.
  This metric maintains consistent optimization rates for all task losses and dynamically adjusts gradient magnitudes based on conflict levels.
  Moreover, we provide a mathematical proof demonstrating the convergence of the HRGrad method, which is evaluated across a range of challenging asymptotic-preserving neural networks (APNNs) scenarios.
  We conduct an extensive set of experiments encompassing the Bhatnagar-Gross-Krook (BGK) equation and the linear transport equation in all ranges of Knudsen number.
  Our results indicate that HRGrad effectively overcomes the `failure modes' of APNNs in these problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HRGrad方法，通过编码隐藏表示和梯度对齐度量，解决多尺度含时动力学问题中多任务学习的梯度冲突，在BGK方程和线性传输方程中有效克服了渐近保持神经网络的失效模式。
AI.motivation: 解决多尺度含时动力学问题中，不同渐近区域任务间存在梯度冲突，导致多任务学习失败的问题。
AI.method: 提出HRGrad方法：1) 编码参数的隐藏表示，序列化不同任务；2) 分割预测结果构建任务损失；3) 引入梯度对齐度量，确保最终更新与各损失梯度正相关，动态调整梯度幅度。
AI.result: 在BGK方程和线性传输方程的广泛Knudsen数范围内，HRGrad有效克服了APNNs的失效模式。
AI.conclusion: HRGrad通过梯度对齐策略解决了多尺度动力学问题中多任务学习的梯度冲突，并提供了收敛性证明。

title: MEMCoder: Multi-dimensional Evolving Memory for Private-Library-Oriented Code Generation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at general code generation, but their performance drops sharply in enterprise settings that rely on internal private libraries absent from public pre-training corpora. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a training-free alternative by providing static API documentation, we find that such documentation typically provides only isolated definitions, leaving a fundamental knowledge gap. Specifically, LLMs struggle with a task-level lack of coordination patterns between APIs and an API-level misunderstanding of parameter constraints and boundary conditions. To address this, we propose MEMCoder, a novel framework that enables LLMs to autonomously accumulate and evolve Usage Guidelines across these two dimensions. MEMCoder introduces a Multi-dimensional Evolving Memory that captures distilled lessons from the model's own problem-solving trajectories. During inference, MEMCoder employs a dual-source retrieval mechanism to inject both static documentation and relevant historical guidelines into the context. The framework operates in an automated closed loop by using objective execution feedback to reflect on successes and failures, resolve knowledge conflicts, and dynamically update memory. Extensive evaluations on the NdonnxEval and NumbaEval benchmarks demonstrate that MEMCoder substantially enhances existing RAG systems, yielding an average absolute pass@1 gain of 16.31%. Furthermore, MEMCoder exhibits vastly superior domain-specific adaptation compared to existing memory-based continual learning methods.

AI.tldr: MEMCoder通过多维演化记忆机制，让LLM在私有API场景下自主积累和更新使用指南，显著提升企业级代码生成能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在企业级代码生成中因缺乏私有库知识而表现不佳，RAG提供的静态文档只包含孤立定义，缺乏API间的协调模式和参数边界约束等深层知识，导致模型难以正确使用企业内部的私有API。
AI.method: 提出MEMCoder框架，核心是**多维演化记忆**（Multi-dimensional Evolving Memory），从模型自身的解题轨迹中提取教训，涵盖任务层面（API协调模式）和API层面（参数约束）。推理时采用**双源检索**机制，同时注入静态文档和历史指南。通过执行反馈自动闭环运作，反思成功/失败、解决知识冲突并动态更新记忆。
AI.result: 在NdonnxEval和NumbaEval基准上，MEMCoder相比现有RAG系统平均绝对pass@1提升16.31%，且领域自适应能力远超现有的基于记忆的持续学习方法。
AI.conclusion: MEMCoder通过让LLM在推理过程中自主积累和演化私有API的使用经验，有效弥合了静态文档与动态使用知识之间的鸿沟，为企业级代码生成提供了一种无需额外训练的实用解决方案。

title: Light 'em Up: Enabling Few-Shot Low-Light 3D Gaussian Splatting with Multi-Scale Explicit Retinex Illumination Decoupling
comment: 19 pages, 5 figures. Code available at https://github.com/YhuoyuH/MERID-GS
summary: Full 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis under low-light conditions remains challenging. Insufficient illumination, noise amplification, and view-dependent photometric inconsistencies prevent existing methods from jointly preserving geometric consistency and photorealism. Unsupervised approaches often exhibit color drift under large viewpoint variations, while supervised low-light enhancement models, though effective for 2D tasks, struggle to generalize to new scenes and typically require retraining. To address this issue, we propose MERID-GS, a Multi-Scale Explicit Retinex Illumination-Decoupled Gaussian framework for low-light 360$^\circ$ synthesis. Based on Retinex theory, the method explicitly separates illumination and reflectance, and suppresses noise propagation while enhancing dark-region structures via a learnable gain and Illumination-State-Guided Frequency Gating. Combined with lightweight Reflection Head and 3D Gaussian Splatting, MERID-GS adapts to new scenes with only a few shots and enables stable low-light novel view synthesis from sparse-view observations. In addition, we construct a low-light multi-view dataset covering full 360$^\circ$ scenes for joint evaluation. Thorough experiments across multiple datasets in this area demonstrate that MERID-GS achieves SOTA performance, exhibiting superior cross-scene generalization and view consistency. The source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/YhuoyuH/MERID-GS..

AI.tldr: MERID-GS提出了一种基于Retinex理论的多尺度显式照明解耦高斯框架，用于低光照360度新视角合成，通过分离照明和反射、抑制噪声传播，仅需少量样本即可实现跨场景泛化的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 低光照条件下的360度新视角合成面临光照不足、噪声放大和视角依赖的光度不一致等问题，现有无监督方法在大视角变化下出现颜色漂移，有监督的低光增强模型难以泛化到新场景且需要重新训练。
AI.method: 基于Retinex理论，显式分离光照和反射分量；通过可学习增益和光照状态引导的频率门控抑制噪声传播并增强暗区结构；结合轻量级Reflection Head和3D高斯泼溅，实现稀疏视角下的稳定新视角合成。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，MERID-GS达到了SOTA性能，展现出优越的跨场景泛化能力和视角一致性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了低光照360度新视角合成的核心挑战，具有优秀的跨场景泛化能力和少量样本适应能力。

title: The Optimal Sample Complexity of Multiclass and List Learning
summary:
While the optimal sample complexity of binary classification in terms of the VC dimension is well-established, determining the optimal sample complexity of multiclass classification has remained open. The appropriate complexity parameter for multiclass classification is the DS dimension, and despite significant efforts, a gap of $\sqrt{\text{DS}}$ has persisted between the upper and lower bounds on sample complexity.
  Recent work by Hanneke et al. (2026) shows a novel algebraic characterization of multiclass hypothesis classes in terms of their DS dimension. Building up on this, we show that the maximum hypergraph density of any multiclass hypothesis class is upper-bounded by its DS dimension. This proves a longstanding conjecture of Daniely and Shalev-Shwartz (2014). As a consequence, we determine the optimal dependence of the sample complexity on the DS dimension for multiclass as well as list learning.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了多类假设类的最大超图密度受其DS维数上界约束，证实了Daniely和Shalev-Shwartz (2014)的长期猜想，从而确定了多类分类和列表学习样本复杂度对DS维数的最优依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 二元分类的最优样本复杂度（基于VC维）已成熟，但多类分类的最优样本复杂度问题长期未解。DS维数被认为是合适的复杂度参数，但上下界之间存在√DS的差距，需要填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 基于Hanneke等人(2026)对多类假设类DS维数的全新代数刻画，证明了最大超图密度≤DS维数，从而建立了两者之间的关键联系。
AI.result: 证明了Daniely和Shalev-Shwartz (2014)提出的关于超图密度与DS维数关系的猜想，并确定了多类分类和列表学习样本复杂度对DS维数的最优依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 该结果闭合了多类分类样本复杂度理论中的一个重要开放问题，确立了DS维数作为多类分类复杂度度量的最优性。

title: CT-Guided Spatially-varying Regularization for Voxel-Wise Deformable Whole-Body PET Registration
summary: Whole-body Positron Emission Tomography (PET) registration is essential for multi-parametric tumor characterization and assessment of metastatic disease progression. In deep learning-based deformable registration, the dense displacement field (DDF) regularizer is crucial for stabilizing optimization and preventing unrealistic deformations in large 3D volumes. A key challenge in whole-body deformable registration is anatomical heterogeneity, rigid structures (e.g., bones) should undergo stronger regularization, whereas soft tissues require more flexible deformation and weaker constraints. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective CT-guided spatially-varying regularization strategy for whole-body cross-tracer deformable PET registration. The key idea is to use the paired CT volume from the PET/CT acquisition to construct a voxel-wise regularization map for the DDF, replacing the conventional single global regularization weight. This yields anatomy-adaptive regularization strength across rigid and soft tissues. The proposed method is evaluated on a real clinical cross-tracer PET/CT dataset of 296 patients involving 18F-PSMA and 18F-FDG, showing that the proposed method achieves statistically significant improvements over weakly-supervised registration baseline in both whole-body registration performance and organ-wise alignment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种CT引导的空间可变正则化策略，用于全身跨示踪剂PET/CT变形配准，通过CT图像构建体素级正则化图，对不同组织（骨骼/软组织）施加自适应约束强度，在296名患者数据集上优于弱监督基线。
AI.motivation: 全身PET配准面临解剖异质性挑战：刚性结构（如骨骼）需要强正则化，而软组织需要更灵活的形变。传统单一全局正则化权重无法适应这种组织差异，导致配准效果不佳。
AI.method: 利用PET/CT采集中的配对CT图像构建体素级正则化图，替代单一全局正则化权重，对刚性组织施加强正则化约束，对软组织施加弱约束，实现解剖自适应的空间变化正则化。
AI.result: 在296名患者的真实临床跨示踪剂PET/CT数据集（18F-PSMA和18F-FDG）上评估，所提方法在全身配准性能和器官级对齐方面均显著优于弱监督配准基线。
AI.conclusion: CT引导的空间可变正则化策略能有效解决全身PET变形配准中的解剖异质性问题，提升配准精度和临床实用性。

title: All That Glitters Is Not Audio: Rethinking Text Priors and Audio Reliance in Audio-Language Evaluation
summary: Large Audio-Language Models show consistent performance gains across speech and audio benchmarks, yet high scores may not reflect true auditory perception. If a model can answer questions without processing the acoustic signal, the benchmark fails as a measure of auditory understanding. We present a diagnostic framework using two axes: text prior, which measures answerability from text and general knowledge alone, and audio reliance, which assesses actual dependency on the acoustic signal. Evaluating eight LALMs across three benchmarks, we find that models retain 60-72% of their full audio scores even without any audio input. Moreover, among items that require audio, only 3.0-4.2% need the complete audio clip; the majority can be resolved using localized fragments. These findings challenge the assumption that benchmark performance equals robust audio understanding, and we conclude with practical guidelines for improving evaluation reliability and benchmark design.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示当前音频-语言模型在基准测试中的高分主要依赖于文本先验知识和局部音频片段，而非真正的听觉感知能力。模型即使完全去掉音频输入，仍能保留60-72%的性能；真正需要完整音频才能回答的问题仅占3.0-4.2%。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-语言模型在基准测试中表现优异，但高分可能并不能反映真实的听觉感知能力。如果模型可以在不处理声学信号的情况下回答问题，那么基准测试就失去了作为听觉理解度量的有效性。
AI.method: 提出了一个诊断框架，包含两个核心维度：1) text prior（文本先验）——衡量仅凭文本和常识就能回答问题的程度；2) audio reliance（音频依赖）——评估模型实际依赖声学信号的程度。在8个LALM和3个基准上进行了系统评估。
AI.result: 1) 模型即使没有音频输入，仍能保留60-72%的完整音频分数；2) 真正需要完整音频才能回答的问题仅占3.0-4.2%；3) 大多数问题可通过局部音频片段解决。
AI.conclusion: 当前基准测试分数与真正的听觉理解之间存在巨大差距，现有评估方法存在严重缺陷。作者提出了改进评估可靠性和基准设计的实用建议。

title: SemiSAM-O1: How far can we push the boundary of annotation-efficient medical image segmentation?
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has become a promising solution to alleviate the annotation burden of deep learning-based medical image segmentation models. While recent advances in foundation model-driven SSL have pushed the boundary to extremely limited annotation scenarios, they fail to maintain robust competitive performance in complex imaging modalities. In this paper, we propose SemiSAM-O1, an annotation-efficient framework using only one annotated template image for segmentation. SemiSAM-O1 extends the specialist-generalist collaborative learning framework to the extreme one-label setting by fully exploiting the foundation model's feature representation capability beyond its prompting interface. SemiSAM-O1 operates in two stages. In the first stage, the foundation model's encoder extracts dense features from all volumes, and class prototypes derived from the single annotated template are propagated to the unlabeled pool via feature similarity to produce coarse initial pseudo-labels. In the second stage, an iterative training-and-refinement loop progressively improves both the segmentation model and the pseudo-labels over multiple rounds, where each round trains the model from scratch on current pseudo-labels and generates updated predictions with voxel-wise uncertainty estimates. An uncertainty-guided refinement step further leverages the foundation model's global feature space to correct high-uncertainty regions by aggregating labels from their most similar confident neighbors, establishing a virtuous cycle of mutual improvement. Extensive experiments on a wide range of segmentation tasks across different modalities and anatomical targets demonstrate that SemiSAM-O1 significantly narrows the performance gap between one-label semi-supervised learning and full supervision, while significantly reducing the computational overhead of online foundation model inference.

AI.tldr: 提出SemiSAM-O1框架，利用单个标注模板实现医学图像分割的极端少样本半监督学习。通过两阶段流程（特征相似度伪标签生成 + 迭代训练-精炼循环），在多种医学图像分割任务上显著缩小了单标签半监督与全监督之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基于基础模型的半监督学习在极低标注场景下表现不足，尤其是在复杂成像模态中难以保持鲁棒竞争性能。本文旨在解决极端少标注（仅一个标注模板）下的医学图像分割问题。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段利用基础模型编码器提取稠密特征，通过特征相似度将单标注模板的类别原型传播到未标注池生成粗伪标签；第二阶段是迭代训练-精炼循环，每轮从头训练分割模型并生成带体素级不确定性估计的预测，然后利用基础模型全局特征空间对高不确定性区域进行校正。
AI.result: 在多种模态和解剖目标的分割任务上，SemiSAM-O1显著缩小了单标签半监督学习与全监督之间的性能差距，同时大幅降低在线基础模型推理的计算开销。
AI.conclusion: SemiSAM-O1在极端少标注场景下有效利用了基础模型的表征能力，实现了高效的医学图像分割，且计算开销可控。

title: A Survey on Split Learning for LLM Fine-Tuning: Models, Systems, and Privacy Optimizations
summary: Fine-tuning unlocks large language models (LLMs) for specialized applications, but its high computational cost often puts it out of reach for resource-constrained organizations. While cloud platforms could provide the needed resources, data privacy concerns make sharing sensitive information with third parties risky. A promising solution is split learning for LLM fine-tuning, which divides the model between clients and a server, allowing collaborative and secure training through exchanged intermediate data, thus enabling resource-constrained participants to adapt LLMs safely. % In light of this, a growing body of literature has emerged to advance this paradigm, introducing varied model methods, system optimizations, and privacy defense-attack techniques for split learning. To bring clarity and direction to the field, a comprehensive survey is needed to classify, compare, and critique these diverse approaches. This paper fills the gap by presenting the first extensive survey dedicated to split learning for LLM fine-tuning. We propose a unified, fine-grained training pipeline to pinpoint key operational components and conduct a systematic review of state-of-the-art work across three core dimensions: model-level optimization, system-level efficiency, and privacy preservation. Through this structured taxonomy, we establish a foundation for advancing scalable, robust, and secure collaborative LLM adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文首次全面综述了拆分学习在LLM微调中的应用，从模型优化、系统效率和隐私保护三个维度系统梳理了现有工作，并提出了统一的细粒度训练流程框架。
AI.motivation: LLM微调计算成本高，资源受限的组织难以承担；虽然可以利用云平台，但数据隐私问题使共享敏感信息存在风险。拆分学习提供了一种有前景的解决方案，但该领域缺乏系统性的综述来分类和比较各类方法。
AI.method: 提出统一的细粒度训练流程来定位关键操作环节，从模型级优化、系统级效率和隐私保护三个核心维度对现有工作进行系统综述，建立结构化分类体系。
AI.result: 首次提供了拆分学习用于LLM微调的综合综述，建立了系统性分类框架，涵盖了模型优化、系统效率和隐私保护等多方面技术。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为推进可扩展、鲁棒且安全的协作式LLM微调方法奠定了基础，并为未来研究方向提供了指导。

title: TopoHR: Hierarchical Centerline Representation for Cyclic Topology Reasoning in Driving Scenes with Point-to-Instance Relations
summary: Topology reasoning is crucial for autonomous driving. Current methods primarily focus on instance-level learning for centerline detection, followed by a sequential module for topology reasoning that relies on simplified MLP layers. Moreover, they often neglect the importance of \textit{point-to-instance} (P2I) relationships in topology reasoning. To address these limitations, we present TopoHR (Topological Hierarchical Representation), a novel end-to-end framework that establishes cyclic interaction between centerline detection and topology reasoning, allowing them to iteratively enhance each other. Specifically, we introduce a hierarchical centerline representation including point queries, instance queries, and semantic representations. These multi-level features are seamlessly integrated and fused within a hierarchical centerline decoder. Furthermore, we design a hierarchical topology reasoning module that captures both fine-grained P2I relationships and global instance-to-instance (I2I) connections within a unified architecture. With these novel components, TopoHR ensures accurate and robust topology reasoning. On the OpenLane-V2 benchmark, TopoHR refreshes state-of-the-art performance with significant improvements. Notably, compared with previous best results, TopoHR achieves +3.8 in $\mathrm{DET}_{\text{l}}$, +5.4 in $\mathrm{TOP}_{\text{ll}}$ on $\text{subset_A}$ and +11.0 in $\mathrm{DET}_{\text{l}}$, +7.9 in $\mathrm{TOP}_{\text{ll}}$ on $\text{subset_B}$, validating the effectiveness of the proposed components. The code will be shared publicly at https://github.com/Yifeng-Bai/TopoHR.git.

AI.tldr: TopoHR是一个面向自动驾驶的端到端拓扑推理框架，通过层级中心线表示（点查询、实例查询、语义表示）和层级拓扑推理模块（同时建模点到实例和实例到实例关系），实现中心线检测与拓扑推理的循环交互与相互增强，在OpenLane-V2基准上取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶拓扑推理方法存在两个关键局限：(1) 采用先实例级中心线检测再串行MLP拓扑推理的两阶段方式，检测与推理相互割裂；(2) 忽略了点到实例(P2I)细粒度关系在拓扑推理中的重要性。作者旨在建立一个检测与推理能够循环交互增强的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出TopoHR框架，核心包括：(1) 层级中心线表示：点查询、实例查询和语义表示的多级特征；(2) 层级中心线解码器：融合多级特征；(3) 层级拓扑推理模块：在同一架构中捕获细粒度P2I关系和全局实例到实例(I2I)连接，实现检测与推理的循环交互。
AI.result: 在OpenLane-V2基准上取得SOTA，subset_A上DET_l提升+3.8，TOP_ll提升+5.4；subset_B上DET_l提升+11.0，TOP_ll提升+7.9。
AI.conclusion: 层级表示和层级拓扑推理能有效提升自动驾驶拓扑推理的准确性和鲁棒性，中心线检测与拓扑推理的循环交互是更优范式。

title: FDIM: A Feature-distance-based Generic Video Quality Metric for Versatile Codecs
summary: Video technology is advancing toward Ultra High Definition (UHD) and High Dynamic Range (HDR), which intensifies the need for higher compression efficiency for these high-specification videos. Beyond advances in traditional codecs, neural video codecs (NVCs) have attracted significant research attention and have evolved rapidly over the past few years. The coding artifacts of NVCs often exhibit content-varying and generative characteristics, which differ from those of conventional codecs and are challenging for traditional video quality assessment (VQA) methods to capture. Therefore, VQA metrics are required to generalize across different codecs, content types, and dynamic ranges to better support video codec research and evaluation. In this paper, we propose FDIM, a feature-distance-based generic video quality metric for both traditional and neural video codecs across SDR and HDR formats. FDIM employs a hybrid architecture that integrates deep and hand-crafted features. The deep feature component learns multi-scale representations to capture distortions ranging from structural and textural fidelity degradation to high-level semantic deviations, while the hand-crafted feature component provides stable complementary cues to improve overall generalization. We trained FDIM on a large-scale subjective quality assessment dataset (DCVQA) consisting of over 16k video sequences encoded by traditional block-based hybrid video codecs and end-to-end perceptually optimized neural video codecs. Extensive experiments on ten SDR/HDR VQA datasets containing diverse, previously unseen codecs demonstrate that FDIM achieves strong generalization and high correlation with subjective assessment. The source code for FDIM and the DCVQA validation set will be released at https://github.com/MCL-ZJU/FDIM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FDIM，一种基于特征距离的通用视频质量评估指标，适用于传统和神经视频编码器，支持SDR和HDR格式，采用深度特征与手工特征混合架构，在大规模主观数据集上训练，在多个数据集上展现出强泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 超高清和高动态范围视频的发展对压缩效率提出更高要求，神经视频编码器产生的内容变化性、生成性伪影难以被传统VQA方法捕捉，需要能跨编码器、内容类型和动态范围泛化的质量评估指标。
AI.method: 提出FDIM，采用混合架构：深度特征组件学习多尺度表示以捕获从结构/纹理保真度退化到高级语义偏差的失真；手工特征组件提供稳定的互补线索以提升泛化能力。在大规模主观数据集DCVQA（超1.6万视频序列）上训练。
AI.result: 在10个SDR/HDR VQA数据集（包含多种未见过的编解码器）上的大量实验表明，FDIM实现了强泛化能力，与主观评估具有高度相关性。
AI.conclusion: FDIM作为一种通用视频质量指标，有效解决了传统和神经视频编码器在不同动态范围下的质量评估问题，具有较强的泛化性能。

title: Institutions for the Post-Scarcity of Judgment
comment: 5 pages, 9 references. Submitted to Communications of the ACM (Opinion section). Comments welcome
summary: Each major technological revolution inverts a particular scarcity and rebuilds institutions around the shift. The near-consensus diagnosis of the AI revolution holds that AI collapses the cost of prediction while judgment remains scarce. This Opinion argues the inversion has now flipped: competent-looking judgment (selecting, ranking, attributing, certifying) is produced at scale and at marginal cost approaching zero, and four complements become scarce: verified signal, legitimacy, authentic provenance, and integration capacity (the community's tolerance for delegated cognition). Because judgment is the substance of institutions, the institutions built to manufacture legitimate judgment (courts, journals, licensing bodies, legislatures) now compete with the technology for the same functional role. The piece traces the pattern across scientific institutions, professional licensing, intellectual property, democratic legitimacy, and foundation-model concentration, and closes with a three-move agenda: reframe AI policy as institutional redesign, build provenance and verification as commons, and develop the formal apparatus for institutional composition under strategic agents.

AI.tldr: 本文认为AI革命已从"预测廉价、判断稀缺"转向"判断被大规模生产且边际成本趋零"，而验证信号、合法性、真实来源和整合能力成为新的稀缺资源。制度与AI在争夺"制造合法判断"的功能角色上形成竞争。
AI.motivation: 挑战当前主流共识（AI降低预测成本但判断仍稀缺），提出反转论：判断本身已被AI大规模、低成本地生产（选择、排序、归因、认证），引发新的稀缺和制度危机。
AI.method: 观点性论述，通过跨领域（科学机构、专业认证、知识产权、民主合法性、基础模型集中化）追踪同一种制度-技术竞争模式。
AI.result: 识别出四种新的稀缺品：验证信号（verified signal）、合法性（legitimacy）、真实来源（authentic provenance）、整合能力（integration capacity）。指出制造合法判断的传统制度（法院、期刊、认证机构、立法机构）与AI产生功能竞争。
AI.conclusion: 提出三步骤议程：1) 将AI政策重新视为制度设计；2) 将来源验证和验证机制建设为公共品；3) 发展应对策略性主体的制度组合理论形式化工具。

title: Layerwise Convergence Fingerprints for Runtime Misbehavior Detection in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models deployed at runtime can misbehave in ways that clean-data validation cannot anticipate: training-time backdoors lie dormant until triggered, jailbreaks subvert safety alignment, and prompt injections override the deployer's instructions. Existing runtime defenses address these threats one at a time and often assume a clean reference model, trigger knowledge, or editable weights, assumptions that rarely hold for opaque third-party artifacts. We introduce Layerwise Convergence Fingerprinting (LCF), a tuning-free runtime monitor that treats the inter-layer hidden-state trajectory as a health signal: LCF computes a diagonal Mahalanobis distance on every inter-layer difference, aggregates via Ledoit-Wolf shrinkage, and thresholds via leave-one-out calibration on 200 clean examples, with no reference model, trigger knowledge, or retraining. Evaluated on four architectures (Llama-3-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Gemma-2-9B, Qwen2.5-14B) across backdoors, jailbreaks, and prompt injection (56 backdoor combinations, 3 jailbreak techniques, and BIPIA email + code-QA), LCF reduces mean backdoor attack success rate (ASR) below 1% on Qwen2.5-7B and Gemma-2 and to 1.3% on Qwen2.5-14B, detects 92-100% of DAN jailbreaks (62-100% for GCG and softer role-play), and flags 100% of text-payload injections across all eight (model, domain) cells, at 12-16% backdoor FPR and <0.1% inference overhead. A single aggregation score covers all three threat families without threat-specific tuning, positioning LCF as a general-purpose runtime safety layer for cloud-served and on-device LLMs.

AI.tldr: LCF是一种无需微调、无需参考模型的运行时监控方法，通过分析LLM层间隐藏状态的轨迹（计算层间差异的对角马氏距离），有效检测后门攻击、越狱攻击和提示注入三类威胁，在多个模型上实现<1%的后门攻击成功率，无需针对特定威胁调参。
AI.motivation: 现有运行时防御方法针对后门、越狱、提示注入等威胁各自独立设计，且通常需要干净的参考模型、触发知识或可编辑的权重，这些假设对第三方黑盒模型不成立。因此需要一种通用的、无参考模型、无需重训练的运行时安全监控方案。
AI.method: LCF将层间隐藏状态轨迹作为健康信号：计算每个层间差异的对角马氏距离，通过Ledoit-Wolf收缩法聚合，并使用留一法校准在200个干净样本上设定阈值，无需参考模型、触发知识或重训练。
AI.result: 在Llama-3-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Gemma-2-9B、Qwen2.5-14B上，对后门攻击（56种组合）将平均攻击成功率降至<1%（Qwen2.5-7B/Gemma-2）和1.3%（Qwen2.5-14B）；DAN越狱检测率92-100%（GCG和软角色扮演62-100%）；文本载荷注入检测率100%；后门误报率12-16%，推理开销<0.1%。
AI.conclusion: LCF通过单一聚合分数覆盖三类威胁，无需针对特定威胁调参，可作为云端和端侧LLM的通用运行时安全层。

title: Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation Network Integrating Object-Level Label and Scene-Level Semantic Features for Multimodal Remote Sensing Images
summary: Semantic segmentation of multi-modal remote sensing imagery plays a pivotal role in land use/land cover (LULC) mapping, environmental monitoring, and precision earth observation. Current multi-modal approaches mainly focus on integrating complementary visual modalities, yet neglect the incorporating of non-visual textual data - a rich source of knowledge that can bridge semantic gaps between visual patterns and real-world concepts. To address this limitation, we propose TSMNet, a text supervised multi-modal open vocabulary semantic segmentation network that synergistically integrates textual supervision with visual representation for open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. Unlike conventional multi-modal segmentation frameworks, TSMNet introduces a dual-branch text encoder to extract both scene-level semantic and object-level label information from various textual data, enabling dynamic cross-modal fusion. These text-derived features dynamically interact with visual embeddings through the proposed text-guided visual semantic fusion module, enabling domain-aware feature refinement and human-interpretable decision-making. To verify our method, we innovatively construct two new multi-modal datasets, and carry out extensive experiments to make a comprehensive comparison between the proposed method and other state-of-the-art (SOTA) semantic segmentation models. Results demonstrate that TSMNet achieves superior segmentation accuracy while exhibiting robust generalization capabilities across diverse geographical and sensor-specific scenarios. This work establishes a new paradigm for explainable remote sensing analysis, demonstrating that textual knowledge integration significantly enhances model generalizability. The source code will be available at https://github.com/yeyuanxin110/TSMNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出TSMNet，一种文本监督的多模态开放词汇语义分割网络，通过引入双分支文本编码器提取场景级和对象级文本信息，与视觉特征进行动态跨模态融合，在遥感图像语义分割任务上超越SOTA方法，并展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感多模态语义分割方法仅关注视觉模态（如RGB、多光谱等）的融合，忽略了非视觉文本数据（如地理标签、场景描述）的利用，而这些文本数据能够弥合视觉模式与真实世界概念之间的语义鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出TSMNet，包含：(1) 双分支文本编码器，分别提取场景级语义和对象级标签信息；(2) 文本引导的视觉语义融合模块，实现文本与视觉特征的动态跨模态交互与领域感知特征细化；(3) 用于开放词汇语义分割的整体网络架构。
AI.result: 在自建的两个多模态数据集上，TSMNet在分割精度上优于现有SOTA模型，并在不同地理区域和传感器场景下展现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 文本知识的整合能显著提升模型的泛化能力，为可解释遥感分析建立了新范式。

title: Peer Identity Bias in Multi-Agent LLM Evaluation: An Empirical Study Using the TRUST Democratic Discourse Analysis Pipeline
summary: The TRUST democratic discourse analysis pipeline exposes its large language model (LLM) components to peer model identity through multiple structural channels -- a design feature whose bias implications have not previously been empirically tested. We provide the first systematic measurement of identity-dependent scoring bias across all active identity exposure channels in TRUST, crossing four model families with two anonymization scopes across 30 political statements. The central finding is that single-channel anonymization produces near-zero bias effects, because individual channels act in opposite directions and cancel each other out -- a result that would lead an evaluator to conclude that identity bias is absent when it is not. Only full-pipeline anonymization reveals the true pattern: homogeneous ensembles amplify identity-driven sycophancy when model identity is fully visible, while the heterogeneous production configuration shows the reverse. Model choice matters independently: one tested model exhibits baseline sycophancy two to three times higher than the others and near-zero deliberative conflict on ideological topics, making it structurally unsuitable for pipelines where genuine inter-role disagreement is the intended quality mechanism. Three practical conclusions follow. First, heterogeneous model ensembles are structurally more robust than homogeneous ones, achieving higher consensus rates and lower identity amplification. Second, full-pipeline anonymization is required for valid bias measurement -- partial anonymization is insufficient and actively misleading. Third, these findings have direct implications for the validation of multi-agent LLM systems in quality-critical applications: a system validated under partial anonymization or with a homogeneous ensemble may pass validation while retaining structural identity bias invisible to single-channel measurement.

AI.tldr: 本文系统测量了TRUST民主话语分析管道中LLM组件因模型身份暴露而产生的评分偏差。发现单通道匿名化因偏差相互抵消而产生近乎零的偏差效应（误导性结论），只有全管道匿名化才能揭示真实偏差模式。同质集成会放大身份驱动的谄媚行为，而异质生产配置则呈现相反模式。结论：异质模型集成结构更稳健，全管道匿名化是有效偏差测量的必要条件。
AI.motivation: TRUST管道设计让LLM组件通过多个结构通道暴露其模型身份，但这种设计带来的偏差影响此前未被实证检验。作者旨在首次系统测量所有活跃身份暴露通道中的身份依赖评分偏差。
AI.method: 跨越4个模型系列、2种匿名化范围、30个政治陈述，系统测量TRUST管道中所有活跃身份暴露通道的评分偏差，比较单通道匿名化与全管道匿名化的效应差异。
AI.result: 单通道匿名化产生近乎零偏差效应（因各通道偏差方向相反相互抵消）；全管道匿名化揭示：同质集成放大身份驱动谄媚行为，异质配置呈现相反模式。特定模型的基线谄媚行为比其他模型高2-3倍。
AI.conclusion: 异质模型集成结构上更稳健；全管道匿名化是有效偏差测量的必要条件，部分匿名化具有误导性；对多智能体LLM系统验证有直接影响。

title: Bridging Restoration and Generation Manifolds in One-Step Diffusion for Real-World Super-Resolution
summary: Pretrained diffusion models have revolutionized real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) but suffer from computational bottlenecks due to iterative sampling. Recent single-step distillation accelerates inference but faces a stark perception-distortion trade-off due to rigid timestep initialization, distributional trajectory mismatches, and fragile stochastic modulation. To address this, we present Adaptive Inversion and Degradation-aware Sampling for Real-ISR (IDaS-SR), a one-step framework bridging the deterministic restoration and stochastic generation manifolds. At its core, the Manifold Inversion Noise Estimator (MINE) resolves these initialization and trajectory mismatches by predicting a severity-aware timestep and inversion noise, precisely anchoring low-quality latents onto the diffusion trajectory. Furthermore, to mitigate fragile stochastic modulation, we propose CHARIOT, a continuous generative steering mechanism. By rescheduling trajectories and interpolating noise, it enables explicit navigation of the perception-distortion boundary without compromising structural priors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IDaS-SR outperforms state-of-the-art methods, seamlessly transitioning from a rigorous structural restorer to a sophisticated texture hallucinator in a single inference step.

AI.tldr: IDaS-SR提出了一种单步扩散模型框架，通过自适应逆推和降质感知采样，在单次推理中实现了从结构恢复到纹理生成的平滑过渡，解决了感知-失真权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单步蒸馏方法在真实图像超分辨率中面临感知-失真权衡，主要原因包括僵化的时间步初始化、分布轨迹不匹配以及脆弱的随机调制。
AI.method: 提出MINE（流形逆推噪声估计器）预测严重程度感知的时间步和逆推噪声，以及CHARIOT（连续生成引导机制）通过重新调度轨迹和插值噪声来显式导航感知-失真边界。
AI.result: 在多个基准上超越了现有最先进方法，能够在一个推理步骤中从严格的结构恢复器平滑过渡到复杂的纹理生成器。
AI.conclusion: IDaS-SR有效解决了单步扩散模型在真实图像超分辨率中的感知-失真权衡问题，实现了高效且高质量的图像恢复。

title: EXACT: an explainable anomaly-aware vision foundation model for analysis of 3D chest CT
summary: Chest computed tomography (CT) is central to the detection and management of thoracic disease, yet the growing scale and complexity of volumetric imaging increasingly exceed what can be addressed by scan-level prediction alone. Clinically useful AI for CT must not only recognize disease across the whole volume, but also localize abnormalities and provide interpretable visual evidence. Existing vision-language foundation models typically compress scans and reports into global image-text representations, limiting their ability to preserve spatial evidence and support clinically meaningful interpretation. Here we developed EXACT, an explainable anomaly-aware foundation model for three-dimensional chest CT that learns spatially resolved representations from paired clinical scans and radiology reports. EXACT was pre-trained on 25,692 CT-reports pairs using anatomy-aware weak supervision, jointly learning organ segmentation and multi-instance anomaly localization without manual voxel-level annotations. The resulting organ-specific anomaly-aware maps assign each voxel a disease-specific anomaly score confined to its corresponding anatomy, jointly encoding lesion extent and organ-level context. In retrospective multinational and multi-center evaluations, EXACT showed broad and consistent improvements across clinically relevant CT tasks, spanning multi-disease diagnosis, zero-shot anomaly localization, downstream adaptation, and visually grounded report generation, outperforming existing three-dimensional medical foundation models. By transforming routine clinical CT scans and free-text reports into explainable voxel-level representations, EXACT establishes a scalable paradigm for trustworthy volumetric medical AI.

AI.tldr: EXACT是一个面向三维胸部CT的可解释异常感知基础模型，通过解剖感知弱监督学习从25,692对CT-报告对中训练，联合学习器官分割和多实例异常定位，生成器官特异性的异常感知图，在多项临床任务上优于现有医学基础模型。
AI.motivation: 临床CT影像日益复杂，现有视觉-语言基础模型仅做全局图像-文本表征，无法保留空间证据和支持可解释的临床推理，缺乏能够同时识别、定位异常并提供可视化证据的模型。
AI.method: 1) 使用解剖感知弱监督学习在CT-报告对上预训练；2) 联合学习器官分割和多实例异常定位，无需手动体素级标注；3) 生成器官特异性异常感知图，为每个体素分配疾病特异性异常分数。
AI.result: 在跨国多中心回顾性评估中，EXACT在多疾病诊断、零样本异常定位、下游任务适应和视觉化报告生成等临床相关任务上均优于现有三维医学基础模型。
AI.conclusion: EXACT将常规临床CT扫描和自由文本报告转化为可解释的体素级表征，建立了可信赖的体量式医学AI的可扩展范式。

title: Learning to Route Queries to Heads for Attention-based Re-ranking with Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been explored as fine-grained zero-shot re-rankers by leveraging attention signals to estimate document relevance. However, existing methods either aggregate attention signals across all heads or rely on a statically selected subset identified by heuristic rules. This solution can be suboptimal because the informative heads can vary across queries or domains. Moreover, naively combining multiple heads can degrade performance due to redundancy or conflicting ranking signals. In this paper, we propose a query-dependent head selection method, RouteHead, for attention-based re-ranking with LLMs. Specifically, we learn a lightweight router that can map each query to an optimal head set, and relevance scores are computed by aggregating attention signals only from these heads. Since query-to-head optimal labels are unavailable, we first construct pseudo labels via an offline search. The router represents each head with a learnable embedding and represents each query using an embedding extracted from the hidden states of the frozen LLM. Then it is trained on the pseudo labels with a sparsity regularizer. Experiments on diverse benchmarks and multiple LLM backbones show that the proposed method consistently outperforms strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RouteHead，通过学习一个轻量级路由器，为每个查询动态选择最优的注意力头集合，以提升LLM作为零样本重排序器的性能，解决了静态选择或聚合所有头带来的冗余和冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM作为重排序器时，要么聚合所有注意力头的信号，要么通过启发式规则静态选择子集，但信息丰富的头因查询或领域而异，且多头的冗余和冲突信号会降低性能。
AI.method: 学习一个轻量级路由器，通过离线搜索构造伪标签（query-to-head最优映射），为每个查询动态选择最优注意力头集合，仅从这些头聚合信号计算相关性分数，并使用稀疏正则化训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和多种LLM骨干网络上，RouteHead一致性地优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 查询依赖的头选择策略能有效提升LLM重排序性能，避免冗余和冲突，且方法具有通用性。

title: 6thGrid-Net: Unified Remote Sensing Image Dehazing Based on Color Restoration and Edge-Preserving
summary: Remote sensing images are frequently degraded by adverse weather conditions, particularly clouds and haze, which severely impair downstream applications. Existing restoration methods typically rely on computationally heavy architectures or sequential pipelines (e.g., detail enhancement followed by color rendition) that suffer from mutual interference and artifact accumulation. Furthermore, recent unified grid-based approaches utilize fixed, isotropic interpolation kernels, neglecting the intrinsic low-dimensional manifold of natural images and inevitably causing edge blur. To address these limitations, we propose 6th Grid-Net, a highly efficient and unified remote sensing image restoration framework tailored for resource-constrained edge devices. Specifically, we construct a novel six-dimensional fusion tensor that seamlessly integrates the color rendition capabilities of 3D LUTs with the spatial-luminance detail preservation of bilateral grids. To overcome the drawbacks of standard trilinear interpolation, we introduce a manifold-adaptive high-dimensional sampling mechanism. This mechanism dynamically adjusts the interpolation kernel based on local edge orientation, texture strength, and color similarity, enabling simultaneous global color stylization and local edge refinement in a single forward pass. Additionally, an edge-aware grid smoothing constraint and dynamic quantization are incorporated to suppress ghosting artifacts and significantly compress the model size. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that 6th Grid-Net achieves state-of-the-art restoration quality across various degradation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出6th Grid-Net，一种面向资源受限边缘设备的高效遥感图像恢复框架，通过构建六维融合张量（结合3D LUT与双边网格）、引入流形自适应高维采样机制，在单次前向传播中同时实现全局色彩风格化与局部边缘细化，并加入边缘感知网格平滑约束与动态量化以抑制伪影、压缩模型大小，在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感图像恢复方法存在计算开销大、顺序流水线导致相互干扰与伪影累积、以及基于固定各向同性插值核忽视自然图像低维流形结构导致边缘模糊等问题。
AI.method: 提出六维融合张量（融合3D LUT的颜色渲染能力与双边网格的空间-亮度细节保持能力），设计流形自适应高维采样机制（根据局部边缘方向、纹理强度和颜色相似性动态调整插值核），引入边缘感知网格平滑约束与动态量化。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，针对多种退化场景（云、雾等）均达到最先进的恢复质量，同时模型尺寸小、适合边缘设备部署。
AI.conclusion: 通过高维融合张量与流形自适应采样，在统一框架内同时解决全局色彩还原与局部边缘保持问题，显著提升恢复效果与计算效率。

title: Non-Destructive Prediction of Fruit Ripeness and Firmness Using Hyperspectral Imaging and Lightweight Machine Learning Models
summary: Post-harvest fruit quality assessment is essential for reducing food waste, yet reliable non-destructive methods typically depend on expensive hyperspectral cameras and computationally intensive deep learning models. These systems typically require GPU resources, large-scale training data, and domain expertise, limiting their feasibility for many real-world agricultural settings. This study systematically evaluates 20 classical machine learning algorithms on hyperspectral imaging data for simultaneous ripeness classification and firmness prediction across five fruit species, using cross-validated experimental design with Bayesian hyperparameter optimization. Data preprocessing strategy, particularly class balancing and spectral transformations, contributes as much to prediction accuracy as algorithm choice. Our results show that tree-based machine learning models can outperform state-of-the-art deep earning models reported in Fruit-HSNet. Moreover, the findings indicate that only three visible-range wavelengths are needed to recover over 94% of full-spectrum accuracy, demonstrating that low-cost multispectral sensors combined with lightweight machine learning models can serve as practical alternatives to expensive hyperspectral cameras and complex deep learning approaches for practical fruit quality sorting.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了20种经典机器学习算法在5种水果的高光谱成像数据上同时进行成熟度分类和硬度预测的效果，发现使用仅3个可见光波长的低成本多光谱传感器结合轻量级机器学习模型可恢复94%以上的全光谱精度，表明其可作为昂贵高光谱相机和复杂深度学习方法的实用替代方案。
AI.motivation: 目前可靠的非破坏性水果品质评估方法依赖于昂贵的高光谱相机和计算密集型的深度学习模型，需要GPU资源、大规模训练数据和领域专业知识，在真实农业场景中可行性有限，因此需要探索更经济实用的替代方案。
AI.method: 在5种水果的高光谱成像数据上系统评估20种经典机器学习算法，采用交叉验证实验设计和贝叶斯超参数优化，特别关注数据预处理策略（类别平衡和光谱变换）对预测精度的影响，并分析所需最少波长数量。
AI.result: 基于树的机器学习模型可超越最新深度学习模型Fruit-HSNet的性能；数据预处理策略对预测精度的贡献与算法选择同等重要；仅需3个可见光波长即可恢复94%以上的全光谱精度。
AI.conclusion: 低成本多光谱传感器结合轻量级机器学习模型可作为昂贵高光谱相机和复杂深度学习方法的实用替代方案，用于实际水果品质分拣。

title: Vision-Language-Action in Robotics: A Survey of Datasets, Benchmarks, and Data Engines
comment: This is a survey paper. The survey is already accepted by TMLR after peer-review. The OpenReview link is here: https://openreview.net/forum?id=tAaWFpvnmm
summary: Despite remarkable progress in Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models, a central bottleneck remains underexamined: the data infrastructure that underlies embodied learning. In this survey, we argue that future advances in VLA will depend less on model architecture and more on the co-design of high-fidelity data engines and structured evaluation protocols. To this end, we present a systematic, data-centric analysis of VLA research organized around three pillars: datasets, benchmarks, and data engines. For datasets, we categorize real-world and synthetic corpora along embodiment diversity, modality composition, and action space formulation, revealing a persistent fidelity-cost trade-off that fundamentally constrains large-scale collection. For benchmarks, we analyze task complexity and environment structure jointly, exposing structural gaps in compositional generalization and long-horizon reasoning evaluation that existing protocols fail to address. For data engines, we examine simulation-based, video-reconstruction, and automated task-generation paradigms, identifying their shared limitations in physical grounding and sim-to-real transfer. Synthesizing these analyses, we distill four open challenges: representation alignment, multimodal supervision, reasoning assessment, and scalable data generation. Addressing them, we argue, requires treating data infrastructure as a first-class research problem rather than a background concern.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的数据基础设施，认为未来VLA研究的瓶颈不在于模型架构，而在于高质量数据引擎与结构化评估协议的协同设计，并围绕数据集、基准测试和数据引擎三大支柱进行了深入分析。
AI.motivation: VLA模型虽取得了显著进展，但其数据基础设施（数据集、基准测试、数据引擎）未被充分研究。作者认为未来VLA的进步将更多依赖数据层面的突破而非模型架构创新，因此需要进行系统性的数据视角分析。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的系统性综述方法，围绕三个支柱展开：(1) 数据集：从具身多样性、模态组成和动作空间公式对真实与合成语料进行分类；(2) 基准测试：联合分析任务复杂度和环境结构；(3) 数据引擎：考察基于仿真、视频重建和自动任务生成的范式。最终综合出四大开放挑战。
AI.result: 揭示了(1) 真实与合成数据之间存在持续的保真度-成本权衡；(2) 现有基准在组合泛化和长程推理评估中存在结构性漏洞；(3) 各类数据引擎在物理基础构建和仿真到现实迁移方面存在共同局限。
AI.conclusion: 总结出四个开放挑战：表征对齐、多模态监督、推理评估和可扩展数据生成。主张应将数据基础设施作为一流的独立研究问题，而非背景性问题来看待。

title: Less Is More: Engineering Challenges of On-Device Small Language Model Integration in a Mobile Application
summary: On-device Small Language Models (SLMs) promise fully offline, private AI experiences for mobile users (no cloud dependency, no data leaving the device). But is this promise achievable in practice? This paper presents a longitudinal practitioner case study documenting the engineering challenges of integrating SLMs (Gemma 4 E2B, 2.6B parameters; Qwen3 0.6B, 600M parameters) into Palabrita, a production Android word-guessing game. Over a 5-day development sprint comprising 204 commits (~90 directly AI-related), the system underwent a radical transformation: from an ambitious design where the LLM generated complete structured puzzles (word, category, difficulty, and five hints as JSON) to a pragmatic architecture where curated word lists provide the words and the LLM generates only three short hints, with a deterministic fallback if it fails. We identify five categories of failures specific to on-device SLM integration: output format violations, constraint violations, context quality degradation, latency incompatibility, and model selection instability. For each failure category, we document the observed symptoms, root causes, and the prompt engineering and architectural strategies that effectively mitigated them, including multi-layer defensive parsing, contextual retry with failure feedback, session rotation, progressive prompt hardening, and systematic responsibility reduction. Our findings demonstrate that on-device SLMs are viable for production mobile applications, but only when the developer accepts a fundamental constraint: the most reliable on-device LLM feature is one where the LLM does the least. We distill our experience into eight actionable design heuristics for practitioners integrating SLMs into mobile apps.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一个为期5天的移动端开发实战案例，记录了将小语言模型（SLM）集成到Android文字猜词游戏中的工程挑战。系统从LLM生成完整JSON结构的谜题，逐步演变为仅生成三个简短提示、并设置确定性回退的务实架构。文章总结了五类SLM集成故障（输出格式违规、约束违规、上下文质量退化、延迟不兼容、模型选择不稳定），提出了相应的缓解策略，最终提炼出“最可靠的端侧LLM功能就是让LLM做得最少”这一核心经验，并给出了八条实用设计启发式。
AI.motivation: 验证端侧小语言模型（SLM）在真实生产移动应用中的可行性，并系统记录和总结集成过程中遇到的工程挑战及解决方案，为其他开发者提供实践指导。
AI.method: 纵向实践案例研究：在5天204次提交的快速开发中，将SLM（Gemma 4 E2B 2.6B、Qwen3 0.6B）集成到已有的Android游戏中，记录故障类别、根因分析以及迭代式的提示工程和架构缓解策略。
AI.result: 识别出五类典型SLM集成故障；发现随着责任减少（从生成完整谜题降为仅生成提示），系统可靠性显著提升；最终验证了端侧SLM在移动端生产环境中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 端侧SLM用于生产移动应用是可行的，但开发者必须接受一个根本约束：最可靠的端侧LLM功能就是让LLM做得最少（减少其承担的责任）。

title: Robust Deepfake Detection, NTIRE 2026 Challenge: Report
summary: Robustness is a long-overlooked problem in deepfake detection. However, detection performance is nearly worthless in the real world if it suffers under exposure to even slight image degradation. In addition to weaker degradations that can accidentally occur in the image processing pipeline, there is another risk of malicious deepfakes that specifically introduce degradations, purposefully exploiting the detector's weaknesses in that regard. Here, we present an overview of the NTIRE 2026 Robust Deepfake Detection Challenge, which specifically addresses that problem. Participants were tasked with building a detector that would later be tested on an unknown test-set, which included both common and uncommon degradations of various strengths. With a total number of 337 participants and 57 submissions to the final leaderboard, the first edition of the challenge was well received. To ensure the reliability of the results, participants were given only 24h to complete the test run with no labels provided, limiting the possibility of training on the test data. Furthermore, the top solutions were scored on a private test-set to detect any such overfitting. This report presents the competition setting, dataset preparation, as well as details and performance of methods. Top methods rely on large foundation models, ensembles, and degradation training to combine generality and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NTIRE 2026鲁棒深度伪造检测挑战赛，旨在解决深度伪造检测器在面对图像退化（包括偶然和恶意引入）时鲁棒性不足的问题。337名参与者提交了57个最终方案，顶级方法依赖大型基础模型、集成学习和退化训练来实现通用性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造检测在实际部署中面临图像退化的挑战（如压缩、噪声等），但现有研究长期忽视鲁棒性问题。恶意攻击者可能故意引入退化来利用检测器的弱点，因此亟需构建能在各种退化条件下保持效果的检测器。
AI.method: 举办NTIRE 2026鲁棒深度伪造检测挑战赛，构建包含多种常见和不常见退化类型及强度的测试集。限制参与者24小时内完成测试且不提供标签，并在私有测试集上验证顶尖方案以防止过拟合。参赛者提交检测器，评估其在未知退化条件下的表现。
AI.result: 挑战赛共337名参与者，57个最终提交。顶级方案主要依靠大型基础模型（foundation models）、集成学习（ensembles）和退化训练（degradation training）来平衡通用性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛证明了大型基础模型和集成方法在提升深度伪造检测鲁棒性方面的有效性，为未来鲁棒深度伪造检测研究提供了基准和方向。

title: From Equations to Algorithms and Data: Transforming Microwave Engineering and Education with Machine Learning
summary: Conventional microwave engineering education relies heavily on analytical methods, canonical circuit topologies, and intuition-driven design, which have proven effective at microwave frequencies. However, as systems increasingly operate in the millimeter-wave and terahertz regimes, parasitic effects, process-dependent electromagnetic interactions, and ultra-wideband performance requirements challenge both topology/layout-constrained traditional design methodologies and existing teaching paradigms. This paper proposes a pedagogical shift in microwave and RFIC (Radio Frequency Integrated Circuit) engineering and education by introducing machine-learning (ML) and data-driven electromagnetic synthesis as a complementary design framework for microwave circuits such as power dividers and combiners, couplers, and baluns. Rather than emphasizing predefined topologies, the proposed approach enables topology-agnostic, performance-oriented exploration of the design space, allowing students to directly engage with electromagnetic behavior through specification-driven synthesis. By integrating machine-learning-based inverse design and multi-objective optimization into the curriculum, the framework enhances physical intuition, encourages design creativity, and better aligns microwave education with emerging industrial practices in high-frequency and ultra-wideband system design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在微波与射频集成电路工程教育中引入机器学习和数据驱动的电磁综合方法，替代传统的基于解析方法和直觉驱动的教学设计范式，使学生在毫米波和太赫兹频段下能够通过性能驱动、拓扑无关的方式探索设计空间。
AI.motivation: 传统微波工程教育依赖解析方法和固定拓扑结构，在毫米波/太赫兹频段面临寄生效应、电磁交互复杂性和超宽带性能需求的挑战，现有教学方法难以适应新兴工业实践。
AI.method: 提出将机器学习逆设计和多目标优化融入课程的教学框架，采用数据驱动的电磁综合方法替代拓扑约束设计，实现规格驱动的性能导向设计空间探索。
AI.result: 该方法能增强学生的物理直觉、鼓励设计创造力，并使微波教育与高频/超宽带系统设计的工业实践更好地对齐。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习驱动的电磁综合是一种有效的微波工程教育范式转变，有助于应对高频设计挑战并培养更具创造性的工程师。

title: DeepSignature: Digitally Signed, Content-Encoding Watermarks for Robust and Transparent Image Authentication
summary: AI-powered generative models have significantly expanded the possibilities for editing, manipulating, and creating high-quality images. Particularly, images that falsely appear to originate from trusted sources pose a serious threat, undermining public trust in image authenticity. We propose DeepSignature, a novel approach that integrates the guarantees of digital signatures with the capabilities of deep neural networks. Neural networks are used both to generate content-encoding watermarks and to embed them imperceptibly into images while ensuring robust extraction. These watermarks are cryptographically verifiable, enabling source attribution and image integrity validation. DeepSignature is compatible with existing image formats and requires no special handling of signed images. It supports client-side verification, requiring only the signer's public key. Additionally, we introduce a novel latent-space verification approach to detect and localize tampering attempts. We evaluate DeepSignature in terms of imperceptibility, robustness to benign transformations, forgery detection, and its resilience against various attack scenarios. Our results highlight the inherent trade-offs between imperceptibility, robustness, and integrity verification. We demonstrate that DeepSignature reliably identifies significant forgery attempts -- achieving near 100\% in our experiments. Finally, we emphasize DeepSignature's modularity and tunable parameters, allowing adaptation to application-specific requirements. Code and model weights will be published.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepSignature，一种将数字签名与深度学习结合的方法，通过神经网络生成可加密验证的水印嵌入图像，实现来源追溯和完整性验证，在伪造检测上接近100%准确率。
AI.motivation: AI生成模型使图像编辑和伪造变得容易，虚假图像冒充可信来源严重损害公众对图像真实性的信任，亟需一种可靠的图像来源认证和完整性验证方法。
AI.method: 利用深度神经网络生成内容编码的水印并将其不可感知地嵌入图像，水印具有加密可验证性；同时提出潜空间验证方法用于检测和定位篡改；支持客户端验证和现有图像格式兼容。
AI.result: 在不可感知性、鲁棒性、伪造检测等方面进行评估，显著伪造检测接近100%准确率，揭示了不可感知性、鲁棒性和完整性验证之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: DeepSignature提供了一种模块化、可调参的图像认证方案，可适应不同应用需求，能可靠识别重大伪造行为。

title: PEPS: Positional Encoding Projected Sampling -- Extended
summary: Implicit neural representations (INRs) are increasingly being used as tools to map coordinates to signals, encompassing applications from neural fields to texture compression, shape representations, and beyond. Most INR methods are based on using high-dimensional projections of the initial coordinates through encoders such as grid or positional encoding. Nevertheless, positional encoding is often insufficient and grids, as we show in this paper, require high resolution for being able to learn. In this paper, we demonstrate that positional encoding can be used not only as a high-dimensional embedding but also decomposed as a series of meaningful points. We propose the Positional Encoding Projected Sampling, where we treat the projection of the original coordinate at each frequency as a point of interest. We describe the motion of each point with respect to the frequencies and show that it follows a unique pattern. Finally, we use the unique motion of each point as a basis decomposition for doing learned positional encoding using grids. We prove, using three competitive applications; image representation, texture compression, and signed distance function; that the proposed approach outperforms the current state of the art methods, and often requires 25\% less parameters for equivalent reconstruction error or rendering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出位置编码投影采样方法，通过将位置编码分解为有意义的点序列，利用每个点在不同频率下的独特运动模式作为基分解，结合网格进行学习，在图像表示、纹理压缩和符号距离函数三个任务上以更少参数超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式神经表示方法中，位置编码往往不够充分，而网格编码需要高分辨率才能有效学习。作者希望结合两者优势，将位置编码分解为有意义的点序列，利用点的运动模式来改进学习效率。
AI.method: 提出Positional Encoding Projected Sampling，将原始坐标在每个频率上的投影视为兴趣点，描述每个点随频率变化的运动模式，利用这种独特运动作为基分解，结合网格实现可学习的位置编码。
AI.result: 在图像表示、纹理压缩和符号距离函数三个任务上，该方法超越了当前最先进方法，在等效重建误差下通常可减少25%的参数。
AI.conclusion: 将位置编码分解为点的运动模式并结合网格学习是一种有效的隐式神经表示方法，能以更少参数达到更优效果。

title: Accelerating Reinforcement Learning for Wind Farm Control via Expert Demonstrations
comment: Submitted to Journal of Physics: Conference Series (Torque 2026). This is the Accepted Manuscript version of an article accepted for publication in Journal of Physics: Conference Series. IOP Publishing Ltd is not responsible for any errors or omissions in this version of the manuscript or any version derived from it. This Accepted Manuscript is published under a CC BY licence
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers a promising approach for adaptive wind farm flow control, yet its practical deployment is hindered by slow training convergence and poor initial performance, factors that could translate to years of reduced power output if an untrained agent were deployed directly. This work investigates whether domain knowledge from steady-state wake models can accelerate RL training and improve initial controller performance. We propose a pretraining methodology in which expert demonstrations are generated by deploying a PyWake-based steady-state optimizer within a dynamic wake simulation (WindGym), then used to initialize both the actor and critic networks of a Soft Actor-Critic agent via behavior cloning. Experiments on a 2x2 wind farm show that pretraining eliminates the costly initial learning phase: while an untrained agent underperforms the greedy zero-yaw baseline by approximately 12%, pretraining raises initial performance to near-baseline levels. During online fine-tuning, all configurations converge within 250,000 environment steps to achieve similar performance, ultimately exceeding that of a lookup-table controller, which reaches approximately 7% power gain after 500,000 steps.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用稳态尾流模型领域知识预训练强化学习智能体的方法，通过在动态风场模拟中生成专家示教来初始化SAC算法的演员-评论家网络，从而消除初始学习阶段性能低下的问题，在2x2风电场实验中实现近乎基准线的初始性能，并在25万步内收敛至优于查表控制器的水平（约7%功率提升）。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在自适应风电场流动控制中虽有潜力，但存在训练收敛慢、初始性能差的问题，直接部署未训练智能体会导致数年功率输出下降。本文旨在利用稳态尾流模型的领域知识加速RL训练并提升初始控制器性能。
AI.method: 提出预训练方法：在动态尾流仿真环境(WindGym)中部署基于PyWake的稳态优化器生成专家示教，通过行为克隆初始化Soft Actor-Critic算法的演员和评论家网络。
AI.result: 在2x2风电场实验中，预训练消除了代价高昂的初始学习阶段：未训练智能体比贪婪零偏航基线低约12%，而预训练将初始性能提升至接近基线水平；在线微调中所有配置在25万步内收敛，最终超过查表控制器（50万步后约7%功率增益）。
AI.conclusion: 预训练方法能有效提升强化学习在风电场控制中的初始性能并加速收敛，为实际部署提供可行方案。

title: PointTransformerX:Portable and Efficient 3D Point Cloud Processing without Sparse Algorithms
comment: This paper has been accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW), 2026
summary: 3D point cloud perception remains tightly coupled to custom CUDA operators for spatial operations, limiting portability and efficiency on non-NVIDIA, AMD, and embedded hardware. We introduce PointTransformerX (PTX), a fully PyTorch-native vision transformer backbone for 3D point clouds, removing all custom CUDA operators and external libraries while retaining competitive accuracy. PTX introduces 3D-GS-RoPE, a rotary positional embedding that encodes 3D spatial relationships directly in self-attention without neighborhood construction, and further replaces sparse convolutional patch embedding with a linear projection. PTX explores inference-time scaling of attention windows to improve accuracy without retraining. With a redesigned feed-forward network, PTX achieves 98.7\% of PointTransformer V3's accuracy on ScanNet with 79.2\% fewer parameters and executing 1.6\times faster while requiring just 253 MB memory. PTX runs natively on NVIDIA GPUs, AMD GPUs (ROCm), and CPUs, providing an efficient and portable foundation for point cloud perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointTransformerX (PTX)，一个完全基于PyTorch原生实现的3D点云视觉Transformer骨干网络，消除了对所有自定义CUDA算子和外部库的依赖。PTX引入了3D-GS-RoPE旋转位置编码、线性投影替换稀疏卷积、以及推理时注意力窗口缩放等技术，在ScanNet上达到PointTransformer V3准确率的98.7%，参数量减少79.2%，速度提升1.6倍，内存仅需253MB，且原生支持NVIDIA GPU、AMD GPU (ROCm)和CPU。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云感知方法严重依赖自定义CUDA算子，导致在非NVIDIA硬件（如AMD GPU、嵌入式设备）上可移植性和效率受限，阻碍了3D感知在不同硬件平台上的广泛部署。
AI.method: 1) 3D-GS-RoPE：一种3D旋转位置编码，直接在自注意力中编码3D空间关系，无需邻域构建；2) 用线性投影替换稀疏卷积的patch嵌入；3) 推理时注意力窗口缩放，无需重新训练即可提升精度；4) 重新设计的前馈网络。
AI.result: 在ScanNet上达到PointTransformer V3准确率的98.7%，参数量减少79.2%，推理速度提升1.6倍，内存仅需253MB，原生支持多硬件平台。
AI.conclusion: PTX证明完全基于PyTorch原生实现可以达到与依赖自定义CUDA算子的方法相近的精度，同时大幅提升可移植性和效率，为点云感知提供了跨平台的高效解决方案。

title: Load constrained wind farm flow control through multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning
comment: Submitted to Journal of Physics: Conference Series (Torque 2026). This is the Accepted Manuscript version of an article accepted for publication in Journal of Physics: Conference Series. IOP Publishing Ltd is not responsible for any errors or omissions in this version of the manuscript or any version derived from it. This Accepted Manuscript is published under a CC BY licence
summary: This study presents a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for load-constrained wind farm flow control (WFFC). While wake steering can enhance total wind farm power, it often introduces increased structural loads on downstream turbines. To address this, we integrate an Independent Soft Actor-Critic (I-SAC) architecture with a data-driven, local inflow sector-averaged surrogate model to provide real-time estimates of Damage Equivalent Loads (DELs). By incorporating these estimates into a shaped reward function, turbine-specific agents are trained to maximize power production while adhering to specific load-increase thresholds ($Δ_{max}$) of 10%, 20%, and 30% relative to a baseline controller. The framework is implemented within the WindGym environment using the DYNAMIKS flow solver with Dynamic Wake Meandering (DWM) model to capture non-stationary wake physics. Results indicate that the MARL agents successfully learn collaborative policies that prioritise power gain while actively retreating from high-DEL control strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于多智能体强化学习（I-SAC）的框架，用于风电场尾流控制，通过引入负载代理模型和形状化奖励函数，在功率提升与结构载荷约束（10%-30%阈值）之间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统尾流转向虽能提升总功率，但会增加下游涡轮机的结构载荷。现有方法缺乏在功率优化与载荷约束之间的联合控制机制。
AI.method: 将独立SAC（I-SAC）与数据驱动的局部入流扇区平均代理模型结合，实时估算等效损伤载荷（DEL），并设计含载荷阈值的奖励函数，在WindGym/DYNAMIKS环境中训练。
AI.result: MARL智能体学会了协作策略，在优先提升功率的同时主动回避高DEL的控制行为，成功满足不同载荷增长阈值约束。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体强化学习能够有效平衡风电场功率优化与结构载荷约束，为安全高效的WFFC提供了可行方案。

title: POCA: Pareto-Optimal Curriculum Alignment for Visual Text Generation
summary: Current visual text generation models struggle with the trade-off between text accuracy and overall image coherence. We find that achieving high text accuracy can reduce aesthetic quality and instruction-following capability. Although reinforcement learning approaches can alleviate the problem through aligning with multiple rewards, they are often unstable for text generation, as existing approaches normally optimize multiple rewards in a weighted-sum way. In addition, it is difficult to balance the weight of each reward. Moreover, reinforcement learning requires a set of training instructions. A large number of prompts require more training time and computing resources, while a small set leads to poor performance. Hence, how to select the prompts for efficient training is an unsolved problem. In this study, we propose Pareto-Optimal Curriculum Alignment (POCA), a framework that addresses this issue as a multi-objective problem by: 1) identifying the Pareto-optimal set to avoid simple scalarization and 2) designing an adaptive curriculum alignment strategy to manage a learning sequence of a multi-reward dataset using automatic difficulty assessment, which is crucial for optimal convergence as RL methods explore in a limited data environment. In synergy, POCA finds the Pareto-optimal set in a unified reward space, which eliminates inconsistent signals to find the best trade-off solution from different rewards under an easy-to-hard optimization landscape. The experimental results show that POCA significantly improves all metrics such as CLIP, HPS scores and sentence accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出POCA框架，通过帕累托最优课程对齐策略，在视觉文本生成中平衡文本准确性与图像质量，使用多目标优化和自适应课程学习解决多奖励强化学习的不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉文本生成模型在文本准确性和图像连贯性之间存在权衡，多奖励强化学习方法存在不稳定、权重难以平衡以及训练指令选择困难等问题。
AI.method: 1) 识别帕累托最优集替代简单加权求和；2) 设计自适应课程对齐策略，通过自动难度评估管理多奖励数据集的训练顺序，实现从易到难的优化。
AI.result: 在CLIP、HPS分数和句子准确率等指标上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: POCA通过帕累托最优和课程学习有效解决了多奖励强化学习在文本生成中的不稳定问题，实现了更好的多目标平衡。

title: Hierarchical RL-MPC Control for Dynamic Wake Steering in Wind Farms
comment: This work has been submitted to IFAC for possible publication
summary: Wind farm wake steering optimization is challenging due to complex flow physics and changing conditions. This paper presents a hierarchical framework that combines reinforcement learning with model predictive control, where an RL agent learns compensatory state estimates for an MPC controller, rather than directly controlling turbines. Evaluated on a three-turbine case, the approach achieves a 23\% power gain over the baseline control and surpasses the idealized MPC with perfect state knowledge. Compared to direct RL control, the hybrid architecture maintains superior safety characteristics during training while achieving comparable performance with more stable control actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层框架，将强化学习与模型预测控制相结合，用于风电场尾流转向优化，在3风机案例中实现23%的功率提升，并展现出比纯RL控制更好的安全性。
AI.motivation: 风电场尾流转向优化由于复杂的流动物理和变化的环境条件而具有挑战性，现有方法难以兼顾性能和安全性。
AI.method: 提出分层框架：RL智能体学习为MPC控制器提供补偿性状态估计（而非直接控制风机），形成RL+MPC的混合架构。
AI.result: 在三风机案例中，该方法相比基线控制实现23%的功率增益，甚至超过具有完美状态信息的理想化MPC；相比纯RL控制，训练过程中安全性更好，且控制动作更稳定。
AI.conclusion: RL与MPC的混合架构能够兼顾性能与安全性，为复杂物理系统的控制提供了有前景的方向。

title: Multivariate Gaussian NeRF for Wide Field-of-View Ultrasound Reconstruction
summary: Wide Field-of-View (WFoV) reconstruction enhances 3D ultrasound imaging by providing valuable anatomical context for segmentation models and visualization. Clinical ultrasound volumes are predominantly acquired using convex probes, which generate expanding, diverging acoustic beams to maximize anatomical coverage. Stitching these sweeps together traditionally introduces significant compounding artifacts and aliasing due to depth-dependent resolution changes. Here, we introduce Ultra-Wide-NeRF, a Multivariate 3D Gaussian (MVG) NeRF-based method for WFoV ultrasound reconstruction. By explicitly modeling the complex beam geometry using distance-dependent convex volumetric sampling and anisotropic 3D Gaussians, our method inherently mitigates these compounding artifacts and provides anti-aliasing. Beyond simply reconstructing a static 3D grid, our NeRF-based approach yields a continuous neural representation of the tissue, enabling the synthesis of high-fidelity novel views from arbitrary virtual trajectories. We validate Ultra-Wide-NeRF for intracardiac echocardiography on phantom and porcine datasets, demonstrating that our method expands the spatial context important in intraoperative navigation. Code will be open-sourced upon publication.

AI.tldr: 提出Ultra-Wide-NeRF，一种基于多变量3D高斯（MVG）NeRF的方法，用于宽视场超声重建。通过距离依赖的凸体积采样和各向异性3D高斯显式建模复杂光束几何，有效抑制拼接伪影和混叠，生成连续神经表示并支持任意虚拟轨迹的新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 传统凸阵探头超声扫描拼接会因深度依赖的分辨率变化产生严重伪影和混叠，限制了宽视场3D超声重建在解剖结构分割和可视化中的应用。
AI.method: 采用多变量3D高斯（MVG）NeRF框架，通过距离依赖的凸体积采样和各向异性3D高斯显式建模超声光束几何，实现抗混叠的连续神经表示重建。
AI.result: 在心腔内超声的体模和猪数据集上验证，该方法能有效扩展空间上下文，支持高质量新视角合成，适用于术中导航。
AI.conclusion: Ultra-Wide-NeRF通过显式建模超声物理传播特性，为宽视场3D超声重建提供了有效方案，且代码将开源。

title: Context-Integrated Adversarial Learning for Predictive Modelling of Stock Price Dynamics
summary: It is a challenging task to forecast equity prices in fast moving financial markets as this becomes even more difficult when the predictive signal is based on non-homogeneous information channels. The classical statistical methods, especially the Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA) models, limit their analytical ability with the linear assumptions that prevent the modeling of complex temporal dynamics.
