title: Zero-to-CAD: Agentic Synthesis of Interpretable CAD Programs at Million-Scale Without Real Data
summary: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) models are defined by their construction history: a parametric recipe that encodes design intent. However, existing large-scale 3D datasets predominantly consist of boundary representations (B-Reps) or meshes, stripping away this critical procedural information. To address this scarcity, we introduce Zero-to-CAD, a scalable framework for synthesizing executable CAD construction sequences. We frame synthesis as an agentic search problem: by embedding a large language model (LLM) within a feedback-driven CAD environment, our system iteratively generates, executes, and validates code using tools and documentation lookup to promote geometric validity and operation diversity. This agentic approach enables the synthesis of approximately one million executable, readable, editable CAD sequences, covering a rich vocabulary of operations beyond sketch-and-extrude workflows. We also release a curated subset of 100,000 high-quality models selected for geometric diversity. To demonstrate the dataset's utility, we fine-tune a vision-language model on our synthetic data to reconstruct editable CAD programs from multi-view images, outperforming strong baselines, including GPT-5.2, and effectively bootstrapping sequence generation capabilities without real construction-history training data. Zero-to-CAD bridges the gap between geometric scale and parametric interpretability, offering a vital resource for the next generation of CAD AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Zero-to-CAD框架，通过将大语言模型嵌入反馈驱动的CAD环境，以智能体搜索方式合成约100万条可执行、可编辑的CAD构建序列，并发布10万高质量子集。微调视觉语言模型后，可从多视图图像重建可编辑CAD程序，性能超越GPT-5.2等强基线。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模3D数据集（如B-Reps、网格）缺乏CAD模型的构建历史（参数化构建序列），而这些程序化信息对编码设计意图至关重要。为解决这一稀缺性问题，需要一种可扩展的方法来合成可执行的CAD构建序列。
AI.method: 将CAD序列合成建模为智能体搜索问题：将LLM嵌入反馈驱动的CAD环境中，系统迭代生成、执行并验证代码，利用工具和文档查找来促进几何有效性和操作多样性。通过此方式合成约100万条可执行、可读、可编辑的CAD序列，并筛选10万高质量子集。
AI.result: 成功合成了约100万条CAD构建序列，覆盖超越草图-拉伸工作流的丰富操作。微调视觉语言模型后，从多视图图像重建可编辑CAD程序，性能超越GPT-5.2等强基线，有效引导了序列生成能力。
AI.conclusion: Zero-to-CAD弥合了几何规模与参数化可解释性之间的差距，为下一代CAD AI提供了关键资源。

title: Rethinking Trust Region Bayesian Optimization in High Dimensions
summary: Trust Region Bayesian Optimization (TuRBO) is an effective strategy for alleviating the curse of dimensionality in high-dimensional black-box optimization. However, inappropriate lengthscale design can cause the local Gaussian process (GP) model within the trust region to degenerate, leading to suboptimal performance in high dimensions. In this work, we show that TuRBO's local GP may remain either excessively complex or overly simple as the dimension $D$ and trust region side length $L$ vary. To address this issue, we propose a straightforward variant, AdaScale-TuRBO, which scales the GP lengthscale with both the problem dimension and trust region size, thereby preserving kernel geometry and maintaining consistent prior complexity. Empirically, we show that AdaScale-TuRBO can robustly outperform standard TuRBO and other popular high-dimensional BO methods on synthetic benchmarks and real-world trajectory planning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaScale-TuRBO，通过根据问题维度和信任区域大小缩放高斯过程长度尺度，解决了TuRBO在高维贝叶斯优化中因长度尺度设计不当导致的GP模型退化问题，在合成基准和轨迹规划任务上表现优于标准TuRBO及其他方法。
AI.motivation: 标准TuRBO在高维优化中存在长度尺度设计问题，导致局部GP模型在信任区域中要么过于复杂要么过于简单，影响优化性能。
AI.method: 提出AdaScale-TuRBO，根据问题维度D和信任区域边长L自适应缩放GP长度尺度，从而保持核函数的几何结构并维持一致的先验复杂度。
AI.result: 在合成基准和真实轨迹规划任务上，AdaScale-TuRBO稳健地优于标准TuRBO及其他流行的高维贝叶斯优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单的长度尺度缩放策略，可以有效缓解TuRBO在高维优化中的GP退化问题，提升优化鲁棒性和性能。

title: AI-Assisted Code Review as a Scaffold for Code Quality and Self-Regulated Learning: An Experience Report
summary: Code review is central to software engineering education but hard to scale in capstone projects due to tight deadlines, uneven peer feedback, and limited prior experience. We investigate an LLM-as-reviewer integrated directly into GitHub pull requests (human-in-the-loop) across two cohorts (more than 100 students, 2023--2024). Using a mixed-methods design -- GitHub data, reflective reports, and a targeted survey -- we examine engagement and responsiveness as behavioral indicators of self-regulated learning processes. Quantitatively, the 2024 cohort produced more iterative activity (1176 vs. 581 PRs), while technical issues observed in 2023 (227 failed AI attempts) dropped to zero after tool and instructional refinements. Despite different adoption levels (93\% vs. 50\% of teams using the tool), responsiveness was stable: 32\% (2023) and 33\% (2024) of successfully AI-reviewed PRs were followed by subsequent commits on the same PR. Qualitatively, students used the LLM's structured comments to focus reviews and discuss code quality, while guidance reduced over-reliance. We contribute: (i) an in-workflow design for an AI reviewer that scaffolds learning while mitigating cognitive offloading; (ii) a repeated cross sectional comparison across two cohorts in authentic settings; (iii) a mixed-methods analysis combining objective GitHub metrics with student self-reports; and (iv) evidence-based pedagogical recommendations for responsible, student-led AI-assisted review.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了将LLM作为代码审查助手直接集成到GitHub Pull Request中（人机协同），在两个学年的100多名学生中进行了实证研究，通过混合方法分析了学生的参与度和响应性，发现该工具能促进迭代活动并减少技术问题，同时学生的自我调节学习行为保持稳定。
AI.motivation: 软件工程教育中的代码审查在毕业设计中难以规模化，原因是时间紧迫、同伴反馈不均衡以及学生缺乏经验。作者希望探索一种LLM辅助的代码审查方式，在教学中实现可扩展的、有效的代码审查支持。
AI.method: 设计LLM-as-reviewer工具嵌入GitHub PR流程（human-in-the-loop），在两个学年的100多名学生中部署。采用混合方法分析：收集GitHub数据（PR数量、迭代活动、AI调用失败次数）、学生反思报告和定向调查问卷，以自我调节学习的行为指标（参与度和响应性）评估效果。
AI.result: 2024届的迭代活动更多（1176 vs 581个PR）；技术问题从2023年的227次AI失败降至0次；团队使用率93%（2024）vs 50%（2023）；响应性稳定（32% vs 33%的AI审查PR后有后续提交）。学生利用LLM的结构化评论聚焦审查和讨论代码质量，指导有助于减少过度依赖。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了：一个支持学习同时减轻认知卸载的AI审查工作流设计、两年真实场景的对比研究、结合客观指标与学生自述的混合方法分析，以及负责任、以学生为主导的AI辅助审查的教学建议。

title: Deployment-Aligned Low-Precision Neural Architecture Search for Spaceborne Edge AI
summary: Designing deep networks that meet strict latency and accuracy constraints on edge accelerators increasingly relies on hardware-aware optimization, including neural architecture search (NAS) guided by device-level metrics. Yet most hardware-aware NAS pipelines still optimize architectures under full-precision assumptions and apply low-precision adaptation only after the search, leading to a mismatch between optimization-time behavior and deployment-time execution on low-precision hardware that can substantially degrade accuracy. We address this limitation by integrating deployment-aligned low-precision training directly into hardware-aware NAS. Candidate architectures are exposed to FP16 numerical constraints during fine-tuning and evaluation, enabling joint optimization of architectural efficiency and numerical robustness without modifying the search space or evolutionary strategy. We evaluate the proposed framework on vessel segmentation for spaceborne maritime monitoring, targeting the Intel Movidius Myriad X Visual Processing Unit (VPU). While post-training precision conversion reduces on-device performance from 0.85 to 0.78 mIoU, deployment-aligned low-precision training achieves 0.826 mIoU on-device for the same architecture (95,791 parameters), recovering approximately two-thirds of deployment-induced accuracy gap without increasing model complexity. These results demonstrate that incorporating deployment-consistent numerical constraints into hardware-aware NAS substantially improves robustness and alignment between optimization and deployment for resource-constrained edge Artificial Intelligence (AI).

AI.tldr: 本文提出将部署对齐的低精度训练直接集成到硬件感知的神经架构搜索（NAS）中，通过在搜索过程中引入FP16数值约束，消除全精度搜索与低精度部署之间的精度鸿沟。在Intel Movidius Myriad X VPU上的船舶分割任务中，该方法将从0.78恢复至0.826 mIoU，恢复了约三分之二的精度损失。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件感知NAS通常在全精度假设下搜索架构，搜索后再进行低精度适配，导致优化阶段与部署阶段行为不匹配，在低精度硬件上精度显著下降。
AI.method: 在硬件感知NAS的微调和评估阶段直接引入FP16数值约束（部署对齐的低精度训练），使候选架构在搜索过程中同时优化架构效率与数值鲁棒性，无需修改搜索空间或进化策略。
AI.result: 在Intel Movidius Myriad X VPU上，船舶分割任务中：全精度→后训练精度转换（0.85→0.78 mIoU）；部署对齐低精度训练（0.826 mIoU，95,791参数），恢复约2/3的部署精度差距。
AI.conclusion: 将部署一致的数值约束纳入硬件感知NAS，能显著提升模型对低精度部署的鲁棒性，缩小优化与部署之间的对齐差距，适用于资源受限的边缘AI场景。

title: Scalable LLM-based Coding of Dialogue in Healthcare Simulation: Balancing Coding Performance, Processing Time, and Environmental Impact
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the Learning at Scale Conference (L@S) 2026
summary: Research shows that dialogue, the interactive process through which participants articulate their thinking, plays a central role in constructing shared understanding, coordinating action, and shaping learning outcomes in teams. Analysing dialogue content has been central to advancing team learning theory and informing the design of computer-supported collaborative learning environments, yet this progress has depended on labour-intensive qualitative coding. LLMs offer new possibilities for automating and enhancing the dialogue layer within emerging multimodal learning analytics approaches, with recent studies showing that they can approximate human coding through few-shot prompting. However, prior work has focused on replicating human coding accuracy for research purposes, rather than addressing a more educationally consequential question: how can we design prompts that allow an LLM to label team dialogue accurately and fast enough to be useful in real settings, such as in-person healthcare simulations, where results must be returned quickly and computational cost and sustainability also matter? This paper investigates how prompt design and batching strategies can be optimised to balance coding accuracy, processing time, and environmental impact in team-based healthcare simulation debriefing. Using a dataset of 11,647 utterances coded across 6 dialogue constructs, we compared 4 prompt designs across varying batch sizes, evaluating coding performance, processing time, and energy consumption, as well as the trade-offs between these metrics. Results indicate that increasing batch size improves speed and reduces energy use, but negatively impacts coding performance. Beyond demonstrating the feasibility of LLM-based qualitative analysis, this study offers practical guidance for scaling dialogue analytics in contexts where timeliness, privacy, and sustainability are critical.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了如何通过优化提示设计和批处理策略，使LLM能够在真实医疗模拟场景中快速、准确、环保地进行团队对话编码分析，发现增大批处理量能提升速度并降低能耗，但会损害编码性能。
AI.motivation: LLM已被证明能通过少量样本提示近似人工对话编码，但现有工作仅关注复制研究场景中的编码准确性，未解决教育实践中更关键的问题：如何设计提示使LLM能快速准确地标注团队对话，应用于对时效性有严格要求的真实场景（如现场医疗模拟）。
AI.method: 使用包含11,647条话语、跨越6个对话构念的数据集，设计了4种提示方案，在不同批处理大小下比较编码性能、处理时间和能耗，分析三者间的权衡关系。
AI.result: 增大批处理大小可提升处理速度并降低能耗，但会对编码性能产生负面影响；提供了不同场景下提示设计和批处理策略的实用指导。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了基于LLM的定性分析在真实场景中的可行性，为在时效性、隐私性和可持续性至关重要的环境中规模化部署对话分析提供了实践指南。

title: CA-IDD: Cross-Attention Guided Identity-Conditional Diffusion for Identity-Consistent Face Swapping
summary: Face swapping aims to optimize realistic facial image generation by leveraging the identity of a source face onto a target face while preserving pose, expression, and context. However, existing methods, especially GAN-based methods, often struggle to balance identity preservation and visual realism due to limited controllability and mode collapse. In this paper, we introduce CA-IDD (Cross-Attention Guided Identity-Conditional Diffusion), the first diffusion-based face swapping approach that integrates multi-modal guidance comprising gaze, identity, and facial parsing through multi-scale cross-attention. Precomputed identity embeddings are incorporated into the denoising process via hierarchical attention layers, resulting in accurate and consistent identity transfer. To improve semantic coherence and visual quality, we use expert-guided supervision, with facial parsing and gaze-consistency modules. Unlike GAN-based or implicit-fusion methods, our diffusion framework provides stable training, robust generalization, and spatially adaptive identity alignment, allowing for fine-grained regional control across pose and expression variations. CA-IDD achieves an FID of 11.73, exceeding established baselines such as FaceShifter and MegaFS. Qualitative results also reveal improved identity retention across diverse poses, establishing CA-IDD as a strong foundation for future diffusion-based face editing.

AI.tldr: 提出首个基于扩散模型的换脸方法CA-IDD，通过交叉注意力机制将身份、注视方向和面部解析等多模态信息融入去噪过程，在身份保持和视觉质量上超越GAN基线方法（FID=11.73）。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN-based换脸方法在身份保持与视觉真实感之间存在平衡困难，受限于可控性差和模式坍塌问题。
AI.method: 利用预计算的身份嵌入通过分层交叉注意力注入扩散模型的去噪过程，结合专家引导的注视一致性和面部解析模块进行多模态指导。
AI.result: FID达到11.73，在身份保持和跨姿态泛化上优于FaceShifter、MegaFS等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CA-IDD证明了扩散模型在换脸任务上的优越性，为未来扩散-based面部编辑提供了坚实基础。

title: Why Architecture Choice Matters in Symbolic Regression
summary: Symbolic regression discovers mathematical formulas from data. Some methods fix a tree of operators, assign learnable weights, and train by gradient descent. The tree's structure, which determines what operators and variables appear at each position, is chosen once and applied to every target. This paper tests whether that choice affects which targets are actually recovered. Three structures are compared, all sharing the same operator and target language but differing in how variables enter the tree; one is strictly more expressive. Across over 12,700 training runs, one structure recovers a target at 100% while another scores 0%, and the ranking reverses on a different target. Expressiveness guarantees that a solution exists in the search space, but not that gradient descent finds it: the most expressive structure fails on targets that a restricted alternative solves reliably. Switching the operator changes which targets succeed; reversing its gradient profile collapses recovery entirely. Balanced (non-chain) tree shapes are never recovered. These findings show that the optimization landscape, not expressiveness alone, determines what gradient-based symbolic regression recovers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于梯度的符号回归中树结构对优化结果的影响，发现表达能力强的结构不一定能恢复目标，优化景观（而非表达能力）才是决定性因素。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度符号回归方法固定树结构，但不同树结构对目标恢复能力的影响未被系统研究。本文旨在揭示树结构选择如何影响基于梯度的符号回归的实际恢复效果。
AI.method: 比较三种不同变量输入方式的树结构（其中一种表达能力更强），在超过12,700次训练中测试不同结构对不同目标的恢复成功率，并分析算子选择及其梯度特征的影响。
AI.result: 不同树结构在相同目标上的恢复率差异极大（100% vs 0%）；表达能力最强的结构反而在某些目标上失败；算子的选择和梯度特征会显著影响恢复结果；平衡树结构从未被成功恢复。
AI.conclusion: 在基于梯度的符号回归中，优化景观比表达能力更能决定目标恢复的成功与否，树结构、算子选择及其梯度特性是关键影响因素。

title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning via Hyperspherical Density Shaping
summary:
Modern self-supervised representation learning methods often relies on empirical heuristics that are not theoretically grounded. In this study we propose HyDeS, a theoretically grounded method based on multi-view mutual information maximization within an hyperspherical space using Shannon differential entropy with a non-parametric von Mises-Fisher density estimator.
  We show that HyDeS bias the trained model towards focusing on foreground features of the images and perform well on segmentation tasks such as VOC PASCAL, while it lags in fine-grained classification. We provide a detailed analysis of the induced latent space geometry and learning dynamics, that can be used for designing other theoretically grounded self-supervised learning methods.

AI.tldr: HyDeS是一种基于超球面空间和香农微分熵的理论自监督表示学习方法，通过非参数von Mises-Fisher密度估计器实现多视图互信息最大化，使模型关注前景特征，在分割任务上表现好但细粒度分类较弱。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督表示学习方法多依赖经验启发式，缺乏理论依据。作者希望提出一种理论上有根基的（theoretically grounded）方法。
AI.method: 基于超球面空间中的多视图互信息最大化，使用香农微分熵和非参数von Mises-Fisher密度估计器来估计互信息。
AI.result: 模型偏向关注图像前景特征，在VOC PASCAL分割任务上表现良好，但在细粒度分类任务上落后于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 作者提供了对潜在空间几何和学习动态的详细分析，可用于设计其他理论驱动的自监督学习方法。

title: CASP: Support-Aware Offline Policy Selection for Two-Stage Recommender Systems
summary: Two-stage recommender systems first choose a candidate generator and then rank items within the generated set. Because the generator decides which items are available to the ranker, changing the generator changes both the policy value and the data support used to estimate that value. This creates an offline selection problem that standard single-stage objectives do not capture: a policy may look good under a retrieval score or a raw off-policy value estimate, but still be unreliable if it depends on weakly supported generator-item pairs. We propose CASP (Coupled Action-Set Pessimism), a support-aware offline selector for finite libraries of two-stage recommender policies. CASP combines doubly robust value estimation with a support-burden penalty. We show that stagewise rules that ignore downstream continuation value can be arbitrarily suboptimal, and we derive population, finite-class, and reconstructed-propensity guarantees for conservative selection. In simulations and a reconstructed MovieLens 1M application, CASP selects lower-burden policies when estimated value and support credibility are in tension.

AI.tldr: 提出CASP（耦合动作集悲观）方法，用于两阶段推荐系统中离线选择策略，通过结合双重稳健价值估计和支持负担惩罚，在估计价值与支持可信度之间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 两阶段推荐系统中，生成器与排序器的改变会同时影响策略价值和数据支持，标准单阶段目标无法捕捉这一离线选择问题，需要一种支持感知的离线选择方法。
AI.method: 提出CASP方法，结合双重稳健价值估计（doubly robust value estimation）与支持负担惩罚（support-burden penalty），在有限策略库上进行保守选择。
AI.result: 理论上证明了忽略下游延续价值的阶段式规则可能任意次优，给出了总体、有限类、重建倾向性下的保守选择保证；实验上在模拟和MovieLens 1M应用中，CASP能在估计价值与支持可信度冲突时选择低负担策略。
AI.conclusion: CASP有效地解决了离线两阶段推荐策略的选择问题，为支持感知的保守选择提供了理论保证和实用方法。

title: Knowledge Lever Risk Management for Software Engineering: A Stochastic Framework for Mitigating Knowledge Loss
comment: A shorter version of the paper will be presented on the 24th IEEE/ACIS International Conference on Software Engineering Research, Management and Applications (SERA 2026)
summary:
Software engineering (SE) organizations operate in a knowledge-intensive domain where critical assets -- architectural expertise, design rationale, and system intuition -- are overwhelmingly tacit and volatile. The departure of key contributors or the decay of undocumented decisions can severely impair project velocity and software quality. While conventional SE risk management optimized for schedule and budget is common, the intangible knowledge risks that determine project success remain under-represented.
  The goal of this research work is to propose and evaluate the Knowledge Lever Risk Management (KLRM) Framework, designed specifically for the software development lifecycle. The primary objectives are to: (1) recast intangible knowledge assets as active mechanisms for risk mitigation (Knowledge Levers); (2) integrate these levers into a structured four-phase architecture (Audit, Alignment, Activation, Assurance); and (3) provide a formal stochastic model to quantify the impact of lever activation on project knowledge capital. We detail the application of these levers through software-specific practices such as pair programming, architectural decision records (ADRs), and LLM-assisted development. Stochastic Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that full lever activation increases expected knowledge capital by 63.8\% and virtually eliminates knowledge crisis probability. Our research shows that knowledge lever activation improves alignment across the project management iron triangle (scope, time, cost) by reducing rework and rediscovery costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出知识杠杆风险管理（KLRM）框架，将隐性知识资产重新定义为主动风险缓解机制，通过审计、对齐、激活、保证四阶段架构，结合结对编程、架构决策记录和LLM辅助开发等实践，利用随机蒙特卡洛模拟证明完全激活知识杠杆可使预期知识资本提升63.8%并消除知识危机概率。
AI.motivation: 软件工程组织中关键的架构知识、设计原理和系统直觉多为隐性且易流失，核心人员离职或未记录决策的衰减会严重影响项目进度和质量，而传统风险管理未充分覆盖这些无形资产风险。
AI.method: 提出KLRM框架，包含四阶段架构（审计、对齐、激活、保证），将隐性知识资产作为"知识杠杆"进行主动管理，结合结对编程、架构决策记录(ADRs)和LLM辅助开发等实践，并构建形式化随机模型量化杠杆激活对知识资本的影响。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛模拟显示完全激活知识杠杆可提升预期知识资本63.8%，几乎消除知识危机概率，并改善项目管理铁三角（范围、时间、成本）的对齐，减少返工和重新发现成本。
AI.conclusion: 知识杠杆的主动激活是软件项目中管理隐性知识风险的有效方法，能显著提升知识资本并降低项目风险。

title: Point Cloud Registration for Fusion between SPECT MPI and CTA Images
summary: Clinical fusion of Single Photon Emission Computed Tomography Myocardial Perfusion Imaging (SPECT MPI) and Computed Tomography Angiography (CTA) remains limited by cross-modality misregistration and reliance on manual landmarks, which can hinder accurate ischemia localization and lesion-level functional assessment. To address this issue, we propose a registration and fusion framework for SPECT MPI and CTA that integrates functional and structural information for comprehensive cardiac evaluation. The proposed pipeline performs U-Net-based segmentation on both modalities. On SPECT MPI, only the left ventricle (LV) is extracted, and anatomical landmarks are automatically derived from characteristic LV structures. On CTA, both ventricles are segmented, and their spatial relationship is used to automatically define landmarks at the interventricular septal junction. Scale-space consistency preprocessing and landmark-driven coarse registration are applied to mitigate initial misalignment. Based on this initialization, multiple fine registration methods are evaluated on LV epicardial surface point clouds, including ICP, SICP, CPD, CluReg, FFD, and BCPD-plus-plus. The resulting transformations are then propagated to voxel-level resampling for high-precision SPECT-CTA fusion. In a retrospective cohort of 60 patients, the proposed framework preserved sub-millimeter coronary detail from CTA while accurately overlaying quantitative SPECT perfusion. Among the evaluated methods, BCPD-plus-plus achieved the highest accuracy with a mean point cloud distance of 1.7 mm. By combining robust initialization, comparative fine registration, and voxel-level fusion, the proposed approach provides a practical solution for myocardial ischemia localization and functional evaluation of coronary lesions, while remaining independent of any specific fine registration algorithm.

AI.tldr: 提出一种SPECT MPI与CTA的配准融合框架，通过U-Net分割、自动解剖标志提取、粗配准+多种精细配准方法（BCPD-plus-plus最优，平均点云距离1.7mm）实现功能与结构影像的精准融合，用于心肌缺血定位和冠脉病变功能评估。
AI.motivation: SPECT MPI与CTA的临床融合受限于跨模态配准误差和对人工标志的依赖，导致缺血定位不准确、功能评估受限。现有方法缺乏自动化且高精度的融合方案。
AI.method: 1) U-Net对两模态分别分割（SPECT: LV；CTA: 双心室）；2) 自动提取解剖标志（LV特征点+室间隔交界点）；3) 尺度空间一致性预处理+标志驱动粗配准；4) 在LV心外膜点云上评估多种精细配准（ICP, SICP, CPD, CluReg, FFD, BCPD-plus-plus）；5) 变换传播到体素级重采样实现融合。
AI.result: 60例回顾性队列中，BCPD-plus-plus最佳，平均点云距离1.7mm；框架成功保留CTA亚毫米冠脉细节并准确叠加SPECT灌注信息。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化配准融合框架不依赖特定精细配准算法，为心肌缺血定位和冠脉病变功能评估提供了实用方案。

title: Self-Supervised Learning for Android Malware Detection on a Time-Stamped Dataset
summary: Android malware detectors built with machine learning often suffer from temporal bias: models are trained and evaluated without respecting apps' actual release times, inflating accuracy and weakening real-world robustness. We address this by constructing a time-stamped dataset of benign and malicious Android apps and introducing a timestamp-verification procedure to ensure temporal accuracy. We then propose a detection framework that uses Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) for self-supervised pre-training to learn obfuscation-resilient representations, followed by supervised classification. Under time-aware evaluation, the method attains 98% accuracy and 89% F1. We further characterize malware behavior by analyzing true positives and false negatives using VirusTotal and the MITRE ATT&CK framework. To support reproducibility and further innovation, we release our dataset and source code.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Android恶意软件检测中的时间偏差问题，构建了带时间戳的数据集，并提出基于BYOL自监督预训练+监督分类的检测框架，在时间感知评估下达到98%准确率和89%F1分数。
AI.motivation: 现有Android恶意软件检测器常忽略应用实际发布时间，导致时间偏差（temporal bias）——模型在时间错位的数据上评估，高估了实际性能，缺乏真实世界的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1) 构建带时间戳的良性/恶意Android应用数据集，并引入时间戳验证流程；2) 使用Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) 进行自监督预训练，学习抗混淆的表征；3) 进行监督分类训练；4) 利用VirusTotal和MITRE ATT&CK框架对检测结果进行恶意软件行为分析。
AI.result: 在时间感知评估下，方法达到98%准确率和89% F1分数，有效缓解了时间偏差问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过时间感知的数据集构建和自监督预训练，可以显著提升Android恶意软件检测器的实际鲁棒性和泛化能力，研究团队还开源了数据集和代码以支持复现。

title: RACANet: Reliability-Aware Crowd Anchor Network for RGB-T Crowd Counting
summary: RGB-Thermal (T) crowd counting aims to integrate visible-spectrum and thermal infrared information to improve the robustness of crowd density estimation in complex scenes. Although existing studies generally improve counting accuracy through cross-modal feature fusion, most current methods rely on implicit cross-modal fusion strategies and lack explicit modeling of local spatial discrepancies as well as fine-grained characterization of modality reliability at the positional level, thereby limiting the accuracy and interpretability of the fusion process. To address these issues, this paper proposes a two-stage fusion framework, RACANet, a Reliability-Aware Crowd Anchor Network for RGB-T crowd counting. First, we introduce a lightweight cross-modal alignment pretraining stage, which explicitly learns cross-modal semantic correspondences through crowd-prior supervision and local bidirectional soft matching. Then, based on the priors learned during pretraining, a Local Anchor Fusion Module (LAFM) is introduced in the formal training stage. This module generates local semantic anchors by aggregating features from highly reliable regions and further enables adaptive pixel-level feature redistribution with a local attention mechanism. In addition, we propose a discrepancy-aware consistency constraint to dynamically coordinate the reliability of regions where modal representations are consistent. Experiments conducted on two widely used benchmark datasets, RGBT-CC and Drone-RGBT, demonstrate that RACANet outperforms existing methods. The anonymous code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RACANet-9985.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RACANet，一种两阶段RGB-T人群计数框架，通过显式跨模态对齐预训练和局部锚点融合模块，并引入差异感知一致性约束，在双模态基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-T人群计数方法依赖隐式跨模态融合策略，缺乏对局部空间差异的显式建模和位置级模态可靠性细粒度刻画，限制了融合精度和可解释性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 轻量级跨模态对齐预训练阶段，通过人群先验监督和局部双向软匹配学习语义对应关系；2) 正式训练阶段引入局部锚点融合模块(LAFM)，利用高可靠区域特征生成局部语义锚点，结合局部注意力实现自适应像素级特征重分配，并设计差异感知一致性约束协调模态可靠性。
AI.result: 在RGBT-CC和Drone-RGBT两个基准数据集上，RACANet优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模跨模态语义对应和位置级可靠性可有效提升RGB-T人群计数精度，两阶段融合框架具有较好的可解释性和性能优势。

title: Diffusion Model as a Generalist Segmentation Learner
summary: Diffusion models are primarily trained for image synthesis, yet their denoising trajectories encode rich, spatially aligned visual priors. In this paper, we demonstrate that these priors can be utilized for text-conditioned semantic and open-vocabulary segmentation, and this approach can be generalized to various downstream tasks to make a general-purpose diffusion segmentation framework. Concretely, we introduce DiGSeg (Diffusion Models as a Generalist Segmentation Learner), which repurposes a pretrained diffusion model into a unified segmentation framework. Our approach encodes the input image and ground-truth mask into the latent space and concatenates them as conditioning signals for the diffusion U-Net. A parallel CLIP-aligned text pathway injects language features across multiple scales, enabling the model to align textual queries with evolving visual representations. This design transforms an off-the-shelf diffusion backbone into a universal interface that produces structured segmentation masks conditioned on both appearance and arbitrary text prompts. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on standard semantic segmentation benchmarks, as well as strong open-vocabulary generalization and cross-domain transfer to medical, remote sensing, and agricultural scenarios-without domain-specific architectural customization. These results indicate that modern diffusion backbones can serve as generalist segmentation learners rather than pure generators, narrowing the gap between visual generation and visual understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiGSeg，将预训练的扩散模型重用于通用语义分割框架，无需领域特定定制即可在语义分割、开放词汇分割及跨域场景中取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在图像合成中展现出丰富的视觉先验，但如何将这些去噪轨迹中的空间对齐信息迁移到视觉理解任务（如分割）中尚未充分探索，作者希望弥合视觉生成与理解之间的鸿沟。
AI.method: 将输入图像和真实掩码编码到潜在空间后拼接作为扩散U-Net的条件信号，并设计并行的CLIP对齐文本路径，在多个尺度注入语言特征，使模型能对齐文本查询与演化中的视觉表征，从而将扩散骨干转化为通用的分割接口。
AI.result: 在标准语义分割基准上达到SOTA，并展现出强大的开放词汇泛化能力及跨域迁移能力（医疗、遥感、农业），无需领域特定的架构定制。
AI.conclusion: 现代扩散骨干网络可以充当通用分割学习器而不仅是生成器，缩小了视觉生成与视觉理解之间的差距。

title: Turtle shell clustering: A mixture approach to discriminative clustering with applications to flow cytometry and other data
summary: Generative approaches to clustering provide information on geometric properties of clusters, whereas discriminative approaches provide boundaries between clusters. Ideas from both approaches are incorporated to present a fully unsupervised, probabilistic, and discriminative clustering method via a regularized mutual information objective function, wherein a mixture of mixtures of Gaussian and uniform distributions is used for formulation of the conditional model. Automatic selection of the number of components is established with the introduction of the regularizing term and a merge step, similar to those applied in reversible jump Markov chain Monte Carlo methods used in Bayesian clustering. Consequently, the turtle shell method -- a fully unsupervised clustering method capable of estimating non-linear boundary lines, automatically selecting the number of components, and capturing intuitive clusters in the presence of data abnormalities such as noise and/or irregular cluster shapes -- is introduced. We test this method on various simulated and real datasets commonly explored in clustering research, and extend the analysis to datasets arising from flow cytometry experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"龟壳方法"的完全无监督概率判别聚类方法，通过正则化互信息目标函数结合高斯与均匀分布的混合模型，能自动选择聚类数量、捕捉非线性边界，并在含噪声或不规则形状数据中表现良好。
AI.motivation: 融合生成式聚类（提供几何信息）和判别式聚类（提供边界信息）各自的优势，提出一种完全无监督的聚类方法，解决现有方法在自动选择聚类数、处理噪声和不规则聚类形状等方面的不足。
AI.method: 采用混合高斯与均匀分布的混合模型构建条件模型，通过正则化互信息目标函数进行优化，并引入类似于贝叶斯聚类中可逆跳转马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛方法的合并步骤，实现自动选择聚类数量。
AI.result: 在多种模拟和真实数据集（包括流式细胞术数据）上进行了测试，验证了该方法能有效估计非线性边界、自动选择聚类数量，并在存在噪声和不规则形状时捕捉直观的聚类结构。
AI.conclusion: 提出的"龟壳方法"是一种有效的完全无监督聚类方法，兼具生成式和判别式聚类的优点，在复杂数据场景下表现出色。

title: Improving Vision-language Models with Perception-centric Process Reward Models
summary: Recent advancements in reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) have significantly improved the complex reasoning ability of vision-language models (VLMs). However, its outcome-level supervision is too coarse to diagnose and correct errors within the reasoning chain. To this end, we propose Perceval, a process reward model (PRM) that enables token-level error grounding, which can extract image-related claims from the response and compare them one by one with the visual evidence in the image, ultimately returning claims that contain perceptual errors. Perceval is trained with perception-intensive supervised training data. We then integrate Perceval into the RL training process to train the policy models. Specifically, compared to traditional GRPO, which applies sequence-level advantages, we apply token-level advantages by targeting penalties on hallucinated spans identified by Perceval, thus enabling fine-grained supervision signals. In addition to augmenting the training process, Perceval can also assist VLMs during the inference stage. Using Perceval, we can truncate the erroneous portions of the model's response, and then either have the model regenerate the response directly or induce the model to reflect on its previous output. This process can be repeated multiple times to achieve test-time scaling. Experiments show significant improvements on benchmarks from various domains across multiple reasoning VLMs trained with RL, highlighting the promise of perception-centric supervision as a general-purpose strategy. For test-time scaling, it also demonstrates consistent performance gains over other strategies, such as major voting. Our code and data will be publicly released at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/Perceval.

AI.tldr: Perceval是一个针对视觉语言模型(VLM)的过程奖励模型(PRM)，通过将响应中的图像相关声明与视觉证据逐词对比，实现token级别的错误定位和细粒度监督信号。它被集成到RL训练过程（提供token级优势）和推理阶段（截断错误部分并触发重生成或反思），显著提升了多个领域基准测试的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）仅提供结果级别的监督信号，过于粗糙，无法诊断和纠正推理链中的具体错误，尤其是视觉感知错误（如幻觉）。
AI.method: 1) 构建Perceval过程奖励模型，提取响应中与图像相关的声明，逐条与图像视觉证据对比，返回包含感知错误的声明。2) 训练Perceval使用感知密集型监督数据。3) 在RL训练中引入token级优势信号（替代GRPO的序列级优势），对Perceval标记的幻觉片段施加惩罚。4) 推理阶段利用Perceval截断错误响应，触发重生成或反思，实现test-time scaling。
AI.result: 在多个领域基准测试上，Perceval显著提升了多种基于RL训练的推理VLM的性能；推理阶段相比多数投票等策略取得了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 以感知为中心的细粒度监督信号是一种通用有效的策略，既能增强RL训练（token级信号），又能改善推理阶段（截断+反思），展示了过程奖励模型在视觉-语言任务中的巨大潜力。

title: Point-MF: One-step Point Cloud Generation from a Single Image via Mean Flows
summary: Single-image point cloud reconstruction must infer complete 3D geometry, including occluded parts, from a single RGB image. While diffusion-based reconstructors achieve high accuracy, they typically require many denoising iterations, resulting in slow and expensive inference. We propose Point-MF, a Mean-Flow-based framework for low-NFE single-image point cloud reconstruction that couples a Mean-Flow-compatible architecture with an auxiliary loss. Specifically, Point-MF operates directly in point-cloud space to learn the mean velocity field and enables one-step reconstruction with a single network function evaluation (1-NFE), without relying on VAE-based latent representations. To make Mean Flow effective under large interval jumps, Point-MF employs a Diffusion Transformer tailored to the Mean-Flow setting, conditioned on frozen DINOv3 image features via a lightweight token adapter and equipped with explicit interval/time conditioning. Moreover, we introduce Denoised Space Anchor, a set-distance auxiliary loss on the denoised-space estimate $x_θ$ induced by the predicted velocity field, to stabilize large-step generation and reduce outliers and density artifacts. On ShapeNet-R2N2 and Pix3D, Point-MF strikes a strong balance between reconstruction quality and inference speed compared to multi-step diffusion baselines and competitive feedforward models, while generating high-quality point clouds with millisecond-level latency.

AI.tldr: 提出Point-MF，一种基于Mean Flow的单步点云重建框架，无需多步扩散迭代，在ShapeNet-R2N2和Pix3D上实现毫秒级高质量点云重建。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散的单图像点云重建方法虽然精度高，但需要大量去噪迭代，导致推理速度慢、计算成本高。作者希望实现低NFE（网络函数评估次数）的高效点云重建。
AI.method: 1) 采用Mean Flow框架直接在点云空间学习平均速度场，实现单步重建（1-NFE）；2) 设计适用于Mean Flow的Diffusion Transformer，基于冻结的DINOv3图像特征并通过轻量级token适配器进行条件注入；3) 提出Denoised Space Anchor辅助损失，稳定大步长生成并减少离群点和密度伪影。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet-R2N2和Pix3D数据集上，Point-MF在重建质量和推理速度之间取得了良好平衡，相比多步扩散基线模型和前馈模型具有竞争力，实现了毫秒级延迟的高质量点云生成。
AI.conclusion: Mean Flow框架结合适当的架构设计和辅助损失，能够有效实现单图像点云的单步高质量重建，显著提升推理效率。

title: MOCA: A Transformer-based Modular Causal Inference Framework with One-way Cross-attention and Cutting Feedback
summary: Causal effect estimation from observational data requires careful adjustment for confounding. Classical estimators such as inverse probability weighting and augmented inverse probability weighting are effective under favorable model specification, but may become unstable when treatment assignment and outcome mechanisms are complex, non-linear, and high-dimensional. Machine learning and representation learning approaches improve flexibility, yet joint training can allow outcome-related information to influence treatment-side representations, which is undesirable from a causal perspective. We propose MOCA (Modular One-way Causal Attention), a transformer-based framework that separates treatment and outcome modeling through a modular design, and performs confounder adjustment using a one-way attention mechanism. A cutting-feedback strategy, implemented via gradient detachment, prevents the outcome loss from updating the treatment module. This design preserves directional information flow while retaining the representational power of transformer architectures for causal inference. Across multiple simulated scenarios, including linear, nonlinear, heavy-tailed, hidden confounding, and high-dimensional settings, MOCA shows competitive or improved performance relative to IPW, AIPW, X-learner, TARNet, and DragonNet. We further illustrate the method on the Infant Health and Development Program dataset and the Dehejia-Wahba dataset as real-world benchmarks. These results suggest that modular attention with one-way information flow provides a promising and interpretable direction for causal inference with modern deep learning models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOCA，一个基于Transformer的模块化因果注意力框架，通过单向注意力机制和梯度分离策略实现因果效应的稳健估计，在多种模拟和真实数据上表现优于传统和现有深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统因果效应估计方法（如IPW、AIPW）在复杂高维非线性场景下不稳定；现有深度学习方法联合训练时，结果信息可能污染处理侧表征，违反因果推断原则。因此需要一种既能利用深度学习表达能力、又能保持因果方向信息流的框架。
AI.method: MOCA采用模块化设计，分离处理建模和结果建模模块，通过单向注意力机制实现混淆变量调整；引入切割反馈策略（梯度分离）确保结果损失不会反向传播更新处理模块，从而保持信息单向流动。
AI.result: 在线性、非线性、重尾分布、隐藏混淆和高维等多种模拟场景下，MOCA相对于IPW、AIPW、X-learner、TARNet和DragonNet表现出竞争力或更优性能；在IHDP和Dehejia-Wahba真实数据集上进一步验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 模块化单向注意力机制结合梯度分离是一种有前景且可解释的深度因果推断方向，能够利用Transformer的表达能力同时维护因果结构的完整性。

title: Majorization-Guided Test-Time Adaptation for Vision-Language Models under Modality-Specific Shift
summary: Vision-language models transfer well in zero-shot settings, but at deployment the visual and textual branches often shift asymmetrically. Under this condition, entropy-based test-time adaptation can sharpen the fused posterior while increasing error, because an unreliable modality may still dominate fusion. We study this failure mode through a majorization view of multimodal posteriors and cast adaptation as a constrained de-mixing problem on the fused prediction. Based on this view, we propose MG-MTTA, which keeps the backbone frozen and updates only a lightweight gate or adapter. The objective combines fused-posterior entropy minimization with a reliability-aware gate prior built from anchor-based modality consistency and cross-modal conflict. Our analysis gives conditions under which entropy reduction preserves the correct ranking and a threshold that characterizes modality-dominance failure. On the ImageNet-based benchmark, MG-MTTA improves top-1 accuracy from 57.97 to 66.51 under semantics-preserving textual shift and from 21.68 to 26.27 under joint visual-textual shift, while remaining competitive in the visual-only benchmark. These results show that multimodal test-time adaptation should control modality reliability, not just prediction entropy.

AI.tldr: 提出MG-MTTA方法，通过模态可靠性感知的熵最小化策略解决多模态测试时适应中模态不对称偏移导致的融合失败问题，仅更新轻量级门控或适配器，在ImageNet基准上显著提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 多模态VL模型在实际部署中，视觉和文本分支常发生非对称偏移，导致基于熵的测试时适应方法虽然能锐化融合后验，但不可靠的模态仍可能主导融合，从而增加错误率。
AI.method: 将多模态后验的适应问题建模为约束解混问题，提出MG-MTTA方法：保持骨干网络冻结，仅更新轻量级门控或适配器；优化目标结合融合后验熵最小化与基于锚点模态一致性和跨模态冲突构建的可靠性感知门控先验。
AI.result: 在ImageNet基准上，语义保持文本偏移下top-1准确率从57.97提升至66.51，联合视觉-文本偏移下从21.68提升至26.27，在纯视觉偏移基准上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态测试时适应不应仅关注预测熵，还需控制模态可靠性；推导了熵降低保持正确排序的条件以及表征模态主导失败模式的阈值。

title: Infrastructure-Guided Connectivity-Enhanced Road Crack Detection and Estimation
comment: Accepted and will be presented at the Fourth IEEE International Conference on Mobility: Operations, Services, and Technologies (MOST) on May 4 - 6, 2026 at Detroit, Michigan
summary: In this paper, we report the world's first infrastructure-guided communication-enhanced road crack detection pipeline that is effective and implementable on passenger vehicles. We first design a customized communication protocol to transmit the region of interest from the infrastructure to the vehicle. With proper camera image processing (e.g., dynamic cropping and frame selection), the focused images are provided to the crack detection model. Leveraging state-of-the-art crack detection model backbones and a carefully prepared dataset comprising a forward-facing view with a crack, we train the model to improve crack-detection performance. We demonstrate the full detection pipeline on an experimental vehicle platform, showcase the detection effectiveness, and project future research directions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个基于基础设施引导、通信增强的车辆道路裂缝检测流水线，通过自定义通信协议、动态图像裁剪和帧选择，结合最新裂缝检测模型骨干网络，在实车平台上验证了检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有道路裂缝检测多在静态图像或无人机上进行，缺乏车辆在行驶过程中与基础设施协同的实时检测方案。作者希望利用基础设施预先识别的感兴趣区域（ROI），通过通信增强车辆检测能力。
AI.method: 1) 设计自定义通信协议，将基础设施识别的ROI传输到车辆；2) 对相机图像进行动态裁剪和帧选择，聚焦于裂缝区域；3) 使用SOTA裂缝检测模型骨干网络，在包含正向视野和裂缝的数据集上训练。
AI.result: 在实验车辆平台上演示了完整的检测流水线，验证了检测有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该基础设施-车辆协同的检测流水线可行有效，未来可进一步优化通信延迟、模型轻量化等方向。

title: CF-VLA: Efficient Coarse-to-Fine Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Policies
summary: Flow-based vision-language-action (VLA) policies offer strong expressivity for action generation, but suffer from a fundamental inefficiency: multi-step inference is required to recover action structure from uninformative Gaussian noise, leading to a poor efficiency-quality trade-off under real-time constraints. We address this issue by rethinking the role of the starting point in generative action modeling. Instead of shortening the sampling trajectory, we propose CF-VLA, a coarse-to-fine two-stage formulation that restructures action generation into a coarse initialization step that constructs an action-aware starting point, followed by a single-step local refinement that corrects residual errors. Concretely, the coarse stage learns a conditional posterior over endpoint velocity to transform Gaussian noise into a structured initialization, while the fine stage performs a fixed-time refinement from this initialization. To stabilize training, we introduce a stepwise strategy that first learns a controlled coarse predictor and then performs joint optimization. Experiments on CALVIN and LIBERO show that our method establishes a strong efficiency-performance frontier under low-NFE (Number of Function Evaluations) regimes: it consistently outperforms existing NFE=2 methods, matches or surpasses the NFE=10 $π_{0.5}$ baseline on several metrics, reduces action sampling latency by 75.4\%, and achieves the best average real-robot success rate of 83.0\%, outperforming MIP by 19.5 points and $π_{0.5}$ by 4.0 points. These results suggest that structured, coarse-to-fine generation enables both strong performance and efficient inference. Our code is available at https://github.com/EmbodiedAI-RoboTron/CF-VLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CF-VLA，一种粗到精的两阶段视觉-语言-动作策略生成框架，通过结构化的动作感知初始化加单步局部细化替代多步去噪推理，在保持高性能的同时大幅提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 基于流的VLA策略虽表达力强，但需多步推理从高斯噪声中恢复动作结构，导致在实时性约束下效率与质量难以兼顾。现有方法通过缩短采样轨迹来缓解此问题，但本文重新审视生成动作建模中起始点的作用，提出用结构化初始化替代无信息噪声。
AI.method: 提出粗到精两阶段框架：粗阶段学习端点的条件后验速度，将高斯噪声转化为结构化的动作感知初始化；精阶段从该初始化出发进行单步固定时间局部细化。训练上采用逐步策略：先学习粗阶段预测器，再进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在CALVIN和LIBERO上，CF-VLA在低NFE场景下建立效率-性能前沿：一致优于现有NFE=2方法，多项指标匹配或超越NFE=10的π0.5基线；动作采样延迟降低75.4%；真实机器人任务成功率83.0%，优于MIP 19.5%、π0.5 4.0%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化的粗到精生成策略能够在保证强性能的同时实现高效推理，为解决VLA策略的实时推理瓶颈提供了有效路径。

title: A Dynamic Learning Observatory Reveals the Rapid Salinization of Satkhira, Bangladesh
summary: Soil salinity is a major environmental challenge in coastal Bangladesh, threatening agricultural productivity and local livelihoods. This study develops a machine-learning-based framework to predict and map soil salinity in Satkhira district by integrating field observations with Landsat-derived spectral indices. A total of 205 soil samples collected during 2024-2025 were used to train an Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) model, and predictions were further improved using a Generalized Additive Model (GAM). Spatial cross-validation was applied to reduce autocorrelation bias, and bootstrap resampling was used to quantify prediction uncertainty. The results show strong spatial variability of soil salinity, with higher concentrations in the southern and central coastal regions and lower levels in the northern inland areas. Vegetation indices, particularly NDVI, along with salinity-related spectral indicators, were identified as key predictors. 10-year-window peak-exposure maps generated for 2014-2023 reveal recurrent high-salinity zones and a persistent, expanding footprint of moderate-to-high salinity exposure across the central parts of the district. Uncertainty analysis indicates higher variability in coastal zones and improved prediction stability when multi-year datasets are combined. The proposed framework provides a robust and scalable approach for long-term monitoring of soil salinity. It supports climate-resilient agriculture, land-use planning, and evidence-based decision-making in coastal Bangladesh.

AI.tldr: 本文利用XGBoost和GAM模型，结合Landsat光谱指数和实地土壤样本数据，对孟加拉国沿海Satkhira地区的土壤盐度进行预测与制图，并分析了2014-2023年盐度暴露的动态变化。
AI.motivation: 土壤盐度是孟加拉国沿海地区的主要环境挑战，威胁着农业生产和当地生计。现有方法在长期监测和预测方面存在局限性，需要开发稳健、可扩展的机器学习框架来支持气候适应性农业和土地利用规划。
AI.method: 采集205个土壤样本（2024-2025年），训练XGBoost模型，并用GAM进一步改进预测。采用空间交叉验证减少空间自相关偏差，使用bootstrap重采样量化预测不确定性。基于10年窗口生成峰值暴露图（2014-2023）。
AI.result: 土壤盐度呈强烈空间异质性，南部和中部沿海地区浓度高，北部内陆地区低。NDVI等植被指数和盐度相关光谱指标是关键预测因子。2014-2023年暴露图显示持续存在高盐度区，且中度至高度盐度暴露范围在中心区域扩大。不确定性分析表明沿海地区变异性较高，多年度数据组合可提高预测稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为土壤盐度的长期监测提供了稳健且可扩展的方法，可支持气候适应性农业、土地利用规划和基于证据的决策。

title: Meta-CoT: Enhancing Granularity and Generalization in Image Editing
summary: Unified multi-modal understanding/generative models have shown improved image editing performance by incorporating fine-grained understanding into their Chain-of-Thought (CoT) process. However, a critical question remains underexplored: what forms of CoT and training strategy can jointly enhance both the understanding granularity and generalization? To address this, we propose Meta-CoT, a paradigm that performs a two-level decomposition of any single-image editing operation with two key properties: (1) Decomposability. We observe that any editing intention can be represented as a triplet - (task, target, required understanding ability). Inspired by this, Meta-CoT decomposes both the editing task and the target, generating task-specific CoT and traversing editing operations on all targets. This decomposition enhances the model's understanding granularity of editing operations and guides it to learn each element of the triplet during training, substantially improving the editing capability. (2) Generalizability. In the second decomposition level, we further break down editing tasks into five fundamental meta-tasks. We find that training on these five meta-tasks, together with the other two elements of the triplet, is sufficient to achieve strong generalization across diverse, unseen editing tasks. To further align the model's editing behavior with its CoT reasoning, we introduce the CoT-Editing Consistency Reward, which encourages more accurate and effective utilization of CoT information during editing. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves an overall 15.8% improvement across 21 editing tasks, and generalizes effectively to unseen editing tasks when trained on only a small set of meta-tasks. Our code, benchmark, and model are released at https://shiyi-zh0408.github.io/projectpages/Meta-CoT/

AI.tldr: 提出Meta-CoT范式，将单图像编辑操作分解为(任务, 目标, 所需理解能力)三元组和五个元任务，结合CoT-编辑一致性奖励，在21个编辑任务上平均提升15.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态理解/生成模型虽将细粒度理解融入CoT过程提升了图像编辑性能，但什么样的CoT形式和训练策略能同时增强理解粒度和泛化性这一关键问题尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出Meta-CoT，包含两层分解：(1) 将编辑意图分解为(任务, 目标, 所需理解能力)三元组，生成任务特定CoT；(2) 将编辑任务进一步分解为五个基础元任务。同时引入CoT-编辑一致性奖励，使模型的编辑行为与CoT推理对齐。
AI.result: 在21个编辑任务上平均提升15.8%，在仅使用少量元任务训练时能有效泛化到未见过的编辑任务。
AI.conclusion: Meta-CoT通过层次化分解和一致性奖励，有效增强了模型对编辑操作的理解粒度和泛化能力。

title: A Unified Fractional Regularization Framework for Sparse Recovery
summary: We propose a unified fractional regularization framework for sparse signal recovery based on the $\ell_1/\ell_p^q$ model. Our main theoretical contribution is the characterization of the equivalence between the first-order stationary points of the $\ell_1/\ell_p^q$ formulation and the subtractive $\ell_1 - α\ell_p$ model, providing a unified perspective on these nonconvex regularizers. In addition, we establish a new sufficient recovery condition under the Restricted Isometry Property (RIP), showing that the framework's robustness even under high-coherence sensing matrices. To solve the resulting problem, we develop a majorization-minimization (MM) algorithm and prove its convergence via the Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz (KL) property. Numerical experiments on different sensing matrices and MRI reconstruction demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于 ℓ₁/ℓ_p^q 模型的统一分数阶正则化框架用于稀疏信号恢复，理论上证明了该框架一阶驻点与 ℓ₁ - αℓ_p 模型的等价性，建立了基于 RIP 的充分恢复条件，并开发了基于 MM 算法的求解方法，在数值实验和 MRI 重建中表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 旨在统一和扩展非凸正则化模型（如 ℓ₁/ℓ_p^q 和 ℓ₁ - αℓ_p），解决稀疏信号恢复中传统 ℓ₁ 正则化存在偏差、非凸方法缺乏统一理论分析的问题。
AI.method: 提出分数阶 ℓ₁/ℓ_p^q 正则化框架，理论证明其与 ℓ₁ - αℓ_p 模型的一阶驻点等价性，推导基于 RIP 的充分恢复条件，设计 MM 算法并利用 KL 性质证明收敛性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法在不同传感矩阵和 MRI 重建任务中一致优于现有方法，且在高相干性矩阵下仍具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该统一分数阶正则化框架有效提升了稀疏信号恢复的性能和鲁棒性，为非凸正则化提供了更坚实的理论基础。

title: Probing CLIP's Comprehension of 360-Degree Textual and Visual Semantics
summary: The dream of instantly creating rich 360-degree panoramic worlds from text is rapidly becoming a reality, yet a crucial gap exists in our ability to reliably evaluate their semantic alignment. Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) models, standard AI evaluators, predominantly trained on perspective image-text pairs, face an open question regarding their understanding of the unique characteristics of 360-degree panoramic image-text pairs. This paper addresses this gap by first introducing two concepts: \emph{360-degree textual semantics}, semantic information conveyed by explicit format identifiers, and \emph{360-degree visual semantics}, invariant semantics under horizontal circular shifts. To probe CLIP's comprehension of these semantics, we then propose novel evaluation methodologies using keyword manipulation and horizontal circular shifts of varying magnitudes. Rigorous statistical analyses across popular CLIP configurations reveal that: (1) CLIP models effectively leverage explicit textual identifiers, demonstrating an understanding of 360-degree textual semantics; and (2) CLIP models fail to robustly preserve semantic alignment under horizontal circular shifts, indicating limited comprehension of 360-degree visual semantics. To address this limitation, we propose a LoRA-based fine-tuning framework that explicitly instills invariance to circular shifts. Our fine-tuned models exhibit improved comprehension of 360-degree visual semantics, though with a slight degradation in original semantic evaluation performance, highlighting a fundamental trade-off in adapting CLIP to 360-degree panoramic images. Code is available at https://github.com/littlewhitesea/360Semantics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了CLIP模型对360度全景图像-文本语义对齐的理解，发现CLIP能理解文本标识符语义，但对水平循环移位下的视觉语义不变性理解不足，并提出LoRA微调框架来改善这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有AI评估方法缺乏对360度全景图像-文本语义对齐的可靠评估能力，CLIP模型主要训练于透视图像，其对360度全景图像独特语义的理解存在未知问题。
AI.method: 1) 定义360度文本语义和视觉语义两个概念；2) 设计基于关键词操作和水平循环移位的评估方法；3) 通过统计分析探测CLIP对上述语义的理解；4) 提出LoRA微调框架显式注入循环移位不变性。
AI.result: CLIP能理解360度文本语义（利用显式文本标识符），但不能稳健保持水平循环移位下的语义对齐（视觉语义理解不足）。LoRA微调改善了视觉语义理解，但轻微降低了原始语义评估性能。
AI.conclusion: 在将CLIP适配到360度全景图像时存在"循环移位不变性"与"原始语义评估能力"之间的根本性权衡。

title: Well-Conditioned Oblivious Perturbations in Linear Space
summary:
Perturbing a deterministic $n$-dimensional matrix with small Gaussian noise is a cornerstone of smoothed analysis of algorithms [Spielman and Teng, JACM 2004], as it reduces the condition number of the input to $O(n)$, and with it the complexity of many matrix algorithms. However, when deployed algorithmically, these perturbations are expensive due to the cost of generating and storing $n^2$ Gaussian random variables. We propose a perturbation that requires generating and storing $O(n)$ random numbers in $O(\log n)$ bits of precision, and reduces the condition number of any deterministic matrix to $O(n)$, matching Gaussian perturbations. Our result in particular implies a better complexity for the perturbed conjugate gradient algorithm, showing that we can solve an $n\times n$ linear system in linear space to within an arbitrarily small constant backward error using $O(n)$ matrix-vector products.
  In our construction, we introduce the concept of a pattern matrix, which is a dense deterministic matrix that maps all sparse vectors into dense vectors, and we combine it with a sparse perturbation whose entries are dependent and located in a non-uniform fashion. In order to analyze this construction, we develop new techniques for lower bounding the smallest singular value of a random matrix with dependent entries.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种仅需O(n)个随机数（O(log n)位精度）的矩阵扰动方法，能将任意确定性矩阵的条件数降至O(n)，匹配高斯扰动效果，并改进了共轭梯度法的复杂度。
AI.motivation: 高斯扰动虽能降低矩阵条件数以加速算法，但生成和存储n²个高斯随机变量代价高昂，本文旨在设计更高效的扰动方案。
AI.method: 引入"模式矩阵"（pattern matrix）概念（一种将稀疏向量映射为稠密向量的确定性矩阵），结合依赖项非均匀分布的稀疏扰动，并开发了新的依赖项随机矩阵最小奇异值下界分析技术。
AI.result: 提出的扰动仅需O(n)个O(log n)位精度的随机数，即可将任意确定性矩阵条件数降至O(n)，使共轭梯度法在O(n)次矩阵-向量乘法内达到任意小常数后向误差。
AI.conclusion: 成功在随机性开销和条件数优化之间取得显著平衡，为大规模线性系统的平滑分析提供了实用化方案。

title: Benchmarking Pathology Foundation Models for Breast Cancer Survival Prediction
summary: Pathology foundation models (PFMs) have recently emerged as powerful pretrained encoders for computational pathology, enabling transfer learning across a wide range of downstream tasks. However, systematic comparisons of these models for clinically meaningful prediction problems remain limited, especially in the context of survival prediction under external validation. In this study, we benchmark widely used and recently proposed PFMs for breast cancer survival prediction from whole-slide histopathology images. Using a standardized pipeline based on patch-level feature extraction and a unified survival modeling framework, we evaluate model representations across three independent clinical cohorts comprising more than 5,400 patients with long-term follow-up. Models are trained on one cohort and evaluated on two independent external cohorts, enabling a rigorous assessment of cross-dataset generalization. Overall, H-optimus-1 achieves the strongest survival prediction performance. More broadly, we observe consistent generational improvements across model families, with second-generation PFMs outperforming their first-generation counterparts. However, absolute performance differences between many recent PFMs remain modest, suggesting diminishing returns from further scaling of pretraining data or model size alone. Notably, the compact distilled model H0-mini slightly outperforms its larger teacher model H-optimus-0, despite using fewer than 8% of the parameters and enabling significantly faster feature extraction. Together, these results provide the first large-scale, externally validated benchmark of PFMs for breast cancer survival prediction, and offer practical guidance for efficient deployment of PFMs in clinical workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地基准测试了多种病理基础模型（PFMs）在乳腺癌生存预测任务上的表现，基于标准化流程在三个独立临床队列（>5400名患者）上进行跨数据集外部验证。研究发现H-optimus-1性能最优，观察到PFM的代际改进，但近期模型间绝对差异较小；值得注意的是，紧凑型蒸馏模型H0-mini以不到8%的参数略超其大教师模型H-optimus-0。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏对病理基础模型（PFMs）在临床意义上的生存预测任务上进行系统性比较，尤其是在外部验证条件下的跨数据集泛化能力评估。
AI.method: 采用标准化流程：基于图像块的病理特征提取 + 统一生存建模框架，在一个队列上训练并在两个独立外部队列上评估，覆盖5,400+乳腺癌患者。
AI.result: H-optimus-1表现最佳；第二代PFMs普遍优于第一代；但近期模型间性能差异较小，表明单纯扩大预训练数据或模型规模可能收益递减。蒸馏模型H0-mini（<8%参数）略超其教师模型H-optimus-0。
AI.conclusion: 提供了首个大规模外部验证的PFMs乳腺癌生存预测基准，为临床工作流中高效部署PFMs提供了实用指导，并提示模型蒸馏可能比单纯扩大规模更具性价比。

title: Tessera: Secure, Near-Line-Rate Weight Streaming for UMA Edge Accelerators
summary:
Deploying proprietary Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on commodity edge devices demands hardware-backed Digital Rights Management (DRM) capable of withstanding both software-level and physical adversaries. In Unified Memory Architecture (UMA) systems, the host CPU and Neural Processing Unit (NPU) share physical DRAM, leaving plaintext model weights directly readable by a compromised OS kernel. Existing defenses fail in this constrained setting: trusted execution environments monopolize scarce memory with permanently reserved regions, while full-memory encryption operates at page granularity. This forces the system to fetch massive 4 KB memory pages for sub-page tensor tiles, severely crippling bandwidth.
  We present Tessera, a reference architecture for inline, cache-line granularity weight decryption on UMA edge accelerators. The design intercepts 64-byte AXI bursts, computing AES-256-CTR keystreams in parallel with DRAM fetches. This streams plaintext directly into isolated NPU SRAM, creating a transient memory footprint confined to the active tile and eliminating the need for permanent memory carve-outs. Measurements across three distinct SoC platforms demonstrate that this parallelization hides cryptographic latency behind standard DRAM fetch times, a condition that holds even under worst-case timing variations. Consequently, Tessera is projected to achieve 98.4\% of the theoretical memory bandwidth ceiling (a mere 1.6\% overhead). Across standard vision and language models, page-level memory encryption suffers up to a 32x bandwidth penalty, whereas Tessera maintains an optimal 1x footprint for all layer geometries. Finally, Tessera neutralizes major UMA-specific attack vectors -- including physical DRAM extraction, rogue DMA, and compute hijacking -- and formally prevents plaintext leakage across sparse tensors.

AI.tldr: Tessera是一种针对UMA边缘设备的参考架构，通过缓存行粒度的AES-256-CTR解密实现模型权重的硬件级保护，能在保持98.4%理论内存带宽的同时，将解密延迟隐藏在DRAM读取延迟内，有效防御物理内存提取、恶意DMA和计算劫持等攻击。
AI.motivation: 在UMA（统一内存架构）系统中，CPU和NPU共享物理DRAM，导致模型权重容易被受攻击的内核读取。现有方案（TEE、全内存加密）在资源受限的边缘设备上存在严重性能问题，需要一种轻量级、细粒度的硬件级权重保护机制。
AI.method: Tessera采用内联、缓存行粒度（64字节）的解密架构，拦截AXI总线突发传输，在DRAM读取的同时并行计算AES-256-CTR密钥流，直接将明文流式传输到隔离的NPU SRAM中，消除永久内存预留需求。
AI.result: 在三种不同SoC平台上的测量表明，加密延迟完全隐藏在标准DRAM读取时间内，达到98.4%的理论内存带宽上限（仅1.6%开销）。相比页级内存加密高达32倍的带宽损失，Tessera在所有层几何形状下保持1倍最优内存占用。
AI.conclusion: Tessera有效解决了UMA系统上DNN权重保护的安全性与性能矛盾，能够抵御物理DRAM提取、恶意DMA和计算劫持等攻击，并形式化地防止稀疏张量的明文泄露。

title: Aycromo: An Open-Source Platform for Automatic Chromosome Detection in Metaphase Images Based on Deep Learning
summary: Chromosome analysis is a fundamental step in the diagnosis of genetic diseases, but the manual karyotyping workflow is time-consuming and heavily dependent on expert specialists, often requiring several days per patient. Although Deep Learning models have achieved high performance in chromosome detection, most proposed solutions remain restricted to research prototypes or lack graphical interfaces suitable for clinical use. In this work, we present Aycromo, an open-source desktop platform for AI-assisted cytogenetic analysis. Built on Electron and ONNX Runtime, the tool allows cytogeneticists to load pre-trained models, compare architectures through an integrated benchmarking module, and manually correct detections via an interactive annotation interface, all without command-line interaction. Preliminary experiments on metaphase images from the CRCN-NE dataset demonstrate that YOLOv11 achieves 99.40% mAP@50, while the platform reduces per-slide analysis to seconds

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Aycromo，一个基于Electron和ONNX Runtime的开源桌面平台，用于AI辅助的细胞遗传学分析。该平台允许细胞遗传学家加载预训练模型、通过集成基准测试模块比较架构，并手动纠正检测结果，无需命令行交互。初步实验显示YOLOv11在CRCN-NE数据集上达到99.40% mAP@50，平台将每张切片分析时间缩短至秒级。
AI.motivation: 染色体分析是遗传疾病诊断的基础步骤，但手动核型分析工作流程耗时且高度依赖专家，每个患者通常需要数天时间。现有深度学习解决方案大多停留在研究原型阶段，缺乏适合临床使用的图形界面。
AI.method: 构建基于Electron和ONNX Runtime的开源桌面平台Aycromo，集成预训练模型加载、架构性能基准测试模块和交互式注释界面，支持YOLOv11等模型进行染色体检测。
AI.result: YOLOv11在CRCN-NE数据集上达到99.40% mAP@50，平台将每张切片分析时间缩短至秒级。
AI.conclusion: Aycromo平台为细胞遗传学分析提供了实用且高效的AI辅助工具，弥合了研究原型与临床应用之间的差距。

title: Learning Curves and Benign Overfitting of Spectral Algorithms in Large Dimensions
summary: Existing large-dimensional theory for spectral algorithms resolves either the optimally tuned point or the interpolation limit, but leaves the under-regularized regime unexplored. We study the learning curve and benign overfitting of spectral algorithms in the large-dimensional setting where the sample size and dimension are of comparable order, i.e., $n \asymp d^γ$ for some $γ>0$. We first consider inner-product kernels on the sphere $\mathbb{S}^{d-1}$ and establish a sharp asymptotic characterization of the excess risk across the full regularization path under various source conditions $s \geq 0$, where $s$ measures the relative smoothness of the regression function. Our results reveal that the learning curve is not simply U-shaped but instead consists of three distinct regimes: over-regularized, under-regularized, and interpolation regimes. This characterization allows us to fully capture the benign overfitting phenomenon, demonstrating that benign overfitting arises consistently across both the under-regularized and interpolation regimes whenever $s$ is positive but no larger than a critical threshold. We further show that, in the sufficiently regularized regime, the kernel learning curve is recovered by an associated sequence model. Finally, we extend the learning-curve analysis to large-dimensional KRR for a class of kernels on general domains in $\mathbb{R}^d$ whose low-degree eigenspaces satisfy spectral-scaling and hyper-contractivity conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了谱算法在高维场景下的学习曲线和良性过拟合现象，揭示了完整正则化路径下包含过正则化、欠正则化和插值三个不同阶段，并证明良性过拟合在欠正则化和插值区间中一致出现。
AI.motivation: 现有高维谱算法理论要么关注最优调参点，要么关注插值极限，但欠正则化区域尚未被探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，全面刻画谱算法在整个正则化路径上的学习行为。
AI.method: 在样本量与维度可比的高维设定下（n ≍ d^γ），首先针对球面S^{d-1}上的内积核建立过剩风险的渐进精确刻画，考虑不同源条件s≥0；然后将分析推广到一般域上满足谱缩放和超收缩条件的低阶特征空间。
AI.result: 1）学习曲线并非简单U形，而是包含过正则化、欠正则化和插值三个不同阶段；2）当s为正但不超过临界阈值时，良性过拟合在欠正则化和插值区间一致出现；3）在充分正则化区间，核学习曲线可由对应的序列模型恢复。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的完整理论框架弥补了现存理论在欠正则化区域的空白，为理解谱算法在高维场景下的全貌行为提供了统一视角。

title: NeuroClaw Technical Report
summary: Agentic artificial intelligence systems promise to accelerate scientific workflows, but neuroimaging poses unique challenges: heterogeneous modalities (sMRI, fMRI, dMRI, EEG), long multi-stage pipelines, and persistent reproducibility risks. To address this gap, we present NeuroClaw, a domain-specialized multi-agent research assistant for executable and reproducible neuroimaging research. NeuroClaw operates directly on raw neuroimaging data across formats and modalities, grounding decisions in dataset semantics and BIDS metadata so users need not prepare curated inputs or bespoke model code. The platform combines harness engineering with end-to-end environment management, including pinned Python environments, Docker support, automated installers for common neuroimaging tools, and GPU configuration. In practice, this layer emphasizes checkpointing, post-execution verification, structured audit traces, and controlled runtime setup, making toolchains more transparent while improving reproducibility and auditability. A three-tier skill/agent hierarchy separates user-facing interaction, high-level orchestration, and low-level tool skills to decompose complex workflows into safe, reusable units. Alongside the NeuroClaw framework, we introduce NeuroBench, a system-level benchmark for executability, artifact validity, and reproducibility readiness. Across multiple multimodal LLMs, NeuroClaw-enabled runs yield consistent and substantial score improvements compared with direct agent invocation. Project homepage: https://cuhk-aim-group.github.io/NeuroClaw/index.html

AI.tldr: NeuroClaw是一个面向神经影像学的多智能体研究助手，支持异构模态数据、端到端环境管理、检查点与审计追踪，并提出了系统性基准NeuroBench用于评估可执行性、有效性和可重复性。
AI.motivation: 神经影像学存在模态异构、流程冗长、可重复性差等挑战，现有AI系统缺乏针对该领域的专用解决方案，用户仍需准备精心策划的输入或定制模型代码。
AI.method: 提出NeuroClaw框架，包含三层智能体/技能层级架构（用户交互、高层编排、低层工具技能），结合端到端环境管理（Python环境固定、Docker支持、自动安装器、GPU配置）、检查点机制、执行后验证与结构化审计追踪，并构建NeuroBench基准。
AI.result: 在多种多模态LLM上，使用NeuroClaw相较于直接调用智能体，在可执行性、有效性和可重复性方面均取得了显著且一致的分数提升。
AI.conclusion: NeuroClaw有效提升了神经影像学研究的可执行性和可重复性，展示了领域专用多智能体系统在科学工作流自动化中的巨大潜力。

title: Evaluating Jailbreaking Vulnerabilities in LLMs Deployed as Assistants for Smart Grid Operations: A Benchmark Against NERC Standards
summary: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) as assistants in electric grid operations promises to streamline compliance and decision-making but exposes new vulnerabilities to prompt-based adversarial attacks. This paper evaluates the risk of jailbreaking LLMs, i.e., circumventing safety alignments to produce outputs violating regulatory standards, assuming threats from authorized users, such as operators, who craft malicious prompts to elicit non-compliant guidance. Three state-of-the-art LLMs (OpenAI's GPT-4o mini, Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite, and Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Haiku) were tested against Baseline, BitBypass, and DeepInception jailbreaking methods across scenarios derived from nine NERC Reliability Standards (EOP, TOP, and CIP). In the initial broad experiment, the overall Attack Success Rate (ASR) was 33.1%, with DeepInception proving most effective at 63.17% ASR. Claude 3.5 Haiku exhibited complete resistance (0% ASR), while Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite was most vulnerable (55.04% ASR) and GPT-4o mini moderately susceptible (44.34% ASR). A follow-up experiment refining malicious wording in Baseline and BitBypass attacks yielded a 30.6% ASR, confirming that subtle prompt adjustments can enhance simpler methods' efficacy.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了三款主流LLM（GPT-4o mini、Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite、Claude 3.5 Haiku）在电网操作场景下对越狱攻击的脆弱性，实验基于NERC可靠性标准，总体攻击成功率为33.1%，其中DeepInception方法最有效（63.17% ASR），Claude 3.5 Haiku完全免疫（0% ASR），而Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite最易受攻击（55.04% ASR）。
AI.motivation: LLM被部署为电网操作助手可提升效率，但也引入了提示词对抗攻击的新安全风险。需要评估LLM在面对授权用户（如操作员）精心构造的恶意提示时，是否可能被越狱而输出违反电网监管标准的违规指导。
AI.method: 选取三款SOTA LLM（GPT-4o mini、Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite、Claude 3.5 Haiku），使用Baseline、BitBypass、DeepInception三种越狱方法，基于九项NERC可靠性标准（EOP、TOP、CIP）构建场景进行攻击测试，并进行后续实验调整提示词措辞以提升简单方法的有效性。
AI.result: 总体攻击成功率为33.1%；DeepInception最高效（63.17% ASR）；Claude 3.5 Haiku完全抵抗越狱（0% ASR）；Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite最脆弱（55.04% ASR）；GPT-4o mini中等（44.34% ASR）；后续实验通过优化措辞使简单方法攻击成功率达30.6%。
AI.conclusion: LLM在电网等关键基础设施中面临越狱攻击的安全风险不可忽视，不同模型的安全性差异显著（Claude表现最优），提示词微调可显著影响攻击成功率，需针对性设计安全防护措施。

title: WildLIFT: Lifting monocular drone video to 3D for species-agnostic wildlife monitoring
summary: Monocular RGB cameras mounted on drones are widely used for wildlife monitoring, yet most analytical pipelines remain confined to two-dimensional image space, leaving geometric information in video underexploited. We present WildLIFT, a computational framework that integrates three-dimensional scene geometry from monocular drone video with open-vocabulary 2D instance segmentation to enable species-agnostic 3D detection and tracking. Oriented 3D bounding box labels with semantic face information enable quantitative assessment of viewpoint coverage and inter-animal occlusion, producing structured metadata for downstream ecological analyses. We validate the framework on 2,581 manually curated frames comprising over 6,700 3D detections across four large mammal species. WildLIFT maintains high identity consistency in multi-animal scenes and substantially reduces manual 3D annotation effort through keyframe-based refinement. By transforming standard drone footage into structured 3D and viewpoint-aware representations, WildLIFT extends the analytical utility of aerial wildlife datasets for behavioural research and population monitoring.

AI.tldr: WildLIFT是一个从单目无人机视频中提取3D几何信息并结合开放词汇2D实例分割的框架，实现物种无关的3D检测与跟踪。在超过6,700个3D检测标注上验证，显著减少人工3D标注工作，并保持多动物场景下的高身份一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机野生动物监测主要停留在2D图像空间，视频中丰富的3D几何信息未被充分利用，且缺乏物种无关的3D检测与跟踪方法。
AI.method: 融合单目无人机视频的3D场景几何与开放词汇2D实例分割，通过关键帧精化策略减少标注量，输出带语义面信息的定向3D边界框。
AI.result: 在2,581帧、6,700+个3D检测上验证；多动物场景下身份一致性高；显著降低3D标注成本。
AI.conclusion: WildLIFT将标准无人机航拍转化为结构化3D表示，扩展了航拍数据在行为研究和种群监测中的分析价值。

title: Explicit integral representations and quantitative bounds for two-layer ReLU networks
summary: An approach to construct explicit integral representations for two-layer ReLU networks is presented, which provides relatively simple representations for any multivariate polynomial. Quantitative bounds are provided for a particular, sharpened ReLU integral representation, which involves a harmonic extension and a projection. The bounds demonstrate that functions can be approximated with $L^{2}(\mathcal{D})$ errors that do not depend explicitly on dimension or degree, but rather the coefficients of their monomial expansions and the distribution $\mathcal{D}$.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种构建双层ReLU网络显式积分表示的方法，可为任意多元多项式提供相对简单的表示，并给出了特定锐化ReLU积分表示的定量界，表明函数逼近误差不显式依赖于维度或次数，而取决于其单项式展开系数和分布。
AI.motivation: 为双层ReLU网络提供显式的积分表示方法，以更好地理解其表达能力，并建立函数逼近误差的定量界。
AI.method: 提出了构建双层ReLU网络显式积分表示的方法，涉及调和延拓和投影，并给出了特定的锐化ReLU积分表示及其定量界。
AI.result: 提供了定量界，表明使用该积分表示逼近函数时，L²误差不显式依赖于维度或多项式次数，而取决于单项式展开系数和数据分布。
AI.conclusion: 双层ReLU网络的积分表示可以有效地逼近多元多项式，逼近误差主要由函数的单项式系数和分布决定，而非维度或次数。

title: DiffuSAM: Diffusion-Based Prompt-Free SAM2 for Few-Shot and Source-Free Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Segmentation models such as Segment Anything Model (SAM) and SAM2 achieve strong prompt-driven zero-shot performance. However, their training on natural images limits domain transfer to medical data. Consequently, accurate segmentation typically requires extensive fine-tuning and expert-designed prompts. We propose DiffuSAM, a diffusion-based adaptation of SAM2 for prompt-free medical image segmentation. Our framework synthesizes SAM2-compatible segmentation mask-like embeddings via a lightweight diffusion-prior from off-the-shelf frozen SAM2 image features. The generated embeddings are integrated into SAM2's mask decoder to produce accurate segmentations, thereby eliminating the need for user prompts. The diffusion prior is further conditioned on previously segmented slices, enforcing spatial consistency across volumes. Evaluated on the BTCV and CHAOS datasets for CT and MRI under Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA) and Few-Shot settings, DiffuSAM achieves competitive performance with efficient training and inference. Code is available upon request from the corresponding author.

AI.tldr: DiffuSAM是一种基于扩散模型的SAM2适配方法，通过轻量级扩散先验从冻结的SAM2图像特征中生成掩码嵌入，实现无需提示的医学图像分割，在CT和MRI数据集上表现出色。
AI.motivation: SAM等分割模型在自然图像上表现优异，但直接迁移到医学图像领域存在域偏移问题，且需要大量微调和专家设计的提示才能获得准确分割结果，这限制了其在医学领域的实际应用。
AI.method: 1) 使用冻结的SAM2图像编码器提取特征；2) 设计轻量级扩散先验网络，从图像特征生成SAM2兼容的分割掩码嵌入；3) 将生成的嵌入送入SAM2掩码解码器获得分割结果；4) 扩散先验可基于已分割切片进行条件生成，保证体素空间一致性。
AI.result: 在BTCV（CT）和CHAOS（MRI）数据集上，分别在源域无监督域适应（SF-UDA）和Few-Shot设置下取得了有竞争力的分割性能，且训练和推理效率高。
AI.conclusion: DiffuSAM成功将SAM2适配到医学图像分割领域，无需用户提示即可生成高质量分割结果，验证了扩散模型作为桥梁连接通用分割模型与专业领域任务的有效性。

title: OmniShotCut: Holistic Relational Shot Boundary Detection with Shot-Query Transformer
summary: Shot Boundary Detection (SBD) aims to automatically identify shot changes and divide a video into coherent shots. While SBD was widely studied in the literature, existing state-of-the-art methods often produce non-interpretable boundaries on transitions, miss subtle yet harmful discontinuities, and rely on noisy, low-diversity annotations and outdated benchmarks. To alleviate these limitations, we propose OmniShotCut to formulate SBD as structured relational prediction, jointly estimating shot ranges with intra-shot relations and inter-shot relations, by a shot query-based dense video Transformer. To avoid imprecise manual labeling, we adopt a fully synthetic transition synthesis pipeline that automatically reproduces major transition families with precise boundaries and parameterized variants. We also introduce OmniShotCutBench, a modern wide-domain benchmark enabling holistic and diagnostic evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出OmniShotCut方法，将镜头边界检测（SBD）形式化为结构化关系预测，利用基于镜头查询的密集视频Transformer同时估计镜头范围、镜头内关系和镜头间关系，并采用全合成过渡生成管道和多领域基准OmniShotCutBench来提升检测精度与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有SBD方法存在三个主要问题：1）过渡边界不可解释；2）容易遗漏细微但有害的镜头不连续性；3）依赖于噪声大、多样性低的标注数据以及过时的基准。为解决这些问题，本文提出更精确、可解释且可扩展的SBD方案。
AI.method: 1）将SBD形式化为结构化关系预测，通过shot query-based密集视频Transformer联合建模shot范围、intra-shot关系和inter-shot关系；2）采用全合成过渡生成管道，自动生成主要过渡类型及其带精确边界的参数化变体，避免人工标注不精确；3）构建OmniShotCutBench，一个现代多领域基准用于全面和诊断性评估。
AI.result: 在OmniShotCutBench上取得最先进性能，边界检测更精确、过渡类型更可解释、对细微不连续性更敏感。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化关系预测+合成数据+新基准三个维度的协同设计，有效克服了传统SBD方法的局限，在精度和可解释性上均有显著提升。

title: Explainable AI in Speaker Recognition -- Making Latent Representations Understandable
summary: Neural networks can be trained to learn task-relevant representations from data. Understanding how these networks make decisions falls within the Explainable AI (XAI) domain. This paper proposes to study an XAI topic: uncovering unknown organisational patterns in network representations, particularly those representations learned by the speaker recognition network that recognises the speaker identity of utterances. Past studies employed algorithms (e.g. t-distributed Stochastic Neighbour Embedding and K-means) to analyse and visualise how network representations form independent clusters, indicating the presence of flat clustering phenomena within the space defined by these representations. In contrast, this work applies two algorithms -- Single-Linkage Clustering (SLINK) and Hierarchical Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (HDBSCAN) -- to analyse how representations form clusters with hierarchical relationships rather than being independent, thereby demonstrating the existence of hierarchical clustering phenomena within the network representation space. To semantically understand the above hierarchical clustering phenomena, a new algorithm, termed Hierarchical Cluster-Class Matching (HCCM), is designed to perform one-to-one matching between predefined semantic classes and hierarchical representation clusters (i.e. those produced by SLINK or HDBSCAN). Some hierarchical clusters are successfully matched to individual semantic classes (e.g. male, UK), while others to conjunctions of semantic classes (e.g. male and UK, female and Ireland). A new metric, Liebig's score, is proposed to quantify the performance of each matching behaviour, allowing us to diagnose the factor that most strongly limits matching performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究说话人识别网络中的层次聚类现象，使用SLINK和HDBSCAN算法发现网络表示中存在层次聚类结构，并设计HCCM算法将层次聚类与语义类别进行匹配，提出Liebig's score量化匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注网络表示中的平面聚类（独立聚类），忽视了表示空间中可能存在的层次化组织结构。本文旨在揭示说话人识别网络中未被发现的层次聚类现象，并建立层次聚类与语义类别的对应关系。
AI.method: 1) 使用SLINK（层次凝聚聚类）和HDBSCAN（层次密度聚类）替代传统t-SNE/K-means，挖掘网络表示的层次结构。2) 提出Hierarchical Cluster-Class Matching (HCCM)算法，实现层次聚类与预定义语义类别（如性别、地区）的一对一匹配。3) 提出Liebig's score指标量化匹配性能，诊断限制匹配的关键因素。
AI.result: 层次聚类可成功匹配到单一语义类别（如male, UK）及语义类别的合取（如male and UK, female and Ireland）。Liebig's score能够有效诊断匹配性能的瓶颈因素。
AI.conclusion: 说话人识别网络的表示空间存在层次聚类结构，而非仅独立聚类；HCCM算法可自动建立层次结构与语义的对应关系，为网络可解释性分析提供了新工具。

title: Tuna-2: Pixel Embeddings Beat Vision Encoders for Multimodal Understanding and Generation
summary: Unified multimodal models typically rely on pretrained vision encoders and use separate visual representations for understanding and generation, creating misalignment between the two tasks and preventing fully end-to-end optimization from raw pixels. We introduce Tuna-2, a native unified multimodal model that performs visual understanding and generation directly based on pixel embeddings. Tuna-2 drastically simplifies the model architecture by employing simple patch embedding layers to encode visual input, completely discarding the modular vision encoder designs such as the VAE or the representation encoder. Experiments show that Tuna-2 achieves state-of-the-art performance in multimodal benchmarks, demonstrating that unified pixel-space modelling can fully compete with latent-space approaches for high-quality image generation. Moreover, while the encoder-based variant converges faster in early pretraining, Tuna-2's encoder-free design achieves stronger multimodal understanding at scale, particularly on tasks requiring fine-grained visual perception. These results show that pretrained vision encoders are not necessary for multimodal modelling, and end-to-end pixel-space learning offers a scalable path toward stronger visual representations for both generation and perception.

AI.tldr: Tuna-2 提出了一种原生统一多模态模型，直接基于像素嵌入进行视觉理解和生成，完全抛弃了预训练视觉编码器（如VAE或表示编码器），取得了SOTA性能，证明端到端像素空间学习是可行的。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型依赖预训练视觉编码器，视觉理解和生成使用分离的表示，导致两者不对齐，且无法实现从原始像素到输出的完全端到端优化。
AI.method: 采用简单的patch嵌入层直接编码视觉输入，抛弃模块化视觉编码器（VAE/表示编码器），在像素嵌入空间统一进行理解和生成建模。
AI.result: 在多模态基准测试中达到SOTA性能，证明像素空间统一建模可与潜在空间方法竞争；无编码器设计在规模化后，尤其在细粒度视觉感知任务上，理解能力更强。
AI.conclusion: 预训练视觉编码器并非多模态建模的必要条件，端到端像素空间学习为视觉理解和生成提供了可扩展的更优路径。

title: An Empirical Evaluation of Locally Deployed LLMs for Bug Detection in Python Code
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on a wide range of software engineering tasks, including code generation and analysis. However, most prior work relies on cloud-based models or specialized hardware, limiting practical applicability in privacy-sensitive or resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical evaluation of two locally deployed LLMs, LLaMA 3.2 and Mistral, for real-world Python bug detection using the BugsInPy benchmark. We evaluate 349 bugs across 17 projects using a zero-shot prompting approach at the function level and an automated keyword-based evaluation framework. Our results show that locally executed models achieve accuracy between 43% and 45%, while producing a large proportion of partially correct responses that identify problematic code regions without pinpointing the exact fix. Performance varies significantly across projects, highlighting the importance of codebase characteristics. The results demonstrate that local models can identify a meaningful share of bugs, though precise localization remains difficult for locally executed LLMs, particularly when handling complex and context dependent bugs in realistic development scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了本地部署的LLaMA 3.2和Mistral模型在BugsInPy基准上检测真实Python bug的能力，零样本函数级检测准确率为43%-45%，大量部分正确响应能定位问题区域但无法精确定位修复点，性能在不同项目间差异显著。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在软件工程任务中依赖云端模型或专用硬件，限制了隐私敏感或资源受限场景下的实际应用，需要评估本地部署模型在真实bug检测中的可行性。
AI.method: 使用BugsInPy基准中的349个bug（覆盖17个项目），采用零样本函数级提示和自动化关键词评估框架，对LLaMA 3.2和Mistral两个本地部署模型进行实证评估。
AI.result: 本地模型准确率为43%-45%，大量响应为部分正确（识别问题区域但未精确指出修复点），性能在不同项目间波动明显。
AI.conclusion: 本地模型能识别相当比例的bug，但精确定位仍然困难，尤其在处理复杂上下文依赖的bug时表现不佳。

title: World-R1: Reinforcing 3D Constraints for Text-to-Video Generation
summary: Recent video foundation models demonstrate impressive visual synthesis but frequently suffer from geometric inconsistencies. While existing methods attempt to inject 3D priors via architectural modifications, they often incur high computational costs and limit scalability. We propose World-R1, a framework that aligns video generation with 3D constraints through reinforcement learning. To facilitate this alignment, we introduce a specialized pure text dataset tailored for world simulation. Utilizing Flow-GRPO, we optimize the model using feedback from pre-trained 3D foundation models and vision-language models to enforce structural coherence without altering the underlying architecture. We further employ a periodic decoupled training strategy to balance rigid geometric consistency with dynamic scene fluidity. Extensive evaluations reveal that our approach significantly enhances 3D consistency while preserving the original visual quality of the foundation model, effectively bridging the gap between video generation and scalable world simulation.

AI.tldr: World-R1 通过强化学习（Flow-GRPO）将3D约束对齐到视频生成模型中，无需修改架构即可提升几何一致性，同时保持视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频基础模型在视觉合成上表现出色，但常出现几何不一致问题。现有方法通过架构修改注入3D先验，但计算成本高且可扩展性差。本文旨在不修改架构的前提下，利用强化学习将3D约束对齐到视频生成中。
AI.method: 提出World-R1框架，使用Flow-GRPO优化模型，利用预训练的3D基础模型和视觉语言模型的反馈来强制执行结构一致性；引入专用纯文本来进行世界模拟对齐；采用周期性解耦训练策略平衡刚性几何一致性与动态场景流畅性。
AI.result: 显著提升3D几何一致性，同时保持基础模型的原始视觉质量，有效弥合视频生成与可扩展世界模拟之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: World-R1展示了在不修改架构的前提下，通过强化学习对齐3D约束是一种可行且可扩展的路径，为视频生成迈向世界模拟提供了新思路。

title: Nonlinear Non-Gaussian Density Steering with Input and Noise Channel Mismatch: Sinkhorn with Memory for Solving the Control-affine Schrödinger Bridge Problem
summary: Solutions to the Schrödinger bridge problem and its generalizations yield feedback control policies for optimal density steering over a controlled diffusion. To numerically compute the same, the dynamic Sinkhorn recursion has become a standard approach. The mathematical engine behind this approach is the Hopf-Cole transform that recasts the conditions for optimality into a system of boundary-coupled linear PDEs. Recent works pointed out that for the control-affine Schrödinger bridge problem, this exact linearity via Hopf-Cole transform, and thus the standard Sinkhorn recursion, apply only if the control and noise channels are proportional. When the channels do not match, the Hopf-Cole-transformed PDEs remain nonlinear, and no algorithm is available to solve the same.
