We advance the state-of-the-art by designing a Sinkhorn recursion with memory that leverages the structure of these nonlinear PDEs, and demonstrate how it solves the control-affine Schrödinger bridge problem with input and noise channel mismatch. We prove the local stability of the proposed algorithm.

AI.tldr: 本文针对控制仿射薛定谔桥问题中控制通道与噪声通道不匹配的情况，设计了一种带记忆的Sinkhorn递归算法，解决了传统Hopf-Cole变换失效后非线性PDE难以求解的问题，并证明了算法的局部稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有的Sinkhorn递归方法依赖于Hopf-Cole变换将最优性条件转化为线性PDE，但这要求控制通道与噪声通道成正比。当两者不匹配时，Hopf-Cole变换后的PDE仍是非线性的，尚无有效算法求解。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出了一种带记忆的Sinkhorn递归方法，利用了控制仿射薛定谔桥问题中非线性PDE的结构特性，通过记忆机制处理非线性耦合项，从而在控制与噪声通道不匹配的情况下仍能有效求解。
AI.result: 展示了该算法能够成功解决控制与噪声通道不匹配的控制仿射薛定谔桥问题，并证明了算法的局部稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作扩展了Sinkhorn递归的适用范围，为更一般的控制仿射薛定谔桥问题提供了可计算的算法解决方案。

title: A Taxonomy and Resolution Strategy for Client-Level Disagreements in Federated Learning
comment: 8 pages, 16 figures. Published in IEEE BigData 2025
summary: Federated Learning (FL) typically assumes unconditional collaboration, a premise that overlooks the complexities of real-world, multi-stakeholder environments in which clients may need to exclude one another for strategic, regulatory, or competitive reasons. This paper addresses this gap, which we term 'client-level disagreements,' by first introducing a taxonomy of such scenarios. We then propose a robust, multi-track resolution strategy that guarantees strict client exclusion by creating and managing isolated model update paths ('tracks'), thereby preventing the cross-contamination and unfairness issues present in naive strategies. Through an empirical evaluation of our custom simulation system across 34 scenarios using the MNIST and N-CMAPSS datasets, we validate that our approach correctly handles permanent, temporal, and overlapping disagreement patterns. Our scalability analysis reveals the server-side resolution algorithm's overhead is negligible (<1 ms per round) even under heavy load. The primary scalability constraint is the client-side training load from participating in multiple tracks, a cost that we show can be effectively mitigated by a submodel reuse strategy. This work presents a scalable and architecturally sound method for managing client-level disagreements, and enhances the practical applicability of FL in settings where policy compliance and strategic control are non-negotiable.

AI.tldr: 本文针对联邦学习中客户间分歧（如战略、监管或竞争原因）问题，提出一种多轨迹隔离策略，通过创建独立模型更新路径实现严格客户排除，避免交叉污染，并在34个场景中验证了其有效性，服务器端开销可忽略不计。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习假设无条件协作，忽视了现实多利益相关者环境中客户间可能存在战略、监管或竞争性排斥需求，本文旨在填补这一"客户级分歧"的空白。
AI.method: 提出多轨迹（Multi-Track）分辨率策略：为不同客户群创建隔离的模型更新路径，实现严格客户排除；并设计子模型重用策略以缓解客户端多轨迹训练负载。
AI.result: 在34个场景（MNIST和N-CMAPSS数据集）中验证方法能正确处理永久、临时和重叠分歧模式；服务器端开销<1ms/轮，客户端负载可通过子模型重用有效缓解。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一种可扩展且架构稳健的方法来管理联邦学习中的客户级分歧，增强了FL在政策合规和战略控制不可妥协场景中的实用适用性。

title: Generalizable CT-Free PET Attenuation and Scatter Correction for Pediatric Patients
comment: 13 pages, 15 figures, 7 tables. Source code available at https://github.com/wujm7/GPCN-PET
summary: Computed tomography (CT)-based attenuation and scatter correction improves quantitative PET but adds radiation exposure that is particularly undesirable in pediatric imaging. Existing CT-free methods are commonly trained in homogeneous settings and often degrade under scanner or radiotracer shifts, which limits their clinical utility. We propose the Generalizable PET Correction Network (GPCN), a dual-domain network for domain-robust CT-free PET attenuation and scatter correction. GPCN combines a multi-band contextual refinement module, which models pediatric anatomical variability through wavelet-based multiscale decomposition and long-range spatial context modeling, with a frequency-aware spectral decoupling module, which performs coordinate-conditioned amplitude/phase refinement in the Fourier domain. By synergizing multi-band spatial contextual modeling with asymmetric frequency-spectrum decoupling, the network explicitly separates invariant topological structures from domain-specific noise, thereby achieving precise quantitative recovery of both anatomical organs and focal lesions. This design aims to separate anatomy-dominant structures from domain-sensitive spectral residuals and to improve robustness across heterogeneous imaging conditions. We train and evaluate the method on 1085 pediatric whole-body PET scans acquired with two scanners and five radiotracers. In both joint training and zero-shot cross-domain evaluation, GPCN outperforms representative baselines and maintains stable quantitative accuracy on unseen scanner-tracer combinations. The method is further supported by ablation, region-wise quantitative analysis, and downstream segmentation experiments. In our cohort, the CT component of the conventional protocol corresponded to an average effective dose of 10.8 mSv, indicating the potential clinical value of reliable CT-free correction for pediatric PET.

AI.tldr: 提出GPCN双域网络，通过多频带上下文建模和频率感知频谱解耦实现CT-free PET衰减与散射校正，在儿科全身PET上超越基线方法，零样本泛化到未见过的扫描仪-示踪剂组合，可避免10.8 mSv的CT辐射剂量。
AI.motivation: CT衰减校正虽提升PET定量精度但带来额外辐射暴露，尤其不利于儿科影像。现有CT-free方法在扫描仪或示踪剂变化时性能下降，缺乏跨域鲁棒性，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 提出GPCN双域网络，包含两个核心模块：(1) 多频带上下文精炼模块，用小波多尺度分解和长程空间上下文建模处理儿科解剖变异；(2) 频率感知频谱解耦模块，在傅里叶域进行坐标条件的振幅/相位精炼，分离不变拓扑结构与域特定噪声。
AI.result: 在1085例儿科全身PET（2种扫描仪、5种示踪剂）上，联合训练和零样本跨域评估均优于代表性基线，对未见过的扫描仪-示踪剂组合保持稳定定量精度，消融实验和下游分割实验进一步验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: GPCN通过多频带空间建模与非对称频域解耦的协同设计，实现了对解剖结构与域特定噪声的显式分离，为儿科PET提供了一种可靠、无辐射的CT-free校正方案，具有显著临床价值。

title: From Stateless Queries to Autonomous Actions: A Layered Security Framework for Agentic AI Systems
summary: Agentic AI systems face security challenges that stateless large language models do not. They plan across extended horizons, maintain persistent memory, invoke external tools, and coordinate with peer agents. Existing security analyses organize threats by attack type (prompt injection, jailbreaking), but provide no principled model of which architectural component is vulnerable or over what timescale the threat manifests. This paper makes five contributions. First, we introduce the Layered Attack Surface Model (LASM), a seven-layer framework that maps threats to distinct architectural components: Foundation, Cognitive, Memory, Tool Execution, Multi-Agent Coordination, Ecosystem, and Governance, the accountability and observability layer that spans the stack analogously to the network management plane. Second, we introduce attack temporality as an orthogonal analytical dimension with four classes: Instantaneous (T1), Session-Persistent (T2), Cross-Session Cumulative (T3), and Sub-Session-Stack, Non-Session-Bounded (T4). Third, through a systematic review of 94 papers (2021--2025), we show that the most dangerous emerging threats concentrate at the intersection of high-layer attacks (L5--L7) and slow-burn temporality (T3--T4): covert agent collusion, long-term memory poisoning, MCP supply-chain compromise, and alignment failure that manifests as an insider threat with no external adversary. Only 8 of 120 paper-cell assignments (7%) fall in this zone. Fourth, we propose a cross-layer defense taxonomy spanning all seven LASM layers and all four temporality classes, exposing which threat classes existing defenses leave unaddressed. Fifth, we survey evaluation benchmarks, identify five research gaps in the under-studied high-layer, slow-burn zone, and argue that agentic security must be treated as a distributed systems problem embedded in an adversarial ecosystem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分层攻击面模型（LASM）和攻击时间性维度，系统分析了94篇论文（2021-2025），发现最危险的威胁集中在高层攻击（L5-L7）与慢速时间性（T3-T4）的交汇处，并指出仅有7%的研究涵盖这一区域。
AI.motivation: 现有安全分析按攻击类型（提示注入、越狱）组织威胁，但缺乏对哪些架构组件易受攻击以及威胁在何种时间尺度上显现的原则性模型。
AI.method: 提出七层LASM框架（基础层、认知层、记忆层、工具执行层、多智能体协调层、生态系统层、治理层）和四类攻击时间性（瞬时T1、会话持续T2、跨会话累积T3、非会话绑定T4），对94篇论文进行系统综述。
AI.result: 仅有7%的研究（120个论文-单元分配中的8个）覆盖高层攻击与慢速时间性的危险交汇区；发现隐蔽智能体合谋、长期记忆投毒、MCP供应链攻击、对齐失败内鬼威胁等关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 智能体安全必须被视为嵌入对抗性生态系统中的分布式系统问题，现有防御在该危险区域存在重大空白。

title: Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network for Hepatobiliary Phase Liver MRI Synthesis
summary: Gadoxetate disodium-enhanced MRI is essential for the detection and characterization of hepatocellular carcinoma. However, acquisition of the hepatobiliary phase (HBP) requires a prolonged post-contrast delay, which reduces workflow efficiency and increases the risk of motion artifacts. In this study, we propose a Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network (TriPF-Net) to synthesize HBP images by leveraging the sequential information from pre-HBP sequences: while T1-weighted imaging serves as the indispensable baseline, the model adaptively integrates arterial-phase (AP) and venous-phase (VP) features when available. By modeling the tissue-specific contrast uptake and excretion dynamics across these three phases, TriPF-Net ensures robust HBP synthesis even under the stochastic absence of one or both dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences. The framework comprises an Enhanced Region-Guided Encoder and a Dynamic Feature Unification Module, optimized with a Region-Guided Sequential Fusion Loss to maintain physiological consistency. In addition, clinical variables, including age, sex, total bilirubin, and albumin, are incorporated to enhance physiological consistency. Compared with conventional methods, TriPF-Net achieved superior performance on datasets from two centers. On the internal dataset, the model achieved an MAE of 10.65, a PSNR of 23.27, and an SSIM of 0.76. On the external validation dataset, the corresponding values were 12.41, 23.11, and 0.78, respectively. This flexible solution enhances clinical workflow and lesion depiction, potentially eliminating the need for delayed HBP acquisition in HCC imaging.

AI.tldr: 提出TriPF-Net，利用动脉期和静脉期的时序信息合成肝脏MRI的肝胆期图像，即使在部分序列缺失时也能稳健生成，避免长时间延迟扫描。
AI.motivation: 肝胆期（HBP）MRI采集需要长时间延迟，影响工作效率且增加运动伪影风险，因此希望利用已有的动脉期和静脉期图像合成HBP，避免额外扫描。
AI.method: 提出三阶段时序融合网络（TriPF-Net），包含增强区域引导编码器、动态特征统一模块和区域引导时序融合损失，可自适应整合T1、动脉期和静脉期特征；同时引入临床变量（年龄、性别、胆红素、白蛋白）增强生理一致性。
AI.result: 内部数据集MAE 10.65、PSNR 23.27、SSIM 0.76；外部验证集MAE 12.41、PSNR 23.11、SSIM 0.78，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可灵活增强临床工作流和病灶显示，可能消除HCC成像中延迟获取HBP的必要。

title: GeoFunFlow-3D: A Physics-Guided Generative Flow Matching Framework for High-Fidelity 3D Aerodynamic Inference over Complex Geometries
summary: Deep generative models and neural operators have demonstrated significant potential for 3D aerodynamic inference. However, they often face inherent challenges in maintaining physical consistency and preserving high-frequency features, primarily due to spectral bias and gradient conflicts within the governing equations. To address these issues, we propose GeoFunFlow-3D, a physics-guided generative flow matching framework. Temporally, we utilize optimal transport theory to build the generation path, ensuring stable training dynamics. Spectrally, we introduce a high-order discrete engine without automatic differentiation (No-AD) to reduce gradient stiffness. Spatially, a topology-aware super-resolution module (SATO) is employed to rigorously enforce physical laws in localized regions such as shock waves. We evaluated our framework on complex industrial datasets. On the BlendedNet dataset, the model successfully avoids mode collapse even under sparse data conditions. For the NASA Rotor37 test, it accurately captures 3D detached shock structures. Compared to conventional operators, GeoFunFlow-3D significantly improves accuracy, reducing the pressure field error (RRMSE) to 0.0215 while maintaining competitive inference efficiency. Ultimately, this work provides a reliable, geometry-driven approach for generating high-dimensional fluid fields.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoFunFlow-3D，一个物理引导的生成流匹配框架，用于3D气动推理，通过最优传输理论、无自动微分的高阶离散引擎和拓扑感知超分辨率模块解决物理一致性和高频特征保持问题，在工业数据集上取得了显著效果。
AI.motivation: 现有深度生成模型和神经算子在3D气动推理中面临两大挑战：物理一致性难以维持（频域偏差和方程梯度冲突）以及高频特征（如激波）的保持困难。
AI.method: 提出GeoFunFlow-3D框架，包含三个关键设计：(1) 时间上利用最优传输理论构建生成路径，确保训练稳定性；(2) 频谱上引入无自动微分的高阶离散引擎，减少梯度刚性问题；(3) 空间上采用拓扑感知超分辨率模块，严格施加局部区域（如激波）的物理定律。
AI.result: 在BlendedNet数据集上避免了模式坍塌；在NASA Rotor37测试中准确捕捉3D激波结构；压力场误差(RRMSE)降至0.0215，推理效率具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为生成高维流场提供了一种可靠、几何驱动的方案，在保持推理效率的同时显著提升了准确性。

title: UniAda: Universal Adaptive Multi-objective Adversarial Attack for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Systems
comment: Published at IEEE Transactions on Reliability journal (2023)
summary: Adversarial attacks play a pivotal role in testing and improving the reliability of deep learning (DL) systems. Existing literature has demonstrated that subtle perturbations to the input can elicit erroneous outcomes, thereby substantially compromising the security of DL systems. This has emerged as a critical concern in the development of DL-based safety-critical systems like Autonomous Driving Systems (ADSs). The focus of existing adversarial attack methods on End-to-End (E2E) ADSs has predominantly centered on misbehaviors of steering angle, which overlooks speed-related controls or imperceptible perturbations. To address these challenges, we introduce UniAda, a multi-objective white-box attack technique with a core function that revolves around crafting an image-agnostic adversarial perturbation capable of simultaneously influencing both steering and speed controls. UniAda capitalizes on an intricately designed multi-objective optimization function with the Adaptive Weighting Scheme (AWS), enabling the concurrent optimization of diverse objectives. Validated with both simulated and real-world driving data, UniAda outperforms five benchmarks across two metrics, inducing steering and speed deviations from 3.54 degrees to 29 degrees and 11 km per hour to 22 km per hour on average. This systematic approach establishes UniAda as a proven technique for adversarial attacks on modern DL-based E2E ADSs.

AI.tldr: 提出UniAda，一种多目标白盒对抗攻击方法，通过设计图像无关的对抗扰动同时影响自动驾驶系统的转向和速度控制，采用自适应加权方案优化多目标函数，在仿真和真实数据上优于五种基准方法。
AI.motivation: 现有针对端到端自动驾驶系统的对抗攻击主要集中于误导转向角，忽略了速度控制相关的攻击，且扰动通常不够隐蔽。本文旨在设计一种能同时影响转向和速度控制的图像无关对抗扰动。
AI.method: 提出UniAda，核心是设计多目标优化函数配合自适应加权方案(AWS)，生成图像无关的对抗扰动，可同时干扰转向和速度控制，属于白盒攻击方法。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实驾驶数据上，UniAda在两项指标上优于五种基准方法，可诱导转向偏差3.54°~29°，速度偏差11km/h~22km/h。
AI.conclusion: UniAda被证明是一种有效的针对现代基于深度学习的端到端自动驾驶系统的对抗攻击技术。

title: Breaking Lock-In: Preserving Steerability under Low-Data VLA Post-Training
summary: Have you ever post-trained a generalist vision-language-action (VLA) policy on a small demonstration dataset, only to find that it stops responding to new instructions and is limited to behaviors observed during post-training? We identify this phenomenon as lock-in: after low-data, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), the policy becomes overly specialized to the post-training data and fails to generalize to novel instructions, manifesting as concept lock-in (fixation on training objects/attributes) and spatial lock-in (fixation on training spatial targets). Many existing remedies introduce additional supervision signals, such as those derived from foundation models or auxiliary objectives, or rely on augmented datasets to recover generalization. In this paper, we show that the policy's internal pre-trained knowledge is sufficient: DeLock mitigates lock-in by preserving visual grounding during post-training and applying test-time contrastive prompt guidance to steer the policy's denoising dynamics according to novel instructions. Across eight simulation and real-world evaluations, DeLock consistently outperforms strong baselines and matches or exceeds the performance of a state-of-the-art generalist policy post-trained with substantially more curated demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeLock方法，解决视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在低数据后训练中出现的"锁定"问题（即策略过度专精于微调数据，无法泛化到新指令）。DeLock通过保留预训练视觉定位能力并引入测试时对比提示引导，无需额外监督信号即可恢复泛化能力，在8个仿真和真实环境评估中超越强基线，达到甚至超越使用更多演示数据训练的通用策略性能。
AI.motivation: 作者观察到通用VLA策略在少量演示数据集上进行监督微调（SFT）后，会出现"锁定"现象——策略过度专精于后训练数据，无法响应新指令，表现为概念锁定和空间锁定。现有方法依赖额外监督信号或增强数据集，作者希望仅利用策略内部预训练知识来解决该问题。
AI.method: DeLock方法包含两部分：(1) 在后训练过程中保留视觉定位能力；(2) 在测试时采用对比提示引导（contrastive prompt guidance），根据新指令引导策略的去噪动力学过程，从而在不依赖额外数据或监督的情况下恢复泛化能力。
AI.result: 在8个仿真和真实环境评估中，DeLock一致优于强基线方法，且匹配或超越了使用更多精选演示数据进行后训练的SOTA通用策略性能。
AI.conclusion: 策略内部的预训练知识足以缓解后训练中的锁定问题，DeLock通过保留视觉定位和测试时对比提示引导，实现了高效且无需额外数据的数据高效后训练。

title: Physics-Informed Temporal U-Net for High-Fidelity Fluid Interpolation
summary: Reconstructing high-fidelity fluid dynamics from sparse temporal observations is quite challenging, mainly due to the chaotic and non-linear nature of fluid transport. Standard deep learning-based interpolation methods often tend to regress to the mean, which results in spatial blurring and temporal strobing, especially noticeable around the observed anchor frames where transitions become discontinuous. In this work, we propose a novel Temporal U-Net architecture that integrates a VGG-based perceptual loss along with a Physics-Informed Bridge to overcome these issues. By introducing time-weighted feature blending and enforcing a parabolic boundary condition defined by t(1 - t), the model ensures smooth transitions while also maintaining perfect consistency at the endpoints. Experimental results on multi-channel RGB fluid data show that our method clearly outperforms standard models, both in terms of structural fidelity and texture preservation. In particular, the model achieves a Mean Absolute Error of 0.015, compared to 0.085 for a standard L1 baseline. Further Spatial Power Spectral Density (PSD) analysis reveals that the model is able to retain high-frequency turbulent details that are usually lost in deterministic reconstructions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种时间U-Net架构，结合VGG感知损失和物理信息桥（抛物线边界条件t(1-t)），用于从稀疏时间观测中重建高保真流体动力学，有效消除了时空模糊和间断问题。
AI.motivation: 标准深度学习插值方法在稀疏时间观测下会回归到均值，导致空间模糊和时间闪烁，尤其在锚定帧附近过渡不连续。需要一种能保持高保真结构和湍流细节的重建方法。
AI.method: 1) 时间U-Net架构；2) VGG感知损失；3) 物理信息桥（Physics-Informed Bridge），施加抛物线边界条件 t(1-t) 确保平滑过渡；4) 时间加权特征融合，保持端点一致性。
AI.result: 在多通道RGB流体数据上，MAE为0.015（标准L1基线为0.085）；空间功率谱密度（PSD）分析表明能保留高频湍流细节，在结构保真度和纹理保持上显著优于标准模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了稀疏时间观测下流体动力学重建中的模糊和过渡不连续问题，能够保留高保真结构和高频湍流细节。

title: A satellite foundation model for improved wealth monitoring
summary: Poverty statistics guide social policy, but in many low- and middle-income countries, censuses and household surveys that collect these data are costly, infrequent, quickly outdated, and sometimes error-prone. Satellite imagery offers global coverage and the possibility of predicting economic livelihoods at scale, yet existing approaches to predicting livelihoods with imagery or other non-traditional data often fail to reliably identify local-level variation and, as we show, degrade under temporal shift. Here we introduce Tempov, a satellite foundation model pretrained by self-supervision on three million bi-temporal Landsat pairs and adapted with parameter-efficient fine-tuning to sparse survey labels. The model enables large-scale, high-resolution wealth mapping and dynamic measurement, including zero-shot nowcasting up to a decade after observed labels, retrospective hindcasting, and decadal change tracking, while outperforming existing neural network and geospatial foundation-model baselines. In low-label regimes, Tempov achieves competitive accuracy with only 10% of survey samples, indicating substantially reduced dependence on expensive label collection. The model further generalizes across populous countries within and outside Africa, and scales to a unified Africa-wide model with strong continent-level performance ($R^2=0.63$, $r^2=0.68$), from which we generate high-resolution decadal maps of wealth and wealth changes for the African continent. Analysis of these maps shows large variation in recent economic performance both within and across countries. Our open-source approach provides a pathway to timely, scalable, low-cost monitoring of wealth and poverty from routinely collected satellite data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tempov，一个基于自监督学习在300万对Landsat卫星图像上预训练的卫星基础模型，通过参数高效微调适应稀疏调查标签，实现大规模高分辨率财富制图和动态测量，包括零样本预测、回顾性反推和十年变化追踪，在非洲大陆达到R²=0.63的强性能。
AI.motivation: 传统贫困统计依赖昂贵、低频、易过时的人口普查和家庭调查，而现有卫星图像方法无法可靠识别局部变化且随时间退化。作者希望利用卫星图像构建可扩展、低成本、高分辨率的财富动态监测方案。
AI.method: 采用自监督预训练框架，在300万对Landsat双时相图像上训练基础模型，然后通过参数高效微调（PEFT）适配稀疏的实地调查标签，实现从卫星数据到财富指标的映射。
AI.result: Tempov在非洲大陆达到R²=0.63、r²=0.68的强性能；仅需10%调查样本即可达到竞争精度；能零样本预测长达十年后的财富状况；能追踪十年间财富变化；跨国家泛化能力强。
AI.conclusion: 自监督卫星基础模型结合参数高效微调，为从日常获取的卫星数据中实现及时、可扩展、低成本的财富与贫困监测提供了可行路径。

title: A Milestone in Formalization: The Sphere Packing Problem in Dimension 8
summary: In 2016, Viazovska famously solved the sphere packing problem in dimension $8$, using modular forms to construct a 'magic' function satisfying optimality conditions determined by Cohn and Elkies in 2003. In March 2024, Hariharan and Viazovska launched a project to formalize this solution and related mathematical facts in the Lean Theorem Prover. A significant milestone was achieved in February 2026: the result was formally verified, with the final stages of the verification done by Math, Inc.'s autoformalization model 'Gauss'. We discuss the techniques used to achieve this milestone, reflect on the unique collaboration between humans and Gauss, and discuss project objectives that remain.

AI.tldr: 本文记录了2024-2026年间使用Lean定理证明器和Math公司自动形式化模型Gauss对Viazovska在8维球堆积问题的证明进行形式化验证的过程，重点讨论人机协作的技术和方法。
AI.motivation: 将Viazovska的8维球堆积问题证明（2016年菲尔兹奖级工作）进行形式化验证，确保其数学严谨性，并探索自动形式化工具在复杂数学证明中的应用。
AI.method: Hariharan和Viazovska团队在Lean定理证明器中启动形式化项目，最终由Math公司的自动形式化模型Gauss完成最后阶段的形式化验证，形成人类数学家与AI助手的新型协作模式。
AI.result: 2026年2月，Viazovska的8维球堆积证明在Lean中成功形式化验证，这是复杂现代数学证明被自动形式化工具辅助验证的重要里程碑。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了自动形式化模型（如Gauss）在辅助完成高难度数学证明形式化方面的潜力，开辟了人类数学家与AI协作的新范式，但仍存在未完成的项目目标。

title: GS-DOT: Gaussian splatting-based image reconstruction for diffuse optical tomography
summary: This work presents GS-DOT, a novel image reconstruction framework based on Gaussian Splatting (GS) for diffuse optical tomography (DOT). Inspired by GS for rendering applications, absorption coefficients are represented as a sparse sum of anisotropic Gaussian primitives optimized to fit measured time-resolved point-spread functions through analytic gradients and Adam optimization. This is the first adaptation of GS algorithms in the photon diffusion regime, where the ray transport function is replaced by the diffusion functions to enable accurate modeling of light transport in highly scattering media. Validation on synthetic tissue models demonstrate high accuracy in localization and quantification of reconstructed absorption maps for both clean and noisy signals. GS-DOT has demonstrated high robustness to noise and showed a huge reduction in memory demand.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GS-DOT，首次将高斯溅射(GS)框架应用于扩散光学层析成像(DOT)，通过各向异性高斯原语的稀疏和表示吸收系数，利用解析梯度和Adam优化拟合时间分辨点扩散函数，在合成组织模型上实现了高精度的吸收图定位与量化，并对噪声表现出高鲁棒性和极低内存需求。
AI.motivation: 将三维视觉中成功的高斯溅射表征方法迁移到扩散光学层析成像领域，解决传统DOT在光子扩散机制下模型不够准确、计算成本高的问题。
AI.method: 将吸收系数表示为各向异性高斯原语的稀疏和；将射线传输函数替换为扩散函数以适应光子扩散机制；通过解析梯度和Adam优化拟合时间分辨点扩散函数来优化高斯原语参数。
AI.result: 在合成组织模型上，对干净和含噪信号均实现了高精度的吸收图定位与量化；对噪声具有高鲁棒性；内存需求大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: GS-DOT成功将高斯溅射思想扩展到扩散光学层析成像领域，为DOT提供了一种高效、鲁棒的新范式。

title: On (not) learning the Möbius function
summary: We prove lower bounds on learning the Möbius or Liouville function with a variety of standard learning techniques, including kernel methods, noisy gradient methods, and correlational statistical query algorithms. These results follow from quantitative bounds on the correlation of Möbius with digital characters of various finite abelian groups, where the group is dictated by the type of input data the algorithm is given. Using residues mod $p$ for many different primes corresponds to a cyclic group, and using the base $p$ expansion for a fixed prime corresponds to an elementary abelian $p$-group. We also note that lower bounds of this form are closely related to certain types of digital prime number theorems.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在Möbius/Liouville函数的学习任务上，核方法、噪声梯度方法和相关性统计查询算法都存在信息论下界，这些下界源于Möbius函数与数字字符之间的低相关性。
AI.motivation: 探索标准机器学习方法（核方法、梯度方法等）在学习数论函数（Möbius函数）时的固有局限性，建立理论基础上的下界。
AI.method: 通过量化Möbius函数与有限阿贝尔群上数字字符的相关性，推导出不同学习算法（核方法、噪声梯度、统计查询）的下界。
AI.result: 证明了Möbius函数与不同群结构（循环群、初等阿贝尔p-群）上的数字字符具有低相关性，从而得出多种标准学习算法的信息论下界。
AI.conclusion: 标准的基于核方法、梯度方法和统计查询的算法在Möbius函数学习任务上存在根本性的性能瓶颈。

title: Personalizing Causal Audio-Driven Facial Motion via Dynamic Multi-modal Retrieval
summary: Audio-driven facial animation is essential for immersive digital interaction, yet existing frameworks fail to reconcile real-time streaming with high-fidelity personalization. Current methods often rely on latency-inducing audio look-ahead, or require high user compliance to pre-encode static embeddings that fails to capture dynamic idiosyncrasies. We present an end-to-end causal framework for personalizing causal facial motion generation via dynamic multi-modal style retrieval, enabling ultra-low latency while uniquely leveraging unstructured style references. We introduce two key innovations: (1) a temporal hierarchical motion representation that captures global temporal context and high-frequency details while maintaining decoding causality, and (2) a multi-modal style retriever that jointly queries audio and motion to dynamically extract stylistic priors without breaking causality. This mechanism allows for scalable personalization with total flexibility regarding the number and contents of templates. By integrating these components into a causal autoregressive architecture, our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in lip-sync accuracy, identity consistency, and perceived realism, supported by extensive quantitative evaluations and user studies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种端到端的因果式音频驱动面部动画生成框架，通过动态多模态风格检索实现超低延迟的个性化面部运动生成，无需音频前瞻或预编码静态嵌入。
AI.motivation: 现有音频驱动面部动画方法在实时流式传输与高保真个性化之间存在矛盾——要么依赖高延迟的音频前瞻，要么需要用户配合预编码静态嵌入（无法捕捉动态特质）。
AI.method: (1) 时间层级运动表示：捕获全局时间上下文和高频细节，同时保持解码因果性；(2) 多模态风格检索器：联合查询音频和运动，动态提取风格先验而不破坏因果性；集成到因果自回归架构中。
AI.result: 在唇形同步精度、身份一致性和感知真实感上显著优于现有方法，经过广泛定量评估和用户研究验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的因果框架成功弥合了实时流式与个性化之间的鸿沟，且对模板数量和内容具有完全的灵活性，为音频驱动面部动画的实时个性化应用提供了可行方案。

title: Inference of Online Newton Methods with Nesterov's Accelerated Sketching
summary: Reliable decision-making with streaming data requires principled uncertainty quantification of online methods. While first-order methods enable efficient iterate updates, their inference procedures still require updating proper (covariance) matrices, incurring $O(d^2)$ time and memory complexity, and are sensitive to ill-conditioning and noise heterogeneity of the problem. This costly inference task offers an opportunity for more robust second-order methods, which are, however, bottlenecked by solving Newton systems with $O(d^3)$ complexity. In this paper, we address this gap by studying an online Newton method with Hessian averaging, where the Newton direction at each step is approximately computed using a sketch-and-project solver with Nesterov's acceleration, matching $O(d^2)$ complexity of first-order methods. For the proposed method, we quantify its uncertainty arising from both random data and randomized computation. Under standard smoothness and moment conditions, we establish global almost-sure convergence, prove asymptotic normality of the last iterate with a limiting covariance characterized by a Lyapunov equation, and develop a fully online covariance estimator with non-asymptotic convergence guarantees. We also connect the resulting uncertainty quantification to that of exact and sketched Newton methods without Nesterov's acceleration. Extensive experiments on regression models demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method for online inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Hessian平均的在线牛顿方法，利用sketch-and-project求解器配合Nesterov加速来近似计算牛顿方向，达到O(d²)复杂度，并建立了渐近正态性和在线协方差估计的理论保证。
AI.motivation: 流式数据的在线决策需要可靠的不确定性量化，但现有方法存在两方面瓶颈：一阶方法推理时需更新协方差矩阵(O(d²))且对病态问题和噪声异质性敏感；二阶方法又受限于求解牛顿系统的O(d³)复杂度。本文旨在弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出在线牛顿方法，使用Hessian平均，通过sketch-and-project求解器结合Nesterov加速近似计算牛顿方向，达到O(d²)复杂度。建立了全局几乎必然收敛性、最后迭代的渐近正态性（极限协方差由Lyapunov方程刻画），并设计了具有非渐近收敛保证的在线协方差估计器。
AI.result: 所提方法在匹配一阶方法O(d²)复杂度的同时，实现了二阶方法的鲁棒性；在回归模型上的大量实验证明了该方法在在线推理中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过随机化计算与Hessian平均技术，成功在保持二阶方法优点的同时将复杂度降至一阶方法水平，为在线推理提供了理论完备且实用的不确定性量化方案。

title: Uncertainty Propagation in LLM-Based Systems
summary: Uncertainty in large language model (LLM)-based systems is often studied at the level of a single model output, yet deployed LLM applications are compound systems in which uncertainty is transformed and reused across model internals, workflow stages, component boundaries, persistent state, and human or organisational processes. Without principled treatment of how uncertainty is carried and reused across these boundaries, early errors can propagate and compound in ways that are difficult to detect and govern. This paper develops a systems-level account of uncertainty propagation. It introduces a conceptual framing for characterising propagated uncertainty signals, presents a structured taxonomy spanning intra-model (P1), system-level (P2), and socio-technical (P3) propagation mechanisms, synthesises cross-cutting engineering insights, and identifies five open research challenges.

AI.tldr: 本文从系统层面研究LLM中不确定性的传播机制，提出了跨模型内部、系统层面和社会技术层面的传播分类法，并识别了五大开放挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单一模型输出的不确定性，但实际部署的LLM系统是复合系统，不确定性会在各组件间传播和累积，导致早期错误难以检测和治理。需要系统级的理论框架来理解不确定性传播。
AI.method: 提出了不确定性传播的概念框架，构建了包含三类传播机制（P1: 模型内部机制、P2: 系统层面机制、P3: 社会技术机制）的结构化分类法，并综合了工程实践中的跨领域见解。
AI.result: 形成了系统级的不确定性传播理论框架，分类梳理了三种传播路径，提炼了工程实践经验，并明确了五个待解决的研究挑战。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性在复合LLM系统中的传播是一个关键但尚未充分研究的问题，需要系统性方法进行检测和治理，以提升LLM系统的可信赖性。

title: Scalable and Verifiable Federated Learning for Cross-Institution Financial Fraud Detection
summary:
The global financial ecosystem confronts a critical asymmetry: while fraud syndicates operate as borderless, distributed networks, banking institutions remain constrained by regulatory data silos, limiting visibility into cross-institutional threat patterns under strict privacy laws such as GDPR. Although Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative training, existing protocols impose a trade-off among scalability, privacy, and integrity. Homomorphic encryption schemes are computationally expensive, while pairwise masking protocols require O(N^2) key exchanges and lack mechanisms to detect malformed updates. Existing defenses also remain vulnerable to gradient inversion attacks that can reconstruct sensitive transaction data.
  To address these limitations, we propose Dynamic Sharded Federated Learning (DSFL), a verifiable secure aggregation framework for cross-institution financial fraud detection. DSFL replaces mesh topologies with Dynamic Stochastic Sharding, reducing communication complexity from O(N^2) to O(N m), where m is a fixed shard size, achieving linear scalability. To mitigate insider threats, we introduce Linear Integrity Tags, an additive-homomorphic commitment mechanism that enables probabilistic verification of submitted updates without the overhead of zero-knowledge proofs, while not enforcing semantic correctness. Additionally, the Active Neighborhood Recovery protocol ensures robust aggregation under participant dropouts. Empirical evaluation on the Credit Card Fraud Detection Dataset (ULB) demonstrates an approximately 33x latency reduction compared to Paillier-based secure aggregation, while maintaining strong resilience under simulated failures. These results position DSFL as a practical foundation for scalable and privacy-preserving collaborative fraud detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态分片联邦学习（DSFL），通过随机分片降低通信复杂度、线性完整性标签实现可验证安全聚合、以及主动邻居恢复协议处理节点掉线，在信用卡欺诈检测任务上相比Paillier方案实现约33倍延迟降低。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习在跨机构金融欺诈检测中面临可扩展性、隐私性和完整性三者不可兼得的困境：同态加密计算开销大，成对掩码协议需要O(N²)密钥交换且缺乏恶意更新检测能力，且现有防御难以抵御梯度逆向攻击泄露敏感交易数据。
AI.method: 1) 动态随机分片（Dynamic Stochastic Sharding）：将通信复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N·m)；2) 线性完整性标签（Linear Integrity Tags）：基于加法同态承诺机制的轻量级可验证聚合；3) 主动邻居恢复协议（Active Neighborhood Recovery）：处理参与者掉线的鲁棒聚合机制。
AI.result: 在ULB信用卡欺诈检测数据集上，相比Paillier同态加密方案实现约33倍延迟降低，并在模拟节点故障下保持强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DSFL为可扩展且隐私保护的跨机构协作欺诈检测提供了实用基础，在可扩展性、隐私性与完整性之间取得了更好的权衡。

title: Grammar-Constrained Refinement of Safety Operational Rules Using Language in the Loop: What Could Go Wrong
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Accepted at SEAMS 2026
summary: Safety specifications in cyber-physical systems (CPS) capture the operational conditions the system must satisfy to operate safely within its intended environment. As operating environments evolve, operational rules must be continuously refined to preserve consistency with observed system behavior during simulation-based verification and validation. Revising inconsistent rules is challenging because the changes must remain syntactically correct under a domain-specific grammar. Language-in-the-loop refinement further raises safety concerns beyond syntactic violations, as it can produce semantically unjustified refinements that overfit to the observed outcomes. We introduce a framework that combines counterfactual reasoning with a grammar-constrained refinement loop to refine operational rules, aligning them with the observed system behavior. Applied to an autonomous driving control system, our approach successfully resolved the inconsistencies in an operational rule inferred by a conventional baseline while remaining grammar compliant. An empirical large language model (LLM) study further revealed model-dependent refinement quality and safety lessons, which motivate rigorous grammar enforcement, stronger semantic validation, and broader evaluation in future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结合反事实推理和语法约束的框架，用于在仿真验证中自动修正不一致的操作规则，并在自动驾驶控制系统中验证了有效性，同时通过LLM实验揭示了模型依赖性和安全问题。
AI.motivation: 信息物理系统的操作规则需要随环境演变而持续修正，但手工修正效率低且易出错，现有的规则细化方法可能产生语法违规或语义上过拟合的不可靠修正。
AI.method: 提出一个结合反事实推理与语法约束的细化循环框架，在语法合规的前提下自动修正不一致的操作规则。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶控制系统中成功解决了基线方法推断的操作规则的不一致问题，保持了语法合规；LLM实验揭示了不同模型在细化质量上的差异及安全隐患。
AI.conclusion: 强调未来工作需要严格的语法执行、更强的语义验证以及更广泛的评估，以确保规则细化的安全性。

title: Shared-kernel Wavelet Neural Networks for Poisson Image Reconstruction
summary: The Laplacian operator transforms the image into its Laplacian field, which usually is sparse and satisfies a stable distribution. On the other hand, an image can be uniquely reconstructed from its Laplacian field via solving a Poisson equation with a proper boundary condition. Such uniqueness is mathematically guaranteed. Thanks to these properties, we propose to use the sparse Laplacian field to present the image. We first show that the Laplacian field is sparse and satisfies a stable distribution on hundreds images. Then, we show that the image can be accurately reconstruct from its Laplacian field. For the reconstruction task, we propose a shared-kernel wavelet neural network, which solves the Poisson equation and has three advantages. First, it has less than {\bf 0.0002M} parameters, which is compact enough for most of devices. Second, it has linear computation complexity, leading to a real-time reconstruction. Third, it achieves higher accuracy than previous methods. Several numerical experiments are conducted to show the effectiveness and efficiency of the sparse Laplacian field and the proposed Poisson solver. The proposed method can be applied in a large range of applications such as image compression, low light enhancement, object tracking, etc.

AI.tldr: 提出利用稀疏拉普拉斯场表示图像，并通过共享核小波神经网络求解泊松方程实现高效精确的图像重建，模型参数不到0.0002M且计算复杂度为线性。
AI.motivation: 拉普拉斯算子将图像转换为稀疏且满足稳定分布的拉普拉斯场，且图像可通过求解泊松方程唯一重建，利用这些性质可以更高效地表示和重建图像。
AI.method: 提出共享核小波神经网络（SKWNN）来求解泊松方程，具有极少的参数（<0.0002M）、线性计算复杂度，实现实时高精度图像重建。
AI.result: 该模型参数极少、计算复杂度线性、重建精度优于以往方法，在图像压缩、低光增强、目标跟踪等多种应用中有效。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏拉普拉斯场结合所提神经网络求解器是一种高效、紧凑的图像表示与重建方案，具备广泛的应用前景。

title: Architecture Matters for Multi-Agent Security
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS), composed of networks of two or more autonomous AI agents, have become increasingly popular in production deployments, yet introduce security risks that do not arise in single-agent settings. Even if individual agents exhibit robust security, architectural decisions governing their coordination can create attack surfaces that have not been systematically characterized. In this work, we present an empirical study of how MAS design decisions shape the tradeoff between task performance and attack resistance. Across three agentic environments (browser, desktop, and code) and 13 architectural configurations, we use stagewise evaluations that distinguish planning refusal, execution-stage interception, partial harmful execution, and successful attack completion to study three key design choices: (i) agent roles, which determine how authority and responsibility are allocated; (ii) communication topology, which shapes how and when agents interact; and (iii) memory, which determines the context and state visibility accessible to each agent. We find that multi-agent architectures are more vulnerable than standalone agents in the majority of configurations, with attack success rates varying by up to 3.8x at comparable or higher benign accuracy, and that no single design is universally safer. These results motivate the development of further evaluations that move beyond the security properties of a single agent.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究，系统分析了多智能体系统（MAS）中三种关键设计选择——智能体角色、通信拓扑和记忆——如何影响任务性能与攻击抵抗性之间的权衡，发现多数配置下MAS比单智能体更脆弱，攻击成功率差异可达3.8倍。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在实际部署中日益普及，但其架构设计引入的安全风险尚未被系统性地表征。现有研究多关注单智能体的安全性，忽略了智能体间协调带来的攻击面。
AI.method: 在浏览器、桌面和代码三种智能体环境中，设置13种架构配置，通过分阶段评估（区分规划拒绝、执行拦截、部分有害执行和成功攻击完成）来研究智能体角色、通信拓扑和记忆三种设计选择对安全性的影响。
AI.result: 多数多智能体架构比单智能体更易受攻击，攻击成功率在相当或更高良性准确率下差异达3.8倍；没有单一设计能普遍更安全。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体系统的安全性不能简单依赖单个智能体的安全属性，需要开发超越单智能体安全性的评估方法。

title: Deep Learning-Enabled Dissolved Oxygen Sensing in Biofouling Environments for Ocean Monitoring
summary: The escalating climate crisis and ecosystem degradation demand intelligent, low-cost sensors capable of robust, long-term monitoring in real-world environments. Absolute dissolved oxygen (DO) concentration is a key parameter for predicting climate tipping points. Inexpensive optoelectronic sensors based on microstructured polymer films doped with phosphorescent dyes could be readily deployable; however, signal drift and marine biofouling remain major challenges. Here, we introduce a sensing paradigm that combines camera-based DO sensors with a visual transformer (ViT)-based physics-informed neural network (PINN) for high-fidelity sensing under biofouling conditions. Training and testing data were obtained from an algae-laden water tank over 14 days to capture accelerated biofouling. The ViT-PINN, which embeds the Stern-Volmer (SV) equation into the loss function, reduces mean average error (MAE) by 92% and 89% compared to classical statistical and ML approaches, achieving ~2 umol/L absolute error. A deep ensemble further quantifies predictive uncertainty, enabling self-diagnostic sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合摄像头溶解氧传感器与视觉Transformer物理信息神经网络（ViT-PINN）的方法，在高生物污损条件下实现高保真度溶解氧浓度测量，相较于传统统计和机器学习方法，MAE降低了92%和89%。
AI.motivation: 气候危机和生态系统退化需要低成本、鲁棒的长期环境监测传感器。溶解氧浓度是预测气候临界点的关键参数，但现有光电器件存在信号漂移和海洋生物污损问题。
AI.method: 结合基于摄像头的溶解氧传感器与视觉Transformer（ViT）物理信息神经网络（PINN），将Stern-Volmer方程嵌入损失函数，并采用深度集成量化预测不确定性。
AI.result: 在为期14天的加速生物污损实验中，ViT-PINN的MAE相较于经典统计和ML方法分别降低92%和89%，绝对误差约为2 umol/L。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能够有效应对生物污损带来的传感器漂移，实现高保真、自诊断的环境传感。

title: Semantic Segmentation for Histopathology using Learned Regularization based on Global Proportions
summary: In pathology, the spatial distribution and proportions of tissue types are key indicators of disease progression, and are more readily available than fine-grained annotations. However, these assessments are rarely mapped to pixel-wise segmentation. The task is fundamentally underdetermined, as many spatially distinct segmentations can satisfy the same global proportions in the absence of pixel-wise constraints. To address this, we introduce Variational Segmentation from Label Proportions (VSLP), a two-stage framework that infers dense segmentations from global label proportions, without any pixel-level annotations. This framework first leverages a pre-trained transformer model with test-time augmentation to produce a pixel-wise confidence estimate. In the second stage, these estimates are fused by solving a variational optimization problem that incorporates a Wasserstein data fidelity term alongside a learned regularizer. Unlike end-to-end networks, our variational method can visualize the fidelity-regularization energy, resulting in more interpretable segmentation. We validate our approach on two public datasets, achieving superior performance over existing weakly supervised and unsupervised methods. For one of these datasets, proportions have been estimated by an experienced pathologist to provide a realistic benchmark to the community. Furthermore, the method scales to an in-house dataset with noisy pathologist labels, severely outperforming state-of-the-art methods, thereby demonstrating practical applicability. The code and data will be made publicly available upon acceptance at https://github.com/xiaoliangpi/VSLP.

AI.tldr: 提出VSLP框架，仅利用全局标签比例（无像素级标注）推断病理图像的密集分割，结合预训练transformer和变分优化方法，在多个数据集上优于现有弱监督和无监督方法。
AI.motivation: 病理学中组织类型的空间分布和比例是疾病进展的关键指标，且比细粒度标注更容易获取。然而这些全局比例信息很少被映射到像素级分割，且任务本质上是欠定的（多种分割方式可满足相同比例）。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1）预训练transformer模型+测试时增强生成像素级置信度估计；2）通过变分优化问题融合这些估计，包含Wasserstein数据保真项和学习的正则化项。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上优于现有弱监督和无监督方法，在含噪声病理学家标注的内部数据集上大幅超过SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: VSLP从全局比例推断密集分割是有效的，变分方法相比端到端网络具有更好的可解释性（可可视化保真度-正则化能量），展示了实际应用潜力。

title: Hardware-Efficient FPGA Implementation of Sigmoid Function Using Mixed-Radix Hyperbolic Rotation CORDIC
comment: This paper has been accepted for the 2026 International Conference on Applied Artificial Intelligence (2AI)
summary:
Efficient hardware implementation of nonlinear activation functions is a crucial task in deploying artificial neural networks on resource-constrained and edge devices such as Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). The sigmoid activation function is widely used for probabilistic output, binary classification, and gating mechanisms in recurrent neural networks, despite its reliance on exponential computations.
  This paper presents a hardware-efficient FPGA implementation of the sigmoid activation function using a mixed-radix CORDIC-based architecture. The proposed approach leverages the mathematical relationship between the sigmoid and hyperbolic tangent functions. The input range is normalized to 1, enabling the corresponding tanh computation to operate within a reduced range of 0.5, which significantly improves convergence behavior.
  To achieve high accuracy with minimal hardware overhead, a modified mixed-radix hyperbolic rotation CORDIC (MR-HRC) algorithm combining radix-2 and radix-4 iterations is introduced. The initial radix-2 stage ensures stable convergence, while the subsequent radix-4 stage accelerates convergence without requiring scale-factor compensation. In the final stage, a radix-2 linear vectoring CORDIC (R2-LVC) is used to compute the hyperbolic tangent by dividing hyperbolic sine and cosine values derived from the MR-HRC algorithm.
  The entire architecture is fully pipelined and implemented on an FPGA. The design is realized on an Xilinx Virtex-7 FPGA using a 16-bit fixed-point representation. Experimental results demonstrate a significant reduction in hardware utilization, requiring only 835 logic slices with zero DSP usage. Additionally, the design achieves a mean absolute error of 4.23 10^-4, outperforming several recent sigmoid implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合基数CORDIC算法的FPGA高效sigmoid激活函数实现，通过将sigmoid转换为tanh计算，结合radix-2和radix-4迭代，在Virtex-7 FPGA上仅使用835个逻辑片且零DSP，实现了4.23×10^-4的均绝对误差。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备（如FPGA）上高效实现非线性激活函数是部署神经网络的关键挑战，而sigmoid函数虽广泛使用但其指数计算对硬件实现不友好。
AI.method: 利用sigmoid与tanh的数学关系进行转换；输入范围归一化到1；提出混合基数MR-HRC算法（radix-2稳定收敛 + radix-4加速收敛，无需缩放因子补偿）+ R2-LVC求tanh；全流水线架构。
AI.result: 在Xilinx Virtex-7 FPGA上仅用835个逻辑片，零DSP使用，均绝对误差4.23×10^-4，优于近期多种sigmoid实现。
AI.conclusion: 所提混合基数CORDIC架构在硬件开销和精度之间取得了良好平衡，适合资源受限设备上的神经网络部署。

title: Probabilistic Graphical Model using Graph Neural Networks for Bayesian Inversion of Discrete Structural Component States
summary: The health condition of components in civil infrastructures can be described by various discrete states according to their performance degradation. Inferring these states from measurable responses is typically an ill-posed inverse problem. Although Bayesian methods are well-suited to tackle such problems, computing the posterior probability density function (PDF) presents challenges. The likelihood function cannot be analytically formulated due to the unclear relationship between discrete states and structural responses, and the high-dimensional state parameters resulting from numerous components severely complicates the computation of the marginal likelihood function. To address these challenges, this study proposes a novel Bayesian inversion paradigm for discrete variables based on Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGMs). The Markov networks are employed as modeling tools, with model parameters learned from data and structural topology prior. It has been proved that inferring this PGM produces the same probabilistic estimation as the posterior PDF derived from Bayesian inference, which effectively solves the above challenges. The inference is accomplished by Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), and a graph property-based GNN training strategy is developed to enable accurate inference across varying graph scales, thereby significantly reducing the computational overhead in high-dimensional problems. Both synthetic and experimental data are used to validate the proposed framework

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率图模型（PGM）和图神经网络（GNN）的贝叶斯反演框架，用于从结构响应中推断土木基础设施组件的离散健康状态，解决了高维离散变量后验概率计算困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 土木基础设施组件的健康状态可用离散变量描述，但从可测响应推断这些状态是一个不适定的逆问题。贝叶斯方法虽适合处理此类问题，但面临两个挑战：离散状态与结构响应关系不明确导致似然函数无法解析表达；高维状态参数使边际似然计算复杂。现有方法难以有效解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出基于概率图模型（马尔可夫网络）的贝叶斯反演范式，模型参数从数据和结构拓扑先验中学习。证明该PGM的推断等价于贝叶斯推断的后验PDF。利用图神经网络（GNN）进行推断，并开发了基于图属性的GNN训练策略，使模型能够跨不同图规模进行准确推断，降低高维问题的计算开销。
AI.result: 通过合成数据和实验数据验证了所提框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于PGM和GNN的贝叶斯反演框架能有效解决离散变量高维后验推断的难题，为土木基础设施健康状态评估提供了新的计算范式。

title: DLM: Unified Decision Language Models for Offline Multi-Agent Sequential Decision Making
summary: Building scalable and reusable multi-agent decision policies from offline datasets remains a challenge in offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), as existing methods often rely on fixed observation formats and action spaces that limit generalization. In contrast, large language models (LLMs) offer a flexible modeling interface that can naturally accommodate heterogeneous observations and actions. Motivated by this, we propose the Decision Language Model (DLM), which formulates multi-agent decision making as a dialogue-style sequence prediction problem under the centralized training with decentralized execution paradigm. DLM is trained in two stages: a supervised fine-tuning phase, which leverages dialogue-style datasets for centralized training with inter-agent context and generates executable actions from offline trajectories, followed by a group relative policy optimization phase to enhance robustness to out-of-distribution actions through lightweight reward functions. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that a unified DLM outperforms strong offline MARL baselines and LLM-based conversational decision-making methods, while demonstrating strong zero-shot generalization to unseen scenarios across tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出决策语言模型(DLM)，将多智能体决策建模为对话式序列预测问题，通过两阶段训练（监督微调+群体相对策略优化）实现统一的多智能体决策策略，在多个基准上表现优于现有方法并展现零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的离线多智能体强化学习方法依赖固定的观察格式和动作空间，限制了对异构观察和动作的泛化能力。大语言模型提供灵活的建模接口，可以自然适应异构数据，因此作者提出利用LLM构建可扩展、可复用的多智能体决策策略。
AI.method: 提出Decision Language Model (DLM)，将多智能体决策建模为对话式序列预测问题。采用两阶段训练：(1) 监督微调阶段，使用对话风格数据集进行集中训练，包含智能体间上下文，从离线轨迹生成可执行动作；(2) 群体相对策略优化阶段，通过轻量奖励函数增强对分布外动作的鲁棒性。采用集中训练分散执行范式。
AI.result: 统一DLM在多个基准上优于强离线MARL基线方法和基于LLM的对话式决策方法，并在未见场景中展现出强大的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM与离线多智能体强化学习结合是有效的，对话式序列预测范式配合两阶段训练能够构建统一、可泛化的多智能体决策策略。

title: Phase-Separated Complex Hilbert PCA on Markerless 3D Pose Estimation Data: A Global Phase Network and Its Extension to a Continuous Field on the Body Surface
comment: 19 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Extended English version of a paper to be submitted to Transactions of the Japanese Society for Artificial Intelligence (JSAI; Special Issue on Emerging Topics in Sports Informatics)
summary: Quantitative analysis of the kinematic chain in sports motion is essential for performance evaluation and injury prevention. Conventional methods such as the kinematic-sequence (KS) and continuous relative phase (CRP) are confined to adjacent joint pairs and lack a unified framework for whole-body coordination, while segmental power-flow analysis requires force plates and inertial parameters that restrict it to laboratory environments. We apply Complex Hilbert Principal Component Analysis (CHPCA) separately to each motion phase (backswing and downswing) on markerless 3D pose estimation data, extracting the dominant whole-body phase pattern as a single complex eigenvector. The pipeline further includes a fully automatic signal-based phase segmentation (no priors on strike count or rest location) and an extension to 1,079 body-surface mesh vertices, so that the kinematic chain is represented as a continuous phase field across the body. On 14 hammer-striking trials of a single subject, the framework reveals (i) a trunk-anchored global phase architecture, (ii) a functional asymmetry between preparation and execution phases quantified by Mode-1 contribution (45.5% vs. 70.5%) and inter-trial Spearman consistency (0.38 vs. 0.58), and (iii) a consistent reorganisation across both skeletal joints and mesh vertices ($p < 10^{-10}$ on 1,079 vertices). As a methodological consistency check, pairwise phase differences from the Mode-1 eigenvector are compared against CRP on all 190 joint pairs by a permutation test ($ρ= 0.473$, $p = 0.0005$). A correspondence analysis between Mode-1 amplitude and kinetic-energy mobilisation variance further shows a strong positive correlation in the downswing ($ρ\approx 0.71$ on both skeleton and mesh) and no correlation in the backswing, indicating that the proposed framework bridges kinematic and kinetic descriptions of coordination through phase structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于复希尔伯特主成分分析（CHPCA）的方法，从无标记3D姿态估计数据中提取运动（锤击）中的全身相位模式，将运动链表示为连续相位场，并在骨骼关节点和体表网格顶点上验证了该方法对运动协调性的量化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统运动链分析方法（如KS、CRP）局限于相邻关节对，缺乏全身协调的统一框架；分段功率流分析依赖力板和惯性参数，限制于实验室环境。因此需要一种能从无标记数据中提取全身运动相位模式的方法。
AI.method: 对每个运动阶段（后摆和下摆）分别应用CHPCA，提取主导全身相位模式（单一复特征向量）；使用全自动信号相位分割（无打击次数或休息位置先验）；扩展到1079个体表网格顶点，将运动链表示为全身连续相位场。
AI.result: 1）发现躯干锚定的全局相位架构；2）准备与执行阶段的功能不对称性（Mode-1贡献45.5% vs 70.5%，Spearman一致性0.38 vs 0.58）；3）骨骼关节与网格顶点间一致的重组（p<10^-10）；4）与CRP的配对比较呈中等相关性（ρ=0.473, p=0.0005）；5）Mode-1振幅与动能变化在下摆阶段强相关（ρ≈0.71），后摆阶段无相关。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过相位结构桥接了运动学与动力学描述，证明了无标记3D姿态数据结合CHPCA可以高效量化全身运动协调性，无需力板等实验室设备。

title: Multi-Plane HyperX: A Low-Latency and Cost-Effective Network for Large-Scale AI and HPC Systems
summary: Multi-plane architectures have become increasingly prevalent in the Fat-Tree networks of AI data centers. By leveraging multiple ports on a single network interface card (NIC) or multiple NICs within a scale-up domain, each port or NIC is allocated to an independent network plane, thereby provisioning the overall system with multiple network planes. However, no prior literature has explored the application of multi-plane technologies to direct networks such as HyperX. This paper investigates the multi-plane HyperX network and demonstrates that, compared to state-of-the-art network topologies like multi-plane Fat-Tree, Dragonfly, and Dragonfly+, the multi-plane HyperX architecture achieves a significantly smaller network diameter and superior cost-effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将多平面技术应用于HyperX直接网络，证明多平面HyperX相比多平面Fat-Tree、Dragonfly等拓扑，具有更小的网络直径和更好的成本效益。
AI.motivation: 多平面架构在AI数据中心的Fat-Tree网络中已广泛应用，但尚未有研究探索将多平面技术应用于HyperX这类直接网络，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 论文设计了多平面HyperX网络架构，并与多平面Fat-Tree、Dragonfly、Dragonfly+等主流拓扑进行对比分析，评估网络直径和成本效益等关键指标。
AI.result: 多平面HyperX架构在网络直径上显著小于当前最先进的多平面Fat-Tree、Dragonfly和Dragonfly+拓扑，同时具有更优的成本效益。
AI.conclusion: 多平面HyperX是一种有潜力的网络拓扑方案，在AI数据中心场景下优于现有的多平面网络架构。

title: EyeBrain: Left and Right Brain Lateralization Activity Classification Through Pupil Diameter and Fixation Duration
summary: The relationship between brain lateralization and cognitive functions is well-documented. The left hemisphere primarily handles tasks such as language and arithmetic, while the right hemisphere is involved in creative activities like drawing and music perception. Eye-tracking technology has shown the potential to reveal cognitive states by measuring ocular metrics such as pupil diameter and fixation duration. However, the ability to distinguish lateralized brain activity using these ocular metrics remains underexplored. Here, we demonstrate that pupil diameter and fixation duration can effectively classify left and right brain hemisphere activities. We obtained a considerably high classification performance, with an F1 score of 0.894. The results suggest that ocular metrics are robust indicators of lateralized brain activity and can be applied in cognitive monitoring and neurorehabilitation. Our future work expands on this by integrating these methods into real-time applications EyeBrain, potentially broadening their use across various cognitive and neurological domains.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了能否通过眼动追踪指标（如瞳孔直径和注视时长）来区分大脑左右半球的活动，实验取得了较高的分类性能（F1=0.894）。
AI.motivation: 虽然已知大脑左右半球功能不同（左脑负责语言和算术，右脑负责创造活动），眼动追踪也能反映认知状态，但利用眼动指标区分左右脑活动的潜力尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 通过测量瞳孔直径和注视时长等眼动指标，使用机器学习方法对左右脑半球活动进行分类。
AI.result: 分类性能良好，F1分数达到0.894。
AI.conclusion: 眼动指标是大脑侧化活动的可靠指示器，可用于认知监测和神经康复，未来将集成到实时应用EyeBrain中。

title: Geometric Analysis of Self-Supervised Vision Representations for Semantic Image Retrieval
summary:
Content-based image retrieval (CBIR) systems enable users to search images based on visual content instead of relying on metadata. The text domain has benefited from vector search of representations created with unsupervised methods such as BERT. However, modern self-supervised learning methods for vision are mostly not reported in CBIR-related literature, instead relying on supervised models or multi-modal methods that align text and vision.
  We evaluate how the representations learned by modern self-supervised learning methods for vision perform under typical retrieval stacks that leverage vector databases and nearest neighbor search. Our evaluation reveals that the latent space geometry impacts approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) indexing. Specifically, highly anisotropic representations with high skewness produced by several modern SSL methods degrade the performance of partition-based and hashing-based search, even if their own linear probe or K-NN accuracy is not affected. In contrast, representations with higher isotropy and local purity better satisfy the distance-based assumptions of ANN indexes, leading to improved semantic retrieval performance.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了现代自监督学习方法（SSL）在视觉领域的表示对基于向量数据库和近似最近邻（ANN）索引的内容图像检索（CBIR）系统性能的影响。研究发现，SSL表示的各向异性（高偏度）会降低分区和哈希类ANN索引的性能，而更具各向同性和局部纯度的表示则能更好地满足ANN索引的假设，提升语义检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有CBIR系统多依赖有监督模型或多模态方法，现代自监督视觉学习方法在CBIR中的应用尚未被充分研究。作者希望评估这些SSL表示在典型检索栈（向量数据库+最近邻搜索）下的实际表现。
AI.method: 作者选取多种现代自监督视觉学习方法，提取图像表示，在标准检索框架下（使用向量数据库和ANN索引）进行实验，分析表示的各向异性、偏度、局部纯度等几何特性与检索性能之间的关系。
AI.result: 高各向异性（高偏度）的SSL表示会显著降低分区和哈希类ANN索引的检索性能；而各向同性高、局部纯度高的表示能更好地适应ANN索引的距离假设，实现更优的语义检索效果。
AI.conclusion: SSL视觉表示的潜在空间几何特性对CBIR系统的ANN索引性能有重要影响。研究者需要关注表示的各向同性和局部纯度，而非仅关注线性探测或K-NN准确率，以提升实际检索系统的效率。

title: CyberCane: Neuro-Symbolic RAG for Privacy-Preserving Phishing Detection with Formal Ontology Reasoning
summary: Privacy-critical domains require phishing detection systems that satisfy contradictory constraints: near-zero false positives to prevent workflow disruption, transparent explanations for non-expert staff, strict regulatory compliance prohibiting sensitive data exposure to external APIs, and robustness against AI-generated attacks. Existing rule-based systems are brittle to novel campaigns, while LLM-based detectors violate privacy regulations through unredacted data transmission. We introduce CyberCane, a neuro-symbolic framework integrating deterministic symbolic analysis with privacy-preserving retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Our dual-phase pipeline applies lightweight symbolic rules to email metadata, then escalates borderline cases to semantic classification via RAG with automated sensitive data redaction and retrieval from a phishing-only corpus. We further introduce PhishOnt, an OWL ontology enabling verifiable attack classification through formal reasoning chains. Evaluation on DataPhish2025 (12.3k emails; mixed human/LLM) and Nazario/SpamAssassin demonstrates a 78.6-point recall gain over symbolic-only detection on AI-generated threats, with precision exceeding 98% and FPR as low as 0.16%. Healthcare deployment projects a 542x ROI; tunable operating points support diverse risk tolerances, with open-source implementation at https://github.com/sbhakim/Cybercane.

AI.tldr: CyberCane是一个神经符号框架，结合确定性符号分析和隐私保护RAG，用于钓鱼检测。它先用轻量级符号规则处理邮件元数据，再将边界案例升级到语义分类（带自动敏感数据脱敏）。引入PhishOnt本体实现可验证攻击分类。在DataPhish2025等数据集上，对AI生成威胁的召回率比纯符号方法提升78.6个百分点，精确率超98%，FPR低至0.16%。
AI.motivation: 隐私关键领域需要满足矛盾约束的钓鱼检测系统：接近零的假阳性、可解释性、严格法规合规（禁止敏感数据暴露给外部API）、以及对AI生成攻击的鲁棒性。现有基于规则的系统对新型攻击脆弱，而LLM检测器通过未脱敏数据传输违反隐私法规。
AI.method: 双阶段流水线：1) 轻量级符号规则分析邮件元数据；2) 边界案例升级到语义分类，使用RAG进行自动敏感数据脱敏并从仅含钓鱼语料库检索。引入基于OWL本体的PhishOnt实现形式化推理链的可验证攻击分类。
AI.result: 在DataPhish2025（12.3k邮件，混合人类/LLM生成）和Nazario/SpamAssassin数据集上，对AI生成威胁召回率提升78.6个百分点，精确率超98%，FPR低至0.16%。医疗部署预计ROI为542倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经符号框架有效平衡了隐私合规与检测能力，可调操作点支持不同风险容忍度，开源实现便于采用。

title: High-dimensional Semi-supervised Classification via the Fermat Distance
summary: Semi-supervised classification, where unlabeled data are massive but labeled data are limited, often arises in machine learning applications. We address this challenge under high-dimensional data by leveraging the manifold and cluster assumptions. Based on the Fermat distance, a density-sensitive metric that naturally encodes the cluster assumption, we propose the weighted $k$-nearest neighbors (NN) classifier and multidimensional scaling (MDS)-induced classifiers. The use of MDS with a large target dimension allows the effective application of linear classifiers to complex manifold data. Theoretically, we derive a sharp lower bound for the expected excess risk within clusters and prove that the weighted $k$-NN classifier utilizing the true Fermat distance is minimax optimal. Furthermore, we explicitly quantify the utility of unlabeled data by showing that the error arising from estimating the Fermat distance decays exponentially with the pooled sample size. Such a rate is much faster than the related rates in the literature. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate competitive or superior performance of our approaches compared to state-of-the-art graph-based semi-supervised classifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Fermat距离的加权k近邻和MDS诱导分类器，用于高维半监督学习，理论证明了其最优性，且无标签数据对距离估计的误差随总样本量指数衰减。
AI.motivation: 解决高维数据下半监督分类问题，即标签数据有限而大量无标签数据可用的情况。
AI.method: 利用Fermat距离（一种密度敏感度量）设计加权k-NN分类器和基于多维缩放（MDS）的线性分类器。
AI.result: 理论证明了加权k-NN分类器在真实Fermat距离下是极小化最优的，且距离估计误差随总样本量指数衰减；实验性能优越。
AI.conclusion: Fermat距离能有效编码聚类假设，在半监督学习中充分利用无标签数据提升分类性能。

title: PhysCodeBench: Benchmarking Physics-Aware Symbolic Simulation of 3D Scenes via Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement
summary: Physics-aware symbolic simulation of 3D scenes is critical for robotics, embodied AI, and scientific computing, requiring models to understand natural language descriptions of physical phenomena and translate them into executable simulation environments. While large language models (LLMs) excel at general code generation, they struggle with the semantic gap between physical descriptions and simulation implementation. We introduce PhysCodeBench, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating physics-aware symbolic simulation, comprising 700 manually-crafted diverse samples across mechanics, fluid dynamics, and soft-body physics with expert annotations. Our evaluation framework measures both code executability and physical accuracy through automated and visual assessment. Building on this, we propose a Self-Corrective Multi-Agent Refinement Framework (SMRF) with three specialized agents (simulation generator, error corrector, and simulation refiner) that collaborate iteratively with domain-specific validation to produce physically accurate simulations. SMRF achieves 67.7 points overall performance compared to 36.3 points for the best baseline among evaluated SOTA models, representing a 31.4-point improvement. Our analysis demonstrates that error correction is critical for accurate physics-aware symbolic simulation and that specialized multi-agent approaches significantly outperform single-agent methods across the tested physical domains.

AI.tldr: 提出PhysCodeBench基准测试（700个物理场景样本）和SMRF多智能体框架（三个专业智能体协作迭代），在物理感知符号模拟任务上比最佳基线提升31.4个百分点。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在通用代码生成上表现优异，但难以弥合物理描述与仿真实现之间的语义鸿沟，缺乏专门评估物理感知符号模拟能力的基准和方法。
AI.method: 构建PhysCodeBench（700样本，涵盖力学/流体/软体物理）；提出SMRF框架（模拟生成器+错误修正器+模拟精炼器三个智能体，结合领域特定验证进行迭代协作）。
AI.result: SMRF总体得分67.7分，最佳基线仅36.3分，提升31.4个百分点；错误修正对物理感知符号模拟至关重要；多智能体方法显著优于单智能体。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体协作与领域验证迭代能有效弥合物理描述与仿真实现的语义鸿沟，为物理感知代码生成提供了新范式。

title: Partition-of-Unity Gaussian Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
summary:
Gaussian basis functions provide an efficient and flexible alternative to spline activations in KANs. In this work, we introduce the partition-of-unity Gaussian KAN (PU-GKAN), a Shepard-type normalized Gaussian KAN in which the Gaussian basis values on each edge are divided by their local sum over fixed centers. This produces a partition-of-unity feature map with trainable coefficients, while preserving the standard edge-based KAN structure. The normalized construction gives exact constant reproduction at the edge level and admits an explicit finite-feature kernel interpretation.
  We formulate both the standard Gaussian KAN (GKAN) and PU-GKAN from a finite-feature and additive-kernel viewpoint, making the induced layer kernels and empirical feature matrices explicit. Using the first-layer feature matrix as the reference object, we adopt a practical scale-selection interval for \(ε\), with the lower endpoint determined by adjacent-center overlap and the upper endpoint determined by a conservative conditioning threshold. Numerical experiments show that PU-GKAN reduces sensitivity to \(ε\), improves validation accuracy for most smooth and moderately non-smooth targets, and gives more stable training behavior. The benefit persists across sample-size and center-number sweeps, higher-dimensional architectures, Matérn RBF bases, and physics-informed examples involving Helmholtz and wave equations. These results indicate that Shepard-type partition-of-unity normalization is a simple and effective stabilization mechanism for RBF-based KANs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PU-GKAN，一种Shepard型归一化高斯KAN，通过分区统一归一化来稳定基于RBF的KAN训练，降低对尺度参数ε的敏感性，提升验证精度和训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 标准高斯KAN对尺度参数ε敏感，训练不稳定。作者希望通过Shepard型归一化（分区统一）机制来稳定RBF基的KAN，减少超参数调优难度。
AI.method: 在每条边上使用高斯基函数，然后通过局部中心求和进行归一化（partition-of-unity），形成归一化特征映射并保留可训练系数。从有限特征和加性核视角重新推导了GKAN和PU-GKAN，并给出了实用的ε选择区间。
AI.result: PU-GKAN降低了ε敏感性，在光滑和中等非光滑目标上提升验证精度，训练更稳定。优势在样本量、中心数扫掠、高维架构、Matérn RBF基以及Helmholtz/波动方程的物理信息示例中均保持。
AI.conclusion: Shepard型分区统一归一化是一种简单有效的RBF基KAN稳定机制。

title: TimingLLM: A Two-Stage Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Pre-Synthesis Timing Prediction from Verilog
summary: Early, tool-free prediction of post-synthesis timing remains a key obstacle to rapid RTL iteration. We introduce TimingLLM, a two-stage retrieval-augmented LLM pipeline that estimates worst negative slack (WNS) and total negative slack (TNS) directly from Verilog. Stage 1 is a fine-tuned LLM that acts as a compact post-synthesis timing oracle, producing path-level arrivals/required times that are summarized into lightweight structural-timing cues (e.g., bag-of-gates counts, critical-path depth, gate-type patterns). Stage 2 is an LLM-based regressor that predicts WNS/TNS and applies a learned diagonal steering vector at the last transformer block, computed from the k nearest timing-labeled modules in a disjoint retrieval bank. On VerilogEval, TimingLLM attains R_WNS = 0.91 (MAPE 12%) and R_TNS=0.97 (MAPE 16%) while running 1.3-1.6 times faster than prior methods. Training uses a new 60k-module Verilog corpus with synthesis reports, which we will release. After training once, TimingLLM can be adapted to new technology libraries and PVT corners by refitting only a small regression head on 1000 labeled modules per setting, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出TimingLLM，一个两阶段检索增强LLM流水线，直接从Verilog代码预测综合后的时序指标（WNS/TNS），无需运行综合工具，速度比传统方法快1.3-1.6倍，在VerilogEval上达到高精度。
AI.motivation: RTL设计迭代中，综合后时序预测依赖完整综合流程，耗时严重。现有工具级预测方法速度慢，阻碍快速设计空间探索。作者希望用LLM直接从Verilog代码推断时序，避免运行综合工具。
AI.method: 两阶段流水线：Stage 1用微调LLM作为"综合时序预言机"，从Verilog生成路径级到达时间/需求时间，再汇总为轻量结构时序特征（门级计数、关键路径深度等）；Stage 2用LLM回归器预测WNS/TNS，在最后一个Transformer块引入从k近邻检索模块计算的对角转向向量（diagonal steering vector）。
AI.result: 在VerilogEval上，WNS预测R²=0.91（MAPE 12%），TNS预测R²=0.97（MAPE 16%），运行速度比现有方法快1.3-1.6倍。仅需1000个新标注模块的回归头微调即可适应新工艺库/PVT角。
AI.conclusion: LLM可以作为一种高效、可迁移的综合时序预测工具，极大加速RTL设计迭代。同时开源了一个60k模块的Verilog语料库及综合报告。

title: From Rights to Rites: Expectations Management in Smart-Home AI
comment: Accepted as a main track conference paper at 2026 HCI International (HCII), Montreal, Canada
summary: Domestic voice assistants and smart-home devices are increasingly embedded in everyday routines, yet their ethics are often treated as an afterthought or delegated to compliance teams. To explore how expectations about smart-home AI are constructed and managed, we conducted 33 semi-structured interviews with designers, developers, and researchers from major smart-home platforms (Amazon Alexa, Microsoft Azure IoT, and Google Nest). Using a constructivist grounded theory approach, we develop Expectations Management (EM): a culturally embedded model describing how practitioners shape, calibrate, and repair expectations by balancing organisational rights with culturally situated rites. We show that EM differs from expectation-confirmation theory and trust-calibration by foregrounding moral judgement, situated action, and cross-cultural variation. Our analysis reveals four recurring design tensions: automation vs. autonomy, helpfulness vs. intrusiveness, personalisation vs. predictability, and transparency vs. obscurity and distils them into a five-phase EM Design Playbook that supports moral prudence. We discuss implications for responsible smart-home design and offer guidance for human-centred AI.

AI.tldr: 通过对亚马逊Alexa、微软Azure IoT和谷歌Nest三大智能家居平台的33名设计师、开发者和研究人员的半结构化访谈，采用建构主义扎根理论，提出了期望管理（EM）模型——一种描述从业者如何通过平衡组织权利与文化仪式来塑造、校准和修复用户期望的文化嵌入框架，并提炼出自动化vs自主性等四大设计张力及五阶段EM设计手册。
AI.motivation: 智能家居语音助手的伦理问题常被忽视或交给合规团队处理，缺乏对从业者如何构建和管理用户期望的系统性理解。
AI.method: 采用建构主义扎根理论方法，对33名来自三大智能家居平台的从业者进行半结构化访谈，通过编码和理论构建提出期望管理模型。
AI.result: 提出期望管理（EM）模型，揭示其与期望确认理论和信任校准模型的区别；识别出自动化vs自主性、帮助vs侵入、个性化vs可预测性、透明vs模糊四大设计张力；开发了五阶段EM设计手册。
AI.conclusion: 期望管理应作为负责任智能家居设计的核心框架，需要考虑文化差异和道德判断，支持从业者进行道德审慎的设计决策。

title: Characterizations of Admissible Objective Functions for Hierarchical Clustering
summary: Hierarchical clustering is a fundamental task in data analysis, yet for a long time it lacked a principled objective function. Dasgupta [STOC 2016] initiated a formal framework by introducing a discrete objective function for cluster trees. This framework was subsequently expanded by Cohen-Addad et al. [J. ACM 2019], who introduced the notion of admissibility -- a criterion ensuring that, whenever the input similarities admit consistent hierarchical representations, the minimizers of an objective function recover them. They also provided a necessary and sufficient condition for admissibility within a broad class of objective functions, which we refer to as sum-type objective functions. Our contributions are twofold. First, we characterize admissible sum-type objective functions when the scaling function g is a symmetric polynomial of degree at most two, together with sufficient conditions in the degree-three case. For admissible objective functions in this class, we show that the recursive sparsest cut algorithm achieves an O($φ$)-approximation ratio, where $φ$ denotes the approximation factor of the sparsest cut subroutine. Second, we introduce a new class of objective functions for hierarchical clustering, which we term max-type objective functions, where cluster interactions are measured by maximum rather than aggregate similarity. For this class, we establish a general characterization of admissibility for arbitrary scaling functions g, and a complete characterization when g is a symmetric polynomial of degree at most two. These results provide new theoretical insights into admissible objective functions for hierarchical clustering and clarify the scope of algorithmic guarantees for optimizing them.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了层次聚类的可容许目标函数，主要贡献包括：(1) 在对称多项式度数≤2时完全刻画了求和型可容许目标函数，并给出了度数=3时的充分条件；(2) 提出了新的最大型目标函数族，并建立了其可容许性的通用刻画。
AI.motivation: 层次聚类长期以来缺乏有原则的目标函数，Dasgupta等人引入了形式化框架和可容许性概念，但现有理论尚不完整。本文旨在进一步刻画求和型可容许目标函数并探索新的目标函数类别。
AI.method: 基于对称多项式度数≤2的求和型函数进行可容许性特征刻画，并提出了最大型(max-type)目标函数族，推导其可容许性的充要条件。
AI.result: (1) 给出了对称多项式度数≤2时求和型可容许目标函数的完全刻画及度数=3时的充分条件；(2) 建立了最大型目标函数的可容许性通用刻画，以及对称多项式度数≤2时的完全刻画。
AI.conclusion: 为层次聚类的可容许目标函数提供了新的理论洞见，并阐明了优化这些函数的算法保证范围。

title: Hardware-Efficient Softmax and Layer Normalization with Guaranteed Normalization for Edge Devices
comment: Accepted by 2026 IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS)
summary: In Transformer models, non-GEMM (non-General Matrix Multiplication) operations -- especially Softmax and Layer Normalization (LayerNorm) -- often dominate hardware cost due to their nonlinear nature. To address this, previous approximation studies mainly target rank-oriented tasks, which is acceptable for classification. However, edge Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications and edge generative AI are largely evaluated based on score-oriented tasks, so normalization-guaranteed non-GEMM operations are essential. We propose a hardware-efficient Softmax and LayerNorm with Guaranteed Normalization for Edge devices. Our design employs hardware-efficient approximation methods while preserving the normalization (Softmax: $\sum p = 1$, LayerNorm: $σ= 1$). Our architecture is described in Verilog HDL and synthesized using the Samsung 28nm CMOS process. In accuracy evaluation, we achieve high accuracy with minimal degradation: GLUE +0.07%, SQuAD -0.01%, perplexity -0.09%. Implementation results show that our architecture is small: $942\,μm^2$ for Softmax, $1199\,μm^2$ for LayerNorm. Compared to the state of the art, we achieve up to 11x and 14x reduction in area, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Transformer中的非GEMM操作（Softmax和LayerNorm）在边缘设备上的硬件实现，提出了一种保证归一化特性的高效近似架构，在Samsung 28nm工艺下实现极小面积（Softmax 942μm², LayerNorm 1199μm²），相比现有工作面积减少最高11-14倍，且在GLUE、SQuAD等任务上几乎无损。
AI.motivation: Transformer中的Softmax和LayerNorm等非线性操作在边缘设备上硬件开销大，现有近似方法面向分类任务（rank-oriented）可接受，但边缘NLP和生成式AI需要评分任务（score-oriented），对归一化保证要求高，因此需要兼顾硬件效率与归一化保证的设计。
AI.method: 提出硬件高效的Softmax和LayerNorm近似方法，在保证归一化性质（Softmax:∑p=1, LayerNorm:σ=1）的前提下，采用适合硬件实现的近似算法；用Verilog HDL描述并在Samsung 28nm CMOS工艺上综合实现。
AI.result: GLUE +0.07%, SQuAD -0.01%, 困惑度 -0.09%，精度几乎无损；Softmax面积942μm²，LayerNorm面积1199μm²；相比SOTA面积减少最高11倍（Softmax）和14倍（LayerNorm）。
AI.conclusion: 提出的归一化保证的近似Softmax和LayerNorm架构在边缘设备上实现了极小的硬件面积和极高的精度保持，适合资源受限的边缘NLP和生成式AI部署。

title: FlowPlace: Flow Matching for Chip Placement
summary: Chip placement plays an important role in physical design. While generative models like diffusion models offer promising learning-based solutions, current methods have the following limitations: they use random synthetic data for pre-training, require long sampling times, and often result in overlaps due to their dependence on gradient-based solvers during the sampling process. To overcome these issues, we propose FlowPlace, which features mask-guided synthetic data generation, flow-based efficient training with flexible prior injection, and hard constraint sampling for overlap-free layouts. Experiments on OpenROAD and ICCAD 2015 benchmarks show FlowPlace achieves better PPA metrics, 10-50$\times$ faster sampling efficiency, and zero overlaps.

AI.tldr: FlowPlace: 基于流匹配的芯片布局方法，通过掩码引导合成数据生成、流模型高效训练（灵活先验注入）和硬约束采样，实现零重叠、10-50倍更快的采样速度，并在PPA指标上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有芯片布局的生成模型（如扩散模型）存在三个问题：1) 使用随机合成数据预训练；2) 采样时间长；3) 依赖梯度求解器导致布局重叠。FlowPlace旨在解决这些局限性。
AI.method: 1) 掩码引导的合成数据生成；2) 基于流匹配（flow-based）的高效训练，支持灵活的先验注入；3) 硬约束采样策略，确保布局无重叠。
AI.result: 在OpenROAD和ICCAD 2015基准上，FlowPlace在PPA（功耗、性能、面积）指标上更好，采样效率提升10-50倍，且实现零重叠。
AI.conclusion: FlowPlace通过流模型替代扩散模型，有效解决了芯片布局生成中的采样慢和重叠问题，展示了流模型在物理设计中的潜力。

title: An AI-Based Supervisory Measurement Integrity Validation Layer for Cyber-Resilient AC/DC Protection in Inverter-Based Microgrids
summary: Line current differential relays (LCDRs) are measurement-driven relays that rely on time-synchronized multi-phase current waveforms to infer internal faults in AC and DC power networks. In inverter-based microgrids, however, the increasing reliance on digitally communicated measurements exposes LCDRs to false-data injection attacks (FDIAs), in which adversaries manipulate remote measurement streams to create protection-triggering yet physically inconsistent current trajectories. This paper addresses this emerging measurement integrity problem by introducing a measurement integrity validation scheme that operates as a supervisory instrumentation layer for modern LCDRs. The proposed scheme interprets short windows of synchronized instantaneous current measurements recorded during relay operation and assesses their physical consistency to distinguish genuine fault-induced trajectories from cyber-manipulated measurement streams. A recurrent neural network is trained offline using only relay-available current measurements and exploits the temporal structure of differential current waveforms, which remains informative in inverter-dominated systems where current magnitude is no longer a reliable observable. The method requires no additional sensors, auxiliary protection elements, or prior knowledge of network topology, and is applicable to both AC and DC LCDRs without structural modification. The proposed measurement validation scheme is evaluated on an islanded inverter-based microgrid under a comprehensive set of fault and FDIA scenarios, demonstrating high detection accuracy while preserving relay dependability. Hardware-in-the-loop validation using an OPAL-RT real-time simulator confirms that the scheme satisfies protection timing constraints and can operate in real time under realistic operating conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于递归神经网络的测量完整性验证方案，作为现代线路电流差动继电器的监督仪表层，通过分析短时间窗口的瞬时电流测量值来区分真实故障与虚假数据注入攻击，适用于交直流逆变器主导的微电网。
AI.motivation: 逆变器主导的微电网中，线路电流差动继电器依赖数字化通信测量，容易遭受虚假数据注入攻击（FDIAs），攻击者可操控远程测量流制造物理不一致的电流轨迹，引发保护误动。现有方法难以有效区分真实故障与网络攻击，亟需一种无需额外传感器、不依赖网络拓扑先验知识的测量完整性验证方案。
AI.method: 该方法作为一个监督仪表层，利用继电器在操作期间记录的短窗口同步瞬时电流测量值，通过离线训练的递归神经网络（RNN）分析差动电流波形的时间结构，评估测量值的物理一致性。该方法仅使用继电器可获取的电流测量值，无需额外传感器、辅助保护元件或网络拓扑先验知识，适用于交直流线路电流差动继电器。
AI.result: 在孤岛逆变器微电网的全面故障和FDIA场景下评估，该方法实现了高检测精度，同时保持了继电器的可靠性。基于OPAL-RT实时仿真器的硬件在环验证确认该方案满足保护时序约束，能在实际运行条件下实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 提出的测量完整性验证方案能有效检测针对线路电流差动继电器的虚假数据注入攻击，适用于逆变器主导的交直流微电网，且满足实时保护时序要求。

title: Beyond coauthorship: semantic structure and phantom collaborators in transportation research, 1967--2025
summary: We present a semantic-structural atlas of transportation research built from 120{,}323 papers across 34 peer-reviewed journals published between 1967 and 2025, roughly an order of magnitude larger than and a decade beyond Sun and Rahwan's~(2017) coauthorship study. We use OpenAlex and Crossref as open, CC0-licensed data sources, resolve author identity through OpenAlex author IDs, ORCID records, and manual alias resolution, and embed every paper with SPECTER2 with Arora-style whitening concatenated with concept TF--IDF and venue linear-discriminant projections. On this substrate we report three findings. First, Leiden on the author-level semantic k-nearest-neighbor graph yields 23 topic communities that agree only weakly with the 172 coauthor communities (normalized mutual information $0.23$), opening room for a predictive layer that neither source encodes alone. Second, a multiplex Leiden partition combining both edge types recovers 181 communities and localizes where collaboration and topic structure decouple. Third -- the paper's core methodological contribution -- we define \emph{phantom collaborators}, pairs of authors who are top-$K$ semantic neighbors yet $\geq 3$ hops apart in the coauthor graph, and show via a temporal hold-out (training cutoff 2019) that phantom pairs become real coauthors in 2020--2025 at a rate $16$ to $33$ times above random, popularity-weighted, and same-venue baselines, with a $68$-fold monotone gradient between the highest- and lowest-similarity buckets. All artifacts are released as a live, reproducible web atlas at https://choi-seongjin.github.io/transport-atlas/.

AI.tldr: 本文基于约12万篇交通研究论文，构建了语义-结构双重图谱，利用SPECTER2嵌入和Leiden聚类识别出23个语义主题社区和181个多路复用社区，并提出“幽灵合作者”概念——即语义相似但合作图上距离≥3跳的作者对——其在未来成为真实合作者的概率是基线的16-33倍。
AI.motivation: 现有交通研究领域文献计量分析多聚焦于单一维度（如合著关系），缺乏将语义内容与合作结构结合的系统性研究，且数据规模有限、时效性不足。作者希望构建大规模、开放、可复现的交通研究图谱，并探索语义相似性与合作关系之间的预测关联。
AI.method: 使用OpenAlex和Crossref获取约12万篇论文，通过SPECTER2嵌入+ARoW whiten+概念TF-IDF+期刊线性判别投影构建论文表示；在作者级别构建语义k近邻图和合著图；采用Leiden算法进行单层和多层（多路复用）社区检测；定义“幽灵合作者”并基于时间划分（训练截断2019）验证其未来成为真实合作者的概率。
AI.result: 语义社区（23个）与合著社区（172个）的归一化互信息仅0.23，表明二者高度不一致；多路复用社区检测得到181个社区；幽灵合作者在2020-2025年内成为真实合作者的概率是随机、流行度加权和同期刊基线的16-33倍，且语义相似度越高，合作发生率呈68倍单调梯度递增。
AI.conclusion: 语义相似性与合作结构在交通研究领域存在显著解耦，但语义上的紧密联系可以有效预测未来合作关系，为学术合作推荐和学科交叉发现提供了可操作的方法论工具。

title: Talking Slide Avatars: Open-Source Multimodal Communication Approach for Teaching
summary: Slide-based teaching is widely used in higher education, yet in online, hybrid, and asynchronous contexts, slides often lose the instructor presence, narrative continuity, and expressive framing that help learners connect with content. Full lecture video can partly restore these qualities, but it is time-consuming to record, revise, and reuse. This study addresses that pedagogical and production challenge by presenting a practice-based analysis of an open-source workflow for creating talking slide avatars for slide-based teaching. The workflow integrates OpenVoice for text-to-speech generation and voice cloning with Ditto-TalkingHead for audio-driven talking-image synthesis, enabling instructors to transform a script and a static portrait into a short narrated video that can be embedded in slide decks or HTML-based lecture materials. Rather than treating this workflow merely as a technical solution, the study frames talking slide avatars as multimodal communication artifacts at the intersection of digital pedagogy, aesthetic education, and art-technology practice. Using a practice-based implementation and analytic reflection approach, the study documents the production pipeline, examines its communicative and aesthetic affordances, and proposes practical guidelines for script length, image selection, pacing, disclosure, accessibility, and ethical use. The study makes three primary contributions: it presents an educator-oriented open-source production model, reframes talking avatars as an educational communication design problem, and proposes a responsible pathway for incorporating generative synthetic media into teaching. It concludes that short, transparent, and carefully designed avatars can humanize slide-based instruction while providing a reusable communicative layer for introductions, transitions, reminders, and recaps across online, hybrid, and asynchronous learning environments.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个开源工作流，通过整合OpenVoice（语音合成与克隆）和Ditto-TalkingHead（音频驱动说话头像合成），将静态肖像和脚本转化为嵌入幻灯片的教学短视频。研究从教育传播、审美实践和伦理角度分析了这一"会说话的幻灯片头像"的生产流程，并提出了设计指南。
AI.motivation: 在线、混合和非同步教学场景中，幻灯片教学缺乏教师在场感、叙事连贯性和表达性框架。完整的授课视频录制耗时且难以修改复用。因此需要一种低成本的、可复用的方式来为幻灯片注入教师临场感和叙事连续性。
